papers.title: Who Will Fill China's Shoes? The Global Evolution of Labor-Intensive Manufacturing
papers.authors: Gordon H. Hanson
papers.abstract: In this paper, I review evidence on changing global specialization in labor-intensive exporting. Production of apparel, footwear, furniture, and related products are how many low-income countries first enter export manufacturing. Just as China's rise as a powerhouse in these goods supplanted a role previously occupied by the East Asian Tigers, the world may again be on the cusp of significant change in where labor-intensive goods are produced. China's prowess in these sectors peaked in the early 2010s; its share in their global exports, while still substantial, is now in decline. Mechanisms through which the global economy may adjust to China's graduation into more technologically sophisticated activities include expanded labor-intensive export production in other emerging economies and labor-saving technological change in products currently heavily reliant on less-educated labor. Available evidence suggests that the first mechanism is operating slowly and the second hardly at all. As a third mechanism, China may in part replace itself by moving labor-heavy factories out of densely populated and expensive coastal cities and into the country's interior. Such a transition, though still in its infancy, would mirror the decentralization of manufacturing production in the U.S. and Europe, which occurred after World War II.
papers.zh_title: 谁将接替中国的位置？劳动密集型制造业的全球演变
papers.zh_abstract: 本文回顾了全球劳动密集型出口专业化变化的证据。服装、鞋类、家具及相关产品的生产是许多低收入国家首次进入出口制造业的途径。正如中国在这些商品领域的崛起取代了此前由东亚四小龙占据的角色一样，世界可能再次处于劳动密集型产品生产地重大变革的前沿。中国在这些领域的实力在2010年代初达到顶峰；其在这些产品全球出口中的份额虽然仍然可观，但目前已呈下降趋势。全球经济可能通过两种机制适应中国向更技术密集型活动的升级：其他新兴经济体扩大劳动密集型出口生产，以及当前严重依赖低教育水平劳动力的产品领域发生节约劳动的技术变革。现有证据表明，第一种机制进展缓慢，第二种机制几乎未发挥作用。作为第三种机制，中国可能部分通过将劳动密集型工厂从人口密集且昂贵的沿海城市迁往内陆地区来实现自我替代。这种转型虽仍处于初期阶段，但将反映二战后美国和欧洲制造业生产分散化的趋势。

papers.title: A Grant to Every Citizen: Survey Evidence of the Impact of a Direct Government Payment in Israel
papers.authors: Naomi Feldman, Ori Heffetz
papers.abstract: In early August, 2020, during the COVID-19 pandemic, Israel disbursed one-time, universal grants to its citizens, of $220 per adult and $150 per child. Using survey data, we estimate that 25–45 percent either had already mostly spent or were planning to spend the money by year’s end and 36–52 percent mostly paid down debts. Interestingly, about as many people reported mostly donating the grant or using it to help family or friends as reported saving it (10–18 percent), with donations mostly originating from higher-income respondents. This voluntary rerouting of governmental assistance may help alleviate the trade-off between targeting and simplicity/speed of disbursement.
papers.meta: Programs：PE；JEL：D14, D91, E21, E62, E65, H24, H31
papers.zh_title: 给每位公民的补助：以色列直接政府支付影响的调查证据
papers.zh_abstract: 2020年8月初，在新冠疫情期间，以色列向其公民发放了一次性全民补助，每位成人220美元，每位儿童150美元。利用调查数据，我们估计25%至45%的人要么已经基本花完，要么计划在年底前花掉这笔钱；36%至52%的人主要用于偿还债务。有趣的是，报告主要将补助用于捐赠或帮助家人朋友的人数与报告储蓄的人数大致相当（10%至18%），其中捐赠主要来自高收入受访者。这种对政府援助的自愿转拨可能有助于缓解精准发放与发放简便/快速之间的权衡。

papers.title: Trauma at School: The Impacts of Shootings on Students' Human Capital and Economic Outcomes
papers.authors: Marika Cabral, Bokyung Kim, Maya Rossin-Slater, Molly Schnell, Hannes Schwandt
papers.abstract: We examine how shootings at schools—an increasingly common form of gun violence in the United States—impact the educational and economic trajectories of students. Using linked schooling and labor market data in Texas from 1992 to 2018, we compare within-student and across-cohort changes in outcomes following a shooting to those experienced by students at matched control schools. We find that school shootings increase absenteeism and grade repetition; reduce high school graduation, college enrollment, and college completion; and reduce employment and earnings at ages 24–26. We further find school-level increases in the number of leadership staff and reductions in retention among teachers and teaching support staff in the years following a shooting. The adverse impacts of shootings span student characteristics, suggesting that the economic costs of school shootings are universal.
papers.zh_title: 校园创伤：枪击事件对学生人力资本和经济结果的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了校园枪击事件——美国日益常见的一种枪支暴力形式——如何影响学生的教育和经济轨迹。利用1992年至2018年德克萨斯州的关联学校与劳动力市场数据，我们比较了枪击事件后学生个体内部及不同队列之间的结果变化，与匹配控制学校学生的经历进行对比。我们发现，校园枪击事件增加了缺勤率和留级率；降低了高中毕业率、大学入学率和大学完成率；并降低了24至26岁年龄段的就业率和收入。我们还发现，在枪击事件后的几年里，学校层面的领导人员数量增加，而教师和教学支持人员的留任率下降。枪击事件的不利影响跨越了学生特征，表明校园枪击事件的经济成本具有普遍性。

papers.title: Measuring Unemployment in Crisis: Effects of COVID-19 on Potential Biases in the CPS
papers.authors: Ori Heffetz, Daniel Reeves
papers.abstract: From February to April 2020, as COVID-19 hit the U.S. economy, the official unemployment rate (UR) climbed from 3.5 percent—the lowest in more than 50 years—to 14.7—the highest since current measurement began in January 1948. This unprecedented, speedy quadrupling of UR coincided with major disruptions in survey-data-collection procedures and a dramatic, differential drop in response rates. To what extent did measurement issues contribute to this quadrupling? We revisit two recently studied potential biases in the Current Population Survey: rotation group bias (Krueger, Mas and Niu, 2017) and difficulty-of-reaching bias (Heffetz and Reeves, 2019). We extend the original analyses to the years prior to the crisis and focus on the six months of peak UR, from April to September 2020. Our ballpark estimates suggest that the peak official UR figure could be biased by up to ∼1.5 percentage points in either direction.
papers.zh_title: 危机中的失业测量：COVID-19对当前人口调查潜在偏差的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 从2020年2月到4月，随着COVID-19冲击美国经济，官方失业率从3.5%（50多年来的最低点）攀升至14.7%（自1948年1月开始当前测量以来的最高点）。这种前所未有的、迅速的失业率四倍增长，恰逢调查数据收集程序的中断以及回应率的急剧且差异化的下降。测量问题在多大程度上导致了这种四倍增长？我们重新审视了当前人口调查中两个近期研究的潜在偏差：轮换组偏差（Krueger, Mas and Niu, 2017）和难以接触偏差（Heffetz and Reeves, 2019）。我们将原始分析扩展到危机前的年份，并重点关注失业率高峰期的六个月，即2020年4月至9月。我们的粗略估计表明，官方失业率峰值数字可能在任何方向上存在高达约1.5个百分点的偏差。

papers.title: Cities, Productivity, and Trade
papers.authors: Alvaro Garcia Marin, Andrei V. Potlogea, Nico Voigtländer, Yang Yang
papers.abstract: We document a novel stylized fact: Using data for several countries, we show that export activity is disproportionately concentrated in larger cities – even more so than overall economic activity. We account for this fact by marrying elements of international trade and economic geography. We build a model with agglomeration economies where firms with heterogeneous productivity sort across city sizes and select into exporting. The model allows us to study the geographic implications of trade policy, as well as the international trade effects of urban policies. We show that (i) lifting restrictions on housing supply raises not only the aggregate productivity of the economy but also its aggregate export intensity, by allowing more firms to locate in larger cities and profit from agglomeration effects; (ii) conversely, while opening up to trade has complex overall economic geography implications, within sectors it tends to shift employment towards larger cities. We structurally estimate the model using data for the universe of Chinese manufacturing firms and study the general equilibrium effects of trade liberalization and of urban policies. We find that the effects of these policies are quantitatively different from those predicted by trade models that ignore economic geography, and by economic geography models that omit international trade (both of which are nested in our framework).
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI, PR；JEL：F23, F6, R13, R31
papers.zh_title: 城市、生产率与贸易
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录了一个新颖的典型事实：利用多个国家的数据，我们表明出口活动不成比例地集中在更大的城市——甚至比整体经济活动更为集中。我们通过融合国际贸易和经济地理学的要素来解释这一事实。我们构建了一个具有集聚经济的模型，其中生产率异质的企业在不同城市规模中进行分类并选择出口。该模型使我们能够研究贸易政策的地理影响，以及城市政策的国际贸易效应。我们表明：（i）取消住房供应限制不仅提高了经济的总体生产率，还通过允许更多企业落户大城市并从集聚效应中获益，提高了经济的总体出口强度；（ii）相反，虽然开放贸易具有复杂的总体经济地理影响，但在部门内部，它倾向于将就业转向更大的城市。我们利用中国全部制造业企业的数据对模型进行了结构估计，并研究了贸易自由化和城市政策的一般均衡效应。我们发现，这些政策的影响在数量上不同于忽略经济地理的贸易模型以及忽略国际贸易的经济地理模型（两者都嵌套在我们的框架中）所预测的结果。

papers.title: Self-image Bias and Lost Talent
papers.authors: Marciano Siniscalchi, Pietro Veronesi
papers.abstract: We propose an overlapping-generation model wherein researchers belong to two groups, M or F, and established researchers evaluate new researchers. Group imbalance obtains even with group-neutral evaluations and identical productivity distributions. Evaluators’ self-image bias and mild between-group heterogeneity in equally productive research characteristics lead the initially dominant group, say M, to promote scholars with characteristics similar to theirs. Promoted Fresearchers are few and similar to M-researchers, perpetuating imbalance. Candidates’ career concerns and institutions’ hiring practices exacerbate talent loss. Mentorship reduces group imbalance, but increases F-group talent loss. Affirmative action reduces both. Our mechanism explains existing evidence and suggests different policies.
papers.zh_title: 自我形象偏见与人才流失
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个世代交叠模型，其中研究人员属于两个群体M或F，且资深研究人员评估新研究人员。即使评估是群体中性的且生产率分布相同，也会出现群体失衡。评估者的自我形象偏见以及同等生产率研究特征中轻微的群体间异质性，导致最初占主导地位的群体（例如M）提拔具有与其相似特征的学者。被提拔的F群体研究人员数量很少且与M群体研究人员相似，从而延续了失衡。候选人的职业关切和机构的招聘实践加剧了人才流失。导师制减少了群体失衡，但增加了F群体的人才流失。平权行动则同时减少了这两者。我们的机制解释了现有证据并提出了不同的政策建议。

papers.title: Exposure to a School Shooting and Subsequent Well-Being
papers.authors: Phillip B. Levine, Robin McKnight
papers.abstract: This paper examines the impact of school shootings on the educational performance and long-term health consequences of students who survive them, highlighting the impact of indiscriminate, high-fatality incidents. Initially, we focus on test scores in the years following a shooting. We also examine whether exposure to a shooting affects chronic absenteeism, which may play a role in explaining any such effect, and school expenditures, which may counteract it. We analyze national, school-district level data and additional school-level data from Connecticut in this part of the analysis. In terms of effects on health status, we focus on its most extreme measure, mortality in the years following a shooting. In this part of the analysis, we analyze county-level data on mortality by cause. In all analyses, we treat the timing of these events as random, enabling us to identify causal effects. Our results indicate that indiscriminate, high-fatality school shootings, such as those that occurred at Sandy Hook and Columbine, have considerable adverse effects on students exposed to them. We cannot rule out substantive effects of other types of shootings with fewer or no fatalities.
papers.zh_title: 校园枪击事件暴露与后续福祉
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了校园枪击事件对幸存学生的学业表现和长期健康后果的影响，重点关注无差别、高死亡率的枪击事件。最初，我们关注枪击事件后几年的考试成绩。我们还考察了暴露于枪击事件是否会影响长期缺勤（这可能解释任何此类效应）以及学校支出（这可能抵消该效应）。在这部分分析中，我们使用了全国学区层面的数据以及康涅狄格州的额外学校层面数据。在健康状态影响方面，我们关注其最极端的衡量指标，即枪击事件后几年的死亡率。在这部分分析中，我们分析了按死因分类的县级死亡率数据。在所有分析中，我们将这些事件的发生时间视为随机的，从而能够识别因果效应。我们的结果表明，无差别、高死亡率的校园枪击事件，例如桑迪胡克和哥伦拜恩事件，对暴露其中的学生产生了相当大的不利影响。我们不能排除其他类型枪击事件（死亡人数较少或无死亡）的实质性影响。

papers.title: Event-day Options
papers.authors: Jonathan H. Wright
papers.abstract: This paper considers new options on Treasury and stock futures than expire each Wednesday and Friday. I examine the volatilities implied by these options as of the night before expiration, and compare the volatilies just before FOMC days and employment report days with the volatilities on other Tuesdays or Thursdays, respectively. This can be used to measure the risk neutral uncertainty associated with FOMC announcements and employment reports. I can also compare the average physical and risk neutral uncertainty: the difference between them is the average variance risk premium. Average variance risk premia are large and significantly positive, especially for FOMC days. Lastly, I construct options-implied densities on the eve of FOMC and employment report days.
papers.zh_title: 事件日期权
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考虑了每周三和周五到期的新国债和股票期货期权。我研究了这些期权在到期前夜隐含的波动率，并将联邦公开市场委员会（FOMC）日和就业报告日之前的波动率与其他周二或周四的波动率分别进行比较。这可用于衡量与FOMC公告和就业报告相关的风险中性不确定性。我还可以比较平均实际波动率和风险中性波动率：两者之差即为平均方差风险溢价。平均方差风险溢价很大且显著为正，尤其是在FOMC日。最后，我在FOMC日和就业报告日前夜构建了期权隐含的密度函数。

papers.title: Vertical Integration and Cream Skimming of Profitable Referrals: The Case of Hospital-Owned Skilled Nursing Facilities
papers.authors: David M. Cutler, Leemore Dafny, David C. Grabowski, Steven Lee, Christopher Ody
papers.abstract: We examine whether vertical integration of hospitals and skilled nursing facilities (SNFs) could lessen competition by foreclosing rival SNFs’ access to lucrative referrals. We find that it could: among integrated providers, a one percent increase in SNF reimbursement for a given patient discharged from the upstream hospital increases the self-referral rate to the hospital’s downstream SNF(s) by 1.8 percent. We find no evidence of offsetting benefits for patients and payers: these increased self-referrals have an imprecisely estimated zero effect on patient outcomes and Medicare spending.
papers.zh_title: 纵向整合与盈利性转诊的撇脂行为：以医院所有的专业护理机构为例
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了医院与专业护理机构（SNF）的纵向整合是否可能通过阻止竞争对手的SNF获取有利可图的转诊来削弱竞争。我们发现这是可能的：在整合型提供者中，对于从上游医院出院的特定患者，SNF报销每增加1%，该医院向下游SNF的自我转诊率就会增加1.8%。我们没有发现对患者和支付方有抵消性利益的证据：这些增加的自我转诊对患者结果和医疗保险支出的影响估计为零，且精度不高。

papers.title: The Long-Term Impact of the COVID-19 Unemployment Shock on Life Expectancy and Mortality Rates
papers.authors: Francesco Bianchi, Giada Bianchi, Dongho Song
papers.abstract: We adopt a time series approach to investigate the historical relation between unemployment, life expectancy, and mortality rates. We fit Vector-autoregressions for the overall US population and for groups identified based on gender and race. We use our results to assess the long-run effects of the COVID-19 economic recession on mortality and life expectancy. We estimate the size of the COVID-19-related unemployment shock to be between 2 and 5 times larger than the typical unemployment shock, depending on race and gender, resulting in a significant increase in mortality rates and drop in life expectancy. We also predict that the shock will disproportionately affect African-Americans and women, over a short horizon, while the effects for white men will unfold over longer horizons. These figures translate in more than 0.8 million additional deaths over the next 15 years.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, EH, LS, ME；JEL：C32, E32, I14, J11
papers.zh_title: COVID-19失业冲击对预期寿命和死亡率的长期影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们采用时间序列方法研究失业、预期寿命和死亡率之间的历史关系。我们对美国总体人口以及按性别和种族划分的群体拟合了向量自回归模型。我们利用结果评估COVID-19经济衰退对死亡率和预期寿命的长期影响。我们估计，与典型的失业冲击相比，COVID-19相关的失业冲击规模根据种族和性别不同要大2到5倍，导致死亡率显著上升和预期寿命下降。我们还预测，该冲击将在短期内对非裔美国人和女性产生不成比例的影响，而对白人男性的影响将在更长时间内显现。这些数字意味着未来15年内将增加超过80万例额外死亡。

papers.title: Deaths of Despair and the Incidence of Excess Mortality in 2020
papers.authors: Casey B. Mulligan
papers.abstract: Weekly mortality through October 3 is partitioned into normal deaths, COVID, and nonCOVID excess deaths (NCEDs). Before March, the excess is negative for the elderly, likely due to the mild flu season. From March onward, excess deaths are approximately 250,000 of which about 17,000 appear to be a COVID undercount and 30,000 non-COVID. Deaths of despair (drug overdose, suicide, alcohol) in 2017 and 2018 are good predictors of the demographic groups with NCEDs in 2020. The NCEDs are disproportionately experienced by men aged 15-55, including men aged 15-25. Local data on opioid overdoses further support the hypothesis that the pandemic and recession were associated with a 10 to 60 percent increase in deaths of despair above already high pre-pandemic levels.
papers.zh_title: 绝望死亡与2020年超额死亡率的发生
papers.zh_abstract: 截至10月3日的每周死亡率被划分为正常死亡、COVID死亡和非COVID超额死亡（NCED）。3月之前，老年人的超额死亡为负值，可能归因于温和的流感季节。从3月开始，超额死亡约为25万例，其中约1.7万例似乎是COVID漏报，3万例为非COVID死亡。2017年和2018年的绝望死亡（药物过量、自杀、酒精）是2020年出现NCED的人口群体的良好预测指标。NCED不成比例地发生在15-55岁男性中，包括15-25岁男性。关于阿片类药物过量的地方数据进一步支持了以下假设：疫情和经济衰退与绝望死亡相比疫情前已经很高的水平增加了10%至60%有关。

papers.title: Answering the Queen: Machine Learning and Financial Crises
papers.authors: Jeremy Fouliard, Michael Howell, Hélène Rey, Vania Stavrakeva
papers.abstract: Financial crises cause economic, social and political havoc. Macroprudential policies are gaining traction but are still severely under-researched compared to monetary and fiscal policy. We use the general framework of sequential predictions, also called online machine learning, to forecast crises out-of-sample. Our methodology is based on model aggregation and is “meta-statistical”, since we can incorporate any predictive model of crises in our analysis and test its ability to add information, without making any assumption on the data generating process. We predict systemic financial crises twelve quarters ahead out-of-sample with high signal-to-noise ratio. Our approach guarantees that picking certain time dependent sets of weights will be asymptotically similar for out-of-sample forecasts to the best ex post combination of models; it also guarantees that we outperform any individual forecasting model asymptotically. We analyse which models provide the most information for our predictions at each point in time and for each country, allowing us to gain some insights into economic mechanisms underlying the building of risk in economies.
papers.zh_title: 回答女王：机器学习与金融危机
papers.zh_abstract: 金融危机造成经济、社会和政治混乱。宏观审慎政策正获得关注，但与货币政策和财政政策相比，其研究仍严重不足。我们使用序列预测的一般框架（也称为在线机器学习）来预测样本外的危机。我们的方法基于模型聚合，是“元统计”的，因为我们可以将任何危机预测模型纳入分析，并测试其增加信息的能力，而无需对数据生成过程做任何假设。我们以高信噪比预测样本外12个季度后的系统性金融危机。我们的方法保证，选择某些时间相关的权重集将在样本外预测中渐近地等同于最佳的事后模型组合；它还保证我们渐近地优于任何单个预测模型。我们分析了在每个时间点和每个国家哪些模型为我们的预测提供了最多信息，从而使我们能够深入了解经济体风险积累背后的经济机制。

papers.title: Borders within Europe
papers.authors: Marta A. Santamaría, Jaume Ventura, Uğur Yeşilbayraktar
papers.abstract: Are country borders still an impediment to trade flows within Europe? Using a rich microlevel survey with 3 million annual shipments of goods by road across 269 European regions, we construct a matrix of bilateral trade flows for 12 industries from 2011 to 2017. We then use the causal inference framework to design an identification strategy to estimate the causal effect of country borders on trade flows. Take two similar region pairs, the first one containing regions in different countries and the second one containing regions in the same country. The market share of the origin region in the destination region for the international pair is only 17.5 percent that of the intranational pair. We refer to this estimate as the average border effect. When we look at each industry separately, we find border effects that range from 12.3 to 38.9 percent. When we look at recent borders, i.e. created after 1910, we find a border effect of 28.8 percent, which is smaller than the average border effect but still quite large. The implication is clear: Europe is far from having a single market.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI, PE, POL；JEL：D71, F15, F55, H77, O57
papers.zh_title: 欧洲内部的边界
papers.zh_abstract: 国家边界是否仍然是欧洲内部贸易流动的障碍？利用一项包含269个欧洲地区每年300万次公路货物运输的丰富微观调查数据，我们构建了2011年至2017年12个行业的双边贸易流量矩阵。然后，我们使用因果推断框架设计识别策略，以估计国家边界对贸易流量的因果效应。取两个相似的地区对，第一个包含不同国家的地区，第二个包含同一国家的地区。对于国际对，来源地区在目的地区的市场份额仅为国内对的17.5%。我们将此估计称为平均边界效应。当我们分别观察每个行业时，发现边界效应在12.3%到38.9%之间。当我们观察近期边界（即1910年后创建的边界）时，发现边界效应为28.8%，小于平均边界效应但仍然相当大。其含义很明确：欧洲远未形成单一市场。

papers.title: Parallel Digital Currencies and Sticky Prices
papers.authors: Harald Uhlig, Taojun Xie
papers.abstract: The rise of digital currencies may result in domestic parallel currencies. Their exchange rate shocks will present a new challenge for monetary policy. We analyze these issues in a New Keynesian framework, where firms can set prices in one of the available currencies. Price rigidity translates a one-time appreciation of a parallel currency into persistent redistribution towards the dollar sector output and inflation. The persistence lasts longer if the central bank targets “dollar”-sector inflation, rather than inflation across all currency sectors. An increase in dollar price rigidity may lead to a decrease rather than an increase of the non-dollar sector.
papers.zh_title: 平行数字货币与粘性价格
papers.zh_abstract: 数字货币的兴起可能导致国内平行货币。其汇率冲击将为货币政策带来新的挑战。我们在新凯恩斯框架下分析这些问题，其中企业可以用一种可用货币设定价格。价格刚性将平行货币的一次性升值转化为向美元部门产出和通胀的持续再分配。如果中央银行以“美元”部门通胀为目标，而不是所有货币部门的通胀，这种持续性会更长。美元价格刚性的增加可能导致非美元部门的减少而非增加。

papers.title: Market Structure and Extortion: Evidence from 50,000 Extortion Payments
papers.authors: Zach Y. Brown, Eduardo Montero, Carlos Schmidt-Padilla, Maria Micaela Sviatschi
papers.abstract: How does gang competition affect extortion? Using detailed data on individual extortion payments to gangs and sales from a leading wholesale distributor of consumer goods and pharmaceuticals in El Salvador, we document evidence on the determinants of extortion payments and the effects of extortion on firms and consumers. We exploit a 2016 nonaggression pact between gangs to examine how collusion affects extortion in areas where gangs previously competed. While the pact led to a large reduction in competition and violence, we find that it increased the amount paid in extortion by approximately 20%. Much of this increase was passed through to retailers and consumers: retailers experienced an increase in delivery fees, leading to an increase in consumer prices. In particular, we find an increase in prices for pharmaceutical drugs and a corresponding increase in hospital visits for chronic illnesses. The results point to an unintended consequence of policies that reduce competition between criminal organizations.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, IO, POL；JEL：D74, K42, L10, O17
papers.zh_title: 市场结构与敲诈：来自50,000笔敲诈付款的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 帮派竞争如何影响敲诈？利用来自萨尔瓦多一家领先的消费品和药品批发分销商的个人敲诈付款和销售数据，我们记录了敲诈付款的决定因素以及敲诈对企业和消费者的影响的证据。我们利用2016年帮派间的互不侵犯条约，研究合谋如何影响先前帮派竞争地区的敲诈。虽然该条约导致竞争和暴力大幅减少，但我们发现它使敲诈金额增加了约20%。这一增长大部分转嫁给了零售商和消费者：零售商的配送费增加，导致消费者价格上涨。特别是，我们发现药品价格上涨，相应的慢性病就诊次数增加。结果表明，减少犯罪组织间竞争的政策会产生意想不到的后果。

papers.title: Dynamic Banking and the Value of Deposits
papers.authors: Patrick Bolton, Ye Li, Neng Wang, Jinqiang Yang
papers.abstract: We propose a dynamic theory of banking where the role of deposits is akin to that of productive capital in the classical q-theory of investment. As a cheap source of leverage, deposits typically create value for banks, but the marginal q of deposits can be negative. Deposit accounts commit banks to accept any inflows and outflows, so that banks cannot perfectly control leverage. Such uncertainty destroys value when banks have insufficient equity capital to buffer shocks. Our model lends itself to a re-evaluation of leverage regulations and offers new perspectives on banking in a low interest-rate environment.
papers.zh_title: 动态银行与存款价值
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出一个动态银行理论，其中存款的作用类似于经典q投资理论中的生产性资本。作为一种廉价的杠杆来源，存款通常为银行创造价值，但存款的边际q可能为负。存款账户使银行承诺接受任何流入和流出，因此银行无法完美控制杠杆。当银行没有足够的股权资本来缓冲冲击时，这种不确定性会破坏价值。我们的模型有助于重新评估杠杆监管，并为低利率环境下的银行业提供新视角。

papers.title: History’s Masters: The Effect of European Monarchs on State Performance
papers.authors: Sebastian Ottinger, Nico Voigtländer
papers.abstract: We create a novel reign-level dataset for European monarchs, covering all major European states between the 10th and 18th centuries. We first document a strong positive relationship between rulers’ cognitive ability and state-level outcomes. To address endogeneity issues, we exploit the facts that i) rulers were appointed according to hereditary succession, independent of their ability, and ii) the wide-spread inbreeding among the ruling dynasties of Europe led over centuries to quasi-random variation in ruler ability. We code the degree of blood relationship between the parents of rulers, which also reflects ‘hidden’ layers of inbreeding from previous generations. The ‘coefficient of inbreeding’ is a strong predictor of ruler ability, and the corresponding instrumental variable results imply that ruler ability had a sizeable effect on the performance of states and their borders. This supports the view that ‘leaders made history,’ shaping the European map until its consolidation into nation states. We also show that rulers mattered only where their power was largely unconstrained. In reigns where parliaments checked the power of monarchs, ruler ability no longer affected their state’s performance. Thus, the strengthening of parliaments in Northern European states (where kin marriage of dynasties was particularly wide-spread) may have shielded them from the detrimental effects of inbreeding.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, POL；JEL：D02, D73, N43, P16
papers.zh_title: 历史的主宰者：欧洲君主对国家绩效的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们创建了一个涵盖10至18世纪欧洲主要国家的全新君主统治期数据集。首先，我们记录了统治者认知能力与国家层面结果之间的强正相关关系。为解决内生性问题，我们利用了以下事实：i) 君主根据世袭继承制任命，与其能力无关；ii) 欧洲统治王朝中普遍存在的近亲通婚在几个世纪中导致了统治者能力近乎随机的变化。我们对统治者父母之间的血缘关系程度进行了编码，这也反映了来自前几代人的“隐性”近亲通婚层。‘近亲系数’是统治者能力的强预测因子，相应的工具变量结果表明，统治者能力对国家绩效及其边界产生了显著影响。这支持了‘领袖创造历史’的观点，即他们塑造了欧洲版图，直至其巩固为民族国家。我们还表明，只有在君主权力基本不受约束的情况下，统治者才至关重要。在议会制衡君主权力的统治时期，统治者能力不再影响其国家的绩效。因此，北欧国家（那里王朝的亲属婚姻尤为普遍）议会的加强可能使其免受近亲通婚的有害影响。

papers.title: Political Parties as Drivers of U.S. Polarization: 1927-2018
papers.authors: Nathan J. Canen, Chad Kendall, Francesco Trebbi
papers.abstract: The current polarization of elites in the U.S., particularly in Congress, is frequently ascribed to the emergence of cohorts of ideologically extreme legislators replacing moderate ones. Politicians, however, do not operate as isolated agents, driven solely by their preferences. They act within organized parties, whose leaders exert control over the rank-and-file, directing support for and against policies. This paper shows that the omission of party discipline as a driver of political polarization is consequential for our understanding of this phenomenon. We present a multi-dimensional voting model and identification strategy designed to decouple the ideological preferences of lawmakers from the control exerted by their party leadership. Applying this structural framework to the U.S. Congress between 1927- 2018, we find that the influence of leaders over their rank-and-file has been a growing driver of polarization in voting, particularly since the 1970s. In 2018, party discipline accounts for around 65% of the polarization in roll call voting. Our findings qualify the interpretation of - and in two important cases subvert - a number of empirical claims in the literature that measures polarization with models that lack a formal role for parties.
papers.zh_title: 政党作为美国政治极化的驱动因素：1927-2018年
papers.zh_abstract: 当前美国精英阶层，特别是国会中的政治极化，常被归因于意识形态极端的立法者群体取代温和派。然而，政治家并非作为孤立的个体仅凭自身偏好行事。他们在有组织的政党中运作，政党领袖对普通议员施加控制，引导对政策的支持或反对。本文表明，忽略政党纪律作为政治极化的驱动因素，对我们理解这一现象具有重要影响。我们提出了一个多维投票模型和识别策略，旨在将立法者的意识形态偏好与其政党领导层施加的控制分离开来。将该结构框架应用于1927年至2018年的美国国会，我们发现，领袖对其普通议员的影响力一直是投票极化日益增长的驱动因素，尤其是自1970年代以来。2018年，政党纪律约占唱名投票极化的65%。我们的研究结果对文献中一些经验性主张的解释提出了质疑，并在两个重要案例中推翻了这些主张，这些文献使用缺乏政党正式角色的模型来衡量极化。

papers.title: Family Support in Hard Times: Dynamics of Intergenerational Exchange after Adverse Events
papers.authors: Jessamyn Schaller, Chase S. Eck
papers.abstract: We use an event-study approach to examine changes in intergenerational financial transfers and informal care within families following wealth loss, job exit, widowhood, and health shocks. We find sharp reductions in parental giving to adult children following negative shocks to parents' wealth and earned income, particularly in low-wealth households. Parental giving also decreases with some health shocks and increases following spousal death. Meanwhile, children of low-wealth households increase financial transfers to their parents following adverse shocks and children in both high- and low-wealth households increase their provision of informal care to parents following a wide range of adverse shocks.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, CH, EH, LS, PE；JEL：D10, D14, D15, D64, I10, J14, J26
papers.zh_title: 困难时期的家庭支持：不利事件后代际交换的动态变化
papers.zh_abstract: 我们采用事件研究方法，考察了在财富损失、失业、丧偶和健康冲击之后，家庭内部代际经济转移和非正式照料的变化。我们发现，在父母财富和劳动收入遭受负面冲击后，父母对成年子女的给予显著减少，尤其是在低财富家庭中。父母的给予也会因某些健康冲击而减少，并在配偶去世后增加。与此同时，低财富家庭的子女在遭受不利冲击后会增加对父母的经济转移，而高财富和低财富家庭的子女在遭受一系列广泛的不利冲击后，都会增加对父母的非正式照料。

papers.title: Wage Risk and Government and Spousal Insurance
papers.authors: Mariacristina De Nardi, Giulio Fella, Gonzalo Paz-Pardo
papers.abstract: The extent to which households can self-insure depends on family structure and wage risk. We calibrate a model of couples and singles’ savings and labor supply under two types of wage processes. The first wage process is the canonical—age independent, linear—one that is typically used to evaluate government insurance provision. The second wage process is a flexible one. We use our model to evaluate the optimal mix of the two most common types of means-tested benefits—in-work versus income floor. The canonical wage process underestimates wage persistence for women and thus implies that in-work benefits should account for most benefit income. In contrast, the richer wage process that matches the wage data well, implies that the income floor should be the main benefit source, similarly to the system in place in the UK. This stresses that allowing for rich wage dynamics is important to properly evaluate policy.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PE；JEL：D1, D12, D14, D15, H11, H2
papers.zh_title: 工资风险与政府及配偶保险
papers.zh_abstract: 家庭自我保险的程度取决于家庭结构和工资风险。我们在两种工资过程下校准了一个关于夫妻和单身者储蓄与劳动供给的模型。第一种工资过程是经典的——年龄独立、线性——通常用于评估政府保险供给。第二种工资过程是灵活的。我们利用模型来评估两种最常见的经济状况调查福利——在职福利与收入下限——的最优组合。经典的工资过程低估了女性工资的持续性，因此意味着在职福利应占福利收入的大部分。相比之下，与工资数据匹配良好的更丰富的工资过程则表明，收入下限应是主要的福利来源，类似于英国现行的制度。这强调了考虑丰富的工资动态对于正确评估政策的重要性。

papers.title: Comparing Conventional and Machine-Learning Approaches to Risk Assessment in Domestic Abuse Cases
papers.authors: Jeffrey Grogger, Sean Gupta, Ria Ivandic, Tom Kirchmaier
papers.abstract: We compare predictions from a conventional protocol-based approach to risk assessment with those based on a machine-learning approach. We first show that the conventional predictions are less accurate than, and have similar rates of negative prediction error as, a simple Bayes classifier that makes use only of the base failure rate. Machine learning algorithms based on the underlying risk assessment questionnaire do better under the assumption that negative prediction errors are more costly than positive prediction errors. Machine learning models based on two-year criminal histories do even better. Indeed, adding the protocol-based features to the criminal histories adds little to the predictive adequacy of the model. We suggest using the predictions based on criminal histories to prioritize incoming calls for service, and devising a more sensitive instrument to distinguish true from false positives that result from this initial screening.
papers.zh_title: 家庭暴力案件中传统风险评估方法与机器学习方法的比较
papers.zh_abstract: 我们比较了基于传统协议的风险评估方法的预测结果与基于机器学习方法的预测结果。我们首先表明，传统预测的准确性低于一个仅利用基础失败率的简单贝叶斯分类器，并且两者具有相似的负预测错误率。在假设负预测错误比正预测错误成本更高的前提下，基于底层风险评估问卷的机器学习算法表现更好。基于两年犯罪历史的机器学习模型表现更佳。事实上，将基于协议的特征添加到犯罪历史中，对模型的预测充分性几乎没有提升。我们建议利用基于犯罪历史的预测来优先处理来电服务请求，并设计一个更灵敏的工具来区分由此初始筛选产生的真阳性和假阳性。

papers.title: Sovereign Debt Standstills
papers.authors: Juan C. Hatchondo, Leonardo Martinez, César Sosa-Padilla
papers.abstract: As a response to the economic difficulties triggered by the COVID-19 pandemic, the G20 implemented the Debt Service Suspension Initiative (DSSI), a standstill or suspension of official bilateral sovereign debt payments for some of the poorest countries. The G20 and others also called on private creditors to offer comparable terms but this did not materialize. We first show that a standard default model can account for the decline in sovereign spreads triggered by the DSSI. The model also accounts for the private creditors’ reluctance to participate in a debt standstill: A private-creditor standstill implies sizable capital losses for debt holders. Furthermore, while sovereign debt standstill proposals emphasize debt payment suspensions without write-offs on the face value of debt obligations, we find that complementing private-creditor standstills with write-offs could reduce debt holders’ losses and simultaneously increase sovereign welfare gains.
papers.zh_title: 主权债务暂停
papers.zh_abstract: 作为应对COVID-19疫情引发的经济困难的措施，G20实施了暂缓偿债倡议（DSSI），即对一些最贫困国家的官方双边主权债务支付进行暂停或中止。G20及其他方面也呼吁私人债权人提供类似条款，但这并未实现。我们首先表明，一个标准的违约模型可以解释DSSI引发的主权利差下降。该模型也解释了私人债权人不愿参与债务暂停的原因：私人债权人暂停意味着债务持有人面临可观的资本损失。此外，尽管主权债务暂停提案强调在不减记债务面值的情况下暂停偿债，但我们发现，将私人债权人暂停与减记相结合可以减少债务持有人的损失，同时增加主权国家的福利收益。

papers.title: Scarred but Wiser: World War 2’s COVID Legacy
papers.authors: Michael Lokshin, Vladimir Kolchin, Martin Ravallion
papers.abstract: The paper formalizes and tests the hypothesis that greater exposure to big shocks induces stronger societal responses for adaptation and protection from future big shocks. We find support for this hypothesis in various strands of the literature and in new empirical tests using cross-country data on deaths due to COVID-19 and deaths during World War 2. Countries with higher death rates in the war saw lower death rates in the first wave of the COVID pandemic, though the effect faded in the pandemic’s second wave. Our tests are robust to a wide range of model specifications and alternative assumptions.
papers.zh_title: 伤痕累累但更明智：第二次世界大战的COVID遗产
papers.zh_abstract: 本文正式提出并检验了一个假设，即对重大冲击的更大暴露会激发社会更强的反应，以适应和防范未来的重大冲击。我们在文献的多个分支以及使用跨国数据（关于COVID-19死亡人数和第二次世界大战死亡人数）的新实证检验中找到了支持这一假设的证据。在战争中死亡率较高的国家，在COVID大流行第一波中的死亡率较低，尽管这种效应在大流行的第二波中减弱了。我们的检验在广泛的模型设定和替代假设下都是稳健的。

papers.title: Advanced Technologies Adoption and Use by U.S. Firms: Evidence from the Annual Business Survey
papers.authors: Nikolas Zolas, Zachary Kroff, Erik Brynjolfsson, Kristina McElheran, David N. Beede, Cathy Buffington, Nathan Goldschlag, Lucia Foster, Emin Dinlersoz
papers.abstract: We introduce a new survey module intended to complement and expand research on the causes and consequences of advanced technology adoption. The 2018 Annual Business Survey (ABS), conducted by the Census Bureau in partnership with the National Center for Science and Engineering Statistics (NCSES), provides comprehensive and timely information on the diffusion among U.S. firms of advanced technologies including artificial intelligence (AI), cloud computing, robotics, and the digitization of business information. The 2018 ABS is a large, nationally representative sample of over 850,000 firms covering all private, nonfarm sectors of the economy. We describe the motivation for and development of the technology module in the ABS, as well as provide a first look at technology adoption and use patterns across firms and sectors. We find that digitization is quite widespread, as is some use of cloud computing. In contrast, advanced technology adoption is rare and generally skewed towards larger and older firms. Adoption patterns are consistent with a hierarchy of increasing technological sophistication, in which most firms that adopt AI or other advanced business technologies also use the other, more widely diffused technologies. Finally, while few firms are at the technology frontier, they tend to be large so technology exposure of the average worker is significantly higher. This new data will be available to qualified researchers on approved projects in the Federal Statistical Research Data Center network.
papers.zh_title: 美国企业先进技术的采用与使用：来自年度商业调查的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们引入了一个新的调查模块，旨在补充和扩展关于先进技术采用原因及后果的研究。2018年年度商业调查（ABS）由人口普查局与国家科学与工程统计中心（NCSES）合作进行，提供了关于美国企业先进技术（包括人工智能、云计算、机器人技术以及商业信息数字化）扩散的全面及时信息。2018年ABS是一个大型、具有全国代表性的样本，涵盖超过85万家企业，覆盖所有私营非农经济部门。我们描述了ABS中技术模块的动机和发展，并首次展示了跨企业和行业的技术采用和使用模式。我们发现，数字化相当普遍，云计算也有一定使用。相比之下，先进技术的采用较为罕见，且通常偏向于规模更大、历史更悠久的企业。采用模式与日益增长的技术复杂性层级一致，其中大多数采用人工智能或其他先进商业技术的企业也使用了其他更广泛传播的技术。最后，尽管处于技术前沿的企业很少，但它们往往规模较大，因此普通工人的技术接触率显著更高。这些新数据将在联邦统计研究数据中心网络内，向经批准项目的合格研究人员开放。

papers.title: Personnel Management and School Productivity: Evidence from India
papers.authors: Renata Lemos, Karthik Muralidharan, Daniela Scur
papers.abstract: This paper uses new data to study school management and productivity in India. We report four main results. First, management quality in public schools is low, and ~2σ below high-income countries with comparable data. Second, private schools have higher management quality, driven by much stronger people management. Third, people management quality is correlated with both independent measures of teaching practice, as well as school productivity measured by student value added. Fourth, private school teacher pay is positively correlated with teacher effectiveness, and better-managed private schools are more likely to retain their most effective teachers. Neither pattern is seen in public schools.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, LS, PE, PR；JEL：I25, M5, O1
papers.zh_title: 人事管理与学校生产力：来自印度的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文使用新数据研究印度的学校管理和生产力。我们报告了四个主要结果。首先，公立学校的管理质量较低，比具有可比数据的高收入国家低约2个标准差。其次，私立学校的管理质量更高，这得益于更强的人员管理。第三，人员管理质量与教学实践的独立衡量指标以及通过学生增值衡量的学校生产力都相关。第四，私立学校教师的薪酬与教师有效性正相关，管理更好的私立学校更有可能留住最有效的教师。公立学校中未观察到这两种模式。

papers.title: The Economics of Crisis Innovation Policy: A Historical Perspective
papers.authors: Daniel P. Gross, Bhaven N. Sampat
papers.abstract: Since the beginning of the COVID-19 pandemic, policymakers, researchers, and journalists have made comparisons to World War II. In 1940, a group of top U.S. science administrators organized a major coordinated research effort to support the Allied war effort, including significant investments in medical research which yielded innovations like mass-produced penicillin, antimalarials, and a flu vaccine. We draw on this episode to discuss the economics of crisis innovation. Since the objectives of crisis R&D are different than ordinary R&D (prioritizing speed, coordination, redundancy, and more), we argue that appropriate R&D policy in a crisis requires going beyond the standard Nelson-Arrow framework for research policy.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, PE, PR；JEL：H12, H56, N42, N72, O31, O32, O38
papers.zh_title: 危机创新政策的经济学：历史视角
papers.zh_abstract: 自COVID-19大流行开始以来，政策制定者、研究人员和记者一直将其与第二次世界大战进行比较。1940年，一群美国顶级科学管理者组织了一项重大的协调研究努力，以支持盟军战争努力，包括对医学研究的大量投资，这些投资产生了大规模生产的青霉素、抗疟药和流感疫苗等创新。我们借鉴这一事件来讨论危机创新的经济学。由于危机研发的目标与普通研发不同（优先考虑速度、协调、冗余等），我们认为，危机中的适当研发政策需要超越标准的内尔森-阿罗研究政策框架。

papers.title: Family Spillover Effects of Marginal Diagnoses: The Case of ADHD
papers.authors: Petra Persson, Xinyao Qiu, Maya Rossin-Slater
papers.abstract: The health care system commonly relies on information about family medical history in the allocation of screenings and in diagnostic processes. At the same time, an emerging literature documents that treatment for “marginally diagnosed” patients often has minimal impacts. This paper shows that reliance on information about relatives' health can perpetuate marginal diagnoses across family members, thereby raising caseloads and health care costs, but without improving patient well-being. We study Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD), the most common childhood mental health condition, and document that the younger siblings and cousins of marginally diagnosed children are also more likely to be diagnosed with and treated for ADHD. Moreover, we find that the younger relatives of marginally diagnosed children have no better adult human capital and economic outcomes than the younger relatives of those who are less likely to be diagnosed. Our analysis points to a simple adjustment to physician protocol that can mitigate these marginal diagnosis spillovers.
papers.zh_title: 边缘诊断的家庭溢出效应：以ADHD为例
papers.zh_abstract: 医疗保健系统通常依赖家庭病史信息来分配筛查和诊断过程。同时，新兴文献记录了“边缘诊断”患者的治疗通常影响甚微。本文表明，依赖亲属健康信息可能会使边缘诊断在家庭成员之间持续存在，从而提高病例数和医疗成本，但不会改善患者福祉。我们研究注意力缺陷多动障碍（ADHD），这是最常见的儿童心理健康状况，并记录了边缘诊断儿童的弟弟妹妹和堂表亲也更有可能被诊断和治疗ADHD。此外，我们发现，边缘诊断儿童的年轻亲属在成人人力资本和经济结果方面并不比那些不太可能被诊断的儿童的年轻亲属更好。我们的分析指出了医生规程的一个简单调整，可以减轻这些边缘诊断的溢出效应。

papers.title: Price Indices and the Value of Innovation with Heterogenous Patients
papers.authors: Claudio Lucarelli, Sean Nicholson, Nicholas Tilipman
papers.abstract: Many countries use uniform cost-effectiveness criteria to determine whether to adopt a new medical technology for the entire population. This approach assumes homogeneous preferences for expected health benefits and side effects. We examine whether new prescription drugs generate welfare gains when accounting for heterogeneous preferences by constructing quality- adjusted price indices for colorectal cancer drug treatments. We find that while the efficacy gains from newer drugs do not justify high prices for the population as a whole, innovation improves the welfare of sicker, late-stage cancer patients. A uniform evaluation criterion would not permit these innovations despite welfare gains to a subpopulation.
papers.zh_title: 价格指数与异质性患者群体中创新的价值
papers.zh_abstract: 许多国家采用统一的成本效益标准来决定是否在全国范围内采用新的医疗技术。这种方法假设人们对预期健康收益和副作用具有同质偏好。我们通过构建结直肠癌药物治疗的质量调整价格指数，考察了在考虑异质性偏好时，新处方药是否带来福利收益。我们发现，尽管新药的有效性提升对整个群体而言不足以证明其高价的合理性，但创新改善了病情更重的晚期癌症患者的福利。尽管创新为亚群体带来了福利收益，但统一的评估标准不会允许这些创新。

papers.title: The Globalization of Refugee Flows
papers.authors: Xavier Devictor, Quy-Toan Do, Andrei A. Levchenko
papers.abstract: This paper analyzes the spatial distribution of refugees over 1987-2017 and establishes several stylized facts about refugees today compared with past decades. Refugees still predominantly reside in developing countries neighboring their country of origin. However, compared to past decades, refugees today (i) travel longer distances, (ii) are less likely to seek protection in a neighboring country, (iii) are less geographically concentrated, and (iv) are more likely to reside in a high-income OECD country. The findings bring new evidence to the debate on refugee responsibility-sharing.
papers.zh_title: 难民流动的全球化
papers.zh_abstract: 本文分析了1987年至2017年间难民的空间分布，并建立了关于当今难民与过去几十年相比的几个典型事实。难民仍然主要居住在原籍国邻近的发展中国家。然而，与过去几十年相比，当今难民（i）旅行距离更长，（ii）不太可能在邻国寻求保护，（iii）地理集中度较低，以及（iv）更可能居住在高收入经合组织国家。这些发现为关于难民责任分担的辩论提供了新证据。

papers.title: The Behavioral Foundations of Default Effects: Theory and Evidence from Medicare Part D
papers.authors: Zarek C. Brot-Goldberg, Timothy Layton, Boris Vabson, Adelina Yanyue Wang
papers.abstract: We leverage two unique natural experiments to show that, in public drug insurance for the low-income elderly in the U.S., defaults have large and persistent effects on plan enrollment and beneficiary drug utilization. We estimate that when a beneficiary's default is exogenously changed from one year to the next, 96% of beneficiaries follow that default. We then develop a general framework for choice under costly cognition that allows for the possibility that either paternalistic defaults that steer consumers to plans that suit them (Thaler and Sunstein 2008) or `shocking' defaults that trigger consumers to make active choices (Carroll et al. 2009) could be optimal. We show that optimal default design depends on a previously-overlooked parameter: The elasticity of active choice propensity with respect to the value of the default. Leveraging variation in the match value of randomly-assigned default plans, we estimate an elasticity close to zero: There is little difference in the probability of active choice between beneficiaries assigned a well-matched default versus beneficiaries assigned a poorly-matched default. We also show that this passivity has real consequences, with beneficiaries assigned poorly-matched defaults experiencing large declines in drug consumption relative to those assigned well-matched defaults. This suggests that any potential welfare gains from an active choice response induced by a poorly-matched default are likely to be small and outweighed by the welfare losses due to reductions in drug consumption among beneficiaries who follow the poorly-matched default. Using a third natural experiment and a structural model of attention, we find that the little active choice that is present in this market appears to be largely random, with two-thirds of the variation in active choice coming from within-beneficiary transitory shocks to attention. Our results show that default rules are an integral part of insurance market design and that beneficiaries are likely to benefit from paternalistic defaults rather than be hurt by them.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, IO, PE；JEL：D03, D9, G52, H0, I13
papers.zh_title: 默认效应的行为基础：来自联邦医疗保险D部分的理论与证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用两个独特的自然实验表明，在美国低收入老年人的公共药物保险中，默认选项对计划注册和受益人药物利用具有巨大且持续的影响。我们估计，当受益人的默认选项从一年到下一年被外生地改变时，96%的受益人遵循该默认选项。然后，我们为成本认知下的选择开发了一个通用框架，该框架允许两种可能性：引导消费者选择适合他们的计划的家长式默认选项（Thaler and Sunstein 2008），或触发消费者做出主动选择的“冲击性”默认选项（Carroll et al. 2009），都可能是最优的。我们表明，最优默认设计取决于一个先前被忽视的参数：主动选择倾向相对于默认选项价值的弹性。利用随机分配默认计划的匹配值变化，我们估计弹性接近于零：被分配良好匹配默认选项的受益人与被分配不良匹配默认选项的受益人之间，主动选择的概率几乎没有差异。我们还表明，这种被动性具有实际后果，与分配良好匹配默认选项的受益人相比，分配不良匹配默认选项的受益人的药物消费大幅下降。这表明，由不良匹配默认选项引发的主动选择反应所带来的任何潜在福利收益可能很小，并且被遵循不良匹配默认选项的受益人药物消费减少所造成的福利损失所抵消。利用第三个自然实验和注意力结构模型，我们发现该市场中存在的少量主动选择似乎主要是随机的，主动选择变动的三分之二来自受益人内部注意力的暂时冲击。我们的结果表明，默认规则是保险市场设计的一个组成部分，受益人更可能从家长式默认选项中受益，而不是受到其伤害。

papers.title: How do Physicians Respond to Malpractice Allegations? Evidence from Florida Emergency Departments
papers.authors: Caitlin Carroll, David M. Cutler, Anupam Jena
papers.abstract: The general deterrence effects of malpractice laws on physician behavior have been extensively studied but may lack salience for physicians. We study the role of specific deterrence in malpractice liability by examining how physicians respond to being accused of malpractice. With the universe of data on patient care and malpractice complaints for Florida emergency physicians, we find that physicians oversee 9% fewer discharges after allegations and treat each discharge 5% more expensively. Effects are similar for paid claims and dropped accusations. Increases in treatment are generalized, i.e., not limited to conditions similar to what the physician is reported for.
papers.zh_title: 医生如何应对医疗事故指控？来自佛罗里达州急诊科的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 医疗事故法对医生行为的一般威慑效应已被广泛研究，但对医生而言可能缺乏显著性。我们通过考察医生在被指控医疗事故后的反应，研究医疗事故责任中特定威慑的作用。利用佛罗里达州急诊科医生患者护理和医疗事故投诉的完整数据，我们发现，在指控发生后，医生监督的出诊量减少9%，并且每次出诊的治疗费用增加5%。对于已赔付的索赔和被撤销的指控，效应相似。治疗增加是普遍性的，即不限于与医生被报告情况相似的病症。

papers.title: Wealth Trajectories Across Key Milestones: Longitudinal Evidence from Life-Course Transitions
papers.authors: Gopi Shah Goda, Jialu Liu Streeter
papers.abstract: Wealth varies considerably across the population and changes significantly over the lifecycle. In this paper, we trace out trajectories of wealth across several key life milestones, including marriage, homeownership, childbirth, divorce, disability, health shocks, retirement and widowhood using multiple decades of longitudinal panel data. We estimate both changes over the ten-year period before and after each milestone and assess whether those changes occur gradually or sharply after the milestone. We find evidence of significant long-run increases in wealth associated with homeownership and retirement, and significant long-run reductions in wealth associated with divorce, health shocks, and disability. In general, these changes appear to occur gradually rather than immediately after the milestone. Our results also indicate a large degree of heterogeneity across demographics, socioeconomic status and risk protection from insurance. In particular, those with lower levels of socioeconomic status and those without access to risk protection experience smaller wealth gains (or larger wealth losses) following life-course transitions. These results identify populations and life stages where individuals are most vulnerable to large reductions in wealth.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS, PE；JEL：G51, I13, J1
papers.zh_title: 关键里程碑上的财富轨迹：来自生命历程转变的纵向证据
papers.zh_abstract: 财富在人群中差异很大，并在生命周期中显著变化。在本文中，我们利用数十年的纵向面板数据，描绘了在几个关键人生里程碑（包括结婚、购房、生育、离婚、残疾、健康冲击、退休和丧偶）前后的财富轨迹。我们估计了每个里程碑前后十年期间的变化，并评估这些变化是在里程碑之后逐渐发生还是急剧发生。我们发现了与购房和退休相关的显著长期财富增长，以及与离婚、健康冲击和残疾相关的显著长期财富减少。总体而言，这些变化似乎是在里程碑之后逐渐发生，而非立即发生。我们的结果还表明，在不同人口统计特征、社会经济地位和保险风险保护方面存在很大程度的异质性。特别是，社会经济地位较低和无法获得风险保护的人群在生命历程转变后经历的财富增长较小（或财富损失较大）。这些结果识别出个体最容易遭受财富大幅减少的人群和生命阶段。

papers.title: Machine Learning and Perceived Age Stereotypes in Job Ads: Evidence from an Experiment
papers.authors: Ian Burn, Daniel Firoozi, Daniel Ladd, David Neumark
papers.abstract: We explore whether ageist stereotypes in job ads are detectable using machine learning methods measuring the linguistic similarity of job-ad language to ageist stereotypes identified by industrial psychologists. We then conduct an experiment to evaluate whether this language is perceived as biased against older workers. We find that language classified by the machine learning algorithm as closely related to ageist stereotypes is perceived as ageist by experimental subjects. The scores assigned to the language related to ageist stereotypes are larger when responses are incentivized by rewarding participants for guessing how other respondents rated the language. These methods could potentially help enforce anti-discrimination laws by using job ads to predict or identify employers more likely to be engaging in age discrimination.
papers.zh_title: 机器学习与招聘广告中感知到的年龄刻板印象：来自实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了是否可以使用机器学习方法检测招聘广告中的年龄歧视刻板印象，该方法衡量招聘广告语言与工业心理学家识别的年龄刻板印象的语言相似性。然后，我们进行了一项实验，以评估这种语言是否被认为对老年工人存在偏见。我们发现，被机器学习算法分类为与年龄刻板印象密切相关的语言，被实验对象认为具有年龄歧视。当通过奖励参与者猜测其他受访者如何评价该语言来激励回应时，与年龄刻板印象相关的语言得分更高。这些方法可能通过使用招聘广告预测或识别更可能从事年龄歧视的雇主，从而有助于执行反歧视法律。

papers.title: Informational Content of Factor Structures in Simultaneous Binary Response Models
papers.authors: Shakeeb Khan, Arnaud Maurel, Yichong Zhang
papers.abstract: We study the informational content of factor structures in discrete triangular systems. Factor structures have been employed in a variety of settings in cross sectional and panel data models, and in this paper we formally quantify their identifying power in a bivariate system often employed in the treatment effects literature. Our main findings are that imposing a factor structure yields point identification of parameters of interest, such as the coefficient associated with the endogenous regressor in the outcome equation, under weaker assumptions than usually required in these models. In particular, we show that a non-standard exclusion restriction that requires an explanatory variable in the outcome equation to be excluded from the treatment equation is no longer necessary for identification, even in cases where all of the regressors from the outcome equation are discrete. We also establish identification of the coefficient of the endogenous regressor in models with more general factor structures, in situations where one has access to at least two continuous measurements of the common factor.
papers.zh_title: 同时二元响应模型中因子结构的信息内容
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了离散三角系统中因子结构的信息内容。因子结构已被应用于横截面和面板数据模型的多种设定中，在本文中，我们正式量化了它们在通常用于处理效应文献的双变量系统中的识别能力。我们的主要发现是，施加因子结构可以在比这些模型通常所需假设更弱的条件下，实现感兴趣参数（例如结果方程中内生回归变量的系数）的点识别。特别是，我们表明，即使结果方程中的所有回归变量都是离散的，也不再需要一种非标准的排除限制条件，即要求结果方程中的解释变量被排除在治疗方程之外。在拥有至少两个共同因子连续测量的情况下，我们还建立了具有更一般因子结构的模型中内生回归变量系数的识别。

papers.title: The Family Origin of the Math Gender Gap is a White Affluent Phenomenon
papers.authors: Gaia Dossi, David N. Figlio, Paola Giuliano, Paola Sapienza
papers.abstract: Previous research has shown that norms around the role of women in society could help explain the gender gap in mathematics, and that these norms could be transmitted within the family. Using data from the Florida Department of Education combined with birth certificates we uncover important heterogeneity in the transmission of gender biases within the family. We find that gender role norms can explain the lower performance of girls in mathematics only in relatively affluent White families, whereas they do not apparently matter for the performance of Black girls.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LS, POL；JEL：A13, I20, J16, Z1
papers.zh_title: 数学性别差距的家庭起源是富裕白人的现象
papers.zh_abstract: 先前的研究表明，关于女性在社会中角色的规范可能有助于解释数学方面的性别差距，并且这些规范可能在家庭内部传递。利用佛罗里达州教育部的数据结合出生证明，我们发现了家庭内部性别偏见传递的重要异质性。我们发现，性别角色规范只能解释相对富裕的白人家庭中女孩在数学方面的较低表现，而对于黑人女孩的表现则似乎没有明显影响。

papers.title: Promoting Platform Takeoff and Self-Fulfilling Expectations: Field Experimental Evidence
papers.authors: Kevin Boudreau
papers.abstract: The theoretical literature on platforms and network effects predicts that the initial growth and takeoff of a platform crucially depends on the market’s expectations of the future installed base. This paper tests this claim, reporting on a field experiment in which invitations to join a newly launched platform were sent to 16,349 individuals and included randomized statements regarding the future expected installed base (along with disclosures of the current installed base). I find evidence consistent with subjective expectations playing a crucial role in shaping early adoption and platform takeoff. Statements regarding expectations of the future installed base more significantly affected adoption than did disclosures of the current installed base. Statements of larger numbers of expected users caused more adoption than did smaller numbers. Statements of a smaller installed base of users (whether current or expected) led to lower demand than did stating nothing at all. The effect of stating subjective expectations by the platform became insignificant once the current installed base grew larger. The response of adoption to expected numbers of users reveals patterns consistent with the long-theorized chicken-and-egg problem and self-fulfilling expectations. The findings have significant implications for the effective promotion, marketing, and “evangelism” of new platform ventures.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, PR；JEL：C93, D16, D26, D43, L1, L13, L86
papers.zh_title: 促进平台起飞与自我实现的预期：实地实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 关于平台和网络效应的理论文献预测，平台的初始增长和起飞关键取决于市场对未来安装基数的预期。本文通过一项实地实验检验了这一论断，实验中向16,349名个体发送了加入新推出平台的邀请，并包含了关于未来预期安装基数的随机陈述（同时披露了当前安装基数）。我发现证据表明，主观预期在塑造早期采用和平台起飞中发挥了关键作用。关于未来安装基数预期的陈述对采用的影响显著大于当前安装基数的披露。预期用户数量较大的陈述比数量较小的陈述导致了更多的采用。无论当前还是预期的用户安装基数较小的陈述，都比完全不陈述导致更低的需求。一旦当前安装基数变大，平台陈述主观预期的影响就变得不显著。采用对预期用户数量的反应揭示了与长期理论化的“先有鸡还是先有蛋”问题和自我实现预期一致的模式。这些发现对新型平台企业的有效推广、营销和“布道”具有重要启示。

papers.title: What Matters for Electrification? Evidence from 70 Years of U.S. Home Heating Choices
papers.authors: Lucas W. Davis
papers.abstract: The percentage of U.S. homes heated with electricity has increased steadily from 1% in 1950, to 8% in 1970, to 26% in 1990, to 40% in 2020. This paper investigates the key determinants of this increase in electrification using data on heating choices from millions of U.S. households over a 70-year period. Energy prices, geography, climate, housing characteristics, and household income are shown to collectively explain 90% of the increase, with changing energy prices by far the most important single factor. This framework is then used to calculate the economic cost of an electrification mandate for new homes. Households in warm states tend to prefer electricity anyway, so would be made worse off by less than $350 annually on average. Households in cold states, however, tend to strongly prefer natural gas so would be made worse off by more than $1000 annually. These findings are directly relevant to a growing number of policies aimed at reducing carbon dioxide emissions through electrification.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE；JEL：H23, L51, Q41, Q42, Q48, Q54
papers.zh_title: 什么对电气化至关重要？来自美国70年家庭供暖选择的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 美国使用电力供暖的家庭比例从1950年的1%稳步增长到1970年的8%，1990年的26%，再到2020年的40%。本文利用70年间数百万美国家庭的供暖选择数据，研究了这一电气化增长的关键决定因素。能源价格、地理位置、气候、住房特征和家庭收入共同解释了90%的增长，其中能源价格的变化是迄今为止最重要的单一因素。然后，本文利用这一框架计算了新住宅电气化强制令的经济成本。温暖州的家庭无论如何都倾向于选择电力，因此平均每年福利损失不到350美元。然而，寒冷州的家庭强烈倾向于天然气，因此每年福利损失超过1000美元。这些发现与越来越多旨在通过电气化减少二氧化碳排放的政策直接相关。

papers.title: Estimating Production Functions in Differentiated-Product Industries with Quantity Information and External Instruments
papers.authors: Nicolás de Roux, Marcela Eslava, Santiago Franco, Eric Verhoogen
papers.abstract: This paper uses output- and input-quantity information and external instruments for materials and labor choices to improve production-function estimates. In rich Colombian data on producers of rubber and plastic products, we construct the external instruments from exchange-rate movements and variation in the “bite” of the minimum wage. Under assumptions of constant elasticities of substitution among outputs and inputs within firms, we aggregate from the firm-product to the firm level and show how quality and variety choices may bias quantity-based estimators. We supplement the external instruments with internal instruments — lagged levels and differences of input choices — in a two-step approach, estimating a difference equation to recover the materials and labor coefficients and a levels equation to recover the capital coefficient. Our estimates imply markups that are 67-70% of those implied by standard proxy-variable methods. A simple Monte Carlo simulation illustrates the advantages of our approach in a controlled setting with firm-level input-quality differences.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, IO, ITI, PR；JEL：D24, L1, L65, O14
papers.zh_title: 在差异化产品行业中利用数量信息和外部工具变量估计生产函数
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用产出和投入数量信息以及针对材料和劳动力选择的外部工具变量来改进生产函数估计。在哥伦比亚橡胶和塑料制品生产商的丰富数据中，我们利用汇率变动和最低工资“约束力”的变化构建了外部工具变量。在假设企业内产出和投入之间替代弹性不变的条件下，我们将数据从企业-产品层面加总到企业层面，并展示了质量和品种选择如何可能使基于数量的估计量产生偏差。我们在两步法中，用内部工具变量（投入选择的滞后水平和差分）补充外部工具变量，通过估计差分方程来恢复材料和劳动力系数，通过估计水平方程来恢复资本系数。我们的估计得出的加成率是标准代理变量方法所得结果的67-70%。一个简单的蒙特卡洛模拟说明了我们的方法在存在企业层面投入质量差异的受控环境中的优势。

papers.title: Robots and Labor in the Service Sector: Evidence from Nursing Homes
papers.authors: Karen Eggleston, Yong Suk Lee, Toshiaki Iizuka
papers.abstract: In one of the first studies of service sector robotics using establishment-level data, we study the impact of robots on staffing in Japanese nursing homes, using geographic variation in robot subsidies as an instrumental variable. We find that robot adoption increases employment by augmenting the number of care workers and nurses on flexible employment contracts, and decreases difficulty in staff retention. Robot adoption also reduces the monthly wages of regular nurses, consistent with reduced burden of care. Our findings suggest that the impact of robots may not be detrimental to labor and may remedy challenges posed by rapidly aging populations.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS；JEL：I11, J14, J23, O30
papers.zh_title: 服务业中的机器人与劳动力：来自养老院的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 在首批利用机构层面数据研究服务业机器人的研究中，我们利用机器人补贴的地理差异作为工具变量，研究了机器人对日本养老院人员配置的影响。我们发现，机器人采用通过增加灵活雇佣合同下的护理人员和护士数量来提高就业，并降低了人员留任的难度。机器人采用还降低了正式护士的月工资，这与护理负担减轻相一致。我们的发现表明，机器人的影响可能不会对劳动力有害，反而可能缓解人口快速老龄化带来的挑战。

papers.title: Did the $660 Billion Paycheck Protection Program and $220 Billion Economic Injury Disaster Loan Program Get Disbursed to Minority Communities in the Early Stages of COVID-19?
papers.authors: Robert W. Fairlie, Frank Fossen
papers.abstract: Social distancing restrictions and health- and economic-driven demand shifts from COVID-19 shut down many small businesses with especially negative impacts on minority owners. Is there evidence that the unprecedented federal government response to help small businesses – the $659 billion Paycheck Protection Program (PPP) and the related $220 billion COVID-19 Economic Injury Disaster Loans (EIDL) – which had a stated goal of helping disadvantaged groups, was disbursed evenly to minority communities? In this descriptive research note, we provide the first detailed analysis of how the PPP and EIDL funds were disbursed across minority communities in the country. From our analysis of data on the universe of loans from these programs and administrative data on employer firms, we generally find a slightly positive relationship between PPP loan receipt per business and the minority share of the population or businesses, although funds flowed to minority communities later than to communities with lower minority shares. PPP loan amounts, however, are negatively related to the minority share of the population. The EIDL program, in contrast, both in numbers and amounts, was distributed positively to minority communities.
papers.zh_title: 6600亿美元的薪资保护计划和2200亿美元的经济伤害灾难贷款计划在COVID-19早期阶段是否流向了少数族裔社区？
papers.zh_abstract: 社交距离限制以及COVID-19带来的健康和经济驱动的需求变化导致许多小企业关闭，对少数族裔企业主的负面影响尤为严重。是否有证据表明，旨在帮助小企业的前所未有的联邦政府应对措施——6590亿美元的薪资保护计划（PPP）和相关2200亿美元的COVID-19经济伤害灾难贷款（EIDL）——其既定目标是帮助弱势群体，并且资金均匀地分配给了少数族裔社区？在这篇描述性研究笔记中，我们首次详细分析了PPP和EIDL资金如何在全国少数族裔社区中分配。通过对这些计划贷款全量数据以及雇主企业行政数据的分析，我们普遍发现，每家企业获得的PPP贷款与少数族裔人口或企业比例之间存在略微正相关关系，尽管资金流向少数族裔社区的时间晚于流向少数族裔比例较低社区的时间。然而，PPP贷款金额与少数族裔人口比例呈负相关。相比之下，EIDL计划无论在数量还是金额上，都正向分配给了少数族裔社区。

papers.title: Stock Prices and Economic Activity in the Time of Coronavirus
papers.authors: Steven J. Davis, Dingqian Liu, Xuguang Simon Sheng
papers.abstract: Stock prices and workplace mobility trace out striking clockwise paths in daily data from mid-February to late May 2020. Global stock prices fell 30 percent from 17 February to 12 March, before mobility declined. Over the next 11 days, stocks fell another 10 percentage points as mobility dropped 40 percent. From 23 March to 9 April, stocks recovered half their losses and mobility fell further. From 9 April to late May, both stocks and mobility rose modestly. This dynamic plays out across the 35 countries in our sample, with notable departures in China, South Korea, and Taiwan. The size of the global stock market crash in reaction to the pandemic is many times larger than a standard asset-pricing model implies. Looking more closely at the world’s two largest economies, the pandemic had greater effects on stock market levels and volatilities in the U.S. than in China even before it became evident that early U.S. containment efforts would flounder. Newspaper-based narrative evidence confirms the dominant – and historically unprecedented – role of pandemic-related developments in the stock market behavior of both countries.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, PE；JEL：E32, E44, E65, G12, G18, I18
papers.zh_title: 新冠病毒时期的股票价格与经济活动
papers.zh_abstract: 在2020年2月中旬至5月下旬的每日数据中，股票价格和工作场所流动性描绘出引人注目的顺时针路径。全球股票价格从2月17日到3月12日下跌了30%，而流动性尚未下降。在接下来的11天里，随着流动性下降40%，股票又下跌了10个百分点。从3月23日到4月9日，股票收复了一半的跌幅，而流动性进一步下降。从4月9日到5月下旬，股票和流动性均小幅上升。这种动态在我们样本中的35个国家中均有体现，但在中国、韩国和台湾地区存在显著差异。全球股市因疫情冲击而崩盘的规模远超标准资产定价模型所暗示的水平。更仔细地观察世界两大经济体，疫情对美国股市水平和波动性的影响大于中国，甚至在美国早期遏制努力明显失败之前就已如此。基于报纸的叙事证据证实了疫情相关发展在两国股市行为中占据主导地位——且具有历史上前所未有的作用。

papers.title: Adaptive Correspondence Experiments
papers.authors: Hadar Avivi, Patrick M. Kline, Evan Rose, Christopher R. Walters
papers.abstract: Correspondence experiments probe for discrimination by manipulating employer perceptions of applicant characteristics. We consider the gains from dynamically adapting the number and characteristics of fictitious applications to the sequence of employer responses received so far. Calibrating the employer callback process to data from a recent correspondence experiment by Nunley et al. (2015), we find it is possible to cut the number of applications required to detect a fixed number of discriminatory jobs roughly in half relative to the static benchmark design that sends the same number and mix of applications to all jobs. These gains are achieved primarily from abandoning jobs with very low callback probabilities and those that demonstrate a willingness to call black applicants.
papers.zh_title: 自适应通信实验
papers.zh_abstract: 通信实验通过操纵雇主对申请人特征的感知来探测歧视。我们考虑根据迄今为止收到的雇主回复序列，动态调整虚构申请的数量和特征所带来的收益。通过将雇主回电过程校准到Nunley等人（2015）近期通信实验的数据，我们发现，与向所有职位发送相同数量和组合申请的静态基准设计相比，可以将检测固定数量歧视性职位所需的申请数量大约削减一半。这些收益主要通过放弃回电概率极低的职位以及那些表现出愿意回电黑人申请人的职位来实现。

papers.title: Another brick on the Wall: On the Effects of Non-Contributory Pensions on Material and Subjective Well Being
papers.authors: Rosangela Bando, Sebastian Galiani, Paul Gertler
papers.abstract: Public expenditures on non-contributory pensions are equivalent to at least 1 percent of GDP in several countries in Latin America and is expected to increase. We explore the effect of non-contributory pensions on the well-being of the beneficiary population by studying the Pensiones Alimentarias program established by law in Paraguay, which targets older adults living in poverty. Households with a beneficiary increased their level of consumption by 44 percent. The program improved subjective well-being in 0.48 standard deviations. These effects are consistent with the findings of Bando, Galiani and Gertler (2020) and Galiani, Gertler and Bando (2016) in their studies on the non-contributory pension schemes in Peru and Mexico. Thus, we conclude that the effects of non-contributory pensions on well-being in Paraguay are comparable to those found for Peru and Mexico and add to the construction of external validity.
papers.zh_title: 墙上的另一块砖：非缴费型养老金对物质和主观福祉的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 在拉丁美洲的几个国家，非缴费型养老金的公共支出至少相当于GDP的1%，并且预计还会增加。我们通过研究巴拉圭依法设立的“养老金食品计划”（Pensiones Alimentarias），该计划针对贫困老年人，探讨了非缴费型养老金对受益人口福祉的影响。有受益人的家庭消费水平提高了44%。该计划将主观福祉提高了0.48个标准差。这些效应与Bando、Galiani和Gertler（2020）以及Galiani、Gertler和Bando（2016）在秘鲁和墨西哥非缴费型养老金计划研究中发现的结果一致。因此，我们得出结论，巴拉圭非缴费型养老金对福祉的影响与秘鲁和墨西哥的发现相当，并为构建外部有效性增添了证据。

papers.title: Moms’ Time—Married or Not
papers.authors: Daniel S. Hamermesh
papers.abstract: Using time-diary data from the U.S. and six wealthy European countries, I demonstrate that non-partnered mothers spend slightly less time performing childcare, but much less time in other household activities than partnered mothers. Unpartnered mothers’ total work time—paid work and household production—is slightly less than partnered women’s. In the U.S. but not elsewhere they watch more television and engage in fewer other leisure activities. These differences are independent of any differences in age, race/ethnicity, ages and numbers of children, and household incomes. Non-partnered mothers feel slightly more pressured for time and much less satisfied with their lives. Analyses using the NLSY79 show that mothers whose partners left the home in the past two years became more depressed than those whose marriages remained intact. Coupled with evidence that husbands spend substantial time in childcare and with their children, the results suggest that children of non-partnered mothers receive much less parental care—perhaps 40 percent less—than other children; and most of what they receive is from mothers who are less satisfied with their lives.
papers.zh_title: 母亲的时间——无论已婚与否
papers.zh_abstract: 利用美国和六个富裕欧洲国家的时间日记数据，我证明非伴侣母亲在育儿上花费的时间略少，但在其他家务活动上的时间远少于有伴侣的母亲。非伴侣母亲的总工作时间——包括有偿工作和家务生产——略少于有伴侣的女性。在美国（而非其他国家），她们观看更多电视，参与其他休闲活动更少。这些差异独立于年龄、种族/民族、子女年龄和数量以及家庭收入的差异。非伴侣母亲感到时间压力略大，生活满意度低得多。使用NLSY79数据的分析显示，过去两年内伴侣离开家庭的母亲比婚姻保持完整的母亲更抑郁。结合丈夫在育儿和陪伴子女上花费大量时间的证据，结果表明非伴侣母亲的子女获得的父母照料远少于其他儿童——可能少40%；而且他们获得的大部分照料来自生活满意度较低的母亲。

papers.title: Health Knowledge and Non-Pharmaceutical Interventions During the COVID-19 Pandemic in Africa
papers.authors: Anne E. Fitzpatrick, Sabrin A. Beg, Laura C. Derksen, Anne Karing, Jason T. Kerwin, Adrienne Lucas, Natalia Ordaz Reynoso, Munir Squires
papers.abstract: Providing health information is a non-pharmaceutical intervention designed to reduce disease transmission and infection risk by encouraging behavior change. But does knowledge change behavior? We test whether coronavirus health knowledge promotes protective risk mitigation behaviors early in the COVID-19 pandemic across four African countries (Ghana, Malawi, Sierra Leone, and Tanzania). Despite reputations for weak health sectors and low average levels of education, health knowledge of the symptoms and transmission mechanisms was high in all countries in the two months after the virus entered the country. Higher knowledge is associated with increased protective measures that would likely lower disease risk with one exception–knowledge is inversely correlated with social distancing. Respondents largely adhered to mask mandates and lockdowns, but continued coming into contact with others at small, informal gatherings, gatherings not affected by mandates. Knowledge alone appears unlikely to reduce all risky activities, especially gatherings within other people's homes. Even early in the pandemic income loss or stress were commonly reported. Our results suggest that early and consistent government provision of health information, likely reduced the severity of the pandemic in Africa but was not a panacea.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EH, PE；JEL：I12, I15, I18, O12
papers.zh_title: 非洲COVID-19疫情期间的健康知识与非药物干预
papers.zh_abstract: 提供健康信息是一种非药物干预，旨在通过鼓励行为改变来减少疾病传播和感染风险。但知识是否改变行为？我们测试了在COVID-19疫情早期，冠状病毒健康知识是否在四个非洲国家（加纳、马拉维、塞拉利昂和坦桑尼亚）促进了保护性风险缓解行为。尽管这些国家以卫生部门薄弱和平均教育水平低而闻名，但在病毒进入该国后的两个月内，所有国家关于症状和传播机制的健康知识都很高。更高的知识与增加的保护措施相关，这些措施可能降低疾病风险，但有一个例外——知识与社交距离呈负相关。受访者大多遵守口罩令和封锁措施，但继续在小规模非正式聚会上与他人接触，这些聚会不受命令影响。仅凭知识似乎不太可能减少所有风险活动，尤其是在他人家庭内的聚会。即使在疫情早期，收入损失或压力也常被报告。我们的结果表明，政府早期且持续提供健康信息可能减轻了非洲疫情的严重程度，但并非万能药。

papers.title: Globalization, Trade Imbalances and Labor Market Adjustment
papers.authors: Rafael Dix-Carneiro, João Paulo Pessoa, Ricardo M. Reyes-Heroles, Sharon Traiberman
papers.abstract: We argue that modeling trade imbalances is crucial to understanding transitional dynamics in response to globalization shocks. We build and estimate a general equilibrium, multi-country, multi-sector model of trade with two key ingredients: (a) endogenous trade imbalances arising from households' consumption and saving decisions; (b) labor market frictions across and within sectors. We use our model to perform several empirical exercises. We find that the “China shock” accounted for 25% of the decline in US manufacturing between 2000 and 2014—twice the magnitude predicted from a model imposing balanced trade. A concurrent rise in US service employment led to a negligible aggregate unemployment response. We then benchmark our model's predictions for the gains from trade against the popular “ACR” sufficient statistics approach. We find that our predictions for the long-run gains from trade and consumption dynamics significantly diverge.
papers.zh_title: 全球化、贸易失衡与劳动力市场调整
papers.zh_abstract: 我们认为，对贸易失衡进行建模对于理解全球化冲击后的转型动态至关重要。我们构建并估计了一个具有两个关键要素的一般均衡、多国、多部门贸易模型：(a) 由家庭消费和储蓄决策产生的内生贸易失衡；(b) 部门间和部门内的劳动力市场摩擦。我们使用模型进行多项实证分析。我们发现，“中国冲击”解释了2000年至2014年间美国制造业下降的25%——这是从强制贸易平衡的模型中预测的两倍。同期美国服务业就业的上升导致总体失业反应微乎其微。然后，我们将模型对贸易收益的预测与流行的“ACR”充分统计量方法进行对比。我们发现，我们对长期贸易收益和消费动态的预测存在显著差异。

papers.title: The Impact of COVID-19 on US Firms
papers.authors: Nicholas Bloom, Robert S. Fletcher, Ethan Yeh
papers.abstract: We use survey data on an opt-in panel of around 2,500 US small businesses to assess the impact of COVID-19. We find a significant negative sales impact that peaked in Quarter 2 of 2020, with an average loss of 29% in sales. The large negative impact masks significant heterogeneity, with over 40% of firms reporting zero or a positive impact, while almost a quarter report losses of more than 50%. These impacts also appear to be persistent, with firms reporting the largest sales drops in mid-2020 still forecasting large sales losses a year later in mid-2021. In terms of business types, we find that the smallest offline firms experienced sales drops of over 40% compared to less than 10% for the largest online firms. Finally, in terms of owners, we find female and black owners reported significantly larger drops in sales. Owners with a humanities degree also experienced far larger losses, while those with a STEM degree saw the least impact.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, LS, PR；JEL：E0, J0, L0
papers.zh_title: COVID-19对美国企业的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们使用一个约2500家美国小企业组成的自愿参与面板的调查数据来评估COVID-19的影响。我们发现显著的负面销售影响，在2020年第二季度达到峰值，平均销售额损失29%。巨大的负面影响掩盖了显著的异质性，超过40%的企业报告零影响或正面影响，而近四分之一的企业报告损失超过50%。这些影响似乎也具有持续性，在2020年中期报告销售额下降最大的企业，一年后到2021年中期仍预测有巨大的销售损失。在企业类型方面，我们发现最小的线下企业销售额下降超过40%，而最大的线上企业下降不到10%。最后，在企业主方面，我们发现女性和黑人企业主报告的销售额下降显著更大。拥有人文学科学位的企业主也遭受了更大的损失，而拥有STEM学位的企业主受到的影响最小。

papers.title: Government and Private Household Debt Relief during COVID-19
papers.authors: Susan F. Cherry, Erica Xuewei Jiang, Gregor Matvos, Tomasz Piskorski, Amit Seru
papers.abstract: We follow a representative panel of US borrowers to study the suspension of household debt payments (debt forbearance) during the COVID-19 pandemic. Between March and October of 2020, loans worth $2 trillion entered forbearance. On average, cumulative payments missed per individual in forbearance during this period were largest for mortgage ($3,200) and auto ($430) borrowers. We estimate that more than 60 million borrowers will miss $70 billion on their debt payments by the end of 2021:Q1. This large amount of debt relief significantly dampened the household debt distress, which can help explain household delinquencies below pre-pandemic levels—a significant difference from other economic crises when delinquencies sharply increased along with unemployment. Forbearance thus may have had potentially large aggregate consequences for house prices and economic activity. Relief flows more to higher income individuals than those receiving stimulus checks, partially due to their higher debt balances: 60% of aggregate forbearance is provided to above median income borrowers. On the other hand, forbearance rates are higher among the more vulnerable populations: individuals with lower credit scores and lower incomes. Borrowers in regions with a higher likelihood of COVID-19 related economic shocks and higher shares of minorities were more likely to obtain debt relief. One third of borrowers in forbearance continued making full payments, suggesting that forbearance acts as a credit line, allowing borrowers to “draw” on payment deferral if needed. More than a quarter of total debt relief was provided by the private sector outside of the government mandates. Exploiting a discontinuity in mortgage eligibility under the CARES Act we estimate that implicit government debt relief subsidies increase the rate of forbearance by about 25%. Government and private relief follow similar patterns across income and creditworthiness, suggesting that borrower self-selection in requesting forbearance is an important determinant of debt relief incidence, and drives the distribution of relief across different population strata. Government relief is provided through private intermediaries, which differ in their propensity to supply relief, with shadow banks less likely to provide forbearance than traditional banks.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, LE, PE；JEL：G00, G01, G18, G2, G21, G23, G38, G5
papers.zh_title: COVID-19期间的政府与私人家庭债务减免
papers.zh_abstract: 我们追踪了一个具有代表性的美国借款人面板数据，研究了COVID-19疫情期间家庭债务支付暂停（债务宽限）的情况。2020年3月至10月期间，价值2万亿美元的贷款进入了宽限期。平均而言，在此期间每位处于宽限期的借款人累计未付的支付金额中，抵押贷款（3200美元）和汽车贷款（430美元）的借款人最大。我们估计，到2021年第一季度末，超过6000万借款人将错过700亿美元的债务支付。这一巨额债务减免显著缓解了家庭债务困境，这有助于解释家庭违约率低于疫情前水平的现象——这与其它经济危机中违约率随失业率急剧上升的情况形成显著差异。因此，宽限可能对房价和经济活动产生潜在的巨大总体影响。与收到刺激支票的人相比，救济更多地流向高收入个体，部分原因是他们更高的债务余额：60%的总体宽限提供给了收入中位数以上的借款人。另一方面，在更脆弱的人群中，宽限率更高：信用评分较低和收入较低的个体。在COVID-19相关经济冲击可能性更高和少数族裔比例更高的地区，借款人更有可能获得债务减免。三分之一的宽限借款人继续全额还款，这表明宽限充当了一条信贷额度，允许借款人在需要时“提取”延期付款。超过四分之一的债务减免由私营部门在政府指令之外提供。利用《CARES法案》下抵押贷款资格的不连续性，我们估计隐性政府债务减免补贴使宽限率提高了约25%。政府和私人救济在收入和信用度方面遵循相似的模式，这表明借款人自我选择申请宽限是债务减免发生率的重要决定因素，并驱动了救济在不同人口阶层中的分布。政府救济通过私人中介提供，这些中介提供救济的倾向不同，影子银行比传统银行更不可能提供宽限。

papers.title: Do Global Pandemics Matter for Stock Prices? Lessons from the 1918 Spanish Flu
papers.authors: Marco Del Angel, Caroline Fohlin, Marc D. Weidenmier
papers.abstract: We study the impact of the 1918 Spanish Flu on U.S. stock prices. We use the death rate to control for the impact of the global pandemic and war news reported in the New York Times to capture the positive effects of the end of World War I on stock prices. Using a new weekly hand collected NYSE stock price index, we show that there is a -.73 correlation between the aggregate stock market and the death rate. Furthermore, vector autoregressions demonstrate that the death rate can explain up to 24 percent of the forecast error variance in the aggregate stock index from September 1918 until the end of the pandemic in March 1920. We also find that the flu had a significant, but varied impact on nine NYSE sectors. The empirical analysis indicates that pandemics can matter big time for stock prices.
papers.zh_title: 全球大流行对股票价格重要吗？来自1918年西班牙流感的教训
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了1918年西班牙流感对美国股票价格的影响。我们使用死亡率来控制全球大流行的影响，并使用《纽约时报》报道的战争新闻来捕捉第一次世界大战结束对股票价格的积极影响。利用一个新的每周手工收集的纽约证券交易所股票价格指数，我们显示总体股票市场与死亡率之间存在-0.73的相关性。此外，向量自回归表明，从1918年9月到1920年3月大流行结束，死亡率可以解释总体股票指数预测误差方差中高达24%的部分。我们还发现，流感对九个纽约证券交易所行业产生了显著但不同的影响。实证分析表明，大流行可能对股票价格产生重大影响。

papers.title: Private and Social Returns to R&D: Drug Development and Demographics
papers.authors: Efraim Benmelech, Janice C. Eberly, Joshua L. Krieger, Dimitris Papanikolaou
papers.abstract: Investment in intangible capital—in particular, research and development—increased dramatically since the 1990s. However, productivity growth remains sluggish in recent years. One potential reason is that a significant share of the increase in intangible investment is geared toward consumer products such as pharmaceutical drugs with limited spillovers to productivity. We document that a significant share of R&D spending in the U.S. is done by pharmaceutical firms and is geared to developing drugs for the older patients. Increased life expectancy and quality of life among the elderly increases welfare but may not be reflected in estimates of total factor productivity.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, EH, PR；JEL：I10, I15, L65, O32, O34, O40
papers.zh_title: 研发的私人与社会回报：药物开发与人口结构
papers.zh_abstract: 自1990年代以来，对无形资本——特别是研发——的投资急剧增加。然而，近年来生产率增长仍然缓慢。一个潜在原因是，无形投资增长的很大一部分面向消费品，例如对生产率溢出效应有限的药物。我们记录到，美国研发支出中很大一部分由制药公司完成，并致力于为老年患者开发药物。老年人预期寿命和生活质量的提高增加了福利，但可能不会反映在全要素生产率的估计中。

papers.title: Hit Harder, Recover Slower? Unequal Employment Effects of the Covid-19 Shock
papers.authors: Sang Yoon (Tim) Lee, Minsung Park, Yongseok Shin
papers.abstract: The destructive economic impact of the Covid-19 pandemic was distributed unequally across the population. Gender, race and ethnicity, age, education level, and a worker's industry and occupation all mattered. We analyze the initial negative effect and the lingering effect through the recovery phase across demographic and socio-economic groups. The initial negative impact on employment was larger for women, minorities, the less educated, and the young, even after accounting for the industries and occupations they worked in. By November 2020, however, the differential impact between men and women, and between education and age groups has vanished. Across race and ethnic groups, Hispanics and Asians were the worse hit but made up for most of the lost ground, while the initial impact on Blacks was smaller but recovery slower.
papers.zh_title: 打击更重，恢复更慢？COVID-19冲击的不平等就业效应
papers.zh_abstract: COVID-19大流行的破坏性经济影响在人口中分布不均。性别、种族和民族、年龄、教育水平以及工人的行业和职业都很重要。我们分析了跨人口和社会经济群体的初始负面效应以及复苏阶段的持续效应。即使考虑了工人所在的行业和职业，对就业的初始负面影响在女性、少数族裔、受教育程度较低者和年轻人中更大。然而，到2020年11月，男性和女性之间以及不同教育和年龄组之间的差异影响已经消失。在种族和民族群体中，西班牙裔和亚裔受到的打击更严重，但弥补了大部分损失，而对黑人的初始影响较小，但复苏较慢。

papers.title: Examining Income Expectations in the College and Early Post-college Periods: New Distributional Tests of Rational Expectations.
papers.authors: Thomas Crossley, Yifan Gong, Todd R. Stinebrickner, Ralph Stinebrickner
papers.abstract: Unique longitudinal probabilistic expectations data from the Berea Panel Study, which cover both the college and early post-college periods, are used to examine young adults’ beliefs about their future incomes. We introduce a new measure of the ex post accuracy of beliefs, and two new approaches to testing whether, ex ante, agents exhibit Rational Expectations. We show that taking into account the additional information about higher moments of individual belief distributions contained in probabilistic expectations data is important for detecting types of violations of Rational Expectations that are not detectable by existing mean-based tests. Beliefs about future income are found to become more accurate as students progress through school and then enter the post-college period. Tests of Rational Expectations almost always reject for the in-school period, but the evidence against Rational Expectations is much weaker in the post-college period.
papers.zh_title: 考察大学及大学后早期阶段的收入预期：理性预期的新分布检验
