papers.zh_abstract: 来自Berea面板研究的独特纵向概率预期数据，涵盖了大学和大学后早期阶段，被用来考察年轻人对其未来收入的信念。我们引入了一种新的信念事后准确性度量，以及两种新的方法来检验事前个体是否表现出理性预期。我们表明，考虑概率预期数据中包含的个体信念分布高阶矩的额外信息，对于检测现有基于均值的检验无法检测到的理性预期违反类型很重要。发现对未来收入的信念随着学生学业进展并进入大学后阶段而变得更加准确。理性预期的检验几乎总是在校期间被拒绝，但在大学后阶段反对理性预期的证据要弱得多。

papers.title: Urban Specialisation; from Sectoral to Functional
papers.authors: Antoine Gervais, James R. Markusen, Anthony J. Venables
papers.abstract: The comparative advantage of many cities is based on their efficiency in the production of ‘functions’, e.g., business services such as finance, law, engineering, or similar functions that are used by firms in a wide range of sectors. Firms that use these functions may choose to source them locally, or to purchase them from other cities. The former case gives rise to cities developing a pattern of sectoral specialization, and the latter a pattern of functional specialization. A two-city country trades with the larger world, and workers within the country are mobile between the two cities. Productivity in a given function varies across cities, giving rise to urban comparative advantage. This may be due to exogenous technological differences (Ricardian) or to city- and function-specific scale economies. Sectors differ in the intensity with which they use different functions, giving rise to a pattern of sectoral and functional specialisation. We generate a number of economic insights, and examine the model’s predictions empirically over a 20-30-year period for US states. As geographic fragmentation costs fall, both our theory and empirical analysis show that sector concentration and regional specialization fall for sectors and rise for functions (occupations).
papers.zh_title: 城市专业化：从部门到功能
papers.zh_abstract: 许多城市的比较优势基于它们在“功能”生产上的效率，例如，金融、法律、工程等商业服务，或类似被广泛行业中的企业所使用的功能。使用这些功能的企业可以选择本地采购，或从其他城市购买。前者导致城市形成部门专业化模式，后者则形成功能专业化模式。一个两城市国家与更大的世界进行贸易，国内工人在两个城市之间流动。给定功能的生产率因城市而异，产生城市比较优势。这可能是由于外生技术差异（李嘉图式）或城市和功能特定的规模经济。不同部门使用不同功能的强度不同，导致部门和功能专业化模式。我们产生了一些经济见解，并在20-30年期间对美国各州的模型预测进行了实证检验。随着地理碎片化成本的下降，我们的理论和实证分析都表明，部门的集中度和区域专业化下降，而功能（职业）的集中度和区域专业化上升。

papers.title: Zoning and Segregation in Urban Economic History
papers.authors: Allison Shertzer, Tate Twinam, Randall P. Walsh
papers.abstract: Recent work has argued that zoning is responsible for racial segregation, disparities in public goods provision, growing regional inequality, and exploding housing costs in productive areas. However, the slow-moving nature of land regulation’s effects suggests a crucial need for historical perspective to understand how zoning has shaped cities over the long term. This essay places the introduction of zoning in the broader context of urban development in the early twentieth century, with a focus on how the demand for separation of racial groups influenced some of the earliest zoning ordinances in American cities. We also discuss the long-run impact of zoning on the development of cities and highlight the key gaps in our understanding of the role of urban and suburban zoning in fostering segregation within cities and across metropolitan areas. A key lesson from our work in this area is that racial dimensions are important when studying land use regulations, even when the policies in question are ostensibly race neutral.
papers.zh_title: 城市经济史中的分区与隔离
papers.zh_abstract: 最近的研究认为，分区导致了种族隔离、公共品供给差异、日益加剧的区域不平等以及生产性地区住房成本的爆炸性增长。然而，土地管制效应的缓慢性质表明，迫切需要历史视角来理解分区如何长期塑造城市。本文将分区的引入置于20世纪初城市发展的更广泛背景中，重点关注种族群体分离的需求如何影响美国城市中一些最早的分区条例。我们还讨论了分区对城市发展的长期影响，并强调了我们对城市和郊区分区在促进城市内部和大都市区域间隔离作用的理解中的关键空白。我们在这一领域工作的一个关键教训是，即使相关政策表面上种族中立，在研究土地使用法规时，种族维度也很重要。

papers.title: Common Ownership and Competition in the Ready-to-Eat Cereal Industry
papers.authors: Matthew Backus, Christopher Conlon, Michael Sinkinson
papers.abstract: Models of firm conduct are the cornerstone of both theoretical and empirical work in industrial organization. A recent contribution (Berry and Haile, 2014) has suggested the use of exclusion restrictions to test alternative conduct models. We propose a pairwise testing procedure based on this idea and show that the power of the test to discriminate between models is tied to the formulation of those restrictions as moments and how they reflect the nonlinearity of equilibrium markups. We apply this test to the ready-to-eat cereal market using detailed scanner and consumer data to evaluate the “common ownership” hypothesis, which has received significant attention. Although we show that the potential magnitude of common ownership effects would be large, our test finds that standard own-firm profit maximization is more consistent with the data.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, IO, LE；JEL：C52, L13, L21, L41
papers.zh_title: 即食麦片行业中的共同所有权与竞争
papers.zh_abstract: 企业行为模型是产业组织理论和实证工作的基石。最近的一项贡献（Berry and Haile, 2014）建议使用排除限制来检验替代行为模型。我们基于这一想法提出了一种成对检验程序，并表明该检验区分模型的能力与这些限制的矩形式表述以及它们如何反映均衡加成定价的非线性有关。我们使用详细的扫描仪和消费者数据将该检验应用于即食麦片市场，以评估备受关注的“共同所有权”假说。尽管我们表明共同所有权效应的潜在规模可能很大，但我们的检验发现，标准的企业自身利润最大化与数据更为一致。

papers.title: Private and Public Investments in Biomedical Research
papers.authors: Maya M. Durvasula, Lisa Larrimore Ouellette, Heidi L. Williams
papers.abstract: Recent policy attention has focused on proposals to reduce prices for drugs that have received public funding. From an implementation perspective, such policies rely on public disclosure of government support for research. In this paper, we highlight two conceptual problems with past attempts to measure these public disclosures, and construct a new data set which corrects for these problems. Our corrected measures suggest that under-reporting of public research support is less of an issue than previously thought.
papers.zh_title: 生物医学研究中的私人与公共投资
papers.zh_abstract: 近期的政策关注聚焦于降低接受公共资助的药品价格的提案。从实施角度来看，此类政策依赖于政府研究支持的公开披露。在本文中，我们指出了过去衡量这些公开披露的尝试中存在的两个概念性问题，并构建了一个纠正这些问题的新数据集。我们修正后的衡量指标表明，公共研究支持的低报问题并不像之前认为的那样严重。

papers.title: The Asset Pricing Implications of Plausible Deniability
papers.authors: Kerry Back, Bruce I. Carlin, Seyed Mohammad Kazempour
papers.abstract: We derive the effect of plausible deniability on asset risk premia in a dynamic setting with correlated firm values, systematic risk, and risk-averse investors. Firms optimally exercise American disclosure options, which are more valuable due to the possibility that other correlated firms may disclose high values, lifting investors' perceptions of the values of nondisclosing firms. Risk premia rise (and average prices fall) prior to disclosures, because investors make inferences about aggregate risks from failures to disclose, resulting in higher state prices for bad states.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IO, POL；JEL：D21, D82, G12, G14
papers.zh_title: 可否认性对资产定价的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在一个包含公司价值相关性、系统性风险和风险厌恶投资者的动态环境中，推导了可否认性对资产风险溢价的影响。公司最优地行使美国式披露期权，由于其他相关公司可能披露高价值，从而提升投资者对未披露公司价值的认知，这使得这些期权更有价值。在披露之前，风险溢价上升（平均价格下降），因为投资者从披露失败中推断出关于总体风险的信息，导致坏状态的状态价格更高。

papers.title: Chaos and Unpredictability in Dynamic Social Problems
papers.authors: Marco Battaglini
papers.abstract: We study a dynamic model of environmental protection in which the level of pollution is a state variable that strategically links policy making periods. Policymakers are forward looking but politically motivated: they have heterogeneous preferences and do not fully internalize the cost of pollution. This type of political economy model is often reduced to a "modified" planner's problem, and yields predictions that are qualitatively similar to a planner's constrained optimum, albeit with a bias: too much pollution in the steady state (or, in other applications, too little investment in public goods, too much public debt, etc.). We highlight conditions under which this reduction is not possible, and the dynamic time inconsistency generated by the political process is responsible for a new type of distortion. Under these conditions, there are equilibria in which, for a generic economy and generic initial conditions, the state evolves in complex cycles, or unpredictable chaotic dynamics. Depending on the fundamentals of the economy, these equilibria may generate ergodic distributions that consistently overshoot the planner's steady state of pollution, or that fluctuate around it.
papers.zh_title: 动态社会问题中的混沌与不可预测性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个环境保护的动态模型，其中污染水平是一个战略性地连接政策制定时期的状态变量。政策制定者具有前瞻性但受政治动机驱动：他们具有异质性偏好，并且没有完全内化污染成本。这种类型的政治经济学模型通常被简化为一个“修正的”规划者问题，并产生与规划者约束最优解定性相似的预测，尽管存在偏差：稳态下污染过多（或在其他应用中，公共物品投资过少、公共债务过多等）。我们强调了这种简化不可能成立的条件，以及政治过程产生的动态时间不一致性导致了一种新型扭曲。在这些条件下，存在均衡，其中对于一般经济体和一般初始条件，状态会演变为复杂周期或不可预测的混沌动态。根据经济的基本面，这些均衡可能产生遍历分布，这些分布持续超过规划者的污染稳态，或在其周围波动。

papers.title: Keynesian Production Networks and the Covid-19 Crisis: A Simple Benchmark
papers.authors: David Baqaee, Emmanuel Farhi
papers.abstract: The Covid-19 crisis is an unusual and seemingly all-encompassing economic shock. On the one hand, it was unquestionably a negative demand shock that, for fixed prices and incomes, reduced household spending. On the other hand, it was also unquestionably a negative supply shock that reduced firms' ability to maintain production at pre-pandemic prices and quantities. These negative shocks affected different industries differently: whereas some producers easily switched to remote-work and maintained both employment and production, industries that required face-to-face contact were forced to reduce production capacity and employment. We consider a stripped-down version of the model presented in Baqaee and Farhi (2020). Despite its simplicity, the model nevertheless allows for an arbitrary input-output network, complementarities in both consumption and production, incomplete markets, downward nominal wage rigidity, and a zero-lower bound. In this sense, it contains many of the ingredients typically considered to be important for understanding the economic fallout from Covid-19. Nevertheless, despite allowing for these realistic ingredients, this model has a stark property: factor income shares at the initial equilibrium are global sufficient statistics for the input-output network. This article clarifies clarifies what ingredients must be added to a model if the production network is to play an important role in the propagation of shocks.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ME；JEL：E0, E24, E3, E4, E5
papers.zh_title: 凯恩斯主义生产网络与新冠疫情危机：一个简单基准
papers.zh_abstract: 新冠疫情危机是一个非同寻常且看似包罗万象的经济冲击。一方面，它无疑是一个负面的需求冲击，在固定价格和收入下减少了家庭支出。另一方面，它无疑也是一个负面的供给冲击，降低了企业在疫情前价格和数量下维持生产的能力。这些负面冲击对不同行业的影响不同：虽然一些生产者轻松转向远程工作并维持了就业和生产，但需要面对面接触的行业被迫减少生产能力和就业。我们考虑了Baqaee和Farhi（2020）提出的模型的一个简化版本。尽管简单，该模型仍然允许任意的投入产出网络、消费和生产中的互补性、不完全市场、向下名义工资刚性和零下限。从这个意义上说，它包含了许多通常被认为对理解新冠疫情经济影响至关重要的要素。然而，尽管允许这些现实要素，该模型有一个显著特性：初始均衡下的要素收入份额是投入产出网络的全局充分统计量。本文阐明了如果生产网络要在冲击传播中发挥重要作用，模型中必须添加哪些要素。

papers.title: The Supply-Side Effects of Monetary Policy
papers.authors: David Baqaee, Emmanuel Farhi, Kunal Sangani
papers.abstract: We propose a supply-side channel for the transmission of monetary policy. We show that in an economy with heterogeneous firms and endogenous markups, demand shocks such as monetary shocks have a first-order effect on aggregate productivity. If high-markup firms have lower pass-throughs than low-markup firms, as is consistent with empirical evidence, then a monetary easing reallocates resources to high-markup firms and alleviates misallocation. Consequently, positive “demand shocks” are accompanied by endogenous positive “supply shocks” that raise output and productivity, lower inflation, and flatten the Phillips curve. We derive a tractable four-equation dynamic model and use it to show that monetary shocks generate a procyclical hump-shaped response in TFP and endogenous cost-push shocks in the New Keynesian Phillips curve. A calibration of our model suggests that the supply-side effect increases the half-life of a monetary shock’s effect on output by about 30% and amplifies the total impact on output by about 70%. Using identified monetary shocks, we provide empirical evidence for both the macro- and micro-level predictions of our model.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ME；JEL：E0, E12, E24, E3, E4, E5, L11, O4
papers.zh_title: 货币政策的供给侧效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了货币政策传导的一个供给侧渠道。我们表明，在一个具有异质性企业和内生加价的经济体中，货币冲击等需求冲击对总体生产率具有一阶效应。如果高加价企业的传导率低于低加价企业（这与经验证据一致），那么货币宽松会将资源重新分配给高加价企业，并缓解资源错配。因此，正向的“需求冲击”伴随着内生的正向“供给冲击”，从而提高产出和生产率，降低通胀，并平坦化菲利普斯曲线。我们推导出一个易于处理的四方程动态模型，并用它来表明货币冲击会在全要素生产率中产生顺周期的驼峰形响应，并在新凯恩斯菲利普斯曲线中产生内生成本推动冲击。我们模型的校准表明，供给侧效应使货币冲击对产出影响的半衰期增加了约30%，并将对产出的总影响放大了约70%。利用识别出的货币冲击，我们为模型在宏观和微观层面的预测提供了经验证据。

papers.title: Africa's Manufacturing Puzzle: Evidence from Tanzanian and Ethiopian Firms
papers.authors: Xinshen Diao, Mia Ellis, Margaret S. McMillan, Dani Rodrik
papers.abstract: Recent growth accelerations in Africa are characterized by increasing productivity in agriculture, a declining share of the labor force employed in agriculture and declining productivity in modern sectors such as manufacturing. To shed light on this puzzle, we disaggregate firms in the manufacturing sector by size using two newly created panels of manufacturing firms, one for Tanzania covering 2008-2016 and one for Ethiopia covering 1996-2017. Our analysis reveals a dichotomy between larger firms that exhibit superior productivity performance but do not expand employment much, and small firms that absorb employment but do not experience any productivity growth. We suggest the poor employment performance of large firms is related to use of capital-intensive techniques associated with global trends in technology.
papers.zh_title: 非洲制造业之谜：来自坦桑尼亚和埃塞俄比亚企业的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 非洲近期的增长加速表现为农业生产率提高、农业劳动力占比下降以及制造业等现代部门生产率下降。为了阐明这一谜题，我们使用两个新构建的制造业企业面板数据（一个涵盖坦桑尼亚2008-2016年，另一个涵盖埃塞俄比亚1996-2017年），按规模对制造业企业进行分解。我们的分析揭示了一种二分法：大型企业表现出卓越的生产率表现，但并未大幅扩大就业；而小型企业吸收了就业，但未经历任何生产率增长。我们认为，大型企业糟糕的就业表现与使用资本密集型技术有关，这与全球技术趋势相关。

papers.title: Students' Heterogeneous Preferences and the Uneven Spatial Distribution of Colleges
papers.authors: Chao Fu, Junjie Guo, Adam J. Smith, Alan T. Sorensen
papers.abstract: We estimate a model of high school students' college choices, allowing for rich heterogeneity in students' preferences for college attributes. We use data on students' enrollment decisions and application decisions—i.e., the sets of colleges to which they applied—to identify the distribution of students' preferences. We use our estimates to quantify differences in a student's expected value upon college application that result from the uneven spatial distribution of colleges. As with other aspects of economic opportunity, we find that place matters: students with otherwise identical characteristics can have very different expected values depending on where they live. The importance of location reflects differences across states as well as differences across counties within a state. For students with low parental incomes and low SAT scores, over 70% of the variation is within-state across counties, while for students with high parental incomes and high SAT scores, 66% of the variation is across states.
papers.zh_title: 学生的异质性偏好与大学的不均匀空间分布
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估计了一个高中学生大学选择的模型，允许学生在大学属性偏好上存在丰富的异质性。我们利用学生的入学决策和申请决策（即他们申请的大学集合）数据来识别学生偏好的分布。我们利用估计结果来量化因大学空间分布不均而导致的学生在大学申请时的预期价值差异。与经济机会的其他方面一样，我们发现地点很重要：具有相同特征的学生可能因居住地不同而具有截然不同的预期价值。地点的重要性既反映了州际差异，也反映了州内县际差异。对于父母收入低且SAT分数低的学生，超过70%的差异来自州内各县之间；而对于父母收入高且SAT分数高的学生，66%的差异来自州际之间。

papers.title: The Globalization of Postsecondary Education: The Role of International Students in the US Higher Education System
papers.authors: John Bound, Breno Braga, Gaurav Khanna, Sarah Turner
papers.abstract: In the four decades since 1980, US colleges and universities have seen the number of students from abroad quadruple. This rise in enrollment and degree attainment affects the global supply of highly educated workers, the flow of talent to the US labor market, and the financing of US higher education. Yet, the impacts are far from uniform, with significant differences evident by level of study and type of institution. The determinants of foreign flows to US colleges and universities reflect both changes in student demand from abroad and the variation in market circumstances of colleges and universities, with visa policies serving a mediating role. The consequences of these market mechanisms impact global talent development, the resources of colleges and universities, and labor markets in the United States and countries sending students.
papers.zh_title: 高等教育的全球化：国际学生在美国高等教育体系中的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 自1980年以来的四十年间，美国高校的国际学生数量翻了两番。这种入学人数和学位获得数量的增长影响着全球高技能劳动力的供给、人才向美国劳动力市场的流动以及美国高等教育的融资。然而，这种影响远非均匀，在学习层次和院校类型上存在显著差异。外国学生流向美国高校的决定因素既反映了国外学生需求的变化，也反映了高校市场环境的差异，而签证政策则起着中介作用。这些市场机制的结果影响着全球人才发展、高校资源以及美国和生源国的劳动力市场。

papers.title: No-fault Default, Chapter 11 Bankruptcy, and Financial Institutions
papers.authors: Robert C. Merton, Richard T. Thakor
papers.abstract: This paper analyzes the costs and benefits of a no-fault-default debt structure as an alternative to the typical bankruptcy process. We show that the deadweight costs of bankruptcy can be avoided or substantially reduced through no-fault-default debt, which permits a relatively seamless transfer of ownership from shareholders to bondholders in certain states of the world. We show that potential costs introduced by this scheme due to risk shifting can be attenuated via convertible debt, and we discuss the relationship of this to bail-in debt and contingent convertible (CoCo) debt for financial institutions. We then explore how, despite the advantages of no-fault-default debt, there may still be a functional role for the bankruptcy process to efficiently allow the renegotiation of labor contracts in certain cases. In sharp contrast to the human-capital-based theories of optimal capital structure in which the renegotiation of labor contract in bankruptcy is a cost associated with leverage, we show that it is a benefit. The normative implication of our analysis is that no-fault-default debt, when combined with specific features of the bankruptcy process, may reduce the deadweight costs associated with bankruptcy. We discuss how an orderly process for transfer of control and a predetermined admissibility of renegotiation of labor contracts can be a useful tool for resolving financial institution failure without harming financial stability.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, LE, POL；JEL：D21, G21, G23, G32, G33, G38, K12, L22
papers.zh_title: 无过错违约、第11章破产与金融机构
papers.zh_abstract: 本文分析了无过错违约债务结构作为典型破产程序替代方案的利弊。我们证明，通过无过错违约债务可以避免或大幅降低破产的沉没成本，该债务允许在某些世界状态下将所有权从股东相对无缝地转移给债券持有人。我们展示了该方案因风险转移而可能引入的潜在成本可以通过可转换债务来减弱，并讨论了这与金融机构的保释债和或有可转换债务的关系。接着，我们探讨了尽管无过错违约债务具有优势，但破产程序在某些情况下仍可能发挥功能性作用，以有效允许劳动合同的重新谈判。与基于人力资本的最优资本结构理论（其中破产中劳动合同的重新谈判被视为与杠杆相关的成本）形成鲜明对比，我们表明这是一种收益。我们分析的政策含义是，无过错违约债务与破产程序的特定特征相结合，可能减少与破产相关的沉没成本。我们讨论了如何将有序的控制权转移过程和预先确定的劳动合同重新谈判可接受性作为解决金融机构失败而不损害金融稳定的有用工具。

papers.title: Recipes and Economic Growth: A Combinatorial March Down an Exponential Tail
papers.authors: Charles I. Jones
papers.abstract: New ideas are often combinations of existing goods or ideas, a point emphasized by Romer (1993) and Weitzman (1998). A separate literature highlights the links between exponential growth and Pareto distributions: Gabaix (1999) shows how exponential growth generates Pareto distributions, while Kortum (1997) shows how Pareto distributions generate exponential growth. But this raises a "chicken and egg" problem: which came first, the exponential growth or the Pareto distribution? And regardless, what happened to the Romer and Weitzman insight that combinatorics should be important? This paper answers these questions by demonstrating that combinatorial growth in the number of draws from standard thin-tailed distributions leads to exponential economic growth; no Pareto assumption is required. More generally, it provides a theorem linking the behavior of the max extreme value to the number of draws and the shape of the tail for any continuous probability distribution.
papers.zh_title: 配方与经济增长：沿指数尾部的组合探索
papers.zh_abstract: 新思想通常是现有商品或思想的组合，这一点由Romer（1993）和Weitzman（1998）强调。另一支文献突出了指数增长与帕累托分布之间的联系：Gabaix（1999）展示了指数增长如何产生帕累托分布，而Kortum（1997）展示了帕累托分布如何产生指数增长。但这引发了一个“先有鸡还是先有蛋”的问题：指数增长和帕累托分布哪个先出现？而且，无论如何，Romer和Weitzman关于组合学应重要的见解发生了什么？本文通过证明从标准薄尾分布中抽取的组合增长会导致指数经济增长来回答这些问题；无需帕累托假设。更一般地，它提供了一个定理，将最大极值的行为与任何连续概率分布的抽取次数和尾部形状联系起来。

papers.title: Globalization and Global Crises: Rest of the World vs. Israel
papers.authors: Assaf Razin
papers.abstract: Post WWII globalization forces are facing headwinds in the form of global crises-the “The Great Recession” and the “The Pandemic Recession”. Israel’s trade and financial globalization, however, is steadily rising. The pandemic-induced slump in economic activity is deep, as consumer spending, investment spending, and export demand tumble. Central banks, tied down by the zero interest rate, resort to semi-fiscal expansionary policies. Indeed, the stabilization burden falls on fiscal policy. The paper provides an overview of the new globalization trends in the world and in Israel, with emphasis on the role of global crises, the Global Financial Crisis, and the Pandemic Crisis in changing globalization long-term trends. When the coronavirus hit, supply chains and production have been disrupted. However, the impact of the pandemic shock is not on the supply side only. On the demand side, the desire to invest has plunged, while people across the rich world are now saving much of their income. Would this short-term changes can reinforce the re-trending of the globalization, which is observed since the Global Financial Crisis? The paper focuses on globalization and provides comparative overview of experiences of the advanced economies and Israel.
papers.zh_title: 全球化与全球危机：世界其他地区与以色列
papers.zh_abstract: 二战后的全球化力量正面临全球危机的逆风——“大衰退”和“大流行衰退”。然而，以色列的贸易和金融全球化却在稳步上升。疫情引发的经济活动衰退是深度的，因为消费者支出、投资支出和出口需求大幅下降。受零利率约束的中央银行诉诸半财政扩张政策。确实，稳定负担落在了财政政策上。本文概述了世界和以色列的新全球化趋势，重点讨论了全球危机、全球金融危机和疫情危机在改变全球化长期趋势中的作用。当冠状病毒来袭时，供应链和生产受到干扰。然而，疫情冲击的影响不仅限于供给侧。在需求侧，投资意愿骤降，而富裕世界的人们现在将大部分收入储蓄起来。这些短期变化是否会强化自全球金融危机以来观察到的全球化重新趋势？本文聚焦于全球化，并提供了发达经济体和以色列经验的比较概述。

papers.title: Do Financial Concerns Make Workers Less Productive?
papers.authors: Supreet Kaur, Sendhil Mullainathan, Suanna Oh, Frank Schilbach
papers.abstract: Workers who are worried about their personal finances may find it hard to focus at work. If so, reducing financial concerns could by itself increase productivity. We test this hypothesis in a sample of low-income Indian piece-rate manufacturing workers. We stagger when wages are paid out: some workers are paid earlier and receive a cash infusion while others remain liquidity constrained. The cash infusion leads workers to reduce their financial concerns by immediately paying off debts and buying household essentials. Subsequently, they become more productive at work: their output increases by 7% (0.11 SD), and they make fewer costly, unintentional mistakes. Workers with more cash-on-hand thus not only work faster but also more attentively, suggesting improved cognition. These effects are concentrated among more financially constrained workers. We argue that mechanisms such as gift exchange or nutrition cannot account for our results. Instead, our findings suggest that financial strain, at least partly through psychological channels, has the potential to reduce earnings exactly when money is most needed.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, LS, PR；JEL：D03, D14, D31, J24, O1
papers.zh_title: 财务担忧会降低工人生产力吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 担心个人财务状况的工人可能难以集中精力工作。如果是这样，减少财务担忧本身就能提高生产力。我们在印度低收入计件制造业工人样本中检验了这一假设。我们错开工资支付时间：一些工人提前获得工资并收到现金注入，而其他工人仍受流动性约束。现金注入使工人通过立即偿还债务和购买家庭必需品来减少财务担忧。随后，他们在工作中变得更有生产力：产出增加7%（0.11个标准差），并且犯下更少代价高昂的无意错误。手头现金更多的工人不仅工作更快，而且更专注，这表明认知能力得到改善。这些效应集中在财务约束更强的工人身上。我们认为，礼物交换或营养等机制无法解释我们的结果。相反，我们的发现表明，财务压力（至少部分通过心理渠道）有可能在最需要钱的时候恰恰减少收入。

papers.title: Place-Based Redistribution
papers.authors: Cecile Gaubert, Patrick M. Kline, Damián Vergara, Danny Yagan
papers.abstract: We study optimal income taxation in a spatial equilibrium model with heterogeneous locational preferences, labor supply decisions, and competitive housing and labor markets. Expressions characterizing the optimal tax schedule in each community are provided that capture the fiscal externalities associated with migration and the effects of redistribution between households and landlords. Correlation between skill and locational preferences yields optimal transfers to poor areas, while sorting based on comparative advantage can motivate transfers in either direction. A calibration to areas targeted by the U.S. Empowerment Zone program yields sizable optimal spatial transfers that are sensitive to assumed levels of migration responsiveness.
papers.zh_title: 基于地点的再分配
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在一个具有异质性区位偏好、劳动供给决策以及竞争性住房和劳动力市场的空间均衡模型中研究最优所得税。提供了刻画每个社区最优税收计划的表达式，这些表达式捕捉了与移民相关的财政外部性以及家庭与房东之间再分配的影响。技能与区位偏好之间的相关性导致对贫困地区的最优转移支付，而基于比较优势的分类则可能推动任何方向的转移支付。对美国授权区计划目标地区的校准产生了相当大的最优空间转移支付，这些转移支付对假设的移民响应水平很敏感。

papers.title: The Economic Case for Global Vaccinations: An Epidemiological Model with International Production Networks
papers.authors: Cem Çakmaklı, Selva Demiralp, Ṣebnem Kalemli-Özcan, Sevcan Yeşiltaş, Muhammed A. Yıldırım
papers.abstract: We present a global general equilibrium model that incorporates input-output linkages across multiple sectors and countries to analyze the impact of pandemic-related labor supply shocks. These shocks vary across industries due to differences in how occupations are affected by the disease, influenced by factors such as contact intensity and the feasibility of remote work. Using the model, we quantify the economic rationale for global vaccinations. Given empirically relevant trade and production elasticities, where labor and imported intermediate inputs complement each other, we examine several scenarios. If wealthy countries vaccinate only their own populations, global output could decline by nearly 1% compared to pre-pandemic levels. In contrast, investing in global vaccinations could yield a 178% return on investment for wealthy nations and potentially halve the global output decline. Vaccinating low-income countries could mitigate economic impacts on wealthy nations through sectoral trade and production linkages, significantly reducing losses by 70% without compromising rich countries own vaccination efforts.
papers.zh_title: 全球疫苗接种的经济理由：一个具有国际生产网络的流行病学模型
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个全球一般均衡模型，该模型纳入了多个部门和国家的投入产出联系，以分析疫情相关的劳动力供给冲击。这些冲击因行业而异，原因是不同职业受疾病影响的程度不同，这受到接触强度和远程工作可行性等因素的影响。利用该模型，我们量化了全球疫苗接种的经济理由。在具有经验相关性的贸易和生产弹性（即劳动力和进口中间投入品相互补充）的情况下，我们考察了几种情景。如果富裕国家仅为本国人口接种疫苗，全球产出可能比疫情前水平下降近1%。相比之下，投资于全球疫苗接种可为富裕国家带来178%的投资回报，并可能使全球产出下降幅度减半。为低收入国家接种疫苗可以通过部门贸易和生产联系减轻对富裕国家的经济影响，在不影响富裕国家自身疫苗接种努力的情况下，将损失显著减少70%。

papers.title: Housing Precarity & the COVID-19 Pandemic: Impacts of Utility Disconnection and Eviction Moratoria on Infections and Deaths Across US Counties
papers.authors: Kay Jowers, Christopher Timmins, Nrupen Bhavsar, Qihui Hu, Julia Marshall
papers.abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic has necessitated the adoption of a number of policies that aim to reduce the spread of the disease by promoting housing stability. Housing precarity, which includes both the risk of eviction and utility disconnections or shut-offs, reduces a person’s ability to abide by social distancing orders and comply with hygiene recommendations. Our analysis quantifies the impact of these various economic policies on COVID-19 infection and death rates using panel regression techniques to control for a variety of potential confounders. We find that policies that limit evictions are found to reduce COVID-19 infections by 3.8% and reduce deaths by 11%. Moratoria on utility disconnections reduce COVID-19 infections by 4.4% and mortality rates by 7.4%. Had such policies been in place across all counties (i.e., adopted as federal policy) from early March 2020 through the end of November 2020, our estimated counterfactuals show that policies that limit evictions could have reduced COVID-19 infections by 14.2% and deaths by 40.7%. For moratoria on utility disconnections, COVID-19 infections rates could have been reduced by 8.7% and deaths by 14.8%. Housing precarity policies that prevent eviction and utility disconnections have been effective mechanisms for decreasing both COVID-19 infections and deaths.
papers.zh_title: 住房不稳定与COVID-19疫情：断水断电和驱逐禁令对美国各县感染和死亡的影响
papers.zh_abstract: COVID-19疫情促使采取了一系列旨在通过促进住房稳定来减少疾病传播的政策。住房不稳定，包括被驱逐以及公用事业断水断电或停供的风险，会降低个人遵守社交距离命令和遵循卫生建议的能力。我们的分析利用面板回归技术控制各种潜在混杂因素，量化了这些不同经济政策对COVID-19感染率和死亡率的影响。我们发现，限制驱逐的政策使COVID-19感染率降低3.8%，死亡率降低11%。断水断电禁令使COVID-19感染率降低4.4%，死亡率降低7.4%。如果这些政策从2020年3月初到2020年11月底在所有县实施（即作为联邦政策采纳），我们的反事实估计显示，限制驱逐的政策本可使COVID-19感染率降低14.2%，死亡率降低40.7%。对于断水断电禁令，COVID-19感染率本可降低8.7%，死亡率降低14.8%。防止驱逐和断水断电的住房不稳定政策是降低COVID-19感染和死亡的有效机制。

papers.title: A Call for Structured Ethics Appendices in Social Science Papers
papers.authors: Edward Asiedu, Dean Karlan, Monica P. Lambon-Quayefio, Christopher R. Udry
papers.abstract: Ethics in social science experimentation and data collection are often discussed but rarely articulated in writing as part of research outputs. Although papers typically reference human subjects research approvals from relevant institutional review boards, most recognize that such boards do not carry out comprehensive ethical assessments. We propose a structured ethics appendix to provide details on the following: policy equipoise, role of the researcher, potential harms to participants and nonparticipants, conflicts of interest, intellectual freedom, feedback to participants, and foreseeable misuse of research results. We discuss each of these, and some of the norms and challenging situations of each. We believe that discussing such issues explicitly in appendices of papers, even if briefly, will serve two purposes: more complete communication of ethics can improve discussions of papers and can clarify and improve the norms themselves.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, EEE, EH, LS, PE, POL；JEL：C81, C83, C9, J01, O12
papers.zh_title: 呼吁在社会科学论文中设立结构化伦理附录
papers.zh_abstract: 社会科学实验和数据收集中的伦理问题经常被讨论，但很少在研究产出中以书面形式明确阐述。尽管论文通常会提及相关机构审查委员会对涉及人类受试者研究的批准，但大多数人都认识到，这些委员会并不进行全面的伦理评估。我们提议设立一个结构化的伦理附录，以提供以下方面的详细信息：政策均衡、研究者的角色、对参与者和非参与者的潜在伤害、利益冲突、学术自由、对参与者的反馈以及研究结果的可预见滥用。我们逐一讨论了这些问题，以及其中一些规范和具有挑战性的情况。我们相信，在论文附录中明确讨论这些问题，即使只是简要地讨论，也将服务于两个目的：更完整的伦理沟通可以改善对论文的讨论，并可以澄清和改进规范本身。

papers.title: COVID-19 and Global Income Inequality
papers.authors: Angus Deaton
papers.abstract: There is a widespread belief that the COVID-19 pandemic has increased global income inequality, reducing per capita incomes by more in poor countries than in rich. This supposition is reasonable but false. Rich countries have experienced more deaths per head than have poor countries; their better health systems, higher incomes, more capable governments and better preparedness notwithstanding. The US did worse than some rich countries, but better than several others. Countries with more deaths saw larger declines in income. There was thus not only no trade-off between lives and income; fewer deaths meant more income. As a result, per capita incomes fell by more in higher-income countries. Country by country, international income inequality decreased. When countries are weighted by population, international income inequality increased, more in line with the original intuition. This was largely because Indian incomes fell, and because the disequalizing effect of declining Indian incomes was not offset by rising incomes in China, which is no longer a globally poor country. That these findings are a result of the pandemic is supported by comparing global inequality using IMF forecasts in October 2019 and October 2020.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, EH, IFM；JEL：F01, I14, O11
papers.zh_title: COVID-19与全球收入不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 人们普遍认为，COVID-19疫情加剧了全球收入不平等，使贫困国家的人均收入下降幅度大于富裕国家。这种假设看似合理，但却是错误的。富裕国家的人均死亡人数高于贫困国家；尽管它们拥有更好的卫生系统、更高的收入、更有能力的政府和更充分的准备。美国的表现比一些富裕国家差，但比其他几个国家好。死亡人数更多的国家收入下降幅度更大。因此，生命与收入之间不仅没有权衡取舍；更少的死亡意味着更多的收入。结果，高收入国家的人均收入下降幅度更大。按国家来看，国际收入不平等程度下降了。当按人口加权国家时，国际收入不平等程度上升，这更符合最初的直觉。这主要是因为印度收入下降，并且印度收入下降的不平等加剧效应未被中国（已不再是全球贫困国家）收入上升所抵消。通过比较国际货币基金组织2019年10月和2020年10月的预测得出的全球不平等，支持了这些发现是疫情结果的观点。

papers.title: Trade and Domestic Distortions: the Case of Informality
papers.authors: Rafael Dix-Carneiro, Pinelopi K. Goldberg, Costas Meghir, Gabriel Ulyssea
papers.abstract: We examine the effects of international trade in the presence of a set of domestic distortions giving rise to informality, a prevalent phenomenon in developing countries. In our quantitative model, the informal sector arises from burdensome taxes and regulations that are imperfectly enforced by the government. In equilibrium, smaller, less productive firms face fewer distortions than larger, more productive ones, potentially leading to substantial misallocation. We show that in settings with a large informal sector, the gains from trade are significantly amplified, as reductions in trade barriers imply a reallocation of resources from initially less distorted to more distorted firms. We confirm findings from earlier reduced-form studies that the informal sector mitigates the impact of negative labor demand shocks on unemployment. Nonetheless, the informal sector can exacerbate the adverse real income effects of economic downturns, amplifying misallocation. Last, our research sheds light on the relationship between trade openness and cross-firm wage inequality.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, ITI, LS；JEL：F14, F16, J46, O17
papers.zh_title: 贸易与国内扭曲：非正规经济案例
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了在存在一系列导致非正规经济的国内扭曲（这是发展中国家的普遍现象）的情况下，国际贸易的影响。在我们的定量模型中，非正规部门源于政府执行不力的繁重税收和监管。在均衡状态下，规模较小、生产率较低的企业面临的扭曲少于规模较大、生产率较高的企业，这可能导致严重的资源错配。我们表明，在非正规部门规模较大的环境中，贸易收益被显著放大，因为贸易壁垒的降低意味着资源从最初扭曲较少的企业重新配置到扭曲较多的企业。我们证实了早期简化形式研究的发现，即非正规部门减轻了负面劳动力需求冲击对失业的影响。尽管如此，非正规部门可能加剧经济衰退对实际收入的不利影响，放大资源错配。最后，我们的研究揭示了贸易开放与跨企业工资不平等之间的关系。

papers.title: Quality and Price Setting of High-Tech Goods
papers.authors: Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Oleksandr Talavera, Nam Hoai Vu
papers.abstract: This paper investigates the link between product quality and price setting for central processing units (CPUs). Using thousands of price quotes from a popular price-comparison website, we find that market fundamentals, such as the number of sellers, median price, share of convenient prices and level of seller stability, are important factors for explaining price stickiness and price dispersion. We demonstrate that calculations of price inflation require conditioning not only on CPU quality, but also on market fundamentals to ensure that CPU attributes are priced correctly. Failing to do so can result in an understatement of CPU price deflation in the sample period.
papers.zh_title: 高科技产品的质量与定价
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了中央处理器（CPU）的产品质量与定价之间的联系。利用来自一个流行的价格比较网站的数千条报价，我们发现市场基本面因素，如卖家数量、中位数价格、便利价格份额和卖家稳定程度，对于解释价格粘性和价格离散至关重要。我们证明，计算价格通胀不仅需要根据CPU质量进行调整，还需要根据市场基本面进行调整，以确保CPU属性被正确定价。如果未能做到这一点，可能会导致样本期内CPU价格通缩被低估。

papers.title: Where is Pollution Moving? Environmental Markets and Environmental Justice
papers.authors: Joseph S. Shapiro, Reed Walker
papers.abstract: Do US air pollution offset markets disproportionately relocate pollution to or from low-income or minority communities? Concerns about an equal distribution of environmental quality across communities—environmental justice—have growing policy influence. We relate prices and quantities of offset transactions to demographics of the communities surrounding polluting plants. We find little association of offset prices or offset-induced movements in pollution with the share of a community that is Black, Hispanic, or with mean household income. This analysis of twelve prominent offset markets suggests that they do not substantially increase or decrease the equity of environmental outcomes.
papers.zh_title: 污染正在向何处转移？环境市场与环境正义
papers.zh_abstract: 美国的空气污染抵消市场是否不成比例地将污染转移到低收入或少数族裔社区？关于社区间环境质量公平分配——即环境正义——的担忧正对政策产生日益增长的影响。我们将抵消交易的价格和数量与污染工厂周边社区的人口统计特征联系起来。我们发现，抵消价格或由抵消引起的污染迁移与社区中黑人、西班牙裔比例或家庭平均收入之间几乎没有关联。对十二个主要抵消市场的分析表明，它们并未显著增加或减少环境结果的公平性。

papers.title: Myth or Measurement: What Does the New Minimum Wage Research Say about Minimum Wages and Job Loss in the United States?
papers.authors: David Neumark, Peter Shirley
papers.abstract: The disagreement among studies of the employment effects of minimum wages in the United States is well known. Less well known, and more puzzling, is the absence of agreement on what the research literature says – that is, how economists summarize the body of evidence on the employment effects of minimum wages. Summaries range from “it is now well-established that higher minimum wages do not reduce employment,” to “the evidence is very mixed with effects centered on zero so there is no basis for a strong conclusion one way or the other,” to “most evidence points to adverse employment effects.” \nWe explore the question of what conclusions can be drawn from the literature, focusing on the evidence using subnational minimum wage variation within the United States that has dominated the research landscape since the early 1990s. To accomplish this, we assembled the entire set of published studies in this literature and identified the core estimates that support the conclusions from each study, in most cases relying on responses from the researchers who wrote these papers. Our key conclusions are: (i) there is a clear preponderance of negative estimates in the literature; (ii) this evidence is stronger for teens and young adults as well as the less-educated; (iii) the evidence from studies of directly-affected workers points even more strongly to negative employment effects; and (iv) the evidence from studies of low-wage industries is less one-sided.
papers.zh_title: 神话还是测量：关于最低工资与失业，新的最低工资研究告诉我们什么？
papers.zh_abstract: 美国最低工资就业效应研究之间的分歧众所周知。但更不为人知且更令人困惑的是，对于研究文献本身所传达的信息——即经济学家如何总结最低工资就业效应的证据体系——缺乏共识。总结范围从“现在已充分确立，更高的最低工资不会减少就业”，到“证据非常混杂，效应集中在零附近，因此没有依据得出任何一方的强有力结论”，再到“大多数证据指向不利的就业效应”。我们探讨了从文献中可以得出什么结论的问题，重点关注自20世纪90年代初以来主导研究格局的、利用美国国内次国家层面最低工资变动的证据。为此，我们收集了该文献中所有已发表的研究，并确定了支持每项研究结论的核心估计值，在大多数情况下依赖于这些论文作者的回答。我们的关键结论是：(i) 文献中明显以负面估计为主；(ii) 对于青少年、年轻成人以及受教育程度较低者，这一证据更为有力；(iii) 来自直接受影响工人研究的证据更强烈地指向负面就业效应；(iv) 来自低工资行业研究的证据则不那么一边倒。

papers.title: Public Economics and Inequality: Uncovering Our Social Nature
papers.authors: Emmanuel Saez
papers.abstract: This paper argues that the social nature of humans, absent from the standard economic model, is crucial to understand our large modern social states and why concerns about inequality are so pervasive. A social solution arises when a situation is resolved at the group level (rather than the individual level) through cooperation and fair distribution of the resulting surplus. In human societies, childcare and education for the young, retirement benefits for the old, health care for the sick, and income support for those in need, is resolved at the social level, and through the social state in advanced economies. Social situations are pervasive even outside government and play a significant role in the distribution of pre-tax market incomes.
papers.zh_title: 公共经济学与不平等：揭示我们的社会本性
papers.zh_abstract: 本文认为，人类的社会本性——标准经济模型中缺失的要素——对于理解我们庞大的现代福利国家以及为何对不平等的担忧如此普遍至关重要。当一种情况通过合作和公平分配由此产生的剩余在群体层面（而非个人层面）得到解决时，就出现了社会解决方案。在人类社会中，对幼儿的保育和教育、对老年人的退休福利、对病人的医疗保健以及对有需要者的收入支持，是在社会层面解决的，在发达经济体中则通过福利国家解决。即使在政府之外，社会情境也普遍存在，并在税前市场收入的分配中发挥着重要作用。

papers.title: Hungry for Success? SNAP Timing, High-Stakes Exam Performance, and College Attendance
papers.authors: Timothy N. Bond, Jillian B. Carr, Analisa Packham, Jonathan Smith
papers.abstract: Monthly government transfer programs create cycles of consumption that track the timing of benefit receipt. In this paper, we exploit state-level variation in the staggered timing of nutritional assistance benefit issuance across households to analyze how this monthly cyclicality in food availability affects academic achievement. Using individual-level score data from a large national college admissions exam in the United States linked to national college enrollment data, we find that taking this high-stakes exam in the last two weeks of the SNAP benefit cycle reduces test scores and lowers the probability of attending a 4-year college for low-income high school students.
papers.zh_title: 渴望成功？SNAP发放时间、高风险考试表现与大学入学
papers.zh_abstract: 月度政府转移支付项目创造了随福利金发放时间而变化的消费周期。在本文中，我们利用各州之间营养援助福利金发放时间错开的变化，分析这种食物可用性的月度周期性如何影响学业成就。使用来自美国一项大型全国大学入学考试的个人分数数据（与全国大学入学数据相关联），我们发现，对于低收入高中生而言，在SNAP福利周期的最后两周参加这项高风险考试会降低考试成绩，并降低进入四年制大学的概率。

papers.title: Trends in U.S. Spatial Inequality: Concentrating Affluence and a Democratization of Poverty
papers.authors: Cecile Gaubert, Patrick M. Kline, Damián Vergara, Danny Yagan
papers.abstract: We study trends in income inequality across U.S. states and counties 1960-2019 using a mix of administrative and survey data sources. Both states and counties have diverged in terms of per-capita pre-tax incomes since the late 1990s, with transfers serving to dampen this divergence. County incomes have been diverging since the late 1970s. These trends in mean income mask opposing patterns among top and bottom income quantiles. Top incomes have diverged markedly across states since the late 1970s. In contrast, bottom income quantiles and poverty rates have converged across areas in recent decades.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, ITI, LS, PE；JEL：E01, H2, R1
papers.zh_title: 美国空间不平等趋势：富裕的集中与贫困的民主化
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用行政和调查数据的混合来源，研究了1960年至2019年美国各州和县的人均收入不平等趋势。自20世纪90年代末以来，各州和县的人均税前收入均出现分化，而转移支付起到了抑制这种分化的作用。自20世纪70年代末以来，各县的收入一直在分化。这些平均收入趋势掩盖了收入顶层和底层分位数之间的相反模式。自20世纪70年代末以来，各州顶层收入显著分化。相比之下，近几十年来，各地区的底层收入分位数和贫困率趋于收敛。

papers.title: Constrained-Efficient Capital Reallocation
papers.authors: Andrea Lanteri, Adriano A. Rampini
papers.abstract: We characterize efficiency in an equilibrium model of investment and capital reallocation with heterogeneous firms facing collateral constraints. The model features two types of pecuniary externalities: collateral externalities, because the resale price of capital affects collateral constraints, and distributive externalities, because buyers of old capital are more financially constrained than sellers, consistent with empirical evidence. We prove that the stationary-equilibrium price of old capital is inefficiently high, because the distributive pecuniary externality exceeds the collateral externality, by a factor of two in our calibrated model. New investment reduces the future price of old capital, providing a rationale for new-investment subsidies.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, PE, PR；JEL：D51, E22, E44, G31, H21
papers.zh_title: 约束有效的资本再配置
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在一个具有异质性企业且面临抵押品约束的投资与资本再配置均衡模型中刻画了效率。该模型具有两种类型的货币外部性：抵押品外部性（因为资本转售价格影响抵押品约束）和分配外部性（因为旧资本购买者比出售者面临更紧的财务约束，这与经验证据一致）。我们证明，旧资本的稳态均衡价格过高，因为分配性货币外部性超过了抵押品外部性，在我们校准的模型中前者是后者的两倍。新投资降低了旧资本的未来价格，这为新投资补贴提供了理由。

papers.title: Household Wealth Trends in the United States, 1962 to 2019: Median Wealth Rebounds... But Not Enough
papers.authors: Edward N. Wolff
papers.abstract: Median household wealth shot up by 21.2 percent in real terms between 2016 and 2019, as asset prices continued to rebound. However, 2007 still remains the watershed year, and median wealth was down 20.4 percent relative to 2007, though mean wealth more than fully recovered. There was a modest remission in wealth inequality, with the share of the top one percent down by 1.4 percentage points, that of the top 20 percent down by 1.0 percentage points, the Gini coefficient down by 0.008, and the mean wealth of the top one percent also down by 1.9 percent. The homeownership rate finally rebounded a bit, by 1.2 percentage points, to 64.9 percent. The stock ownership rate advanced by 0.4 percentage points to 49.6 percent, though still down from its 2001 peak. Though the mean debt of the middle class rose by 10.7 percent in real terms, the debt-income and debt-net worth ratios remained largely unchanged. The black-white gap in mean net worth remained unchanged, as did the Hispanic-white wealth gap. The wealth of households under age 35 continued to deteriorate in both absolute and relative terms between 2016 and 2019.
papers.zh_title: 1962年至2019年美国家庭财富趋势：中位数财富反弹……但还不够
papers.zh_abstract: 2016年至2019年间，随着资产价格持续反弹，美国家庭中位数财富实际增长了21.2%。然而，2007年仍然是分水岭年份，中位数财富相对于2007年下降了20.4%，尽管均值财富已完全恢复并超过。财富不平等略有缓解，最富有的1%人群的份额下降了1.4个百分点，最富有的20%人群的份额下降了1.0个百分点，基尼系数下降了0.008，最富有的1%人群的均值财富也下降了1.9%。住房拥有率终于略有反弹，上升了1.2个百分点，达到64.9%。股票拥有率上升了0.4个百分点，达到49.6%，但仍低于2001年的峰值。尽管中产阶级的均值债务实际增长了10.7%，但债务收入比和债务净资产比基本保持不变。黑人与白人之间的均值净资产差距保持不变，西班牙裔与白人之间的财富差距也保持不变。2016年至2019年间，35岁以下家庭的财富在绝对和相对意义上均继续恶化。

papers.title: Gender Differences in (some) Formative Inputs to Child Development
papers.authors: Michael Baker
papers.abstract: While there is a large literature on gender differences in important childhood developmental inputs in developing countries, the evidence for developed countries is relatively limited. I investigate gender differences in some of these inputs in the US and Canada. In the US very low birthweight males face excess mortality compared to their female counterparts. I provide evidence that the previously documented increase in mortality with the withdrawal of critical care at the Very Low Birth Weight (VLBW) threshold is primarily for boys. The fact that the critical care of both boys and girls changes discretely at this threshold suggests a possible misallocation of scarce hospital resources. In the US first born girls are breastfed longer than first born males, but the difference is so small that it is unlikely to have any consequence. Finally, mothers in the US and Canada are more likely to experience depression post birth when the first born child is a boy. Perhaps related, the parenting of first born boys in Canada in the first years of life is more likely to be confrontational.
papers.zh_title: 儿童发展（某些）形成性投入中的性别差异
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管关于发展中国家儿童重要发展投入中性别差异的文献很多，但发达国家的证据相对有限。我调查了美国和加拿大在这些投入中的一些性别差异。在美国，极低出生体重的男性婴儿相比女性婴儿面临更高的超额死亡率。我提供的证据表明，先前记录的、在极低出生体重阈值处因撤除重症监护而导致的死亡率增加主要发生在男婴身上。男婴和女婴的重症监护在该阈值处均发生离散变化，这一事实表明稀缺的医院资源可能存在错配。在美国，头胎女婴的母乳喂养时间长于头胎男婴，但差异非常小，不太可能产生任何后果。最后，在美国和加拿大，当第一个孩子是男孩时，母亲在产后更有可能经历抑郁。或许与此相关，在加拿大，头胎男孩在生命最初几年的养育更可能具有对抗性。

papers.title: The Impact of Regulation on Innovation
papers.authors: Philippe Aghion, Antonin Bergeaud, John Van Reenen
papers.abstract: Does regulation affect the pace and nature of innovation and if so, by how much? We build a tractable and quantifiable endogenous growth model with size-contingent regulations. We apply this to population administrative firm panel data from France, where many labor regulations apply to firms with 50 or more employees. Nonparametrically, we find that there is a sharp fall in the fraction of innovating firms just to the left of the regulatory threshold. Further, a dynamic analysis shows a sharp reduction in the firm’s innovation response to exogenous demand shocks for firms just below the regulatory threshold. We then quantitatively fit the parameters of the model to the data, finding that innovation at the macro level is about 5.4% lower due to the regulation, a 2.2% consumption equivalent welfare loss. Four-fifths of this loss is due to lower innovation intensity per firm rather than just a misallocation towards smaller firms and lower entry. We generalize the theory to allow for changes in the direction of R&D, and find that regulation’s negative effects only matter for incremental innovation (as measured by citations and text-based measures of novelty). A more regulated economy may have less innovation, but when firms do innovate they tend to “swing for the fence” with more radical (and labor saving) breakthroughs.
papers.zh_title: 监管对创新的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 监管是否影响创新的速度和性质？如果影响，程度有多大？我们构建了一个易于处理且可量化的内生增长模型，其中包含规模相关的监管。我们将该模型应用于法国的人口行政企业面板数据，该国许多劳动法规适用于拥有50名或以上员工的企业。非参数分析发现，在监管阈值左侧，创新企业比例急剧下降。此外，动态分析显示，对于刚好低于监管门槛的企业，其对外生需求冲击的创新反应显著减弱。随后，我们定量地将模型参数拟合到数据中，发现由于监管，宏观层面的创新水平降低了约5.4%，这相当于2.2%的消费等价福利损失。其中五分之四的损失源于每家企业创新强度的降低，而不仅仅是资源向小型企业的错配和进入率下降。我们将理论推广到允许研发方向变化的情形，并发现监管的负面效应仅对增量创新（以引用次数和基于文本的新颖性衡量）产生影响。一个监管更严格的经济体可能创新更少，但当企业确实进行创新时，它们往往倾向于“全力一搏”，追求更激进（且节省劳动力）的突破。

papers.title: A Second-best Argument for Low Optimal Tariffs
papers.authors: Lorenzo Caliendo, Robert C. Feenstra, John Romalis, Alan M. Taylor
papers.abstract: We derive a new formula for the optimal uniform tariff in a small-country, heterogeneous-firm model with roundabout production and a nontraded good. Tariffs are applied on imported intermediate inputs. First-best policy requires that markups on domestic intermediate inputs are offset by subsidies. In a second-best setting where such subsidies are not used, the double- marginalization of domestic markups creates a strong incentive to lower the optimal tariff on imported inputs. In a 186-country quantitative model, the median optimal tariff is 10%, and negative for five countries, as compared to 27% in manufacturing from the one-sector, optimal tariff formula without roundabout production.
papers.zh_title: 低最优关税的次优论证
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在一个包含循环生产和非贸易品的小国异质性企业模型中，推导出一个新的统一最优关税公式。关税适用于进口中间投入品。最优政策要求通过补贴来抵消国内中间投入品的加成。在未使用此类补贴的次优情境下，国内加成的双重边际化产生了降低进口投入品最优关税的强烈动机。在一个包含186个国家的量化模型中，中位数最优关税为10%，有五个国家为负值；相比之下，在不考虑循环生产的单部门最优关税公式中，制造业的最优关税为27%。

papers.title: The Organization of Innovation: Incomplete Contracts and the Outsourcing Decision
papers.authors: Thomas Jungbauer, Sean Nicholson, June Pan, Michael Waldman, Lucy Xiaolu Wang
papers.abstract: Why do firms outsource research and development (R&D) for some products while conducting R&D in-house for similar ones? An innovating rm risks cannibalizing its existing products. The more profitable these products, the more the firm wants to limit cannibalization. We apply this logic to the organization of R&D by introducing a novel theoretical model in which developing in-house provides the firm more control over the new product's location in product space. An empirical analysis of our testable predictions using pharmaceutical data concerning patents, patent expiration, and outsourcing at various stages of the R&D process supports our theoretical approach.
papers.zh_title: 创新的组织：不完全契约与外包决策
papers.zh_abstract: 为什么企业将某些产品的研发外包，而对类似产品进行内部研发？创新企业面临蚕食其现有产品的风险。现有产品利润越高，企业就越想限制这种蚕食。我们将这一逻辑应用于研发的组织方式，引入了一个新颖的理论模型，其中内部研发使企业能够更好地控制新产品在产品空间中的定位。利用制药行业关于专利、专利到期以及研发过程各阶段外包的数据，对我们的可检验预测进行的实证分析支持了我们的理论方法。

papers.title: Contracting in Peer Networks
papers.authors: Peter M. DeMarzo, Ron Kaniel
papers.abstract: We consider multi-agent multi-firm contracting when agents benchmark their wages to a weighted average of their peers, where weights may vary within and across firms. Despite common shocks, compensation benchmarking can undo performance benchmarking, so that wages load positively rather than negatively on peer output. Although contracts appear inefficient, when a single principal commits to a public contract, the optimal contract hedges agents’ relative wage risk without sacrificing efficiency. Moreover, the principal can exploit any asymmetries in peer effects to enhance profits. With multiple principals, or a principal that is unable to commit, a “rat race” emerges in which agents are more productive, but wages increase even more, reducing profits and undermining efficiency. Effort levels are too high rather than too low, and can exceed first best. Wage transparency and disclosure requirements exacerbate these effects.
papers.zh_title: 同行网络中的契约设计
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考虑多代理人、多企业的契约设计问题，其中代理人将其工资与同行的加权平均值进行对标，权重在企业内部和企业之间可能有所不同。尽管存在共同冲击，薪酬对标可能抵消绩效对标的效果，导致工资与同行产出呈正相关而非负相关。尽管契约看似无效率，但当单一委托人承诺采用公开契约时，最优契约能在不牺牲效率的前提下对冲代理人的相对工资风险。此外，委托人可以利用同行效应中的任何不对称性来提高利润。在存在多个委托人，或委托人无法承诺的情况下，会出现“竞赛效应”，代理人生产率提高，但工资增长更快，从而降低利润并损害效率。努力水平过高而非过低，甚至可能超过最优水平。工资透明度和披露要求会加剧这些效应。

papers.title: Liquidity, Pledgeability, and the Nature of Lending
papers.authors: Douglas W. Diamond, Yunzhi Hu, Raghuram G. Rajan
papers.abstract: We develop a theory of how corporate lending and financial intermediation change based on the fundamentals of the firm and its environment. We focus on the interaction between the prospective net worth or liquidity of an industry and the firm’s internal governance or pledgeability. Variations in prospective liquidity can induce changes in the nature, covenants, and quantity of loans that are made, the identity of the lender, and the extent to which the lender is leveraged. We offer predictions on how these might vary over the financial cycle.
papers.meta: Programs：CF；JEL：G2, G21, G23, G3, G32, G33
papers.zh_title: 流动性、可质押性与贷款的性质
papers.zh_abstract: 我们发展了一个理论，阐述企业贷款和金融中介如何根据企业及其所处环境的基本面而变化。我们重点关注行业预期净值或流动性与企业内部治理或可质押性之间的相互作用。预期流动性的变化可能引发贷款性质、契约条款、贷款数量、贷款人身份以及贷款人杠杆程度的变化。我们就这些因素如何随金融周期变化提供了预测。

papers.title: Information Avoidance and Image Concerns
papers.authors: Christine L. Exley, Judd B. Kessler
papers.abstract: A rich literature finds that individuals avoid information, even information that is instrumental to their choices. A common hypothesis posits that individuals strategically avoid information to hold particular beliefs or to take certain actions—such as behaving selfishly—with lower image costs. Building off of the classic “moral wiggle room” design, this paper provides the first direct test of whether individuals avoid information because of image concerns. We do so by introducing a control condition that makes minimal changes to eliminate the role of image concerns while keeping other key features of the decision environment unchanged. We analyze data from 4,626 experimental subjects. We find that image concerns play a role in driving information avoidance, but a role that is substantially smaller—less than half of the magnitude—than the common approach in the literature would suggest.
papers.zh_title: 信息规避与形象关注
papers.zh_abstract: 大量文献发现，个体会规避信息，甚至包括对其决策有用的信息。一个常见的假设认为，个体会策略性地规避信息，以便持有特定信念或采取某些行动——例如自私行为——从而降低形象成本。本文基于经典的“道德模糊空间”设计，首次直接检验了个体是否因形象关注而规避信息。我们通过引入一个控制条件来实现这一点，该条件在保持决策环境其他关键特征不变的情况下，对最小化变化以消除形象关注的作用。我们分析了来自4626名实验对象的数据。研究发现，形象关注在驱动信息规避中确实起作用，但其作用程度远小于文献中常见方法所暗示的——不到其规模的一半。

papers.title: Labor Market Institutions and the Distribution of Wages: The Role of Spillover Effects
papers.authors: Nicole M. Fortin, Thomas Lemieux, Neil Lloyd
papers.abstract: This paper examines the role of spillover effects of minimum wages and threat effects of unionization in changes in wage inequality in the United States between 1979 and 2017. A distribution regression framework is introduced to estimate both types of spillover effects. Threat effects double the contribution of de-unionization to the increase in male wage inequality. Spillover effects magnify the explanatory power of declining minimum wages to two-thirds of the increase in inequality at the bottom end of the female wage distribution.
papers.zh_title: 劳动力市场制度与工资分布：溢出效应的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了最低工资的溢出效应和工会化的威胁效应在1979年至2017年美国工资不平等变化中的作用。我们引入了一个分布回归框架来估计这两种溢出效应。威胁效应使去工会化对男性工资不平等加剧的贡献翻倍。溢出效应将最低工资下降的解释力放大到女性工资分布底端不平等加剧的三分之二。

papers.title: The Impact of the Non-essential Business Closure Policy on Covid-19 Infection Rates
papers.authors: Hummy Song, Ryan M. McKenna, Angela T. Chen, Guy David, Aaron Smith-McLallen
papers.abstract: In response to the Covid-19 pandemic, many localities instituted non-essential business closure orders, keeping individuals categorized as essential workers at the frontlines while sending their non-essential counterparts home. We examine the extent to which being designated as an essential or non-essential worker impacts one’s risk of being Covid-positive following the non-essential business closure order in Pennsylvania. We also assess the intrahousehold transmission risk experienced by their cohabiting family members and roommates. Using a difference-in-differences framework, we estimate that workers designated as essential have a 55% higher likelihood of being positive for Covid-19 than those classified as non-essential; in other words, non-essential workers experience a protective effect. While members of the health care and social assistance subsector contribute significantly to this overall effect, it is not completely driven by them. We also find evidence of intrahousehold transmission that differs in intensity by essential status. Dependents cohabiting with an essential worker have a 17% higher likelihood of being Covid-positive compared to those cohabiting with a non-essential worker. Roommates cohabiting with an essential worker experience a 38% increase in likelihood of being Covid-positive. Analysis of households with a Covid-positive member suggests that intrahousehold transmission is an important mechanism
papers.meta: Programs：EH, LS, PE；JEL：H75, I12, I14, I18, J21, J68
papers.zh_title: 非必要商业关闭政策对新冠感染率的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 为应对新冠疫情，许多地区实施了非必要商业关闭令，将归类为必要岗位的工人留在前线，同时让非必要岗位工人回家。我们考察了在宾夕法尼亚州实施非必要商业关闭令后，被指定为必要或非必要工人对个人新冠检测阳性风险的影响。我们还评估了其同居家庭成员和室友面临的家庭内部传播风险。使用双重差分框架，我们估计被指定为必要的工人比非必要工人新冠检测阳性的可能性高55%；换言之，非必要工人享有保护效应。虽然医疗保健和社会援助子行业的成员对这一总体效应贡献显著，但并非完全由其驱动。我们还发现了家庭内部传播的证据，其强度因必要状态而异。与必要工人同居的受抚养人，其新冠检测阳性的可能性比与非必要工人同居者高17%。与必要工人同居的室友，其新冠检测阳性的可能性增加38%。对存在新冠阳性成员家庭的分析表明，家庭内部传播是一个重要机制。

papers.title: The Effects of Youth Employment on Crime: Evidence from New York City Lotteries
papers.authors: Judd B. Kessler, Sarah Tahamont, Alexander M. Gelber, Adam Isen
papers.abstract: Recent policy discussions have proposed government-guaranteed jobs, including for youth. One key potential benefit of youth employment is a reduction in criminal justice contact. Prior work on summer youth employment programs has documented little-to-no effect of the program on crime during the program but has found decreases in violent and other serious crimes among “at-risk” youth in the year or two after the program. We add to this picture by studying randomized lotteries for access to the New York City Summer Youth Employment Program (SYEP), the largest such program in the United States. We link SYEP data to New York State criminal records data to investigate outcomes of 163,447 youth who participated in a SYEP lottery between 2005 and 2008. We find evidence that SYEP participation decreases arrests and convictions during the program summer, effects that are driven by the small fraction (3 percent) of SYEP youth who are at-risk, as defined by having been arrested before the start of the program. We conclude that an important benefit of SYEPs is the contemporaneous effect during the program summer and that the effect is concentrated among individuals with prior contact with the criminal justice system.
papers.zh_title: 青年就业对犯罪的影响：来自纽约市抽签的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 近期的政策讨论提出了政府保障就业的设想，包括针对青年群体。青年就业的一个关键潜在好处是减少与刑事司法系统的接触。此前关于夏季青年就业项目的研究表明，项目期间对犯罪几乎没有影响，但在项目结束后的一两年内，“高风险”青年的暴力犯罪和其他严重犯罪有所减少。我们通过研究纽约市夏季青年就业项目（SYEP）的随机抽签来补充这一图景，该项目是美国规模最大的此类项目。我们将SYEP数据与纽约州刑事记录数据相关联，调查了2005年至2008年间参与SYEP抽签的163,447名青年的结果。我们发现证据表明，参与SYEP会降低项目夏季期间的逮捕和定罪率，这一效应由SYEP青年中一小部分（3%）高风险群体驱动，该群体定义为在项目开始前曾有被捕记录。我们得出结论，SYEP的一个重要益处是项目夏季期间的同期效应，且该效应集中于此前与刑事司法系统有过接触的个体。

papers.title: Globalization and Greenhouse Gas Emissions: Evidence from the United States
papers.authors: Claire Brunel, Arik Levinson
papers.abstract: The US has been a global leader in regulating local air pollution and a global laggard in regulating greenhouse gases (GHGs). For decades, critics of US policy have expressed fears that stringent US regulations on local air pollution would lead to pollution havens overseas. Prior research, suggests that has not happened. But what about the converse fear? Are the less stringent US climate regulations causing the US to become a pollution haven for other countries’ GHG-intensive industries? We provide a decomposition of US manufacturing GHG emissions and find no evidence of offshoring either to or from the United States since 1990.
papers.zh_title: 全球化与温室气体排放：来自美国的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 美国在监管本地空气污染方面一直是全球领导者，而在监管温室气体方面则是全球落后者。几十年来，美国政策的批评者一直担心，美国对本地空气污染的严格监管会导致污染向海外转移。先前的研究表明，这种情况并未发生。但相反担忧呢？美国较宽松的气候监管是否导致美国成为其他国家温室气体密集型产业的污染天堂？我们对美国制造业温室气体排放进行了分解，自1990年以来未发现向美国或从美国离岸外包的证据。

papers.title: Efficiency and Equity Impacts of Energy Subsidies
papers.authors: Robert W. Hahn, Robert D. Metcalfe
papers.abstract: Economic theory suggests that energy subsidies can lead to excessive consumption and environmental degradation. However, the precise impact of energy subsidies is not well understood. We analyze a large energy subsidy: the California Alternate Rates for Energy (CARE). CARE provides a price reduction for low-income consumers of natural gas and electricity. Using a natural field experiment, we estimate the price elasticity of demand for natural gas to be about -0.35 for CARE customers. An economic model of this subsidy yields three results. First, the natural gas subsidy appears to reduce welfare. Second, the economic impact of various policies, such as cap-and-trade, depends on whether prices for various customers move closer to the marginal social cost. Third, benefits to CARE customers need to increase by 6% to offset the costs of the program.
papers.zh_title: 能源补贴的效率与公平影响
papers.zh_abstract: 经济理论表明，能源补贴可能导致过度消费和环境退化。然而，能源补贴的具体影响尚不明确。我们分析了一项大型能源补贴：加州替代能源费率计划（CARE）。CARE为低收入天然气和电力消费者提供价格减免。通过一项自然田野实验，我们估计CARE客户对天然气的需求价格弹性约为-0.35。该补贴的经济模型得出三个结果。首先，天然气补贴似乎降低了福利。其次，各种政策（如总量控制与交易）的经济影响取决于不同客户的价格是否更接近边际社会成本。第三，CARE客户的收益需要增加6%才能抵消该项目的成本。

papers.title: Poverty in China since 1950: A Counterfactual Perspective
papers.authors: Martin Ravallion
papers.abstract: The other side of the coin to post-reform success is often pre-reform failure, and the policy lessons are found on both sides. The paper estimates how much of China’s poverty rate around 1980—near the outset of Deng Xiaoping’s pro-market reforms—is attributable to the prior Maoist regime. Based on the history, it is argued that South Korea and Taiwan provide a relevant counterfactual. Then a difference-in-difference estimate using historical data indicates that about two thirds of China’s poverty in 1980 is attributed to the impact of the Maoist path since 1950. Further checks and tests suggest that (if anything) this is likely to be an underestimate. It took 10-20 years for China’s post-reform economy to make up the lost ground. The impact of the Maoist path had begun to fade in the 1970s, and half or more of the catch-up was in period up to 1990, under Deng’s rule.
papers.zh_title: 1950年以来中国的贫困：一个反事实视角
papers.zh_abstract: 改革后成功的另一面往往是改革前的失败，政策教训存在于双方。本文估计了1980年左右（接近邓小平亲市场改革初期）中国贫困率中有多少可归因于之前的毛泽东时代。基于历史，本文认为韩国和台湾提供了相关的反事实。随后，使用历史数据的双重差分估计表明，1980年中国约三分之二的贫困可归因于1950年以来毛泽东道路的影响。进一步的检验和测试表明，这很可能是一个低估。中国改革后的经济用了10到20年才弥补失去的阵地。毛泽东道路的影响在1970年代已开始减弱，而追赶的一半或更多发生在1990年之前，即在邓小平统治时期。

papers.title: Competition for Attention in the ETF Space
papers.authors: Itzhak Ben-David, Francesco Franzoni, Byungwook Kim, Rabih Moussawi
papers.abstract: The interplay between investors' demand and providers' incentives has shaped the evolution of exchange-traded funds (ETFs). While early ETFs invest in broad-based indexes and therefore offered diversification at low cost, later products track niche port- folios and charge high fees. Strikingly, over their first five years, specialized ETFs lose about 30% in risk-adjusted terms. This underperformance cannot be explained by high fees or hedging demand. Rather, it is driven by the overvaluation of the underlying stocks at the time of the launch. Our results are consistent with providers catering to investors' extrapolative beliefs by issuing specialized ETFs that track attention- grabbing themes.
papers.zh_title: ETF领域的注意力竞争
papers.zh_abstract: 投资者需求与提供者激励之间的相互作用塑造了交易所交易基金（ETF）的演变。早期ETF投资于广泛基础指数，因此以低成本提供多元化，而后期产品追踪利基投资组合并收取高额费用。引人注目的是，在其前五年内，专业ETF在风险调整基础上损失约30%。这种表现不佳不能由高费用或对冲需求解释。相反，它是由推出时基础股票的高估驱动的。我们的结果与提供者迎合投资者的外推信念一致，即通过发行追踪吸引注意力主题的专业ETF。

papers.title: Price Limits in a Tradable Performance Standard
papers.authors: Banban Wang, William A. Pizer, Clayton Munnings
papers.abstract: Tradable performance standards are widely used sectoral regulatory policies. Examples include the US lead phasedown, fuel economy standards for automobiles, renewable portfolio standards, low carbon fuel standards, and—most recently—China’s new national carbon market. At the same time, theory and experience with traditional cap-and-trade programs suggests an important role for price limits in the form of floors, ceilings, and reserves. In this paper we develop a simple analytical model to derive the welfare comparison between tradable performance standards and a price-based alternative. This works out to be is a simple variant of the traditional Weitzman prices-versus-quantities result. We use this result to show that substantial gains could arise from shifting two programs, China’s new national carbon market (~60% gain) and the California Low Carbon Fuel Standard (~20% gain), to a price mechanism. This will generally be true when the coefficient of variation in the price under a TPS is larger than 50%. We end with a discussion of implementation issues, including full and partial consignment auctions based on actual and expected output.
papers.zh_title: 可交易绩效标准中的价格限制
papers.zh_abstract: 可交易绩效标准是广泛使用的部门监管政策。例子包括美国铅淘汰计划、汽车燃油经济性标准、可再生能源组合标准、低碳燃料标准，以及最近中国的全国碳市场。同时，传统总量控制与交易项目的理论和经验表明，价格限制（以地板价、天花板价和储备形式）发挥着重要作用。在本文中，我们开发了一个简单的分析模型，以推导可交易绩效标准与基于价格的替代方案之间的福利比较。这被证明是传统韦茨曼价格与数量结果的一个简单变体。我们利用这一结果表明，将两个项目——中国新的全国碳市场（约60%的收益）和加州低碳燃料标准（约20%的收益）——转向价格机制可能带来显著收益。当可交易绩效标准下价格的变异系数大于50%时，这通常是正确的。我们最后讨论了实施问题，包括基于实际和预期产出的全额和部分委托拍卖。

papers.title: Robust Financial Contracting and Investment
papers.authors: Aifan Ling, Jianjun Miao, Neng Wang
papers.abstract: We study how investors' preferences for robustness influence corporate investment, financing, and compensation decisions and valuation in a financial contracting model with agency. We characterize the robust contract and show that early liquidation can be optimal when investors are sufficiently ambiguity averse. We implement the robust contract by debt, equity, cash, and a financial derivative asset. The derivative is used to hedge against the investors' concern that the entrepreneur may be overly optimistic. Our calibrated model generates sizable equity premium and credit spread, and implies that ambiguity aversion lowers Tobin's q; the average investment, and investment volatility. The entrepreneur values the project at an internal rate of return of 3.5% per annum higher than investors do.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG；JEL：D81, E22, G12, G32, J33
papers.zh_title: 稳健金融契约与投资
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究投资者对稳健性的偏好如何影响企业投资、融资和薪酬决策以及估值，在一个包含代理问题的金融契约模型中。我们刻画了稳健契约，并表明当投资者足够模糊厌恶时，早期清算可能是最优的。我们通过债务、股权、现金和一种金融衍生资产来实施稳健契约。该衍生品用于对冲投资者对企业家可能过于乐观的担忧。我们的校准模型产生了可观的股权溢价和信用利差，并表明模糊厌恶降低了托宾q、平均投资和投资波动性。企业家对项目的估值年化内部收益率比投资者高出3.5%。

papers.title: Fiscal Multipliers: A Heterogenous-Agent Perspective
papers.authors: Tobias Broer, Per Krusell, Erik Öberg
papers.abstract: We use an analytically tractable heterogeneous-agent (HANK) version of the standard New Keynesian model to show how the size of fiscal multipliers depends on i) the distribution of factor incomes, and ii) the source of nominal rigidities. With sticky prices but flexible wages, the standard representative-agent (RANK) model predicts large multipliers because profits fall after a fiscal stimulus and the resulting negative income effect makes the representative worker work harder. Our HANK model, where workers do not own stock and thus do not receive profit income, predicts smaller fiscal multipliers. In fact, they are smaller with sticky prices than with flexible prices. When wages are the source of nominal rigidity, in contrast, fiscal multipliers are close to one, independently of income heterogeneity and price stickiness.
papers.zh_title: 财政乘数：异质性主体视角
papers.zh_abstract: 我们使用标准新凯恩斯模型的一个分析上易处理的异质性主体版本，来展示财政乘数的大小如何取决于i)要素收入的分配，以及ii)名义刚性的来源。在价格粘性但工资灵活的情况下，标准代表性主体模型预测大乘数，因为财政刺激后利润下降，由此产生的负收入效应使代表性工人更加努力工作。我们的异质性主体模型中，工人不持有股票因此不获得利润收入，预测了较小的财政乘数。事实上，在价格粘性下乘数比在价格灵活下更小。相反，当工资是名义刚性的来源时，财政乘数接近1，独立于收入异质性和价格粘性。

papers.title: Changes in Social Network Structure in Response to Exposure to Formal Credit Markets
papers.authors: Abhijit Banerjee, Emily Breza, Arun G. Chandrasekhar, Esther Duflo, Matthew O. Jackson, Cynthia Kinnan
papers.abstract: Formal financial institutions can have far-reaching and long-lasting impacts on informal lending and information networks. We first study 75 villages in Karnataka, 43 of which were exposed to microfinance after we first collected detailed network data. Networks shrink more in exposed villages. Links between households that were unlikely to ever borrow from microfinance are at least as likely to disappear as links involving likely borrowers. We replicate these surprising findings in the context of a randomized controlled trial in Hyderabad, where a microfinance institution randomly selected neighborhoods to enter first. Four years after all neighborhoods were treated, households in early-entry neighborhoods had credit access longer and had larger loans. We again find fewer social relationships between households in early-entry neighborhoods, even among those ex-ante unlikely to borrow. Because the results suggest global spillovers, which are inconsistent with standard models of network formation, we develop a new dynamic model of network formation that emphasizes chance meetings, where efforts to socialize generate a global network-level externality. Finally, we analyze informal borrowing and the sensitivity of consumption to income fluctuations. Households unlikely to take up microcredit suffer the greatest loss of informal borrowing and risk sharing, underscoring the global nature of the externality.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, IO, LS, PE, PR, TWP；JEL：D13, D85, L14, O12, Z13
papers.zh_title: 社交网络结构在接触正规信贷市场后的变化
papers.zh_abstract: 正规金融机构可以对非正规借贷和信息网络产生深远且持久的影响。我们首先研究了卡纳塔克邦的75个村庄，其中43个村庄在我们首次收集详细的网络数据后接触了小额信贷。在接触小额信贷的村庄中，网络规模缩小得更明显。那些不太可能从小额信贷机构借款的家庭之间的联系，与可能借款的家庭之间的联系相比，消失的可能性至少一样大。我们在海得拉巴的一项随机对照试验中复制了这些令人惊讶的发现，该试验中一家小额信贷机构随机选择社区优先进入。在所有社区都获得服务四年后，早期进入社区的居民获得信贷的时间更长，贷款额度也更大。我们再次发现，早期进入社区的家庭之间的社会关系更少，即使在那些事前不太可能借款的家庭中也是如此。由于这些结果表明存在全局性溢出效应，这与标准的网络形成模型不一致，因此我们开发了一个新的网络形成动态模型，该模型强调偶然相遇，其中社交努力会产生全局性的网络层面外部性。最后，我们分析了非正规借贷以及消费对收入波动的敏感性。不太可能接受小额信贷的家庭在非正规借贷和风险分担方面遭受的损失最大，这突显了这种外部性的全局性质。

papers.title: Double-Robust Identification for Causal Panel Data Models
papers.authors: Dmitry Arkhangelsky, Guido W. Imbens
papers.abstract: We study identification and estimation of causal effects in settings with panel data. Traditionally researchers follow model-based identification strategies relying on assumptions governing the relation between the potential outcomes and the unobserved confounders. We focus on a novel, complementary, approach to identification where assumptions are made about the relation between the treatment assignment and the unobserved confounders. We introduce different sets of assumptions that follow the two paths to identification, and develop a double robust approach. We propose estimation methods that build on these identification strategies.
papers.zh_title: 面板数据因果模型的双稳健识别方法
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了面板数据设定下因果效应的识别与估计问题。传统上，研究者遵循基于模型的识别策略，依赖于关于潜在结果与未观测混杂因素之间关系的假设。我们专注于一种新颖的、互补性的识别方法，该方法对处理分配与未观测混杂因素之间的关系做出假设。我们引入了遵循两种识别路径的不同假设集合，并开发了一种双稳健方法。我们提出了基于这些识别策略的估计方法。

papers.title: Smart(Phone) Investing? A within Investor-time Analysis of New Technologies and Trading Behavior.
papers.authors: Ankit Kalda, Benjamin Loos, Alessandro Previtero, Andreas Hackethal
papers.abstract: Using transaction-level data from two German banks, we study the effects of smartphones on investor behavior. Comparing trades by the same investor in the same month across different platforms, we find that smartphones increase purchasing of riskier and lottery-type assets and chasing past returns. After the adoption of smartphones, investors do not substitute trades across platforms and buy also riskier, lottery-type, and hot investments on other platforms. Using smartphones to trade specific assets or during specific hours contributes to explain our results. Digital nudges and the device screen size do not mechanically drive our results. Smartphone effects are not transitory.
papers.zh_title: 智能手机投资？基于投资者-时间维度的新技术与交易行为分析
papers.zh_abstract: 利用来自两家德国银行的交易级数据，我们研究了智能手机对投资者行为的影响。通过比较同一投资者在同一个月内跨不同平台的交易，我们发现智能手机增加了对风险更高、彩票型资产的购买以及追逐历史回报的行为。在采用智能手机后，投资者并不会跨平台替代交易，而是在其他平台上也会购买风险更高、彩票型以及热门的投资品种。使用智能手机交易特定资产或在特定时段进行交易，有助于解释我们的结果。数字助推和设备的屏幕尺寸并非机械地驱动我们的结果。智能手机效应并非暂时性的。

papers.title: Rethinking How We Score Capital Gains Tax Reform
papers.authors: Natasha Sarin, Lawrence H. Summers, Owen M. Zidar, Eric Zwick
papers.abstract: We argue the revenue potential from increasing tax rates on capital gains may be substantially greater than previously understood. First, many prior studies focus primarily on short-run taxpayer responses, and so miss revenue from gains that are deferred when rates change. Second, the composition of capital gains has shifted in recent years, such that the share of gains that are highly elastic to the tax rate has likely declined. Third, focusing on capital gains tax collection may understate fiscal spillovers from decreasing the preferential tax treatment for capital gains. Fourth, additional base-broadening reforms, like eliminating stepped-up basis and making charitable giving a realization event, will decrease the elasticity of the tax base to rate changes. Overall, we do not think the prevailing assumption of many in the scorekeeping community—that raising rates to top ordinary income levels would raise little revenue—is warranted. A crude calculation illustrates that raising capital gains rates to ordinary income levels could raise $1 trillion more revenue over a decade than other estimates suggest. Given the magnitudes at stake, scorekeeping procedures employed in evaluating capital gains should be made more transparent and be the subject of external professional debate and review.
papers.zh_title: 重新思考如何评估资本利得税改革
papers.zh_abstract: 我们认为，提高资本利得税率所带来的潜在财政收入可能远高于以往的理解。首先，许多先前的研究主要关注纳税人的短期反应，因此忽略了因税率变动而递延的收益所产生的财政收入。其次，近年来资本利得的构成发生了变化，因此对税率高度弹性的利得份额可能已经下降。第三，仅关注资本利得税征收可能会低估减少资本利得优惠税收待遇所带来的财政溢出效应。第四，额外的税基拓宽改革，例如取消递增计税基础以及将慈善捐赠视为实现事件，将降低税基对税率变化的弹性。总体而言，我们认为许多评分界人士普遍持有的假设——即将税率提高到最高普通收入水平只会带来很少的财政收入——是缺乏依据的。一个粗略的计算表明，将资本利得税率提高到普通收入水平，在十年内可能比其他估计多筹集1万亿美元的财政收入。鉴于所涉金额巨大，用于评估资本利得的评分程序应更加透明，并应成为外部专业辩论和审查的主题。

papers.title: Longevity Perceptions and Saving Decisions during the COVID-19 Outbreak: An Experimental Investigation
papers.authors: Abigail Hurwitz, Olivia S. Mitchell, Orly Sade
papers.abstract: We experimentally study individuals’ perceptions about and advice to others regarding retirement savings and annuitization during the pandemic. Many people recommend that others save more for retirement, but those most affected by the pandemic tell others to save and annuitize less. We investigate two possible channels for this result and show that the pandemic does not substantially alter optimism regarding survival probabilities. Hence, we conclude that economic factors are driving our results. Consequently, some financial ramifications of the COVID-19 outbreak are yet to be revealed, as the pandemic is having longer-term effects on peoples’ willingness to save and annuitize.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19疫情期间的寿命认知与储蓄决策：一项实验研究
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过实验研究了大流行期间个人对退休储蓄和年金化的认知以及对他人的建议。许多人建议他人为退休储蓄更多，但受大流行影响最严重的人却建议他人减少储蓄和年金化。我们研究了导致这一结果的两种可能渠道，并表明大流行并未显著改变人们对生存概率的乐观态度。因此，我们得出结论，经济因素正在驱动我们的结果。因此，COVID-19疫情的一些财务影响尚未显现，因为大流行正在对人们储蓄和年金化的意愿产生更长期的影响。

papers.title: COVID-19 Disruptions Disproportionately Affect Female Academics
papers.authors: Tatyana Deryugina, Olga Shurchkov, Jenna E. Stearns
papers.abstract: The rapid spread of the COVID-19 pandemic and subsequent countermeasures, such as school closures, the shift to working from home, and social distancing are disrupting economic activity around the world. As with other major economic shocks, there are winners and losers, leading to increased inequality across certain groups. In this project, we investigate the effects of COVID-19 disruptions on the gender gap in academia. We administer a global survey to a broad range of academics across various disciplines to collect nuanced data on the respondents’ circumstances, such as a spouse’s employment, the number and ages of children, and time use. We find that female academics, particularly those who have children, report a disproportionate reduction in time dedicated to research relative to what comparable men and women without children experience. Both men and women report substantial increases in childcare and housework burdens, but women experienced significantly larger increases than men did.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19疫情对女性学者的影响尤为严重
papers.zh_abstract: COVID-19疫情的迅速蔓延以及随后的应对措施，如学校关闭、转向居家办公和社交距离，正在扰乱全球经济活动。与其他重大经济冲击一样，有赢家也有输家，导致某些群体之间的不平等加剧。在本项目中，我们研究了COVID-19疫情对学术界性别差距的影响。我们向跨学科领域的广泛学者进行了一项全球调查，以收集关于受访者情况的细致数据，例如配偶的就业状况、子女的数量和年龄以及时间使用情况。我们发现，女性学者，尤其是有孩子的女性学者，报告称用于研究的时间相对于条件相当的男性和没有孩子的女性而言，出现了不成比例的减少。男性和女性都报告称育儿和家务负担大幅增加，但女性经历的增幅显著大于男性。

papers.title: Populism, Protectionism, and Political Instability
papers.authors: Tyler Daun, Sebastian Galiani, Gustavo Torrens
papers.abstract: Most populist regimes in Latin American countries used trade policy to redistribute income, despite being less efficient than other redistribution schemes such as transfers financed with an income tax. Often, this outcome is attributed to the lack of fiscal capacity in Latin American countries. Instead, we develop a simple political economy game where the populist government may use trade policy to encourage capitalists to invest in the more labor-intensive industry. Since moving capital is costly, those capitalists will support the continuation of the protectionist trade policy even after the populist government falls from power. The populist government may therefore choose to implement the less efficient but politically-sustainable policy instead of the more efficient policy that will be easily overturned after a regime change. Building fiscal capacity does not change the equilibrium. Only a long run commitment to a minimum level of redistribution restores efficiency.
papers.zh_title: 民粹主义、保护主义与政治不稳定
papers.zh_abstract: 拉丁美洲国家的大多数民粹主义政权使用贸易政策来重新分配收入，尽管这不如其他再分配方案（如通过所得税融资的转移支付）有效。通常，这一结果被归因于拉丁美洲国家财政能力的不足。相反，我们构建了一个简单的政治经济学博弈，其中民粹主义政府可能利用贸易政策来鼓励资本家投资于劳动密集型产业。由于转移资本是有成本的，这些资本家即使在民粹主义政府下台后，也会支持保护主义贸易政策的延续。因此，民粹主义政府可能会选择实施效率较低但政治上可持续的政策，而不是那种在政权更迭后容易被推翻的更高效政策。建设财政能力并不会改变均衡。只有对最低水平的再分配做出长期承诺才能恢复效率。

papers.title: Living and Dying in America: An Essay on Deaths of Despair and the Future of Capitalism
papers.authors: Christopher J. Ruhm
papers.abstract: This essay reviews Deaths of Despair and the Future of Capitalism (DEATHS), by Anne Case and Angus Deaton, a fascinating account of life and death in the United States during the late 20th and early 21st centuries. While primarily targeted towards a popular audience, the volume will be of interest to many economists and other social scientists. It postulates how public and private policies currently practiced in the United States, combined with and partly causing the declining economic and social circumstances of less educated, have led to increased mortality from drugs, suicide, and chronic liver disease. After describing the material in DEATHS in considerable detail, I suggest a variety of research questions that need to be answered to confirm or refute Case and Deaton’s arguments and describe challenges to their key hypotheses. Among the latter are the ability of the postulated relationships to explain the sharply differing mortality trajectories of non-Hispanic whites, compared with other groups, and the timing of the observed mortality changes. Along the way, I raise doubts about the usefulness of the “deaths of despair” conceptualization, with its strong implications about causality.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, LS, PE；JEL：I12, I14, I18, J11, J18
papers.zh_title: 生与死在美利坚：评绝望之死与资本主义的未来
papers.zh_abstract: 本文评述了安妮·凯斯和安格斯·迪顿所著的《绝望之死与资本主义的未来》（DEATHS），该书对20世纪末和21世纪初美国人的生与死进行了引人入胜的记述。虽然主要面向大众读者，但这本书也会引起许多经济学家和其他社会科学家的兴趣。该书假设，美国当前实行的公共和私人政策，加上并部分导致了受教育程度较低人群经济和社会状况的恶化，导致了因毒品、自杀和慢性肝病导致的死亡率上升。在详细描述了DEATHS一书的内容之后，我提出了一系列需要回答的研究问题，以证实或反驳凯斯和迪顿的论点，并描述了他们关键假设所面临的挑战。后者包括所假设的关系能否解释非西班牙裔白人与其他群体相比截然不同的死亡率轨迹，以及观察到的死亡率变化的时间点。在此过程中，我对“绝望之死”这一概念化框架的有用性提出了质疑，因为它对因果关系有强烈的暗示。
