papers.meta: Programs：DEV, PE；JEL：H42, H53, I38, O12, Q18
papers.zh_title: 作为保险的实物转移支付
papers.zh_abstract: 近期关于社会保护计划最优形式的争论凸显了现金作为向低收入家庭转移支付首选形式的潜力。然而，实物转移支付在世界各地仍然普遍存在。我们认为，受益者本身可能更偏好实物转移支付，因为这些转移支付可以提供针对价格风险的保险。由于市场整合程度低，发展中国家的家庭经常面临显著的价格波动。我们建立了一个模型，证明如果收入的边际效用与价格之间的协方差为正，那么实物转移支付相对于现金能改善福利。利用热量摄入不足作为边际效用的代理变量，我们发现对于印度家庭而言，实物转移支付相对于现金能改善福利，这一效应完全由贫困家庭驱动。我们进一步表明，印度实物食品转移支付项目——公共分配系统（PDS）慷慨程度的提高，不仅导致热量摄入增加，还降低了热量摄入对价格的敏感度。

papers.title: Wages, Minimum Wages, and Price Pass-Through: The Case of McDonald’s Restaurants
papers.authors: Orley C. Ashenfelter, Štěpán Jurajda
papers.abstract: We use price and wage data from McDonald's restaurants to provide evidence on wage increases, labor-saving technology introduction, and price pass-through by a large low-wage employer facing a flurry of minimum wage hikes from 2016-2020. We estimate an elasticity of hourly wage rates with respect to minimum wages of 0.7. In 40% of instances where minimum wages increase, McDonald's restaurants' wages are near the effective minimum wage level both before and after its increase; however, we also uncover a tendency among a large subset of restaurants to preserve their pay 'premium' above the minimum wage level. We find no association between the adoption of labor-saving touch screen ordering technology and minimum wage hikes. Our data imply that McDonald's restaurants pass through the higher costs of minimum wage increases in the form of higher prices of the Big Mac sandwich. We find a 0.2 price elasticity with respect to wage increases, which implies an elasticity of prices with respect to minimum wages of about 0.14. Based on a listing of all US McDonald's restaurants from 2010 to 2020, we also find no effects of minimum wages on McDonald's restaurant entry and exit.
papers.zh_title: 工资、最低工资与价格传导：麦当劳餐厅的案例
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用麦当劳餐厅的价格和工资数据，为一家大型低薪雇主在2016年至2020年面临一系列最低工资上调时的工资上涨、节省劳动力的技术引入以及价格传导提供证据。我们估计小时工资率相对于最低工资的弹性为0.7。在40%的最低工资上涨案例中，麦当劳餐厅的工资在最低工资上调前后都接近有效最低工资水平；然而，我们也发现，在很大一部分餐厅中，存在保持其高于最低工资水平的工资“溢价”的趋势。我们没有发现采用节省劳动力的触摸屏点餐技术与最低工资上调之间存在关联。我们的数据表明，麦当劳餐厅以巨无霸三明治价格上涨的形式，将最低工资上涨带来的更高成本传导出去。我们发现价格相对于工资上涨的弹性为0.2，这意味着价格相对于最低工资的弹性约为0.14。基于2010年至2020年美国所有麦当劳餐厅的列表，我们也没有发现最低工资对麦当劳餐厅的进入和退出产生影响。

papers.title: The Gendered Impact of the COVID-19 Recession on the US Labor Market
papers.authors: Stefania Albanesi, Jiyeon Kim
papers.abstract: The economic crisis associated with the emergence of the novel corona virus is unlike standard recessions. Demand for workers in high contact and inflexible service occupations has declined, while parental supply of labor has been reduced by lack of access to reliable child care and in-person schooling options. This has led to a substantial and persistent drop in employment and labor force participation for women, who are typically less affected by recessions than men. We examine real time data on employment, unemployment, labor force participation and gross job flows to document the gendered impact of the pandemic. We also discuss the potential long-term implications of this crisis, including the role of automation in depressing the recovery of employment for the worst hit service occupations.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS；JEL：E24, J16, J2, J21, J23
papers.zh_title: COVID-19衰退对美国劳动力市场的性别影响
papers.zh_abstract: 与新型冠状病毒出现相关的经济危机不同于标准的经济衰退。对高接触性和非灵活性服务职业的劳动力需求下降，同时，由于缺乏可靠的儿童保育和面对面教育选择，父母的劳动力供给减少。这导致女性的就业和劳动力参与率出现大幅且持续的下降，而女性通常受经济衰退的影响小于男性。我们利用就业、失业、劳动力参与率和总工作流动的实时数据，记录了这场大流行病的性别影响。我们还讨论了这场危机的潜在长期影响，包括自动化在抑制受冲击最严重的服务职业就业复苏方面的作用。

papers.title: Endogenous Immigration, Human and Physical Capital Formation, and the Immigration Surplus
papers.authors: Isaac Ehrlich, Yun Pei
papers.abstract: We evaluate the economic consequences of immigration in a two-country, two-skill, overlapping-generations framework, where immigration, population, human and physical capital formation, and economic growth are endogenous variables. We go beyond extant literature by integrating physical capital in our model. This enables the derivation of new insights about the induced-immigration effects of exogenous triggers, including pull and push factors and policy variables, on the dynamic evolution of the “immigration surplus” in the short run versus the long run, in destination vs. source countries and in the global economy. The policy shifts we analyze include the easing of constraints on potential migrants’ labor and physical capital mobility, and the role of physical capital endowments. We also discuss the policy implications of asymmetries in the net benefits from immigration across destination and source countries.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, LS, PE, POL；JEL：F22, F43, J11, J24, O15
papers.zh_title: 内生移民、人力与物质资本形成以及移民剩余
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在一个两国、两技能、世代交叠的框架下评估移民的经济后果，其中移民、人口、人力与物质资本形成以及经济增长均为内生变量。我们通过将物质资本纳入模型，超越了现有文献。这使得我们能够推导出关于外生触发因素（包括拉力和推力因素以及政策变量）对“移民剩余”动态演变的诱导性移民效应的新见解，这些效应体现在短期与长期、目的地国与来源国以及全球经济中。我们分析的政策变化包括放松对潜在移民劳动力和物质资本流动的限制，以及物质资本禀赋的作用。我们还讨论了目的地国和来源国之间移民净收益不对称性的政策含义。

papers.title: What Marginal Outcome Tests Can Tell Us About Racially Biased Decision-Making
papers.authors: Peter Hull
papers.abstract: Marginal outcome tests compare the expected effects of a decision on individuals who are of different races but at the same indifference point of the decision-maker. I present a simple formalization of how such tests can detect racial bias, defined as a deviation from accurate statistical discrimination. Namely, the tests can reject that the decision-maker ranks individuals according to some accurate prediction of a mandated outcome, given some unspecified race-inclusive information set. The frontier of marginal effects can furthermore rule out canonical taste-based discrimination. I relate this analysis to other interpretations of marginal outcome tests, other notions of racial discrimination, and recent identification strategies.
papers.zh_title: 边际结果检验能告诉我们关于种族偏见决策的什么信息
papers.zh_abstract: 边际结果检验比较了决策对处于决策者相同无差异点但种族不同的个体的预期影响。我提出了一个简单的形式化方法，说明此类检验如何检测种族偏见，即偏离准确的统计歧视。具体而言，这些检验可以拒绝决策者根据对某个规定结果的某种准确预测（基于某个未指定的、包含种族的信念集）对个体进行排序的假设。边际效应的前沿还可以进一步排除典型的基于偏好的歧视。我将这一分析与对边际结果检验的其他解释、种族歧视的其他概念以及最近的识别策略联系起来。

papers.title: A Simple but Powerful Simulated Certainty Equivalent Approximation Method for Dynamic Stochastic Problems
papers.authors: Yongyang Cai, Kenneth L. Judd
papers.abstract: We introduce a novel simulated certainty equivalent approximation (SCEQ) method for solving dynamic stochastic problems. Our examples show that this method only requires a desktop computer to solve high-dimensional finite- or infinite-horizon, stationary or nonstationary dynamic stochastic problems with hundreds of state variables, a wide state space, and occasionally binding constraints. The SCEQ method is simple, stable, and efficient, which makes it suitable for solving complex economic problems that cannot be solved by other algorithms.
papers.meta: Programs：TWP；JEL：C61, C63, C68, E31, E52, Q54, Q58
papers.zh_title: 动态随机问题的一种简单而强大的模拟确定性等价近似方法
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种新颖的模拟确定性等价近似（SCEQ）方法，用于求解动态随机问题。我们的示例表明，该方法仅需一台台式计算机，即可解决具有数百个状态变量、广泛状态空间以及偶尔约束的高维有限期或无限期、平稳或非平稳动态随机问题。SCEQ方法简单、稳定且高效，使其适用于解决其他算法无法处理的复杂经济问题。

papers.title: Financial Regulation in a Quantitative Model of the Modern Banking System
papers.authors: Juliane Begenau, Tim Landvoigt
papers.abstract: How does the shadow banking system respond to changes in capital regulation of commercial banks? We propose a quantitative general equilibrium model with regulated and unregulated banks to study the unintended consequences of regulation. Tighter capital requirements for regulated banks cause higher convenience yield on debt of all banks, leading to higher shadow bank leverage and a larger shadow banking sector. At the same time, tighter regulation eliminates the subsidies to commercial banks from deposit insurance, reducing the competitive pressures on shadow banks to take risks. The net effect is a safer financial system with more shadow banking. Calibrating the model to data on financial institutions in the U.S., the optimal capital requirement is around 16%.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EEE；JEL：E41, E44, G21, G23, G28
papers.zh_title: 现代银行体系量化模型中的金融监管
papers.zh_abstract: 影子银行体系如何应对商业银行资本监管的变化？我们提出了一个包含受监管和未受监管银行的量化一般均衡模型，以研究监管的非预期后果。对受监管银行实施更严格的资本要求，会导致所有银行债务的便利收益率上升，从而推高影子银行的杠杆率并扩大影子银行部门。同时，更严格的监管消除了存款保险对商业银行的补贴，降低了影子银行承担风险的竞争压力。净效果是金融体系更加安全，但影子银行业务增多。将模型校准至美国金融机构数据后，最优资本要求约为16%。

papers.title: Kidney Exchange: An Operations Perspective
papers.authors: Itai Ashlagi, Alvin E. Roth
papers.abstract: Many patients in need of a kidney transplant have a willing but incompatible (or poorly matched) living donor. Kidney exchange programs arrange exchanges among such patient-donor pairs, in cycles and chains of exchange, so each patient receives a compatible kidney. Kidney exchange has become a standard form of transplantation in the United States and a few other countries, in large part because of continued attention to the operational details that arose as obstacles were overcome and new obstacles became relevant. We review some of the key operational issues in the design of successful kidney exchange programs. Kidney exchange has yet to reach its full potential, and the paper further describes some open questions that we hope will continue to attract attention from researchers interested in the operational aspects of dynamic exchange.
papers.zh_title: 肾脏交换：运营视角
papers.zh_abstract: 许多需要肾移植的患者拥有愿意捐献但血型不匹配（或配型不佳）的活体捐献者。肾脏交换项目通过循环和链式交换，在这些患者-捐献者配对之间安排交换，使每位患者都能获得相容的肾脏。肾脏交换已成为美国及其他少数国家的标准移植形式，这在很大程度上得益于对运营细节的持续关注——这些细节随着障碍被克服和新障碍的出现而不断演变。我们回顾了成功肾脏交换项目设计中的一些关键运营问题。肾脏交换尚未充分发挥其潜力，本文进一步描述了一些开放性问题，希望这些问题能持续吸引对动态交换运营方面感兴趣的研究者的关注。

papers.title: Skipping the Bag: The Intended and Unintended Consequences of Disposable Bag Regulation
papers.authors: Tatiana Homonoff, Lee-Sien Kao, Javiera Selman, Christina Seybolt
papers.abstract: Regulation of goods associated with negative environmental externalities may decrease consumption of the targeted product, but may be ineffective at reducing the externality itself if close substitutes are left unregulated. We find evidence that plastic bag bans, the most common disposable bag regulation in the US, led retailers to circumvent the regulation by providing free thicker plastic bags which are not covered by the ban. In contrast, a regulation change that replaced the ban with a small tax on all disposable bags generated large decreases in disposable bag use and overall environmental costs. Our results suggest that narrowly-defined regulations (like plastic bag bans) may be less effective than policies that target a more comprehensive set of products, even in the case when the policy instrument itself (a tax rather than a ban) is not as strict.
papers.zh_title: 跳过袋子：一次性袋子监管的预期与非预期后果
papers.zh_abstract: 对具有负面环境外部性的商品进行监管，可能会减少目标产品的消费，但如果密切替代品未被监管，则可能无法有效减少外部性本身。我们发现证据表明，塑料袋禁令（美国最常见的一次性袋子监管）导致零售商通过提供不受禁令覆盖的免费更厚塑料袋来规避监管。相比之下，一项将禁令替换为对所有一次性袋子征收小额税的监管变更，显著减少了一次性袋子的使用和总体环境成本。我们的结果表明，即使政策工具本身（税收而非禁令）不那么严格，针对更全面产品组合的政策也可能比狭义定义的监管（如塑料袋禁令）更有效。

papers.title: Social and Genetic Effects on Educational Performance in Early Adolescence
papers.authors: Martin A. Isungset, Dalton Conley, Henrik D. Zachrisson, Eivind Ystrøm, Alexandra Havdahl, Pål R. Njølstad, Torkild H. Lyngstad
papers.abstract: Research into the intergenerational transmission of educational advantage has long been criticized for not paying sufficient attention to genetics. This study is based on the Norwegian Mother, Father and Child Cohort Study (MoBa) and administrative register data on 25000 genotyped Norwegian children and their parents. We assess and disentangle the relative importance of genetics and social background for children’s standardized academic test scores. Norway offers a particularly interesting context for intergenerational transmission, as the welfare state and educational system is designed to provide equal opportunity structures for children. The results point to genetics only confounding the parent status-offspring achievement relationship to a small degree, to ‘genetic nurture’ effects being small, and pro-vide no evidence of neither Scarr-Rowe interactions in test scores nor parent-child genotype interactions. Even in a universal welfare state with relatively low levels of inequality, there are two systems of ascription, one genetic and one social, and these are largely independent of each other.
papers.zh_title: 早期青少年教育表现的社会与遗传效应
papers.zh_abstract: 关于教育优势代际传递的研究长期以来因未充分关注遗传因素而受到批评。本研究基于挪威母亲、父亲与儿童队列研究（MoBa）以及25000名基因分型的挪威儿童及其父母的行政登记数据。我们评估并厘清了遗传和社会背景对儿童标准化学业测试成绩的相对重要性。挪威为代际传递提供了一个特别有趣的背景，因为其福利国家和教育体系旨在为儿童提供平等的机会结构。结果表明，遗传仅对父母地位与子女成就之间的关系产生轻微混淆效应，“遗传培育”效应很小，并且没有证据表明测试成绩中存在Scarr-Rowe交互作用或亲子基因型交互作用。即使在相对低不平等水平的全民福利国家中，也存在两种归因系统——一种遗传性的和一种社会性的，且它们在很大程度上相互独立。

papers.title: The Economics of Spatial Mobility: Theory and Evidence Using Smartphone Data
papers.authors: Yuhei Miyauchi, Kentaro Nakajima, Stephen J. Redding
papers.abstract: We develop a tractable quantitative framework for modelling the rich patterns of spatial mobility observed in smartphone data. We show that travel is frequently undertaken as part of a travel itinerary, defined as a journey starting and ending at home that can include more than one intermediate stop on a given day. We show that these travel itineraries provide microfoundations for consumption externalities and generate both complementarity and substitutability between locations. We show that the consumption externalities implied by travel itineraries are central to matching quasi-experimental evidence from the shift to WFH. We find that these consumption externalities are key drivers of the agglomeration of economic activity in central cities and shape the relative welfare gains from alternative transport improvements in favor of investments in central cities.
papers.zh_title: 空间流动的经济学：基于智能手机数据的理论与证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个易于处理的量化框架，用于建模智能手机数据中观察到的丰富空间流动模式。我们表明，旅行通常作为旅行行程的一部分进行，该行程定义为从家出发并最终返回家的旅程，一天内可包含多个中间停留点。我们证明，这些旅行行程为消费外部性提供了微观基础，并在不同地点之间产生了互补性和替代性。我们进一步表明，旅行行程所隐含的消费外部性对于匹配转向远程办公的准实验证据至关重要。我们发现，这些消费外部性是经济活动集聚于中心城区的关键驱动因素，并塑造了不同交通改善方案（偏向中心城区投资）的相对福利收益。

papers.title: Intellectual Property Infringement by Foreign Firms: Import Protection through the ITC or Court
papers.authors: James A. Brander, Barbara J. Spencer
papers.abstract: This paper examines intellectual property litigation as a method of protection from patent-infringing imports. Claims against patent-infringing imports entering the United States may be filed before the International Trade Commission (ITC) or in district court. The ITC applies injunctions (import prohibitions) that would seem to provide more protection from infringing imports than the standard license fee remedy in court. Settlements prior to legal adjudication are common in both venues. Using a model with Nash bargaining and Cournot competition, we show that an ITC filing may restrict imports by less than in court. This result tends to apply if product differentiation is high and the size of the patented cost-reducing innovation is large.
papers.zh_title: 外国公司的知识产权侵权：通过ITC或法院的进口保护
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了知识产权诉讼作为应对专利侵权进口品的一种保护方法。针对进入美国的专利侵权进口品的索赔，可以向国际贸易委员会（ITC）或地区法院提起。ITC适用禁令（进口禁止），这似乎比法院的标准许可费救济更能提供对侵权进口品的保护。在两个司法管辖区，法律裁决前的和解都很常见。通过使用纳什谈判和古诺竞争模型，我们表明，ITC诉讼对进口的限制可能小于法院。当产品差异化程度高且专利成本降低创新的规模大时，这一结果往往成立。

papers.title: The “Matthew Effect” and Market Concentration: Search Complementarities and Monopsony Power
papers.authors: Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Federico Mandelman, Yang Yu, Francesco Zanetti
papers.abstract: This paper develops a dynamic general equilibrium model with heterogeneous firms that face search complementarities in the formation of vendor contracts. Search complementarities amplify small differences in productivity among firms. Market concentration fosters monopsony power in the labor market, magnifying profits and further enhancing high-productivity firms' output share. Firms want to get bigger and hire more workers, in stark contrast with the classic monopsony model, where a firm aims to reduce the amount of labor it hires. The combination of search complementarities and monopsony power induces a strong “Matthew effect” that endogenously generates superstar firms out of uniform idiosyncratic productivity distributions. Reductions in search costs increase market concentration, lower the labor income share, and increase wage inequality.
papers.zh_title: “马太效应”与市场集中度：搜索互补性与买方垄断势力
papers.zh_abstract: 本文构建了一个异质性企业的动态一般均衡模型，其中企业在形成供应商合同时面临搜索互补性。搜索互补性放大了企业间微小的生产率差异。市场集中度加剧了劳动力市场中的买方垄断势力，放大了利润，并进一步提升了高生产率企业的产出份额。企业希望变得更大并雇佣更多工人，这与经典买方垄断模型形成鲜明对比——在经典模型中，企业旨在减少其雇佣的劳动量。搜索互补性与买方垄断势力的结合引发了强烈的“马太效应”，从均匀的异质性生产率分布中内生地催生出超级明星企业。搜索成本的降低增加了市场集中度，降低了劳动收入份额，并加剧了工资不平等。

papers.title: Gender and the Dynamics of Economics Seminars
papers.authors: Pascaline Dupas, Alicia Sasser Modestino, Muriel Niederle, Justin Wolfers, The Seminar Dynamics Collective
papers.abstract: This paper reports the results of the first systematic attempt at quantitatively measuring the seminar culture within economics and testing whether it is gender neutral. We collected data on every interaction between presenters and their audience in hundreds of research seminars and job market talks across most leading economics departments, as well as during summer conferences. We find that women presenters are treated differently than their male counterparts. Women are asked more questions during a seminar and the questions asked of women presenters are more likely to be patronizing or hostile. These effects are not due to women presenting in different fields, different seminar series, or different topics, as our analysis controls for the institution, seminar series, and JEL codes associated with each presentation. Moreover, it appears that there are important differences by field and that these differences are not uniformly mitigated by more rigid seminar formats. Our findings add to an emerging literature documenting ways in which women economists are treated differently than men, and suggest yet another potential explanation for their under-representation at senior levels within the economics profession.
papers.zh_title: 性别与经济学研讨会的动态
papers.zh_abstract: 本文报告了首次系统量化衡量经济学研讨会文化并检验其是否性别中立的尝试结果。我们收集了在大多数顶尖经济系以及夏季会议期间，数百场研究研讨会和求职市场演讲中演讲者与听众之间每一次互动的数据。我们发现，女性演讲者受到的待遇与男性同行不同。在研讨会期间，女性被问及更多问题，而且向女性演讲者提出的问题更可能带有居高临下或敌意的态度。这些效应并非由于女性在不同领域、不同系列研讨会或不同主题上进行演讲所致，因为我们的分析控制了与每场演讲相关的机构、系列研讨会和JEL代码。此外，不同领域似乎存在重要差异，而这些差异并未通过更严格的研讨会形式得到统一缓解。我们的发现为记录女性经济学家与男性受到不同待遇的新兴文献增添了内容，并提出了经济学界高级职位中女性代表性不足的另一个潜在解释。

papers.title: What Explains Differences in Finance Research Productivity During the Pandemic?
papers.authors: Brad M. Barber, Wei Jiang, Adair Morse, Manju Puri, Heather Tookes, Ingrid M. Werner
papers.abstract: Using a survey of AFA members, we analyze how demographics, time allocation, production mechanisms, and institutional factors affect research production during the pandemic. Consistent with the literature, research productivity falls more for women and faculty with young children. Independently and novel, extra time spent teaching (much more likely for women) negatively affects research productivity. Also novel are the results that concerns about feedback, isolation, and health have large negative research effects, disproportionately affecting junior faculty and PhD students. Finally, faculty facing greater concerns about employers’ finances report larger negative research effects and more concerns about feedback, isolation and health.
papers.zh_title: 疫情期间金融研究生产力差异的解释因素
papers.zh_abstract: 通过对美国金融协会成员的调查，我们分析了人口统计特征、时间分配、生产机制和制度因素如何影响疫情期间的研究产出。与文献一致，女性和有年幼子女的教师的研究生产力下降幅度更大。独立且新颖的是，额外花费在教学上的时间（女性更可能如此）对研究生产力产生负面影响。同样新颖的结果是，对反馈、孤立和健康的担忧对研究产生较大的负面效应，且对初级教师和博士生影响尤为严重。最后，对雇主财务状况有更大担忧的教师报告了更大的负面研究效应，以及对反馈、孤立和健康的更多担忧。

papers.title: Does Mobility Explain Why Slums Were Hit Harder by COVID-19 in Mumbai, India?
papers.authors: Jaymee Sheng, Anup Malani, Ashish Goel, Purushotham Botla
papers.abstract: SARS-CoV-2 has had a greater burden, as measured by rate of infection, in poorer communities within cities. For example, 55% of Mumbai slums residents had antibodies to COVID-19, 3.2 times the seroprevalence in non-slum areas of the city according to a sero-survey done in July 2020. One explanation is that government suppression was less severe in poorer communities, either because the poor were more likely to be exempt or unable to comply. Another explanation is that effective suppression itself accelerated the epidemic in poor neighborhoods because households are more crowded and residents share toilet and water facilities. We show there is little evidence for the first hypothesis in the context of Mumbai. Using location data from smart phones, we find that slum residents had nominally but not significantly (economically or statistically) higher mobility than non-slums prior to the sero-survey. We also find little evidence that mobility in non-slums was lower than in slums during lockdown, a subset of the period before the survey.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EH；JEL：I12, I14, I15, I18, R0
papers.zh_title: 流动性能否解释为何印度孟买的贫民窟受COVID-19冲击更严重？
papers.zh_abstract: SARS-CoV-2在城市内较贫困社区造成了更大的负担，以感染率衡量。例如，根据2020年7月进行的一项血清调查，孟买55%的贫民窟居民拥有COVID-19抗体，是非贫民窟地区血清阳性率的3.2倍。一种解释是，政府在较贫困社区的压制措施不那么严厉，要么是因为穷人更可能被豁免，要么是无法遵守。另一种解释是，有效的压制本身加速了贫困社区的疫情，因为家庭更拥挤，居民共用厕所和供水设施。我们表明，在孟买的背景下，几乎没有证据支持第一种假设。利用智能手机的位置数据，我们发现，在血清调查之前，贫民窟居民的流动性名义上高于非贫民窟，但并不显著（经济上或统计上）。我们还发现，几乎没有证据表明，在封锁期间（调查前的一个子时期），非贫民窟的流动性低于贫民窟。

papers.title: A Model of Credit, Money, Interest, and Prices
papers.authors: Saki Bigio, Yuliy Sannikov
papers.abstract: This paper integrates a realistic implementation of monetary policy through the banking system into an incomplete-markets economy with wage rigidity. Monetary policy sets policy rates and alters the supply of reserves. These tools grant independent control over credit spreads and an interest target. Through these tools, monetary policy affects the evolution of real interests rates, credit, output, and the wealth distribution—both in the long and in the short run. We decompose the effects through a combination of the interest and credit channels that depend on the size of the central bank’s balance sheet. Monetary policy reaches an expansionary limit when it enters a liquidity trap. The model highlights a trade-off between worse microeconomic insurance (insurance across agents) and greater macroeconomic insurance (insurance across states). The model prescribes that monetary policy should operate with a small balance sheet which tightens credit during booms, and should expand its balance sheet and lower policy rates during busts.
papers.zh_title: 一个关于信贷、货币、利率和价格的模型
papers.zh_abstract: 本文将货币政策通过银行体系的现实实施方式，整合到一个具有工资刚性的不完全市场经济中。货币政策设定政策利率并改变准备金供给。这些工具赋予了对信贷利差和利率目标的独立控制权。通过这些工具，货币政策影响实际利率、信贷、产出和财富分配的演变——无论是在长期还是短期。我们通过利率和信贷渠道的组合来分解这些效应，这取决于中央银行资产负债表的规模。当货币政策进入流动性陷阱时，它达到扩张极限。该模型强调了微观经济保险（跨代理人保险）恶化与宏观经济保险（跨状态保险）增强之间的权衡。该模型规定，货币政策应以小资产负债表运作，在繁荣时期收紧信贷，并在萧条时期扩大资产负债表并降低政策利率。

papers.title: The Value of Privacy in Cartels: An Analysis of the Inner Workings of a Bidding Ring
papers.authors: Kei Kawai, Jun Nakabayashi, Juan M. Ortner
papers.abstract: We study the inner workings of a bidding cartel focusing on the way in which bidders communicate with one another regarding how each bidder should bid. We show that the designated winner of the cartel can attain higher payoffs by randomizing its bid and keeping it secret from other bidders when defection is a concern. Intuitively, randomization makes defection less attractive as potential defectors face the risk of not winning the auction even if they deviate. We illustrate how our theoretical predictions are borne out in practice by studying a bidding cartel that operated in the town of Kumatori, Japan.
papers.zh_title: 卡特尔中隐私的价值：对投标圈内部运作的分析
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个投标卡特尔（bidding cartel）的内部运作，重点关注投标人之间就每个投标人应如何投标进行沟通的方式。我们表明，当存在背叛风险时，卡特尔指定的赢家可以通过随机化其投标并对其他投标人保密来获得更高的收益。直观地说，随机化降低了背叛的吸引力，因为潜在的背叛者即使偏离约定，也面临无法赢得拍卖的风险。我们通过研究一个在日本熊取町运作的投标卡特尔，说明了我们的理论预测如何在实践中得到验证。

papers.title: Market Power in Neoclassical Growth Models
papers.authors: Laurence M. Ball, N. Gregory Mankiw
papers.abstract: This paper examines the optimal accumulation of capital and the effects of government debt in neoclassical growth models in which firms have market power and therefore charge prices above marginal cost. In this environment, the real interest rate earned by savers is less than the net marginal product of capital. We establish a new method for evaluating dynamic efficiency that can be applied in such economies. A plausible calibration suggests that the wedge between the real interest rate and the marginal product of capital is more than 4 percentage points and that the U.S. economy is dynamically efficient. In addition, government Ponzi schemes can have different implications for welfare than they do under competition. Even if the government can sustain a perpetual rollover of debt and accumulating interest, the policy may nonetheless reduce welfare by depressing steady-state capital and aggregate consumption. These findings suggest that even with low interest rates, as have been observed recently, fiscal policymakers should still be concerned about the crowding-out effects of government debt.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ME；JEL：E13, E22, E62, H63, O41
papers.zh_title: 新古典增长模型中的市场势力
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了企业拥有市场势力并因此收取高于边际成本的价格时，新古典增长模型中的最优资本积累以及政府债务的影响。在这种环境下，储蓄者获得的实际利率低于资本的净边际产出。我们建立了一种新的评估动态效率的方法，可应用于此类经济体。一个合理的校准表明，实际利率与资本边际产出之间的楔子超过4个百分点，并且美国经济是动态有效的。此外，政府庞氏骗局（Ponzi schemes）对福利的影响可能与竞争条件下的情况不同。即使政府能够维持债务的永久展期并积累利息，该政策仍可能通过压低稳态资本和总消费来降低福利。这些发现表明，即使利率较低（如近期所观察到的），财政政策制定者仍应关注政府债务的挤出效应。

papers.title: ‘You Will:’ A Macroeconomic Analysis of Digital Advertising
papers.authors: Jeremy Greenwood, Yueyuan Ma, Mehmet Yorukoglu
papers.abstract: An information-based model is developed where traditional and digital advertising finance the provision of free media goods and affect price competition. Digital advertising is directed toward consumers while traditional advertising is undirected. The equilibrium is suboptimal. Media goods are under provided with both types of advertising. Additionally, traditional advertising is excessive because it is undirected. The tax-cum-subsidy policy that overcomes these inefficiencies is characterized. The model is calibrated to the U.S. economy. Digital advertising increases welfare significantly and is disproportionately financed by better-off consumers. The welfare gain from the optimal policy is much smaller than the gain from digital advertising.
papers.zh_title: “你会的：”数字广告的宏观经济分析
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个基于信息的模型，其中传统广告和数字广告为免费媒体商品的提供提供资金，并影响价格竞争。数字广告针对消费者，而传统广告则是非定向的。均衡状态是次优的。两种类型的广告都导致媒体商品供给不足。此外，传统广告由于是非定向的而过度供给。我们描述了能够克服这些低效率的税收-补贴政策。该模型根据美国经济进行了校准。数字广告显著提高了福利，并且其资金不成比例地由较富裕的消费者提供。最优政策带来的福利收益远小于数字广告带来的收益。

papers.title: Do Monetary Policy Frameworks Matter in Low Income Countries?
papers.authors: Alina Carare, Carlos de Resende, Andrew T. Levin, Chelsea Zhang
papers.abstract: Microeconomic evidence indicates a very high frequency of price adjustment in low income countries (LICs), raising the question of whether LICs may be reasonably characterized as exhibiting monetary neutrality. To address this question, we analyze a cross-country panel dataset of 79 LICs over the period 1990 to 2015 to assess the impact of external shocks on real GDP growth, and we find highly significant differences between LICs where the central bank targets monetary aggregates or inflation compared to LICs that maintain rigid nominal exchange rates. We also conduct an event study of the surprise devaluation of the Central African Franc (CFA) in January 1994 and find that it had highly significant effects on the output growth of 10 CFA countries relative to 18 similar countries outside the CFA zone. Consequently, the hypothesis of monetary neutrality is decisively rejected, and these findings provide strong support for the role of monetary policy frameworks in fostering price stability and macroeconomic stability in LICs.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, ME；JEL：E02, E52, E58, O11, O23
papers.zh_title: 货币政策框架在低收入国家重要吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 微观经济证据表明，低收入国家（LICs）的价格调整频率非常高，这引发了关于低收入国家是否可以被合理描述为表现出货币中性的问题。为了解决这个问题，我们分析了1990年至2015年间79个低收入国家的跨国面板数据集，以评估外部冲击对实际GDP增长的影响。我们发现，在中央银行以货币总量或通胀为目标的低收入国家，与维持刚性名义汇率的低收入国家之间，存在高度显著的差异。我们还对1994年1月中非法郎（CFA）的意外贬值进行了事件研究，发现相对于CFA区外的18个类似国家，它对10个CFA国家的产出增长产生了高度显著的影响。因此，货币中性的假设被明确拒绝，这些发现为货币政策框架在促进低收入国家价格稳定和宏观经济稳定方面的作用提供了强有力的支持。

papers.title: Artificial Intelligence and Pricing: The Impact of Algorithm Design
papers.authors: John Asker, Chaim Fershtman, Ariel Pakes
papers.abstract: The behavior of artificial intelligences algorithms (AIAs) is shaped by how they learn about their environment. We compare the prices generated by AIAs that use different learning protocols when there is market interaction. Asynchronous learning occurs when the AIA only learns about the return from the action it took. Synchronous learning occurs when the AIA conducts counterfactuals to learn about the returns it would have earned had it taken an alternative action. The two lead to markedly different market prices. When future profits are not given positive weight by the AIA, synchronous updating leads to competitive pricing, while asynchronous can lead to pricing close to monopoly levels. We investigate how this result varies when either counterfactuals can only be calculated imperfectly and/or when the AIA places a weight on future profits.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, PR；JEL：C72, C73, D43, D82, K21, L1, L13, L4, L51, O33
papers.zh_title: 人工智能与定价：算法设计的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 人工智能算法（AIAs）的行为由其学习环境的方式塑造。我们比较了在市场互动中使用不同学习协议的AIAs所产生的价格。异步学习发生在AIA仅从其所采取的行动中了解回报时。同步学习发生在AIA进行反事实推断以了解如果采取替代行动本应获得的回报时。两者导致显著不同的市场价格。当未来利润不被AIA赋予正权重时，同步更新导致竞争性定价，而异步更新可能导致接近垄断水平的定价。我们研究了当反事实只能被不完美地计算和/或当AIA对未来利润赋予权重时，这一结果如何变化。

papers.title: Science and the Market for Technology
papers.authors: Ashish Arora, Sharon Belenzon, Jungkyu Suh
papers.abstract: Well functioning Markets for Technology (MFT) allow inventors to sell their inventions to others that may derive more value from them. We argue that the growing reliance on science in inventions enhances MFT. In addition to higher quality inventions, reliance on science may enhance gains from trade and reduce the transfer cost of knowledge and other transaction costs. Using large scale data, we show that patents citing science are more likely to be traded, especially for novel patents and for smaller inventors. Leveraging the fall of the Berlin Wall as a source of exogenous variation in the relevant scientific knowledge to technological fields, we confirm reliance on science increases the likelihood that the invention will be traded
papers.meta: Programs：PR；JEL：L24, O3, O31, O33, O34, O36
papers.zh_title: 科学与技术市场
papers.zh_abstract: 运作良好的技术市场（MFT）允许发明者将其发明出售给可能从中获得更多价值的其他人。我们认为，发明中对科学的日益依赖增强了技术市场。除了更高质量的发明外，对科学的依赖可能增加贸易收益，并降低知识的转移成本和其他交易成本。利用大规模数据，我们表明引用科学的专利更有可能被交易，尤其是对于新颖专利和较小的发明者。利用柏林墙倒塌作为相关科学知识对技术领域的外生变化来源，我们确认对科学的依赖增加了发明被交易的可能性。

papers.title: First-mover Advantage and the Private Value of Public Science
papers.authors: Ashish Arora, Sharon Belenzon, Bernardo Dionisi
papers.abstract: Technical progress increasingly relies on the use of scientific knowledge. But if much of this knowledge is in the public domain, can it be a source of private value? We find that average private returns to using public science are small, especially in crowded technical fields, consistent with the view that the expected profit from an input that others can easily access is low. However, private value is higher when a firm is the first to use science, partly because it can secure broader patents relative to later users. Finally, corporate participation in scientific research is a strong predictor of first use, especially of relevant science. This is consistent with the view that participation in science raises familiarity with relevant scientific advances.
papers.zh_title: 先发优势与公共科学的私人价值
papers.zh_abstract: 技术进步越来越依赖于科学知识的使用。但如果这些知识大部分属于公共领域，它能否成为私人价值的来源？我们发现，使用公共科学的平均私人回报很小，尤其是在拥挤的技术领域，这与一种观点一致，即其他人容易获取的投入的预期利润较低。然而，当企业是第一个使用科学时，私人价值更高，部分原因是相对于后来的使用者，它可以获得更广泛的专利。最后，企业参与科学研究是首次使用（尤其是相关科学）的有力预测因素。这与参与科学研究能提高对相关科学进展的熟悉程度的观点一致。

papers.title: Deterrence and Compellence in the Parliament
papers.authors: Duha T. Altindag, Naci H. Mocan, Jie Zhang
papers.abstract: In most countries, Parliamentary immunity protects lawmakers from civil or criminal charges while in office, and it shields them from prosecution for their political speech or political actions. This paper presents the first empirical analysis in the literature of the impact of Parliamentary immunity on the behavior and performance of politicians. Leveraging a Constitutional Amendment, the adoption of which lifted the immunity of 24 percent of the Members of the Turkish Parliament (MPs), we find that immunity from prosecution impacts how the MPs act and perform their duties in the Parliament. Losing immunity pacifies the MPs of the opposition parties, who become less diligent in the Parliament (drafting fewer pieces of legislation, initiating fewer investigation inquiries, delivering fewer and shorter speeches) and become less aggressive (interrupting other MPs less frequently). They also reduce their tendency to cast dissenting votes against the government. These MPs are less likely to get re-nominated by their parties in the next election, and they are less likely to get re-elected. We find no evidence that more outspoken and active opposition MPs or those who are more valuable for their parties have been targeted for immunity revocation. The results are robust to limiting the analysis to the sample of opposition MPs who had the same intensity of pre-treatment Parliamentary activity. There is no evidence that the MPs, who retained immunity, have increased their Parliamentary efforts in reaction to their same-party colleagues losing immunity. We find that laws are passed faster after the Constitutional Amendment was adopted, possibly as a consequence of reduced opposition and deliberation. Using Eurobarometer surveys, we find that citizens’ reactions to the revocation of MP immunity are polarized. An individual’s trust in the Parliament is lower or higher based on whether an MP from the individual’s province lost immunity and if that MP subscribes to the same or opposing ideology as the individual.
papers.meta: Programs：LE, LS, PE, POL；JEL：D02, K0, P48
papers.zh_title: 议会中的威慑与强制
papers.zh_abstract: 在大多数国家，议会豁免权保护立法者在任职期间免于民事或刑事指控，并使其免于因其政治言论或政治行为而被起诉。本文提供了文献中关于议会豁免权对政治家行为和表现影响的首次实证分析。利用一项宪法修正案（该修正案的通过取消了土耳其议会24%议员的豁免权），我们发现免于起诉的豁免权影响了议员在议会中的行为方式和职责履行。失去豁免权使反对党议员变得温和，他们在议会中变得不那么勤勉（起草更少的立法、发起更少的调查、发表更少且更短的演讲），并且变得不那么激进（更少打断其他议员）。他们还减少了投票反对政府的倾向。这些议员在下次选举中更不可能被其政党重新提名，也更不可能再次当选。我们没有发现证据表明，更直言不讳和活跃的反对党议员，或对其政党更有价值的议员，成为豁免权被撤销的目标。将分析限制在修正案前议会活动强度相同的反对党议员样本中，结果依然稳健。没有证据表明保留豁免权的议员因同党议员失去豁免权而增加了其议会努力。我们发现，宪法修正案通过后，法律通过得更快，这可能是反对和审议减少的结果。利用欧洲晴雨表调查，我们发现公民对取消议员豁免权的反应是两极分化的。个人对议会的信任度是降低还是提高，取决于其所在省份的议员是否失去豁免权，以及该议员与个人是否持有相同或相反的意识形态。

papers.title: Not Too Late: Improving Academic Outcomes Among Adolescents
papers.authors: Jonathan Guryan, Jens Ludwig, Monica P. Bhatt, Philip J. Cook, Jonathan M.V. Davis, Kenneth Dodge, George Farkas, Roland G. Fryer Jr, Susan Mayer, Harold Pollack, Laurence Steinberg
papers.abstract: There is growing concern that it is too difficult or costly to substantially improve the academic skills of children who are behind in school once they reach adolescence. But perhaps what we have tried in the past relies on the wrong interventions, failing to account for challenges like the increased variability in academic needs during adolescence, or heightened difficulty of classroom management. This study tests the effects of one intervention that tries to solve both problems by simplifying the teaching task: individualized, intensive, in-school tutoring. A key innovation by the non-profit we study (Saga Education) is to identify how to deliver “high-impact tutoring” at relatively low cost ($3,500 to $4,300 per participant per year). Our first randomized controlled trial (RCT) of Saga’s tutoring model with 2,633 9th and 10th grade students in Chicago public schools found participation increased math test scores by 0.16 standard deviations (SDs) and increased grades in math and non-math courses. We replicated these results in a separate RCT with 2,710 students and found even larger math test score impacts—0.37 SD—and similar grade impacts. These effects persist into future years, although estimates for high school graduation are imprecise. The treatment effects do not appear to be the result of a generic “mentoring effect” or of changes in social-emotional skills, but instead seem to be caused by changes in the instructional “technology” that students received. The estimated benefit-cost ratio is comparable to many successful model early-childhood programs.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：H0, I0, I20, I23, I3, J24, Z18
papers.zh_title: 为时未晚：改善青少年的学业成果
papers.zh_abstract: 人们日益担忧，一旦儿童进入青春期，要大幅改善他们在学业上的落后状况会过于困难或成本过高。但也许我们过去尝试的方法依赖于错误的干预措施，未能考虑到诸如青春期学业需求变异性增加或课堂管理难度加大等挑战。本研究测试了一种通过简化教学任务来同时解决这两个问题的干预措施的效果：个性化、高强度的校内辅导。我们所研究的非营利组织（Saga Education）的一个关键创新是，找到了以相对较低的成本（每位参与者每年3500至4300美元）提供“高影响力辅导”的方法。我们对Saga辅导模式进行的首次随机对照试验（RCT）涉及芝加哥公立学校的2633名九年级和十年级学生，发现参与该辅导使数学考试成绩提高了0.16个标准差，并提高了数学和非数学课程的成绩。我们在另一项涉及2710名学生的独立随机对照试验中重复了这些结果，发现对数学考试成绩的影响更大——达到0.37个标准差——并且对成绩的影响相似。这些影响会持续到未来几年，尽管对高中毕业率的估计并不精确。处理效应似乎并非源于普遍的“指导效应”或社会情感技能的变化，而似乎是由学生所接受的教学“技术”变化所导致。估计的收益成本比与许多成功的早期儿童示范项目相当。

papers.title: Equilibrium in the Market for Public School Teachers: District Wage Strategies and Teacher Comparative Advantage
papers.authors: Barbara Biasi, Chao Fu, John Stromme
papers.abstract: We study the equity-efficiency implication of giving school districts control over teacher pay using an equilibrium model of the market for public-school teachers. Teachers differ in their comparative advantages in teaching low- or high-achieving students. School districts, which serve different student bodies, use both wage and hiring strategies to compete for their preferred teachers. We estimate the model using data from Wisconsin, where districts gained control over teacher pay in 2011. We find that, all else equal, giving districts control over teacher pay would lead to more efficient teacher-district sorting but larger educational inequality. Teacher bonus programs that incentivize comparative advantage-based sorting, combined with bonus rates favoring districts with more low-achieving students, could improve both efficiency and equity.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LS；JEL：I20, J31, J45, J51, J61, J63
papers.zh_title: 公立学校教师市场的均衡：学区工资策略与教师比较优势
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用公立学校教师市场的均衡模型，研究赋予学区控制教师薪酬权力对公平与效率的影响。教师在教授低成就或高成就学生方面具有不同的比较优势。服务于不同学生群体的学区，会同时使用工资和招聘策略来竞争他们偏好的教师。我们使用威斯康星州的数据来估计该模型，该州于2011年赋予学区控制教师薪酬的权力。我们发现，在其他条件相同的情况下，赋予学区控制教师薪酬的权力将导致更高效的教师-学区匹配，但会加剧教育不平等。激励基于比较优势进行匹配的教师奖金计划，如果其奖金率更倾向于招收更多低成就学生的学区，则可能同时提高效率和公平性。

papers.title: Sharing the Burden of Subsidization: Evidence on Pass-Through from a Subsidy Revision in Medicare Part D
papers.authors: Colleen Carey
papers.abstract: In many federally-subsidized insurance markets, insurers are subsidized on the basis of enrollee characteristics; in principle, subsidies that are "risk adjusted" in this way compensate insurers for ex ante differences in expected cost. Between 2010 and 2011, the subsidies in Medicare Part D were revised, sharply changing the subsidy for diagnoses and demographic characteristics. This paper uses the response of insurers to the subsidy update to estimate pass-through of government subsidies to two insurer choice variables: premiums and out-of-pocket costs. We find that diagnostic subsidies are passed-through at a rate of 40% to the out-of-pocket costs for relevant drugs. Premiums are not responsive to overall subsidies, but do reflect changes in the demographic component of subsidies.
papers.zh_title: 分担补贴负担：来自Medicare D部分补贴修订的转嫁证据
papers.zh_abstract: 在许多联邦补贴的保险市场中，保险公司根据参保者特征获得补贴；原则上，这种“风险调整”后的补贴旨在补偿保险公司在预期成本上的事前差异。在2010年至2011年间，Medicare D部分的补贴进行了修订，大幅改变了针对诊断和人口统计特征的补贴。本文利用保险公司对补贴更新的反应，来估计政府补贴向两个保险公司选择变量——保费和自付费用——的转嫁率。我们发现，诊断补贴以40%的比率转嫁到相关药物的自付费用上。保费对总体补贴不敏感，但确实反映了补贴中人口统计组成部分的变化。

papers.title: Replicating the Dow Jones Industrial Average
papers.authors: Jacky Lin, Genevieve C. Selden, John B. Shoven, Clemens Sialm
papers.abstract: The Dow Jones Industrial Average has historically been the most quoted stock index in the United States. It has several unique features. It uses price weights, it ignores cash dividend payments, and it also treats stock dividends, rights issues, and other corporate actions inconsistently. We show that price indices which use alternative weighting methods and more systematic inclusion criteria perform similarly to the Dow. However, ignoring cash and stock dividends underestimates the long-run returns earned by stock market investors dramatically. If the DJIA had consistently adjusted for dividends and other corporate actions since 1928, the index would have closed at 1,113,047 instead of 28,538 points at the end of 2019.
papers.zh_title: 复制道琼斯工业平均指数
papers.zh_abstract: 道琼斯工业平均指数历来是美国引用最多的股票指数。它具有几个独特的特点：采用价格加权，忽略现金股息支付，并且对股票股息、配股及其他公司行为的处理也不一致。我们表明，使用替代加权方法和更系统化纳入标准的价格指数，其表现与道琼斯指数相似。然而，忽略现金和股票股息会严重低估股票市场投资者获得的长期回报。如果道琼斯工业平均指数自1928年以来一直持续调整股息和其他公司行为，该指数在2019年底将以1,113,047点收盘，而不是28,538点。

papers.title: Income Dynamics of Immigrants and Natives in Sweden 1985-2016
papers.authors: Benjamin Friedrich, Lisa Laun, Costas Meghir
papers.abstract: This paper analyzes earnings inequality and earnings dynamics in Sweden over 1985–2016. The deep recession in the early 1990s marks a historic turning point with a massive increase in earnings inequality and earnings volatility, and the impact of the recession and the recovery from it lasted for decades. In the aftermath of the recession, we find steady growth in real earnings across the entire distribution for men and women and decreasing inequality over more than 20 years. Despite the positive trend, large gender differences in earnings dynamics persist. While earnings growth for men is more closely tied to the business cycle, women face much higher volatility overall. Earnings volatility is also substantially higher among foreign-born workers, reflecting weaker labor market attachment and high risk of large negative shocks for low-income immigrants. We document an important role of social benefits usage for the overall trends and for differences across sub-populations. Higher benefits enrollment, especially for women and immigrants, is associated with higher earnings volatility. As the generosity and usage of benefit programs declined over time, we find stronger earnings growth among low-income workers, consistent with higher self-sufficiency.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM, LS, PE；JEL：E24, E25, J24, J3
papers.zh_title: 1985-2016年瑞典移民与本土居民的收入动态
papers.zh_abstract: 本文分析了1985年至2016年间瑞典的收入不平等和收入动态。1990年代初的深度衰退标志着一个历史转折点，导致收入不平等和收入波动性大幅增加，而衰退及其复苏的影响持续了数十年。在衰退之后，我们发现男性和女性在整个收入分布中的实际收入持续增长，并且在超过20年的时间里不平等程度不断下降。尽管存在这一积极趋势，但收入动态中仍存在巨大的性别差异。男性的收入增长与商业周期联系更紧密，而女性整体上面临更高的波动性。外国出生工人的收入波动性也显著更高，这反映了他们较弱的劳动力市场依附性以及低收入移民面临巨大负面冲击的高风险。我们记录了社会福利金使用对总体趋势以及不同亚群之间差异的重要作用。更高的福利金参保率，尤其是女性和移民，与更高的收入波动性相关。随着福利计划的慷慨程度和使用率随时间下降，我们发现低收入工人的收入增长更强，这与更高的自给自足程度相一致。

papers.title: A New Spatial Hedonic Equilibrium in the Emerging Work-from-Home Economy?
papers.authors: Jan Brueckner, Matthew E. Kahn, Gary C. Lin
papers.abstract: This paper studies the impacts of work-from-home (WFH) in the housing market from both intercity and intracity perspectives. Our results confirm the theoretical prediction that WFH puts downward pressure on housing prices and rents in high-productivity counties, a result of workers starting to relocate to cheaper metro areas during the pandemic without forsaking their desirable jobs. We also show that WFH tends to flatten intracity house-price gradients, weakening the price premium associated with good job access.
papers.zh_title: 新兴的居家办公经济中是否存在新的空间特征价格均衡？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文从城市间和城市内两个视角研究了居家办公（WFH）对住房市场的影响。我们的结果证实了理论预测，即居家办公对高生产率县的房价和租金施加下行压力，这是工人在疫情期间开始搬迁到更便宜的大都市区而不放弃其理想工作的结果。我们还表明，居家办公倾向于使城市内的房价梯度变得平缓，削弱了与良好就业可达性相关的价格溢价。

papers.title: Climate Policy, Financial Frictions, and Transition Risk
papers.authors: Stefano Carattini, Garth Heutel, Givi Melkadze
papers.abstract: We study climate and macroprudential policies in an economy with financial frictions. Using a dynamic stochastic general equilibrium model featuring both a pollution market failure and a market failure in the financial sector, we explore transition risk – whether ambitious climate policy can lead to macroeconomic instability. It can, but the risk can be alleviated through macroprudential policies – taxes or subsidies on banks’ assets. Then, we explore efficient climate and macroprudential policy in the long run and over business cycles. The presence of financial frictions affects the steady-state value and dynamic properties of the efficient carbon tax. Macroprudential policy alone, without a carbon tax, is not very effective at addressing the pollution externality.
papers.zh_title: 气候政策、金融摩擦与转型风险
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了存在金融摩擦的经济中的气候政策和宏观审慎政策。使用一个同时包含污染市场失灵和金融部门市场失灵特征的动态随机一般均衡模型，我们探讨了转型风险——即雄心勃勃的气候政策是否会导致宏观经济不稳定。它可能导致，但这种风险可以通过宏观审慎政策——对银行资产征税或补贴——来缓解。然后，我们探讨了长期和商业周期中的有效气候政策和宏观审慎政策。金融摩擦的存在会影响有效碳税的稳态值和动态特性。没有碳税的宏观审慎政策本身，在解决污染外部性方面效果不佳。

papers.title: The World Management Survey at 18: lessons and the way forward
papers.authors: Daniela Scur, Raffaella Sadun, John Van Reenen, Renata Lemos, Nicholas Bloom
papers.abstract: Understanding how differences in management “best practices” affect organizational outcomes has been a focus of both theoretical and empirical work in the fields of management, sociology, economics and public policy. The World Management Survey (WMS) project was born almost two decades ago with the main goal of developing a new systematic measure of management practices being used in organizations. The WMS has contributed to a body of knowledge around how managerial structures, not just managerial talent, relates to organizational performance. Over 18 years of research, a set of consistent patterns have emerged and spurred new questions. We will present a brief overview of what we have learned in terms of measuring and understanding management practices and condense the implications of these findings for policy. We end with an outline of what we see as the path forward for both research and policy implications of this research programme.
papers.zh_title: 世界管理调查18年：经验教训与未来方向
papers.zh_abstract: 理解管理“最佳实践”的差异如何影响组织成果，一直是管理学、社会学、经济学和公共政策领域理论和实证研究的焦点。世界管理调查（WMS）项目始于近二十年前，其主要目标是开发一种新的、系统性的衡量组织中所用管理实践的方法。WMS为围绕管理结构（而不仅仅是管理人才）如何与组织绩效相关的知识体系做出了贡献。经过18年的研究，一系列一致的模式已经出现，并引发了新的问题。我们将简要概述在衡量和理解管理实践方面所学到的内容，并总结这些发现对政策的启示。最后，我们概述了我们认为该研究项目在研究和政策启示方面的未来路径。

papers.title: COVID-19 Has Strengthened the Relationship Between Alcohol Consumption and Domestic Violence
papers.authors: Aaron Chalfin, Shooshan Danagoulian, Monica Deza
papers.abstract: A large body of evidence documents a link between alcohol consumption and violence involving intimate partners and close family members. Recent scholarship suggests that since the onset of the COVID-19 pandemic and subsequent stay-at-home orders, there has been a marked increase in domestic violence. This research considers an important mechanism behind the increase in domestic violence during the COVID-19 pandemic: an increase in the riskiness of alcohol consumption. We combine 911 call data with newly-available high-resolution microdata on visits to bars and liquor stores in Detroit, MI and find that the strength of the relationship between visits to alcohol outlets and domestic violence more than doubles starting in March 2020. We find more limited evidence with respect to non-domestic assaults, supporting our conclusion that it is not alcohol consumption per se but alcohol consumption at home that is a principal driver of domestic violence
papers.zh_title: 新冠疫情强化了酒精消费与家庭暴力之间的关系
papers.zh_abstract: 大量证据表明酒精消费与涉及亲密伴侣和近亲的家庭暴力之间存在关联。近期研究表明，自新冠疫情爆发及随后的居家令实施以来，家庭暴力显著增加。本研究探讨了疫情期间家庭暴力增加的一个重要机制：酒精消费风险性的上升。我们结合了密歇根州底特律市的911报警数据与关于酒吧和酒类商店访问量的新型高分辨率微观数据，发现自2020年3月起，酒精销售点访问量与家庭暴力之间的关联强度翻了一倍以上。对于非家庭暴力袭击，我们发现的证据较为有限，这支持了我们的结论：并非酒精消费本身，而是家庭内的酒精消费是家庭暴力的主要驱动因素。

papers.title: Voice at Work
papers.authors: Jarkko Harju, Simon Jäger, Benjamin Schoefer
papers.abstract: We estimate the effects of worker voice on productivity, job quality, and separations. We study the 1991 introduction of a right to worker representation on boards or advisory councils in Finnish firms with at least 150 employees, designed primarily to facilitate workforce-management communication. Consistent with information sharing theories, our difference-in-differences design reveals that worker voice raised labor productivity. In contrast to the exit-voice theory, we find no effects on voluntary job separations, and at most small positive effects on other measures of job quality. However, we find evidence for reductions in involuntary separations during the recessionary context. A 2008 introduction of shop-floor representation, another worker voice institution pre-existing in our main sample of firms, had more limited effects.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, IO, LE, LS, PE, POL, PR；JEL：G3, J3, J5, J63, L22
papers.zh_title: 工作中的发言权
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估算了员工发言权对生产率、工作质量和离职率的影响。我们研究了1991年芬兰引入的一项权利，即员工在至少拥有150名员工的企业中拥有董事会或咨询委员会的代表权，该权利主要旨在促进劳动力与管理层之间的沟通。与信息共享理论一致，我们的双重差分设计揭示，员工发言权提高了劳动生产率。与退出-发言权理论相反，我们发现员工发言权对自愿离职没有影响，对其他工作质量指标最多只有微小的正向影响。然而，我们发现了在经济衰退背景下非自愿离职减少的证据。2008年引入的车间代表制度（这是我们主要样本企业中已存在的另一种员工发言权制度）的影响较为有限。

papers.title: Can Automatic Government Spending Be Procyclical?
papers.authors: Luciana Galeano, Alejandro Izquierdo, Jorge P. Puig, Carlos A. Vegh, Guillermo Vuletin
papers.abstract: It is well-known by now that government spending has typically been countercyclical in industrial countries and procyclical in developing economies. Most of this literature has focused on analyzing aggregate government spending or discretionary spending categories such as government consumption and government investment. Little is known, however, about the cyclical behavior of automatic government spending, which comprises unemployment insurance, family programs, and social security transfers. Automatic government spending follows from laws, or even constitutional clauses, that benefit individuals who meet certain eligibility criteria. In principle, the main categories of automatic government spending are expected to be either countercyclical (especially unemployment insurance and other shock absorber programs) or acyclical (particularly social security and other structural programs). \nWe find that while automatic government spending is, as expected, countercyclical in industrial countries, it is, surprisingly, procyclical in the developing world. We track the source of this puzzling procyclical behavior to (i) the effective lack of automatic stabilizers like unemployment insurance and (ii) more intriguingly, the existence of perverse automatic de-stabilizing mechanisms in social security spending (in particular in the absence of indexation mechanisms). We also show that the presence and nature of these two social programs are crucial new determinants of aggregate government spending cyclicality as well as macroeconomic volatility, even after controlling for other well-known determinants and addressing potential endogeneity concerns.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM, PE；JEL：E02, E32, E62, H53, H55
papers.zh_title: 自动政府支出能否是顺周期的？
papers.zh_abstract: 众所周知，政府支出在工业国家通常是逆周期的，而在发展中经济体则是顺周期的。大部分文献集中于分析总政府支出或可自由支配的支出类别，如政府消费和政府投资。然而，关于自动政府支出（包括失业保险、家庭项目和社会保障转移支付）的周期性行为，我们知之甚少。自动政府支出源于法律甚至宪法条款，使符合特定资格标准的个人受益。原则上，自动政府支出的主要类别预计要么是逆周期的（尤其是失业保险和其他减震项目），要么是非周期的（特别是社会保障和其他结构性项目）。我们发现，虽然自动政府支出在工业国家如预期般是逆周期的，但在发展中国家却令人惊讶地是顺周期的。我们将这种令人困惑的顺周期行为归因于：（i）有效缺乏像失业保险这样的自动稳定器，以及（ii）更有趣的是，社会保障支出中存在反常的自动去稳定机制（特别是在缺乏指数化机制的情况下）。我们还表明，这两个社会项目的存在和性质是总政府支出周期性和宏观经济波动性的关键新决定因素，即使在控制了其他已知决定因素并解决了潜在的内生性问题之后也是如此。

papers.title: Exchange Rate Pass-Through, Monetary Policy, and Real Exchange Rates: Iceland and the 2008 Crisis
papers.authors: Sebastian Edwards, Luis Cabezas
papers.abstract: We use detailed data for Iceland to examine two often-neglected aspects of the “exchange rate pass-through” problem. First, we investigate whether the pass-through coefficient varies with the degree of “international tradability” of goods. Second, we analyze if the pass-through coefficient depends on the monetary policy framework. We consider 12 disaggregated price indexes in Iceland for 2003-2019, a period that includes Iceland’s banking and currency crisis of 2008. We find that the pass-through declined around the time Iceland reformed its “flexible inflation targeting,” and that the coefficients are significantly higher for tradable than for nontradable goods.
papers.zh_title: 汇率传递、货币政策与实际汇率：冰岛与2008年危机
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用冰岛的详细数据来考察“汇率传递”问题中两个常被忽视的方面。首先，我们研究了传递系数是否随商品的“国际可贸易程度”而变化。其次，我们分析了传递系数是否取决于货币政策框架。我们考虑了冰岛2003年至2019年期间的12个细分价格指数，这一时期包括冰岛2008年的银行业和货币危机。我们发现，大约在冰岛改革其“灵活通胀目标制”时，传递系数有所下降，并且可贸易商品的系数显著高于非贸易商品。

papers.title: The Trade-off Between Prioritization and Vaccination Speed Depends on Mitigation Measures
papers.authors: Nikhil Agarwal, Andrew Komo, Chetan A. Patel, Parag A. Pathak, M. Utku Ünver
papers.abstract: Calls for eliminating prioritization for SARS-CoV-2 vaccines are growing amid concerns that prioritization reduces vaccination speed. We use an SEIR model to study the effects of vaccination distribution on public health, comparing prioritization policy and speed under mitigation measures that are either eased during the vaccine rollout or sustained through the end of the pandemic period. NASEM's recommended prioritization results in fewer deaths than no prioritization, but does not minimize total deaths. If mitigation measures are eased, abandoning NASEM will result in about 134,000 more deaths at 30 million vaccinations per month. Vaccination speed must be at least 53% higher under no prioritization to avoid increasing deaths. With sustained mitigation, discarding NASEM prioritization will result in 42,000 more deaths, requiring only a 26% increase in speed to hold deaths constant. Therefore, abandoning NASEM's prioritization to increase vaccination speed without substantially increasing deaths may require sustained mitigation.
papers.zh_title: 优先接种与接种速度之间的权衡取决于缓解措施
papers.zh_abstract: 随着对优先接种会降低接种速度的担忧日益增加，取消SARS-CoV-2疫苗优先接种的呼声越来越高。我们使用SEIR模型研究疫苗接种分配对公共卫生的影响，比较了在缓解措施要么在疫苗推广期间放松、要么持续到疫情结束的情况下的优先接种政策和接种速度。NASEM推荐的优先接种政策导致的死亡人数少于不优先接种，但并未使总死亡人数最小化。如果缓解措施放松，放弃NASEM优先接种政策，在每月接种3000万剂疫苗的情况下，将导致约13.4万人额外死亡。在不优先接种的情况下，接种速度必须至少提高53%，才能避免死亡人数增加。在持续缓解措施的情况下，放弃NASEM优先接种政策将导致4.2万人额外死亡，只需将接种速度提高26%即可保持死亡人数不变。因此，为了在不显著增加死亡人数的情况下通过放弃NASEM优先接种政策来提高接种速度，可能需要持续实施缓解措施。

papers.title: Biosimilar Competition: Early Learning
papers.authors: Richard G. Frank, Mahnum Shahzad, William B. Feldman, Aaron S. Kesselheim
papers.abstract: Biologics accounted for roughly $145 billion in spending in 2018 (IQVIA, 2019). They are also the fastest growing segment of the pharmaceutical industry. The Biological Price Competition and Innovation Act (BPCIA) of 2010 created an abbreviated pathway for biosimilar products to promote price competition in the market for biological drugs. There was great anticipation that the BPCIA would lead to a moderation in drug prices driven by market competition. The observed levels of competition and the accompanying savings have not reached those expected levels. we investigate the early impacts of entry of potential biosimilar competitors on use of biosimilars and prices for biological products. We focus especially on entry by biosimilars and how altered market structures stemming from the implementation of the BPCIA are affecting the prices for biological products subject to biosimilar competition. We do so by studying 7 products that have recently faced biosimilar competition. We estimate fixed effects and Instrument Variables models to estimate the impact of market competition on prices. Our results indicate that in the range of 1 to 3 entrants each additional marketed product results in a reduction in weighted average market prices of between 5.4 and 7 percentage points.
papers.zh_title: 生物类似药竞争：早期经验
papers.zh_abstract: 2018年，生物制剂支出约为1450亿美元（IQVIA，2019）。它们也是制药行业中增长最快的部分。2010年的《生物制品价格竞争与创新法案》（BPCIA）为生物类似药创建了一条简化的审批途径，以促进生物药品市场的价格竞争。人们曾高度期待BPCIA将通过市场竞争导致药品价格趋于温和。然而，观察到的竞争水平以及随之而来的节省并未达到预期水平。我们研究了潜在生物类似药竞争者进入对生物类似药使用和生物制品价格的早期影响。我们特别关注生物类似药的进入，以及BPCIA实施所导致的市场结构变化如何影响面临生物类似药竞争的生物制品的价格。为此，我们研究了近期面临生物类似药竞争的7种产品。我们估计了固定效应模型和工具变量模型，以评估市场竞争对价格的影响。我们的结果表明，在1到3个进入者的范围内，每增加一个上市产品，加权平均市场价格将下降5.4到7个百分点。

papers.title: A Welfare Analysis of Competitive Insurance Markets with Vertical Differentiation and Adverse Selection
papers.authors: W. Bentley MacLeod
papers.abstract: A feature of many insurance markets is that they combine vertical differentiation (all consumers prefer high to low-coverage policies) and adverse selection (high cost customers prefer high-coverage plans). Building on Novshek and Sonnenschein (1978) and Azevedo and Gottlieb (2017), this paper characterizes the competitive equilibria in a vertically differentiated market characterized by adverse selection. This provides a simple, dynamic model of the market, along with their welfare consequences over time in response to policy changes. The model makes predictions consistent with recent evidence on the ACA exchange in the US (Frean et al. (2017)). Moreover, it provides a complete characterization of the health insurance “death spiral”. The death spiral leads to an inefficient outcome, but does not lead to a complete breakdown of the market. Rather, it predicts a large number of plans, with coverage that falls with an individual’s willingness to pay. It is shown that introducing a minimum coverage standard combined with an insurance mandate cannot restore efficiency. The optimal system depends on both the valuation of public funds and the social value of insurance. Depending on these parameters, a number of different types of systems may be optimal, including a single payer system with mandatory participation for all, such as the Canadian system, a mixed private-public system, as one sees in many countries, or a pure, free market system.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, IO, TWP；JEL：D01, D21, D41, I11, I13, L15
papers.zh_title: 具有纵向差异和逆向选择的竞争性保险市场的福利分析
papers.zh_abstract: 许多保险市场的一个特点是，它们结合了纵向差异（所有消费者都偏好高覆盖率的保单而非低覆盖率的保单）和逆向选择（高成本客户偏好高覆盖率的计划）。基于Novshek和Sonnenschein（1978）以及Azevedo和Gottlieb（2017）的研究，本文刻画了具有逆向选择特征的纵向差异化市场中的竞争均衡。这提供了一个简单的市场动态模型，以及它们随时间推移对政策变化的福利后果。该模型的预测与近期关于美国ACA交易所的证据一致（Frean等人，2017）。此外，它提供了健康保险“死亡螺旋”的完整刻画。死亡螺旋导致无效率的结果，但不会导致市场完全崩溃。相反，它预测了大量计划，其覆盖率随个人支付意愿下降而下降。研究表明，引入最低覆盖率标准加上保险强制要求无法恢复效率。最优系统取决于公共资金的估值和保险的社会价值。根据这些参数，多种不同类型的系统可能是最优的，包括像加拿大系统那样的全民强制参与单一支付方系统、许多国家可见的混合公私系统，或者纯粹的自由市场系统。

papers.title: Climate Royalty Surcharges
papers.authors: Brian C. Prest, James H. Stock
papers.abstract: In 2019, production on federal lands comprised 40% of domestic coal, 22% of domestic oil, and 12% of domestic natural gas production. Currently, the federal fossil fuel leasing program does not consider the climate costs of burning federal fossil fuels. One way to do so is through a climate royalty surcharge in addition to the current royalty rate, set in 1920, of 12.5% (18.75% offshore). We consider determining this surcharge by maximizing revenue, maximizing welfare, or setting royalties to achieve 80% of the emissions reductions of an outright leasing ban. Using the model in Prest (2021), we calculate the resulting surcharges and their implications. We estimate that all three approaches would lead to meaningful declines in global emissions, and the first two would substantially increase royalty receipts, which are split with the state of production. For example, we estimate that choosing a common royalty rate to maximize revenues yields a climate royalty surcharge of 39%, increases annual royalty receipts by $6.2B, and reduces global emissions by 37 to 63 MMton CO2e/year.
papers.zh_title: 气候权利金附加费
papers.zh_abstract: 2019年，联邦土地上的产量占国内煤炭产量的40%、国内石油产量的22%和国内天然气产量的12%。目前，联邦化石燃料租赁计划未考虑燃烧联邦化石燃料的气候成本。一种实现方式是，在1920年设定的当前12.5%（海上18.75%）权利金税率基础上，增加一项气候权利金附加费。我们考虑通过最大化收入、最大化福利或设定权利金以实现完全租赁禁令减排量的80%来确定此附加费。使用Prest（2021）的模型，我们计算了由此产生的附加费及其影响。我们估计，这三种方法都将导致全球排放量有意义的下降，并且前两种方法将大幅增加权利金收入，这些收入与生产州分成。例如，我们估计，选择统一的、旨在最大化收入的权利金税率，将产生39%的气候权利金附加费，使年度权利金收入增加62亿美元，并使全球排放量每年减少37至63百万吨二氧化碳当量。

papers.title: Water Infrastructure and Health in U.S. Cities
papers.authors: Brian Beach
papers.abstract: Between 1900 and 1930 typhoid fever and other waterborne diseases were largely eradicated from U.S. cities. This achievement required a mix of technological, scientific, economic, and bureaucratic innovations. This article examines how the interaction of those forces influenced water and sanitary infrastructure provision during the 19th and early 20th centuries. I show the sharp link between infrastructure investments and declines in waterborne disease and discuss how that relationship informs the methodological approaches one should use to assess the impact of sanitary investments on urban development. Finally, I review the literature on the social returns to eliminating the threat of waterborne disease. The evidence suggests the benefits of infrastructure investment far exceeded the costs.
papers.zh_title: 美国城市的水基础设施与健康
papers.zh_abstract: 在1900年至1930年间，伤寒和其他水传播疾病在美国城市中基本被根除。这一成就需要技术、科学、经济以及官僚体制创新的结合。本文考察了这些力量的相互作用如何影响19世纪和20世纪初的水与卫生基础设施供给。我展示了基础设施投资与水传播疾病下降之间的显著联系，并讨论了这种关系如何为评估卫生投资对城市发展影响的方法论路径提供信息。最后，我回顾了关于消除水传播疾病威胁的社会回报的文献。证据表明，基础设施投资的收益远远超过了成本。

papers.title: Uncertainty and Risk-Taking in Science: Meaning, Measurement and Management in Peer Review of Research Proposals
papers.authors: Chiara Franzoni, Paula Stephan
papers.abstract: Concern that the selection of research projects by peer review disfavors risky science has called attention to ways to incorporate risk into the evaluation of research proposals. This discussion often occurs in the absence of well-defined and developed concepts of what risk and uncertainty mean in science. This paper sets out to address this void with the goal of providing building blocks to further the discussion of the meaning of risk and uncertainty in science. The core contributions of the paper are fourfold. First, we outline the meaning of risk in science, drawing on insights from literatures on risk and uncertainty. Second, based on this outline, we discuss possible ways in which programs can embrace a more comprehensive concept of risk and embed it in peer review of proposals, with the goal of not penalizing risky research proposals with the potential of high return when funding decisions are made. Third, we make an important distinction between research projects involving high-risk and research projects whose evaluation is subjected to ambiguity/radical uncertainty. Fourth, we discuss possible ways of addressing ambiguity/radical uncertainty by funding agencies.
papers.meta: Programs：LS, PR；JEL：H41, I23, I28, J18, O3, O31, O33, O38
papers.zh_title: 科学中的不确定性与风险承担：研究提案同行评审中的含义、测量与管理
papers.zh_abstract: 对同行评审选择研究项目不利于高风险科学的担忧，促使人们关注将风险纳入研究提案评估的方法。这种讨论往往缺乏对科学中风险与不确定性含义的明确定义和成熟概念。本文旨在填补这一空白，目标是提供构建模块以推进关于科学中风险与不确定性含义的讨论。本文的核心贡献有四个方面。首先，我们借鉴风险与不确定性文献的见解，概述了科学中风险的含义。其次，基于这一概述，我们讨论了项目可以采纳更全面的风险概念并将其嵌入提案同行评审的可能方式，目标是在做出资助决策时不惩罚具有高回报潜力的高风险研究提案。第三，我们对涉及高风险的研究项目与评估受到模糊性/根本不确定性影响的研究项目做出了重要区分。第四，我们讨论了资助机构应对模糊性/根本不确定性的可能方式。

papers.title: Big Push in Distorted Economies
papers.authors: Francisco J. Buera, Hugo Hopenhayn, Yongseok Shin, Nicholas Trachter
papers.abstract: Why don't poor countries adopt more productive technologies? Is there a role for policies that coordinate technology adoption? To answer these questions, we develop a quantitative model that features complementarity in firms' technology adoption decisions: The gains from adoption are larger when more firms adopt. When this complementarity is strong, multiple equilibria and hence coordination failures are possible. More important, even without equilibrium multiplicity, the model elements responsible for the complementarity can substantially amplify the effect of distortions and policies. In what we call the Big Push region, the impact of idiosyncratic distortions is over three times larger than in models without such complementarity. This amplification enables our model to nearly fully account for the income gap between India and the US without coordination failures playing a role.
papers.zh_title: 扭曲经济体中的大推动
papers.zh_abstract: 为什么贫穷国家不采用更具生产力的技术？协调技术采纳的政策是否有作用？为了回答这些问题，我们开发了一个量化模型，该模型具有企业技术采纳决策的互补性：当更多企业采纳时，采纳的收益更大。当这种互补性很强时，多重均衡乃至协调失败是可能的。更重要的是，即使没有均衡多重性，导致互补性的模型要素也能显著放大扭曲和政策的影响。在我们称之为大推动区域的范围内，特质性扭曲的影响比没有这种互补性的模型大出三倍以上。这种放大效应使我们的模型能够在没有协调失败的情况下，几乎完全解释印度与美国之间的收入差距。

papers.title: The Diffusion of Health Care Fraud: A Network Analysis
papers.authors: A. James O'Malley, Thomas A. Bubolz, Jonathan S. Skinner
papers.abstract: Many studies have examined the diffusion of health care innovations but less is known about the diffusion of health care fraud. In this paper, we consider the diffusion of potentially fraudulent Medicare home health care billing in the United States during 2002-16, with a focus on the 21 hospital referral regions (HRRs) covered by local Department of Justice anti-fraud “strike force” offices. We hypothesize that patient-sharing across home health care agencies provides a mechanism for the rapid diffusion of fraudulent strategies; we measure such activity using a novel bipartite mixture (or BMIX) network index. First, we find a remarkable increase in home health care activity between 2002 and 2009 in some but not all regions; average billing per Medicare enrollees in McAllen TX and Miami increased by $2,127 and $2,422 compared to a $289 increase in other HRRs not targeted by the Department of Justice. Second, we establish that the HRR-level BMIX (but not other network measures) was a strong predictor of above-average home care expenditures across HRRs. Third, within HRRs, agencies sharing more patients with other agencies were predicted to increase spending the following year. Finally, the initial 2002 BMIX index was a strong predictor of subsequent changes in HRR-level home health billing during 2002-9. These results highlight the importance of bipartite network structure in diffusion and in infection models more generally.
papers.zh_title: 医疗欺诈的扩散：一项网络分析
papers.zh_abstract: 许多研究考察了医疗创新的扩散，但对医疗欺诈扩散的了解较少。在本文中，我们考虑了2002年至2016年间美国医疗保险家庭健康计费中潜在欺诈行为的扩散，重点关注由地方司法部反欺诈“打击部队”办公室覆盖的21个医院转诊区域（HRR）。我们假设家庭健康机构之间的患者共享为欺诈策略的快速扩散提供了机制；我们使用一种新颖的二部混合（或BMIX）网络指数来测量此类活动。首先，我们发现2002年至2009年间，部分但非所有区域的家庭健康活动显著增加；与司法部未针对的其他HRR的289美元增长相比，德克萨斯州麦卡伦和迈阿密的每位医疗保险参保者平均计费分别增加了2,127美元和2,422美元。其次，我们确认HRR级别的BMIX（而非其他网络指标）是跨HRR高于平均家庭护理支出的强预测因子。第三，在HRR内部，与其他机构共享更多患者的机构被预测将在下一年增加支出。最后，2002年的初始BMIX指数是2002年至2009年间HRR级别家庭健康计费后续变化的强预测因子。这些结果突显了二部网络结构在扩散以及更一般的感染模型中的重要性。

papers.title: Why Did Bank Stocks Crash During COVID-19?
papers.authors: Viral V. Acharya, Robert F. Engle III, Maximilian Jager, Sascha Steffen
papers.abstract: A two-sided "credit-line channel" – relating to drawdowns and repayments – explains the severe drop and partial subsequent recovery in bank stock prices during the COVID-19 pandemic. Banks with greater exposure to undrawn credit lines saw larger stock price declines but performed better before the pandemic and after the policy interventions. Despite deposit inflows, high drawdowns led to reduced bank lending, suggestive of capital encumbrance upon drawdowns. Repayments of credit lines unencumbered capital which explains the stock price recovery starting Q2 2020. Bank provision of credit lines resembles writing deep out-of-the-money put options on aggregate risk, and we propose how to incorporate this feature into bank capital stress tests.
papers.zh_title: 为什么银行股在COVID-19期间暴跌？
papers.zh_abstract: 一个双面的“信贷额度渠道”——涉及提款和还款——解释了COVID-19大流行期间银行股价的严重下跌及随后的部分复苏。对未提取信贷额度敞口较大的银行经历了更大的股价下跌，但在大流行前和政策干预后表现更好。尽管有存款流入，高提款导致银行放贷减少，表明提款时资本受到负担。信贷额度的还款释放了资本，这解释了从2020年第二季度开始的股价复苏。银行提供信贷额度类似于对总体风险卖出深度虚值看跌期权，我们提出了如何将此特征纳入银行资本压力测试的建议。

papers.title: Migration and Redistribution: Federal Governance of an Economic Union Matters
papers.authors: Assaf Razin, Efraim Sadka
papers.abstract: Both the U.S. and the EU are an economic union: There is a single market for goods, capital, finance, and labor. That is, there is free mobility of goods and services, physical and financial capital, and labor among the member countries of the union. Nevertheless, there is much higher degree of economic policy coordination among the member states of the U.S than of the EU. We argue, by using a model of a union exhibiting migration-based fiscal externality, that the degree of coordination among the member states potentially contribute a great deal to our understanding of observed policy differences between the EU and the US as economic unions: the generosity of the welfare state and the skill composition of migration.
papers.zh_title: 移民与再分配：经济联盟的联邦治理至关重要
papers.zh_abstract: 美国和欧盟都是一个经济联盟：存在商品、资本、金融和劳动力的单一市场。也就是说，在联盟成员国之间，商品和服务、实物和金融资本以及劳动力可以自由流动。尽管如此，美国各成员国之间的经济政策协调程度远高于欧盟。我们通过使用一个展示基于移民的财政外部性的联盟模型论证，成员国之间的协调程度可能极大地有助于我们理解欧盟和美国作为经济联盟在观察到的政策差异：福利国家的慷慨程度和移民的技能构成。

papers.title: New Evidence on the Money’s Worth of Immediate and Deferred Individual Annuities
papers.authors: James M. Poterba, Adam Solomon
papers.abstract: This paper estimates the expected present discounted value (EPDV) of the payments from immediate and deferred annuities that were available in the US retail insurance market in May 2024. The central estimates suggest that for immediate annuities purchased at age 65, the value of payouts per premium dollar is about 87 cents for a buyer whose prospective mortality aligns with that of the US population, and about one dollar for one whose mortality aligns with that of a typical annuity purchaser. For a deferred annuity purchased at age 65 that begins payouts at age 75, the EPDVs are 73 cents and close to one dollar, respectively. The private information that contributes to the lower mortality rates of annuitants than those of the population appears to decay over time, and age-specific mortality rates of recent annuitants are somewhat lower than those of annuitants who bought policies further in the past. Annuities with guarantee periods, the most popular retail products, are much less sensitive, from a valuation perspective, to the buyer’s date of death and mortality risk than simple life annuities.
papers.zh_title: 关于即期和递延个人年金货币价值的新证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文估算了2024年5月美国零售保险市场上可获得的即期和递延年金支付的预期现值（EPDV）。中心估计表明，对于65岁购买的即期年金，如果购买者的预期死亡率与美国人口死亡率一致，每美元保费的赔付价值约为87美分；如果其死亡率与典型年金购买者一致，则约为1美元。对于65岁购买、75岁开始支付的递延年金，EPDV分别为73美分和接近1美元。导致年金领取者死亡率低于人口死亡率的私人信息似乎随时间衰减，近期年金领取者的特定年龄死亡率略低于更早购买保单的年金领取者。从估值角度看，带有保证期的年金（最受欢迎的零售产品）对购买者的死亡日期和死亡风险的敏感度远低于简单生命年金。

papers.title: The Effects of Child Tax Benefits on Poverty and Labor Supply: Evidence from the Canada Child Benefit and Universal Child Care Benefit
papers.authors: Michael Baker, Derek Messacar, Mark Stabile
papers.abstract: We investigate whether child tax benefits reduce child poverty and labor force participation among single mothers within the context of the 2015 expansion of the Canadian Universal Child Care Benefit (UCCB) and the 2016 introduction of the Canada Child Benefit (CCB). We compare single mothers to single childless women as single mothers have historically had the highest poverty rates. Our analysis indicates that both reforms reduced child poverty, although the Canada Child Benefit had the greater effect. We find no evidence of a labor supply response to either of the program reforms on either the extensive or intensive margins.
papers.zh_title: 儿童税收福利对贫困和劳动供给的影响：来自加拿大儿童福利和全民儿童保育福利的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们调查了儿童税收福利是否在2015年加拿大全民儿童保育福利（UCCB）扩大和2016年加拿大儿童福利（CCB）引入的背景下，减少了单亲母亲的儿童贫困和劳动参与。我们将单亲母亲与无子女单身女性进行比较，因为单亲母亲历来贫困率最高。我们的分析表明，两项改革都减少了儿童贫困，尽管加拿大儿童福利的效果更大。我们没有发现任何证据表明这两项计划改革在广延边际或集约边际上对劳动供给产生了反应。

papers.title: Effects of Recent Minimum Wage Policies in California and Nationwide: Results from a Pre-specified Analysis Plan
papers.authors: David Neumark, Maysen Yen
papers.abstract: We analyze the impacts of recent city minimum wage increases in California and nationwide, following a pre-analysis plan (PAP) registered prior to the release of data covering two years of minimum wage increases. For California cities we find a hint of negative employment effects. Nationally, we find some evidence of disemployment effects for teens, but not young adults or high school dropouts. City-specific analyses provide limited evidence of adverse effects on the share low-income, but the pooled city analysis does not; the national analysis generally finds no impact on the share low-income, with one exception that may reflect prior trends.
papers.zh_title: 加州及全美近期最低工资政策的影响：基于预分析计划的结果
papers.zh_abstract: 我们按照在涵盖两年最低工资增长的数据发布前注册的预分析计划，分析了加州及全美近期城市最低工资增长的影响。对于加州城市，我们发现存在负面就业效应的迹象。在全美范围内，我们发现了一些对青少年产生就业抑制效应的证据，但对年轻成年人或高中辍学者则没有。针对具体城市的分析提供了有限证据表明对低收入人群比例存在不利影响，但城市汇总分析并未发现这一点；全美分析通常未发现对低收入人群比例的影响，只有一个例外可能反映了先前趋势。

papers.title: A Soul's View of the Optimal Population Problem
papers.authors: David de la Croix, Matthias Doepke
papers.abstract: A long-standing challenge for welfare economics is to develop welfare criteria that can be applied to allocations with different population levels. Such a criterion is essential to resolve the optimal population problem, i.e., the tradeoff between population size and the welfare of each person alive. A welfare criterion that speaks to this issue inherently requires evaluating the welfare of nonexistent people, because some people exist only in some allocations but not in others. To make progress, we consider the population problem in an environment where population is variable, but there is a fixed supply of souls, who may experience multiple incarnations over time. Rather than pondering the value of nonexistence, from the souls' perspective comparing larger or smaller populations merely involves valuing shorter or longer waits until the next incarnation. We argue that such comparisons are possible on the basis of introspection and lead to intuitive welfare criteria with attractive properties. We emphasize that one does not have to believe in reincarnation to accept the resulting criteria; rather, reincarnation serves as a metaphor to facilitate the necessary utility comparisons.
papers.zh_title: 灵魂视角下的最优人口问题
papers.zh_abstract: 福利经济学长期面临的挑战是制定可应用于不同人口水平配置的福利标准。这样的标准对于解决最优人口问题（即人口规模与每个在世者福利之间的权衡）至关重要。一个涉及此问题的福利标准本质上需要评估不存在人口的福利，因为有些人只存在于某些配置中而非其他配置中。为了取得进展，我们在人口可变但灵魂供给固定的环境中考虑人口问题，这些灵魂可能随时间经历多次化身。从灵魂的角度来看，比较较大或较小的人口规模并非思考不存在的价值，而仅仅涉及评估等待下一次化身的时间长短。我们认为，这种比较可以通过内省进行，并得出具有吸引力的直观福利标准。我们强调，人们不必相信轮回才能接受由此产生的标准；相反，轮回作为一种隐喻，有助于进行必要的效用比较。

papers.title: Government Policies in a Granular Global Economy
papers.authors: Cecile Gaubert, Oleg Itskhoki, Maximilian Vogler
papers.abstract: We use the granular model of international trade developed in Gaubert and Itskhoki (2020) to study the rationale and implications of three types of government interventions typically targeted at large individual firms -- antitrust, trade and industrial policies. We find that in antitrust regulation, governments face an incentive to be overly lenient in accepting mergers of large domestic firms, which acts akin to beggar-thy-neighbor trade policy in sectors with strong comparative advantage. In trade policy, targeting large individual foreign exporters rather than entire sectors is desirable from the point of view of a national government. Doing so minimizes the pass-through of import tariffs into domestic consumer prices, placing a greater portion of the burden on foreign producers. Finally, we show that subsidizing `national champions' is generally suboptimal in closed economies as it leads to an excessive build-up of market power, but it may become unilaterally welfare improving in open economies. We contrast unilaterally optimal policies with the coordinated global optimal policy and emphasize the need for international policy cooperation in these domains.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, ITI；JEL：D43, F12, F13, L40, L52
papers.zh_title: 颗粒化全球经济中的政府政策
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用Gaubert和Itskhoki（2020）开发的国际贸易颗粒化模型，研究通常针对大型个体企业的三类政府干预（反垄断、贸易和产业政策）的理由和影响。我们发现，在反垄断监管中，政府面临过度宽容地批准大型国内企业合并的激励，这在具有强比较优势的行业中类似于以邻为壑的贸易政策。在贸易政策中，从国家政府的角度来看，针对大型个体外国出口商而非整个行业是可取的。这样做可以最小化进口关税向国内消费者价格的传导，将更大比例的负担转嫁给外国生产者。最后，我们表明，在封闭经济中补贴“国家冠军”通常不是最优的，因为它会导致市场力量的过度积累，但在开放经济中可能单方面改善福利。我们将单方面最优政策与协调的全球最优政策进行对比，并强调在这些领域进行国际政策合作的必要性。

papers.title: Student Learning in Online College Programs
papers.authors: Stephanie Riegg Cellini, Hernando Grueso
papers.abstract: We draw on administrative data from the country of Colombia to assess differences in student learning in online and traditional on-campus college programs. The Colombian context is uniquely suited to study this topic, as students take a compulsory exit examination at the end of their studies. We can therefore directly compare performance on the exit exam for students in online and on-campus programs both across and within institutions, degrees, and majors. Using inverse probability weighting methods based on a rich set of background characteristics coupled with institution-degree-major fixed effects, our results suggest that bachelor’s degree students in online programs perform worse on nearly all test score measures (including math, reading, writing, and English) relative to their counterparts in on-campus programs. Results for shorter technical certificates are more mixed. While online students perform significantly worse than on-campus students on exit exams in private institutions, they perform better in SENA—the main public vocational institution in the country.
papers.zh_title: 在线大学课程中的学生学习
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用哥伦比亚的行政数据来评估在线和传统校园大学课程中学生学习的差异。哥伦比亚的背景特别适合研究这一主题，因为学生在学业结束时必须参加强制性毕业考试。因此，我们可以直接比较在线和校园课程学生在跨机构、学位和专业以及机构内部的表现。使用基于丰富背景特征的逆概率加权方法，并结合机构-学位-专业固定效应，我们的结果表明，在线课程的学士学位学生在几乎所有考试成绩指标（包括数学、阅读、写作和英语）上的表现均低于校园课程的学生。较短技术证书的结果则更为复杂。虽然在线学生在私立机构毕业考试中的表现显著低于校园学生，但在该国主要公立职业培训机构SENA中，他们的表现更好。

papers.title: Growing Like India: The Unequal Effects of Service-Led Growth
papers.authors: Tianyu Fan, Michael Peters, Fabrizio Zilibotti
papers.abstract: Structural transformation in most currently developing countries takes the form of a rapid rise in services but limited industrialization. In this paper, we propose a new methodology to structurally estimate productivity growth in service industries that circumvents the notorious difficulties in measuring quality improvements. In our theory, the expansion of the service sector is both a consequence—due to income effects—and a cause— due to productivity growth—of the development process. We estimate the model using Indian household data. We find that productivity growth in non-tradable consumer services such as retail, restaurants, or residential real estate, was an important driver of structural transformation and rising living standards between 1987 and 2011. However, the welfare gains were heavily skewed toward high-income urban dwellers.
papers.zh_title: 像印度一样增长：服务业主导增长的不平等效应
papers.zh_abstract: 当前大多数发展中国家的结构转型表现为服务业的快速崛起但工业化有限。在本文中，我们提出了一种新方法来结构性估计服务业的生产率增长，从而规避衡量质量改进的著名难题。在我们的理论中，服务业的扩张既是发展过程的结果（由于收入效应），也是原因（由于生产率增长）。我们使用印度家庭数据估计了该模型。我们发现，非贸易消费服务业（如零售、餐饮或住宅房地产）的生产率增长是1987年至2011年间结构转型和生活水平提高的重要驱动力。然而，福利收益严重偏向于高收入城市居民。

papers.title: CEO Stress, Aging, and Death
papers.authors: Mark Borgschulte, Marius Guenzel, Canyao Liu, Ulrike Malmendier
papers.abstract: We estimate the long-term effects of experiencing high levels of job demands on the mortality and aging of CEOs. The estimation exploits variation in takeover protection and industry crises. First, using hand-collected data on the dates of birth and death for 1,605 CEOs of large, publicly-listed U.S. firms, we estimate the resulting changes in mortality.
