The hazard estimates indicate that CEOs’ lifespan increases by two years when insulated from market discipline via anti-takeover laws, and decreases by 1.5 years in response to an industry-wide downturn. Second, we apply neural-network based machine-learning techniques to assess visible signs of aging in pictures of CEOs. We estimate that exposure to a distress shock during the Great Recession increases CEOs’ apparent age by one year over the next decade. Our findings imply significant health costs of managerial stress, also relative to known health risks.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EH, LS；JEL：G01, G3, I10, J01
papers.zh_title: CEO压力、衰老与死亡
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估计了经历高工作需求水平对CEO死亡率和衰老的长期影响。该估计利用了收购保护措施和行业危机的变化。首先，利用手工收集的1605位美国大型上市公司CEO的出生和死亡日期数据，我们估计了由此产生的死亡率变化。风险估计表明，当通过反收购法免受市场纪律约束时，CEO的寿命增加两年，而在应对全行业衰退时则减少1.5年。其次，我们应用基于神经网络的机器学习技术来评估CEO照片中的可见衰老迹象。我们估计，在大衰退期间遭受困境冲击会使CEO在未来十年内的表观年龄增加一岁。我们的发现表明，管理压力的健康成本显著，甚至相对于已知的健康风险也是如此。

papers.title: Global Value Chains
papers.authors: Pol Antràs, Davin Chor
papers.abstract: This paper surveys the recent body of work in economics on the importance of global value chains (GVCs) in shaping international trade flows and multinational activity. On the empirical front, we begin reviewing several variants of the "macro approach" to measuring the relevance of global production sharing in the world economy, and we also offer a critical evaluation of the country- and industry-level datasets (or World Input Output Tables) that have been used to date. We next discuss the advantages and disadvantages of a burgeoning alternative "micro approach" that has instead employed firm-level datasets to document the ways in which firms have sliced up their value chains across countries. On the theoretical front, we propose an analogous dissection of the literature. First, we review a vast body of work developing country- and industry-level quantitative frameworks that are easily calibrated with World Input Output Tables, and that open the door for counterfactual exercises with minimal demands on estimation. Second, we overview micro-level frameworks that have treated firms rather than countries or industries as the relevant unit of analysis, and that have unveiled a number of distinctive mechanisms by which GVCs shape the determinants and consequences of international trade flows in ways distinct from traditional models of international trade. We close this survey with a discussion of a still infant literature on the desirability and effects of trade policy in a world of GVCs.
papers.zh_title: 全球价值链
papers.zh_abstract: 本文综述了经济学中关于全球价值链在塑造国际贸易流动和跨国活动方面重要性的近期研究。在实证方面，我们首先回顾了衡量全球生产共享在世界经济中相关性的“宏观方法”的几种变体，并对迄今为止使用的国家和行业层面数据集（或世界投入产出表）进行了批判性评估。接下来，我们讨论了新兴的替代“微观方法”的优缺点，该方法转而使用企业层面数据来记录企业如何跨国分割其价值链。在理论方面，我们提出了类似的文献剖析。首先，我们回顾了大量开发国家和行业层面量化框架的研究，这些框架易于使用世界投入产出表进行校准，并为反事实分析打开了大门，且对估计的要求最低。其次，我们概述了将企业而非国家或行业视为相关分析单位的微观层面框架，这些框架揭示了一系列独特机制，通过这些机制，全球价值链以不同于传统国际贸易模型的方式塑造了国际贸易流动的决定因素和后果。我们以对全球价值链世界中贸易政策的可取性和影响的尚不成熟文献的讨论结束本综述。

papers.title: Minimax Risk and Uniform Convergence Rates for Nonparametric Dyadic Regression
papers.authors: Bryan S. Graham, Fengshi Niu, James L. Powell
papers.abstract: We study nonparametric regression in a setting where N(N-1) dyadic outcomes are observed for N randomly sampled units. Outcomes across dyads sharing a unit in common may be dependent (i.e., our dataset exhibits dyadic dependence). We present two sets of results. First, we calculate lower bounds on the minimax risk for estimating the regression function at (i) a point and (ii) under the infinity norm. Second, we calculate (i) pointwise and (ii) uniform convergence rates for the dyadic analog of the familiar Nadaraya-Watson (NW) kernel regression estimator. We show that the NW kernel regression estimator achieves the optimal rates suggested by our risk bounds when an appropriate bandwidth sequence is chosen. This optimal rate differs from the one available under iid data: the effective sample size is smaller and dimension of the regressor vector influences the rate differently.
papers.zh_title: 非参数二元回归的极小极大风险与一致收敛速度
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在N个随机抽样单元中观察到N(N-1)个二元结果的非参数回归设定。共享一个共同单元的对间结果可能是相关的（即我们的数据集表现出二元依赖性）。我们提出两组结果。首先，我们计算了在（i）点处和（ii）无穷范数下估计回归函数的极小极大风险的下界。其次，我们计算了熟悉的Nadaraya-Watson核回归估计量的二元类似物的（i）逐点和（ii）一致收敛速度。我们表明，当选择适当的带宽序列时，Nadaraya-Watson核回归估计量达到了风险界所建议的最优速度。这个最优速度与独立同分布数据下的速度不同：有效样本量更小，且回归变量向量的维度对速度的影响也不同。

papers.title: Doing Business in China: Parental Background and Government Intervention Determine Who Owns Businesses
papers.authors: Ruixue Jia, Xiaohuan Lan, Gerard Padró I Miquel
papers.abstract: While intergenerational transmission of entrepreneurship is a well-known regularity, we hypothesize that in a transition economy where the state retains an important role, those whose parents are government workers may also be more likely to become business owners. We test the hypothesis in China and show that (1) on average, both entrepreneurs and government workers have a higher likelihood of having children who own incorporated businesses and (2) In provinces where government involvement is higher, the likelihood that children of government workers (entrepreneurs) own incorporated businesses is significantly higher (lower). Our study demonstrates that the local economic business environment shapes the influence of parental background on business ownership.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, POL, PR；JEL：D02, D72, O12, O38, O53
papers.zh_title: 在中国经商：父母背景与政府干预决定企业所有权归属
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管创业的代际传递是一个众所周知的规律，但我们假设，在政府仍扮演重要角色的转型经济体中，父母是政府工作人员的人也可能更有可能成为企业主。我们在中国检验了这一假设，并表明：（1）平均而言，企业家和政府工作人员的孩子拥有注册公司的可能性都更高；（2）在政府干预程度更高的省份，政府工作人员（企业家）的孩子拥有注册公司的可能性显著更高（更低）。我们的研究表明，地方经济商业环境塑造了父母背景对企业所有权的影响。

papers.title: On the Distribution of Estates and the Distribution of Wealth: Evidence from the Dead
papers.authors: Yonatan Berman, Salvatore Morelli
papers.abstract: Detailed information about the distribution of estates left at death has commonly served as the basis for the estimation of wealth distributions among the living via the mortality multiplier method. The application of detailed mortality rates by demographics and other determinants of mortality is crucial for obtaining an unbiased representation of the wealth distribution of the living. Yet, in this paper we suggest that a simplified mortality multiplier method, derived using average mortality rates and aggregate tabulations by estate size, may be sufficient to derive compelling estimates of wealth concentration. We show that the application of homogeneous multipliers leads to estimates that are close in level and trend to the concentration of wealth derived in the existing literature with the detailed mortality multiplier method for a variety of countries. The use of mortality rates graduated by estate size does not confute this finding. We also derive the general formal conditions for the similarity between the distributions of wealth of the living and estates at death and discuss the main caveats. These findings may unlock a wide array of aggregate estate tabulations, previously thought to be unusable, for estimating historical trends of wealth concentration.
papers.zh_title: 论遗产分配与财富分配：来自逝者的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 关于死亡时遗留遗产分布的详细信息，通常通过死亡率乘数法作为估算在世者财富分布的基础。应用按人口统计特征和其他死亡率决定因素细化的死亡率，对于获得在世者财富分布的无偏表示至关重要。然而，在本文中，我们提出，使用平均死亡率和按遗产规模汇总的表格得出的简化死亡率乘数法，可能足以得出令人信服的财富集中度估计。我们表明，应用同质乘数得出的估计值，在水平和趋势上，与现有文献中使用详细死亡率乘数法为多个国家得出的财富集中度相近。使用按遗产规模分级的死亡率并不否定这一发现。我们还推导了在世者财富分布与死亡时遗产分布相似性的一般形式条件，并讨论了主要注意事项。这些发现可能解锁大量先前被认为无法使用的汇总遗产表格，用于估算财富集中度的历史趋势。

papers.title: Licensing Life-Saving Drugs for Developing Countries: Evidence from the Medicines Patent Pool
papers.authors: Alberto Galasso, Mark Schankerman
papers.abstract: We study the effects of an institution that pools patents across geographical markets on the licensing and adoption of life-saving drugs in low- and middle-income countries. Using data on licensing and sales for HIV, hepatitis C and tuberculosis drugs, we show that there is an immediate and large increase in licensing by generic firms when a patent is included in the Medicines Patent Pool (MPP). The effect is heterogeneous across countries. The findings are robust to identification strategies to deal with endogeneity of MPP patents and countries. The impact on actual entry and sales, however, is much smaller than on licensing, which is due to geographic bundling of licenses by the MPP. More broadly, the paper highlights the potential of pools in promoting technology diffusion in developing countries.
papers.zh_title: 为发展中国家许可救命药物：来自药品专利池的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个跨地理市场汇集专利的机构对中低收入国家救命药物许可和采用的影响。利用关于艾滋病、丙型肝炎和结核病药物的许可和销售数据，我们表明，当一项专利被纳入药品专利池（MPP）时，仿制药公司的许可会立即大幅增加。这种效应在不同国家之间存在异质性。这些发现对于处理MPP专利和国家内生性的识别策略是稳健的。然而，对实际进入和销售的影响远小于对许可的影响，这是由于MPP对许可进行了地理捆绑。更广泛地说，本文强调了专利池在促进发展中国家技术扩散方面的潜力。

papers.title: Education and Innovation
papers.authors: Barbara Biasi, David J. Deming, Petra Moser
papers.abstract: This chapter summarizes existing evidence on the link between education and innovation and presents open questions for future research. After a brief review of theoretical frameworks on the link between education, innovation, and economic growth, we explore three alternative policies to encourage innovation through education: expanding access to basic skills, improving the quality of education, and investing in universities. We also review the literature on the role of innovation for education. We conclude by outlining possible avenues for future research.
papers.zh_title: 教育与创新
papers.zh_abstract: 本章总结了关于教育与创新之间联系的现有证据，并提出了未来研究的开放性问题。在简要回顾了关于教育、创新和经济增长之间联系的理论框架之后，我们探讨了三种通过教育鼓励创新的替代政策：扩大基本技能的获取、提高教育质量以及投资于大学。我们还回顾了关于创新对教育作用的文献。最后，我们概述了未来研究的可能方向。

papers.title: Lessons from Denmark about Inequality and Social Mobility
papers.authors: James J. Heckman, Rasmus Landersø
papers.abstract: Many American policy analysts point to Denmark as a model welfare state with low levels of income inequality and high levels of income mobility across generations. It has in place many social policies now advocated for adoption in the U.S. Despite generous Danish social policies, family influence on important child outcomes in Denmark is about as strong as it is in the United States. More advantaged families are better able to access, utilize, and influence universally available programs. Purposive sorting by levels of family advantage create neighborhood effects. Powerful forces not easily mitigated by Danish-style welfare state programs operate in both countries.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE, POL；JEL：H24, H44, J12, J18
papers.zh_title: 来自丹麦关于不平等与社会流动性的教训
papers.zh_abstract: 许多美国政策分析人士将丹麦视为一个福利国家的典范，其收入不平等程度低，代际收入流动性高。丹麦实施了许多目前在美国被倡导采用的社会政策。尽管丹麦有慷慨的社会政策，但家庭对丹麦重要儿童结果的影响几乎与美国一样强。更优势的家庭能够更好地获取、利用和影响普遍可用的项目。按家庭优势水平进行的有目的性分类产生了邻里效应。在两国都存在着不易被丹麦式福利国家项目缓解的强大力量。

papers.title: Tax Evasion at the Top of the Income Distribution: Theory and Evidence
papers.authors: John Guyton, Patrick Langetieg, Daniel Reck, Max Risch, Gabriel Zucman
papers.abstract: We study tax evasion at the top of the U.S. income distribution using micro-data from random and operational audits and focused enforcement initiatives. Leveraging enforcement that revealed noncompliance ex post, we find that under the audit methods used during 2006–2013, individual random audit data failed to capture sophisticated evasion via offshore accounts and pass-through businesses. Consequently, estimates based solely on individual random audit data from this period under-state evasion by the highest-income Americans. We propose a theoretical explanation and construct new distributional estimates of noncompliance in the United States. Accounting for sophisticated evasion increases unreported income of the top 1% of the income distribution in 2006–2013 by 50% and increases the top 1% fiscal income share by about 1 percentage point.
papers.zh_title: 收入分配顶端的逃税行为：理论与证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用来自随机审计、操作审计和重点执法行动中的微观数据，研究美国收入分配顶端的逃税行为。利用事后揭示不合规行为的执法手段，我们发现，在2006-2013年使用的审计方法下，个人随机审计数据未能捕捉到通过离岸账户和穿透式企业进行的复杂逃税行为。因此，仅基于这一时期个人随机审计数据的估计低估了最高收入美国人的逃税行为。我们提出了一个理论解释，并构建了美国不合规行为的新分布估计。考虑复杂逃税行为后，2006-2013年收入分配前1%人群的未报告收入增加了50%，并将前1%人群的财政所得份额提高了约1个百分点。

papers.title: Sovereign Debt Ratchets and Welfare Destruction
papers.authors: Peter M. DeMarzo, Zhiguo He, Fabrice Tourre
papers.abstract: An impatient and risk-neutral government can sell bonds at any time to a more patient group of competitive lenders. The key problem: the government cannot commit to either a particular financing strategy, or a default strategy. Despite risk-neutrality, in equilibrium debt adjusts slowly towards a target debt-to-income level, exacerbating booms and busts. Most strikingly, for any debt maturity structure, the gains from trade are entirely dissipated when trading opportunities are continuous, as lenders compete with each other and the government competes with itself. Moreover, citizens who are more patient than their government are strictly harmed by the unrestricted borrowing. We fully characterize debt dynamics, ergodics, and comparative statics when income follows a geometric Brownian motion, and analyze several commitment devices that allow the sovereign to recapture some gains from trade: self-imposed restrictions on debt issuances and levels, as well as “market-imposed” discipline.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, DEV, EFG, IFM, ITI, ME, POL；JEL：C73, F32, F38, F43, F51, G12
papers.zh_title: 主权债务棘轮与福利破坏
papers.zh_abstract: 一个不耐烦且风险中性的政府可以随时向一群更有耐心的竞争性贷款人出售债券。关键问题在于：政府既不能承诺特定的融资策略，也不能承诺违约策略。尽管风险中性，在均衡中，债务会缓慢地向目标债务收入比调整，加剧了繁荣与萧条。最引人注目的是，对于任何债务期限结构，当交易机会是连续的时候，贸易收益完全消散，因为贷款人之间相互竞争，政府也与自身竞争。此外，比其政府更有耐心的公民会因无限制的借贷而受到严格损害。当收入遵循几何布朗运动时，我们完全刻画了债务动态、遍历性和比较静态分析，并分析了几种允许主权国家重新获得部分贸易收益的承诺机制：对债务发行和水平的自我施加限制，以及“市场施加”的纪律。

papers.title: Sovereign Debt in the 21st Century
papers.authors: Kris James Mitchener, Christoph Trebesch
papers.abstract: How will sovereign debt markets evolve in the 21st century? We survey how the literature has responded to the eurozone debt crisis, placing “lessons learned” in historical perspective. The crisis featured: (i) the return of debt problems to advanced economies; (ii) a bank-sovereign “doom-loop” and the propagation of sovereign risk to households and firms; (iii) roll-over problems and self-fulfilling crisis dynamics; (iv) severe debt distress without outright sovereign defaults; (v) large-scale sovereign bailouts from abroad; and (vi) creditor threats to litigate and hold out in a debt restructuring. Many of these characteristics were already present in historical debt crises and are likely to remain relevant in the future. Looking forward, our survey points to a growing role of sovereign-bank linkages, legal risks, domestic debt and default, and of official creditors, due to new lenders such as China as well as the increasing dominance of central banks in global debt markets. Questions of debt sustainability and default will remain acute in both developing and advanced economies.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, IFM；JEL：F30, F34, G12, G15, N10, N20
papers.zh_title: 21世纪的主权债务
papers.zh_abstract: 主权债务市场在21世纪将如何演变？我们调查了文献如何应对欧元区债务危机，并将“经验教训”置于历史视角中。这场危机的特点是：(i) 债务问题回归发达经济体；(ii) 银行-主权“厄运循环”以及主权风险向家庭和企业的传播；(iii) 展期问题和自我实现的危机动态；(iv) 没有彻底主权违约的严重债务困境；(v) 来自国外的大规模主权救助；以及 (vi) 债权人在债务重组中威胁诉讼和抵制。这些特征中的许多在历史上的债务危机中已经存在，并且很可能在未来仍然相关。展望未来，我们的调查指出，由于中国等新贷款人以及中央银行在全球债务市场中日益增长的主导地位，主权-银行联系、法律风险、国内债务和违约以及官方债权人的作用将日益增强。债务可持续性和违约问题在发展中国家和发达经济体中都将继续严峻。

papers.title: Industrialization and Urbanization in Nineteenth Century America
papers.authors: Jeremy Atack, Robert A. Margo, Paul Rhode
papers.abstract: During the nineteenth century the United States urbanized – the share of the population living in urban areas increased – and industrialized – the share of the labor force in manufacturing increased. Our survey of the literature and analyses of census data suggests that a key reason was the development of a nationwide transportation system, especially the railroad. Coupled with changes in manufacturing technology and organizational form, the “transportation revolution” increased demand for manufacturing labor in urban locations. Labor supply responded and because of agglomeration economies, population density and the size and number of urban places increased. Although our focus is on the US experience, a causal role for transportation is likely for other economies that experienced historical industrialization and urbanization.
papers.zh_title: 19世纪美国的工业化与城市化
papers.zh_abstract: 在19世纪，美国经历了城市化——居住在城市地区的人口比例增加——和工业化——制造业劳动力份额增加。我们对文献的回顾和对人口普查数据的分析表明，一个关键原因是全国性交通系统的发展，尤其是铁路。结合制造技术和组织形式的变化，“交通革命”增加了城市地区对制造业劳动力的需求。劳动力供给随之响应，由于集聚经济，人口密度以及城市地点的规模和数量都增加了。尽管我们的重点是美国经验，但对于经历了历史性工业化和城市化的其他经济体来说，交通的因果作用很可能也存在。

papers.title: Diversity in Schools: Immigrants and the Educational Performance of U.S. Born Students
papers.authors: David N. Figlio, Paola Giuliano, Riccardo Marchingiglio, Umut Özek, Paola Sapienza
papers.abstract: We study the effect of exposure to immigrants on the educational outcomes of US-born students, using a unique dataset combining population-level birth and school records from Florida. This research question is complicated by substantial school selection of US-born students, especially among White and comparatively affluent students, in response to the presence of immigrant students in the school. We propose a new identification strategy to partial out the unobserved non-random selection into schools, and find that the presence of immigrant students has a positive effect on the academic achievement of US-born students, especially for students from disadvantaged backgrounds. Moreover, the presence of immigrants does not affect negatively the performance of affluent US-born students, who typically show a higher academic achievement compared to immigrant students. We provide suggestive evidence on potential channels.
papers.zh_title: 学校中的多样性：移民与美国出生学生的教育表现
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了接触移民对美国出生学生教育成果的影响，使用了结合佛罗里达州人口层面出生和学校记录的独特数据集。这个研究问题因美国出生学生（尤其是白人和相对富裕的学生）对学校中移民学生存在的显著学校选择而变得复杂。我们提出了一种新的识别策略，以剔除未观测到的非随机学校选择，并发现移民学生的存在对美国出生学生的学业成绩有积极影响，特别是对来自弱势背景的学生。此外，移民的存在不会对富裕的美国出生学生的表现产生负面影响，这些学生通常比移民学生表现出更高的学业成绩。我们提供了关于潜在渠道的提示性证据。

papers.title: Welfare Consequences of Sustainable Finance
papers.authors: Harrison Hong, Neng Wang, Jinqiang Yang
papers.abstract: We model the welfare consequences of portfolio mandates that restrict investors to hold firms with net-zero carbon emissions. To qualify for these mandates, value-maximizing firms have to accumulate decarbonization capital. Qualification lowers a firm’s required rate of return by its decarbonization investments divided by Tobin’s q, i.e., the dividend yield shareholders forgo to address the global-warming externality. The welfare-maximizing mandate approximates the first-best solution, yielding welfare gains compared to laissez faire by mitigating the weather disaster risks resulting from carbon emissions. Our model generates transitions to steady-state decarbonization-to-productive capital ratios that we use to evaluate the optimality of proposed net-zero targets.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, PE；JEL：E20, G12, G30, H50
papers.zh_title: 可持续金融的福利后果
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了投资组合指令的福利后果模型，这些指令限制投资者只能持有净零碳排放企业。为了符合这些指令要求，追求价值最大化的企业必须积累脱碳资本。符合资格会降低企业的必要回报率，降低幅度等于其脱碳投资除以托宾q，即股东为应对全球变暖外部性而放弃的股息收益率。福利最大化的指令近似于最优解，通过减轻碳排放导致的天气灾害风险，与自由放任相比带来福利改善。我们的模型生成了向稳态脱碳-生产性资本比率的过渡，我们利用这一比率来评估所提议的净零目标的最优性。

papers.title: Combining Rules and Discretion in Economic Development Policy: Evidence on the Impacts of the California Competes Tax Credit
papers.authors: Matthew Freedman, David Neumark, Shantanu Khanna
papers.abstract: We evaluate the effects of one of a new generation of economic development programs, the California Competes Tax Credit (CCTC), on local job creation. Incorporating perceived best practices from previous initiatives, the CCTC combines explicit eligibility thresholds with some discretion on the part of program officials to select tax credit recipients. The structure and implementation of the program facilitates rigorous evaluation. We exploit detailed data on accepted and rejected applicants to the CCTC, including information on scoring of applicants with regard to program goals and funding decisions, together with restricted access American Community Survey (ACS) data on local economic conditions. Using a difference-in-differences approach, we find that each CCTC-incentivized job in a census tract increases the number of individuals working in that tract by over two – a significant local multiplier. We also explore the program’s distributional implications and impacts by industry. We find that CCTC awards increase employment among workers residing in both high income and low income communities, and that the local multipliers are larger for non-manufacturing awards than for manufacturing awards.
papers.meta: Programs：LS, PE；JEL：H25, H71, J68, R11, R23, R58
papers.zh_title: 经济发展政策中规则与自由裁量权的结合：加州竞争税收抵免影响的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们评估了新一代经济发展项目之一——加州竞争税收抵免（CCTC）对当地就业创造的影响。CCTC吸收了以往项目的公认最佳实践，将明确的资格门槛与项目官员选择税收抵免接受者的一定自由裁量权相结合。该项目的结构和实施便于进行严格评估。我们利用CCTC已接受和已拒绝申请者的详细数据，包括申请者在项目目标和资金决策方面的评分信息，以及限制访问的美国社区调查（ACS）关于当地经济状况的数据。采用双重差分法，我们发现，每个由CCTC激励的、位于人口普查区的工作岗位，会使该区域工作人数增加超过两人——这是一个显著的本地乘数效应。我们还探讨了该项目的分配效应以及按行业划分的影响。我们发现，CCTC奖励增加了居住在高收入和低收入社区的工人的就业，并且非制造业奖励的本地乘数效应大于制造业奖励。

papers.title: Experimental Evidence on the Effectiveness of Non-Experts for Improving Vaccine Demand
papers.authors: Marcella Alsan, Sarah Eichmeyer
papers.abstract: We experimentally vary signals and senders to identify which combination will increase vaccine demand among a disadvantaged population in the United States – Black and White men without a college education. Our main finding is that laypeople (non-expert concordant senders) are most effective at promoting vaccination, particularly among those least willing to become vaccinated. This finding points to a trade-off between the higher qualifications of experts on the one hand, but lower social proximity to low socio-economic status populations on the other hand, which may undermine credibility in settings of low trust.
papers.zh_title: 关于非专家提高疫苗需求有效性的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过实验改变信号和发送者，以确定哪种组合能提高美国弱势群体——即未受过大学教育的黑人和白人男性——的疫苗需求。我们的主要发现是，普通人（非专家、身份一致的发送者）在促进疫苗接种方面最为有效，尤其是在那些最不愿意接种疫苗的人群中。这一发现指出了专家资质更高与低社会经济地位群体社会亲近度较低之间的权衡，后者可能在低信任环境中削弱可信度。

papers.title: The Voice of Monetary Policy
papers.authors: Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Tho Pham, Oleksandr Talavera
papers.abstract: We develop a deep learning model to detect emotions embedded in press conferences after the meetings of the Federal Open Market Committee and examine the influence of the detected emotions on financial markets. We find that, after controlling for the Fed’s actions and the sentiment in policy texts, positive tone in the voices of Fed Chairs leads to statistically significant and economically large increases in share prices. In other words, how policy messages are communicated can move the stock market. In contrast, the bond market appears to take few vocal cues from the Chairs. Our results provide implications for improving the effectiveness of central bank communications.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：D84, E31, E58, G12
papers.zh_title: 货币政策的声音
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个深度学习模型，用于检测联邦公开市场委员会会议后新闻发布会上蕴含的情绪，并考察这些检测到的情绪对金融市场的影响。我们发现，在控制了美联储的行动和政策文本中的情绪之后，美联储主席声音中的积极语调会导致股价出现统计上显著且经济意义上大幅度的上涨。换句话说，政策信息的传达方式可以影响股市。相比之下，债券市场似乎很少从主席那里获取声音线索。我们的研究结果为提高央行沟通的有效性提供了启示。

papers.title: Adaptation to Environmental Change: Agriculture and the Unexpected Incidence of the Acid Rain Program
papers.authors: Nicholas J. Sanders, Alan Barreca
papers.abstract: The Acid Rain Program (ARP) cut sulfur dioxide (SO2) emissions from power plants in the United States, with considerable benefits. We show this also reduced ambient sulfate levels, which lowered agriculture productivity through decreased soil sulfur. Using plant-level SO2 emissions and an atmospheric transport model, we estimate the relationship between airborne sulfate levels and yields for corn and soybean. We estimate crop revenue losses for these two crops around $1-1.5 billion per year, with accompanying decreases in land value. Back of the envelope calculations of the costs to replace lost sulfur suggest producer responses were limited and suboptimal.
papers.zh_title: 适应环境变化：农业与酸雨计划的意外影响
papers.zh_abstract: 酸雨计划（ARP）削减了美国发电厂的二氧化硫（SO2）排放，带来了显著效益。我们表明，这也降低了环境硫酸盐水平，通过减少土壤硫含量而降低了农业生产力。利用工厂层面的SO2排放数据和大气传输模型，我们估计了空气中硫酸盐水平与玉米和大豆产量之间的关系。我们估计，这两种作物的年作物收入损失约为10-15亿美元，同时土地价值也随之下降。粗略计算补充流失硫的成本表明，生产者的应对措施有限且并非最优。

papers.title: The Value of Employer-Sponsored Health Insurance
papers.authors: Casey B. Mulligan
papers.abstract: Based on published estimates of its price elasticity of demand and of tax wedges, as well as the method of revealed preference, I estimate that the annual social value of ESI is about $1.5 trillion beyond what policyholders, their employers, and taxpayers pay for it. The private component of that value, which in some respects is the other side of “job lock,” derives in part from group plans, with the group determined by many characteristics other than the demand for healthcare. With voluntary groups formed this way, adverse risk selection is reduced, the groups can be effective at obtaining substantial discounts and rebates for their members, and division of labor employed in shopping for health providers. ESI is also a mechanism for employers to act on their incentives for a healthy and productive workforce. External effects include tax externalities (in both directions), encouraging work, and easing government expenditure obligations by helping to prevent people from going without health insurance.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, IO, PE；JEL：D40, D71, H30, I13, J32
papers.zh_title: 雇主提供的健康保险的价值
papers.zh_abstract: 基于已发表的关于其需求价格弹性和税收楔子的估计，以及显示性偏好方法，我估计雇主提供的健康保险（ESI）的年社会价值约为1.5万亿美元，这超出了投保人、其雇主和纳税人为其支付的费用。该价值的私人部分（在某些方面是“工作锁定”的另一面）部分源于团体计划，而团体的确定除了医疗需求外还取决于许多其他特征。通过这种方式形成的自愿团体减少了逆向风险选择，这些团体能够有效地为其成员获得大量折扣和回扣，并在寻找医疗服务提供者方面实现劳动分工。ESI也是雇主为其健康且富有生产力的劳动力激励而采取行动的一种机制。外部效应包括税收外部性（双向）、鼓励工作以及通过帮助防止人们没有医疗保险来减轻政府支出义务。

papers.title: Dynamic Oligopoly Pricing with Asymmetric Information: Implications for Horizontal Mergers
papers.authors: Andrew Sweeting, Xuezhen Tao, Xinlu Yao
papers.abstract: We model differentiated product pricing by firms that possess private information about serially-correlated state variables, such as their marginal costs, and can use prices to signal information to rivals. In a dynamic game, we show that signaling can raise prices significantly above static complete information Nash levels, even when the privately observed state variables are restricted to lie in narrow ranges. We calibrate our model using data from the beer industry, and show that our model can explain changes in price levels, price dynamics and cost pass-through after the 2008 MillerCoors joint venture.
papers.zh_title: 具有不对称信息的动态寡头定价：对横向合并的启示
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了差异化产品定价模型，其中企业拥有关于序列相关状态变量（如其边际成本）的私人信息，并可以利用价格向竞争对手传递信号。在一个动态博弈中，我们表明，即使私人观测到的状态变量被限制在狭窄范围内，信号传递也能使价格显著高于静态完全信息纳什水平。我们利用啤酒行业的数据校准模型，并表明我们的模型可以解释2008年MillerCoors合资企业后价格水平、价格动态和成本传导的变化。

papers.title: Digital Resilience: How Work-From-Home Feasibility Affects Firm Performance
papers.authors: John (Jianqiu) Bai, Erik Brynjolfsson, Wang Jin, Sebastian Steffen, Chi Wan
papers.abstract: Digital technologies may make some tasks, jobs and firms more resilient to unanticipated shocks. We extract data from over 200 million U.S. job postings to construct an index for firms' resilience to the Covid-19 pandemic by assessing the work-from-home (WFH) feasibility of their labor demand. Using a difference-in-differences framework, we find that public firms with high pre-pandemic WFH index values had significantly higher sales, net incomes, and stock returns than their peers during the pandemic. Our results indicate that firms with higher digital resilience, as measured through our pre-pandemic WFH index, performed significantly better in general, and in non-essential industries in particular, where WFH feasibility was necessary to continue operation. The ability to use digital technologies to work remotely also mattered more in non-high-tech industries than in high-tech ones. Lastly, we find evidence that firms with lower pre-pandemic WFH feasibility attempted to catch up to their more resilient competitors via greater software investment. This is consistent with a complementarity between digital technologies and WFH practices. Our study's results are robust to a variety of empirical specifications and provide a first look at how WFH practices improved resilience to a major, unanticipated social and economic shock.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, LS, PR；JEL：D23, J21, L0, L25, O0, O33
papers.zh_title: 数字韧性：居家办公可行性如何影响企业绩效
papers.zh_abstract: 数字技术可能使某些任务、工作和企业更能抵御意外冲击。我们从超过2亿个美国职位发布中提取数据，通过评估其劳动力需求的居家办公（WFH）可行性，构建了企业应对新冠疫情韧性的指数。使用双重差分框架，我们发现，在疫情期间，疫情前WFH指数值高的上市公司，其销售额、净利润和股票回报率显著高于同行。我们的结果表明，通过我们疫情前WFH指数衡量的数字韧性较高的企业，总体上表现显著更好，尤其是在非必需行业中，在这些行业中WFH可行性对于继续运营是必要的。利用数字技术远程办公的能力在非高科技行业也比在高科技行业更为重要。最后，我们发现有证据表明，疫情前WFH可行性较低的企业试图通过增加软件投资来追赶其更具韧性的竞争对手。这与数字技术与WFH实践之间的互补性是一致的。我们的研究结果对各种实证设定都是稳健的，并首次揭示了WFH实践如何提高了对重大、意外社会和经济冲击的韧性。

papers.title: The Repeated Setbacks of HIV Vaccine Development Laid the Groundwork for SARS-CoV-2 Vaccines
papers.authors: Jeffrey E. Harris
papers.abstract: The decades-long effort to produce a workable HIV vaccine has hardly been a waste of public and private resources. To the contrary, the scientific know-how acquired along the way has served as the critical foundation for the development of vaccines against the novel, pandemic SARS-CoV-2 virus. We retell the real-world story of HIV vaccine research – with all its false leads and missteps – in a way that sheds light on the current state of the art of antiviral vaccines. We find that HIV-related R&D had more than a general spillover effect. In fact, the repeated failures of phase 2 and 3 clinical trials of HIV vaccine candidates have served as a critical stimulus to the development of successful vaccine technologies today. We rebut the counterargument that HIV vaccine development has been no more than a blind alley, and that recently developed vaccines against COVID-19 are really descendants of successful vaccines against Ebola, MERS, and SARS. These successful vaccines likewise owe much to the vicissitudes of HIV vaccine development. We then discuss how the failures of HIV vaccine development have taught us how adapt SARS-CoV-2 vaccines to immune escape from emerging variants. Finally, we inquire whether recent advances in the development of vaccines against SARS-CoV-2 might in turn further the development of an HIV vaccine - what we describe as a reverse spillover effect.
papers.zh_title: HIV疫苗研发的反复挫折为SARS-CoV-2疫苗奠定了基础
papers.zh_abstract: 数十年来为研制有效HIV疫苗所做的努力并非浪费公共和私人资源。相反，在此过程中获得的科学知识为开发针对新型大流行SARS-CoV-2病毒的疫苗奠定了关键基础。我们重新讲述了HIV疫苗研究的真实故事——包括所有错误的线索和失误——以揭示当前抗病毒疫苗的技术水平。我们发现，HIV相关的研发不仅仅具有一般的溢出效应。事实上，HIV候选疫苗2期和3期临床试验的反复失败，已成为当今成功疫苗技术发展的关键刺激因素。我们反驳了“HIV疫苗研发不过是一条死胡同”的反驳论点，并指出最近开发的COVID-19疫苗实际上是成功针对埃博拉、中东呼吸综合征和SARS疫苗的后代。这些成功的疫苗同样在很大程度上归功于HIV疫苗研发的曲折历程。然后，我们讨论了HIV疫苗研发的失败如何教会我们如何使SARS-CoV-2疫苗适应新变异株的免疫逃逸。最后，我们探究了近期SARS-CoV-2疫苗研发的进展是否可能反过来促进HIV疫苗的研发——我们将其描述为反向溢出效应。

papers.title: Human Capital and Black-White Earnings Gaps, 1966-2017
papers.authors: Owen Thompson
papers.abstract: This paper estimates the contribution of human capital, measured using both educational attainment and test performance, to the Black-white earnings gap in three separate samples of men spanning 1966 through 2017. There are three main findings. First, the magnitude of reductions in the Black-white earnings gap that occur after controlling for human capital have become much larger over time, suggesting a growing contribution of human capital to Black-white earnings disparities. Second, these increases are almost entirely due to growth in the returns to human capital, rather than changing racial gaps in the human capital traits themselves. Finally, growth in the explanatory power of human capital has been primarily due to increases in the association between human capital and the likelihood of non-work, with no clear increases in the extent to which human capital explains Black-white differences in hourly wages or other intensive margins. These findings highlight how apparently race-neutral structural developments in the US labor market, such as increasing skill prices and falling labor force participation rates among less skilled men, have had large impacts on the dynamics of racial inequality.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：I24, I26, J71
papers.zh_title: 人力资本与黑人与白人之间的收入差距，1966-2017年
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用1966年至2017年间三个独立的男性样本，估计了以教育程度和考试成绩衡量的人力资本对黑人与白人收入差距的贡献。主要有三个发现。首先，在控制人力资本后，黑人与白人收入差距的缩小幅度随着时间的推移变得越来越大，这表明人力资本对黑人与白人收入差距的贡献日益增加。其次，这些增长几乎完全归因于人力资本回报率的提高，而非人力资本特征本身的种族差距变化。最后，人力资本解释力的增长主要是由于人力资本与非工作可能性之间的关联增强，而在人力资本解释黑人与白人小时工资或其他集约边际差异的程度方面，没有明显的增加。这些发现突显了美国劳动力市场中看似种族中性的结构性发展，例如技能价格上升和低技能男性劳动力参与率下降，如何对种族不平等的动态产生了巨大影响。

papers.title: Central Bank Swap Arrangements in the COVID-19 Crisis
papers.authors: Joshua Aizenman, Hiro Ito, Gurnain Kaur Pasricha
papers.abstract: Facing acute strains in the offshore dollar funding markets during the COVID-19 crisis, the Federal Reserve (Fed) implemented measures to provide US dollar liquidity through swap arrangements with other central banks and establishing a repo facility for financial institutions and monetary authorities (FIMA) in March 2020. This paper assesses motivations for the Fed liquidity lines, and the effects and spillovers of US dollar auctions by central banks. We find that the access to the liquidity arrangements was driven by the recipient economies’ close financial and trade ties with the US. Access to dollar liquidity also reflected global trade exposure. We find that announcements of expansion of Fed liquidity facilities or of auctions using these facilities led to appreciation of partner currencies against the US dollar. and reduced deviations from covered interest parity (CIP). Dollar auctions by major central banks (BoE, ECB, BoJ and SNB) led to temporary appreciation of other currencies against the US dollar, reduced CIP deviations, and persistently reduced sovereign bond yields of other economies. However, dollar auctions done by other central banks with access to Fed facilities did not have a meaningful impact on key domestic financial variables . The impact of major central bank auctions does not differ by the economies’ financial or trade links with the US or their balance sheet currency exposure, i.e. the major central bank auctions benefitted even the more vulnerable economies.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19危机中的中央银行互换安排
papers.zh_abstract: 面对COVID-19危机期间离岸美元融资市场的严重压力，美联储于2020年3月实施了通过与其他央行互换安排以及为金融机构和货币当局设立回购便利（FIMA）来提供美元流动性的措施。本文评估了美联储流动性额度的动机，以及央行美元拍卖的影响和溢出效应。我们发现，获得流动性安排是由接受经济体与美国密切的金融和贸易联系驱动的。获得美元流动性也反映了全球贸易敞口。我们发现，宣布扩大美联储流动性便利或使用这些便利进行拍卖，导致伙伴国货币对美元升值，并减少了与抛补利率平价的偏离。主要央行（英国央行、欧洲央行、日本央行和瑞士央行）的美元拍卖导致其他货币对美元暂时升值，减少了抛补利率平价偏离，并持续降低了其他经济体的主权债券收益率。然而，其他拥有美联储便利准入权的央行进行的美元拍卖，并未对关键的国内金融变量产生有意义的影响。主要央行拍卖的影响并不因经济体与美国的金融或贸易联系或其资产负债表货币敞口而异，即主要央行拍卖甚至使更脆弱的经济体受益。

papers.title: Information Spillovers in Experience Goods Competition
papers.authors: Zhuoqiong Charlie Chen, Christopher T. Stanton, Catherine Thomas
papers.abstract: When experience goods compete, consuming one product can be informative about value for similar untried products. We study a two-period model of duopoly competition in markets that have this feature and where firms can price discriminate between consumers based on purchasing history. Price dynamics, firm profits, and consumer surplus depend on how information spillovers shape demand from the consumers who have trialed the rival product—the potential switchers. In the first period, rather than competing intensely for all future profits, firms compete only for the difference in future profits between repeat and switching consumers. Demand-side information spillovers offer an explanation of how competing firms in new product markets can be profitable in all periods even when selling products that are indistinguishable ex ante.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, PR；JEL：D11, L1, L13, L15, L26, M21
papers.zh_title: 体验品竞争中的信息溢出效应
papers.zh_abstract: 当体验品相互竞争时，消费一种产品可以为了解类似未尝试产品的价值提供信息。我们研究了一个具有此特征的市场中双寡头竞争的两期模型，在该市场中，企业可以根据购买历史对消费者进行价格歧视。价格动态、企业利润和消费者剩余取决于信息溢出如何塑造来自尝试过竞争对手产品的消费者（即潜在转换者）的需求。在第一期，企业并非为所有未来利润激烈竞争，而仅竞争重复消费者与转换消费者之间未来利润的差额。需求侧信息溢出效应解释了，在新产品市场中竞争的企业如何能够在所有时期都盈利，即使销售的产品在事前无法区分。

papers.title: Old Boys' Clubs and Upward Mobility Among the Educational Elite
papers.authors: Valerie Michelman, Joseph Price, Seth D. Zimmerman
papers.abstract: This paper studies how exclusive social groups shape upward mobility and whether inter-actions between low- and high-status peers can integrate the top rungs of the economic and social ladders. Our setting is Harvard in the 1920s and 1930s, where new groups of students arriving on campus encountered a social system centered on exclusive old boys’ clubs. Combining archival and Census records, we first show that students from prestigious private feeder schools are overrepresented in old boys’ clubs, while academic high achievers and ethnic minorities are almost completely absent. Club members earn 32% more than other students and are more likely to work in finance and join country clubs, both characteristic of the era’s elite. We then use random variation in room assignment to show that exposure to high-status peers expands gaps in college club membership, adult social club membership, and finance careers by high school type, with large positive effects for private school students and zero or negative effects for others. To conclude, we turn to more recent cohorts. We show that the link between exclusive college clubs and finance careers persists across the 20th century even as Harvard diversifies, and that elite university students from the highest-income families continue to out-earn their peers.
papers.zh_title: 老男孩俱乐部与教育精英中的向上流动性
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了排他性社会群体如何塑造向上流动性，以及低地位与高地位同龄人之间的互动能否整合经济和社会阶梯的顶层。我们的研究背景是20世纪20年代和30年代的哈佛大学，当时新到校园的学生群体遇到了一个以排他性老男孩俱乐部为中心的社会体系。结合档案和人口普查记录，我们首先表明，来自著名私立预科学校的学生在老男孩俱乐部中比例过高，而学业成绩优异的学生和少数族裔几乎完全缺席。俱乐部成员比其他学生收入高出32%，并且更有可能从事金融行业和加入乡村俱乐部，这两者都是当时精英阶层的特征。然后，我们利用宿舍分配的随机变化来表明，接触高地位同龄人扩大了按高中类型划分的大学俱乐部成员身份、成人社交俱乐部成员身份和金融职业方面的差距，对私立学校学生产生较大的积极影响，而对其他学生则产生零或负影响。最后，我们转向更近期的群体。我们表明，即使哈佛大学变得多元化，排他性大学俱乐部与金融职业之间的联系在整个20世纪依然存在，并且来自最高收入家庭的精英大学学生继续比同龄人赚得更多。

papers.title: Dynamic Bank Expansion: Spatial Growth, Financial Access, and Inequality
papers.authors: Yan Ji, Songyuan Teng, Robert Townsend
papers.abstract: We propose a model with local spatial markets and heterogeneous agents to understand and evaluate the geographic expansion of bank branches after banking deregulation in Thailand. The model features heterogeneity in financial frictions across regions, with the costs of accessing credit and deposits depending on the distance from the nearest branch. Disciplined by micro estimates of the effects of branch openings, the model reproduces salient regional and aggregate patterns concerning occupational choice, financial access, and inequality. We apply the model to study two counterfactual financial sector policies in distant markets, one subsidizing branches and the other subsidizing household deposits.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, ME；JEL：C54, E23, E44, F43, O11, O16, R11, R13
papers.zh_title: 动态银行扩张：空间增长、金融可及性与不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个包含局部空间市场和异质性主体的模型，以理解和评估泰国银行业放松管制后银行分支机构的区域扩张。该模型的特点是不同地区的金融摩擦存在异质性，获取信贷和存款的成本取决于与最近分支机构的距离。在分支机构开设的微观估计效应的约束下，该模型再现了关于职业选择、金融可及性和不平等的显著区域和总体模式。我们应用该模型研究了偏远市场中两种反事实的金融部门政策，一种是补贴分支机构，另一种是补贴家庭存款。

papers.title: Reducing Parent-School Information Gaps and Improving Education Outcomes: Evidence from High-Frequency Text Messages
papers.authors: Samuel Berlinski, Matias Busso, Taryn Dinkelman, Claudia Martínez A.
papers.abstract: We conducted an experiment in low-income urban schools in Chile to test the effects and behavioral changes triggered by a program that sends attendance, grade, and classroom behavior information to parents via weekly and monthly text messages. Our 18-month intervention raised average math scores by 0.09 of a standard deviation and increased the share of students satisfying attendance requirements for grade promotion by 4.7 percentage points. Treatment effects were larger for students at higher risk of later grade retention and dropout. Our results demonstrate that communicating existing school information to parents frequently can shrink parent-school information gaps and improve school outcomes in a light-touch, scalable, and cost-effective way.
papers.zh_title: 缩小家长与学校之间的信息差距并改善教育成果：来自高频短信的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在智利的低收入城市学校进行了一项实验，以测试一项通过每周和每月短信向家长发送出勤率、成绩和课堂行为信息的项目所引发的效果和行为变化。我们为期18个月的干预措施将平均数学成绩提高了0.09个标准差，并将满足年级晋升出勤要求的学生比例提高了4.7个百分点。对于后期留级和辍学风险较高的学生，处理效应更大。我们的结果表明，频繁地向家长传达现有的学校信息，可以以轻触式、可扩展且成本效益高的方式缩小家长与学校之间的信息差距，并改善学校成果。

papers.title: Real and Private-Value Assets
papers.authors: William N. Goetzmann, Christophe Spaenjers, Stijn Van Nieuwerburgh
papers.abstract: Real and private-value assets—defined here as the sum of real estate, infrastructure, collectibles, and non-corporate business equity—is an investment class worth an estimated $85 trillion in the U.S. alone. Furthermore, private values can affect pricing in many other financial markets, such as that for sustainable investments. This paper introduces the research on real assets and private values that can be found in this special issue. It also reviews recent advances—and suggests new research directions—on a number of topics in the real assets space that we believe to be particularly important and exciting.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, PE；JEL：E01, G0, R0, Z11
papers.zh_title: 实物资产与私人价值资产
papers.zh_abstract: 实物资产和私人价值资产——此处定义为房地产、基础设施、收藏品和非公司企业股权的总和——是一个仅在美国估计价值就达85万亿美元的投资类别。此外，私人价值可能影响许多其他金融市场的定价，例如可持续投资市场。本文介绍了本期特刊中关于实物资产和私人价值的研究。它还回顾了近期在实物资产领域我们认为特别重要和令人兴奋的一些主题上的进展，并提出了新的研究方向。

papers.title: Not a Typical Firm: The Joint Dynamics of Firms, Labor Shares, and Capital–Labor Substitution
papers.authors: Joachim Hubmer, Pascual Restrepo
papers.abstract: While the US labor share has declined, especially in manufacturing and retail, the labor share of a typical firm in these sectors has risen. This paper introduces a model where firms incur fixed costs to automate tasks. In response to lower capital prices, the model reproduces the labor share patterns observed in the data: large firms automate more tasks, reducing the aggregate labor share; while the median firm continues to operate a labor-intensive technology with a rising labor share. Using our model, we decompose the labor share decline and the rise in sales concentration in each sector into a part driven by lower capital prices and a part driven by reallocation to higher-markup firms. Reallocation played a minor role in explaining the labor share decline in manufacturing and some role in retail and other sectors during 1982–2012.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PR；JEL：E22, E23, E24, E25
papers.zh_title: 非典型企业：企业、劳动份额与资本-劳动替代的联合动态
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管美国劳动份额有所下降，尤其是在制造业和零售业，但这些行业中典型企业的劳动份额却有所上升。本文提出了一个模型，其中企业为自动化任务而承担固定成本。为了应对资本价格下降，该模型再现了数据中观察到的劳动份额模式：大企业自动化更多任务，降低了总体劳动份额；而中位数企业继续采用劳动密集型技术，其劳动份额上升。利用我们的模型，我们将每个行业的劳动份额下降和销售集中度上升分解为两部分：一部分由资本价格下降驱动，另一部分由向高加成率企业的重新配置驱动。在1982年至2012年期间，重新配置在解释制造业劳动份额下降方面作用较小，而在零售业和其他行业中起到了一定作用。

papers.title: The Political Economy of Responses to COVID-19 in the U.S.A.
papers.authors: Zhihan Cui, Geoffrey Heal, Howard Kunreuther, Lu Liu
papers.abstract: Social distancing via shelter-in-place strategies, and wearing masks, have emerged as the most effective non-pharmaceutical ways of combatting COVID-19. In the United States, choices about these policies are made by individual states. We develop a game-theoretic model and then test it econometrically, showing that the policy choices made by one state are strongly influenced by the choices made by others. If enough states engage in social distancing or mask wearing, they will tip others that have not yet done so to follow suit and thus shift the Nash equilibrium. If interactions are strongest amongst states of similar political orientations there can be equilibria where states with different political leanings adopt different strategies. In this case a group of states of one political orientation may by changing their choices tip others of the same orientation, but not those whose orientations differ. We test these ideas empirically using probit and logit regressions and find strong confirmation that inter-state social reinforcement is important and that equilibria can be tipped. Policy choices are influenced mainly by the choices of other states, especially those of similar political orientation, and to a much lesser degree by the number of new COVID-19 cases. The choice of mask-wearing policy shows more sensitivity to the actions of other states than the choice of SIP policies, and republican states are much less likely to introduce mask-wearing policies. The choices of both types of policies are influenced more by political than public health considerations.
papers.zh_title: 美国应对COVID-19的政治经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 通过居家令进行社交距离以及佩戴口罩，已成为抗击COVID-19最有效的非药物手段。在美国，这些政策的选择由各州自行决定。我们开发了一个博弈论模型，然后对其进行计量经济学检验，表明一个州的政策选择受到其他州选择的强烈影响。如果有足够多的州采取社交距离或佩戴口罩措施，它们将促使尚未这样做的其他州效仿，从而改变纳什均衡。如果政治倾向相似的州之间的互动最强，则可能存在均衡，其中不同政治倾向的州采取不同策略。在这种情况下，一组具有某种政治倾向的州可能通过改变其选择来影响其他相同倾向的州，但不会影响那些倾向不同的州。我们使用probit和logit回归对这些想法进行了实证检验，并发现强有力的证据表明州际社会强化很重要，且均衡可以被改变。政策选择主要受其他州选择的影响，尤其是那些政治倾向相似的州，而受新增COVID-19病例数量的影响则小得多。佩戴口罩政策的选择比其他州对居家令政策的选择更敏感，共和党州更不可能引入佩戴口罩政策。两种类型政策的选择受政治因素而非公共卫生考虑的影响更大。

papers.title: Oh, How the Mighty Have Fallen: The Bank Failures and Near Failures That Started America’s Greatest Financial Panics
papers.authors: Hugh Rockoff
papers.abstract: This is my presidential address to the Economic History Association that was delivered in September 2020. It examines the failures or in some cases near-failures, of financial institutions that started the 12 most severe peacetime financial panics in the United States, beginning with the Panic of 1819 and ending with the Panic of 2008. The following generalizations were true in most cases, although not in all. (1) Panics were triggered by a short series of failures or near-failures; (2) many of the failing institutions were what we would now call shadow banks; (3) typically, the source of trouble was an excessive investment in real estate; and (4) typically, they had outstanding reputations for trustworthiness, prudence, and financial acumen—before they failed. It appears that in these respects the Panic of 2008 was an old-school panic.
papers.zh_title: 啊，强者如何陨落：引发美国最严重金融恐慌的银行倒闭与濒临倒闭事件
papers.zh_abstract: 这是我于2020年9月向经济史协会发表的主席演讲。它考察了引发美国12次最严重和平时期金融恐慌的金融机构倒闭或某些情况下的濒临倒闭事件，从1819年恐慌开始，到2008年恐慌结束。以下概括在大多数情况下成立，尽管并非全部。（1）恐慌是由一系列短暂的倒闭或濒临倒闭事件引发的；（2）许多倒闭的机构是我们现在所称的影子银行；（3）通常，问题的根源是对房地产的过度投资；（4）通常，它们在倒闭之前，在可信度、审慎性和金融敏锐度方面享有卓越声誉。在这些方面，2008年恐慌似乎是一场老式恐慌。

papers.title: Trading Spaces: Medicare’s Regulatory Spillovers on Treatment Setting for Non-Medicare Patients
papers.authors: Michael Geruso, Michael R. Richards
papers.abstract: Medicare pricing is known to indirectly influence provider prices and care provision for non-Medicare patients; however, Medicare's regulatory externalities beyond fee-setting are less well understood. We study how physicians' outpatient surgery choices for non­-Medicare patients responded to Medicare removing a ban on ambulatory surgery center (ASC) use for a specific procedure. Following the rule change, surgeons began reallocating both Medicare and commercially insured patients to ASCs. Specifically, physicians became 70% more likely to use ASCs for the policy-­targeted procedure among their non-Medicare patients. These novel findings demonstrate that Medicare rulemaking affects physician behavior beyond the program's statutory scope.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, PE；JEL：H23, H42, H51, I11, I13, I18
papers.zh_title: 空间转换：Medicare对非Medicare患者治疗场所的监管溢出效应
papers.zh_abstract: 众所周知，Medicare定价会间接影响非Medicare患者的提供者价格和护理提供；然而，Medicare在费用设定之外的监管外部性尚不十分清楚。我们研究了医生为非Medicare患者选择门诊手术时，如何应对Medicare取消对特定手术使用门诊手术中心（ASC）的禁令。在规则变更后，外科医生开始将Medicare和商业保险患者都重新分配到ASC。具体来说，对于其非Medicare患者，医生对政策目标手术使用ASC的可能性增加了70%。这些新颖的发现表明，Medicare的规则制定会影响医生在项目法定范围之外的行为。

papers.title: The Causal Effect of Depression and Anxiety on Life Satisfaction: An Instrumental Variable Approach
papers.authors: Arnar Buason, Edward C. Norton, Paul McNamee, Edda Bjork Thordardottir, Tinna Laufey Asgeirsdóttir
papers.abstract: Within the vast body of literature on the relationship between mental disorders and life satisfaction, no satisfactory treatment has been proposed to deal with the bi-directional relationship between the two. We estimate the causal effect of depression and anxiety on life satisfaction by applying an instrumental-variable regression approach to the Household, Income and Labour Dynamics in Australia (HILDA) survey. Our identification strategy exploits regional variation in the tendency to diagnose depression and anxiety, while also using an individual-level panel-data method. Our results show that previous research seriously overestimates the effect of depression and anxiety on life satisfaction. The most comparable estimate from previous research is over five times the size of our estimate. Furthermore, those papers that use such estimates to measure the monetary value of not suffering from depression or anxiety find it to be between $14 to $600 million a year per individual, compared to our estimate of around $60 thousand. Another source of bias which further inflates previous monetary estimates is the endogeneity of income. We account for this issue by using irregular sources of income, such as lottery winnings, instead of regular household income.
papers.zh_title: 抑郁和焦虑对生活满意度的因果效应：一种工具变量方法
papers.zh_abstract: 在关于精神障碍与生活满意度之间关系的大量文献中，尚未提出令人满意的处理方法来解决两者之间的双向关系。我们通过将工具变量回归方法应用于澳大利亚家庭、收入和劳动力动态调查（HILDA），估计了抑郁和焦虑对生活满意度的因果效应。我们的识别策略利用了诊断抑郁和焦虑倾向的地区差异，同时采用了个体层面的面板数据方法。我们的结果表明，先前的研究严重高估了抑郁和焦虑对生活满意度的影响。先前研究中最为可比的估计值是我们估计值的五倍多。此外，那些使用此类估计值来衡量不患抑郁或焦虑的货币价值的论文发现，每人每年的价值在1400万至6亿美元之间，而我们的估计值约为6万美元。另一个进一步夸大先前货币估计值的偏差来源是收入的内生性。我们通过使用非经常性收入来源（如彩票中奖）而非常规家庭收入来解决这个问题。

papers.title: The Mortgage Piggy Bank: Building Wealth through Amortization
papers.authors: Asaf Bernstein, Peter Koudijs
papers.abstract: Mortgage amortization schedules are among the largest savings plans in the world (e.g. U.S. households contribute hundreds of billions of dollars annually to these “mortgage piggy banks”). However, little is known about their effects on wealth accumulation. Ex-ante, effects are unclear. It depends on the fungibility of home equity and other savings, and households’ willingness to adjust consumption or leisure. Empirically, effects are difficult to identify since amortization and other savings choices are typically codetermined. We overcome this challenge by utilizing a 2013 Dutch reform that increased amortization requirements for new mortgages. Using detailed administrative data, we compare savings decisions for home-buyers right before or after the reform. We use plausibly exogenous variation in the timing of home purchase coming from life-events (e.g. birth of a child) to address selection concerns. Dynamic difference-in- difference estimates support the parallel trend assumption. We find that marginal wealth-building from amortization (MWA) is substantial. Remarkably, households leave other savings untouched and cut consumption and leisure instead, implying a near 1-for-1 rise in net-worth. Results hold at least five years out when additional amortization-induced home equity is larger than other savings. The effect is ubiquitous, holding for unconstrained households, who could easily offset additional amortization, and movers, suggesting a broad applicability of our results. Consistent with a simple model, we do find that estimates are lower for households who appear less financially sophisticated or less willing to adjust short-term consumption. Overall, our results highlight the critical importance of mortgage amortization for household wealth-building and macroprudential policies.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, CF, LS, PE；JEL：D14, D15, E21, E6, G21, G4, G5, G51, J2, R3
papers.zh_title: 抵押贷款储蓄罐：通过分期偿还积累财富
papers.zh_abstract: 抵押贷款分期偿还计划是世界上最大的储蓄计划之一（例如，美国家庭每年向这些“抵押贷款储蓄罐”贡献数千亿美元）。然而，关于它们对财富积累的影响却知之甚少。事前来看，影响尚不明确。这取决于房屋净值和其他储蓄的可替代性，以及家庭调整消费或休闲的意愿。实证上，由于分期偿还和其他储蓄选择通常是共同决定的，因此难以识别其影响。我们通过利用2013年荷兰一项提高新抵押贷款分期偿还要求的改革来克服这一挑战。利用详细的行政数据，我们比较了改革前后购房者的储蓄决策。我们使用来自生活事件（例如孩子出生）的购房时间的外生变化来处理选择性问题。动态双重差分估计支持平行趋势假设。我们发现，通过分期偿还进行边际财富积累（MWA）是显著的。值得注意的是，家庭不碰其他储蓄，而是削减消费和休闲，这意味着净资产几乎一比一增长。结果在至少五年内成立，此时额外的分期偿还导致的房屋净值大于其他储蓄。这种效应普遍存在，对于能够轻松抵消额外分期偿还的无约束家庭以及搬家者都成立，表明我们的结果具有广泛的适用性。与一个简单模型一致，我们确实发现，对于看起来财务知识较少或不太愿意调整短期消费的家庭，估计值较低。总体而言，我们的结果凸显了抵押贷款分期偿还对于家庭财富积累和宏观审慎政策的关键重要性。

papers.title: JUE Insight: The Impacts of Opportunity Zones on Zone Residents
papers.authors: Matthew Freedman, Shantanu Khanna, David Neumark
papers.abstract: The Opportunity Zone program, created by the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act in 2017, was designed to encourage investment in distressed communities across the U.S. We examine the early impacts (up to one-and-a-half years after enactment) of the Opportunity Zone program on residents of targeted areas. We leverage restricted-access microdata from the American Community Survey and employ a matching approach to estimate causal reduced-form effects of the program. Our results point to little or no evidence of positive effects of the Opportunity Zone program on the employment, earnings, or poverty of zone residents.
papers.zh_title: JUE洞察：机会区对区内居民的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 机会区计划由2017年《减税与就业法案》创建，旨在鼓励对美国各地陷入困境的社区进行投资。我们考察了机会区计划对目标区域居民的早期影响（颁布后长达一年半）。我们利用美国社区调查的限制访问微观数据，并采用匹配方法来估计该计划的因果简化形式效应。我们的结果表明，几乎没有或没有证据表明机会区计划对区内居民的就业、收入或贫困产生了积极影响。

papers.title: Unequal Jury Representation and Its Consequences
papers.authors: Shamena Anwar, Patrick Bayer, Randi Hjalmarsson
papers.abstract: We analyze the extent and consequences of unequal representation on juries in Harris County, Texas. We first document that residents from predominantly white and high-income neighborhoods are substantially over-represented on juries. Using quasi-random variation in those called for jury duty each day, we next establish that Black defendants are more likely to be convicted and receive longer sentences from juries with more residents from these overrepresented neighborhoods. We estimate that equal representation would reduce Black defendants’ median sentence length by 50% and the probability of receiving a life sentence by 67%. Straightforward remedies could mitigate these legally unwarranted racial disparities.
papers.zh_title: 不平等的陪审团代表及其后果
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了德克萨斯州哈里斯县陪审团中不平等代表的程度和后果。我们首先记录到，来自以白人和高收入社区为主的居民在陪审团中占比过高。接下来，利用每天被传唤履行陪审义务者的准随机变化，我们确定，来自这些代表过多社区的居民更多的陪审团，更有可能判定黑人被告有罪并判处更长的刑期。我们估计，平等代表将使黑人被告的中位刑期减少50%，并使其被判终身监禁的概率降低67%。直接的补救措施可以减轻这些法律上不合理的种族差异。

papers.title: SVARs With Occasionally-Binding Constraints
papers.authors: S. Borağan Aruoba, Marko Mlikota, Frank Schorfheide, Sergio Villalvazo
papers.abstract: We develop a structural VAR in which an occasionally-binding constraint generates censoring of one of the dependent variables. Once the censoring mechanism is triggered, we allow some of the coefficients for the remaining variables to change. We show that a necessary condition for a unique reduced form is that regression functions for the non-censored variables are continuous at the censoring point and that parameters satisfy some mild restrictions. In our application the censored variable is a nominal interest rate constrained by an effective lower bound (ELB). According to our estimates based on U.S. data, once the ELB becomes binding, the coefficients in the inflation equation change significantly, which translates into a change of the inflation responses to (unconventional) monetary policy and demand shocks. Our results suggest that the presence of the ELB is indeed empirically relevant for the propagation of shocks. We also obtain a shadow interest rate that shows a significant accommodation in the early parts of the Great Recession, followed by a mild and steady accommodation until liftoff in 2016.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ME；JEL：C11, C22, C34, E32, E52
papers.zh_title: 具有偶发性约束的SVAR模型
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个结构向量自回归模型，其中偶发性约束导致其中一个因变量被截断。一旦截断机制被触发，我们允许剩余变量的一些系数发生变化。我们证明，简化形式唯一存在的必要条件是，非截断变量的回归函数在截断点处连续，且参数满足一些温和的限制条件。在我们的应用中，被截断的变量是受有效下限约束的名义利率。根据我们基于美国数据的估计，一旦有效下限变得具有约束力，通胀方程中的系数会显著变化，这转化为通胀对（非常规）货币政策和需求冲击的响应发生变化。我们的结果表明，有效下限的存在确实在经验上与冲击的传导相关。我们还获得了一个影子利率，该利率在大衰退初期显示出显著的宽松，随后是温和而稳定的宽松，直至2016年加息。

papers.title: Testing for Parameter Instability and Structural Change in Persistent Predictive Regressions
papers.authors: Torben G. Andersen, Rasmus T. Varneskov
papers.abstract: This paper develops parameter instability and structural change tests within predictive regressions for economic systems governed by persistent vector autoregressive dynamics. Specifically, in a setting where all – or a subset – of the variables may be fractionally integrated and the predictive relation may feature cointegration, we provide sup-Wald break tests that are constructed using the Local speCtruM (LCM) approach. The new tests cover both parameter variation and multiple structural changes with unknown break dates, and the number of breaks being known or unknown. We establish asymptotic limit theory for the tests, showing that it coincides with standard testing procedures. As a consequence, existing critical values for tied-down Bessel processes may be applied, without modification. We implement the new structural change tests to explore the stability of the fractionally cointegrating relation between implied- and realized volatility (IV and RV). Moreover, we assess the relative efficiency of IV forecasts against a challenging time-series benchmark constructed from high-frequency data. Unlike existing studies, we find evidence that the IV-RV cointegrating relation is unstable, and that carefully constructed time-series forecasts are more efficient than IV in capturing low-frequency movements in RV.
papers.zh_title: 持久性预测回归中参数不稳定性和结构变化的检验
papers.zh_abstract: 本文在由持久向量自回归动态支配的经济系统的预测回归中，开发了参数不稳定性和结构变化检验。具体而言，在全部或部分变量可能是分数阶积分且预测关系可能具有协整性的设定下，我们提供了使用局部谱方法构建的sup-Wald断点检验。这些新检验涵盖了参数变化和具有未知断点日期的多重结构变化，且断点数量已知或未知。我们为这些检验建立了渐近极限理论，表明其与标准检验程序一致。因此，现有的针对有界贝塞尔过程的临界值可以直接应用，无需修改。我们实施新的结构变化检验，以探索隐含波动率与已实现波动率之间分数阶协整关系的稳定性。此外，我们评估了隐含波动率预测相对于一个由高频数据构建的具有挑战性的时间序列基准的相对效率。与现有研究不同，我们发现隐含波动率与已实现波动率之间的协整关系不稳定的证据，并且精心构建的时间序列预测在捕捉已实现波动率的低频运动方面比隐含波动率更有效。

papers.title: Consistent Local Spectrum (LCM) Inference for Predictive Return Regressions
papers.authors: Torben G. Andersen, Rasmus T. Varneskov
papers.abstract: This paper studies the properties of predictive regressions for asset returns in economic systems governed by persistent vector autoregressive dynamics. In particular, we allow for the state variables to be fractionally integrated, potentially of different orders, and for the returns to have a latent persistent conditional mean, whose memory is difficult to estimate consistently by standard techniques in finite samples. Moreover, the predictors may be endogenous and “imperfect”. In this setting, we develop a consistent Local speCtruM (LCM) estimation procedure, that delivers asymptotic Gaussian inference. Furthermore, we provide a new LCM-based estimator of the conditional mean persistence, that leverages biased regression slopes as well as new LCM-based tests for significance of (a subset of) the predictors, which are valid even without estimating the return persistence. Simulations illustrate the theoretical arguments. Finally, in an empirical application to monthly S&P 500 return predictions, we provide evidence for a fractionally integrated conditional mean component. Moreover, using our new LCM procedure and tools, we document significant predictive power for key state variables such as the default spread and treasury interest rates.
papers.zh_title: 预测性收益回归的一致局部谱推断
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了在由持久向量自回归动态支配的经济系统中，资产收益预测回归的性质。具体而言，我们允许状态变量是分数阶积分的，可能具有不同阶数，并且允许收益具有一个潜在的持久条件均值，其记忆性在有限样本中难以通过标准技术一致估计。此外，预测变量可能是内生的且“不完美的”。在此设定下，我们开发了一个一致的局部谱估计程序，该程序提供渐近高斯推断。此外，我们提供了一个新的基于局部谱的条件均值持久性估计量，该估计量利用了有偏的回归斜率，以及新的基于局部谱的预测变量（子集）显著性检验，这些检验即使在未估计收益持久性的情况下也有效。模拟说明了理论论证。最后，在月度标普500指数收益预测的实证应用中，我们提供了分数阶积分条件均值成分的证据。此外，使用我们新的局部谱程序和工具，我们记录了关键状态变量（如违约利差和国债利率）的显著预测能力。

papers.title: Consistent Inference for Predictive Regressions in Persistent Economic Systems
papers.authors: Torben G. Andersen, Rasmus T. Varneskov
papers.abstract: We study standard predictive regressions in economic systems governed by persistent vector autoregressive dynamics for the state variables. In particular, all – or a subset – of the variables may be fractionally integrated, which induces a spurious regression problem. We propose a new inference and testing procedure – the Local speCtruM (LCM) approach – for joint significance of the regressors, that is robust against the variables having different integration orders and remains valid regardless of whether predictors are significant and if they induce cointegration. Specifically, the LCM procedure is based on fractional filtering and band-spectrum regression using a suitably selected set of frequency ordinates. Contrary to existing procedures, we establish a uniform Gaussian limit theory and a standard χ2-distributed test statistic. Using LCM inference and testing techniques, we explore predictive regressions for the realized return variation. Standard least squares inference indicates that popular financial and macroeconomic variables convey valuable information about future return volatility. In contrast, we find no significant evidence using our robust LCM procedure. If anything, our tests support a reverse chain of causality: rising financial volatility predates adverse innovations to macroeconomic variables. Simulations illustrate the relevance of the theoretical arguments for finite-sample inference.
papers.zh_title: 持久经济系统中预测回归的一致推断
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了由状态变量的持久向量自回归动态支配的经济系统中的标准预测回归。具体而言，全部或部分变量可能是分数阶积分的，这会导致伪回归问题。我们提出了一种新的推断和检验程序——局部谱方法——用于回归变量的联合显著性，该方法对变量具有不同积分阶数具有稳健性，并且无论预测变量是否显著以及是否诱导协整，都保持有效。具体来说，局部谱程序基于分数滤波和使用适当选择的频率坐标的带谱回归。与现有程序相反，我们建立了统一的高斯极限理论和标准的χ²分布检验统计量。使用局部谱推断和检验技术，我们探索了已实现收益变异的预测回归。标准最小二乘推断表明，流行的金融和宏观经济变量传达了关于未来收益波动性的有价值信息。相比之下，使用我们稳健的局部谱程序，我们没有发现显著证据。如果有的话，我们的检验支持反向因果关系链：金融波动性上升先于宏观经济变量的不利冲击。模拟说明了理论论证对有限样本推断的相关性。

papers.title: The Impact of the Federal Pandemic Unemployment Compensation on Job Search and Vacancy Creation
papers.authors: Ioana Marinescu, Daphne Skandalis, Daniel Zhao
papers.abstract: During the COVID-19 pandemic, the Federal Pandemic Unemployment Compensation (FPUC) increased US unemployment benefits by $600 a week. Theory predicts that FPUC will decrease job applications, and could decrease vacancy creation. We estimate the effect of FPUC on job applications and vacancy creation week by week, from March to July 2020, using granular data from the online jobs platform Glassdoor. We exploit variation in the proportional increase in benefits across local labor markets. To isolate the effect of FPUC, we flexibly allow for different trends in local labor markets differentially exposed to the COVID-19 crisis. We verify that trends in outcomes prior to the FPUC do not correlate with future increases in benefits, which supports our identification assumption. First, we find that a 10% increase in unemployment benefits caused a 3.6% decline in applications, but did not decrease vacancy creation; hence, FPUC increased tightness (vacancies/applications). Second, we document that tightness was unusually depressed during the FPUC period. Altogether, our results imply that the positive effect of FPUC on tightness was welfare improving: FPUC decreased competition among applicants at a time when jobs were unusually scarce. Our results also help explain prior findings that FPUC did not decrease employment.
papers.zh_title: 联邦大流行失业补偿对求职和职位创造的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 在COVID-19大流行期间，联邦大流行失业补偿将美国失业救济金每周增加了600美元。理论预测，联邦大流行失业补偿将减少求职申请，并可能减少职位创造。我们利用在线求职平台Glassdoor的细粒度数据，估计了2020年3月至7月期间联邦大流行失业补偿对求职申请和职位创造的逐周影响。我们利用了不同地方劳动力市场福利比例增加的差异。为了隔离联邦大流行失业补偿的影响，我们灵活地允许受COVID-19危机影响程度不同的地方劳动力市场存在不同趋势。我们验证了联邦大流行失业补偿实施前的结果趋势与未来福利增加不相关，这支持了我们的识别假设。首先，我们发现失业救济金增加10%导致求职申请减少3.6%，但并未减少职位创造；因此，联邦大流行失业补偿增加了市场紧张度（职位/申请）。其次，我们记录了联邦大流行失业补偿期间市场紧张度异常低迷。总体而言，我们的结果表明联邦大流行失业补偿对市场紧张度的积极影响改善了福利：在就业机会异常稀缺的时期，联邦大流行失业补偿减少了求职者之间的竞争。我们的结果也有助于解释先前关于联邦大流行失业补偿并未减少就业的发现。

papers.title: Family Companionship and Elderly Suicide: Evidence from the Chinese Lunar New Year
papers.authors: Hanming Fang, Ziteng Lei, Liguo Lin, Peng Zhang
papers.abstract: Mental health problems among the elderly have attracted increasing attention. The most serious mental health problems may result in suicide, and lack of family companionship is often speculated to be a major cause. In this paper, we use high-frequency suicide rate data and utilize a novel temporal variation in the lunisolar calendar to provide evidence on the protective effects of the Chinese Lunar New Year (when the elderly people receive unusually high level of family companionship) on elderly suicide. We find that elderly suicide rate decreases by 8.7% during the Chinese Lunar New Year. In addition, the protective effects are stronger in counties where the typical level of daily family companionship for the elderly is lower. By contrast, we do not find similar protective effects for young and middle-age cohorts. We consider a variety of alternative mechanisms, and conclude that family companionship is an important channel for the protective effects of the Chinese Lunar New Year. Our study calls for greater attention to the mental health status and suicide problem of the elderly, especially with the rapid population aging and increasing prevalence of the “empty-nest” elderly in developing countries.
papers.zh_title: 家庭陪伴与老年人自杀：来自中国农历新年的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 老年人的心理健康问题日益受到关注。最严重的心理健康问题可能导致自杀，而缺乏家庭陪伴常被推测是主要原因之一。在本文中，我们利用高频自杀率数据，并利用阴阳历中新颖的时间变化，提供了中国农历新年（此时老年人获得异常高的家庭陪伴）对老年人自杀保护作用的证据。我们发现，在中国农历新年期间，老年人自杀率下降了8.7%。此外，在老年人日常家庭陪伴典型水平较低的县，这种保护作用更强。相比之下，我们没有发现对年轻和中年群体有类似的保护作用。我们考虑了多种替代机制，并得出结论，家庭陪伴是中国农历新年保护作用的重要渠道。我们的研究呼吁更多地关注老年人的心理健康状况和自杀问题，特别是在发展中国家人口快速老龄化和“空巢”老人日益普遍的背景下。

papers.title: Stochastic Earnings Growth and Equilibrium Wealth Distributions
papers.authors: Thomas J. Sargent, Neng Wang, Jinqiang Yang
papers.abstract: The cross-section distribution of U.S. wealth is more skewed than the distribution of labor earnings. Stachurski and Toda (2019) explain how plain vanilla Bewley-Aiyagari-Huggett (BAH) models with infinitely lived agents can't generate that pattern because an equilibrium risk-free rate is lower than the time rate of preference and each person's wealth process is stationary. We provide two modifications of a BAH model that generate this pattern: (1) overlapping generations of agents who have low wealth at birth and pass through N life-stage transitions of stochastic lengths, and (2) labor-earnings processes that exhibit stochastic growth. With only a few parameters such a model can well approximate mappings from the Lorenz curve and Gini coefficient for cross-sections of labor earnings to their counterparts for cross sections of wealth. Three forces amplify inequality in wealth relative to inequality in labor-earnings: stochastic life-stage transitions; a precautionary savings motive for high wage earners that is especially strong after they receive positive permanent earnings shocks; and an energetic life-cycle saving motive for agents who have low wealth at birth. An equilibrium risk-free interest rate that exceeds a time preference rate fosters a fat-tailed wealth distribution.
papers.zh_title: 随机收入增长与均衡财富分布
papers.zh_abstract: 美国财富的横截面分布比劳动收入的分布更偏斜。Stachurski和Toda（2019）解释了为什么具有无限期生命主体的标准Bewley-Aiyagari-Huggett（BAH）模型无法产生这种模式，因为均衡无风险利率低于时间偏好率，且每个人的财富过程是平稳的。我们提供了BAH模型的两种修改以产生这种模式：（1）代际交叠的主体，他们在出生时财富较低，并经历N个随机长度的生命阶段转换；（2）表现出随机增长的收入过程。仅用少数几个参数，这样的模型就能很好地近似从劳动收入横截面的洛伦兹曲线和基尼系数到财富横截面对应项的映射。三种力量放大了财富不平等相对于劳动收入不平等的程度：随机的生命阶段转换；高收入者因预防性储蓄动机，在收到正向永久性收入冲击后尤为强烈；以及出生时财富较低的主体具有旺盛的生命周期储蓄动机。超过时间偏好率的均衡无风险利率促进了厚尾财富分布的形成。

papers.title: Dry Bulk Shipping and the Evolution of Maritime Transport Costs, 1850-2020
papers.authors: David S. Jacks, Martin Stuermer
papers.abstract: We provide evidence on the dynamic effects of fuel price shocks, shipping demand shocks, and shipping supply shocks on real dry bulk freight rates in the long run. We first analyze a new dataset on dry bulk freight rates for the period from 1850 to 2020, finding that they followed a downward but undulating path with a cumulative decline of 79%. Next, we turn to understanding the drivers of booms and busts in the dry bulk shipping industry, finding that shipping demand shocks strongly dominate all others as drivers of real dry bulk freight rates in the long run. Furthermore, while shipping demand shocks have increased in importance over time, shipping supply shocks in particular have become less relevant.
papers.zh_title: 干散货航运与海运成本的演变（1850-2020）
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供了关于燃料价格冲击、航运需求冲击和航运供给冲击对长期实际干散货运费率的动态影响的证据。我们首先分析了1850年至2020年期间干散货运费率的新数据集，发现其呈现下降但波动的路径，累计下降了79%。接下来，我们转而理解干散货航运业繁荣与萧条的驱动因素，发现航运需求冲击在长期内作为实际干散货运费率的驱动因素，显著主导所有其他因素。此外，虽然航运需求冲击的重要性随时间增加，但航运供给冲击尤其变得不那么相关。

papers.title: Using Machine Learning and Qualitative Interviews to Design a Five-Question Women's Agency Index
papers.authors: Seema Jayachandran, Monica Biradavolu, Jan Cooper
papers.abstract: We propose a new method to design a short survey measure of a complex concept such as women's agency. The approach combines mixed-methods data collection and machine learning. We select the best survey questions based on how strongly correlated they are with a "gold standard'' measure of the concept derived from qualitative interviews. In our application, we measure agency for 209 women in Haryana, India, first, through a semi-structured interview and, second, through a large set of close-ended questions. We use qualitative coding methods to score each woman's agency based on the interview, which we treat as her true agency. To identify the close-ended questions most predictive of the "truth," we apply statistical algorithms that build on LASSO and random forest but constrain how many variables are selected for the model (five in our case). The resulting five-question index is as strongly correlated with the coded qualitative interview as is an index that uses all of the candidate questions. This approach of selecting survey questions based on their statistical correspondence to coded qualitative interviews could be used to design short survey modules for many other latent constructs.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, LS；JEL：C83, D13, J16, O12
papers.zh_title: 利用机器学习和定性访谈设计一个五题女性能动性指数
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种新方法，用于设计衡量女性能动性等复杂概念的简短调查指标。该方法结合了混合方法数据收集和机器学习。我们根据调查问题与源自定性访谈的该概念“黄金标准”衡量指标的相关性强弱，来选择最佳调查问题。在我们的应用中，我们首先通过半结构化访谈，其次通过大量封闭式问题，衡量了印度哈里亚纳邦209名女性的能动性。我们使用定性编码方法，根据访谈对每位女性的能动性进行评分，并将其视为其真实能动性。为了识别最能预测“真相”的封闭式问题，我们应用了基于LASSO和随机森林但限制模型选择变量数量（本例中为五个）的统计算法。由此产生的五题指数与编码后的定性访谈的相关性，与使用所有候选问题的指数一样强。这种根据问题与编码定性访谈的统计对应性来选择调查问题的方法，可用于为许多其他潜在构念设计简短的调查模块。

papers.title: The Effect of Macroeconomic Uncertainty on Household Spending
papers.authors: Olivier Coibion, Dimitris Georgarakos, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Geoff Kenny, Michael Weber
papers.abstract: Using a new survey of European households, we study how exogenous variation in the macroeconomic uncertainty perceived by households affects their spending decisions. We use randomized information treatments that provide different types of information about the first and/or second moments of future economic growth to generate exogenous changes in the perceived macroeconomic uncertainty of some households. The effects on their spending decisions relative to an untreated control group are measured in follow-up surveys. Higher macroeconomic uncertainty induces households to reduce their spending on non-durable goods and services in subsequent months as well as to engage in fewer purchases of larger items such as package holidays or luxury goods. Moreover, uncertainty reduces household propensity to invest in mutual funds. These results support the notion that macroeconomic uncertainty can impact household decisions and have large negative effects on economic outcomes.
papers.zh_title: 宏观经济不确定性对家庭支出的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 利用一项针对欧洲家庭的新调查，我们研究了家庭感知到的宏观经济不确定性的外生变化如何影响其支出决策。我们使用随机信息处理，提供关于未来经济增长第一和/或第二矩的不同类型信息，以引起部分家庭感知到的宏观经济不确定性的外生变化。在后续调查中测量了这些变化相对于未处理对照组对其支出决策的影响。更高的宏观经济不确定性促使家庭在随后几个月减少非耐用品和服务的支出，并减少购买诸如包价旅游或奢侈品等大件物品。此外，不确定性降低了家庭投资共同基金的倾向。这些结果支持了宏观经济不确定性能够影响家庭决策并对经济结果产生巨大负面影响的观点。

papers.title: Discontinued Positive Feedback Trading and the Decline of Return Predictability
papers.authors: Itzhak Ben-David, Jiacui Li, Andrea Rossi, Yang Song
papers.abstract: We show that demand effects generated by institutional frictions can influence systematic return predictability patterns in stocks and mutual funds. Identification relies on a reform to the Morningstar rating system, which we show caused a structural break in style-level positive feedback trading by mutual funds. As a result, momentum-related factors in stocks, as well as performance persistence and the “dumb money effect” in mutual funds, experienced sharp decline. Consistent with the proposed channel, return predictability declined right after the reform, was limited to the U.S. market, and was concentrated in factors and mutual funds most exposed to the mechanism.
papers.zh_title: 中断的正反馈交易与回报可预测性的下降
papers.zh_abstract: 我们表明，由制度摩擦产生的需求效应可以影响股票和共同基金中系统性的回报可预测模式。识别依赖于晨星评级系统的改革，我们证明该改革导致了共同基金在风格层面的正反馈交易的结构性断裂。结果，股票中的动量相关因子，以及共同基金中的业绩持续性和“傻钱效应”，都经历了急剧下降。与所提出的渠道一致，回报可预测性在改革后立即下降，仅限于美国市场，并集中在受该机制影响最大的因子和共同基金中。

papers.title: When Did Growth Begin? New Estimates of Productivity Growth in England from 1250 to 1870
papers.authors: Paul Bouscasse, Emi Nakamura, Jón Steinsson
papers.abstract: We estimate productivity growth in England from 1250 to 1870. Real wages over this period were heavily influenced by plague-induced swings in the population. Our estimates account for these Malthusian dynamics. We find that productivity growth was zero prior to 1600. Productivity growth began in 1600—almost a century before the Glorious Revolution. Thus, the onset of productivity growth preceded the bourgeois institutional reforms of 17th century England. We estimate productivity growth of 2% per decade between 1600 and 1800, increasing to 5% per decade between 1810 and 1860. Much of the increase in output growth during the Industrial Revolution is explained by structural change—the falling importance of land in production—rather than faster productivity growth. Stagnant real wages in the 18th and early 19th centuries—“Engel’s Pause”—is explained by rapid population growth putting downward pressure on real wages. Yet, feedback from population growth to real wages is sufficiently weak to permit sustained deviations from the “iron law of wages” prior to the Industrial Revolution.
papers.zh_title: 增长始于何时？1250年至1870年英格兰生产率增长的新估计
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估算了1250年至1870年英格兰的生产率增长。这一时期实际工资深受瘟疫引起的人口波动的影响。我们的估计考虑了这些马尔萨斯动态。我们发现，1600年之前生产率增长为零。生产率增长始于1600年——几乎比光荣革命早一个世纪。因此，生产率增长的出现先于17世纪英格兰的资产阶级制度改革。我们估计1600年至1800年间生产率增长为每十年2%，在1810年至1860年间增加到每十年5%。工业革命期间产出增长的大部分增长由结构变化——土地在生产中重要性的下降——而非更快的生产率增长来解释。18世纪和19世纪初实际工资停滞——“恩格斯停顿”——由快速人口增长对实际工资施加下行压力来解释。然而，人口增长对实际工资的反馈足够弱，以至于在工业革命之前允许持续偏离“工资铁律”。

papers.title: Body-Worn Cameras in Policing: Benefits and Costs
papers.authors: Morgan C. Williams Jr., Nathan Weil, Elizabeth A. Rasich, Jens Ludwig, Hye Chang, Sophia Egrari
papers.abstract: Body-worn cameras (BWCs) are an increasingly common tool for police oversight, accountability, and transparency, yet there remains uncertainty about their impacts on policing outcomes. This paper reviews what we know about the benefits of BWCs and how those benefits compare to the costs of this new technology. We make two contributions relative to existing research. First, we update prior meta-analyses of studies of the impacts of BWCs on policing outcomes to incorporate the most recent, and largest, studies carried out to date in this literature. This additional information provides additional support for the idea that cameras may affect a number of policing outcomes that are important from a social welfare perspective, particularly police use of force. Second, we carry out a benefit-cost analysis of BWCs, as financial barriers are often cited as a key impediment to adoption by police departments. Our baseline estimate for the benefit-cost ratio of BWCs is 4.95. Perhaps as much as one-quarter of the estimated benefits accrue to government budgets directly, which suggests the possibility that this technology could, from the narrow perspective of government budgets, even pay for itself.
papers.zh_title: 执法记录仪在警务中的收益与成本
papers.zh_abstract: 执法记录仪是用于警察监督、问责和透明度的一种日益普遍的工具，但其对警务结果的影响仍存在不确定性。本文回顾了我们对执法记录仪收益的了解，以及这些收益与这项新技术的成本相比如何。我们相对于现有研究做出了两项贡献。首先，我们更新了先前关于执法记录仪对警务结果影响研究的元分析，以纳入该文献迄今为止进行的最新、规模最大的研究。这些额外信息进一步支持了这样一种观点，即摄像头可能影响从社会福利角度来看重要的若干警务结果，特别是警察使用武力。其次，我们对执法记录仪进行了收益-成本分析，因为财务障碍常被引为警察部门采用该技术的关键障碍。我们对执法记录仪收益-成本比率的基线估计为4.95。估计收益中多达四分之一可能直接归于政府预算，这表明从政府预算的狭隘角度来看，这项技术甚至可能收回成本。

papers.title: Public Health Policy at Scale: Impact of a Government-sponsored Information Campaign on Infant Mortality in Denmark
papers.authors: Onur Altindag, Jane Greve, Erdal Tekin
papers.abstract: We evaluate the impact of a nationwide public health intervention on deaths from sudden infant death syndrome (SIDS), using population data from Denmark in a regression discontinuity research design. The information campaign–implemented primarily through a universal nurse home visiting program–reduced infant mortality by 17.2 percent and saved between 11.6-13.5 lives over 10,000 births. The estimated effect sizes are 11-14 times larger among low birthweight and preterm infants relative to the overall population. Improvement in infant mortality is concentrated among those with low socio-economic status and with limited access to health information, thereby reducing health inequities at birth.
papers.zh_title: 大规模公共卫生政策：政府资助的信息运动对丹麦婴儿死亡率的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用丹麦的人口数据，采用断点回归设计，评估了一项全国性公共卫生干预措施对婴儿猝死综合征死亡的影响。该信息运动——主要通过一项普遍的护士家访计划实施——使婴儿死亡率降低了17.2%，并在每10,000名新生儿中挽救了11.6至13.5条生命。在低出生体重和早产婴儿中，估计的效果大小是总体人群的11至14倍。婴儿死亡率的改善集中在社会经济地位较低和获取健康信息机会有限的群体中，从而减少了出生时的健康不平等。

papers.title: Carbon Policy and the Emissions Implications of Electric Vehicles
papers.authors: Kenneth Gillingham, Marten Ovaere, Stephanie M. Weber
papers.abstract: Will a carbon tax improve the welfare consequences of policies to promote electric vehicles? This paper examines when a complementarity could exist between carbon pricing and high electric vehicle adoption. We analyze electricity generation in recent years to show that in several regions, carbon pricing interacts with electric vehicle adoption. Under moderate carbon prices like those in effect today, additional electric vehicles will be more likely to be charged with coal-fired generation than without carbon pricing. We confirm this finding using a detailed dynamic model that includes the transportation and power sectors. At much higher carbon prices, the effect reverses.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE；JEL：H23, Q48, Q53, Q54, Q58, R48
papers.zh_title: 碳政策与电动汽车的排放影响
papers.zh_abstract: 碳税会改善促进电动汽车政策的福利后果吗？本文考察了碳定价与高电动汽车普及率之间何时可能存在互补性。我们分析了近年来的发电情况，以表明在几个地区，碳定价与电动汽车普及率存在相互作用。在像当今生效的适度碳价格下，与没有碳定价的情况相比，额外的电动汽车更有可能使用燃煤发电充电。我们使用一个包含交通和电力部门的详细动态模型证实了这一发现。在更高的碳价格下，这种效应会逆转。

papers.title: The Incidence and Magnitude of the Health Costs of In-person Schooling during the COVID-19 Pandemic
papers.authors: Casey B. Mulligan
papers.abstract: The health costs of in-person schooling during the pandemic, if any, fall primarily on the families of students, largely due to the fact that students significantly outnumber teachers.
