Data from North Carolina, Wisconsin, Australia, England, and Israel covering almost 80 million person-days in school help assess the magnitude of the fatality risks of in-person schooling (with mitigation protocols), accounting for the age and living arrangements of students and teachers. The risks of in-person schooling to teachers are comparable to the risks of commuting by automobile. Valued at a VSL of $10 million, the average daily fatality cost ranges from $0.01 for an unvaccinated young teacher living alone to as much as $29 for an elderly and unvaccinated teacher living with an elderly and unvaccinated spouse. COVID-19 risk avoidance may also be more amenable to Bayesian updating and selective protection than automobile fatalities are. The results suggest that economic behaviors can sometimes invert epidemiological patterns when it comes to the spread of infectious diseases in human populations.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, EH, PE；JEL：I18, I21, J45, J51, L33, L51
papers.zh_title: 新冠疫情时期线下教学的健康成本：发生率与规模
papers.zh_abstract: 疫情期间线下教学的健康成本（若有）主要落在学生家庭身上，很大程度上是因为学生人数远超教师。来自北卡罗来纳州、威斯康星州、澳大利亚、英格兰和以色列的数据涵盖了近8000万在校人天，有助于评估在采取缓解措施的情况下线下教学的致命风险规模，并考虑了学生和教师的年龄及居住安排。线下教学对教师的风险与驾车通勤的风险相当。以1000万美元的统计生命价值计算，平均每日致命成本从独居的未接种疫苗年轻教师的0.01美元到与未接种疫苗老年配偶同住的未接种疫苗老年教师的29美元不等。与汽车致死相比，COVID-19风险规避可能更易于进行贝叶斯更新和选择性保护。结果表明，在传染病在人群中传播方面，经济行为有时可能逆转流行病学模式。

papers.title: Millennials and the Take-Off of Craft Brands: Preference Formation in the U.S. Beer Industry
papers.authors: Bart J. Bronnenberg, Jean-Pierre H. Dubé, Joonhwi Joo
papers.abstract: We conduct an empirical case study of the U.S. beer industry to analyze the disruptive effects of locally-manufactured, craft brands on market structure, an increasingly common phenomenon in CPG industries typically attributed to the emerging generation of adult Millennial consumers. We document a generational share gap: Millennials buy more craft beer than earlier generations. We test between two competing mechanisms: (i) persistent generational differences in tastes and (ii) differences in past experiences, or, consumption capital. Our test exploits a novel database tracking the geographic differences in the diffusion of craft breweries across the U.S.. Using a structural model of demand with endogenous consumption capital stock formation, we find that heterogeneous consumption capital accounts for 85% of the generational share gap between Millennials and Baby Boomers, with the remainder explained by intrinsic generational differences in preferences. We predict the beer market structure will continue to fragment over the next decade, over-turning a nearly century-old structure dominated by a small number of national brands. The attribution of the share gap to consumption capital shaped through availability on the supply side of the market highlights how barriers to entry, such as regulation and high traditional marketing costs, sustained a concentrated market structure.
papers.zh_title: 千禧一代与精酿品牌的崛起：美国啤酒行业的偏好形成
papers.zh_abstract: 我们对美国啤酒行业进行了一项实证案例研究，以分析本地生产的精酿品牌对市场结构的颠覆性影响，这是消费品包装品行业中日益常见的现象，通常归因于新兴的成年千禧一代消费者。我们记录了一个代际份额差距：千禧一代比更早世代购买更多精酿啤酒。我们在两种竞争机制之间进行检验：（i）持久的代际口味差异和（ii）过去经验或消费资本的差异。我们的检验利用了一个新颖的数据库，追踪了美国各地精酿酒厂扩散的地理差异。使用一个包含内生消费资本存量形成的结构性需求模型，我们发现异质性消费资本解释了千禧一代与婴儿潮一代之间代际份额差距的85%，其余部分由内在的代际偏好差异解释。我们预测，未来十年啤酒市场结构将继续碎片化，颠覆近一个世纪以来由少数全国性品牌主导的结构。将份额差距归因于通过市场供应侧的可获得性形成的消费资本，突显了监管和高传统营销成本等进入壁垒如何维持了集中的市场结构。

papers.title: The Causal Eﬀects of Lockdown Policies on Health and Macroeconomic Outcomes
papers.authors: Jonas E. Arias, Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Juan Rubio Ramírez, Minchul Shin
papers.abstract: We assess the causal impact of epidemic-induced lockdowns on health and macroeconomic outcomes and measure the trade-oﬀ between containing the spread of an epidemic and economic activity. To do so, we estimate an epidemiological model with time-varying parameters and use its output as information for estimating SVARs and LPs that quantify the causal eﬀects of nonpharmaceutical policy interventions. We apply our approach to Belgian data for the COVID-19 epidemic during 2020. We ﬁnd that additional government-mandated mobility curtailments would have reduced deaths at a very small cost in terms of GDP.
papers.zh_title: 封锁政策对健康和宏观经济结果的因果效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们评估了疫情引发的封锁对健康和宏观经济结果的因果影响，并衡量了遏制疫情传播与经济活动之间的权衡。为此，我们估计了一个具有时变参数的流行病学模型，并将其输出作为估计结构向量自回归和局部投影的信息，以量化非药物政策干预的因果效应。我们将该方法应用于2020年比利时COVID-19疫情数据。我们发现，额外的政府强制出行限制本可以以非常小的GDP成本减少死亡人数。

papers.title: The Smoot-Hawley Trade War
papers.authors: Kris James Mitchener, Kirsten Wandschneider, Kevin Hjortshøj O'Rourke
papers.abstract: We document the outbreak of a trade war after the U.S. adopted the Smoot-Hawley tariff in June 1930. U.S. trade partners initially protested the possible implementation of the sweeping tariff legislation, with many eventually choosing to retaliate by increasing their tariffs on imports from the United States. Using a new quarterly dataset on bilateral trade for 99 countries during the interwar period, we show that U.S. exports to countries that protested fell by between 15 and 22 percent, while U.S. exports to retaliators fell by 28-33 percent. Furthermore, using a second new dataset on U.S. exports at the product-level, we find that the most important U.S. exports to retaliating markets were particularly affected, suggesting a possible mechanism whereby the U.S. was targeted despite countries’ MFN obligations. The retaliators’ welfare gains from trade fell by roughly 8-17%.
papers.zh_title: 斯穆特-霍利贸易战
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录了美国于1930年6月通过斯穆特-霍利关税后爆发的贸易战。美国贸易伙伴最初抗议这项全面关税立法的可能实施，其中许多国家最终选择通过提高对美国进口商品的关税进行报复。利用两次世界大战期间99个国家双边贸易的新季度数据集，我们显示美国对抗议国家的出口下降了15%至22%，而对报复国家的出口下降了28%至33%。此外，利用第二个关于美国产品层面出口的新数据集，我们发现美国对报复市场最重要的出口产品受到特别影响，这表明了一种可能的机制，即尽管各国负有最惠国待遇义务，美国仍成为目标。报复国家的贸易福利收益下降了约8%至17%。

papers.title: Big Data in Finance
papers.authors: Itay Goldstein, Chester S. Spatt, Mao Ye
papers.abstract: Big data is revolutionizing the finance industry and has the potential to significantly shape future research in finance. This special issue contains articles following the 2019 NBER/ RFS conference on big data. In this Introduction to the special issue, we define the “Big Data” phenomenon as a combination of three features: large size, high dimension, and complex structure. Using the articles in the special issue, we discuss how new research builds on these features to push the frontier on fundamental questions across areas in finance – including corporate finance, market microstructure, and asset pricing. Finally, we offer some thoughts for future research directions.
papers.zh_title: 金融中的大数据
papers.zh_abstract: 大数据正在彻底改变金融行业，并有可能显著塑造未来的金融研究。本期特刊收录了2019年NBER/RFS大数据会议后的文章。在本期特刊引言中，我们将“大数据”现象定义为三个特征的结合：大规模、高维度和复杂结构。利用特刊中的文章，我们讨论了新研究如何基于这些特征，推动金融领域各方向（包括公司金融、市场微观结构和资产定价）基本问题的前沿。最后，我们为未来研究方向提供了一些思考。

papers.title: Weather, Climate, and Migration in the United States
papers.authors: Jamie T. Mullins, Prashant Bharadwaj
papers.abstract: Do people move as a result of temperature shocks? Documenting weather as a push factor for migration is crucial for informing policy related to climate change and adaptation. This paper studies the impacts of high-temperature days on out-migration from counties in the US. We find that outmigration responds to long-term variation in temperatures, but not to the short-term temperature variations that are commonly leveraged in the literature. We provide evidence consistent with the idea that the effect of long-term variation in temperature is driven by changes in expectations regarding future conditions, and specifically climate change.
papers.zh_title: 美国的气候、天气与移民
papers.zh_abstract: 人们是否会因温度冲击而迁移？记录天气作为移民的推动因素对于制定与气候变化和适应相关的政策至关重要。本文研究了高温天数对美国各县人口迁出的影响。我们发现，迁出对温度的长期变化有反应，但对文献中常用的短期温度变化没有反应。我们提供的证据与以下观点一致：长期温度变化的影响是由对未来条件（特别是气候变化）预期的变化驱动的。

papers.title: Financial and Total Wealth Inequality with Declining Interest Rates
papers.authors: Daniel L. Greenwald, Matteo Leombroni, Hanno Lustig, Stijn Van Nieuwerburgh
papers.abstract: Financial wealth inequality and long-term real interest rates track each other closely over the post-war period. Faced with unanticipated lower real rates, households which rely more on financial wealth must see large capital gains to afford the consumption that they planned before the decline in rates. Lower rates beget higher financial wealth inequality. Inequality in total wealth, the sum of financial and human wealth and the relevant concept for house-hold welfare, rises much less than financial wealth inequality and even declines at the top of the wealth distribution. A standard incomplete markets model reproduces the observed in-crease in financial wealth inequality in response to a decline in real interest rates because high financial-wealth households have a financial portfolio with high duration.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, PE；JEL：E01, E1, E21, E24, E25, E44, G11, G5
papers.zh_title: 利率下降背景下的金融财富与总财富不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 战后时期，金融财富不平等与长期实际利率密切相关。面对未预料到的实际利率下降，更依赖金融财富的家庭必须看到大量资本收益，才能负担利率下降前计划的消费。较低的利率导致更高的金融财富不平等。总财富（金融财富与人力财富之和，是家庭福利的相关概念）的不平等上升幅度远小于金融财富不平等，甚至在财富分配顶端有所下降。一个标准的不完全市场模型再现了实际利率下降时观察到的金融财富不平等加剧，因为高金融财富家庭的金融组合具有高久期。

papers.title: Does LEED Certification Save Energy? Evidence from Retrofitted Federal Buildings
papers.authors: Karen Clay, Edson R. Severnini, Xiaochen Sun
papers.abstract: This paper examines the causal impact of LEED (Leadership in Energy & Environmental Design) certification on energy consumption among federally owned buildings that were retrofitted over the period 1990-2019. Using a difference-in-differences propensity score matching approach, the paper has two findings. First, despite energy savings being an explicit federal goal, LEED-certified retrofits of federal buildings did not have statistically significant energy savings on average. Second, LEED buildings with higher energy scores had greater energy efficiency post-certification, and the improvements were economically meaningful. The absence of energy savings on average appears to be driven by three factors—trade-offs across energy and other areas in acquiring points for certification, possible changes in energy use after the official performance period for LEED certification ended, and improvements in the energy efficiency of all federal buildings.
papers.zh_title: LEED认证能节省能源吗？来自联邦改造建筑的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了LEED（能源与环境设计先锋）认证对1990-2019年期间改造的联邦所有建筑能源消耗的因果影响。使用双重差分倾向得分匹配方法，本文有两个发现。首先，尽管节能是一个明确的联邦目标，但联邦建筑的LEED认证改造平均而言并未带来统计上显著的节能效果。其次，获得更高能源评分的LEED建筑在认证后具有更高的能源效率，且改进在经济上具有重要意义。平均而言缺乏节能效果似乎由三个因素驱动——在获取认证积分时能源与其他领域之间的权衡、LEED认证官方绩效期结束后能源使用的可能变化，以及所有联邦建筑能源效率的改进。

papers.title: Pay Me Later: Savings Constraints and the Demand for Deferred Payments
papers.authors: Lasse Brune, Eric Chyn, Jason T. Kerwin
papers.abstract: We study a simple savings scheme that allows workers to defer receipt of part of their wages for three months at zero interest. The scheme significantly increases savings during the deferral period, leading to higher post-disbursement spending on lumpy goods. Two years later, after two additional rounds of the savings scheme, we find that treated workers have made permanent improvements to their homes. The popularity of the scheme implies a lack of good alternative savings options. The results of a follow-up experiment suggest that demand for the scheme is partly due to its ability to address self-control issues.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, LS；JEL：D14, D9, D90, D91, J22, J33, O12, O15
papers.zh_title: 晚点付我：储蓄约束与延期支付需求
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个简单的储蓄方案，该方案允许工人在零利率条件下将部分工资延迟三个月领取。该方案在延迟期内显著增加了储蓄，导致发放后在大件商品上的支出增加。两年后，在经历了两轮额外的储蓄方案后，我们发现受处理的工人对房屋进行了永久性改善。该方案的受欢迎程度表明缺乏良好的替代储蓄选择。一项后续实验的结果表明，对该方案的需求部分源于其解决自我控制问题的能力。

papers.title: Slippery Fish: Enforcing Regulation when Agents Learn and Adapt
papers.authors: Andres Gonzalez-Lira, Ahmed Mushfiq Mobarak
papers.abstract: Attempts to curb undesired behavior through regulation gets complicated when agents can adapt to circumvent enforcement. We test a model of enforcement with learning and adaptation, by auditing vendors selling illegal fish in Chile in a randomized controlled trial, and tracking them daily using mystery shoppers. Conducting audits on a predictable schedule and (counter-intuitively) at high frequency is less effective, as agents learn to take advantage of loopholes. A consumer information campaign proves to be almost as cost-effective and curbing illegal sales, and obviates the need for complex monitoring and policing. The Chilean government subsequently chooses to scale up this campaign.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, LE, POL；JEL：K42, L51, O1
papers.zh_title: 滑溜的鱼：当代理人学习和适应时执行监管
papers.zh_abstract: 当代理人能够适应以规避执法时，通过监管遏制不良行为的尝试会变得复杂。我们通过一项随机对照试验，对智利销售非法鱼类的供应商进行审计，并使用神秘顾客进行每日追踪，检验了一个包含学习和适应的执法模型。按可预测的时间表进行审计，并且（反直觉地）高频审计效果较差，因为代理人学会了利用漏洞。一项消费者信息宣传活动被证明在遏制非法销售方面几乎同样具有成本效益，并且消除了复杂监控和执法的必要性。智利政府随后选择扩大这项活动。

papers.title: The Rise of Dual-Class Stock IPOs
papers.authors: Dhruv Aggarwal, Ofer Eldar, Yael Hochberg, Lubomir P. Litov
papers.abstract: We create a novel dataset to examine the nature and determinants of dual-class IPOs. We document that dual-class firms have different types of controlling shareholders and wedges between voting and economic rights. We find that the founders' wedge is largest when founders have stronger bargaining power. The increase in founder wedge over time is due to increased willingness by venture capitalists to accommodate founder control and technological shocks that reduced firms' needs for external financing. Greater founder bargaining power is also associated with a lower likelihood of sunset provisions that eliminate dual-class structures within specified periods.
papers.zh_title: 双重股权结构IPO的兴起
papers.zh_abstract: 我们创建了一个新颖的数据集，以考察双重股权结构IPO的性质和决定因素。我们记录了双重股权公司拥有不同类型的控股股东，以及投票权与经济权利之间的差异。我们发现，当创始人拥有更强的议价能力时，创始人的投票权与经济权差距最大。创始人差距随时间推移而增加，是由于风险资本家更愿意迁就创始人的控制权，以及减少公司对外部融资需求的技术冲击。更大的创始人议价能力也与在指定期限内取消双重股权结构的日落条款可能性较低相关。

papers.title: Exchange Rate Fluctuations and Firm Leverage
papers.authors: Ṣebnem Kalemli-Özcan, Ilhyock Shim, Xiaoxi Liu
papers.abstract: We quantify the effect of exchange rate fluctuations on firm leverage. When home currency appreciates, firms who hold foreign currency debt and local currency assets observe higher net worth as appreciation lowers the value of their foreign currency debt. These firms can borrow more as a result and increase their leverage. When home currency depreciates, the reverse happens as firms have to de-lever with a negative shock to their balance sheets. Using firm-level data for leverage from 10 emerging market economies during the period from 2002 to 2015, we show that firms operating in countries whose non-financial sectors hold more of the debt in foreign currency, increase (decrease) their leverage relatively more after home currency appreciations (depreciations). Combining the leverage data with firm-level FX debt data for 4 emerging market countries, we further show that our results hold at the most granular level. Our quantitative results are asymmetric: the effects of depreciations, that are generally associated with sudden stops, are quantitatively larger than those of appreciations, which take place at a slower pace over time during capital inflow episodes. As our exercise compares depreciations and appreciations of similar size, these results are suggestive of financial frictions being more binding during depreciations than a possible relaxation of such frictions during appreciations.
papers.zh_title: 汇率波动与企业杠杆
papers.zh_abstract: 我们量化了汇率波动对企业杠杆的影响。当本币升值时，持有外币债务和本币资产的企业观察到净资产增加，因为升值降低了其外币债务的价值。这些企业因此能够借入更多资金并增加杠杆。当本币贬值时，情况相反，企业因资产负债表受到负面冲击而不得不去杠杆。利用2002年至2015年期间10个新兴市场经济体的企业层面杠杆数据，我们表明，在非金融部门持有更多外币债务的国家运营的企业，在本币升值（贬值）后，其杠杆率相对增加（减少）更多。结合4个新兴市场国家的企业层面杠杆数据与企业层面外币债务数据，我们进一步表明，我们的结果在最细粒度层面上也成立。我们的定量结果是不对称的：通常与突然停止相关的贬值效应，在数量上大于升值效应，后者在资本流入期间以较慢的速度发生。由于我们的比较涉及规模相似的贬值和升值，这些结果表明，在贬值期间，金融摩擦比在升值期间可能放松此类摩擦更具约束力。

papers.title: Aspirations and Financial Decisions: Experimental Evidence from the Philippines
papers.authors: David McKenzie, Aakash Mohpal, Dean Yang
papers.abstract: A randomized experiment among poor entrepreneurs tested the impact of exogenously inducing higher financial aspirations. In theory, raising aspirations could have positive effects by inducing higher effort, but could also reduce effort if unmet aspirations lead to frustration. Treatment resulted in more ambitious savings goals, but nearly all individuals fell far short of reaching these goals. Two years later, treated individuals had not saved more, and actually had lower borrowing and business investments. Treatment also reduced belief in the amount of control over one’s life. Setting aspirations too high can lead to frustration, leading individuals to reduce their economic investments.
papers.zh_title: 抱负与财务决策：来自菲律宾的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 一项针对贫困企业家的随机实验测试了外生诱导更高财务抱负的影响。理论上，提高抱负可能通过诱导更高努力产生积极影响，但如果未实现的抱负导致挫败感，也可能减少努力。处理导致了更雄心勃勃的储蓄目标，但几乎所有个体都远未达到这些目标。两年后，受处理的个体并未储蓄更多，实际上借贷和商业投资更低。处理还降低了对个人生活掌控程度的信念。设定过高的抱负可能导致挫败感，促使个体减少其经济投资。

papers.title: Rugged Entrepreneurs: The Geographic and Cultural Contours of New Business Formation
papers.authors: John M. Barrios, Yael Hochberg, Daniele Macciocchi
papers.abstract: How do geographic and historical-cultural factors shape new business formation? Using novel data on new business registrations, we document that 75% of the variation in new business formation is explained by time-invariant county-level factors and examine the extent to which such variation is driven by historical, cultural, and geographic factors. Current-day new business formation is positively related to historical attributes that presage individualist culture: frontier experience and historical birthplace diversity, as well as the county’s topographical features. The relation holds when we exploit plausibly exogenous variation in frontier experience driven by shocks to the settlement process that arise from historical immigration flows. Our study points to the fundamental role of geographic and historical-cultural features, especially rugged individualism, in explaining contemporary new business formation in the U.S.
papers.zh_title: 坚韧的企业家：新企业形成的地理与文化轮廓
papers.zh_abstract: 地理和历史-文化因素如何塑造新企业形成？利用新企业注册的新数据，我们记录了新企业形成中75%的变异可由县级时间不变因素解释，并考察了这种变异在多大程度上由历史、文化和地理因素驱动。当前的新企业形成与预示个人主义文化的历史属性正相关：边疆经历和历史出生地多样性，以及该县的地形特征。当我们利用由历史移民流动冲击定居过程所驱动的边疆经历的外生变化时，这种关系仍然成立。我们的研究指出了地理和历史-文化特征，特别是坚韧的个人主义，在解释美国当代新企业形成中的根本作用。

papers.title: Career Spillovers in Internal Labor Markets
papers.authors: Nicola Bianchi, Giulia Bovini, Jin Li, Matteo Paradisi, Michael L. Powell
papers.abstract: This paper studies career spillovers across workers, which arise in firms with limited promotion opportunities. We exploit a 2011 Italian pension reform that unexpectedly tightened eligibility criteria for the public pension, leading to sudden, substantial, and heterogeneous retirement delays. Using administrative data on Italian private-sector workers, the analysis leverages cross-firm variation to isolate the effect of retirement delays among soon-to-retire workers on the wage growth and promotions of their colleagues. We find evidence of spillover patterns consistent with older workers blocking the careers of their younger colleagues, but only in firms with limited promotion opportunities.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, LS, PE；JEL：J21, J26, J31, M51, M52
papers.zh_title: 内部劳动力市场中的职业溢出效应
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了工人之间的职业溢出效应，这种效应出现在晋升机会有限的企业中。我们利用了2011年意大利养老金改革，该改革意外收紧了公共养老金的资格标准，导致突然、显著且异质性的退休延迟。利用意大利私营部门工人的行政数据，该分析利用企业间差异来隔离即将退休工人退休延迟对其同事工资增长和晋升的影响。我们发现了与年长工人阻碍年轻同事职业发展相一致的溢出模式，但仅限于晋升机会有限的企业。

papers.title: Diagnostic Business Cycles
papers.authors: Francesco Bianchi, Cosmin L. Ilut, Hikaru Saijo
papers.abstract: A large psychology literature argues that, due to selective memory recall, decision-makers' forecasts of their future circumstances appear overly influenced by the new information embedded in their current circumstances. We adopt the diagnostic expectations (DE) paradigm (Bordalo et al. (2018)) to capture this feature of belief formation and develop the behavioral foundations for applying DE to business cycle models, while demonstrating its empirical relevance for aggregate dynamics. First, we address (i) the theoretical challenges associated with modeling the feedback between optimal actions and agents' DE beliefs and (ii) the time-inconsistencies that arise under distant memory. Second, we show that under distant memory the interaction between actions and DE beliefs naturally generate repeated boom-bust cycles in response to a single initial shock. Finally, we propose a portable solution method to study DE in dynamic stochastic general equilibrium models and use it to estimate a quantitative DE New Keynesian model. Both endogenous states and distant memory play a critical role in successfully replicating the boom-bust cycle observed in response to a monetary policy shock.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ME；JEL：D8, D9, E03, E3, E71
papers.zh_title: 诊断性经济周期
papers.zh_abstract: 大量心理学文献认为，由于选择性记忆回忆，决策者对其未来状况的预测似乎过度受到当前状况中包含的新信息的影响。我们采用诊断性预期范式（Bordalo等人，2018）来捕捉信念形成的这一特征，并为将诊断性预期应用于经济周期模型建立行为基础，同时证明其对总体动态的实证相关性。首先，我们解决了（i）与建模最优行动和代理人诊断性预期信念之间反馈相关的理论挑战，以及（ii）在远距离记忆下出现的时间不一致性问题。其次，我们表明，在远距离记忆下，行动与诊断性预期信念之间的相互作用会自然地对单一初始冲击产生重复的繁荣-萧条周期。最后，我们提出了一种便携式求解方法，用于研究动态随机一般均衡模型中的诊断性预期，并用它来估计一个定量诊断性预期新凯恩斯模型。内生状态和远距离记忆在成功复制货币政策冲击后观察到的繁荣-萧条周期中都起着关键作用。

papers.title: Africa's Latent Assets
papers.authors: Soeren J. Henn, James A. Robinson
papers.abstract: Despite the past centuries’ economic setbacks and challenges, are there reasons for optimism about Africa's economic prospects? We provide a conceptual framework and empirical evidence that show how the nature of African society has led to three sets of unrecognized “latent assets.” First, success in African society is talent driven and Africa has experienced high levels of perceived and actual social mobility. A society where talented individuals rise to the top and optimism prevails is an excellent basis for entrepreneurship and innovation. Second, Africans, like westerners who built the world's most successful effective states, are highly skeptical of authority and attuned to the abuse of power. We argue that these attitudes can be a critical basis for building better institutions. Third, Africa is “cosmopolitan.” Africans are the most multilingual people in the world, have high levels of religious tolerance, and are welcoming to strangers. The experience of navigating cultural and linguistic diversity sets Africans up for success in a globalized world.
papers.zh_title: 非洲的潜在资产
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管过去几个世纪经历了经济挫折和挑战，是否有理由对非洲的经济前景感到乐观？我们提供了一个概念框架和实证证据，展示了非洲社会的性质如何导致了三组未被认识的“潜在资产”。首先，非洲社会的成功是由才能驱动的，非洲经历了高水平的感知和实际社会流动性。一个才华横溢的人能够上升到顶层且乐观主义盛行的社会，是创业和创新的绝佳基础。其次，非洲人，就像那些建立了世界上最成功有效国家的西方人一样，对权威高度怀疑，并对权力滥用保持警觉。我们认为，这些态度可以成为建设更好制度的关键基础。第三，非洲是“世界性的”。非洲人是世界上最多语言的人群，具有高度的宗教宽容，并欢迎陌生人。驾驭文化和语言多样性的经验使非洲人在全球化的世界中为成功做好了准备。

papers.title: Patent Auctions and Bidding Coalitions: Structuring the Sale of Club Goods
papers.authors: John Asker, Mariagiovanna Baccara, SangMok Lee
papers.abstract: Auctioneers of patents are observed to allow joint bidding by coalitions of buyers. These auctions are distinguished by the good for sale being non-rivalrous, but still excludable, in consumption{that is, they auctions of club goods. This affects how coalitional bidding impacts auction performance. We study the implications of coalitions of bidders on second-price (or equivalently, ascending-price) auctions. Although the formation of coalitions can benefit the seller, we show that stable coalition profiles tend to consist of excessively large coalitions, to the detriment of both auction revenue and social welfare. Limiting the permitted coalition size increases efficiency and confers benefits on the seller. Lastly, we compare the revenues generated by patent auctions and multi-license auctions, and we find that the latter are superior in a large class of environments.
papers.meta: Programs：IO；JEL：D44, D47, K21, L14, L24, L4, O34
papers.zh_title: 专利拍卖与竞标联盟：俱乐部商品的销售结构
papers.zh_abstract: 观察到专利的拍卖者允许买方联盟进行联合竞标。这些拍卖的特点在于待售商品在消费上是非竞争性的，但仍然是排他性的——也就是说，它们是俱乐部商品的拍卖。这影响了联盟竞标对拍卖绩效的作用。我们研究了竞标者联盟对第二价格（或等价地，递增价格）拍卖的影响。尽管联盟的形成可能有利于卖方，但我们表明，稳定的联盟结构往往由过大的联盟组成，这损害了拍卖收入和社会福利。限制允许的联盟规模可以提高效率，并为卖方带来好处。最后，我们比较了专利拍卖和多许可证拍卖产生的收入，并发现后者在一大类环境中更为优越。

papers.title: Addressing the COVID-19 Pandemic: Comparing Alternative Value Frameworks
papers.authors: Maddalena Ferranna, JP Sevilla, David E. Bloom
papers.abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic has forced countries to make difficult ethical choices, e.g., how to balance public health and socioeconomic activity and whom to prioritize in allocating vaccines or other scarce medical resources. We discuss the implications of benefit-cost analysis, utilitarianism, and prioritarianism in evaluating COVID-19-related policies. The relative regressivity of COVID-19 burdens and control policy costs determines whether increased sensitivity to distribution supports more or less aggressive control policies. Utilitarianism and prioritarianism, in that order, increasingly favor income redistribution mechanisms compared with benefit-cost analysis. The concern for the worse-off implies that prioritarianism is more likely than utilitarianism or benefit-cost analysis to target young and socioeconomically disadvantaged individuals in the allocation of scarce vaccine doses.
papers.zh_title: 应对COVID-19疫情：比较不同的价值框架
papers.zh_abstract: COVID-19疫情迫使各国做出艰难的伦理选择，例如如何平衡公共卫生和社会经济活动，以及在分配疫苗或其他稀缺医疗资源时优先考虑谁。我们讨论了成本效益分析、功利主义和优先主义在评估COVID-19相关政策中的含义。COVID-19负担和控制政策成本的相对累退性决定了，对分配的更高敏感性是支持更激进还是更温和的控制政策。与成本效益分析相比，功利主义和优先主义（按此顺序）越来越倾向于收入再分配机制。对弱势群体的关注意味着，在分配稀缺疫苗剂量时，优先主义比功利主义或成本效益分析更有可能针对年轻和社会经济弱势的个体。

papers.title: Misdemeanor Prosecution
papers.authors: Amanda Y. Agan, Jennifer L. Doleac, Anna Harvey
papers.abstract: Communities across the United States are reconsidering the public safety benefits of prosecuting nonviolent misdemeanor offenses, yet there is little empirical evidence to inform policy in this area. In this paper we report the first estimates of the causal effects of misdemeanor prosecution on defendants' subsequent criminal justice involvement. We leverage the as-if random assignment of nonviolent misdemeanor cases to Assistant District Attorneys (ADAs) who decide whether a case should be prosecuted in the Suffolk County District Attorney's Office in Massachusetts. These ADAs vary in the average leniency of their prosecution decisions. We find that, for the marginal defendant, nonprosecution of a nonviolent misdemeanor offense leads to a 53% reduction in the likelihood of a new criminal complaint, and to a 60% reduction in the number of new criminal complaints, over the next two years. These local average treatment effects are largest for defendants without prior criminal records, suggesting that averting criminal record acquisition is an important mechanism driving our findings. We also present evidence that a recent policy change in Suffolk County imposing a presumption of nonprosecution for nonviolent misdemeanor offenses had similar beneficial effects, decreasing the likelihood of subsequent criminal justice involvement.
papers.zh_title: 轻罪起诉
papers.zh_abstract: 美国各地的社区正在重新考虑起诉非暴力轻罪对公共安全的益处，然而，为这一领域的政策提供信息的实证证据很少。在本文中，我们报告了轻罪起诉对被告后续刑事司法参与因果效应的首次估计。我们利用了马萨诸塞州萨福克县地区检察官办公室中非暴力轻罪案件近乎随机分配给助理地区检察官（ADA）的情况，这些ADA决定案件是否应被起诉。这些ADA在起诉决定的平均宽大程度上存在差异。我们发现，对于边际被告而言，不起诉非暴力轻罪导致未来两年内新刑事指控的可能性降低53%，新刑事指控的数量减少60%。这些局部平均处理效应对没有前科的被告最大，这表明避免获得犯罪记录是驱动我们发现的重要机制。我们还提供了证据，表明萨福克县最近一项政策变化——对非暴力轻罪实行不起诉推定——产生了类似的有利效果，降低了后续刑事司法参与的可能性。

papers.title: Representation is Not Sufficient for Selecting Gender Diversity
papers.authors: Justus A. Baron, Bernhard Ganglmair, Nicola Persico, Timothy Simcoe, Emanuele Tarantino
papers.abstract: Representation of women and minorities in a “selectorate”—the group that chooses an organization's leaders—is a key mechanism for promoting diversity. We show that representation, on its own, is not sufficient for selecting gender diversity: a supportive organizational culture is also required. In the case of the Internet Engineering Task Force, a random increase in female representation in its selection committee caused an increase in female appointments only after cultural norms supporting diversity and inclusion became more salient.
papers.meta: Programs：POL, PR；JEL：D02, J16, J17, M14, O32
papers.zh_title: 代表性不足以选择性别多样性
papers.zh_abstract: 在“选拔者群体”（即选择组织领导者的群体）中，女性和少数群体的代表性是促进多样性的关键机制。我们表明，仅凭代表性本身不足以选择性别多样性：还需要支持性的组织文化。以互联网工程任务组为例，其选拔委员会中女性代表性的随机增加，只有在支持多样性和包容性的文化规范变得更加突出时，才导致女性任命的增加。

papers.title: Mammograms and Mortality: How Has the Evidence Evolved?
papers.authors: Amanda E. Kowalski
papers.abstract: Decades of evidence reveal a complicated relationship between mammograms and mortality. Mammograms may detect deadly cancers early, but they may also lead to the diagnosis and potentially fatal treatment of cancers that would never progress to cause symptoms. I provide a brief history of the evidence on mammograms and mortality, focusing on evidence from clinical trials, and I discuss how this evidence informs mammography guidelines. I then explore the evolution of all-cause mortality relative to breast cancer mortality within an influential clinical trial. I conclude with some responses to the evolving evidence.
papers.zh_title: 乳房X光检查与死亡率：证据如何演变？
papers.zh_abstract: 数十年的证据揭示了乳房X光检查与死亡率之间的复杂关系。乳房X光检查可能早期发现致命癌症，但也可能导致对永远不会进展到引起症状的癌症进行诊断和潜在致命治疗。我简要回顾了关于乳房X光检查和死亡率的证据历史，重点关注临床试验的证据，并讨论这些证据如何影响乳房X光检查指南。然后，我探讨了一个有影响力的临床试验中全因死亡率相对于乳腺癌死亡率的演变。最后，我对不断演变的证据提出了一些回应。

papers.title: The Public Health Effects of Legalizing Marijuana
papers.authors: D. Mark Anderson, Daniel I. Rees
papers.abstract: Thirty-six states have legalized medical marijuana and 14 states have legalized the use of marijuana for recreational purposes. In this paper, we review the literature on the public health consequences of legalizing marijuana, focusing on studies that have appeared in economics journals as well as leading public policy, public health, and medical journals. Among the outcomes considered are: youth marijuana use, alcohol consumption, the abuse of prescription opioids, traffic fatalities, and crime. For some of these outcomes, there is a near consensus in the literature regarding the effects of medical marijuana laws (MMLs). As an example, leveraging geographic and temporal variation in MMLs, researchers have produced little credible evidence to suggest that legalization promotes marijuana use among teenagers. Likewise, there is convincing evidence that young adults consume less alcohol when medical marijuana is legalized. For other public health outcomes such as mortality involving prescription opioids, the effect of legalizing medical marijuana has proven more difficult to gauge and, as a consequence, we are less comfortable drawing firm conclusions. Finally, it is not yet clear how legalizing marijuana for recreational purposes will affect these and other important public health outcomes. We will be able to draw stronger conclusions when more post-treatment data are collected in states that have recently legalized recreational marijuana.
papers.zh_title: 大麻合法化的公共卫生影响
papers.zh_abstract: 36个州已将医用大麻合法化，14个州已将娱乐用大麻合法化。在本文中，我们回顾了关于大麻合法化公共卫生后果的文献，重点关注发表在经济学期刊以及领先的公共政策、公共卫生和医学期刊上的研究。考虑的结果包括：青少年大麻使用、酒精消费、处方阿片类药物滥用、交通死亡和犯罪。对于其中一些结果，文献中关于医用大麻法律影响的共识近乎一致。例如，利用医用大麻法律的地理和时间变化，研究人员几乎没有产生可信的证据表明合法化会促进青少年使用大麻。同样，有令人信服的证据表明，当医用大麻合法化时，年轻人饮酒减少。对于其他公共卫生结果，如涉及处方阿片类药物的死亡率，衡量医用大麻合法化的影响已被证明更加困难，因此我们不太愿意得出明确结论。最后，尚不清楚娱乐用大麻合法化将如何影响这些及其他重要的公共卫生结果。当在最近将娱乐用大麻合法化的州收集到更多处理后数据时，我们将能够得出更可靠的结论。

papers.title: Policy Implications of Non-Linear Effects of Tax Changes on Output
papers.authors: Samara R. Gunter, Daniel Riera-Crichton, Carlos A. Vegh, Guillermo Vuletin
papers.abstract: In an earlier paper, titled "Non-linear effects of tax changes on output: The role of the initial level of taxation," we estimated tax multipliers using (i) a novel dataset on value-added taxes for 51 countries (21 industrial and 30 developing) for the period 1970-2014, and (ii) the so-called narrative approach developed by Romer and Romer (2010) to properly identify exogenous tax changes. The main finding is that, in line with existing theoretical distortionary and disincentive-based arguments, the effect of tax changes on output is highly non-linear. The tax multiplier is essentially zero under relatively low/moderate initial tax rate levels and more negative as the initial tax rate and the size of the change in the tax rate increase. This companion paper first shows that these findings have important policy implications, given that the initial level of taxes varies greatly across countries and thus so will the potential output effect of changing tax rates. The paper then turns to some specific policy applications. It focuses on the relevance of the arguments for revenue mobilization in countries with low levels of provision of public goods and social and infrastructure gaps, as well as in commodity-dependent countries. The paper then considers some practical implications for the standard debt sustainability analysis. Lastly, it evaluates the implications of the findings for the Laffer curve.
papers.zh_title: 税收变化对产出的非线性效应的政策含义
papers.zh_abstract: 在之前一篇题为“税收变化对产出的非线性效应：初始税收水平的作用”的论文中，我们使用（i）一个涵盖1970-2014年51个国家（21个工业国和30个发展中国家）增值税的新数据集，以及（ii）由Romer和Romer（2010）开发的所谓叙事方法来正确识别外生税收变化，估计了税收乘数。主要发现是，与现有的基于扭曲和抑制激励的理论论点一致，税收变化对产出的影响高度非线性。在初始税率水平相对较低/中等时，税收乘数基本为零，随着初始税率和税率变化幅度的增加，乘数变得更负。这篇配套论文首先表明，这些发现具有重要的政策含义，因为各国的初始税收水平差异很大，因此改变税率对产出的潜在影响也会不同。然后，论文转向一些具体的政策应用。它重点关注这些论点对公共产品提供水平低、社会和基础设施存在差距的国家以及依赖商品的国家进行收入动员的相关性。然后，论文考虑了标准债务可持续性分析的一些实际含义。最后，它评估了这些发现对拉弗曲线的影响。

papers.title: Back to School: The Effect of School Visits During COVID-19 on COVID-19 Transmission
papers.authors: Dena Bravata, Jonathan H. Cantor, Neeraj Sood, Christopher M. Whaley
papers.abstract: Schools across the United States and the world have been closed in an effort to mitigate the spread of COVID-19. However, the effect of school closure on COVID-19 transmission remains unclear. We estimate the causal effect of changes in the number of weekly visits to schools on COVID-19 transmission using a triple difference approach. In particular, we measure the effect of changes in county-level visits to schools on changes in COVID-19 diagnoses for households with school-age children relative to changes in COVID-19 diagnoses for households without school-age children. We use a data set from the first 46 weeks of 2020 with 130 million household-week level observations that includes COVID-19 diagnoses merged to school visit tracking data from millions of mobile phones. We find that increases in county-level in-person visits to schools lead to an increase in COVID-19 diagnoses among households with children relative to households without school-age children. However, the effects are small in magnitude. A move from the 25th to the 75th percentile of county-level school visits translates to a 0.3 per 10,000 household increase in COVID-19 diagnoses. This change translates to a 3.2 percent relative increase. We find larger differences in low-income counties, in counties with higher COVID-19 prevalence, and at later stages of the COVID-19 pandemic.
papers.zh_title: 重返校园：COVID-19期间学校访问对COVID-19传播的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 美国和世界各地的学校已关闭以减缓COVID-19的传播。然而，学校关闭对COVID-19传播的影响仍不清楚。我们使用三重差分法估计每周学校访问次数变化对COVID-19传播的因果效应。具体来说，我们衡量县级学校访问变化对有学龄儿童家庭COVID-19诊断变化的影响，相对于无学龄儿童家庭COVID-19诊断的变化。我们使用2020年前46周的数据集，包含1.3亿个家庭-周级别的观测值，其中包括COVID-19诊断数据，并与来自数百万部手机的学校访问追踪数据合并。我们发现，县级学校面对面访问的增加导致有儿童家庭相对于无学龄儿童家庭的COVID-19诊断增加。然而，影响幅度很小。从县级学校访问的第25百分位移动到第75百分位，相当于每万户家庭COVID-19诊断增加0.3例。这一变化相当于相对增加3.2%。我们在低收入县、COVID-19患病率较高的县以及COVID-19大流行后期发现了更大的差异。

papers.title: Guaranteed Markets and Corporate Scientific Research
papers.authors: Sharon Belenzon, Larisa C. Cioaca
papers.abstract: The U.S. government incentivizes firms to develop innovative technologies by awarding R&D contracts that often carry an implicit promise of “guaranteed demand.” Firms that demonstrate strong technological capabilities are rewarded with noncompetitive production contracts for the resulting products and services. Using newly assembled data on $4.2 trillion in government procurement contracts from all federal agencies, matched to U.S. publicly traded firms, we document a “crowding-in” effect, where government R&D contracts lead to increased investment in corporate scientific research. Firms co-invest with the government at the R&D stage to enhance their chances of securing these lucrative production contracts. We develop a theoretical framework to explain when it is optimal for the government to bundle R&D and production contracts. Our analysis shows that guaranteed demand can produce higher quality at a lower total cost for upstream R&D projects when the R&D firms have production capabilities. Our empirical results confirm these predictions. Additionally, we find that the crowding-in effect has weakened over time as the government has increasingly separated R&D contracts from production contracts. We discuss the potential implications of this decoupling.
papers.zh_title: 有保障的市场与企业科学研究
papers.zh_abstract: 美国政府通过授予研发合同来激励企业开发创新技术，这些合同通常隐含着“有保障的需求”的承诺。展现出强大技术能力的企业会获得针对其最终产品和服务的不具竞争性的生产合同。利用新整理的、涵盖所有联邦机构4.2万亿美元政府采购合同的数据，并与美国上市公司相匹配，我们记录了一种“挤入”效应：政府的研发合同导致企业科学研究投资增加。企业在研发阶段与政府共同投资，以提高获得这些利润丰厚的生产合同的机会。我们构建了一个理论框架来解释政府何时将研发合同与生产合同捆绑是最优的。我们的分析表明，当研发企业具备生产能力时，有保障的需求能够以更低的总成本为上游研发项目带来更高质量。我们的实证结果证实了这些预测。此外，我们发现，随着政府越来越多地将研发合同与生产合同分离，这种挤入效应随着时间的推移而减弱。我们讨论了这种脱钩的潜在影响。

papers.title: Labor Rationing
papers.authors: Emily Breza, Supreet Kaur, Yogita Shamdasani
papers.abstract: This paper measures excess labor supply in equilibrium. We examine hiring shocks—which employ 24% of the labor force in external month-long jobs—in Indian local labor markets. In peak months, wages increase instantaneously and local aggregate employment declines. In lean months, consistent with severe labor rationing, wages and aggregate employment are unchanged, with positive employment spillovers on remaining workers—indicating that over a quarter of labor supply is rationed. At least 24% of lean self-employment among casual workers occurs because they cannot find jobs. Consequently, traditional survey approaches mismeasure labor market slack. Rationing has broad implications for labor market analysis.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, LS, PR；JEL：E24, J2, J6, O10, O17
papers.zh_title: 劳动力配给
papers.zh_abstract: 本文衡量了均衡状态下的超额劳动力供给。我们考察了印度地方劳动力市场中的雇佣冲击——这些冲击在外部为期一个月的岗位中雇佣了24%的劳动力。在高峰月份，工资立即上涨，而地方总就业量下降。在低谷月份，与严重的劳动力配给一致，工资和总就业量保持不变，但对剩余工人产生了正向的就业溢出效应——这表明超过四分之一的劳动力供给被配给了。在临时工中，至少有24%的低谷月份自雇就业是因为他们找不到工作。因此，传统的调查方法错误地衡量了劳动力市场的松弛程度。配给对劳动力市场分析具有广泛的影响。

papers.title: Surviving a Mass Shooting
papers.authors: Prashant Bharadwaj, Manudeep Bhuller, Katrine V. Løken, Mirjam Wentzel
papers.abstract: We use data on all middle and high school-aged children who survived a mass shooting incident on July 22, 2011 in Utøya, Norway, to understand how such events affect survivors, their families, and their peers. Using a difference-in-differences design to compare survivors to a matched control group, we find that in the short run children who survive have substantially lower GPA (nearly 0.5 SD), increased health visits, and more mental health diagnoses (nearly 400% increase). In the medium run, survivors have fewer years of schooling completed and lower labor force participation. Parents and siblings of survivors are also impacted, experiencing substantial increases in doctor visits and mental health diagnoses. However, there appear to be limited impacts on school-aged peers of survivors. While this event affected the entire country, we show that survivors and their families bear significant costs despite robust social safety nets and universal access to healthcare.
papers.zh_title: 大规模枪击事件的幸存者
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用2011年7月22日挪威于特岛大规模枪击事件中所有幸存的初中和高中年龄段儿童的数据，来理解此类事件如何影响幸存者、他们的家人以及同龄人。采用双重差分设计，将幸存者与匹配的对照组进行比较，我们发现，在短期内，幸存儿童的GPA显著降低（近0.5个标准差），健康就诊次数增加，心理健康诊断数量增加（增幅近400%）。在中期，幸存者完成的受教育年限更少，劳动力参与率也更低。幸存者的父母和兄弟姐妹也受到影响，他们的就诊次数和心理健康诊断数量大幅增加。然而，对幸存者的学龄同龄人的影响似乎有限。尽管这一事件影响了整个国家，但我们表明，尽管拥有健全的社会安全网和全民医疗保健，幸存者及其家人仍承担了巨大的成本。

papers.title: Food vs. Food Stamps: Evidence from an At-Scale Experiment in Indonesia
papers.authors: Abhijit Banerjee, Rema Hanna, Benjamin A. Olken, Elan Satriawan, Sudarno Sumarto
papers.abstract: Governments seeking to provide food assistance have a choice between providing in-kind food directly to beneficiaries, or providing vouchers that can be used to purchase food on the market. To understand the differences between these policies, the Government of Indonesia randomly phased in the transition from in-kind delivery of subsidized rice to approximately equivalent vouchers usable to buy rice and eggs across 105 districts comprising over 3.4 million beneficiary households. We find the transition led to substantial changes in the allocation of aid in practice. The vouchers provided concentrated assistance to targeted households, who received 45 percent more assistance in voucher areas than in in-kind districts. As a result, for households in the bottom 15 percent at baseline, poverty fell by 20 percent. Vouchers also allowed households to purchase higher-quality rice, and led to increased consumption of egg-based proteins. We find vouchers have little effect on aggregate rice prices, although we observe modest price increases in remote villages. Overall leakage from the program was not affected, but the administrative costs of benefits delivery substantially fell. In short, the results suggest that the change from in-kind food aid to vouchers led to substantial impacts on poverty through the way it changed how programs were implemented on the ground.
papers.zh_title: 食品与食品券：来自印度尼西亚大规模实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 寻求提供食品援助的政府面临一个选择：是直接向受益人提供实物食品，还是提供可在市场上购买食品的代金券。为了理解这些政策之间的差异，印度尼西亚政府在105个县（涵盖超过340万受益家庭）中，随机分阶段地将补贴大米的实物发放过渡为可用于购买大米和鸡蛋的等值代金券。我们发现，这种过渡在实践中导致了援助分配的实质性变化。代金券向目标家庭提供了集中的援助，在代金券地区，目标家庭获得的援助比实物发放地区多45%。因此，对于基线时处于收入最低15%的家庭，贫困率下降了20%。代金券还使家庭能够购买更高质量的大米，并增加了鸡蛋类蛋白质的消费。我们发现代金券对大米总价格影响甚微，尽管我们观察到偏远村庄的价格略有上涨。该计划的总体渗漏未受影响，但福利发放的行政成本大幅下降。简而言之，结果表明，从实物食品援助转向代金券，通过改变项目在基层的实施方式，对贫困产生了实质性影响。

papers.title: The Labor Effects of Judicial Bias in Bankruptcy
papers.authors: Aloisio Araujo, Rafael Ferreira, Spyridon Lagaras, Flavio Moraes, Jacopo Ponticelli, Margarita Tsoutsoura
papers.abstract: We study the effect of judicial bias favoring firm continuation in bankruptcy on the labor market outcomes of employees by exploiting the random assignment of cases across courts in the State of São Paulo in Brazil. Employees of firms assigned to courts that favor firm continuation are more likely to stay with their employer, but they earn, on average, lower wages three to five years after bankruptcy. We discuss several potential mechanisms that can rationalize this result, and provide evidence that imperfect information about outside options in the local labor market and adjustment costs associated with job change play an important role.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, LE, LS；JEL：G33, J30, K0, O16
papers.zh_title: 破产中司法偏见的劳动力效应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用巴西圣保罗州法院之间案件的随机分配，研究了破产程序中偏向企业存续的司法偏见对员工劳动力市场结果的影响。被分配到偏向企业存续的法院的企业员工，更有可能留在其雇主处，但在破产后三到五年内，他们的平均工资较低。我们讨论了可以合理解释这一结果的几种潜在机制，并提供了证据表明，关于地方劳动力市场外部选择的不完全信息以及与工作变动相关的调整成本起着重要作用。

papers.title: The Pricing Strategies of Online Grocery Retailers
papers.authors: Diego Aparicio, Zachary Metzman, Roberto Rigobon
papers.abstract: Matched product data is collected from the leading online grocers in the U.S. The same exact products are identified in scanner data. The paper documents pricing strategies within and across online (and offline) retailers. First, online retailers exhibit substantially less uniform pricing than offline retailers. Second, online price differentiation across competing chains in narrow geographies is higher than offline retailers. Third, variation in offline elasticities, shipping distance, pricing frequency, and local demo- graphics are utilized to explain price differentiation. Surprisingly, pricing technology (across time) magnifies price differentiation (across locations). This evidence motivates a high-frequency study to unpack the patterns of algorithmic pricing. The data shows that algorithms: personalize prices at the delivery zipcode level, update prices very frequently and in tiny magnitudes, reduce price synchronization, exhibit lower menu costs, constantly explore the price grid, and often match competitors’ prices.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM, IO, ITI, ME；JEL：D9, L1, L2, M31, O33
papers.zh_title: 在线食品杂货零售商的定价策略
papers.zh_abstract: 我们从美国领先的在线食品杂货商处收集了匹配的产品数据。相同的产品在扫描数据中也被识别出来。本文记录了在线（和线下）零售商内部及之间的定价策略。首先，在线零售商表现出比线下零售商显著更少的统一定价。其次，在狭窄地理区域内，竞争性连锁店之间的在线价格差异高于线下零售商。第三，线下弹性、运输距离、定价频率和地方人口统计特征的差异被用来解释价格差异。令人惊讶的是，定价技术（跨时间）放大了价格差异（跨地点）。这一证据促使我们进行高频研究，以揭示算法定价的模式。数据显示，算法：在配送邮政编码层面个性化定价，非常频繁且以微小幅度更新价格，减少价格同步性，表现出更低的菜单成本，不断探索价格网格，并且经常匹配竞争对手的价格。

papers.title: Optimal Product Design: Implications for Competition and Growth under Declining Search Frictions
papers.authors: Guido Menzio
papers.abstract: As search frictions become smaller in the market for a consumer product, buyers are able to locate and access more sellers per unit of time. In response, sellers choose to design varieties of the product that are more specialized in order to exploit differences in the buyers' preferences. I find mild conditions on the fundamentals under which the decline in search frictions and the increase in specialization have exactly offsetting effects on the extent of competition in the market. Under these conditions, price dispersion remains constant over time even though search frictions are vanishing. Buyer's surplus and seller's profit, however, grow at a constant endogenous rate, as the endogenous increase in specialization allows sellers to cater better and better to the heterogeneous desires of buyers.
papers.zh_title: 最优产品设计：搜索摩擦下降对竞争和增长的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 随着消费品市场中的搜索摩擦变小，买家能够在单位时间内找到并接触到更多的卖家。作为回应，卖家选择设计更专业化的产品品种，以利用买家偏好的差异。我找到了关于基础条件的温和条件，在这些条件下，搜索摩擦的下降和专业化程度的提高对市场竞争程度具有完全抵消的影响。在这些条件下，即使搜索摩擦正在消失，价格离散度也随时间保持不变。然而，买方的剩余和卖方的利润以恒定的内生速度增长，因为专业化的内生增长使得卖家能够越来越好地满足买方的异质性需求。

papers.title: Taxing Property in Developing Countries: Theory and Evidence from Mexico
papers.authors: Anne Brockmeyer, Alejandro Estefan, Karina Ramírez Arras, Juan Carlos Suárez Serrato
papers.abstract: We study the most under-utilized tax in developing countries—the property tax—by modeling and estimating the welfare effects of tax rate changes and enforcement. The model shows tax hikes impact welfare by reducing compliance and exacerbating liquidity constraints. Enforcement impacts welfare by subjecting non-compliant taxpayers to threats of fines and property seizure. Empirically, administrative data, sharp tax rate increases, and an enforcement experiment show both policies increase revenue. Tax hikes raise welfare since revenue gains surpass liquidity costs. Enforcement reduces welfare as threat costs overshadow revenue increases. Governments can enhance welfare by raising tax rates rather than escalating enforcement.
papers.zh_title: 发展中国家征收财产税：来自墨西哥的理论与证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了发展中国家利用最不充分的税种——财产税，通过建模和估计税率变化与执法的福利效应。模型显示，提高税率通过降低合规性和加剧流动性约束来影响福利。执法通过使不合规纳税人面临罚款和财产没收的威胁来影响福利。实证上，行政数据、大幅的税率上调以及一项执法实验表明，这两种政策都增加了收入。提高税率能提高福利，因为收入增长超过了流动性成本。执法会降低福利，因为威胁成本超过了收入增长。政府可以通过提高税率而不是加强执法来提高福利。

papers.title: Pandemics, Incentives, and Economic Policy: A Dynamic Model
papers.authors: Roberto Chang, Humberto Martínez, Andrés Velasco
papers.abstract: The advent of a pandemic is an exogenous shock, but the dynamics of contagion are very much endogenous --and depend on choices that individuals make in response to incentives. In such an episode, economic policy can make a difference not just by alleviating economic losses but also via incentives that affect the trajectory of the pandemic itself. We develop this idea in a dynamic equilibrium model of an economy subject to a pandemic. Just as in conventional SIR models, infection rates depend on how much time people spend at home versus working outside the home. But in our model, whether to go out to work is a decision made by individuals who trade off higher pay from working outside the home today versus a higher risk of infection and expected future economic and health-related losses. As a result, pandemic dynamics depend on factors that have no relevance in conventional models. In particular, expectations and forward-looking behavior are crucial and can result in multiplicity of equilibria with different levels of economic activity, infection, and deaths. The analysis yields novel policy lessons. For example, incentives embedded in a fiscal package resembling the U.S. CARES Act can result in two waves of infection.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, EH, IFM；JEL：E6, F4, H3, I3
papers.zh_title: 大流行病、激励与经济政策：一个动态模型
papers.zh_abstract: 大流行病的出现是一个外生冲击，但传染的动态过程在很大程度上是内生的——并且取决于个体根据激励做出的选择。在这样的时期，经济政策不仅可以减轻经济损失，还可以通过影响大流行病本身轨迹的激励措施发挥作用。我们在一个受大流行病影响的经济体的动态均衡模型中发展了这一思想。与传统的SIR模型一样，感染率取决于人们在家与在外工作的时间分配。但在我们的模型中，是否外出工作是个体做出的决策，他们权衡了今天外出工作获得的更高报酬与更高的感染风险以及预期的未来经济和健康相关损失。因此，大流行病的动态取决于传统模型中无关的因素。特别是，预期和前向行为至关重要，并可能导致多重均衡，这些均衡具有不同的经济活动水平、感染人数和死亡人数。分析得出了新颖的政策启示。例如，类似于美国CARES法案的财政刺激方案中嵌入的激励措施可能导致两波感染浪潮。

papers.title: Dispersion in Financing Costs and Development
papers.authors: Tiago V. Cavalcanti, Joseph P. Kaboski, Bruno S. Martins, Cezar Santos
papers.abstract: Most aggregate theories of financial frictions model credit available at a single cost of financing but rationed. However, using a comprehensive firm-level credit registry, we document both high levels and high dispersion in credit spreads to Brazilian firms. We develop a quantitative dynamic general equilibrium model in which dispersion in spreads arises from intermediation costs and market power. Calibrating to the Brazilian data, we show that, for equivalent levels of external financing, dispersion has more profound impacts on aggregate development than single-price credit rationing and yields firm dynamics that are more consistent with observed patterns.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, EFG, IFM；JEL：E44, O11, O16
papers.zh_title: 融资成本离散度与发展
papers.zh_abstract: 大多数关于金融摩擦的总体理论都假设信贷以单一融资成本提供但受到配给。然而，利用一个全面的企业层面信贷登记数据，我们记录了巴西企业信贷利差的高水平和高离散度。我们开发了一个定量动态一般均衡模型，其中利差的离散度源于中介成本和市场势力。通过校准巴西数据，我们表明，在同等外部融资水平下，离散度对总体发展的影响比单一价格信贷配给更为深远，并产生了与观察到的模式更一致的企业动态。

papers.title: Effects of School Shootings on Risky Behavior, Health and Human Capital
papers.authors: Partha Deb, Anjelica Gangaram
papers.abstract: We examine the effect of school shootings on health and human capital outcomes of exposed students as adults and on their migration during high school and a few years beyond. The analytic dataset use shootings compiled by the Center for Homeland Defense and Security with 2003-2012 Behavioral Risk Factor Surveillance System data. To study migration, we use the 2004-2018 American Community Survey. We find that students exposed to school shootings experience declines in health and well-being, engage in more risky behaviors, and have worse education and labor market outcomes as young adults. There is no evidence of migration in response to school shootings.
papers.zh_title: 校园枪击事件对风险行为、健康与人力资本的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了校园枪击事件对受影响学生成年后健康与人力资本结果的影响，以及他们在高中及之后几年内的迁移情况。分析数据集使用了国土防御与安全中心汇编的枪击事件数据以及2003-2012年行为风险因素监测系统数据。为了研究迁移，我们使用了2004-2018年美国社区调查。我们发现，遭受校园枪击事件的学生在成年后健康与福祉下降，参与更多风险行为，并且在教育和劳动力市场结果上表现更差。没有证据表明存在因校园枪击事件而发生的迁移。

papers.title: Changing Returns to Scale in Manufacturing 1880-1930: The Rise of (Skilled) Labor?
papers.authors: Jeanne Lafortune, Ethan G. Lewis, José Pablo Martínez, José Tessada
papers.abstract: This paper estimates returns to scale for manufacturing industries around the turn of the twentieth century in the United States by exploiting an industry-city panel data for the years 1880-1930. We estimate decreasing returns to scale on average over the period, contrary to most of the existing literature, because our empirical methodology allows us to separate returns to scale from "agglomeration" effects. We also find that returns to scale grew substantially after 1910, mostly because the return to labor grew. We find that this was more marked in industries that were more intensive in human capital and energy at the beginning of the period and in cells that were less competitive. Overall, results suggest that technological change and lack of initial competition played relevant roles in the rise of larger establishments in manufacturing.
papers.zh_title: 制造业规模报酬的变化（1880-1930）：（熟练）劳动力的崛起？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用1880-1930年行业-城市面板数据，估计了二十世纪之交美国制造业的规模报酬。我们发现，与现有大多数文献相反，该时期平均规模报酬递减，因为我们的实证方法能够将规模报酬与“集聚”效应分离开来。我们还发现，1910年后规模报酬显著增长，主要是由于劳动力报酬的增长。我们发现，在期初人力资本和能源密集度更高的行业以及竞争较弱的单元中，这一现象更为显著。总体而言，结果表明技术变革和初始竞争不足在制造业大型企业的崛起中发挥了重要作用。

papers.title: From Mancession to Shecession: Women's Employment in Regular and Pandemic Recessions
papers.authors: Titan Alon, Sena Coskun, Matthias Doepke, David Koll, Michèle Tertilt
papers.abstract: We examine the impact of the global recession triggered by the Covid-19 pandemic on women's versus men's employment. Whereas recent recessions in advanced economies usually had a disproportionate impact on men's employment, giving rise to the moniker "mancessions," we show that the pandemic recession of 2020 was a "shecession" in most countries with larger employment declines among women. We examine the causes behind this pattern using micro data from several national labor force surveys, and show that both the composition of women's employment across industries and occupations as well as increased childcare needs during closures of schools and daycare centers made important contributions. While many countries exhibit similar patterns, we also emphasize how policy choices such as furloughing policies and the extent of school closures shape the pandemic's impact on the labor market. Another notable finding is the central role of telecommuting: gender gaps in the employment impact of the pandemic arise almost entirely among workers who are unable to work from home. Nevertheless, among telecommuters a different kind of gender gap arises: women working from home during the pandemic spent more work time also doing childcare and experienced greater productivity reductions than men. We discuss what our findings imply for gender equality in a post-pandemic labor market that will likely continue to be characterized by pervasive telecommuting.
papers.zh_title: 从男性衰退到女性衰退：常规衰退与大流行病衰退中的女性就业
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了由Covid-19大流行病引发的全球衰退对女性与男性就业的影响。尽管发达经济体近期的衰退通常对男性就业产生不成比例的影响，从而产生了“男性衰退”的说法，但我们表明，2020年的大流行病衰退在大多数国家是一场“女性衰退”，女性就业下降幅度更大。我们利用多个国家劳动力调查的微观数据考察了这一模式背后的原因，并表明女性在行业和职业中的就业构成以及学校和日托中心关闭期间增加的育儿需求都做出了重要贡献。虽然许多国家表现出相似的模式，但我们也强调了政策选择（如休假政策和学校关闭程度）如何塑造大流行病对劳动力市场的影响。另一个值得注意的发现是远程办公的核心作用：大流行病对就业影响的性别差距几乎完全出现在无法在家工作的工人中。然而，在远程办公者中出现了另一种性别差距：大流行病期间在家工作的女性花费更多工作时间同时照顾孩子，并且生产力下降幅度大于男性。我们讨论了我们的发现对后大流行病劳动力市场中性别平等的启示，该市场可能仍将以普遍的远程办公为特征。

papers.title: Monopoly of Taxation Without a Monopoly of Violence: The Weak State’s Trade-Offs From Taxation
papers.authors: Soeren J. Henn, Christian Mastaki Mugaruka, Miguel Ortiz, Raúl Sánchez de la Sierra, David Qihang Wu
papers.abstract: This study presents a new economic perspective on state-building based on a case study in the Democratic Republic of the Congo’s hinterland. We explore the implications for the state of considering rebels as stationary bandits. When the state, through a military operation, made it impossible for rebels to levy taxes, it inadvertently encouraged them to plunder the assets of the very citizens they previously preferred to tax. When it negotiated with rebels instead, this effect was absent, but negotiating compromised the state’s legitimacy and prompted the emergence of new rebels. The findings suggest that attempting to increase taxation by a weak state in the hinterland could come at the expense of safety in the medium term and of the integrity of the state in the long term.
papers.zh_title: 没有暴力垄断的税收垄断：弱国从税收中面临的权衡
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究基于刚果民主共和国腹地的案例研究，提出了关于国家建设的新经济视角。我们探讨了将反叛者视为固定匪徒对国家的影响。当国家通过军事行动使反叛者无法征税时，它无意中鼓励了反叛者掠夺那些他们原本更倾向于征税的公民的资产。当国家转而与反叛者谈判时，这种效应不存在，但谈判损害了国家的合法性，并促使新反叛者的出现。研究结果表明，试图增加弱国在腹地的税收，中期内可能以安全为代价，长期内则以国家完整性为代价。

papers.title: Can Automatic Retention Improve Health Insurance Market Outcomes?
papers.authors: Adrianna L. McIntyre, Mark Shepard, Myles Wagner
papers.abstract: There is growing interest in market design using default rules and other choice architecture principles to steer consumers toward desirable outcomes. Using data from Massachusetts’ health insurance exchange, we study an "automatic retention" policy intended to prevent coverage interruptions among low-income enrollees. Rather than disenroll people who lapse in paying premiums, the policy automatically switches them to an available free plan until they actively cancel or lose eligibility. We find that automatic retention has a sizable impact, switching 14% of consumers annually and differentially retaining healthy, low-cost individuals. The results illustrate the power of defaults to shape insurance coverage outcomes.
papers.zh_title: 自动保留能否改善健康保险市场结果？
papers.zh_abstract: 利用默认规则和其他选择架构原则引导消费者走向理想结果的市场设计日益受到关注。利用马萨诸塞州健康保险交易所的数据，我们研究了一项旨在防止低收入参保人保险中断的“自动保留”政策。该政策不是将未支付保费的参保人除名，而是自动将他们切换到一个可用的免费计划，直到他们主动取消或失去资格。我们发现自动保留产生了显著影响，每年切换14%的消费者，并差异性地保留了健康、低成本的个体。结果说明了默认规则在塑造保险覆盖结果方面的力量。

papers.title: COVID-19 Time-varying Reproduction Numbers Worldwide: An Empirical Analysis of Mandatory and Voluntary Social Distancing
papers.authors: Alexander Chudik, M. Hashem Pesaran, Alessandro Rebucci
papers.abstract: This paper estimates time-varying COVID-19 reproduction numbers worldwide solely based on the number of reported infected cases, allowing for under-reporting. Estimation is based on a moment condition that can be derived from an agent-based stochastic network model of COVID-19 transmission. The outcomes in terms of the reproduction number and the trajectory of per-capita cases through the end of 2020 are very diverse. The reproduction number depends on the transmission rate and the proportion of susceptible population, or the herd immunity effect. Changes in the transmission rate depend on changes in the behavior of the virus, reflecting mutations and vaccinations, and changes in people's behavior, reflecting voluntary or government mandated isolation. Over our sample period, neither mutation nor vaccination are major factors, so one can attribute variation in the transmission rate to variations in behavior. Evidence based on panel data models explaining transmission rates for nine European countries indicates that the diversity of outcomes results from the non-linear interaction of mandatory containment measures, voluntary precautionary isolation, and the economic incentives that governments provided to support isolation. These effects are precisely estimated and robust to various assumptions. As a result, countries with seemingly different social distancing policies achieved quite similar outcomes in terms of the reproduction number. These results imply that ignoring the voluntary component of social distancing could introduce an upward bias in the estimates of the effects of lock-downs and support policies on the transmission rates. The full set of estimation results and the replication package are available on the authors' websites.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, EH, IFM, ITI, LS, PE, POL；JEL：C40, D0, E7, F60, I20
papers.zh_title: 全球COVID-19时变再生数：强制与自愿社交距离的实证分析
papers.zh_abstract: 本文仅基于报告的感染病例数（允许漏报）估计了全球COVID-19的时变再生数。估计基于一个矩条件，该条件可以从基于主体的COVID-19传播随机网络模型中推导得出。截至2020年底，再生数和人均病例轨迹的结果非常多样化。再生数取决于传播率和易感人群比例，即群体免疫效应。传播率的变化取决于病毒行为的变化（反映突变和疫苗接种）以及人们行为的变化（反映自愿或政府强制隔离）。在我们的样本期内，突变和疫苗接种都不是主要因素，因此可以将传播率的变化归因于行为的变化。基于解释九个欧洲国家传播率的面板数据模型的证据表明，结果的多样性源于强制遏制措施、自愿预防性隔离以及政府为支持隔离提供的经济激励的非线性相互作用。这些效应估计精确且对各种假设稳健。因此，看似采取不同社交距离政策的国家在再生数方面取得了相当相似的结果。这些结果表明，忽略社交距离的自愿成分可能会高估封锁和支持政策对传播率的影响。完整的估计结果和复制包可在作者网站上获取。

papers.title: Estimating the Financial Impact of Gene Therapy in the U.S.
papers.authors: Chi Heem Wong, Dexin Li, Nina Wang, Jonathan Gruber, Rena M. Conti, Andrew W. Lo
papers.abstract: We empirically assess the potential financial impact of future gene therapies on the US economy. After identifying 109 late-stage gene therapy clinical trials currently underway, we estimate the number of new and existing patients with corresponding diseases to be treated by these gene therapies, developing and applying novel mathematical models to estimate the increase in quality-adjusted life years for each approved gene therapy. We then simulate the launch prices and the expected spending for these therapies over a 15-year time horizon. Under conservative assumptions, the results of our simulation suggest that an expected total of 1.09 million patients will be treated by gene therapy from January 2020 to December 2034. The expected peak annual spending on these therapies is $25.3 billion, and the expected total spending from January 2020 to December 2034 is $306 billion. Assuming a linear pace of future gene therapy development fitted to past experience, our spending estimate increases by only 15.7% under conservative assumptions. As a proxy for the impact of expected spending on different public and private payers, we decompose the estimated annual spending by treated age group. Since experience suggests that insurers with annual budget constraints may restrict access to therapies with expected benefit to the patient, we consider various methods of payment to ensure access to these therapies even among those insured by the most budget-constrained payers.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, AP, EH, PE；JEL：G17, I11, I13, I18
papers.zh_title: 估算基因疗法在美国的财务影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们实证评估了未来基因疗法对美国经济的潜在财务影响。在识别出目前正在进行中的109项晚期基因疗法临床试验后，我们估算了这些基因疗法将治疗的相关疾病的新增和现有患者数量，并开发并应用新颖的数学模型来估算每种获批基因疗法所增加的质量调整生命年。随后，我们模拟了这些疗法在15年时间范围内的上市价格和预期支出。在保守假设下，我们的模拟结果表明，从2020年1月至2034年12月，预计共有109万名患者将接受基因疗法治疗。这些疗法的预期年度峰值支出为253亿美元，而从2020年1月至2034年12月的预期总支出为3060亿美元。假设未来基因疗法的发展速度与过去经验相符的线性步伐，在保守假设下，我们的支出估算仅增加15.7%。作为预期支出对不同公共和私人支付方影响的代理指标，我们按治疗年龄组分解了估算的年度支出。由于经验表明，面临年度预算约束的保险公司可能会限制对预期对患者有益的疗法的获取，我们考虑了各种支付方式，以确保即使是由预算最紧张的支付方承保的患者也能获得这些疗法。

papers.title: Gender, Selection into Employment, and the Wage Impact of Immigration
papers.authors: George J. Borjas, Anthony Edo
papers.abstract: Immigrant supply shocks are typically expected to reduce the wage of comparable workers. Natives may respond to the lower wage by moving to markets that were not directly targeted by immigrants and where presumably the wage did not drop. This paper argues that the wage change observed in the targeted market depends not only on the size of the native response, but also on which natives choose to respond. A non-random response alters the composition of the sample of native workers, mechanically changing the average native wage in affected markets and biasing the estimated wage impact of immigration. We document the importance of this selection bias in the French labor market, where women accounted for a rapidly increasing share of the foreign-born workforce since 1976. The raw correlations suggest that the immigrant supply shock did not change the wage of French women, but led to a sizable decline in their employment rate. In contrast, immigration had little impact on the employment rate of men, but led to a sizable drop in the male wage. We show that the near-zero correlation between immigration and female wages arises partly because the native women who left the labor force had relatively low wages. Adjusting for the selection bias results in a similar wage elasticity for both French men and women (between -0.7 and -1.0).
papers.zh_title: 性别、就业选择与移民的工资影响
papers.zh_abstract: 移民供给冲击通常预期会降低可比工人的工资。本地人可能会通过迁移到未直接受移民影响且工资可能未下降的市场来应对较低的工资。本文认为，在目标市场中观察到的工资变化不仅取决于本地人反应的大小，还取决于哪些本地人选择做出反应。非随机反应改变了本地工人样本的构成，机械地改变了受影响市场中本地人的平均工资，并导致对移民工资影响的估计产生偏差。我们记录了这种选择偏差在法国劳动力市场中的重要性，自1976年以来，女性在外来劳动力中所占比例迅速增加。原始相关性表明，移民供给冲击并未改变法国女性的工资，但导致其就业率大幅下降。相比之下，移民对男性的就业率影响很小，但导致男性工资大幅下降。我们表明，移民与女性工资之间近乎零的相关性部分源于离开劳动力市场的本地女性工资相对较低。调整选择偏差后，法国男性和女性的工资弹性相似（介于-0.7和-1.0之间）。

papers.title: Technology and the Task Content of Jobs across the Development Spectrum
papers.authors: Julieta Caunedo, Elisa Keller, Yongseok Shin
papers.abstract: Technology is the driver of labor allocation across sectors and occupations. Is the impact of technological change on developing countries similar to its impact on developed countries? Will developing countries follow the same development path that developed economies have taken? Our approach focuses on how technology shifts and reshapes the tasks workers perform on the job, and views occupations as the natural observable stand-in for these tasks. We first take stock of our knowledge on how technological change reallocates labor. We then construct a new measure of occupational task contents for each country and present new evidence on countries' task intensity. In the cross section, developed countries use non-routine analytical and interpersonal tasks more intensively than developing countries, but less intensively use routine-cognitive and routine-manual tasks. Both the occupational employment share and the occupational task contents of a country matter for these relationships. In the time dimension, countries with high initial task intensities experienced a decline in these intensities, suggesting convergence in task intensities across countries. Our results show that occupational task contents ought to be measured for each country for proper analysis. More broadly, we should not simply extrapolate what we know about the impact of technology on the labor market in developed countries to developing countries.
papers.zh_title: 技术与发展谱系中工作的任务内容
papers.zh_abstract: 技术是劳动力在部门和职业间配置的驱动力。技术变革对发展中国家的影响是否与对发达国家的影响相似？发展中国家是否会遵循发达经济体所经历的发展路径？我们的方法侧重于技术如何转移和重塑工人在工作中执行的任务，并将职业视为这些任务的自然可观察替代指标。我们首先总结了关于技术变革如何重新分配劳动力的现有知识。然后，我们为每个国家构建了一个新的职业任务内容衡量指标，并展示了关于国家任务强度的新证据。在横截面上，发达国家比发展中国家更密集地使用非常规分析性和人际交往任务，但较少密集地使用常规认知和常规手动任务。一个国家的职业就业份额和职业任务内容都对这种关系有影响。在时间维度上，初始任务强度高的国家经历了这些强度的下降，表明各国之间的任务强度存在趋同。我们的结果表明，为了进行恰当的分析，应该为每个国家衡量职业任务内容。更广泛地说，我们不应简单地将关于技术对发达国家劳动力市场影响的知识外推到发展中国家。

papers.title: How Do Business Owners Respond to a Tax Cut? Examining the 199A Deduction for Pass-through Firms
papers.authors: Lucas Goodman, Katherine Lim, Bruce Sacerdote, Andrew Whitten
papers.abstract: We measure the short- and medium-run responses of businesses and their owners to Section 199A, a deduction that reduced the effective tax rate on most U.S. pass-through business income beginning in 2018. Using tax records of individuals and businesses, we compare taxpayers with exogenously differing levels of exposure to the deduction, exploiting limitations within the statute. We find evidence of a 3 to 4 percent increase in reported business income eligible for the deduction during 2018 and 2019 for the more-exposed group relative to the less-exposed group. We also find some evidence of effects on specific hypothesized margins of adjustment. Partnerships reduced ineligible forms of compensation paid to owners by approximately 10 to 15 percent, in line with the incentives created by Section 199A, but S corporations did not reduce wages to owners. We find no evidence that Section 199A encouraged movements from employee to contractor status or increased contractor activity. Finally, we find little evidence of changes in real economic activity as measured by physical investment, wages to non-owners, or employment.
papers.zh_title: 企业主如何应对减税？——审视穿透型企业的199A扣除
papers.zh_abstract: 我们衡量了企业及其所有者对第199A条的短期和中期反应，该条款自2018年起降低了大多数美国穿透型企业商业收入的有效税率。利用个人和企业的税务记录，我们比较了在法定限制下，对扣除条款具有外生不同暴露程度的纳税人。我们发现，在2018年和2019年，相对于暴露程度较低的群体，暴露程度较高的群体符合扣除条件的报告商业收入增加了3%至4%。我们还发现了一些证据表明，该条款对特定的假设调整边际产生了影响。合伙企业将支付给所有者的不符合条件的报酬形式减少了约10%至15%，这与第199A条创造的激励一致，但S公司并未减少支付给所有者的工资。我们没有发现证据表明第199A条鼓励从雇员身份向承包商身份的转变或增加了承包商活动。最后，我们发现几乎没有证据表明实际经济活动发生变化，如实物投资、非所有者工资或就业。

papers.title: Venture Capital’s “Me Too” Moment
papers.authors: Sophie Calder-Wang, Paul Gompers, Patrick Sweeney
papers.abstract: In this paper, we document the historically low rate of hiring of women in the venture capital sector. We find that the high-profile Ellen Pao v. Kleiner Perkins gender discrimination trial had dramatic treatment effects. In difference-in-differences regressions, we find that the rate of hiring of female venture capitalists increased substantially after the trial and that the hiring was more pronounced in states that were more receptive to the exposure. We use the state-level mandated maternity benefits as an instrument for the receptivity to the treatment effects of the Pao Trial. We also show that the fraction of founders who are female increases after the Pao Trial, but that the increase is driven entirely by the hiring of female venture capitalists. There is no increase in the propensity of male venture capitalists to invest in female founders in the post-Pao Trial period.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, LS, PR；JEL：G3, J01, J16, J7, K31
papers.zh_title: 风险投资的“我也是”时刻
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们记录了风险投资行业历史上女性招聘率低下的情况。我们发现，备受瞩目的Ellen Pao诉Kleiner Perkins性别歧视案产生了显著的处理效应。在双重差分回归中，我们发现审判后女性风险投资家的招聘率大幅上升，并且这种招聘在更易接受该案件曝光的州更为明显。我们使用州级强制产假福利作为Pao案处理效应接受度的工具变量。我们还表明，Pao案后女性创始人的比例有所增加，但这种增加完全是由女性风险投资家的招聘所驱动的。在Pao案后时期，男性风险投资家投资于女性创始人的倾向没有增加。

papers.title: Addressing Biases that Impact Homeowners’ Adoption of Solar Panels
papers.authors: Howard Kunreuther, Anna Polise, Quinlyn Spellmeyer
papers.abstract: Solar power is now economically competitive with fossil fuels in many countries, yet relatively few homeowners have installed solar panels on their property. A principal reason for this behavior stems from cognitive biases—such as myopia, inertia and herding—that cause consumers to avoid investing in long-term measures, even those that are financially attractive to them and produce social benefits such as reducing the long-term consequences of climate change. A behavioral risk audit can demonstrate ways to address these cognitive biases, in concert with short-term economic incentives and social influences. We focus on the installation of solar panels, an issue that has relevance to residents in the United States and the European Union, and to property owned by businesses and governments.
papers.zh_title: 解决影响房主安装太阳能电池板的偏见
papers.zh_abstract: 太阳能发电在许多国家现在已与化石燃料在经济上具有竞争力，然而相对较少的房主在其房产上安装了太阳能电池板。这种行为的一个主要原因源于认知偏见——例如短视、惯性和从众效应——这些偏见导致消费者避免投资于长期措施，即使是那些对他们具有财务吸引力并能产生社会效益（如减少气候变化的长期后果）的措施。行为风险审计可以展示如何结合短期经济激励和社会影响来解决这些认知偏见。我们专注于太阳能电池板的安装，这一问题与美国和欧盟的居民以及企业和政府拥有的财产相关。

papers.title: Robust Decarbonization of the US Power Sector: Policy Options
papers.authors: James H. Stock, Daniel N. Stuart
papers.abstract: To reliably achieve deep decarbonization of the US power sector, a candidate policy must perform robustly across a range of possible future trajectories of demand, fossil fuel prices, and prices of new wind and solar capacity. Using a modified version of the NREL ReEDS model with scenarios that span different trajectories of demand, fuel prices, and technology costs, we find that some recently proposed policies can robustly achieve 80% decarbonization (relative to 2005 emissions) or more by 2035, but many do not. The two robustly successful policies are a tradeable performance standard (TPS) and a hybrid Clean Electricity Standard (CES) with a 100% clean target, partial crediting of gas generation, and a $40/mton CO2 alternative compliance payment (ACP) backstop. Both are nearly as cost effective as the emissions-equivalent efficient policy. A $40 carbon tax nearly achieves the robust 80% threshold and, in most scenarios, drives deep decarbonization. A 90% CES (without partial crediting) fails to achieve robust 2035 decarbonization because it need not drive coal out of the system. Simply extending renewable energy tax credits, which are set to expire, does not drive significant decarbonization in most scenarios, nor does relying on increased ambition in green-leaning states.
papers.zh_title: 美国电力部门的稳健脱碳：政策选择
papers.zh_abstract: 为了可靠地实现美国电力部门的深度脱碳，候选政策必须在需求、化石燃料价格以及新的风能和太阳能容量价格的一系列可能未来轨迹中表现出稳健性。使用修改版的NREL ReEDS模型，并采用涵盖不同需求、燃料价格和技术成本轨迹的情景，我们发现一些最近提出的政策能够稳健地实现到2035年80%的脱碳（相对于2005年排放量）或更多，但许多政策不能。两个稳健成功的政策是可交易绩效标准（TPS）和混合清洁电力标准（CES），后者具有100%清洁目标、对天然气发电的部分信用以及每吨二氧化碳40美元的替代合规付款（ACP）后盾。两者几乎与排放等效的高效政策一样具有成本效益。每吨40美元的碳税几乎达到了稳健的80%阈值，并且在大多数情景下推动了深度脱碳。90%的CES（无部分信用）未能实现稳健的2035年脱碳，因为它不必将煤炭赶出系统。简单地延长即将到期的可再生能源税收抵免，在大多数情景下不会推动显著的脱碳，依赖绿色倾向州增加雄心也是如此。

papers.title: Optimal Deposit Insurance
papers.authors: Eduardo Dávila, Itay Goldstein
papers.abstract: This paper studies the optimal determination of deposit insurance when bank runs are possible. We show that the welfare impact of changes in the level of deposit insurance coverage can be generally expressed in terms of a small number of sufficient statistics, which include the level of losses in specific scenarios and the probability of bank failure. We characterize the wedges that determine the optimal ex-ante regulation, which map to asset- and liability-side regulation. We demonstrate how to employ our framework in an application to the most recent change in coverage, which took place in 2008.
papers.zh_title: 最优存款保险
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了在可能发生银行挤兑的情况下，如何最优地确定存款保险。我们证明，存款保险覆盖水平变化的福利影响通常可以用少数几个充分统计量来表示，这些统计量包括特定情景下的损失水平和银行破产概率。我们刻画了决定最优事前监管的楔子，这些楔子对应于资产端和负债端的监管。我们展示了如何将我们的框架应用于最近一次（2008年）覆盖范围变化的分析中。

papers.title: Flattening the Curve: Pandemic-Induced Revaluation of Urban Real Estate
papers.authors: Arpit Gupta, Vrinda Mittal, Jonas Peeters, Stijn Van Nieuwerburgh
papers.abstract: We show that the COVID-19 pandemic brought house price and rent declines in city centers, and price and rent increases away from the center, thereby flattening the bid-rent curve in most U.S. metropolitan areas. Across MSAs, the flattening of the bid-rent curve is larger when working from home is more prevalent, housing markets are more regulated, and supply is less elastic. Housing markets predict that urban rent growth will exceed suburban rent growth for the foreseeable future.
papers.zh_title: 拉平曲线：疫情引发的城市房地产重估
papers.zh_abstract: 我们表明，COVID-19疫情导致城市中心的房价和租金下降，而远离中心地区的房价和租金上涨，从而拉平了美国大多数大都市区的投标租金曲线。在都市统计区层面，当居家办公更为普遍、住房市场监管更严格以及住房供应弹性更小时，投标租金曲线的拉平程度更大。住房市场预测，在可预见的未来，城市租金的增长将超过郊区租金的增长。

papers.title: Minority Turnout and Representation under Cumulative Voting. An Experiment.
papers.authors: Alessandra Casella, Jeffrey Guo, Michelle Jiang
papers.abstract: Under majoritarian election systems, securing participation and representation of minorities remains an open problem, made salient in the US by its history of voter suppression. One remedy recommended by the courts is Cumulative Voting (CV): each voter has as many votes as open positions and can cumulate votes on as few candidates as desired. Theory predicts that CV encourages the minority to overcome obstacles to voting: although each voter is treated equally, CV increases minority's turnout relative to the majority, and the minority's share of seats won. A lab experiment based on a costly voting design strongly supports both predictions.
papers.zh_title: 少数族裔投票率与累积投票制下的代表性：一项实验
papers.zh_abstract: 在多数决选举制度下，确保少数族裔的参与和代表性仍然是一个悬而未决的问题，美国历史上压制选民的行为使这一问题尤为突出。法院推荐的一种补救措施是累积投票制：每位选民拥有的票数与待选职位数量相同，并且可以将票数累积投给尽可能少的候选人。理论预测，累积投票制会鼓励少数族裔克服投票障碍：尽管每位选民被平等对待，但累积投票制会提高少数族裔相对于多数族裔的投票率，并增加少数族裔赢得的席位比例。一项基于成本投票设计的实验室实验有力地支持了这两个预测。

papers.title: Ideology and Performance in Public Organizations
papers.authors: Jorg L. Spenkuch, Edoardo Teso, Guo Xu
papers.abstract: We combine personnel records of the United States federal bureaucracy from 1997-2019 with administrative voter registration data to study how ideological alignment between politicians and bureaucrats affects the personnel policies and performance of public organizations. We present four results. (i) Consistent with the use of the spoils system to align ideology at the highest levels of government, we document significant partisan cycles and substantial turnover among political appointees. (ii) By contrast, we find virtually no political cycles in the civil service. The lower levels of the federal government resemble a "Weberian" bureaucracy that appears to be largely protected from political interference. (iii) Democrats make up the plurality of civil servants. Overrepresentation of Democrats increases with seniority, with the difference in career progression being largely explained by positive selection on observables. (iv) Political misalignment carries a sizeable performance penalty. Exploiting presidential transitions as a source of "within-bureaucrat" variation in the political alignment of procurement officers over time, we find that contracts overseen by a misaligned officer exhibit cost overruns that are, on average, 8% higher than the mean overrun. We provide evidence that is consistent with a general "morale effect," whereby misaligned bureaucrats are less motivated.
papers.zh_title: 公共组织中的意识形态与绩效
papers.zh_abstract: 我们将1997-2019年美国联邦官僚机构的人事记录与行政选民登记数据相结合，研究政治家与官僚之间的意识形态一致性如何影响公共组织的人事政策和绩效。我们提出了四个结果。（i）与在政府最高层使用分赃制来统一意识形态的做法一致，我们记录了政治任命官员中显著的党派周期和大量的人员更替。（ii）相比之下，我们在文官系统中几乎没有发现政治周期。联邦政府的较低层级类似于一种“韦伯式”官僚机构，似乎在很大程度上免受政治干预。（iii）民主党人在文官中占多数。民主党人的过度代表性随着资历的增加而增加，职业发展方面的差异在很大程度上可以通过可观测特征的正向选择来解释。（iv）政治错位会带来相当大的绩效损失。利用总统换届作为采购官员政治一致性随时间变化的“官僚内部”变异来源，我们发现，由错位官员监督的合同，其成本超支平均比平均超支高出8%。我们提供的证据与一种普遍的“士气效应”一致，即错位的官僚积极性较低。

papers.title: The Impact of Paid Family Leave on Employers: Evidence from New York
papers.authors: Ann P. Bartel, Maya Rossin-Slater, Christopher J. Ruhm, Meredith Slopen, Jane Waldfogel
papers.abstract: We designed and fielded a survey of New York and Pennsylvania firms to study the impacts of New York's 2018 Paid Family Leave policy on employer outcomes. We match each NY firm to a comparable PA firm and use difference-in-difference models to analyze within-match-pair changes in outcomes. We find that PFL leads to an improvement in employers' rating of their ease of handling long employee absences, concentrated in the first policy year and among firms with 50-99 employees. We also find an increase in employee leave-taking in the second policy year, driven by smaller firms.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：I38, J21, J22, J23, J32, J38
papers.zh_title: 带薪家事假对雇主的影响：来自纽约的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们设计并开展了一项针对纽约州和宾夕法尼亚州企业的调查，以研究纽约州2018年带薪家事假政策对雇主结果的影响。我们将每家纽约州企业与一家可比的宾夕法尼亚州企业进行匹配，并使用双重差分模型分析匹配对内结果的变化。我们发现，带薪家事假政策导致雇主对处理员工长期缺勤难易程度的评分有所提高，这种改善主要集中在政策实施的第一年以及拥有50-99名员工的企业中。我们还发现，在政策实施的第二年，员工休假有所增加，这主要是由规模较小的企业推动的。

papers.title: Immigration and Regional Specialization in AI
papers.authors: Gordon H. Hanson
papers.abstract: I examine the specialization of US commuting zones in AI-related occupations over the 2000 to 2018 period. I define AI-related jobs based on keywords in Census occupational titles. Using the approach in Lin (2011) to identify new work, I measure job growth related to AI by weighting employment growth in AI-related occupations by the share of job titles in these occupations that were added after 1990. Overall, regional specialization in AI-related activities mirrors that of regional specialization in IT. However, foreign-born and native-born workers within the sector tend to cluster in different locations. Whereas specialization of the foreign-born in AI-related jobs is strongest in high-tech hubs with a preponderance of private-sector employment, native-born specialization in AI-related jobs is strongest in centers for military and space-related research. Nationally, foreign-born workers account for 55% of job growth in AI-related occupations since 2000. In regression analysis, I find that US commuting zones exposed to a larger increases in the supply of college-educated immigrants became more specialized in AI-related occupations and that this increased specialization was due entirely to the employment of the foreign born. My results suggest that access to highly skilled workers constrains AI-related job growth and that immigration of the college-educated helps relax this constraint.
papers.zh_title: 移民与人工智能领域的区域专业化
