papers.zh_abstract: 自然资源管理是一个动态问题，其分析因主体在短期和长期内选择不同反应而变得复杂。长期考虑在地下水管理中尤为突出。我们估算了加利福尼亚州（全球最有价值的农业区之一）农民对地下水抽水成本变化的反应，该地区多年生作物通过前期成本和长期收益引入了动态性。利用受监管电价驱动的准实验性地下水成本变化，我们估计了一个包含状态依赖和前瞻性农民的土地利用动态离散选择模型。农民对地下水的短期需求弹性为-0.79，且没有作物选择反应。相比之下，其长期弹性为-0.46，包括高耗水多年生作物种植面积的大幅减少和休耕增加。因此，仅进行短期分析会得出数量上不同的结论。加利福尼亚州标志性的地下水可持续性目标将需要在受监管地区征收52%的税，这将使多年生作物面积减少10%，休耕面积增加21%。

papers.title: When Scale and Replication Work: Learning from Summer Youth Employment Experiments
papers.authors: Sara Heller
papers.abstract: Because successful human capital interventions often fail to scale or replicate, public investment decisions require understanding how program size, context, and implementation shape program effects. This paper uses two new randomized controlled trials of summer youth employment programs in Chicago and Philadelphia to demonstrate how multiple experiments can help explain replicability and inform the expansion of promising approaches. Even when these programs grow or change models across contexts, participation consistently reduces criminal justice involvement. It may also decrease the need for child protective services and behavioral health treatment. Experimental variation in program model and local provider generates no detectable heterogeneity, suggesting that effects replicate partly because variability in implementation does not matter. There is, however, individual-level heterogeneity that explains differences in effect magnitudes across populations and informs optimal targeting; youth at higher risk of socially costly outcomes experience larger benefits. Identifying more interventions that combine this pattern of treatment heterogeneity with robust replicability could aid efforts to reduce social inequality efficiently.
papers.zh_title: 当规模与复制有效时：从夏季青年就业实验中学习
papers.zh_abstract: 由于成功的人力资本干预措施往往难以规模化或复制，公共投资决策需要理解项目规模、背景和实施如何塑造项目效果。本文利用芝加哥和费城两个新的夏季青年就业项目随机对照试验，展示了多个实验如何有助于解释可复制性并为有前景方法的扩展提供信息。即使这些项目在不同背景下增长或改变模式，参与始终能减少刑事司法介入。它还可能减少对儿童保护服务和行为健康治疗的需求。项目模式和当地提供者的实验性变化未产生可检测的异质性，这表明效果部分复制是因为实施中的变异性无关紧要。然而，存在个体层面的异质性，这解释了不同人群间效应量级的差异，并为最优目标定位提供信息；面临更高社会成本风险青年获得了更大收益。识别更多结合了这种处理异质性模式与稳健可复制性的干预措施，可能有助于有效减少社会不平等。

papers.title: The Economic Ripple Effects of COVID-19
papers.authors: Francisco J. Buera, Roberto N. Fattal-Jaef, Hugo Hopenhayn, P. Andres Neumeyer, Yongseok Shin
papers.abstract: What are the effects of a temporary lockdown of the economy? Do firms' deteriorating balance sheets and labor market frictions propagate and prolong the effects? We answer these questions in a model with financial and labor market frictions. The model makes quantitative predictions about the effect of lockdowns of varying magnitude and duration on output, employment and firm dynamics. We find that the effects are not persistent if (i) workers on temporary layoff can be recalled by their previous employers without having to go through the frictional labor market and (ii) the government provides employment subsidies to firms during the lockdown. However, the effects are heterogeneous and young non-essential firms are disproportionately affected. In addition, if lockdowns lead to more permanent reallocation across industries, the recession becomes more protracted. Although the paper is motivated by the lockdowns during the Covid-19 pandemic, the framework can be readily applied to large, temporary shocks of different nature.
papers.zh_title: COVID-19的经济涟漪效应
papers.zh_abstract: 经济暂时封锁的影响是什么？企业恶化的资产负债表和劳动力市场摩擦是否会传播并延长这些影响？我们在一个包含金融和劳动力市场摩擦的模型中回答了这些问题。该模型对不同程度和持续时间封锁对产出、就业和企业动态的影响做出了定量预测。我们发现，如果（i）临时解雇的工人可以被前雇主召回而无需经过摩擦性劳动力市场，并且（ii）政府在封锁期间为企业提供就业补贴，那么这些影响不会持续。然而，影响是异质性的，年轻非必需企业受到的影响尤为严重。此外，如果封锁导致跨行业更永久的重新配置，衰退将变得更加持久。尽管本文的动机是COVID-19大流行期间的封锁，但该框架可以很容易地应用于不同性质的大规模临时冲击。

papers.title: The Effects of Default Choice on Student Loan Borrowing: Experimental Evidence from a Public Research University
papers.authors: Dennis A. Kramer II, Christina J. Lamb, Lindsay C. Page
papers.abstract: We explore the role of defaults and choice architecture on student loan decision-making, experimentally testing the impact pre-populating either decline or accept decisions compared to an active choice, no pre-population, decision. We demonstrate that the default choice presented does influence student loan borrowing decisions. Specifically, compared to active choice, students presented within a pre-populated decline decision were almost five percent less likely to accept all packaged loans and borrowed between 4.6 and 4.8 percent less in federal educational loans. The reductions in borrowing appears to be concentrated within unsubsidized loans with those assigned to the opt-in condition borrowing 8.3 percent less in unsubsidized loans. These changes in borrowing did not induce substitution towards private or Parent PLUS loans nor did they negatively impact enrollment, academic performance, or on-campus work outcomes in the same academic year.
papers.zh_title: 默认选择对学生贷款借款的影响：来自一所公立研究型大学的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了默认选择和选择架构对学生贷款决策的作用，通过实验测试了预填拒绝或接受决策与主动选择（无预填）决策相比的影响。我们证明，呈现的默认选择确实会影响学生贷款借款决策。具体来说，与主动选择相比，面对预填拒绝决策的学生接受所有打包贷款的可能性降低了近5%，联邦教育贷款借款额减少了4.6%至4.8%。借款减少似乎集中在无补贴贷款上，被分配到选择加入条件的学生无补贴贷款借款额减少了8.3%。这些借款变化并未导致向私人贷款或Parent PLUS贷款的替代，也未对同一学年的入学、学业表现或校内工作结果产生负面影响。

papers.title: The Ruble Collapse in an Online Marketplace: Some Lessons for Market Designers
papers.authors: John J. Horton
papers.abstract: The sharp devaluation of the ruble in 2014 increased the real returns to Russians from working in a global online labor marketplace, as contracts in this market are dollar-denominated. Russians clearly noticed the opportunity, with Russian hours-worked increasing substantially, primarily on the extensive margin—incumbent Russians already active were fairly inelastic. Contrary to the predictions of bargaining models, there was little to no pass-through of the ruble price changes in to wages. There was also no evidence of a demand-side response, with buyers not posting more "Russian friendly" jobs, suggesting limited cross-side externalities. The key findings—a high extensive margin elasticity but low intensive margin elasticity; little pass-through into wages; and little evidence of a cross-side externality—have implications for market designers with respect to pricing and supply acquisition.
papers.zh_title: 在线市场中的卢布崩溃：给市场设计者的一些教训
papers.zh_abstract: 2014年卢布大幅贬值增加了俄罗斯人在全球在线劳动力市场工作的实际回报，因为该市场的合同以美元计价。俄罗斯人显然注意到了这一机会，俄罗斯人的工作时间大幅增加，主要是在广延边际上——已有的俄罗斯活跃工人相当缺乏弹性。与讨价还价模型的预测相反，卢布价格变化几乎没有传导至工资。也没有需求侧反应的证据，买家没有发布更多“适合俄罗斯人”的工作，这表明跨边外部性有限。关键发现——高广延边际弹性但低集约边际弹性；工资传导微弱；以及几乎没有跨边外部性的证据——对市场设计者在定价和供应获取方面具有启示意义。

papers.title: Computerization, Obsolescence, and the Length of Working Life
papers.authors: Péter Hudomiet, Robert J. Willis
papers.abstract: This paper analyzes how computerization affected the labor market outcomes of older workers between 1984 and 2017. Using the computerization supplements of the Current Population Survey (CPS) we show that different occupations were computerized at different times, older workers tended to start using computers with a delay compared to younger workers, but computer use within occupations converged to the same levels across age groups eventually. That is, there was a temporary knowledge gap between younger and older workers in most occupations. We estimate how this knowledge gap affected older workers’ labor market outcomes using data from the CPS and the Health and Retirement Study. Our models control for occupation and time fixed effects and in some models; we also control for full occupation-time interactions and use middle aged (age 40-49) workers as the control group. We find strong and robust negative effects of the knowledge gap on wages, and a large, temporary increase in transitions from work to non-participation, consistent with a model of creative destruction in which the computerization of jobs made older workers’ skills obsolete in birth cohorts that experienced computerization relatively late in their careers. We find larger effects on females and on middle-skilled workers.
papers.zh_title: 计算机化、技能过时与工作寿命长度
papers.zh_abstract: 本文分析了1984年至2017年间计算机化如何影响老年工人的劳动力市场结果。利用当前人口调查（CPS）的计算机化补充数据，我们表明不同职业在不同时间实现计算机化，老年工人开始使用计算机的时间往往晚于年轻工人，但各年龄组内职业的计算机使用最终趋同于相同水平。也就是说，在大多数职业中，年轻和老年工人之间存在暂时的知识差距。我们利用CPS和健康与退休研究的数据，估计了这一知识差距如何影响老年工人的劳动力市场结果。我们的模型控制了职业和时间固定效应，在某些模型中，我们还控制了完整的职业-时间交互作用，并使用中年（40-49岁）工人作为对照组。我们发现知识差距对工资有强烈且稳健的负面影响，并且从工作到非参与状态的转变出现了大幅、暂时的增加，这与创造性破坏模型一致，在该模型中，职业的计算机化使得在职业生涯较晚阶段经历计算机化的出生队列中，老年工人的技能过时。我们发现对女性和中等技能工人的影响更大。

papers.title: Opening up Military Innovation: Causal Eﬀects of Reforms to U.S. Defense Research
papers.authors: Sabrina T. Howell, Jason Rathje, John Van Reenen, Jun Wong
papers.abstract: For governments procuring innovation, one choice is whether to specify desired products (a “Conventional” approach) or allow firms to suggest ideas (an “Open” approach). Using a U.S. Air Force R&D grant program, where Open and Conventional competitions were held simultaneously, we find that Open awards increase both commercial innovation and technology adoption by the military. In contrast, Conventional awards have no positive effects on new technology, but do create more program lock-in. We present evidence that openness matters independently from inducing differential selection, for example of less well-established firms. These results suggest benefits from open approaches to innovation procurement.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, PE, PR；JEL：H56, H57, O31, O32, O33, O36, O38
papers.zh_title: 开放军事创新：美国国防研究改革的因果效应
papers.zh_abstract: 对于采购创新的政府而言，一个选择是具体规定所需产品（“传统”方法），还是允许企业提出想法（“开放”方法）。利用美国空军研发资助项目（其中开放和传统竞赛同时进行），我们发现开放奖项能同时促进商业创新和军事技术采纳。相比之下，传统奖项对新技术没有积极影响，但会导致更多的项目锁定。我们提供的证据表明，开放性本身独立于诱导差异化选择（例如选择不太成熟的企业）而产生作用。这些结果表明，创新采购的开放方法具有益处。

papers.title: The Impact of Domestic Travel Bans on COVID-19 is Nonlinear in Their Duration
papers.authors: Fiona Burlig, Anant Sudarshan, Garrison Schlauch
papers.abstract: Domestic mobility restrictions to control the spread of COVID-19 are widespread in developing countries, and have trapped millions of migrant workers in hotspot cities. We show that bans can increase cumulative infections relative to a counterfactual sans restrictions. A SEIR model shows bans’ impacts are nonlinear in duration. We empirically test this hypothesis using a natural experiment in India as well as data from China, Indonesia, the Philippines, South Africa, and Kenya. Although very short and long restrictions limit the spread of disease, moderately lengthy restrictions substantially increase infections. This underscores the importance of considering duration in mobility-restricting policy decisions in developing countries.
papers.zh_title: 国内旅行禁令对COVID-19的影响与其持续时间呈非线性关系
papers.zh_abstract: 在发展中国家，为控制COVID-19传播而实施的国内出行限制措施十分普遍，并已导致数百万农民工被困在疫情热点城市。我们表明，与无限制的反事实情况相比，禁令可能增加累计感染人数。一个SEIR模型显示，禁令的影响与其持续时间呈非线性关系。我们利用印度的自然实验以及来自中国、印度尼西亚、菲律宾、南非和肯尼亚的数据，对这一假设进行了实证检验。尽管非常短和非常长的限制措施能限制疾病传播，但中等长度的限制措施会显著增加感染人数。这强调了在发展中国家制定限制出行政策时考虑持续时间的重要性。

papers.title: Using Social Media to Identify the Effects of Congressional Viewpoints on Asset Prices
papers.authors: Francesco Bianchi, Roberto Gomez Cram, Howard Kung
papers.abstract: We use a high-frequency identification approach to document that individual politicians affect asset prices. We exploit the regular flow of viewpoints contained in Congress members’ tweets. Supportive (critical) tweets increase (decrease) the stock prices of the targeted firm and the corresponding industry in minutes around the tweet. The bulk of the stock price effects is concentrated in the tweets revealing news about future legislative action. The effects are amplified around committee meeting days, especially when the tweet originates from committee members and influential politicians. Overall, we show that Congress members’ social media accounts are an important source of political news.
papers.zh_title: 利用社交媒体识别国会观点对资产价格的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们采用高频识别方法，证明个别政治家会影响资产价格。我们利用了国会议员推文中定期流露的观点。支持性（批评性）推文会在发布后几分钟内提高（降低）目标公司及相应行业的股票价格。股票价格效应的大部分集中在揭示未来立法行动新闻的推文中。在委员会会议日前后，当推文来自委员会成员或有影响力的政治家时，这种效应会放大。总体而言，我们表明国会议员的社交媒体账户是政治新闻的重要来源。

papers.title: Science as a Public Good: Public Use and Funding of Science
papers.authors: Yian Yin, Yuxiao Dong, Kuansan Wang, Dashun Wang, Benjamin Jones
papers.abstract: Knowledge of how science is consumed in public domains is essential for a deeper understanding of the role of science in human society. While science is heavily supported by public funding, common depictions suggest that scientific research remains an isolated or ‘ivory tower’ activity, with weak connectivity to public use, little relationship between the quality of research and its public use, and little correspondence between the funding of science and its public use. This paper introduces a measurement framework to examine public good features of science, allowing us to study public uses of science, the public funding of science, and how use and funding relate. Specifically, we integrate five large-scale datasets that link scientific publications from all scientific fields to their upstream funding support and downstream public uses across three public domains – government documents, the news media, and marketplace invention. We find that the public uses of science are extremely diverse, with different public domains drawing distinctively across scientific fields. Yet amidst these differences, we find key forms of alignment in the interface between science and society. First, despite concerns that the public does not engage high-quality science, we find universal alignment, in each scientific field and public domain, between what the public consumes and what is highly impactful within science. Second, despite myriad factors underpinning the public funding of science, the resulting allocation across fields presents a striking alignment with the field’s collective public use. Overall, public uses of science present a rich landscape of specialized consumption, yet collectively science and society interface with remarkable, quantifiable alignment between scientific use, public use, and funding.
papers.zh_title: 科学作为公共品：科学的公共使用与资助
papers.zh_abstract: 了解科学如何在公共领域被消费，对于更深入理解科学在人类社会中的作用至关重要。尽管科学受到公共资金的大力支持，但常见的描述表明，科学研究仍然是一项孤立或“象牙塔”式的活动，与公共使用的联系薄弱，研究质量与其公共使用之间关系不大，科学的资助与其公共使用之间也缺乏对应。本文引入了一个测量框架来审视科学的公共品特征，使我们能够研究科学的公共使用、科学的公共资助，以及使用与资助之间的关系。具体而言，我们整合了五个大规模数据集，将来自所有科学领域的科学出版物与其上游的资助支持以及下游在三个公共领域——政府文件、新闻媒体和市场发明——中的公共使用联系起来。我们发现，科学的公共使用极其多样化，不同的公共领域对不同科学领域的利用方式截然不同。然而，在这些差异之中，我们在科学与社会的接口处发现了关键的一致性形式。首先，尽管存在公众不接触高质量科学的担忧，但我们发现在每个科学领域和公共领域中，公众消费的内容与科学内部具有高影响力的内容之间存在普遍的一致性。其次，尽管科学公共资助的基础因素众多，但由此产生的跨领域资金分配与各领域的集体公共使用呈现出显著的一致性。总体而言，科学的公共使用呈现出一幅专业化消费的丰富图景，但集体来看，科学与社会的接口在科学使用、公共使用和资助之间展现出显著且可量化的一致性。

papers.title: Revisiting Capital-Skill Complementarity, Inequality, and Labor Share
papers.authors: Lee E. Ohanian, Musa Orak, Shihan Shen
papers.abstract: This paper revisits capital-skill complementarity and inequality, as in Krusell, Ohanian, Rios-Rull and Violante (KORV, 2000). Using their methodology, we study how well the KORV model accounts for more recent data, including the large changes in labor’s share of income that were not present in KORV. We study both labor share of gross income (as in KORV), and income net of depreciation. We also use non-farm business sector output as an alternative measure of production to real GDP. We find strong evidence for continued capital-skill complementarity in the most recent data, and that the model continues to closely account for the skill premium. The model captures the average level of labor share, though it overpredicts its level by 2-4 percentage points at the end of the period.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS；JEL：E13, E25, J23, J3, J68
papers.zh_title: 重新审视资本-技能互补性、不平等与劳动份额
papers.zh_abstract: 本文重新审视了Krusell、Ohanian、Rios-Rull和Violante（KORV，2000）中的资本-技能互补性与不平等问题。我们使用他们的方法，研究KORV模型在多大程度上解释了更近期的数据，包括KORV中未出现的劳动收入份额的巨大变化。我们同时研究了总收入的劳动份额（如KORV）和扣除折旧后的收入。我们还使用非农商业部门产出作为实际GDP的替代生产指标。我们发现，在最新数据中，资本-技能互补性持续存在的有力证据，并且该模型继续紧密地解释了技能溢价。该模型捕捉了劳动份额的平均水平，尽管在期末其预测水平高出了2-4个百分点。

papers.title: The Impact of Aggregators on Internet News Consumption
papers.authors: Susan Athey, Markus Mobius, Jeno Pal
papers.abstract: A policy debate centers around the question how news aggregators such as Google News affect traffic to online news sites. Many publishers view aggregators as substitutes for traditional news consumption while aggregators view themselves as complements because they make news discovery easier. We use Spain as a natural experiment because Google News shut down altogether in response to a copyright reform enacted in December 2014. We compare the news consumption of a large number of Google News users with a synthetic control group of similar non-Google News users. We find that the shutdown of Google News reduces overall news consumption by about 20% for treatment users, and reduces page views on publishers other than Google News by 10%. This decrease is concentrated around small publishers. We further find that users are able to replace some but not all of the types of news they previously read. Post-shutdown, they read less breaking news, hard news, and news that is not well covered on their favorite news publishers. These news categories explain most of the overall reduction in news consumption, and shed light on the mechanisms through which aggregators interact with traditional publishers.
papers.zh_title: 聚合器对互联网新闻消费的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 一场政策辩论的核心问题是，像谷歌新闻这样的新闻聚合器如何影响在线新闻网站的流量。许多出版商将聚合器视为传统新闻消费的替代品，而聚合器则将自己视为互补品，因为它们使新闻发现更容易。我们以西班牙为自然实验，因为谷歌新闻在2014年12月一项版权改革实施后完全关闭。我们比较了大量谷歌新闻用户与由类似非谷歌新闻用户组成的合成对照组的新闻消费情况。我们发现，谷歌新闻的关闭使处理用户的总体新闻消费减少了约20%，并使谷歌新闻以外出版商的页面浏览量减少了10%。这种减少集中在小型出版商身上。我们进一步发现，用户能够替换他们之前阅读的部分（但非全部）新闻类型。关闭后，他们阅读的突发新闻、硬新闻以及其最喜爱的新闻出版商未充分报道的新闻减少了。这些新闻类别解释了新闻消费总体减少的大部分原因，并揭示了聚合器与传统出版商相互作用的机制。

papers.title: The Dance Between Government and Private Investors: Public Entrepreneurial Finance around the Globe
papers.authors: Jessica Bai, Shai Bernstein, Abhishek Dev, Josh Lerner
papers.abstract: This paper examines the interaction between governments and private capital investors when financing early-stage ventures. We first provide a simple conceptual framework to explore when collaboration between governments and private investors is likely to emerge. Using hand-collected data on 755 programs worldwide, we find that government programs frequently involve private capital investors. Collaboration is greater when governments are more effective, when programs target earlier-stage companies, and when the local private venture market is more developed. Such collaborations mostly occur through joint equity investments and matching-funds requirements. These findings underscore the importance of government synergies with local private capital markets.
papers.zh_title: 政府与私人投资者之间的共舞：全球公共创业融资
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了在资助早期创业企业时政府与私人资本投资者之间的互动。我们首先提供了一个简单的概念框架，以探讨政府与私人投资者之间的合作何时可能产生。利用我们手工收集的全球755个项目的相关数据，我们发现政府项目经常涉及私人资本投资者。当政府效率更高、项目针对更早期公司、以及当地私人风险市场更发达时，合作程度更高。这种合作主要通过联合股权投资和配套资金要求来实现。这些发现强调了政府与当地私人资本市场协同作用的重要性。

papers.title: Women in Academic Economics: Have We Made Progress?
papers.authors: Donna K. Ginther, Shulamit Kahn
papers.abstract: This study uses data from Academic Analytics to examine gender differences in promotion to associate professor in economics. We found that women in economics were 15% less likely to be promoted to associate professor after controlling for cumulative publications, citations, grants and grant dollars. In contrast, we found no significant gender differences in promotion in other fields including biomedical science, physical science, political science, mathematics and statistics, and engineering. We separated the sample by the research intensity of institutions and found suggestive evidence that these results were being driven by less research-intensive institutions.
papers.zh_title: 经济学界的女性：我们取得进展了吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究使用Academic Analytics的数据，考察了经济学领域晋升副教授时的性别差异。我们发现，在控制了累计发表量、引用量、资助金额和资助笔数后，经济学领域的女性晋升副教授的可能性比男性低15%。相比之下，在其他领域，包括生物医学科学、物理科学、政治学、数学与统计学以及工程学，我们没有发现显著的性别晋升差异。我们按机构的研究强度对样本进行了划分，并发现提示性证据表明，这些结果是由研究强度较低的机构驱动的。

papers.title: Credit Horizons
papers.authors: Nobuhiro Kiyotaki, John Moore, Shengxing Zhang
papers.abstract: Entrepreneurs appear to borrow largely against their near-term revenues, even when their investment has a longer horizon. In this paper, we develop a model of credit horizons. A question of particular concern to us is whether persistently low interest rates can stifle economic activity. With this in mind, our model is of a small open economy where the world interest rate is taken to be exogenous. We show that a permanent fall in the interest rate can reduce aggregate investment and growth, and even lead to a drop in the welfare of everyone in the domestic economy. We use our framework to examine how credit horizons interact with plant dynamics and the evolution of productivity. Finally, we speculate that the measurement of total investment may camouflage the true level of productive investment in plant and human capital, and give too rosy a picture of property-fuelled booms sparked by low interest rates.
papers.zh_title: 信贷期限
papers.zh_abstract: 企业家似乎主要依靠近期收入进行借贷，即使他们的投资期限更长。在本文中，我们构建了一个信贷期限模型。我们特别关注的一个问题是，持续的低利率是否会抑制经济活动。基于此，我们的模型是一个小型开放经济体，其中世界利率被视为外生变量。我们证明，利率的永久性下降可能会减少总投资和增长，甚至导致国内经济中每个人的福利下降。我们利用我们的框架来研究信贷期限如何与工厂动态和生产率演变相互作用。最后，我们推测，对总投资额的衡量可能掩盖了工厂和人力资本方面生产性投资的真实水平，并对低利率引发的、由房地产推动的繁荣给出过于乐观的图景。

papers.title: Risk Perceptions and Protective Behaviors: Evidence from COVID-19 Pandemic
papers.authors: M. Kate Bundorf, Jill DeMatteis, Grant Miller, Maria Polyakova, Jialu L. Streeter, Jonathan Wivagg
papers.abstract: We analyze data from a survey we administered during the COVID-19 pandemic to investigate the relationship between people's subjective risk beliefs and their protective behaviors. We report three main findings. First, on average, people substantially overestimate the absolute level of risk associated with economic activity, but have correct signals about their relative risk. Second, people who believe that they face a higher risk of infection are more likely to report avoiding economic activities. Third, government mandates restricting economic behavior attenuate the relationship between subjective risk beliefs and protective behaviors.
papers.zh_title: 风险认知与保护行为：来自COVID-19大流行的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了在COVID-19大流行期间进行的一项调查数据，以研究人们的主观风险信念与其保护行为之间的关系。我们报告了三个主要发现。首先，平均而言，人们大幅高估了经济活动相关的绝对风险水平，但对其相对风险有正确的信号。其次，认为自己面临更高感染风险的人更有可能报告避免经济活动。第三，限制经济行为的政府指令削弱了主观风险信念与保护行为之间的关系。

papers.title: Large Fiscal Episodes and Sustainable Development: Some International Evidence
papers.authors: Joshua Aizenman, Yothin Jinjarak, Hien Thi Kim Nguyen, Donghyun Park
papers.abstract: This paper examines the association between episodes of large fiscal impulses (expansions and adjustments) and sustainable development indicators (prosperity, resilience, and inclusivity). We provide country studies of Chile, Poland, South Africa, and Thailand, examining the components of government expenses and tax revenues, and reporting four stylized patterns from the analysis. (i) Fiscal expansions led to higher growth rates and reduced negative trade-offs, e.g., pollution and poor-health mortalities associated with economic growth. (ii) Fiscal adjustments led to a more inclusive economy, lowered poverty headcounts, improved sanitation, and cleaner technology access. (iii) Fiscal expansions followed an increase in direct taxes (especially corporate taxes) and a decline in social contributions, and preceded a decline in other direct taxes and an increase in wage bills. (iv) Fiscal adjustments followed a decline in other direct taxes and social contributions, an increase in wage bills, and preceded a decline in government consumption expenditure and transfers. In light of these findings, the domestic resource mobilization should consider the time paths of the taxes and expenditure components to understand their empirical linkages with the sustainable development outcomes in the respective countries.
papers.zh_title: 大规模财政事件与可持续发展：一些国际证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了大规模财政冲击（扩张与调整）事件与可持续发展指标（繁荣、韧性与包容性）之间的关联。我们提供了智利、波兰、南非和泰国的国别研究，分析了政府支出和税收收入的构成，并总结了四种典型模式：（i）财政扩张带来了更高的增长率，并减少了负面权衡，例如与经济增长相关的污染和不良健康死亡率。（ii）财政调整带来了更包容的经济，降低了贫困人口数量，改善了卫生设施，并增加了清洁技术的获取。（iii）财政扩张之前，直接税（尤其是公司税）增加，社会缴款减少；之后，其他直接税减少，工资支出增加。（iv）财政调整之前，其他直接税和社会缴款减少，工资支出增加；之后，政府消费支出和转移支付减少。基于这些发现，国内资源动员应考虑税收和支出构成的时间路径，以理解它们与各国可持续发展结果之间的实证联系。

papers.title: Knowledge Spillovers, Trade, and FDI
papers.authors: Wolfgang Keller
papers.abstract: This paper studies knowledge spillovers, positive externalities that augment the information set of an economic agent, and reviews the evidence on such spillovers in the context of international economic transactions. The entry discusses trade channels of knowledge transfer associated with purchases from abroad (imports) and sales to abroad (exports). Another focus is on the foreign direct investment (FDI) channel through purchases from abroad (inward FDI) and sales to abroad (outward FDI). The entry also distinguishes knowledge flows from foreign to domestic agents and from domestic to foreign agents. The entry underlines the importance of empirical methodology and data characteristics that determine the quality of econometric identification. Even though spillovers are by their very nature–as externalities–difficult to identify, over recent decades a number of advances have produced robust evidence that both trade and foreign direct investment lead to sizable knowledge spillovers. These advances have been both conceptual as well as in the areas of empirical methodology and new data.
papers.zh_title: 知识溢出、贸易与外国直接投资
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究知识溢出——即增加经济主体信息集的正外部性，并回顾了在国际经济交易背景下此类溢出的证据。本文讨论了与从国外购买（进口）和向国外销售（出口）相关的知识转移的贸易渠道。另一个重点是通过从国外购买（内向外国直接投资）和向国外销售（外向外国直接投资）的外国直接投资渠道。本文还区分了从外国到国内主体和从国内到外国主体的知识流动。本文强调了决定计量经济学识别质量的实证方法和数据特征的重要性。尽管溢出本质上作为外部性难以识别，但近几十年来的一些进展已提供了稳健的证据，表明贸易和外国直接投资都会导致可观的知识溢出。这些进展既体现在概念上，也体现在实证方法和新数据领域。

papers.title: Hidden Software and Veiled Value Creation: Illustrations from Server Software Usage
papers.authors: Raviv Murciano-Goroff, Ran Zhuo, Shane Greenstein
papers.abstract: How do you measure the value of a commodity that transacts at a price of zero from an economic standpoint? This study examines the potential for and extent of omission and misattribution in standard approaches to economic accounting with regards to open source software, an unpriced commodity in the digital economy. The study is the first to follow usage and upgrading of unpriced software over a long period of time. It finds evidence that software updates mislead analyses of sources of firm productivity and identifies several mechanisms that create issues for mismeasurement. To illustrate these mechanisms, this study closely examines one asset that plays a critical role in the digital economic activity, web server software. We analyze the largest dataset ever compiled on web server use in the United States and link it to disaggregated information on over 200,000 medium to large organizations in the United States between 2001 and 2018. In our sample, we find that the omission of economic value created by web server software is substantial and that this omission indicates there is over $4.5 billion dollars of mismeasurement of server software across organizations in the United States. This mismeasurement varies by organization age, geography, industry and size. We also find that dynamic behavior, such as improvements of server technology and entry of new products, further exacerbates economic mismeasurement.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, PR；JEL：D22, L17, L86, O3, O33
papers.zh_title: 隐藏的软件与隐蔽的价值创造：来自服务器软件使用的例证
papers.zh_abstract: 如何从经济角度衡量一种以零价格交易的商品的价值？本研究考察了标准经济核算方法中关于开源软件（数字经济中一种无定价商品）的遗漏和错误归因的可能性及程度。本研究首次长期追踪无定价软件的使用和升级情况。它发现证据表明，软件更新误导了对企业生产率来源的分析，并识别出若干导致测量误差的机制。为说明这些机制，本研究深入考察了一种在数字经济活动中发挥关键作用的资产——网络服务器软件。我们分析了美国有史以来最大的网络服务器使用数据集，并将其与2001年至2018年间美国超过20万家大中型组织的细分信息相关联。在我们的样本中，我们发现网络服务器软件所创造的经济价值被遗漏的程度相当大，这种遗漏表明美国各组织间存在超过45亿美元的服务器软件测量误差。这种测量误差因组织年龄、地理位置、行业和规模而异。我们还发现，动态行为，如服务器技术的改进和新产品的进入，进一步加剧了经济测量误差。

papers.title: The Backward Art of Slowing the Spread? Congregation Efficiencies during COVID-19
papers.authors: Casey B. Mulligan
papers.abstract: Were workers more likely to be infected by COVID-19 in their workplace, or outside it? Although both economic models of the pandemic and public health policy recommendations often presume that the workplace is less safe, economic theory predicts that group cooperation significantly increases the per capita demand for public goods. Disease prevention may also have scale economies in supply. The available data from schools, hospitals, nursing homes, warehouses, grocery stores, food processing plants, hair stylists, and airlines – covering more than a million employees and students – show employers adopting mitigation protocols in the spring of 2020. Coincident with the adoption, infection rates in workplaces typically dropped from well above household rates to well below. When this occurs, the sign of the disease externality from participating in large organizations changes from negative to positive, even while individuals continue to have an incentive to avoid large organizations due to the prevention costs they impose on members. Rational cooperative prevention sometimes results in infectious-disease patterns that are opposite of predictions from classical epidemiology.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, EH, IO；JEL：D22, D71, H23, I18, L25
papers.zh_title: 减缓传播的落后技艺？COVID-19期间的聚集效率
papers.zh_abstract: 工人更可能在工作中还是工作之外感染COVID-19？尽管大流行的经济模型和公共卫生政策建议通常假定工作场所更不安全，但经济理论预测，群体合作会显著增加对公共产品的人均需求。疾病预防在供给方面也可能存在规模经济。来自学校、医院、养老院、仓库、杂货店、食品加工厂、美发师和航空公司的现有数据——涵盖超过一百万名员工和学生——显示，雇主在2020年春季采取了缓解措施。随着这些措施的采用，工作场所的感染率通常从远高于家庭感染率降至远低于家庭感染率。当这种情况发生时，参与大型组织带来的疾病外部性的符号从负变为正，即使个体由于大型组织对其成员施加的预防成本而仍有动机避免加入大型组织。理性的合作预防有时会导致传染病模式与经典流行病学的预测相反。

papers.title: A Policy Matrix for Inclusive Prosperity
papers.authors: Dani Rodrik, Stefanie Stantcheva
papers.abstract: One of the biggest challenges that countries face today is the very unequal distributions of opportunities, resources, income and wealth across people. Inclusive prosperity – whereby many people from different backgrounds can benefit from economic growth, new technologies, and the fruits of globalization – remains elusive. To address these issues, societies face choices among many different policies and institutional arrangements to try to ensure a proper supply of productive jobs and activities, as well as access to education, financial means, and other endowments that prepare individuals for their participation in the economy. In this paper we offer a simple, organizing framework to think about policies for inclusive prosperity. We provide a comprehensive taxonomy of policies, distinguishing among the types of inequality they address and the stages of the economy where the intervention takes place. The taxonomy clarifies the differences among contending approaches to equity and inclusion and can help analysts assess the impacts and implications of different policies and identify potential gaps.
papers.zh_title: 包容性繁荣的政策矩阵
papers.zh_abstract: 当今各国面临的最大挑战之一是机会、资源、收入和财富在人群中的极不平等分配。包容性繁荣——即来自不同背景的许多人能够从经济增长、新技术和全球化成果中受益——仍然难以实现。为解决这些问题，社会需要在众多不同的政策和制度安排中做出选择，以确保生产性工作和活动的适当供给，以及教育、金融手段和其他禀赋的获取，这些禀赋使个人能够参与经济。在本文中，我们提供了一个简单的组织框架来思考包容性繁荣的政策。我们提供了一个全面的政策分类，区分了它们所解决的不平等类型以及干预发生的经济阶段。该分类澄清了关于公平和包容的不同方法之间的差异，可以帮助分析师评估不同政策的影响和含义，并识别潜在的差距。

papers.title: What’s Missing in Environmental (Self-)Monitoring: Evidence from Strategic Shutdowns of Pollution Monitors
papers.authors: Yingfei Mu, Edward A. Rubin, Eric Zou
papers.abstract: Regulators often rely on regulated entities to self-monitor compliance, potentially creating strategic incentives for endogenous monitoring. This paper builds a framework to detect whether local governments skip air pollution monitoring when they expect air quality to deteriorate. The core of our method tests whether the timing of monitor shutdowns coincides with the counties’ air quality alerts – public advisories based on local governments’ own pollution forecasts. Applying the method to a monitor in Jersey City, NJ, suspected of a deliberate shutdown during the 2013 “Bridgegate” traffic jam, we find a 33% reduction of this monitor’s sampling rate on pollution-alert days. Building on large-scale inference tools, we then apply the method to test more than 1,300 monitors across the U.S., finding 14 metro areas with clusters of monitors showing similar strategic behavior. We assess geometric imputation and remote-sensing technologies as potential solutions to deter future strategic monitoring.
papers.zh_title: 环境（自我）监测中缺失了什么：来自污染监测仪战略性关闭的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 监管机构通常依赖受监管实体进行自我监测以遵守规定，这可能会产生内生监测的战略激励。本文构建了一个框架，用于检测地方政府是否在预期空气质量恶化时跳过空气污染监测。我们方法的核心是检验监测仪关闭的时间是否与县的空气质量警报（基于地方政府自身污染预测的公共建议）相吻合。将该方法应用于新泽西州泽西市的一个监测仪（该监测仪在2013年“桥门”交通堵塞期间被怀疑故意关闭），我们发现该监测仪在污染警报日的采样率降低了33%。基于大规模推断工具，我们随后将该方法应用于测试美国超过1300个监测仪，发现14个大都市区存在显示类似战略行为的监测仪集群。我们评估了几何插补和遥感技术作为阻止未来战略监测的潜在解决方案。

papers.title: Normalizing Community Mask-Wearing: A Cluster Randomized Trial in Bangladesh
papers.authors: Jason Abaluck, Laura H Kwong, Ashley Styczynski, Ashraful Haque, Md. Alamgir Kabir, Ellen Bates-Jefferys, Emily Crawford, Jade Benjamin-Chung, Salim Benhachmi, Shabib Raihan, Shadman Rahman, Neeti Zaman, Peter J. Winch, Md. Maqsud Hossain, Hasan Mahmud Reza, Stephen P. Luby, Ahmed Mushfiq Mobarak
papers.abstract: A randomized-trial of community-level mask promotion in rural Bangladesh during COVID-19 shows that the intervention tripled mask usage and is a cost-effective means of promoting public health.
papers.zh_title: 规范社区口罩佩戴：孟加拉国的一项整群随机试验
papers.zh_abstract: 在COVID-19期间，孟加拉国农村地区进行的一项社区层面口罩推广随机试验表明，该干预措施使口罩使用率提高了两倍，并且是一种具有成本效益的促进公共卫生的手段。

papers.title: The Growing Importance of Decision-Making on the Job
papers.authors: David J. Deming
papers.abstract: Machines increasingly replace people in routine job tasks. The remaining tasks require workers to make open-ended decisions and to have “soft” skills such as problem-solving, critical thinking and adaptability. This paper documents growing demand for decision-making and explores the consequences for life-cycle earnings. Career earnings growth in the U.S. more than doubled between 1960 and 2017, and the age of peak earnings increased from the late 30s to the mid-50s. I show that a substantial share of this shift is explained by increased employment in decision-intensive occupations, which have longer and more gradual periods of earnings growth. To understand these patterns, I develop a model that nests decision-making in a standard human capital framework. Workers predict the output of uncertain, context-dependent actions. Experience reduces prediction error, improving a worker’s ability to adapt using data from similar decisions they have made in the past. Experience takes longer to accumulate in high variance, non-routine jobs. I test the predictions of the model using data from the three waves of the NLS. Life-cycle wage growth in decision-intensive occupations has increased over time, and it has increased relatively more for highly-skilled workers.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, ED, LS, PR；JEL：I26, J23, J24, J31
papers.zh_title: 工作中决策制定日益增长的重要性
papers.zh_abstract: 机器越来越多地取代人们从事常规性工作任务。剩余的任务要求工人做出开放式决策，并具备“软”技能，如解决问题、批判性思维和适应能力。本文记录了决策制定需求的增长，并探讨了其对生命周期收入的影响。美国职业生涯收入增长在1960年至2017年间翻了一倍多，收入峰值年龄从30多岁后期增加到50多岁中期。我表明，这种转变的很大一部分是由决策密集型职业就业的增加所解释的，这些职业具有更长、更渐进的收入增长期。为了理解这些模式，我开发了一个模型，将决策制定嵌套在标准人力资本框架中。工人预测不确定的、依赖于情境的行动的产出。经验减少了预测误差，提高了工人利用过去类似决策数据来适应的能力。在高方差、非常规的工作中，积累经验需要更长时间。我使用全国纵向调查三轮数据检验了模型的预测。决策密集型职业的生命周期工资增长随时间推移而增加，并且对于高技能工人来说，这种增长相对更大。

papers.title: Optimal Harvest with Multiple Fishing Zones, Endogenous Price and Global Uncertainty
papers.authors: Jose Pizarro, Eduardo S. Schwartz
papers.abstract: The literature on the optimal harvest of fisheries has concentrated on a single fishing area with biomass uncertainty and to a lesser degree also with price uncertainty. We develop and implement a stochastic optimal control approach to determine the harvest that maximizes the value of a fishery participating in a global market, where all the considered harvesting zones sell their production. This market is characterized by an inverse demand function, which combines an exogenous demand shock and the aggregate harvesting of all zones. Accordingly, a fishery's harvest will be affected by the global demand shocks and the harvesting in all the competing zones through the global selling price. In addition, we decompose the biomass uncertainty into local and global biomass shocks. Through global biomass shocks, the model provides enough flexibility to acknowledge for correlation in the biomass shocks faced by the multiple perhaps adjacent areas. When we compare our global framework with an alternative where the individual zones are aggregated into a single optimizing fishery we find that competition will increase the global harvest and consequently reduced the resource price.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EEE；JEL：G10, G13, G31, Q20, Q22
papers.zh_title: 多渔区、内生价格与全球不确定性下的最优捕捞
papers.zh_abstract: 关于渔业最优捕捞的文献主要集中在单一渔区，并考虑了生物量不确定性，在较小程度上也考虑了价格不确定性。我们开发并实施了一种随机最优控制方法，以确定使参与全球市场的渔业价值最大化的捕捞量，其中所有考虑的渔区都在该市场销售其产品。该市场以逆需求函数为特征，该函数结合了外生需求冲击和所有渔区的总捕捞量。因此，一个渔区的捕捞量将受到全球需求冲击以及所有竞争渔区通过全球销售价格产生的捕捞量的影响。此外，我们将生物量不确定性分解为局部和全球生物量冲击。通过全球生物量冲击，该模型提供了足够的灵活性来承认多个可能相邻区域所面临的生物量冲击之间的相关性。当我们将我们的全球框架与另一种将各个渔区合并为一个单一优化渔业的替代方案进行比较时，我们发现竞争将增加全球捕捞量，从而降低资源价格。

papers.title: Why Working from Home Will Stick
papers.authors: Jose Maria Barrero, Nicholas Bloom, Steven J. Davis
papers.abstract: COVID-19 drove a mass social experiment in working from home (WFH). We survey more than 30,000 Americans over multiple waves to investigate whether WFH will stick, and why. Our data say that 20 percent of full workdays will be supplied from home after the pandemic ends, compared with just 5 percent before. We develop evidence on five reasons for this large shift: better-than-expected WFH experiences, new investments in physical and human capital that enable WFH, greatly diminished stigma associated with WFH, lingering concerns about crowds and contagion risks, and a pandemic-driven surge in technological innovations that support WFH. We also use our survey data to project three consequences: First, employees will enjoy large benefits from greater remote work, especially those with higher earnings. Second, the shift to WFH will directly reduce spending in major city centers by at least 5-10 percent relative to the pre-pandemic situation. Third, our data on employer plans and the relative productivity of WFH imply a 5 percent productivity boost in the post-pandemic economy due to re-optimized working arrangements. Only one-fifth of this productivity gain will show up in conventional productivity measures, because they do not capture the time savings from less commuting.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PR；JEL：D13, D23, E24, G18, J22, M54, R3
papers.zh_title: 为何居家办公将长期存在
papers.zh_abstract: COVID-19 推动了一场关于居家办公的大规模社会实验。我们通过多轮调查访问了超过 30,000 名美国人，以研究居家办公是否会持续存在及其原因。我们的数据显示，疫情结束后，20% 的完整工作日将来自居家办公，而疫情前这一比例仅为 5%。我们提供了关于这一巨大转变的五个原因的证据：居家办公体验好于预期、支持居家办公的实物和人力资本新投资、与居家办公相关的污名化大幅减少、对人群聚集和传染风险的持续担忧，以及疫情推动的支持居家办公的技术创新激增。我们还利用调查数据预测了三个后果：首先，员工将从更多的远程工作中获得巨大收益，尤其是收入较高的员工。其次，转向居家办公将直接导致主要城市中心的支出相对于疫情前水平至少减少 5-10%。第三，我们关于雇主计划和居家办公相对生产率的数据表明，由于工作安排的重新优化，疫情后经济的生产率将提升 5%。这些生产率提升中只有五分之一会体现在传统的生产率指标中，因为这些指标并未捕捉到通勤时间减少所带来的节省。

papers.title: Myopic Loss Aversion and Investment Decisions: from the Laboratory to the Field
papers.authors: Kazi Iqbal, Asadul Islam, John A. List, Vy Nguyen
papers.abstract: Whether, and to what extent, behavioral anomalies uncovered in the lab manifest themselves in the field remains of first order importance in finance and economics. We begin by examining behavior of retail traders/investors making investment decisions in constructed laboratory markets. Our results show that the behaviors of the traders are consistent with myopic loss aversion. We combine the lab results with a unique individual-level matched dataset on daily stock market transactions and portfolio positions over a two year period. We find that lab behaviors help to predict, but do not fully capture, the essential real-world trading analogs of retail traders.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, DEV, PE；JEL：C9, C93, D03, N97
papers.zh_title: 短视损失厌恶与投资决策：从实验室到现实市场
papers.zh_abstract: 在实验室中发现的行为异常是否以及在多大程度上会在现实市场中显现，这仍然是金融和经济学中首要重要的问题。我们首先考察了在构建的实验室市场中做出投资决策的散户交易者/投资者的行为。我们的结果表明，交易者的行为与短视损失厌恶一致。我们将实验室结果与一个独特的、为期两年的个人层面每日股票市场交易和投资组合头寸的匹配数据集相结合。我们发现，实验室行为有助于预测，但不能完全捕捉散户交易者在现实世界中的基本交易行为。

papers.title: Strategic Fragmented Markets
papers.authors: Ana Babus, Cecilia Parlatore
papers.abstract: We study the determinants of asset market fragmentation in a model with strategic investors that disagree about the value of an asset. Investors' choices determine the market structure. Fragmented markets are supported in equilibrium when disagreement between investors is low. In this case, investors take the same side of the market and are willing to trade in smaller markets with a higher price impact to face less competition when trading against a dealer. The maximum degree of market fragmentation increases as investors' priors are more correlated. Dealers can benefit from fragmentation, but investors are always better off in centralized markets.
papers.zh_title: 战略性碎片化市场
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在一个包含对资产价值存在分歧的战略性投资者的模型中，研究资产市场碎片化的决定因素。投资者的选择决定了市场结构。当投资者之间的分歧较低时，碎片化市场在均衡中得到支持。在这种情况下，投资者站在市场的同一侧，并愿意在价格影响更大的较小市场中交易，以便在与交易商交易时面临更少的竞争。市场碎片化的最大程度随着投资者先验信念的相关性增加而增加。交易商可以从碎片化中受益，但投资者在集中市场中总是过得更好。

papers.title: On the Welfare Gains from Tradeable Benefits-in-Kind
papers.authors: Martin Ravallion
papers.abstract: Governments often prohibit resale of the benefits-in-kind provided by antipoverty programs. Yet the personal gains from those benefits are likely to vary and to be known privately, so there can be gains to poor people from trading their assignments. We know very little about those gains. To help address this knowledge gap, the paper models a competitive market for assignments, and simulates the market using an unusual survey of workers on a rural public-works scheme in a poor state of India. The results indicate large gains from tradeable assignments after first randomizing. The gains exceed those from poverty targeting without trade and are not lower for poorer households or female workers. Fully realizing the gains from trade in practice may require complementary policies to help people access the market and to support its administration and regulation.
papers.zh_title: 可交易实物福利的福利收益
papers.zh_abstract: 政府通常禁止转售反贫困计划提供的实物福利。然而，这些福利的个人收益可能因人而异且为私人信息，因此穷人之间通过交易其配额可能获得收益。我们对这些收益知之甚少。为帮助填补这一知识空白，本文建立了一个配额竞争市场模型，并利用一项针对印度贫困邦农村公共工程计划工人的特殊调查进行市场模拟。结果表明，在初始随机分配后，可交易配额带来了巨大的收益。这些收益超过了没有交易时的贫困瞄准收益，并且对于较贫困家庭或女性工人而言并未降低。在实践中充分实现交易收益可能需要配套政策，以帮助人们进入市场并支持其行政管理和监管。

papers.title: Does Mentoring Increase the Collaboration Networks of Female Economists? An Evaluation of the CeMENT Randomized Trial
papers.authors: Donna K. Ginther, Rina Na
papers.abstract: Previous research has shown that women in the treatment group of the CeMENT randomized controlled trial increased their publications and the likelihood that they were tenured in top 50 economics departments. This paper examines one potential mechanism, namely, that CeMENT expanded the collaboration networks of the participants. Our analysis finds that women who received the mentoring treatment had three additional pre-tenure coauthors, 1.6 more pre-tenure publications and 43 additional citations to those publications. After controlling for additional coauthors, the CeMENT program increased publications, and top-tier publications. These results suggest that the information conveyed at the workshop facilitated participants’ career success.
papers.zh_title: 导师制能否扩大女性经济学家的合作网络？对 CeMENT 随机试验的评估
papers.zh_abstract: 先前的研究表明，在 CeMENT 随机对照试验中，接受处理组的女性其发表物数量以及在排名前 50 的经济学系获得终身教职的可能性均有所增加。本文考察了一个潜在的机制，即 CeMENT 扩大了参与者的合作网络。我们的分析发现，接受导师制处理的女性在获得终身教职前平均多了 3 位合著者，多了 1.6 篇发表物，并且这些发表物被多引用了 43 次。在控制了额外合著者后，CeMENT 项目增加了发表物数量和顶级期刊发表物。这些结果表明，研讨会上传达的信息促进了参与者的职业成功。

papers.title: Selecting the Most Effective Nudge: Evidence from a Large-Scale Experiment on Immunization
papers.authors: Abhijit Banerjee, Arun G. Chandrasekhar, Suresh Dalpath, Esther Duflo, John Floretta, Matthew O. Jackson, Harini Kannan, Francine N. Loza, Anirudh Sankar, Anna Schrimpf, Maheshwor Shrestha
papers.abstract: Policymakers often choose a policy bundle that is a combination of different interventions in different dosages. We develop a new technique—treatment variant aggregation (TVA)—to select a policy from a large factorial design. TVA pools together policy variants that are not meaningfully different and prunes those deemed ineffective. This allows us to restrict attention to aggregated policy variants, consistently estimate their effects on the outcome, and estimate the best policy effect adjusting for the winner’s curse. We apply TVA to a large randomized controlled trial that tests interventions to stimulate demand for immunization in Haryana, India. The policies under consideration include reminders, incentives, and local ambassadors for community mobilization. Cross-randomizing these interventions, with different dosages or types of each intervention, yields 75 combinations. The policy with the largest impact (which combines incentives, ambassadors who are information hubs, and reminders) increases the number of immunizations by 44% relative to the status quo. The most cost-effective policy (information hubs, ambassadors, and SMS reminders but no incentives) increases the number of immunizations per dollar by 9.1% relative to status quo.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, DEV, EH, LS, PE, POL；JEL：C18, C93, D83, I15, O12, O15
papers.zh_title: 选择最有效的助推：来自大规模免疫实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 政策制定者通常选择由不同干预措施以不同剂量组合而成的政策包。我们开发了一种新技术——处理变体聚合——来从大规模析因设计中筛选政策。TVA 将没有显著差异的政策变体合并，并剔除被认为无效的变体。这使我们能够将注意力集中在聚合后的政策变体上，一致地估计它们对结果的影响，并在调整赢家诅咒后估计最佳政策效果。我们将 TVA 应用于一项大规模随机对照试验，该试验测试了刺激印度哈里亚纳邦免疫需求的干预措施。所考虑的政策包括提醒、激励措施和社区动员的地方大使。交叉随机化这些干预措施，每种干预措施采用不同剂量或类型，共产生 75 种组合。影响最大的政策（结合了激励措施、作为信息枢纽的大使和提醒）使免疫接种数量相对于现状增加了 44%。最具成本效益的政策（信息枢纽、大使和短信提醒，但无激励措施）使每美元免疫接种数量相对于现状增加了 9.1%。

papers.title: Disability Insurance in the Great Recession: Ease of Access, Program Enrollment, and Local Hysteresis
papers.authors: Melissa S. Kearney, Brendan M. Price, Riley Wilson
papers.abstract: Previous research has documented that Social Security Disability Insurance (SSDI) applications and awards increase during economic downturns and that expanded access to SSDI leads to a reduction in employment. We build on these insights and investigate to what extent differential access to SSDI during economic downturns leads to differential changes in SSDI enrollment and employment during the subsequent recovery. We exploit plausibly exogenous variation in SSDI appeals processing time (a measure of hassle or access) facing individuals living in ZIP codes that straddle Social Security Administration hearing office catchment borders. During the Great Recession, ZIP codes assigned to hearing offices with faster appellate processes saw a larger increase in SSDI enrollment than their cross-border neighbors. These enrollment effects are concentrated among ZIP code pairs that experienced more severe labor market downturns, and they persist as late as 2015. In the full sample, there is no clear effect of longer processing times on subsequent employment rates. However, we find some limited evidence that faster appellate processes may have weighed on the employment recovery in hard-hit ZIP codes that had high pre-recession rates of SSDI enrollment. Our findings highlight the importance of considering interaction effects between economic shocks and ease of access to the safety net.
papers.zh_title: 大衰退中的残疾保险：准入便利性、项目注册与局部滞后效应
papers.zh_abstract: 先前的研究已证实，社会保障残疾保险的申请和授予在经济衰退期间会增加，并且扩大 SSDI 的准入会导致就业减少。我们基于这些见解，研究经济衰退期间 SSDI 准入的差异在多大程度上导致随后复苏期间 SSDI 注册和就业的差异变化。我们利用了居住在跨越社会保障局听证办公室辖区边界的邮政编码区的个人所面临的 SSDI 上诉处理时间（一种衡量麻烦或准入程度的指标）中看似外生的变化。在大衰退期间，被分配到上诉流程更快的听证办公室的邮政编码区，其 SSDI 注册人数的增长幅度大于其跨境邻居。这些注册效应集中在经历了更严重劳动力市场衰退的邮政编码区对中，并且持续到 2015 年。在全样本中，更长的处理时间对后续就业率没有明显影响。然而，我们发现了有限的证据表明，在那些经济衰退前 SSDI 注册率较高且遭受重创的邮政编码区，更快的上诉流程可能抑制了就业复苏。我们的研究结果强调了考虑经济冲击与安全网准入便利性之间交互效应的重要性。

papers.title: Digital Collateral
papers.authors: Paul Gertler, Brett Green, Catherine Wolfram
papers.abstract: A new form of secured lending using “digital collateral” has recently emerged, most prominently in low- and middle-income countries. Digital collateral relies on lockout technology, which allows the lender to temporarily disable the flow value of the collateral to the borrower without physically repossessing it. We explore this new form of credit both in a model and in a field experiment using school-fee loans digitally secured with a solar home system. Securing a loan with digital collateral drastically reduces default rates (by 19 pp) and increases the lender’s rate of return (by 38 pp). Employing a variant of the Karlan and Zinman (2009) methodology, we decompose the total effect on repayment and find that roughly one-third is attributable to adverse selection, and two-thirds is attributable to moral hazard. In addition, access to digitally secured school-fee loans significantly increases school enrollment and school-related expenditures without detrimental effects to households’ balance sheet.
papers.zh_title: 数字抵押品
papers.zh_abstract: 一种使用“数字抵押品”的新型担保贷款最近出现，主要在中低收入国家。数字抵押品依赖于锁定技术，该技术允许贷款人暂时禁用抵押品对借款人的流动价值，而无需实际收回抵押品。我们通过一个模型和一个实地实验来探索这种新的信贷形式，该实验使用以太阳能家庭系统进行数字担保的学费贷款。用数字抵押品担保贷款大幅降低了违约率（降低了19个百分点），并提高了贷款人的回报率（提高了38个百分点）。采用Karlan和Zinman（2009）方法的一个变体，我们分解了对还款的总影响，发现大约三分之一可归因于逆向选择，三分之二可归因于道德风险。此外，获得数字担保的学费贷款显著提高了入学率和与学校相关的支出，而对家庭资产负债表没有不利影响。

papers.title: Fearless Woman: Financial Literacy and Stock Market Participation
papers.authors: Tabea Bucher-Koenen, Rob J. Alessie, Annamaria Lusardi, Maarten van Rooij
papers.abstract: Women are less financially literate than men. It is unclear whether this gap reflects a lack of knowledge or, rather, a lack of confidence. Our survey experiment shows that women tend to disproportionately respond “do not know” to questions measuring financial knowledge, but when this response option is unavailable, they often choose the correct answer. We estimate a latent class model and predict the probability that respondents truly know the correct answers. We find that about one-third of the financial literacy gender gap can be explained by women’s lower confidence levels. Both financial knowledge and confidence explain stock market participation.
papers.zh_title: 无畏的女性：金融素养与股市参与
papers.zh_abstract: 女性的金融素养低于男性。尚不清楚这种差距是反映了知识缺乏，还是信心不足。我们的调查实验表明，女性倾向于不成比例地回答“不知道”来衡量金融知识的问题，但当这个回答选项不可用时，她们通常选择正确答案。我们估计了一个潜在类别模型，并预测受访者真正知道正确答案的概率。我们发现，大约三分之一的金融素养性别差距可以用女性较低的自信心水平来解释。金融知识和信心都能解释股市参与。

papers.title: Surviving the Fintech Disruption
papers.authors: Wei Jiang, Yuehua Tang, Rachel (Jiqiu) Xiao, Vincent Yao
papers.abstract: This paper studies how demand for labor reacts to financial technology (fintech) shocks based on comprehensive databases of fintech patents and firm job postings in the U.S. during the past decade. We first develop a measure of fintech exposure at the occupation level by intersecting the textual information in job task descriptions and fintech patents. We then document a significant decline of job postings in the most exposed occupations, and an increase in industry as well as geographical concentration of these occupations. Firms resort to an upskilling strategy in face of the fintech disruption, requiring “combo” (finance and software) skills, higher education attainments, and longer work experiences in the hiring of fintech-exposed jobs. Financial firms and those with high innovation outputs are able to offset the disruptive effect from the fintech shock. Among innovating firms, however, only inventors (but not acquisition-driven innovators) experience growth in hiring, sales, investment, and enjoy better returns on assets.
papers.zh_title: 在金融科技颠覆中生存
papers.zh_abstract: 本文基于过去十年美国金融科技专利和企业职位发布的综合数据库，研究劳动力需求如何应对金融科技冲击。我们首先通过交叉职位任务描述和金融科技专利中的文本信息，构建了职业层面的金融科技暴露度指标。然后，我们记录了暴露度最高的职业的职位发布显著下降，以及这些职业的行业和地理集中度上升。面对金融科技颠覆，企业采取技能提升策略，在招聘金融科技暴露岗位时要求“组合”（金融和软件）技能、更高的教育程度和更长的工作经验。金融企业和创新产出高的企业能够抵消金融科技冲击的颠覆效应。然而，在创新企业中，只有发明者（而非收购驱动的创新者）在招聘、销售、投资方面实现增长，并获得更好的资产回报率。

papers.title: Air Pollution and Adult Cognition: Evidence from Brain Training
papers.authors: Andrea La Nauze, Edson R. Severnini
papers.abstract: We exploit novel data from brain-training games to examine the impacts of air pollution on a comprehensive set of cognitive skills in adults. We find that exposure to particulate matter (PM2.5) impairs adult cognitive function, and that these effects are largest for those in prime working age. These results confirm a hypothesized mechanism for the impacts of air pollution on workforce productivity. We also find that the cognitive effects are largest for new tasks and for those with low ability, suggesting that air pollution increases inequality in productivity.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, EH, LS；JEL：I14, I24, J24, Q53
papers.zh_title: 空气污染与成人认知：来自大脑训练的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用大脑训练游戏的新颖数据，研究了空气污染对成年人一系列综合认知技能的影响。我们发现，暴露于细颗粒物（PM2.5）会损害成年人的认知功能，且这种影响对处于主要工作年龄的人群最为显著。这些结果证实了空气污染影响劳动力生产率的一个假设机制。我们还发现，认知影响对于新任务和能力较低的人群最为显著，这表明空气污染加剧了生产率的不平等。

papers.title: Temporal Instability of Risk Preference among the Poor: Evidence from Payday Cycles
papers.authors: Mika Akesaka, Peter Eibich, Chie Hanaoka, Hitoshi Shigeoka
papers.abstract: The poor live paycheck to paycheck and are repeatedly exposed to strong cyclical income fluctuations. We investigate whether such income fluctuations affect risk preference among the poor. If risk preference temporarily changes around payday, optimal decisions made before payday may no longer be optimal afterward, which could reinforce poverty. By exploiting Social Security payday cycles in the US, we find that risk preference among the poor relying heavily on Social Security changes around payday. Rather than cognitive decline before payday, the deterioration of mental health and relative deprivation may play a role. We find similar evidence among the Japanese elderly.
papers.zh_title: 贫困人口风险偏好的时间不稳定性：来自发薪日周期的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 贫困人口靠薪水度日，反复面临强烈的周期性收入波动。我们研究了这种收入波动是否会影响贫困人口的风险偏好。如果风险偏好在发薪日前后暂时发生变化，那么发薪日前做出的最优决策在发薪日后可能不再最优，这可能会加剧贫困。通过利用美国社会保障发薪日周期，我们发现严重依赖社会保障的贫困人口的风险偏好在发薪日前后发生变化。心理健康恶化和相对剥夺感可能在其中起作用，而非发薪日前的认知衰退。我们在日本老年人中也发现了类似的证据。

papers.title: Time is of the Essence: Climate Adaptation Induced by Existing Institutions
papers.authors: Antonio Bento, Noah S. Miller, Mehreen Mookerjee, Edson R. Severnini
papers.abstract: This study conceptualizes and demonstrates empirically that existing non-climate policies can induce climate adaptation. Adaptation involves adjusting to or coping with climatic change with the goal of reducing our vulnerability to its harmful effects. We examine the impact of temperature on ambient ozone concentration in the United States from 1980-2013. Ozone is formed under warm temperatures, but regulated by the Clean Air Act. These air quality standards may act as a buffer against extreme increases in ambient ozone concentration. Indeed, adaptation in counties out of attainment with the standards is 107 percent larger than under attainment, implying substantial regulation-induced adaptation.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE；JEL：D02, H23, K32, P48, Q53, Q54, Q58
papers.zh_title: 时间至关重要：现有制度引发的气候适应
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究概念化并实证证明了现有的非气候政策可以引发气候适应。适应涉及调整或应对气候变化，目标是减少我们对其有害影响的脆弱性。我们考察了1980年至2013年间温度对美国环境臭氧浓度的影响。臭氧在温暖温度下形成，但受到《清洁空气法》的监管。这些空气质量标准可能起到缓冲作用，防止环境臭氧浓度极端升高。事实上，未达标县的适应效应比达标县高出107%，这表明存在显著的监管引发的适应。

papers.title: The Long-Run Spillover Effects of Pollution: How Exposure to Lead Affects Everyone in the Classroom
papers.authors: Ludovica Gazze, Claudia Persico, Sandra Spirovska
papers.abstract: Children exposed to pollutants like lead are more disruptive and have lower achievement. However, little is known about whether lead-exposed children affect the long-run outcomes of their peers. We estimate these spillover effects using new data on preschool blood lead levels (BLLs) matched to education data for all students in North Carolina public schools. We compare siblings whose school-grade cohorts differ in the proportion of children with elevated BLLs, holding constant school and peers’ demographics. Having more lead-exposed peers is associated with lower high-school graduation and SAT-taking rates and increased suspensions and absences. Peer effects are larger for same-gendered students.
papers.zh_title: 污染的长期溢出效应：铅暴露如何影响课堂中的每个人
papers.zh_abstract: 接触铅等污染物的儿童更具破坏性，学业成绩也更低。然而，关于铅暴露儿童是否会影响其同龄人的长期结果，我们知之甚少。我们利用北卡罗来纳州公立学校所有学生的学龄前血铅水平新数据，并将其与教育数据匹配，来估计这些溢出效应。我们比较了兄弟姐妹中，其学校年级队列中血铅水平升高儿童比例不同的情况，同时控制了学校和同龄人的人口统计学特征。拥有更多铅暴露同龄人的学生，其高中毕业率和SAT参加率较低，而停学和缺勤率较高。同龄人效应在同性别学生中更大。

papers.title: Mortgage Lenders and the Geographic Concentration of Foreclosures
papers.authors: Stephen L. Ross, Yuan Wang
papers.abstract: We use HMDA rate spread loans to identify lenders involved in riskier lending prior to the foreclosure crisis. We develop a shift-share measure of changes in high rate spread share lender representation in housing submarkets across origination years. While half the cross-sectional correlation between foreclosure and high rate spread lender share is explained by borrower observables, we find robust and stable estimates of the within housing submarket relationship between foreclosure and predicted changes in market share. Estimates are not explained by local housing price variation, rather evidence suggests servicer behavior in response to rising local foreclosure rates as a mechanism.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, PE；JEL：D14, G01, G21, R21, R23
papers.zh_title: 抵押贷款机构与止赎的地理集中
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用HMDA利差贷款数据来识别在止赎危机前参与高风险贷款的机构。我们开发了一个基于份额转移的衡量指标，用于衡量在贷款发放年份中，住房子市场中高利差份额贷款机构代表性的变化。虽然止赎率与高利差贷款机构份额之间的横截面相关性有一半可由借款人可观测特征解释，但我们发现，在住房子市场内部，止赎率与预测的市场份额变化之间的关系具有稳健且稳定的估计值。这些估计值无法由当地房价变动解释，相反，证据表明，服务商对当地止赎率上升的反应是一种作用机制。

papers.title: Augmenting State Capacity for Child Development: Experimental Evidence from India
papers.authors: Alejandro J. Ganimian, Karthik Muralidharan, Christopher R. Walters
papers.abstract: We use a large-scale randomized experiment to study the impact of augmenting staffing in the world’s largest public early childhood program: India’s Integrated Child Development Services (ICDS). Adding a half-time worker doubled net preschool instructional time and led to 0.29σ and 0.46σ increases in math and language test scores after 18 months for children who remained enrolled in the program. Rates of stunting and severe malnutrition were also lower in the treatment group. A cost-benefit analysis suggests that the benefits of augmenting ICDS staffing are likely to significantly exceed its costs even under conservative assumptions.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, LS, PE；JEL：C93, I21, I22, I25, O15
papers.zh_title: 增强儿童发展中的国家能力：来自印度的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用一项大规模随机实验，研究了在全球最大的公共儿童早期项目——印度综合儿童发展服务（ICDS）中增加人员配置的影响。增加一名半职工作人员使学前教学净时间翻倍，并在18个月后使继续参与该项目的儿童的数学和语言测试成绩分别提高了0.29个标准差和0.46个标准差。治疗组的发育迟缓和严重营养不良率也较低。成本效益分析表明，即使在保守假设下，增强ICDS人员配置的收益也可能显著超过其成本。

papers.title: Should There Be Vertical Choice in Health Insurance Markets?
papers.authors: Victoria R. Marone, Adrienne Sabety
papers.abstract: We study the welfare effects of offering choice over coverage levels—“vertical choice”—in regulated health insurance markets. We emphasize that heterogeneity in the efficient level of coverage is not sufficient to motivate choice. When premiums do not reflect individuals' costs, it may not be in consumers' best interest to select their efficient coverage level. We show that vertical choice is efficient only if consumers with higher willingness to pay for insurance have a higher efficient level of coverage. We investigate this condition empirically and find that as long as a minimum coverage level can be enforced, the welfare gains from vertical choice are either zero or economically small.
papers.zh_title: 健康保险市场是否应存在垂直选择？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在受监管的健康保险市场中提供覆盖水平选择（即“垂直选择”）的福利效应。我们强调，有效覆盖水平的异质性并不足以成为提供选择的理由。当保费不反映个人成本时，消费者选择其有效覆盖水平可能并不符合自身最佳利益。我们证明，只有当对保险支付意愿较高的消费者具有较高的有效覆盖水平时，垂直选择才是有效的。我们通过实证检验了这一条件，并发现只要能够强制执行最低覆盖水平，垂直选择带来的福利收益要么为零，要么在经济上微不足道。

papers.title: Do Firms with Specialized M&A Staff Make Better Acquisitions?
papers.authors: Sinan Gokkaya, Xi Liu, René M. Stulz
papers.abstract: We open the black box of the M&A decision process by constructing a comprehensive sample of US firms with specialized M&A staff. We investigate whether specialized M&A staff improves acquisition performance or facilitates managerial empire building instead. We find that firms with specialized M&A staff make better acquisitions when acquisition performance is measured by stock price reactions to announcements, long-run stock returns, operating performance, divestitures, and analyst earnings forecasts. This effect does not hold when the CEO is powerful, overconfident, or entrenched. Acquisitions by firms without specialized staff do not create value, on average. We provide evidence on mechanisms through which specialized M&A staff improves acquisition performance. For identification, we use the staggered recognition of inevitable disclosure doctrine as a source of exogenous variation in the employment of specialized M&A staff.
papers.zh_title: 拥有专业并购人员的公司能做出更好的收购吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过构建一个拥有专业并购人员的美国公司综合样本，打开了并购决策过程的黑箱。我们研究了专业并购人员是提高了收购绩效，还是反而助长了管理层的帝国构建。我们发现，当收购绩效通过公告股价反应、长期股票回报、经营业绩、资产剥离和分析师盈利预测来衡量时，拥有专业并购人员的公司能做出更好的收购。当CEO权力过大、过度自信或固守职位时，这种效应不成立。平均而言，没有专业人员的公司进行的收购并未创造价值。我们提供了专业并购人员改善收购绩效的机制证据。为了进行识别，我们利用了不可避免披露原则的分阶段认可作为专业并购人员雇佣的外生变化来源。

papers.title: CIP Deviations, the Dollar, and Frictions in International Capital Markets
papers.authors: Wenxin Du, Jesse Schreger
papers.abstract: The covered interest rate parity (CIP) condition is a fundamental arbitrage relationship in international finance. In this chapter, we review its breakdown during the Global Financial Crisis and its continued failure in the subsequent decade. We review how to measure CIP deviations, discuss the drivers of CIP deviations, and the implications of CIP deviations for global financial markets.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IFM, ME；JEL：E0, F0, G0
papers.zh_title: CIP偏差、美元与国际资本市场摩擦
papers.zh_abstract: 覆盖利率平价（CIP）条件是国际金融中的基本套利关系。在本章中，我们回顾了其在全球金融危机期间的崩溃以及随后十年中的持续失效。我们探讨了如何衡量CIP偏差，讨论了CIP偏差的驱动因素，以及CIP偏差对全球金融市场的影响。

papers.title: Household Debt Overhang Did Hardly Cause a Larger Spending Fall during the Financial Crisis in Australia
papers.authors: Lars E.O. Svensson
papers.abstract: The “debt-overhang hypothesis” – that households cut back more on their spending in a crisis when they have higher levels of outstanding mortgage debt (Dynan, 2012) – seems to be taken for granted by macroprudential authorities in several countries in their policy decisions, as well as by the international organizations that evaluate and comment on countries’ macroprudential policy. New results for Australian microdata are presented that reject the debt-overhang hypothesis. The results instead support the “spending-normalization hypothesis” of Andersen, Duus, and Jensen (2016), what can also be called the “debt-financed overspending” hypothesis – that the correlation between high pre-crisis household indebtedness and subsequent spending falls during the crisis reflects high debt-financed spending pre-crisis and a return to normal spending during the crisis. As discussed in Svensson (2019, 2020), this is consistent with the above correlation reflecting debt-financed overspending through what Muellbauer (2012) calls the “housing-collateral household demand” channel and Mian and Sufi (2018) the “credit-driven household demand” channel.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, IFM, ME；JEL：E21, G01, G18, G21, R21
papers.zh_title: 澳大利亚金融危机期间，家庭债务积压几乎未导致更大的支出下降
papers.zh_abstract: “债务积压假说”——即危机期间，当家庭未偿还抵押贷款债务水平较高时，他们会更大幅度地削减支出（Dynan, 2012）——似乎被多个国家的宏观审慎当局在其政策决策中，以及评估和评论各国宏观审慎政策的国际组织视为理所当然。我们提出的澳大利亚微观数据新结果否定了债务积压假说。这些结果反而支持了Andersen、Duus和Jensen（2016）的“支出正常化假说”，也可称为“债务融资过度支出假说”——即危机前高家庭债务与危机期间随后的支出下降之间的相关性，反映了危机前由债务融资的高支出以及危机期间支出回归正常水平。正如Svensson（2019, 2020）所讨论的，这与上述相关性反映了通过Muellbauer（2012）所称的“住房抵押家庭需求”渠道以及Mian和Sufi（2018）所称的“信贷驱动家庭需求”渠道进行的债务融资过度支出是一致的。

papers.title: Tax Planning Knowledge Diffusion via the Labor Market
papers.authors: John M. Barrios, John Gallemore
papers.abstract: We examine the extent to which the labor market facilitates the diffusion of tax planning knowledge across firms. Using a novel dataset of tax department employee movements between S&P 1500 firms, we find that firms experience an increase in their tax planning after hiring a tax employee from a tax aggressive firm. This finding is robust to various research designs and specifications. Consistent with tax planning knowledge driving this result, we find that the tax planning benefit of hiring an employee from a tax aggressive firm is stronger when the employee has more tax experience and is hired into a senior tax department role, and when the hiring firm likely had less tax planning knowledge prior to the hire. Further tests suggest that tax planning knowledge is highly specific in nature: the increase in tax avoidance is larger when the hiring and former firms are similar (i.e., operating in the same sector or having similar foreign operations), and firms are more likely to hire tax department employees from firms with similar characteristics. Our study documents the first-order role of the labor market in the diffusion of tax planning knowledge across firms, and suggests that tax department human capital is a central determinant of tax planning outcomes.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, LS, PE；JEL：H25, H26, J20, J24, J4, J44, J60
papers.zh_title: 通过劳动力市场扩散的税收筹划知识
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了劳动力市场在多大程度上促进了税收筹划知识在企业间的扩散。利用一个包含S&P 1500公司税务部门员工流动的新数据集，我们发现，公司在从税收激进公司雇佣一名税务员工后，其税收筹划活动有所增加。这一发现在各种研究设计和规格下都是稳健的。与税收筹划知识驱动这一结果相一致的是，我们发现，当该员工拥有更多税务经验并被聘用到高级税务部门职位，以及当雇佣公司在雇佣前可能拥有较少税收筹划知识时，从税收激进公司雇佣员工带来的税收筹划收益更强。进一步的测试表明，税收筹划知识具有高度特定性：当雇佣公司和前公司相似（即在同一行业运营或具有相似的海外业务）时，避税程度的增加更大，并且公司更倾向于从具有相似特征的公司雇佣税务部门员工。我们的研究记录了劳动力市场在企业间扩散税收筹划知识中的首要作用，并表明税务部门的人力资本是税收筹划结果的核心决定因素。

papers.title: The Battle Over Patents: History and the Politics of Innovation
papers.authors: Stephen H. Haber, Naomi R. Lamoreaux
papers.abstract: This essay is the introduction to a book of the same title, forthcoming in summer of 2021 from Oxford University Press. The purpose is to document the ways in which patent systems are products of battles over the economic surplus from innovation. The features of these systems take shape as interests at different points in the production chain seek advantage in any way they can, and consequently, they are riven with imperfections. The interesting historical question is why US-style patent systems with all their imperfections have come to dominate other methods of encouraging inventive activity. The essays in the book suggest that the creation of a tradable but temporary property right facilitates the transfer of technological knowledge and thus fosters a highly productive decentralized ecology of inventors and firms.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE；JEL：N4, N41, N42, N43, N44, O3, O34
papers.zh_title: 专利之争：历史与创新政治学
papers.zh_abstract: 本文是一本同名书籍的引言，该书将于2021年夏季由牛津大学出版社出版。其目的是记录专利制度是如何成为围绕创新经济剩余进行斗争的产物。这些制度的特征随着生产链不同环节的利益相关者以各种方式寻求优势而形成，因此，它们充满了缺陷。一个有趣的历史问题是，为什么美国式的专利制度尽管存在所有缺陷，却已主导了其他鼓励发明活动的方法。本书中的文章表明，可交易但临时的财产权的创造促进了技术知识的转移，从而培育了一个由发明者和公司组成的高效分散化生态系统。

papers.title: Getting Schooled: The Role of Universities in Attracting Immigrant Entrepreneurs
papers.authors: Natee Amornsiripanitch, Paul A. Gompers, George Hu, Kaushik Vasudevan
papers.abstract: Immigrant founders of venture capital-backed companies have been critical to the entrepreneurial ecosystem. We document the channels through which immigrant founders find their way to the United States and how those channels have changed over time. Immigrants have been an important source of founders for venture capital-backed startups accounting for roughly 20% of all founders over the past 30 years. Immigrants coming to the United States for their education have been the primary source of founders with those coming after being educated abroad and then arriving for work decreasing in importance over time. The importance of undergraduate education as a channel for immigrant founders has increased over time. Immigrant founders coming for education are likely to start their companies in the state in which they were educated, especially states where they received their graduate education, leading to potentially large local economic benefits. The results of this paper have important policy implications for the supply of entrepreneurial talent and efforts to promote entrepreneurial ecosystems.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, LS；JEL：G24, J0, J15, J24, L26
papers.zh_title: 接受教育：大学在吸引移民企业家中的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 风险投资支持公司的移民创始人对创业生态系统至关重要。我们记录了移民创始人进入美国的渠道以及这些渠道随时间的变化。移民一直是风险投资支持初创企业创始人的重要来源，在过去30年中约占所有创始人的20%。来美国接受教育的移民一直是创始人的主要来源，而在国外接受教育后为工作而来美国的创始人的重要性随时间推移而下降。本科教育作为移民创始人渠道的重要性随时间增加。为教育而来的移民创始人很可能在他们接受教育的州创办公司，尤其是在他们接受研究生教育的州，这可能会带来巨大的地方经济利益。本文的结果对创业人才的供给以及促进创业生态系统的努力具有重要的政策意义。

papers.title: Productivity, Place, and Plants
papers.authors: Benjamin Schoefer, Oren Ziv
papers.abstract: Why do cities differ so much in productivity? A long literature has sought out systematic sources, such as inherent productivity advantages, market access, agglomeration forces, or sorting. We document that up to three quarters of the measured regional productivity dispersion is spurious, reflecting the “luck of the draw” of finite counts of idiosyncratically heterogeneous plants that happen to operate in a given location. The patterns are even more pronounced for new plants, hold for alternative productivity measures, and broadly extend to European countries. This large role for individual plants suggests a smaller role for places in driving regional differences.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, ITI, LS, PE, PR；JEL：D22, D24, E23, R0, R12
papers.zh_title: 生产率、地点与工厂
papers.zh_abstract: 为什么城市之间的生产率差异如此之大？长期以来，文献一直在寻找系统性的原因，例如固有的生产率优势、市场准入、集聚力量或分类效应。我们证明，高达四分之三的观测到的区域生产率差异是虚假的，反映了“抽签运气”——即恰好在一个特定地点运营的、数量有限的、具有异质性的工厂。这种模式对于新工厂而言更为明显，对于其他生产率衡量指标也成立，并且广泛适用于欧洲国家。单个工厂的巨大作用表明，地点在驱动区域差异方面的作用较小。

papers.title: A Congestion Theory of Unemployment Fluctuations
papers.authors: Yusuf Mercan, Benjamin Schoefer, Petr Sedláček
papers.abstract: We propose a theory of unemployment fluctuations in which new-hires and incumbent-workers are imperfect substitutes. Hence, attempts to hire away the unemployed during recessions diminish the marginal product of new hires, discouraging job creation. This single feature achieves a ten-fold increase in the volatility of hiring in an otherwise standard search model, produces a realistic Beveridge curve despite countercyclical separations, and explains 30–40% of US unemployment fluctuations. Additionally, it explains the excess procyclicality of new hires’ wages, the cyclical labor wedge, countercyclical earnings losses from job displacement, and the limited steady-state effects of unemployment insurance.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, ME, PR；JEL：D24, E24, E32, J21, J23, J64
papers.zh_title: 失业波动的拥堵理论
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种失业波动理论，其中新雇佣工人和在职工人是不完全替代的。因此，在经济衰退期间试图雇佣失业者的行为会降低新雇佣工人的边际产出，从而抑制就业创造。这一单一特征在原本标准的搜索模型中实现了招聘波动性的十倍增长，尽管存在逆周期的离职率，但仍能产生现实的贝弗里奇曲线，并解释了美国30-40%的失业波动。此外，它还解释了新雇佣工人工资的过度顺周期性、周期性劳动楔子、失业导致的逆周期收入损失，以及失业保险有限的稳态效应。

papers.title: Reservation Raises: The Aggregate Labor Supply Curve at the Extensive Margin
papers.authors: Preston Mui, Benjamin Schoefer
papers.abstract: We measure extensive-margin labor supply (employment) preferences in two representative surveys of the U.S. and German populations. We elicit reservation raises: the percent wage change that renders a given individual indifferent between employment and nonemployment. It is equal to her reservation wage divided by her actual, or potential, wage. The reservation raise distribution is the nonparametric aggregate labor supply curve. Locally, the curve exhibits large short-run elasticities above 3, consistent with business cycle evidence. For larger upward shifts, arc elasticities shrink towards 0.5, consistent with quasi-experimental evidence from tax holidays. Existing models fail to match this nonconstant, asymmetric curve.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, ME, PE；JEL：E24, E32, J22, J64
papers.zh_title: 保留加薪：广义边际上的总劳动供给曲线
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在两项具有代表性的美国与德国人口调查中衡量了广义边际劳动供给（就业）偏好。我们引出了“保留加薪”：即使特定个体在就业与非就业之间无差异的工资变化百分比。它等于该个体的保留工资除以其实际或潜在工资。保留加薪的分布构成了非参数的总劳动供给曲线。在局部，该曲线表现出大于3的较大短期弹性，这与商业周期的证据一致。对于较大的向上变动，弧弹性缩小至0.5左右，这与来自税收假期准实验研究的证据一致。现有模型无法匹配这种非恒定、非对称的曲线。

papers.title: Invention and the Life Course: Age Differences in Patenting
papers.authors: Mary Kaltenberg, Adam B. Jaffe, Margie E. Lachman
papers.abstract: Previous research suggests creative ability peaks in the age decades of the 30s and early 40s, and declines thereafter, with some variation across fields. Building from the cognitive aging literature, we expect differences in the rate of creation and qualitative nature of creative works by age. Cognitive processes show aging-related changes with increases in experience-based knowledge (pragmatics or crystallized abilities) and decreases in the ability to process novel information quickly and efficiently (mechanics or fluid abilities). We describe a new database created by combining the publicly available patent data with information on inventor ages scraped from directory websites on the web for approximately 1.2 million U.S.-resident inventors patenting between 1976 and 2017. Our results suggest that cross-sectional and within-inventor patenting rates are similar, peaking at around the early 40s for both women and men. We find varying results for attributes of patents in relation to age, some of which are consistent with cognitive aging theory. For solo inventors, backward citations and originality, which are connected to experience, were found to increase with age. Forward citations, number of claims, and generality measures, as well as a citation-based measure of disruptiveness decline on average with inventor age. A similar pattern was found for performance in teams based on the average age of inventors in the team. Exploration of age diversity showed that teams with a wider age range had patents that are slightly more important (i.e., with more forward citations). The findings have the potential to advance scholarship on the life course of innovation with implications for workplace policies.
papers.zh_title: 发明与生命历程：专利活动中的年龄差异
papers.zh_abstract: 先前的研究表明，创造能力在30多岁至40岁出头达到顶峰，之后下降，不同领域存在一些差异。基于认知老化文献，我们预期不同年龄段的创造速率和创造性作品的性质存在差异。认知过程表现出与年龄相关的变化：基于经验的知识（实用能力或晶体能力）增加，而快速有效处理新信息的能力（机械能力或流体能力）下降。我们描述了一个新数据库，该数据库通过将公开可用的专利数据与从网络目录网站抓取的、约120万美国居民发明家（在1976年至2017年间获得专利）的年龄信息相结合而创建。我们的结果表明，横截面和发明家内部的专利率相似，男性和女性均在40岁出头达到峰值。我们发现专利属性与年龄的关系存在不同结果，其中一些与认知老化理论一致。对于独立发明家，与经验相关的后向引用和原创性随年龄增长而增加。前向引用、权利要求数量和通用性指标，以及基于引用的颠覆性指标，平均随发明家年龄增长而下降。基于团队中发明家平均年龄的团队绩效也发现了类似模式。对年龄多样性的探索表明，年龄范围更广的团队获得的专利略微更重要（即前向引用更多）。这些发现有可能推进关于创新生命历程的学术研究，并对工作场所政策产生影响。

papers.title: The Age of Invention: Matching Inventor Ages to Patents Based on Web-scraped Sources
papers.authors: Mary Kaltenberg, Adam B. Jaffe, Margie Lachman
papers.abstract: This paper overviews the data collection procedures and resulting data for inventor ages and associated death dates. We use information about inventors from patents (name and location) and search for age and date of death information from publicly available online web directories and build a scoring system to indicate the quality of information that we collect. After applying a variety of heuristics and robustness checks, we are confident of 1,508,676 inventor ages associated with patents granted between 1976 and 2018. We also find the death dates of 206,589 inventors, though we are not as confident of the accuracy of the death information. The datasets and associated replication files are freely available at: https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/YRLSKU
papers.zh_title: 发明的时代：基于网络抓取来源将发明家年龄与专利匹配
papers.zh_abstract: 本文概述了发明家年龄及相关死亡日期数据的数据收集程序和最终数据。我们利用专利中的发明家信息（姓名和地点），从公开可用的在线网络目录中搜索年龄和死亡日期信息，并构建了一个评分系统来指示所收集信息的质量。在应用各种启发式方法和稳健性检验后，我们确信有1,508,676个与1976年至2018年间授予的专利相关的发明家年龄。我们还找到了206,589位发明家的死亡日期，尽管我们对死亡信息的准确性不那么确信。数据集及相关复制文件可在以下网址免费获取：https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/YRLSKU

papers.title: Are Bigger Banks Better? Firm-Level Evidence from Germany
papers.authors: Kilian Huber
papers.abstract: The effects of large banks on the real economy are theoretically ambiguous and politically controversial. I identify quasi-exogenous increases in bank size in postwar Germany. I show that firms did not grow faster after their relationship banks became bigger. In fact, opaque borrowers grew more slowly. The enlarged banks did not increase profits or efficiency, but worked with riskier borrowers. Bank managers benefited through higher salaries and media attention. The paper presents newly digitized microdata on German firms and their banks. Overall, the findings reveal that bigger banks do not always raise real growth and can actually harm some borrowers.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, DAE, EFG, IO, ME；JEL：E24, E44, G21, G28, L11, L25, N14, N24, N84
papers.zh_title: 大银行更好吗？来自德国的企业层面证据
papers.zh_abstract: 大银行对实体经济的影响在理论上具有模糊性，在政治上具有争议性。我识别了战后德国银行规模的准外生增长。我证明，在其关系银行变得更大之后，企业并未增长得更快。事实上，不透明的借款人增长得更慢。规模扩大的银行并未提高利润或效率，而是与风险更高的借款人合作。银行管理者通过更高的薪水和媒体关注度获益。本文展示了新数字化的德国企业及其银行的微观数据。总体而言，研究结果表明，更大的银行并不总能提高实际增长，实际上可能损害一些借款人。

papers.title: Discrimination, Managers, and Firm Performance: Evidence from “Aryanizations” in Nazi Germany
papers.authors: Kilian Huber, Volker Lindenthal, Fabian Waldinger
papers.abstract: Large-scale increases in discrimination can lead to dismissals of highly qualified managers. We investigate how expulsions of senior Jewish managers, due to rising discrimination in Nazi Germany, affected large corporations. Firms that lost Jewish managers experienced persistent reductions in stock prices, dividends, and returns on assets. Aggregate market value fell by roughly 1.8 percent of German GNP because of the expulsions. Managers who served as key connectors to other firms and managers who were highly educated were particularly important for firm performance. The findings imply that individual managers drive firm performance. Discrimination against qualified business leaders causes first-order economic losses.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, DAE, LS, ME, POL；JEL：D22, E60, G30, J7, J71, M12, N24, N34, N8
papers.zh_title: 歧视、管理者与企业绩效：来自纳粹德国“雅利安化”的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 大规模歧视的加剧可能导致高素质管理者的解雇。我们研究了纳粹德国因歧视加剧而导致的高级犹太管理者的驱逐如何影响大型企业。失去犹太管理者的企业经历了股票价格、股息和资产收益率的持续下降。由于这些驱逐，总市场价值下降了大约德国国民生产总值的1.8%。那些作为与其他企业关键连接者的管理者以及受过高等教育的管理者，对企业绩效尤为重要。这些发现意味着个体管理者驱动企业绩效。对合格商业领袖的歧视会导致一级的经济损失。

papers.title: The Eﬀects of Disclosure and Enforcement on Payday Lending in Texas
papers.authors: Jialan Wang, Kathleen Burke
papers.abstract: Inspired by the ﬁeld experiment in Bertrand and Morse (2011), the state of Texas adopted an information disclosure for consumers taking out payday loans starting in January, 2012. The disclosure compares the cost of payday loans with other credit products, and presents their likelihood of renewal in easy-to-understand terms. Simultaneously, Austin and Dallas implemented stricter supply restrictions through city ordinances. We analyze both types of regulations, and ﬁnd that the statewide disclosures led to a signiﬁcant and persistent 13% decline in loan volume in the ﬁrst six months after implementation. The city ordinances led to a 61% decline in loan volume in Austin and a 44% decline in Dallas, with the timing of the eﬀect driven by the start of enforcement rather than the eﬀective date of regulation.
