Policies based on such models may not reflect societal preferences or capture how preferences affect behavior and disease spread. Models with epidemiological processes that do incorporate behavior change or health-wealth tradeoffs (mostly from economics) drastically limit individual-level heterogeneity to remain tractable. This makes it difficult to understand variation in behavioral responses and distributional consequences of the pandemic, which should be central to any evaluation of pandemic-related policy. Without the proper tools, we are unable to fully address even basic policy questions, such as whether the long-run effects of social-distancing justify the costs - and if so, for whom and under what circumstances. After reviewing modeling approaches from epidemiology and economics (among other fields), I propose a framework adapted from earlier work on the HIV/AIDS epidemic. Analysis of individual behavior is based on the idea that health is a form of human capital in which individuals invest through their choices. The model integrates individual level variation that other frameworks omit, but does so at the cost of drastically limiting aggregate economic and epidemiological processes. I conclude that what is needed is a multi-disciplinary effort that helps to bridge gaps across disciplines, which would amount to constructing models that capture key features of different approaches. To be useful in evaluating pandemic-related policy, such a model should have rich heterogeneity and capture how individual choices are linked to the broad contours of disease spread and aggregate economic output. Whether such an effort would be feasible and fruitful remains to be seen.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, PE；JEL：I12, I14, I18, I24, J20
papers.zh_title: 大流行期间的行为建模：以艾滋病作为历史类比
papers.zh_abstract: 许多流行病学模型并非旨在捕捉健康与经济福祉之间的权衡，也很少有模型能够预测这些权衡如何与个人偏好相互作用以影响行为。基于此类模型的政策可能无法反映社会偏好，也无法捕捉偏好如何影响行为和疾病传播。那些确实包含行为变化或健康-财富权衡的流行病学过程模型（主要来自经济学）为了保持可处理性而大幅限制了个人层面的异质性。这使得难以理解行为反应的变异性和大流行的分配后果，而这应成为任何大流行相关政策评估的核心。没有适当的工具，我们甚至无法充分解决基本的政策问题，例如社交距离的长期效应是否证明其成本是合理的——如果是，对谁以及在什么情况下合理。在回顾了流行病学和经济学（以及其他领域）的建模方法后，我提出了一个改编自早期关于艾滋病毒/艾滋病流行病工作的框架。对个体行为的分析基于健康是一种人力资本形式的理念，个人通过其选择进行投资。该模型整合了其他框架忽略的个人层面变异，但代价是大幅限制了总体经济和流行病学过程。我的结论是，需要多学科努力来弥合学科间的差距，这相当于构建能够捕捉不同方法关键特征的模型。为了在评估大流行相关政策时有用，这样的模型应具有丰富的异质性，并捕捉个人选择如何与疾病传播的广泛轮廓和总体经济产出相联系。这种努力是否可行且富有成效仍有待观察。

papers.title: Delay the Pension Age or Adjust the Pension Benefit? Implications for Labor Supply and Individual Welfare in China
papers.authors: Yuanyuan Deng, Hanming Fang, Katja Hanewald, Shang Wu
papers.abstract: We develop and calibrate a life-cycle model of labor supply and consumption to quantify the implications of alternative pension reforms on labor supply, individual welfare, and government budget for China’s basic old-age insurance program. We focus on urban males and distinguish low-skilled and high-skilled individuals, who differ in their preferences, health and labor income dynamics, and medical expense processes. We use the calibrated model to evaluate three potential pension reforms: (i) increasing the pension eligibility age from 60 to 65, but keeping the current pension benefit rule unchanged; (ii) keeping the pension eligibility age at 60, but proportionally lowering pension benefits so that the pension program’s budget is the same as under Reform (i); and (iii) increasing the pension eligibility age to 65 and simultaneously increasing the pension benefits so that individuals of both skill types attain the same individual welfare levels as in the status quo. We find that relative to the baseline, both Reforms (i) and (ii) can substantially improve the budgets of the pension system, but at the cost of substantial individual welfare loss for both skill types. In contrast, we find that Reform (iii) can modestly improve the budget of the pension system while ensuring that both skill types are as well off as in the status quo. We find that Reforms (i) and (ii) slightly increases, but Reform (iii) slightly decreases, the overall labor supply.
papers.zh_title: 延迟退休年龄还是调整养老金待遇？对中国劳动供给和个人福利的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发并校准了一个劳动供给和消费的生命周期模型，以量化替代性养老金改革对中国基本养老保险计划的劳动供给、个人福利和政府预算的影响。我们关注城市男性，并区分低技能和高技能个体，他们在偏好、健康和劳动收入动态以及医疗支出过程上存在差异。我们使用校准后的模型评估三种潜在的养老金改革：（i）将养老金领取年龄从60岁提高到65岁，但保持当前养老金待遇规则不变；（ii）保持养老金领取年龄为60岁，但按比例降低养老金待遇，使养老金计划的预算与改革（i）相同；（iii）将养老金领取年龄提高到65岁，同时提高养老金待遇，使两种技能类型的个人都达到与现状相同的个人福利水平。我们发现，相对于基准，改革（i）和（ii）都能显著改善养老金系统的预算，但代价是两种技能类型的个人福利大幅损失。相比之下，我们发现改革（iii）可以适度改善养老金系统的预算，同时确保两种技能类型的个人福利与现状相同。我们发现，改革（i）和（ii）略微增加了总体劳动供给，而改革（iii）则略微减少了总体劳动供给。

papers.title: Labor Dynamics and Supply Chain Disruption in Food Manufacturing
papers.authors: A. Ford Ramsey, Barry Goodwin, Mildred Haley
papers.abstract: Food manufacturing and processing is an important link between agricultural producers and consumers in the agricultural supply chain. The food manufacturing sector in the United States is both increasingly mechanized and increasingly concentrated. Consequently, labor risks in food manufacturing have changed over time with changes in industry structure. Labor risks were highlighted by the COVID-19 pandemic - particularly in the animal slaughtering and processing industry - where labor-driven disruptions resulted in temporary plant closures. We use county-level data on employment in food manufacturing and dynamic panel models estimated via generalized method of moments to examine employment and wage dynamics in the food manufacturing sector and animal processing industry. We then compare forecasts from the estimated models with changes in food manufacturing and animal processing employment and wages during the onset of the COVID-19 pandemic. Our results provide insight into the role of operational and disruption risks in food manufacturing. We find significant delays in adjustment to employment and quicker adjustment in wages. Although there is an unanticipated drop in employment in food manufacturing and animal processing in April of 2020, employment returned to predicted levels within two to three months. The response of wages and employment to the COVID-19 pandemic suggest a degree of resilience in food supply chains.
papers.zh_title: 食品制造业中的劳动力动态与供应链中断
papers.zh_abstract: 食品制造和加工是农业供应链中连接农业生产者和消费者的重要环节。美国的食品制造业既日益机械化，也日益集中。因此，食品制造业中的劳动力风险随着行业结构的变化而随时间改变。COVID-19大流行凸显了劳动力风险——特别是在动物屠宰和加工行业——其中劳动力驱动的中断导致工厂暂时关闭。我们使用县级食品制造业就业数据以及通过广义矩估计法估计的动态面板模型，来考察食品制造业和动物加工业的就业与工资动态。然后，我们将估计模型的预测与COVID-19大流行初期食品制造业和动物加工业就业与工资的变化进行比较。我们的结果提供了对食品制造业运营风险和中断风险作用的见解。我们发现就业调整存在显著延迟，而工资调整更快。尽管2020年4月食品制造业和动物加工业的就业出现了意外下降，但就业在两到三个月内恢复到了预测水平。工资和就业对COVID-19大流行的反应表明食品供应链具有一定程度的韧性。

papers.title: Learning about Housing Cost: Survey Evidence from the German House Price Boom
papers.authors: Fabian Kindermann, Julia Le Blanc, Monika Piazzesi, Martin Schneider
papers.abstract: This paper uses new household survey data to study expectation formation during the recent housing boom in Germany. The cross section of forecasts depends on only two household characteristics: location and tenure. The average household in a region responds to local conditions but underpredicts local price growth. Renters make on average higher and hence more accurate forecasts than owners, although their forecasts are more dispersed and their mean squared forecast errors are higher. A quantitative model of learning about housing cost can match these facts. It emphasizes the unique information structure of housing among asset markets: renters who do not own the asset are relatively well informed about its cash flow, since they pay for housing services that owners simply consume. Renters then make more accurate forecasts in a boom driven by an increase in rents and recovery from a financial crisis.
papers.zh_title: 学习住房成本：来自德国房价繁荣期的调查证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用新的家庭调查数据，研究德国近期住房繁荣期间的预期形成。预测的横截面仅取决于两个家庭特征：地理位置和住房所有权。一个地区的普通家庭会对当地状况做出反应，但会低估当地房价增长。租房者平均而言比房主做出更高、因而更准确的预测，尽管他们的预测更为分散，且均方预测误差更高。一个关于住房成本学习的定量模型可以匹配这些事实。该模型强调了住房在资产市场中独特的信息结构：不拥有该资产的租房者对其现金流相对更了解，因为他们为房主直接消费的住房服务付费。因此，在由租金上涨和金融危机复苏驱动的繁荣中，租房者能做出更准确的预测。

papers.title: Judging Under Public Pressure
papers.authors: Alma Cohen, Zvika Neeman, Florian Auferoth
papers.abstract: Individuals who engage in “judging” – that is, rendering a determination in a dispute or contest between two parties – might be influenced by public pressure to favor one of the parties. Many rules and arrangements seek to insulate such individuals from public pressure or to address the effects of such pressure. We study this subject empirically, investigating the circumstances in which public pressure is more and less likely to affect judging.
papers.zh_title: 在公众压力下进行裁决
papers.zh_abstract: 从事“裁决”（即在双方之间的争端或竞赛中做出决定）的个人可能会受到公众压力的影响，从而偏袒其中一方。许多规则和安排旨在使此类个人免受公众压力影响，或应对这种压力的后果。我们对此主题进行实证研究，探究公众压力更可能或更不可能影响裁决的具体情境。

papers.title: Politics and Gender in the Executive Suite
papers.authors: Alma Cohen, Moshe Hazan, David Weiss
papers.abstract: Are the political preferences of CEOs associated with the representation and compensation of women in the executive suite? We find that Democratic CEOs (those who contribute more to Democratic candidates) are associated with higher representation of women in the executive suite. To explore causality, we use an event study approach and show that replacing a Republican with a Democratic CEO is associated with 20%-60% in more women in the executive suite. Finally, we show that Democratic CEOs associated with a significant reduction (or even disappearance) of the gender gap in the level and performance-sensitivity of executive pay.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, LE, POL；JEL：G30, J16, J30, M12, M14, M51
papers.zh_title: 高管层的政治倾向与性别
papers.zh_abstract: CEO的政治偏好是否与高管层中女性的代表性和薪酬相关？我们发现，民主党CEO（那些向民主党候选人捐款更多的人）与高管层中女性比例更高相关。为探究因果关系，我们采用事件研究法，表明将共和党CEO替换为民主党CEO后，高管层中女性比例增加20%-60%。最后，我们证明民主党CEO与高管薪酬水平和绩效敏感度方面的性别差距显著缩小（甚至消失）相关。

papers.title: Global Banks and Systemic Debt Crises
papers.authors: Juan M. Morelli, Pablo Ottonello, Diego J. Perez
papers.abstract: We study the role of global financial intermediaries in international lending. We construct a model of the world economy, in which heterogeneous borrowers issue risky securities purchased by financial intermediaries. Aggregate shocks transmit internationally through financial intermediaries' net worth. The strength of this transmission is governed by the degree of frictions intermediaries face in financing their risky investments. We provide direct empirical evidence on this mechanism showing that around Lehman Brothers' collapse, emerging-market bonds held by more distressed global banks experienced larger price contractions. A quantitative analysis of the model shows that global financial intermediaries play a relevant role in driving borrowing-cost and consumption fluctuations in emerging-market economies, during both debt crises and regular business cycles. The portfolio of financial intermediaries and the distribution of bond holdings in the world economy are key to determine aggregate dynamics.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E3, F3, F41
papers.zh_title: 全球银行与系统性债务危机
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究全球金融中介在国际借贷中的作用。我们构建了一个世界经济模型，其中异质性借款人发行由金融中介购买的风险证券。总冲击通过金融中介的净值在国际间传导。这种传导的强度取决于中介在为其风险投资融资时所面临的摩擦程度。我们提供了关于这一机制的直接经验证据，表明在雷曼兄弟倒闭前后，由陷入困境的全球银行持有的新兴市场债券经历了更大的价格下跌。模型的定量分析表明，在债务危机和常规商业周期中，全球金融中介在推动新兴市场经济体的借贷成本波动和消费波动方面发挥着重要作用。金融中介的投资组合以及世界经济中债券持有量的分布是决定总体动态的关键因素。

papers.title: On the Green Interest Rate.
papers.authors: Nicholas Z. Muller
papers.abstract: This paper demonstrates how a central bank might operationalize an expanded role inclusive of managing risks from environmental pollution. The analysis introduces the green interest rate (rg) which depends on temporal changes in the pollution intensity of output. This policy instrument reallocates consumption from periods when output is pollution intensive to when output is cleaner. In economies on a cleaning-up path, rg exceeds r*. For those growing more polluted, rg is less than r*. In the U.S. economy from 1957 to 2016, rg exceeded r* by 50 basis points. Federal environmental policy reversed the orientation between rg and r*.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, ME；JEL：E21, E43, E63, Q51, Q53, Q54, Q56, Q58
papers.zh_title: 论绿色利率
papers.zh_abstract: 本文展示了中央银行如何将包括管理环境污染风险在内的扩展角色付诸实践。分析引入了绿色利率（rg），该利率取决于产出污染强度的时序变化。这一政策工具将消费从产出污染密集的时期重新分配到产出更清洁的时期。在处于清洁化路径的经济体中，rg超过r*。对于污染日益严重的经济体，rg低于r*。在1957年至2016年的美国经济中，rg比r*高出50个基点。联邦环境政策逆转了rg与r*之间的取向关系。

papers.title: Missing Top Income Recipients
papers.authors: Martin Ravallion
papers.abstract: Low response rates among rich households are thought to be a serious problem in many applications using household surveys. The paper discusses the various ways the problem can be dealt with, and makes some recommendations for practice, including in developing countries. Under certain conditions, income-selective non-compliance with an initially randomized assignment can be corrected by reweighting the data. This requires that the surveys pick up at least some top incomes. If not, then income tax records can help, including in estimating distributional national accounts. However, tax data come with their own concerns including tax avoidance/evasion, weak coverage of informal sectors and illicit incomes, and concerns about construct validity, given the limitations of taxable income as a basis for inter-personal comparisons of economic welfare. An appropriately weighted survey-based distribution of an acceptable measure of economic welfare need not be less reliable for most purposes of distributional analysis than income-tax records, including in combination with surveys. The choice will depend on the question to be addressed, and country-specific circumstances. These measurement issues warrant further research across multiple settings.
papers.zh_title: 缺失的高收入人群
papers.zh_abstract: 在许多使用家庭调查的应用中，富裕家庭的低回复率被认为是一个严重问题。本文讨论了处理该问题的各种方法，并为实践（包括在发展中国家）提出了一些建议。在某些条件下，可以通过对数据进行重新加权来纠正最初随机分配中因收入选择导致的违规行为。这要求调查至少能捕捉到部分高收入人群。如果无法做到，那么所得税记录可以提供帮助，包括用于估算分配国民账户。然而，税收数据本身也存在问题，包括避税/逃税、对非正规部门和非法收入的覆盖不足，以及由于应税收入作为人际经济福利比较基础的局限性而带来的构念效度问题。对于大多数分配分析目的而言，经过适当加权的、基于调查的可接受经济福利指标分布，其可靠性不一定低于所得税记录（包括与调查结合使用的情况）。选择将取决于要解决的问题以及各国的具体情况。这些测量问题值得在多种情境下进行进一步研究。

papers.title: The Market-Expanding Role of Regulatory Approval in Medicine
papers.authors: Benjamin Berger, Amitabh Chandra, Craig Garthwaite
papers.abstract: Regulatory review is often seen as a barrier to innovation, increasing costs and delaying new medicines. Yet approval may also expand markets by certifying quality and reducing uncertainty. We test this by studying FDA approval for follow-on indications—uses that physicians could already prescribe “off-label”—and find approval raises use in newly approved diseases by 25 percent within a year, with larger increases in smaller off-label markets. Subsequent approvals in the same disease yield smaller gains. Our results suggest regulatory approval of medicines expands market size by increasing demand, rather than easing insurer-imposed restrictions, revealing limits to market-based learning.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, IO, PE, PR；JEL：I1, I18, O3
papers.zh_title: 药品监管批准的市场扩张作用
papers.zh_abstract: 监管审查通常被视为创新的障碍，会增加成本并延迟新药上市。然而，批准也可能通过认证质量和减少不确定性来扩张市场。我们通过研究FDA对后续适应症（即医生已经可以“超说明书”使用的用途）的批准来检验这一点，发现批准后一年内，新获批疾病的使用量增加了25%，在较小的超说明书市场中增幅更大。同一疾病后续的批准带来的收益较小。我们的结果表明，药品监管批准通过增加需求（而非放松保险公司施加的限制）来扩大市场规模，揭示了基于市场学习的局限性。

papers.title: Supply, Demand, and Specialized Production
papers.authors: James D. Hamilton
papers.abstract: This paper develops a growth model characterized by equilibrium unemployment and sustained monopoly power. The level of demand is a key factor in deviations from the steady-state growth path with a Keynesian-type spending multiplier despite the absence of any nominal rigidities. The key friction in the model is the technological requirement that production of certain goods requires a dedicated team of workers that takes time to train and assemble.
papers.zh_title: 供给、需求与专业化生产
papers.zh_abstract: 本文构建了一个以均衡失业和持续垄断势力为特征的增长模型。尽管不存在任何名义刚性，需求水平仍是偏离稳态增长路径的关键因素，并存在凯恩斯式的支出乘数。模型中的关键摩擦是技术性要求：某些商品的生产需要一支专门的工人团队，而组建和培训该团队需要时间。

papers.title: Information Cascades and Social Learning
papers.authors: Sushil Bikhchandani, David Hirshleifer, Omer Tamuz, Ivo Welch
papers.abstract: Social learning is the updating of beliefs based on the observation of others. It can lead to efficient aggregation of information, but also to inaccurate decisions, fragility of mass behaviors, and, in the case of information cascades, to complete blockage of learning. We review the theory of information cascades and social learning, and discuss important themes, insights and applications of this literature as it has developed over the last thirty years. We also highlight open questions and promising directions for further theoretical and empirical exploration.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, DEV, EH, IO, LE, LS, PE, POL, PR；JEL：D7, D8, D9
papers.zh_title: 信息级联与社会学习
papers.zh_abstract: 社会学习是指基于观察他人行为来更新自身信念的过程。它既能促进信息的有效聚合，也可能导致决策失误、群体行为的脆弱性，以及在信息级联情况下学习的完全停滞。本文回顾了信息级联与社会学习的理论，并讨论了该文献在过去三十年间发展出的重要主题、洞见与应用。我们还指出了开放性问题以及未来理论与实证探索的有前景方向。

papers.title: Synthetic Controls with Staggered Adoption
papers.authors: Eli Ben-Michael, Avi Feller, Jesse Rothstein
papers.abstract: Staggered adoption of policies by different units at different times creates promising opportunities for observational causal inference. Estimation remains challenging, however, and common regression methods can give misleading results. A promising alternative is the synthetic control method (SCM), which finds a weighted average of control units that closely balances the treated unit’s pre-treatment outcomes. In this paper, we generalize SCM, originally designed to study a single treated unit, to the staggered adoption setting. We first bound the error for the average effect and show that it depends on both the imbalance for each treated unit separately and the imbalance for the average of the treated units. We then propose "partially pooled" SCM weights to minimize a weighted combination of these measures; approaches that focus only on balancing one of the two components can lead to bias. We extend this approach to incorporate unit-level intercept shifts and auxiliary covariates. We assess the performance of the proposed method via extensive simulations and apply our results to the question of whether teacher collective bargaining leads to higher school spending, finding minimal impacts. We implement the proposed method in the augsynth R package.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE, TWP；JEL：C21, C23, I21, J5
papers.zh_title: 交错采纳情境下的合成控制法
papers.zh_abstract: 不同单位在不同时间交错采纳政策，为观察性因果推断创造了有前景的机会。然而，估计仍然具有挑战性，常见的回归方法可能得出误导性结果。一个有前景的替代方法是合成控制法（SCM），它通过寻找控制单位的加权平均，尽可能紧密地平衡处理单位在干预前的结果变量。在本文中，我们将最初为研究单一处理单位而设计的SCM推广到交错采纳情境。我们首先界定了平均处理效应的误差，并表明该误差既取决于每个处理单位单独的失衡程度，也取决于处理单位平均值的失衡程度。然后，我们提出了“部分池化”的SCM权重，以最小化这两个指标的加权组合；仅关注平衡其中某一成分的方法可能导致偏差。我们将该方法扩展到纳入单位层面的截距偏移和辅助协变量。我们通过广泛的模拟评估了所提出方法的性能，并将结果应用于教师集体谈判是否导致更高学校支出这一问题，发现影响极小。我们在augsynth R包中实现了所提出的方法。

papers.title: The Augmented Synthetic Control Method
papers.authors: Eli Ben-Michael, Avi Feller, Jesse Rothstein
papers.abstract: The synthetic control method (SCM) is a popular approach for estimating the impact of a treatment on a single unit in panel data settings. The "synthetic control" is a weighted average of control units that balances the treated unit's pre-treatment outcomes and other covariates as closely as possible. A critical feature of the original proposal is to use SCM only when the fit on pre-treatment outcomes is excellent. We propose Augmented SCM as an extension of SCM to settings where such pre-treatment fit is infeasible. Analogous to bias correction for inexact matching, Augmented SCM uses an outcome model to estimate the bias due to imperfect pre-treatment fit and then de-biases the original SCM estimate. Our main proposal, which uses ridge regression as the outcome model, directly controls pre-treatment fit while minimizing extrapolation from the convex hull. This estimator can also be expressed as a solution to a modified synthetic controls problem that allows negative weights on some donor units. We bound the estimation error of this approach under different data generating processes, including a linear factor model, and show how regularization helps to avoid over-fitting to noise. We demonstrate gains from Augmented SCM with extensive simulation studies and apply this framework to estimate the impact of the 2012 Kansas tax cuts on economic growth. We implement the proposed method in the new augsynth R package.
papers.meta: Programs：LS, PE, TWP；JEL：C21, C23, E62, H71
papers.zh_title: 增强型合成控制法
papers.zh_abstract: 合成控制法（SCM）是一种在面板数据情境下估计单一处理单位处理效应的流行方法。“合成控制”是控制单位的加权平均，它尽可能紧密地平衡处理单位在干预前的结果变量和其他协变量。原始方法的一个关键特征是仅在干预前结果拟合良好时使用SCM。我们提出增强型SCM作为SCM在干预前拟合不可行情境下的扩展。类似于对不精确匹配的偏差校正，增强型SCM使用一个结果模型来估计因干预前拟合不完美导致的偏差，然后对原始SCM估计进行去偏。我们的主要提议使用岭回归作为结果模型，在最小化凸包外推的同时直接控制干预前拟合。该估计量也可以表示为修改后的合成控制问题的解，该问题允许某些供体单位具有负权重。我们在不同数据生成过程（包括线性因子模型）下界定了该方法的估计误差，并展示了正则化如何有助于避免对噪声的过拟合。我们通过广泛的模拟研究展示了增强型SCM的改进，并将该框架应用于估计2012年堪萨斯州减税对经济增长的影响。我们在新的augsynth R包中实现了所提出的方法。

papers.title: A Model of Online Misinformation
papers.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Asuman Ozdaglar, James Siderius
papers.abstract: We present a model of online content sharing where agents sequentially observe an article and must decide whether to share it with others. This content may or may not contain misinformation. Agents gain utility from positive social media interactions but do not want to be called out for propagating misinformation. We characterize the (Bayesian-Nash) equilibria of this social media game and show sharing exhibits strategic complementarity. Our first main result establishes that the impact of homophily on content virality is non-monotone: homophily reduces the broader circulation of an article, but it creates echo chambers that impose less discipline on the sharing of low-reliability content. This insight underpins our second main result, which demonstrates that social media platforms interested in maximizing engagement tend to design their algorithms to create more homophilic communication patterns (“filter bubbles”). We show that platform incentives to amplify misinformation are particularly pronounced for low-reliability content likely to contain misinformation and when there is greater polarization and more divisive content. Finally, we discuss various regulatory solutions to such platform-manufactured misinformation.
papers.zh_title: 在线错误信息模型
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个在线内容分享模型，其中主体依次观察一篇文章，并必须决定是否与他人分享。这些内容可能包含也可能不包含错误信息。主体从积极的社交媒体互动中获得效用，但不想因传播错误信息而被指责。我们刻画了该社交媒体博弈的（贝叶斯-纳什）均衡，并表明分享行为表现出策略互补性。我们的第一个主要结果确立了同质性对内容病毒式传播的影响是非单调的：同质性减少了文章的广泛传播，但它创造了回音室，对低可靠性内容的分享施加了较少的约束。这一洞见支撑了我们的第二个主要结果，该结果表明，追求参与度最大化的社交媒体平台倾向于设计其算法，以创造更具同质性的沟通模式（“过滤气泡”）。我们表明，平台放大错误信息的激励在以下情况下尤为显著：对于可能包含错误信息的低可靠性内容，以及当存在更大的两极分化和更具分裂性的内容时。最后，我们讨论了针对这种平台制造的错误信息的各种监管解决方案。

papers.title: Marriage Market and Labor Market Sorting
papers.authors: Paula A. Calvo, Ilse Lindenlaub, Ana Reynoso
papers.abstract: We develop a new equilibrium model in which households’ labor supply choices form the link between sorting on the marriage market and sorting on the labor market. We first show that in theory, the nature of home production—whether partners’ hours are complements or substitutes—shapes equilibrium labor supply as well as marriage and labor market sorting. We then estimate our model using German data to empirically assess the nature of home production, and find that spouses’ home hours are complements. We investigate to what extent complementarity in home hours drives sorting and inequality. We find that home production complementarity strengthens positive marriage sorting and reduces the gender gap in hours and in labor sorting. This puts significant downward pressure on the gender wage gap and on within-household income inequality, but fuels between-household inequality. Our estimated model sheds new light on the sources of inequality in today’s Germany, and—by identifying important shifts in home production technology toward more complementarity—on the evolution of inequality over time.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS；JEL：D1, J01, J12, J16, J24, J31
papers.zh_title: 婚姻市场与劳动力市场匹配
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个新的均衡模型，其中家庭的劳动供给选择构成了婚姻市场匹配与劳动力市场匹配之间的联系。我们首先从理论上表明，家庭生产的性质——即配偶的工作时间是互补品还是替代品——塑造了均衡劳动供给以及婚姻和劳动力市场匹配。然后，我们使用德国数据估计我们的模型，以实证评估家庭生产的性质，并发现配偶的家庭工作时间是互补的。我们研究了家庭工作时间互补性在多大程度上驱动了匹配和不平等。我们发现，家庭生产互补性加强了正向婚姻匹配，并缩小了工作时间与劳动匹配方面的性别差距。这给性别工资差距和家庭内部收入不平等带来了显著的下行压力，但加剧了家庭间的不平等。我们估计的模型为当今德国不平等的根源提供了新的见解，并且——通过识别家庭生产技术向更高互补性的重要转变——为不平等随时间的演变提供了新的见解。

papers.title: Sampling Bias in Entrepreneurial Experiments
papers.authors: Ruiqing Cao, Rembrand M. Koning, Ramana Nanda
papers.abstract: Using data from a prominent online platform for launching new digital products, we document that ‘sampling bias’—defined as the difference between a startup’s target customer base and the actual sample on which early ‘beta tests’ are conducted—has a systematic and persistent impact on the venture’s success. Specifically, we show that products with a female-focused target market launching on a typical day, when nine in ten users on this platform are men, experience 45% less growth a year after launch than those for whom the target market is more male-focused. By isolating exogenous variation in the composition of beta testers unrelated to the characteristics of launched products on that day, we find that on days when there are unexpectedly more women beta testers on the platform—reducing the amount of sampling bias for female-focused products—the gender-performance gap shrinks towards zero. Our results highlight how sampling bias can lead to fewer successfully commercialized innovations for consumers who are underrepresented among early users.
papers.zh_title: 创业实验中的抽样偏差
papers.zh_abstract: 利用一个著名的数字新产品发布在线平台的数据，我们记录了“抽样偏差”——定义为初创企业的目标客户群与实际进行早期“测试版测试”的样本之间的差异——对企业的成功具有系统性和持续性的影响。具体来说，我们表明，在典型的一天（该平台上十分之九的用户是男性）推出以女性为目标市场的产品，一年后的增长比那些目标市场更偏向男性的产品少45%。通过隔离与当天推出产品特征无关的测试版测试者构成的外生变化，我们发现，当平台上女性测试版测试者意外增多（从而减少了女性聚焦产品的抽样偏差量）时，性别-绩效差距缩小至接近零。我们的结果强调了抽样偏差如何导致在早期用户中代表性不足的消费者的创新成功商业化减少。

papers.title: Determinacy without the Taylor Principle
papers.authors: George-Marios Angeletos, Chen Lian
papers.abstract: Our understanding of monetary policy is complicated by an equilibrium-selection conundrum: because the same path for the nominal interest rate can be associated with multiple equilibrium paths for inflation and output, there is a long-standing debate about what the right equilibrium selection is. We offer a potential resolution by showing that small frictions in social memory and intertemporal coordination can remove the indeterminacy. Under our perturbations, the unique surviving equilibrium is the same as that selected by the Taylor principle, but it no more relies on it; monetary policy is left to play only a stabilization role; and fiscal policy needs to be Ricardian, even when monetary policy is passive.
papers.zh_title: 无泰勒原理的确定性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们对货币政策的理解因一个均衡选择难题而变得复杂：由于名义利率的同一路径可能与通胀和产出的多条均衡路径相关联，因此关于什么是正确的均衡选择存在长期争论。我们通过表明社会记忆和跨期协调中的微小摩擦可以消除不确定性，提供了一个潜在的解决方案。在我们的扰动下，唯一存活的均衡与泰勒原理所选择的均衡相同，但它不再依赖于泰勒原理；货币政策仅发挥稳定作用；财政政策需要是李嘉图式的，即使货币政策是被动的。

papers.title: (When) Does Patent Protection Spur Cumulative Research Within Firms?
papers.authors: Ashish Arora, Sharon Belenzon, Matt Marx, Dror Shvadron
papers.abstract: We estimate the effect of patent protection on follow-on investments in corporate scientific research. We exploit a new method for identifying an exogenous reduction in the protection a granted patent provides. Using data on public, research-active firms between 1990 and 2015, we find that firms decrease follow-on research after a reduction in patent protection, as measured by a drop in internal citations to an associated scientific article. This effect is stronger for smaller firms and in industries where patents are traded less frequently. Our findings are consistent with a stylized model whereby patent protection is a strategic substitute for commercialization capability. Our results imply that stronger patents encourage follow-on research, but also shift the locus of research from big firms toward smaller firms and startups. As patent protection has strengthened since the mid-1980s, our results help explain why the American innovation ecosystem has undergone a growing division of innovative labor, where startups become primary sources of new ideas.
papers.zh_title: 专利保护何时（以及是否）促进企业内部累积性研究？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估计了专利保护对企业科学研究后续投资的影响。我们利用一种新方法来识别已授权专利保护的外生减少。利用1990年至2015年间活跃于研究的上市公司的数据，我们发现，在专利保护减少后（以对相关科学文章的内部引用量下降来衡量），企业会减少后续研究。这种效应对于规模较小的企业以及专利交易频率较低的行业更为显著。我们的发现与一个简约模型一致，该模型认为专利保护是商业化能力的策略替代品。我们的结果表明，更强的专利保护鼓励了后续研究，但也将研究重心从大企业转向较小的企业和初创企业。自20世纪80年代中期以来，随着专利保护的加强，我们的结果有助于解释为什么美国创新生态系统经历了日益增长的创新劳动分工，其中初创企业成为新想法的主要来源。

papers.title: Prudential Policy with Distorted Beliefs
papers.authors: Eduardo Dávila, Ansgar Walther
papers.abstract: This paper studies leverage regulation and monetary policy when equity investors and/or creditors have distorted beliefs relative to a planner. We characterize how the optimal leverage regulation responds to arbitrary changes in investors' and creditors' beliefs and relate our results to practical scenarios. We show that the optimal regulation depends on the type and magnitude of such changes. Optimism by investors calls for looser leverage regulation, while optimism by creditors, or jointly by both investors and creditors, calls for tighter leverage regulation. Monetary policy should be tightened (loosened) in response to either investors' or creditors' optimism (pessimism).
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME；JEL：E52, E61, G21, G28
papers.zh_title: 信念扭曲下的审慎政策
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了当股权投资者和/或债权人相对于规划者存在扭曲信念时，杠杆监管与货币政策的最优设计。我们刻画了最优杠杆监管如何响应投资者与债权人信念的任意变化，并将结果与实际情景相联系。研究表明，最优监管取决于此类变化的类型与幅度。投资者乐观情绪要求放松杠杆监管，而债权人乐观情绪或投资者与债权人共同乐观则要求收紧杠杆监管。货币政策应针对投资者或债权人的乐观（悲观）情绪相应收紧（放松）。

papers.title: Platform as a Rule-Maker: Evidence from Airbnb's Cancellation Policies
papers.authors: Jian Jia, Ginger Zhe Jin, Liad Wagman
papers.abstract: Digital platforms are not only match-making intermediaries but also establish internal rules that govern all users in their ecosystems. To better understand the governing role of platforms, we study two Airbnb pro-guest rules that pertain to guest and host cancellations, using data on Airbnb and VRBO listings in 10 US cities. We demonstrate that such pro-guest rules can drive demand and supply to and from the platform, as a function of the local platform competition between Airbnb and VRBO. Our results suggest that platform competition sometimes dampens a platform wide pro-guest rule and sometimes reinforces it, often with heterogeneous effects on different hosts. This implies that platform competition does not necessarily mitigate a platform's incentive to treat the two sides asymmetrically, and any public policy in platform competition must consider its implication on all sides.
papers.zh_title: 平台作为规则制定者：来自爱彼迎取消政策的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 数字平台不仅是撮合交易的中介，还建立内部规则来管理其生态系统中的所有用户。为更深入理解平台的治理角色，我们利用美国10个城市中爱彼迎和VRBO房源数据，研究了爱彼迎两项针对客人的规则，分别涉及客人和房东的取消行为。我们证明，此类亲客规则能够根据爱彼迎与VRBO之间的本地平台竞争情况，驱动需求与供给进出平台。结果表明，平台竞争有时会削弱平台层面的亲客规则，有时则会强化它，且对不同房东往往产生异质性影响。这意味着平台竞争未必能缓解平台对双边用户区别对待的动机，任何针对平台竞争的公共政策都必须考虑其对所有各方的影响。

papers.title: Employed in a SNAP? The Impact of Work Requirements on Program Participation and Labor Supply
papers.authors: Colin Gray, Adam Leive, Elena Prager, Kelsey B. Pukelis, Mary Zaki
papers.abstract: Work requirements are common in U.S. safety net programs. Evidence remains limited, however, on the extent to which work requirements increase economic self-sufficiency or screen out vulnerable individuals. Using linked administrative data on food stamps (SNAP) and earnings with a regression discontinuity design, we find robust evidence that work requirements increase program exits by 23 percentage points (64 percent) among incumbent participants after 18 months. There is a 53 percent overall reduction in program participation among adults who are subject to work requirements. Homeless adults are disproportionately screened out. We find no effects on employment, and suggestive evidence of increased earnings in some specifications. Our findings indicate that, per dollar of public expenditure, eliminating work requirements would likely transfer more resources to low-income adults than other programs targeting the same population.
papers.zh_title: 在SNAP中就业？工作要求对项目参与和劳动供给的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 工作要求在美国安全网项目中十分普遍。然而，关于工作要求在多大程度上能提高经济自给自足或筛选出弱势个体的证据仍然有限。利用食品券（SNAP）与收入的关联行政数据，结合断点回归设计，我们发现强有力的证据表明，在现有参与者中，工作要求在18个月后使项目退出率提高了23个百分点（64%）。在受工作要求约束的成年人中，项目参与总体减少了53%。无家可归的成年人被不成比例地筛选出去。我们未发现对就业的影响，但在某些设定中，有提示性证据表明收入有所增加。我们的研究结果表明，按每美元公共支出计算，取消工作要求可能比针对同一人群的其他项目将更多资源转移给低收入成年人。

papers.title: Five Facts about the UIP Premium
papers.authors: Ṣebnem Kalemli-Özcan, Liliana Varela
papers.abstract: We introduce a new measure of currency risk for emerging markets, the UIP premium, and highlight five key insights into its cross-sectional and time-series properties. We derive the UIP premium from survey data on exchange rate expectations and show that it captures a substantial local risk factor, as evidenced by: (1) The UIP premium for emerging markets is consistently positive, higher, and more volatile than the UIP premium for advanced economies; (2) A significant portion of cross-sectional and time-series variation in the UIP premium is driven by local risk factors; (3) The interest rate differential component of the UIP premium is more volatile and strongly correlated with local risk factors; (4) Local and global risk factors influence exchange rate expectations, which closely align with actual exchange rate movements; (5) The local risk factor is associated with country-specific policy shocks, where such policy uncertainty can predict persistent expectations of depreciations.
papers.zh_title: 关于未抵补利率平价溢价的五个事实
papers.zh_abstract: 我们引入了一种衡量新兴市场货币风险的新指标——未抵补利率平价溢价，并强调了其横截面和时间序列特性的五个关键见解。我们从汇率预期的调查数据中推导出未抵补利率平价溢价，并表明它捕捉了一个重要的本地风险因子，证据如下：（1）新兴市场的未抵补利率平价溢价持续为正，且比发达经济体的未抵补利率平价溢价更高、更波动；（2）未抵补利率平价溢价的横截面和时间序列变动的很大一部分由本地风险因子驱动；（3）未抵补利率平价溢价的利差组成部分更波动，且与本地风险因子强相关；（4）本地和全球风险因子影响汇率预期，而汇率预期与实际汇率变动紧密一致；（5）本地风险因子与国家特定的政策冲击相关，这种政策不确定性可以预测持续的贬值预期。

papers.title: The Dynamics of Inattention in the (Baseball) Field
papers.authors: James E. Archsmith, Anthony Heyes, Matthew J. Neidell, Bhaven N. Sampat
papers.abstract: Recent theoretical and empirical work characterizes attention as a limited resource that decision-makers strategically allocate. There has been less research on the dynamic interdependence of attention: how paying attention now may affect performance later. In this paper, we exploit high-frequency data on decision-making by Major League Baseball umpires to examine this. We find that umpires not only apply greater effort to higher-stakes decisions, but also that effort applied to earlier decisions increases errors later. These findings are consistent with the umpire having a depletable ‘budget’ of attention. There is no such dynamic interdependence after breaks during the game (at the end of each inning) suggesting that even short rest periods can replenish attention budgets. We also find that an expectation of higher stakes future decisions leads to reduced attention to current decisions, consistent with forward-looking behavior by umpires aware of attention scarcity.
papers.zh_title: （棒球）场上的注意力动态
papers.zh_abstract: 近期的理论和实证工作将注意力描述为一种决策者战略性分配的有限资源。关于注意力的动态相互依赖性——即现在如何分配注意力可能影响后续表现——的研究较少。在本文中，我们利用美国职业棒球大联盟裁判决策的高频数据来检验这一点。我们发现，裁判不仅对更高风险的决策投入更多努力，而且对早期决策投入的努力会增加后续的错误。这些发现与裁判拥有一个可耗尽的注意力“预算”是一致的。在比赛期间（每局结束后）的休息之后，不存在这种动态相互依赖性，这表明即使是短暂的休息也能补充注意力预算。我们还发现，对未来更高风险决策的预期会导致对当前决策的注意力减少，这与裁判意识到注意力稀缺并具有前瞻性行为是一致的。

papers.title: What Does Codetermination Do?
papers.authors: Simon Jäger, Shakked Noy, Benjamin Schoefer
papers.abstract: We provide a comprehensive overview of codetermination, i.e., worker representation in firms’ governance and management. The available micro evidence points to zero or small positive effects of codetermination on worker and firm outcomes, and leaves room for moderate positive effects on productivity, wages, and job stability. Similarly, we present new country-level, general-equilibrium event studies of codetermination reforms between the 1960s and 2010s, finding no effects on aggregate economic outcomes or the quality of industrial relations. We offer three explanations of the institution’s limited impact. First, existing codetermination laws convey little authority to workers. Second, countries with codetermination laws have high baseline levels of informal worker voice. Third, codetermination laws may interact with other labor market institutions, such as union representation and collective bargaining. We close by discussing implications for recent codetermination proposals in the United States.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, LE, LS, PE, POL, PR；JEL：J08, K31, M1, M5
papers.zh_title: 共同决定制度有何作用？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供了关于共同决定制度（即工人参与公司治理和管理）的全面概述。现有的微观证据表明，共同决定制度对工人和企业结果的影响为零或微小的正向效应，并且为生产率、工资和工作稳定性的适度正向效应留有余地。同样，我们提出了关于1960年代至2010年代共同决定制度改革的新国家层面一般均衡事件研究，发现其对总体经济结果或劳资关系质量没有影响。我们对该制度有限影响提供了三种解释。首先，现有的共同决定法律赋予工人的权力很小。其次，有共同决定法律的国家具有较高水平的非正式工人发言权。第三，共同决定法律可能与其他劳动力市场制度（如工会代表和集体谈判）相互作用。最后，我们讨论了近期美国共同决定提案的启示。

papers.title: Tasks, Automation, and the Rise in US Wage Inequality
papers.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Pascual Restrepo
papers.abstract: We document that between 50% and 70% of changes in the US wage structure over the last four decades are accounted for by the relative wage declines of worker groups specialized in routine tasks in industries experiencing rapid automation. We develop a conceptual framework where tasks across a number of industries are allocated to different types of labor and capital. Automation technologies expand the set of tasks performed by capital, displacing certain worker groups from employment opportunities for which they have comparative advantage. This framework yields a simple equation linking wage changes of a demographic group to the task displacement it experiences. We report robust evidence in favor of this relationship and show that regression models incorporating task displacement explain much of the changes in education differentials between 1980 and 2016. Our task displacement variable captures the effects of automation technologies (and to a lesser degree offshoring) rather than those of rising market power, markups or deunionization, which themselves do not appear to play a major role in US wage inequality. We also propose a methodology for evaluating the full general equilibrium effects of task displacement (which include induced changes in industry composition and ripple effects as tasks are reallocated across different groups). Our quantitative evaluation based on this methodology explains how major changes in wage inequality can go hand-in-hand with modest productivity gains.
papers.zh_title: 任务、自动化与美国工资不平等加剧
papers.zh_abstract: 我们证明，在过去四十年中，美国工资结构变化的50%至70%可由那些在经历快速自动化的行业中专门从事常规任务的工人群体的相对工资下降来解释。我们开发了一个概念框架，其中多个行业的任务被分配给不同类型的劳动力和资本。自动化技术扩展了资本执行的任务集，取代了某些工人群体，使其失去具有比较优势的就业机会。该框架产生了一个简单的方程，将人口群体的工资变化与其经历的任务替代联系起来。我们报告了支持这一关系的稳健证据，并表明包含任务替代变量的回归模型解释了1980年至2016年间教育差异的大部分变化。我们的任务替代变量捕捉了自动化技术（以及在较小程度上离岸外包）的影响，而非市场力量、加成率或去工会化的影响，后者本身似乎并未在美国工资不平等中发挥主要作用。我们还提出了一种评估任务替代完全一般均衡效应的方法（其中包括行业构成的诱导变化以及任务在不同群体间重新分配时的涟漪效应）。基于该方法的定量评估解释了工资不平等的重大变化如何能与适度的生产率增长并存。

papers.title: The Effect of Changes in Social Security's Delayed Retirement Credit: Evidence from Administrative Data
papers.authors: Mark Duggan, Irena Dushi, Sookyo Jeong, Gina Li
papers.abstract: The delayed retirement credit (DRC) increases monthly OASI (Old Age and Survivors Insurance) benefits for primary beneficiaries who claim after their full retirement age (FRA). For many years, the DRC was set at 3.0 percent per year (0.25 percent monthly). The 1983 amendments to Social Security more than doubled this actuarial adjustment to 8.0 percent per year. These changes were phased in gradually, so that those born in 1924 or earlier retained a 3.0 percent DRC while those born in 1943 or later had an 8.0 percent DRC. In this paper, we use administrative data from the Social Security Administration (SSA) to estimate the effect of this policy change on individual claiming behavior. We focus on the first half of the DRC increase (from 3.0 to 5.5 percent) given changes in other SSA policies that coincided with the later increases. Our findings demonstrate that the increase in the DRC led to a significant increase in delayed claiming of social security benefits and strongly suggest that the effects were larger for those with higher lifetime incomes, who would have a greater financial incentive to delay given their longer life expectancies.
papers.zh_title: 社会保障延迟退休积分变化的影响：来自行政数据的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 延迟退休积分（DRC）会提高在完全退休年龄（FRA）之后申领的主要受益人的月度老年和遗属保险（OASI）福利。多年来，DRC设定为每年3.0%（每月0.25%）。1983年社会保障修正案将这一精算调整幅度提高了一倍以上，达到每年8.0%。这些变化是逐步实施的，因此1924年或之前出生的人保留3.0%的DRC，而1943年或之后出生的人则享有8.0%的DRC。在本文中，我们使用社会保障管理局（SSA）的行政数据来估计这一政策变化对个人申领行为的影响。鉴于其他SSA政策的变化与后来的增长同时发生，我们重点关注DRC增长的前半部分（从3.0%到5.5%）。我们的研究结果表明，DRC的提高导致社会保障福利延迟申领显著增加，并强烈表明，对于终身收入较高的人，其影响更大，因为他们的预期寿命更长，延迟申领的经济激励也更大。

papers.title: Culture and the Family
papers.authors: Natalie Bau, Raquel Fernández
papers.abstract: This handbook chapter focuses on interactions between the family and culture that have significant economic implications. We start by documenting the wide range of global variation in family institutions and discussing some of the profound changes in family structure in the modern era. We next discuss the family’s role in generating economic outcomes given that it is the main transmitter of culture, focusing on female labor force participation, fertility, and human capital investment. We review the persistent effects of different traditional family institutions and describe how cultural practices related to the family, such as son preference, co-residence traditions, polygyny, and marriage payments, affect decision-making within the family and interact with policy. Lastly we examine how diverse forces, including new policies and technologies, have led family institutions and culture to change. We conclude that studying the family in a vacuum, without accounting for the role of culture, may lead to misleading conclusions regarding the effects of diverse shocks and policies, including technological change.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, LS；JEL：I0, J11, J12, J13, J14, J16, O11, O12
papers.zh_title: 文化与家庭
papers.zh_abstract: 本手册章节聚焦于家庭与文化之间具有重要经济影响的相互作用。我们首先记录了全球范围内家庭制度的广泛差异，并讨论了现代时期家庭结构的一些深刻变化。接着，我们探讨了家庭在产生经济结果中的作用，因为它是文化的主要传递者，重点关注女性劳动力参与、生育率和人力资本投资。我们回顾了不同传统家庭制度的持续影响，并描述了与家庭相关的文化实践，如重男轻女、同居传统、一夫多妻制和婚姻支付，如何影响家庭内部的决策并与政策相互作用。最后，我们考察了包括新政策和技术在内的多种力量如何导致家庭制度和文化发生变化。我们得出结论，如果忽视文化的作用而孤立地研究家庭，可能会导致关于各种冲击和政策（包括技术变革）影响的误导性结论。

papers.title: It Ain’t Where You’re From, It’s Where You’re At: Hiring Origins, Firm Heterogeneity, and Wages.
papers.authors: Sabrina L. Di Addario, Patrick M. Kline, Raffaele Saggio, Mikkel Sølvsten
papers.abstract: Sequential auction models of labor market competition predict that the wages required to successfully poach a worker from a rival employer will depend on the productivities of both the poached and poaching ﬁrms. We develop a theoretically grounded extension of the two-way ﬁxed eﬀects model of Abowd et al. (1999) in which log hiring wages are comprised of a worker ﬁxed eﬀect, a ﬁxed eﬀect for the “destination” ﬁrm hiring the worker, and a ﬁxed eﬀect for the “origin” ﬁrm, or labor market state, from which the worker was hired. This speciﬁcation is shown to nest the reduced form for hiring wages delivered by semi-parametric formulations of the canonical sequential auction model of Postel-Vinay and Robin (2002b) and its generalization in Bagger et al. (2014). Fitting the model to Italian social security records, origin eﬀects are found to explain only 0.7% of the variance of hiring wages among job movers, while destination eﬀects explain more than 23% of the variance. Across ﬁrms, destination eﬀects are more than 13 times as variable as origin eﬀects. Interpreted through the lens of Bagger et al. (2014)’s model, this ﬁnding requires that workers possess implausibly strong bargaining strength. Studying a cohort of workers entering the Italian labor market in 2005, we ﬁnd that diﬀerences in origin eﬀects yield essentially no contribution to the evolution of the gender gap in hiring wages, while diﬀerences in destination eﬀects explain the majority of the gap at the time of labor market entry. These results suggest that where a worker is hired from tends to be relatively inconsequential for their wages in comparison to where they are currently employed.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, LS, PE, TWP；JEL：C1, J3, J5
papers.zh_title: 关键不在于你来自哪里，而在于你身在何处：雇佣来源、企业异质性与工资
papers.zh_abstract: 劳动力市场竞争的序贯拍卖模型预测，成功从竞争对手那里挖走一名工人所需的工资将取决于被挖走工人所在企业和挖人企业的生产率。我们开发了一个基于理论的扩展模型，该模型基于Abowd等人（1999）的双向固定效应模型，其中对数雇佣工资由工人固定效应、雇佣工人的“目的地”企业固定效应以及工人被雇佣时的“来源”企业或劳动力市场状态的固定效应组成。该设定被证明包含了由Postel-Vinay和Robin（2002b）的经典序贯拍卖模型的半参数公式及其在Bagger等人（2014）中的推广所导出的雇佣工资简化形式。将该模型应用于意大利社会保障记录，发现来源效应仅解释了工作转换者雇佣工资变异的0.7%，而目的地效应解释了超过23%的变异。在企业层面，目的地效应的变异是来源效应的13倍以上。通过Bagger等人（2014）模型的视角解释，这一发现要求工人拥有难以置信的强大议价能力。通过研究2005年进入意大利劳动力市场的一批工人，我们发现来源效应的差异对雇佣工资性别差距的演变几乎没有贡献，而目的地效应的差异则解释了劳动力市场进入时的大部分差距。这些结果表明，与工人当前受雇的地点相比，他们被雇佣的来源地对工资的影响相对较小。

papers.title: Can Competitiveness predict Education and Labor Market Outcomes? Evidence from Incentivized Choice and Survey Measures
papers.authors: Thomas Buser, Muriel Niederle, Hessel Oosterbeek
papers.abstract: We assess the predictive power of two measures of competitiveness for education and labor market outcomes using a large, representative survey panel. The first is incentivized and is an online adaptation of the laboratory-based Niederle-Vesterlund measure. The second is an unincentivized survey question eliciting general competitiveness on an 11-point scale. Both measures are strong and consistent predictors of income, occupation, completed level of education and field of study. The predictive power of the new unincentivized measure for these outcomes is robust to controlling for other traits, including risk attitudes, confidence and the Big Five personality traits. For most outcomes, the predictive power of competitiveness exceeds that of the other traits. Gender differences in competitiveness can explain 5-10 percent of the observed gender differences in education and labor market outcomes.
papers.zh_title: 竞争力能否预测教育和劳动力市场结果？来自激励性选择和调查测量的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们使用一个大型、具有代表性的调查面板，评估了两种竞争力测量对教育和劳动力市场结果的预测能力。第一种是激励性的，是基于实验室的Niederle-Vesterlund测量的在线改编版。第二种是非激励性的调查问题，在11分量表上引出一般竞争力。这两种测量都是收入、职业、完成的教育水平和研究领域的强有力且一致的预测指标。新的非激励性测量对这些结果的预测能力在控制其他特质（包括风险态度、信心和大五人格特质）后依然稳健。对于大多数结果，竞争力的预测能力超过了其他特质。竞争力方面的性别差异可以解释观察到的教育和劳动力市场结果中性别差异的5%至10%。

papers.title: Crisis Innovation Policy from World War II to COVID-19
papers.authors: Daniel P. Gross, Bhaven N. Sampat
papers.abstract: Innovation policy can be a crucial component of governments' responses to crises. Because speed is a paramount objective, crisis innovation may also require different policy tools than innovation policy in non-crisis times, raising distinct questions and tradeoffs. In this paper, we survey the U.S. policy response to two crises where innovation was crucial to a resolution: World War II and the COVID-19 pandemic. After providing an overview of the main elements of each of these efforts, we discuss how they compare, and to what degree their differences reflect the nature of the central innovation policy problems and the maturity of the U.S. innovation system. We then explore four key tradeoffs for crisis innovation policy—top-down vs. bottom-up priority setting, concentrated vs. distributed funding, patent policy, and managing disruptions to the innovation system—and provide a logic for policy choices. Finally, we describe the longer-run impacts of the World War II effort and use these lessons to speculate on the potential long-run effects of the COVID-19 crisis on innovation policy and the innovation system.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EH, PE, PR；JEL：H12, H56, I18, N42, N72, O31, O32, O38
papers.zh_title: 从二战到新冠疫情的危机创新政策
papers.zh_abstract: 创新政策可以成为政府应对危机的关键组成部分。由于速度是首要目标，危机创新可能还需要与非危机时期的创新政策不同的政策工具，从而引发独特的问题和权衡。在本文中，我们调查了美国在两次危机中的政策响应，在这两次危机中，创新对解决问题至关重要：第二次世界大战和新冠疫情。在概述了这些努力的主要要素之后，我们讨论了它们之间的比较，以及它们的差异在多大程度上反映了核心创新政策问题的性质和美国创新体系的成熟度。然后，我们探讨了危机创新政策的四个关键权衡——自上而下与自下而上的优先级设定、集中与分散的资金、专利政策以及管理对创新体系的干扰——并为政策选择提供了逻辑依据。最后，我们描述了二战努力的长期影响，并利用这些经验教训来推测新冠疫情危机对创新政策和创新体系的潜在长期影响。

papers.title: Shocks, Institutions and Secular Changes in Employment of Older Individuals
papers.authors: Richard Rogerson, Johanna Wallenius
papers.abstract: Employment rates of males aged 55-64 have changed dramatically in the OECD over the last 5 decades. The average employment rate decreased by more than 15 percentage points between the mid-1970s and the mid-1990s, only to increase by roughly the same amount subsequently. One proposed explanation in the literature is that spousal non-working times are complements and that older males are working longer as a result of secular increases in labor supply of older females. In the first part of this paper we present evidence against this explanation. We then offer a new narrative to understand the employment rate changes for older individuals. We argue that the dramatic U-shaped pattern for older male employment rates should be understood as reflecting a mean reverting low frequency shock to labor market opportunities for all workers in combination with temporary country specific policy responses that incentivized older individuals to withdraw from market work.
papers.zh_title: 冲击、制度与老年人就业的长期变化
papers.zh_abstract: 在过去50年中，经合组织国家55-64岁男性的就业率发生了巨大变化。平均就业率从1970年代中期到1990年代中期下降了超过15个百分点，随后又大致上升了相同的幅度。文献中提出的一种解释是，配偶的非工作时间是互补的，并且老年男性工作时间延长是老年女性劳动力供给长期增加的结果。在本文的第一部分，我们提出了反对这一解释的证据。然后，我们提出了一种新的叙述来理解老年人就业率的变化。我们认为，老年男性就业率的戏剧性U型模式应被理解为反映了所有工人劳动力市场机会的均值回归低频冲击，以及各国为激励老年人退出市场工作而采取的临时性特定政策响应。

papers.title: The Impact of a Private Supplement to Public Health Care: The Mexico Diabetes Experiment
papers.authors: Ari Bronsoler, Jonathan Gruber, Enrique Seira
papers.abstract: There are ongoing debates around the world over the value of private supplements to public health insurance systems. We investigate this issue in the context of one of the world’s deadliest diseases, diabetes, and one of the countries with the worst diabetes problems in the world, Mexico. We implement a novel deniers randomization approach to cost-effectively provide a causal estimate of enrollment in private supplement to the free public health system. Our final sample of more than 1000 diabetics randomized into a large price subsidy for enrollment in the private plan is well balanced. We estimate enormous impacts of the private supplement, with HbA1c blood sugar levels falling by a full point (relative to a control mean of 8.5%), and to increase the share of those treated who are under control by 69%. We show that this effect arises through both improved treatment compliance and health behaviors, and that diabetes complications fall even in the short run. The net costs of this intervention are at most one-third of the gross costs due to offsetting public sector savings, and the health benefits are many multiples of gross costs. But the returns to private care do not appear to reflect more productive delivery of care per visit, which is comparable in a separate quasi-experimental analysis of public insurance; rather, effects arise through more attachment to medical care in the private alternative.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS, PE；JEL：H11, H51, I11
papers.zh_title: 私人补充公共医疗保健的影响：墨西哥糖尿病实验
papers.zh_abstract: 关于私人补充公共医疗保险体系的价值，世界各地一直存在争论。我们在世界上最致命的疾病之一——糖尿病，以及世界上糖尿病问题最严重的国家之一——墨西哥的背景下研究这个问题。我们采用一种新颖的拒绝者随机化方法，以成本效益高的方式提供加入免费公共卫生系统私人补充计划的因果估计。我们的最终样本包括超过1000名糖尿病患者，他们被随机分配到加入私人计划的大幅价格补贴中，样本平衡良好。我们估计了私人补充计划的巨大影响，HbA1c血糖水平下降了整整一个百分点（相对于对照组均值8.5%），并且使接受治疗者中病情得到控制的比例增加了69%。我们表明，这种效应是通过改善治疗依从性和健康行为产生的，并且即使在短期内，糖尿病并发症也有所减少。由于公共部门的储蓄抵消，这项干预措施的净成本最多仅为总成本的三分之一，而健康效益是总成本的许多倍。但私人护理的回报似乎并不反映每次就诊时护理服务的更高生产率（在单独的公共保险准实验分析中，生产率相当）；相反，效应是通过私人替代方案中与医疗护理更强的联系而产生的。

papers.title: Entrepreneurship During the COVID-19 Pandemic: Evidence from the Business Formation Statistics
papers.authors: John C. Haltiwanger
papers.abstract: Applications for new businesses from the U.S. Census Bureau’s monthly and weekly Business Formation Statistics (BFS) fell substantially in the early stages of the pandemic but then surged in the second half of 2020. This surge has continued through May 2021. The pace of applications since mid-2020 is the highest on record (earliest data available is 2004). The large increase in applications is for both likely new employers and nonemployers. These patterns contrast sharply with those in the Great Recession when applications for likely new employer businesses and in turn actual startups of employer businesses declined sharply and persistently. The surge in new business applications has been uneven across sectors. Ten 3-digit NAICS industries account for 75% of the surge. Dominant industries include Nonstore Retail (alone accounting for 33% of the surge), Professional, Scientific and Technical Services, Truck Transportation, and Accommodation and Food Services. Given that existing small businesses in Retail Trade and Accommodation and Food Services have suffered especially large declines in the pandemic, these patterns are consistent with restructuring induced by the pandemic.
papers.zh_title: 新冠疫情时期的创业活动：来自企业成立统计数据的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 来自美国人口普查局月度和周度企业成立统计数据（BFS）的新企业申请在疫情初期大幅下降，但在2020年下半年激增。这一激增一直持续到2021年5月。自2020年中期以来的申请速度是有记录以来的最高水平（最早可得数据为2004年）。申请量的大幅增长既包括可能的新雇主企业，也包括非雇主企业。这些模式与大衰退时期形成了鲜明对比，当时可能的新雇主企业申请以及随之而来的实际雇主企业初创数量急剧且持续下降。新企业申请的激增在各行业之间分布不均。十个三位数NAICS行业占激增总量的75%。主导行业包括非店铺零售（仅此一项就占激增总量的33%）、专业、科学和技术服务、卡车运输以及住宿和餐饮服务。鉴于零售贸易以及住宿和餐饮服务业的现有小企业在疫情中遭受了特别严重的下降，这些模式与疫情引发的结构调整是一致的。

papers.title: Redesigning the US Army’s Branching Process: A Case Study in Minimalist Market Design
papers.authors: Kyle Greenberg, Parag A. Pathak, Tayfun Sönmez
papers.abstract: We present the proof-of-concept for minimalist market design (Sönmez, 2023) as an effective methodology to enhance an institution based on the desiderata of stakeholders with minimal interference. Four objectives – respecting merit, increasing retention, aligning talent, and enhancing trust – guided reforms to US Army’s centralized branching process of cadets to military specialties since 2006. USMA’s mechanism for the Class of 2020 exacerbated challenges implementing these objectives. Formulating the Army’s desiderata as rigorous axioms, we analyze their implications. Under our minimalist approach to institution redesign, the Army’s objectives uniquely identify a branching mechanism. Our design is now adopted at USMA and ROTC.
papers.zh_title: 重新设计美国陆军的分支流程：一个极简市场设计的案例研究
papers.zh_abstract: 我们展示了极简市场设计（Sönmez, 2023）作为一种有效方法的概念验证，该方法基于利益相关者的期望以最小干预来改进制度。自2006年以来，四个目标——尊重功绩、提高留任率、匹配人才和增强信任——指导了美国陆军将学员集中分配到军事专业的分支流程改革。西点军校针对2020届学员的机制加剧了实现这些目标的挑战。我们将陆军的期望形式化为严格的公理，并分析其含义。在我们的制度重新设计的极简方法下，陆军的目标唯一地确定了一个分支机制。我们的设计现已被西点军校和后备军官训练团采用。

papers.title: Granular Corporate Hedging Under Dominant Currency
papers.authors: Laura Alfaro, Mauricio Calani, Liliana Varela
papers.abstract: This paper shows that, in a world dominated by vehicle currencies, ﬁrms engaging in international operations retain currency risk and hedge it real and ﬁnancially. We employ a unique dataset covering the universe of trade credit, international trade, foreign currency debt, and FX derivatives contracts with ﬁrms’ census data in Chile (2005-2018). We document that operational hedging is quantitatively limited, as diﬀerent maturity, frequency, and amount of FX operations make it diﬃcult to net these exposures. The granular ﬁrms complement real hedging using FX ﬁnancial instruments, which improve their cash ﬂow management and promote their trade and growth.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IFM, ITI；JEL：F31, F38, G30, G38
papers.zh_title: 主导货币下的微观企业对冲
papers.zh_abstract: 本文表明，在一个由载体货币主导的世界中，从事国际业务的企业保留货币风险，并通过实际和金融手段进行对冲。我们使用一个独特的数据集，涵盖了智利（2005-2018年）企业普查数据中的贸易信贷、国际贸易、外币债务和外汇衍生品合约的总体情况。我们记录到，由于外汇操作在期限、频率和金额上的差异使得净敞口难以抵消，实际对冲在数量上是有限的。微观企业利用外汇金融工具补充实际对冲，这改善了它们的现金流管理，并促进了它们的贸易和增长。

papers.title: Illegal Immigration: The Trump Effect
papers.authors: Mark Hoekstra, Sandra Orozco-Aleman
papers.abstract: Recent years have witnessed the emergence of increasingly provocative anti-immigrant politicians in both Europe and the United States. We examine whether the 2016 election of Donald Trump, who made illegal immigration and border enforcement a centerpiece of his campaign, reduced illegal immigration into the U.S. We exploit the fact the election result was widely unexpected and thus generated a large, overnight change in expected immigration policy and rhetoric. We compare migration flows before and after the election and find that while it reduced immigration among deported Mexicans and at least temporarily among Central Americans, it had no effect on the overall inflow of unauthorized Mexican workers.
papers.zh_title: 非法移民：特朗普效应
papers.zh_abstract: 近年来，欧洲和美国都出现了越来越具有挑衅性的反移民政客。我们考察了2016年唐纳德·特朗普的当选（他将非法移民和边境执法作为其竞选的核心议题）是否减少了进入美国的非法移民。我们利用了选举结果普遍出乎意料这一事实，从而导致了预期移民政策和言论在一夜之间发生巨大变化。我们比较了选举前后的移民流动，发现虽然选举减少了被驱逐出境的墨西哥人以及至少暂时减少了中美洲人的移民，但对未经授权的墨西哥工人的总体流入没有影响。

papers.title: Competition Laws, Governance, and Firm Value
papers.authors: Ross Levine, Chen Lin, Wensi Xie
papers.abstract: Do antitrust laws influence corporate valuations? We evaluate the relationship between firm value and laws limiting firms from engaging in anticompetitive agreements, abusing dominant positions, and conducting M&As that restrict competition. Using firm-level data from 99 countries over the 1990-2010 period, we discover that valuations rise after countries strengthen competition laws. The effects are larger among firms with more severe pre-existing agency problems: firms in countries with weaker investor protection laws, with weaker firm-specific governance provisions, and with greater opacity. The results suggest that antitrust laws that intensify competition exert a positive influence on valuations by reducing agency problems.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, IFM, IO, LE；JEL：G3, K21, K22, L4
papers.zh_title: 竞争法、治理与企业价值
papers.zh_abstract: 反垄断法是否影响企业估值？我们评估了企业价值与限制企业从事反竞争协议、滥用市场支配地位以及进行限制竞争的并购的法律之间的关系。使用1990-2010年期间99个国家的企业层面数据，我们发现，在各国加强竞争法后，企业估值上升。这种效应在事前代理问题更严重的企业中更大：这些企业位于投资者保护法律较弱的国家，具有较弱的公司特定治理条款，并且透明度较低。结果表明，加强竞争的竞争法通过减少代理问题对企业估值产生积极影响。

papers.title: Central Bank Policy and the Concentration of Risk: Empirical Estimates
papers.authors: Nuno Coimbra, Daisoon Kim, Hélène Rey
papers.abstract: Before the 2008 crisis, the cross-sectional skewness of banks’ leverage went up and macro risk concentrated in the balance sheets of large banks. Using a model of proﬁt-maximizing banks with heterogeneous Value-at-Risk constraints, we extract the distribution of banks’ risk-taking parameters from balance sheet data. The time series of these estimates allow us to understand systemic risk and its concentration in the banking sector over time. Counterfactual exercises show that (1) monetary policymakers confront the trade-oﬀ between stimulating the economy and ﬁnancial stability, and (2) macroprudential policies can be eﬀective tools to increase ﬁnancial stability.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IFM, ME；JEL：E0, E5, F3, G01
papers.zh_title: 中央银行政策与风险集中：实证估计
papers.zh_abstract: 在2008年危机之前，银行杠杆的横截面偏度上升，宏观风险集中在大银行的资产负债表中。使用一个具有异质性风险价值约束的利润最大化银行模型，我们从资产负债表数据中提取了银行风险承担参数的分布。这些估计值的时间序列使我们能够理解系统性风险及其在银行业中随时间推移的集中程度。反事实实验表明：（1）货币政策制定者面临刺激经济与金融稳定之间的权衡；（2）宏观审慎政策可以成为增强金融稳定的有效工具。

papers.title: The Anatomy of Cyber Risk
papers.authors: Rustam Jamilov, Hélène Rey, Ahmed Tahoun
papers.abstract: This paper uses computational linguistics to introduce a novel measure of firm-level cyber risk exposure based on the quarterly earnings calls of listed firms. Our measure covers more than 14,000 firms from over 90 countries between 2003 and 2025. The measure is validated using human auditors and a large language model. We show that the measure affects stock returns and profits, is priced in the options market, and predicts actual cyberattacks. Cyber risk spills over across firms and propagates from firm to sector level. Back-of-the-envelope estimates suggest that the global cost of cyber risk exposure amounts to hundreds of billions of dollars annually.
papers.zh_title: 网络风险的剖析
papers.zh_abstract: 本文使用计算语言学，基于上市公司季度财报电话会议，引入了一种新颖的企业层面网络风险暴露度量指标。该度量覆盖了2003年至2025年间来自90多个国家的超过14,000家企业。该度量通过人工审计员和一个大型语言模型进行了验证。我们表明，该度量影响股票回报和利润，在期权市场中被定价，并能预测实际的网络攻击。网络风险在企业间溢出，并从企业层面传播到行业层面。粗略估计表明，全球网络风险暴露的成本每年高达数千亿美元。

papers.title: Funding Risky Research
papers.authors: Chiara Franzoni, Paula Stephan, Reinhilde Veugelers
papers.abstract: The speed with which Covid-19 vaccines were developed and their high-performance underlines how much society depends on the pace of scientific research and how effective science can be. This is especially the case for vaccines based on the new designer mRNA technology. We draw on this exceptional moment for science to reflect on whether the government funding system is sufficiently supportive of research needed for key breakthroughs, and whether the system of funding encourages sufficient risk-taking to induce scientists to explore transformative research paths. We begin with a discussion of the challenges faced by scientists who did pioneering-research related to mRNA-based drugs in getting support for research. We describe measures developed to distinguish risky from non-risky research and their citation footprint. We review empirical work suggesting that funding is biased against risky research and provide a framework for thinking about why principal investigators, panelists and funding agencies may eschew risky research. We close with a discussion of interventions that government agencies and universities could follow if they wish to avoid a bias against risk.
papers.zh_title: 资助高风险研究
papers.zh_abstract: 新冠疫苗的开发速度及其高性能凸显了社会对科学研究速度的依赖程度以及科学可以多么有效。对于基于新型设计信使RNA技术的疫苗尤其如此。我们利用这一科学的特殊时刻来反思：政府资助体系是否充分支持关键突破所需的研究，以及资助体系是否鼓励足够的风险承担以引导科学家探索变革性的研究路径。我们首先讨论了从事信使RNA药物相关开创性研究的科学家在获得研究支持方面所面临的挑战。我们描述了为区分高风险与非高风险研究及其引用足迹而制定的措施。我们回顾了表明资助偏向于规避高风险研究的实证工作，并提供了一个框架来思考为什么首席研究员、评审小组成员和资助机构可能回避高风险研究。最后，我们讨论了如果政府机构和大学希望避免对风险的偏见，它们可以采取的干预措施。

papers.title: Trade Policy is Real News: Theory and Evidence
papers.authors: George A. Alessandria, Carter B. Mix
papers.abstract: We evaluate the aggregate effects of changes in trade barriers when these changes can be implemented slowly over time and trade responds gradually to changes in trade barriers because firm-level trade costs make exporting a dynamic decision. Our model shows how expectations of changes in trade barriers affect the economy. We find that while decreases in trade barriers increase economic activity, expectations of lower future trade barriers temporarily decrease investment, hours worked, and output. Further-more, canceling an expected decline in future trade barriers raises investment and output in the short run but substantially lowers medium-run growth. These effects are larger when the expected reform is bigger. In the data, we find that countries with more trade growth after the General Agreement on Tariffs and Trade (GATT) rounds decreased investment and hours worked in the years leading to the tariff cuts, as predicted by our model.
papers.zh_title: 贸易政策是真实新闻：理论与证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们评估了贸易壁垒变化的总体效应，当这些变化可能随时间缓慢实施，并且由于企业层面的贸易成本使出口成为一个动态决策，贸易对贸易壁垒变化做出渐进反应时。我们的模型展示了贸易壁垒变化的预期如何影响经济。我们发现，虽然贸易壁垒的降低增加了经济活动，但对未来贸易壁垒降低的预期会暂时减少投资、工作时间和产出。此外，取消预期的未来贸易壁垒降低会在短期内提高投资和产出，但会大幅降低中期增长。当预期改革规模更大时，这些效应也更大。在数据中，我们发现，在关税与贸易总协定（GATT）回合后贸易增长更多的国家，在关税削减前的几年里投资和工作时间有所减少，这与我们模型的预测一致。

papers.title: Equilibrium Effects of Pay Transparency
papers.authors: Zoe B. Cullen, Bobak Pakzad-Hurson
papers.abstract: The public discourse around pay transparency has focused on the direct effect: how workers seek to rectify pay inequities through renegotiation. The question of how wage-setting and employment practices of the firm respond has received less attention. To study these equilibrium outcomes, we test our model of bargaining under incomplete information with an analysis of pay transparency mandates in the context of the U.S. private sector. Our model predicts that transparency reduces the individual bargaining power of workers, leading to lower average wages. A key insight is that employers credibly refuse to pay high wages to any one worker to avoid costly renegotiations with others under transparency. In situations where workers do not have individual bargaining power, such as under a collective bargaining agreement or in markets with posted wages, greater transparency has a muted impact on average wages. We test these predictions by evaluating the adoption of U.S. state legislation protecting the right of workers to inquire about the salaries of their coworkers. Consistent with our prediction, the laws lead wages to decline by approximately 2% overall, but effects are muted when workers have low individual bargaining power. Our model provides a unified framework to analyze a wide range of transparency policies, and reconciles effects of transparency mandates documented in a variety of countries and contexts.
papers.zh_title: 薪酬透明度的均衡效应
papers.zh_abstract: 关于薪酬透明度的公共讨论主要集中在直接效应上：即工人如何通过重新谈判来纠正薪酬不平等。而企业的工资设定和雇佣实践如何响应这一问题受到的关注较少。为了研究这些均衡结果，我们基于不完全信息下的谈判模型进行了检验，并结合对美国私营部门薪酬透明度强制规定的分析。我们的模型预测，透明度会削弱工人的个人议价能力，导致平均工资下降。一个关键见解是，雇主可信地拒绝向任何一名工人支付高工资，以避免在透明度下与其他工人进行代价高昂的重新谈判。在工人没有个人议价能力的情况下，例如在集体谈判协议下或公布工资的市场中，更高的透明度对平均工资的影响较小。我们通过评估美国州立法保护工人询问同事工资的权利的采用情况来检验这些预测。与我们的预测一致，这些法律导致工资总体下降约2%，但当工人个人议价能力较低时，影响较小。我们的模型提供了一个统一框架来分析广泛的透明度政策，并调和了在不同国家和背景下记录的透明度强制规定的效应。

papers.title: Using the Retail Distribution of Sellers to Impute Expenditures Shares
papers.authors: Alexis Antoniades, Robert C. Feenstra, Mingzhi Xu
papers.abstract: Many price indices must be constructed without quantity data at the elementary level. We show that for some consumer goods in the United States and other countries, one can approximate expenditure shares using weights derived from the retail distribution of sellers. These weights are based on the share of outlets selling an item, or the share of outlets adjusted by the total number of items sold in each. Relative to using no weights, we find that using such imputed weights substantially reduces bias in the frequency of price changes, in annual inflation, and in price comparisons across countries.\n
papers.zh_title: 利用卖方的零售分布推算支出份额
papers.zh_abstract: 许多价格指数必须在缺乏基层数量数据的情况下构建。我们表明，对于美国和其他国家的一些消费品，可以使用基于卖方零售分布推导的权重来近似支出份额。这些权重基于销售某商品的店铺比例，或根据每家店铺销售的商品总数调整后的店铺比例。与不使用权重相比，我们发现使用此类推算权重显著减少了价格变动频率、年通胀率以及跨国价格比较中的偏差。

papers.title: Personal Bankruptcy and the Accumulation of Shadow Debt
papers.authors: Bronson Argyle, Benjamin Iverson, Taylor D. Nadauld, Christopher Palmer
papers.abstract: Compiling new liability-level data from the balance sheets of personal bankruptcy filers, we document that a sizable share of reported liabilities are “shadow debt,” debt not reported to credit bureaus that often arises from the non-payment of goods and services. We use this new data to evaluate how debtor cash flows affect when consumers file for bankruptcy and how much debt they have at bankruptcy. We find that filers respond to a quasi-exogenous $100 increase in monthly cash flows by delaying filing by an average of one month and by increasing unsecured indebtedness by $4,000 in the months preceding filing. A large share of the additional debt incurred by delaying filers is shadow debt, and our effects are concentrated among filers without employment, health, or marriage shocks.
papers.zh_title: 个人破产与影子债务的积累
papers.zh_abstract: 通过汇编个人破产申请者资产负债表上新的负债层面数据，我们记录了报告负债中有相当大一部分是“影子债务”，即未向信用机构报告且通常源于商品和服务未付款的债务。我们利用这些新数据来评估债务人现金流如何影响消费者何时申请破产以及破产时的债务规模。我们发现，申请者对每月现金流准外生增加100美元的反应是，平均延迟申请一个月，并在申请前几个月内增加4000美元的无担保债务。延迟申请者所承担的额外债务中很大一部分是影子债务，并且我们的效应集中在没有就业、健康或婚姻冲击的申请者中。

papers.title: Trade and Innovation
papers.authors: Marc J. Melitz, Stephen J. Redding
papers.abstract: Two central insights from the Schumpeterian approach to innovation and growth are that the pace of innovation is endogenously determined by the expectation of future profits and that growth is inherently a process of creative destruction. As international trade is a key determinant of firm profitability and survival, it is natural to expect it to play a key role in shaping both incentives to innovate and the rate of creative destruction. In this paper, we review the theoretical and empirical literature on trade and innovation. We highlight four key mechanisms through which international trade affects endogenous innovation and growth: (i) market size; (ii) competition; (iii) comparative advantage; (iv) knowledge spillovers. Each of these mechanisms offers a potential source of dynamic welfare gains in addition to the static welfare gains from trade from conventional trade theory. Recent research has suggested that these dynamic welfare gains from trade can be substantial relative to their static counterparts. Discriminating between alternative mechanisms for these dynamic welfare gains and strengthening the evidence on their quantitative magnitude remain exciting areas of ongoing research.
papers.zh_title: 贸易与创新
papers.zh_abstract: 熊彼特式创新与增长方法的两个核心见解是：创新速度由对未来利润的预期内生决定，以及增长本质上是一个创造性破坏的过程。由于国际贸易是企业盈利能力和生存的关键决定因素，自然可以预期它在塑造创新激励和创造性破坏速度方面发挥关键作用。在本文中，我们回顾了关于贸易与创新的理论和实证文献。我们强调了国际贸易影响内生创新和增长的四个关键机制：（i）市场规模；（ii）竞争；（iii）比较优势；（iv）知识溢出。除了传统贸易理论中来自贸易的静态福利收益之外，这些机制中的每一个都提供了动态福利收益的潜在来源。最近的研究表明，这些来自贸易的动态福利收益相对于其静态对应物可能是巨大的。区分这些动态福利收益的替代机制，并加强关于其数量规模的证据，仍然是正在进行的研究中令人兴奋的领域。

papers.title: Heterogeneity in the Impact of Privatizing Social Health Insurance: Evidence from California's Medicaid Program
papers.authors: Mark Duggan, Craig Garthwaite, Adelina Yanyue Wang
papers.abstract: State governments face the classic “make or buy” decision for the provision of Medicaid services. Over the past two decades, the majority of states have outsourced the provision of social health insurance through Medicaid Managed Care (MMC) programs. These programs have been extensively studied in the literature – with little evidence of large positive or negative effects. However, most states initially allowed older and sicker enrollees to remain enrolled in the government run fee for service (FFS) programs. It is possible that these more fragile enrollees could have a different experience in managed care. In this paper we study California’s mandatory enrollment of the senior and persons with disabilities (SPD) population in MMC. We find this mandatory enrollment caused an increased use of the emergency department and transfers between hospitals. This was not simply a hassle cost for enrollees – we also estimate an increase in mortality for the affected population. These effects were strongest for the sickest enrollees – the types of enrollees that might be expected to have a different experience with managed care. Our results suggest the adverse impact of MMC varies by the enrollee health, which should inform the optimal outsourcing decision for governments.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, PE；JEL：H0, H1, I1, I10, I13, I18
papers.zh_title: 社会健康保险私有化影响的异质性：来自加州医疗补助计划的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 州政府在提供医疗补助服务方面面临着经典的“制造或购买”决策。在过去二十年中，大多数州已将社会健康保险的提供外包给医疗补助管理式护理计划。这些计划在文献中得到了广泛研究——几乎没有证据表明存在大的正面或负面影响。然而，大多数州最初允许年龄较大和病情较重的参保者继续参加政府运营的按服务收费计划。这些更脆弱的参保者在管理式护理中可能会有不同的体验。在本文中，我们研究了加州强制将老年人和残疾人群体纳入管理式护理的情况。我们发现，这种强制参保导致急诊科使用和医院间转诊增加。这不仅仅是参保者的麻烦成本——我们还估计受影响人群的死亡率有所上升。这些影响对病情最重的参保者最为强烈——这类参保者可能预期在管理式护理中有不同的体验。我们的结果表明，管理式护理的不利影响因参保者健康状况而异，这应为政府的最优外包决策提供信息。

papers.title: The Role of Information in the Rosen-Roback Framework
papers.authors: Xuwen Gao, Ran Song, Christopher Timmins
papers.abstract: In this paper, we study the role of information in non-market valuation. We develop a variant of the Rosen-Roback model of inter-urban sorting that incorporates public access to information about air quality, and demonstrate that information constraints create a wedge between the revealed and true hedonic prices. Moreover, the direction and the magnitude of that wedge depends on the individual’s perception bias. We empirically test our theoretical predictions by leveraging a natural experiment – the unexpected disclosure of PM2.5 data in China. We find that perception bias before the data disclosure leads to a downward estimation bias in hedonic valuation. The hedonic price of avoiding PM2.5 exposure increases substantially from 171 to 336 Chinese Yuan in response to the information shock. Our work sheds light on the application of Rosen-Roback theory for non-market valuation in countries where the public access to information is restricted.
papers.zh_title: 信息在罗森-罗巴克框架中的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了信息在非市场估值中的作用。我们构建了一个罗森-罗巴克城际分类模型的变体，该模型纳入了公众获取空气质量信息的渠道，并证明信息约束会在揭示性特征价格与真实特征价格之间造成一个楔子。此外，这个楔子的方向和大小取决于个体的感知偏差。我们利用一个自然实验——中国PM2.5数据的意外公开——来实证检验我们的理论预测。我们发现，数据公开前的感知偏差导致特征价格估值出现向下估计偏差。在信息冲击下，避免PM2.5暴露的特征价格从171元人民币大幅上升至336元人民币。我们的工作揭示了罗森-罗巴克理论在公众信息获取受限国家进行非市场估值时的应用前景。

papers.title: Gender Differences in Peer Recognition by Economists
papers.authors: David Card, Stefano DellaVigna, Patricia Funk, Nagore Iriberri
papers.abstract: We study the selection of Fellows of the Econometric Society, using a new data set of publications and citations for over 40,000 actively publishing economists since the early 1900s. Conditional on achievement, we document a large negative gap in the probability that women were selected as Fellows in the 1933-1979 period. This gap became positive (though not statistically significant) from 1980 to 2010, and in the past decade has become large and highly significant, with over a 100% increase in the probability of selection for female authors relative to males with similar publications and citations. The positive boost affects highly qualified female candidates (in the top 10% of authors) with no effect for the bottom 90%. Using nomination data for the past 30 years, we find a key proximate role for the Society's Nominating Committee in this shift. Since 2012 the Committee has had an explicit mandate to nominate highly qualified women, and its nominees enjoy above-average election success (controlling for achievement). Looking beyond gender, we document similar shifts in the premium for geographic diversity: in the mid-2000s, both the Fellows and the Nominating Committee became significantly more likely to nominate and elect candidates from outside the US. Finally, we examine gender gaps in several other major awards for US economists. We show that the gaps in the probability of selection of new fellows of the American Academy of Arts and Sciences and the National Academy of Sciences closely parallel those of the Econometric Society, with historically negative penalties for women turning to positive premiums in recent years.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LE, LS, PE, POL, PR；JEL：J16
papers.zh_title: 经济学家同行认可中的性别差异
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用一个包含自20世纪初以来超过40,000名活跃发表论文的经济学家的出版物和引用数据的新数据集，研究了计量经济学会会士的遴选过程。在控制学术成就的条件下，我们发现在1933年至1979年期间，女性被选为会士的概率存在巨大的负向差距。这一差距在1980年至2010年间转为正向（尽管在统计上不显著），而在过去十年中变得巨大且高度显著，与具有相似发表和引用记录的男性作者相比，女性作者被选中的概率增加了超过100%。这种正向提升仅影响高资质的女性候选人（位于作者排名前10%），而对排名后90%的作者没有影响。利用过去30年的提名数据，我们发现学会的提名委员会在这一转变中起到了关键的直接作用。自2012年以来，该委员会被明确授权提名高资质的女性，并且其提名人在选举中享有高于平均水平的成功率（在控制学术成就后）。超越性别视角，我们记录了地理多样性溢价的类似转变：在21世纪中期，会士和提名委员会都显著更倾向于提名和选举来自美国以外的候选人。最后，我们考察了美国经济学家其他几个主要奖项中的性别差距。我们表明，美国艺术与科学院和美国国家科学院新院士当选概率的差距与计量经济学会的情况高度相似，历史上对女性的负面惩罚在近年转变为正向溢价。

papers.title: Option-Implied Spreads and Option Risk Premia
papers.authors: Christopher L. Culp, Mihir Gandhi, Yoshio Nozawa, Pietro Veronesi
papers.abstract: We propose implied spreads (IS) and normalized implied spreads (NIS) as simple measures to characterize option prices. IS is the credit spread of an option’s implied bond, the portfolio long a risk-free bond and short a put option. NIS normalizes IS by the risk-neutral default probability and reflects tail risk. IS and NIS are countercyclical and predict implied bond returns, while neither, like implied volatility, predicts put returns. These opposite predictability results are consistent with a stochastic volatility, stochastic jump intensity model, as put premia increase in volatility but decrease in jump intensity, while implied bond premia increase in both.
papers.zh_title: 期权隐含利差与期权风险溢价
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出隐含利差（IS）和标准化隐含利差（NIS）作为刻画期权价格的简单度量。IS是期权隐含债券（即一个由无风险债券多头和看跌期权空头组成的投资组合）的信用利差。NIS通过风险中性违约概率对IS进行标准化，并反映尾部风险。IS和NIS是逆周期的，并能预测隐含债券的收益，而两者（如同隐含波动率一样）均不能预测看跌期权的收益。这些相反的预测结果与一个具有随机波动率和随机跳跃强度的模型一致，因为看跌期权溢价随波动率增加而增加，但随跳跃强度增加而减少，而隐含债券溢价则随两者增加而增加。

papers.title: Dissecting Green Returns
papers.authors: Lubos Pastor, Robert F. Stambaugh, Lucian A. Taylor
papers.abstract: Green assets delivered high returns in recent years. This performance reflects unexpectedly strong increases in environmental concerns, not high expected returns. German green bonds outperformed their higher-yielding non-green twins as the “greenium” widened, and U.S. green stocks outperformed brown as climate concerns strengthened. Despite that outperformance, we estimate lower expected returns for green stocks than for brown, consistent with theory. We estimate expected returns in two ways: ex ante, using implied costs of capital, and ex post, using realized returns purged of shocks from climate concerns and earnings. A theoretically motivated green factor explains much of value stocks' recent underperformance.
papers.zh_title: 剖析绿色资产收益
papers.zh_abstract: 近年来绿色资产带来了高回报。这一表现反映了环境关注度出乎意料的强劲增长，而非高预期回报。随着“绿色溢价”的扩大，德国绿色债券的表现优于其收益率更高的非绿色同类债券；随着气候担忧的加剧，美国绿色股票的表现优于棕色股票。尽管存在这种优异表现，我们估计绿色股票的预期回报低于棕色股票，这与理论一致。我们通过两种方式估计预期回报：事前，使用隐含资本成本；事后，使用剔除气候担忧和盈利冲击后的已实现回报。一个基于理论动机的绿色因子解释了近期价值股表现不佳的很大一部分原因。

papers.title: Signaling and Discrimination in Collaborative Projects
papers.authors: Paula Onuchic, Debraj Ray
papers.abstract: We study collaborative work in pairs when potential collaborators are motivated by the reputational implications of (joint or solo) projects. In equilibrium, individual collaboration strategies both influence and are influenced by the public assignment of credit for joint work across the two partners. We investigate the fragility of collaboration to small biases in the public’s credit assignment. When collaborators are symmetric, symmetric equilibria are often fragile, and in non-fragile equilibria individuals receive asymmetric collaborative credit based on payoff-irrelevant “identities.” We study payoff distributions across identities within asymmetric equilibria, and compare aggregate welfare across symmetric and asymmetric equilibria.
papers.zh_title: 合作项目中的信号传递与歧视
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了当潜在合作者受到（联合或单独）项目声誉影响时的成对合作工作。在均衡中，个体的合作策略既影响也受公众对联合工作中两位合作者功劳分配的影响。我们考察了合作在公众功劳分配存在微小偏差时的脆弱性。当合作者对称时，对称均衡通常是脆弱的，而在非脆弱均衡中，个体基于与收益无关的“身份”获得不对称的合作功劳。我们研究了不对称均衡中不同身份间的收益分配，并比较了对称均衡与不对称均衡中的总体福利。

papers.title: Temptation and Incentives to Wealth Accumulation
papers.authors: Orazio Attanasio, Agnes Kovacs, Patrick Moran
papers.abstract: We propose a rich model of household behavior to study the effect of two important policies: mortgage interest tax deduction and mandatory mortgage amortization. These policies have attracted some controversy, first because they are conceived to increase overall saving, an objective that the literature does not agree they can achieve, and second because they incentivize illiquid savings and may thus increase the share of ‘wealthy hand-to-mouth’ households. We build a life-cycle model where housing may act as a commitment device to counteract present biases arising from temptation. We show that the model matches several empirical facts, including the large share of wealthy hand-to-mouth households. We evaluate the effect of the two policies and find that they increase wealth accumulation by 7 and 10% respectively.
