In the San Francisco, Los Angeles, and Seattle metropolitan areas, the price of land everywhere within those three markets having been bid up by amounts that at least equal typical household income. Finally, we show that our zoning tax estimates are strongly positively correlated with a new measure of local housing market supply constraint (the Wharton Residential Land Use Regulatory Index of 2018). This relationship is not mechanically driven as the regulatory index is constructed from survey data that do not incorporate land or house price data in any way.
papers.zh_title: 地方住宅用地限制对单一家庭住房市场内外部土地价值的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估算了限制性住宅用地环境对美国主要住房市场土地价格的影响。利用用于开发单一家庭住房的空置土地微观数据，我们实施了一种新的实证策略来估算所谓的“区划税”——即由于供给侧监管而导致土地价格上涨的幅度。我们的结果与先前的研究结果大体一致，即区划税在大型沿海市场中尤为沉重。然而，我们更新的数据表明，西海岸大型市场的价格影响现在是全国最大的。在旧金山、洛杉矶和西雅图大都市区，这三个市场内所有地方的土地价格都被推高到至少相当于典型家庭收入的水平。最后，我们表明，我们的区划税估算值与当地住房市场供给约束的新衡量指标（2018年沃顿住宅用地监管指数）呈强正相关。这种关系并非机械驱动，因为该监管指数是基于调查数据构建的，这些数据并未以任何方式纳入土地或房价数据。

papers.title: Converging to Converge? A Comment
papers.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Carlos A. Molina
papers.abstract: Kremer, Willis, and You (2021) revisit cross-country convergence patterns over the last six decades. They provide evidence that the lack of convergence that applied early in the sample has now been replaced by modest convergence. They also argue this relationship is driven by convergence in various determinants of economic growth across countries and a flattening of the relationship between these determinants and growth. Although the patterns documented by the authors are intriguing, our reanalysis finds that these results are driven by the lack of country fixed effects controlling for unobserved determinants of GDP per capita across countries. We show theoretically and empirically that failure to include country fixed effects will create a bias in convergence coeffcients towards zero and this bias can be time-varying, even when the underlying country-level parameters are stable. These results are relevant not just for the current paper, but for the convergence literature more generally. Our reanalysis finds no evidence of major changes in patterns of convergence and, more importantly, no flattening of the relationship between institutional variables and economic growth. Focusing on democracy, we show that this variable's impact continues to be precisely estimated and if anything a little larger than at the beginning of the sample.
papers.zh_title: 趋同于趋同？一个评论
papers.zh_abstract: Kremer、Willis和You（2021）重新审视了过去六十年的跨国趋同模式。他们提供的证据表明，样本早期存在的缺乏趋同现象现在已被适度的趋同所取代。他们还认为，这种关系是由各国经济增长各种决定因素的趋同以及这些决定因素与增长之间关系的扁平化所驱动的。尽管作者记录的模式引人入胜，但我们的重新分析发现，这些结果是由于缺乏控制各国人均GDP未观测决定因素的国家固定效应所驱动的。我们从理论和实证上表明，未能纳入国家固定效应会导致趋同系数向零产生偏差，并且这种偏差可能随时间变化，即使潜在的国家层面参数是稳定的。这些结果不仅与当前论文相关，而且更普遍地与趋同文献相关。我们的重新分析没有发现趋同模式发生重大变化的证据，更重要的是，没有发现制度变量与经济增长之间关系扁平化的证据。聚焦于民主，我们表明该变量的影响仍然被精确估计，并且如果有什么不同的话，它比样本初期的影响还要大一些。

papers.title: Skills, Degrees and Labor Market Inequality
papers.authors: Peter Q. Blair, Papia Debroy, Justin Heck
papers.abstract: Income inequality between workers with and without bachelor’s degrees has grown sharply during the past 50 years. Canonical explanations attribute this trend to skill-biased technological change, often labeling workers with bachelor’s degrees as “skilled” and those without as “unskilled.” We offer a complementary approach by using the skill requirements of a worker’s current job as a proxy for their skill set. This method enables skill-based comparisons across educational backgrounds and ties observed skills directly to labor market demand. It also broadens the definition of a skilled worker to include those who develop expertise through work experience. We refer to such workers as Skilled Through Alternative Routes (STARs), consistent with the idea that human capital is accumulated not only through formal education but also through on-the-job work experience. Building on this framework, we develop a model of job transitions in which the Absolute Skill Mobility Friction (ASMF) is defined as the elasticity of the flow rate between two occupations with respect to skill distance separating them. Empirically, we find that STARs and bachelor’s degree holders experience similar mobility frictions when moving between jobs with comparable skill requirements. However, STARs face greater friction than bachelor’s degree holders when moving to higher-wage jobs that demand more skills than their current occupation. This gap in upward mobility persists unmitigated in tight labor markets, suggesting that human capital differences alone do not account for labor market inequality by education.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, ED, LS, PR；JEL：I24, I26, J01, J1, J2, J24, J3, J6, L2
papers.zh_title: 技能、学位与劳动力市场不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 在过去50年中，拥有学士学位和没有学士学位的工人之间的收入不平等急剧扩大。经典解释将其归因于技能偏向型技术进步，通常将有学士学位的工人标记为“高技能”，而没有的则标记为“低技能”。我们提供了一种补充方法，即使用工人当前工作的技能要求作为其技能集的代理。这种方法能够基于技能进行跨教育背景的比较，并将观察到的技能直接与劳动力市场需求联系起来。它还拓宽了高技能工人的定义，将那些通过工作经验发展专业技能的人也包括在内。我们将此类工人称为“通过替代途径获得技能者”（STARs），这与人力资本不仅通过正规教育积累，也通过在职工作经验积累的观点一致。基于这一框架，我们开发了一个工作转换模型，其中“绝对技能流动性摩擦”（ASMF）被定义为两个职业之间流动率相对于它们之间技能距离的弹性。实证上，我们发现，当在技能要求相似的工作之间转换时，STARs和学士学位持有者经历相似的流动性摩擦。然而，当STARs转向比他们当前职业要求更多技能的高工资工作时，他们面临的摩擦比学士学位持有者更大。这种向上流动性的差距在紧张的劳动力市场中仍未得到缓解，这表明仅凭人力资本差异并不能解释按教育划分的劳动力市场不平等。

papers.title: Innovation-Driven Entrepreneurship
papers.authors: Tristan L. Botelho, Daniel Fehder, Yael Hochberg
papers.abstract: Entrepreneurship is thought to be a key driver of economic growth. While there are myriad forms of entrepreneurship, ranging from self-employment to small and medium size enterprises to technology- and innovation-driven startups, recent research provides evidence that the relationship between entrepreneurship and economic growth is driven not by overall quantity of new firm entry, but rather by a small subset of high-growth startups that are primarily categorized as innovation-driven. This paper provides a survey of the growing literature on the economics of such innovation-driven entrepreneurship. We begin by distinguishing between the various forms of entrepreneurship, which are often confounded in both theory and empirical work. We lay out the current state of knowledge, and describe the challenges faced by researchers in the field, particularly around measurement, data and identification. We conclude with an overview of the major open questions and directions for future research in the area.
papers.zh_title: 创新驱动的创业
papers.zh_abstract: 创业被认为是经济增长的关键驱动力。尽管创业形式多种多样，从自雇到中小企业，再到技术和创新驱动的初创企业，但最近的研究提供的证据表明，创业与经济增长之间的关系并非由新企业进入的总量驱动，而是由一小部分主要被归类为创新驱动的高增长初创企业所驱动。本文对关于此类创新驱动创业的日益增长的文献进行了综述。我们首先区分了各种形式的创业，这些形式在理论和实证工作中常常被混淆。我们阐述了当前的知识状况，并描述了该领域研究人员面临的挑战，特别是在测量、数据和识别方面。最后，我们概述了该领域的主要未解决问题和未来研究方向。

papers.title: The Welfare Effects of Dynamic Pricing: Evidence from Airline Markets
papers.authors: Kevin R. Williams
papers.abstract: Airfares fluctuate due to demand shocks and intertemporal variation in willingness to pay. I estimate a model of dynamic airline pricing accounting for both sources of price adjustments using novel flight-level data. I use the model estimates to evaluate the welfare effects of dynamic airline pricing. Relative to uniform pricing, dynamic pricing benefits early-arriving, leisure consumers at the expense of late-arriving, business travelers. Although dynamic pricing ensures seat availability for business travelers, these consumers are then charged higher prices. When aggregated over markets, welfare is higher under dynamic pricing than under uniform pricing. The directionality of the welfare effect at the market level depends on whether dynamic price adjustments are mainly driven by demand shocks or by changes in the overall demand elasticity.
papers.zh_title: 动态定价的福利效应：来自航空市场的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 机票价格因需求冲击和支付意愿的跨期变化而波动。我利用新颖的航班层面数据，估计了一个考虑这两种价格调整来源的动态航空公司定价模型。我利用模型估计来评估动态航空公司定价的福利效应。相对于统一定价，动态定价有利于早到的休闲消费者，但代价是晚到的商务旅客。尽管动态定价确保了商务旅客的座位可用性，但这些消费者随后被收取更高的价格。当跨市场加总时，动态定价下的福利高于统一定价下的福利。市场层面福利效应的方向取决于动态价格调整主要是由需求冲击驱动，还是由整体需求弹性的变化驱动。

papers.title: Rents and Intangible Capital: A Q+ Framework
papers.authors: Nicolas Crouzet, Janice C. Eberly
papers.abstract: In recent years, US investment has been lackluster, despite rising valuations. Key explanations include growing rents and growing intangibles. We propose and estimate a framework to quantify their roles. The gap between valuations — reflected in average Q — and investment — reflected in marginal q — can be decomposed into three terms: the value of installed intangibles; rents generated by physical capital; and an interaction term, measuring rents generated by intangibles. The intangible-related terms contribute significantly to the gap, particularly in fast-growing sectors. Our findings suggest care in a pure-rents interpretation, given the rising role of intangibles.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG；JEL：D25, D4, E22, G31
papers.zh_title: 租金与无形资本：一个Q+框架
papers.zh_abstract: 近年来，尽管估值上升，但美国投资一直低迷。关键解释包括租金增长和无形资产增长。我们提出并估计了一个框架来量化它们的作用。估值（反映在平均Q中）与投资（反映在边际q中）之间的差距可以分解为三个部分：已安装无形资产的价值；实物资本产生的租金；以及一个交互项，衡量无形资产产生的租金。与无形资产相关的部分对差距贡献显著，尤其是在快速增长部门。我们的发现表明，鉴于无形资产作用日益上升，在纯粹的租金解释中需要谨慎。

papers.title: The Causal Effect of Heat on Violence: Social Implications of Unmitigated Heat Among the Incarcerated
papers.authors: Anita Mukherjee, Nicholas J. Sanders
papers.abstract: Correctional facilities commonly lack climate control, producing a setting absent endogenous responses to hot weather like avoidance, adjustment, and mitigation. We study daily weather variation across the state of Mississippi, and show that high temperatures increase intense violence among the incarcerated. Days with unsafe heat index levels shift both the intensive and extensive margins of violence, raising daily violent interactions by 20%, and the probability of any violence by 18%. Our setting cleanly identifies the effect of heat on violence, and highlights previously unobserved social costs of current facility infrastructure. Rising global temperatures could substantially increase violence absent adjustment.
papers.zh_title: 高温对暴力的因果效应：被监禁者中未缓解高温的社会影响
papers.zh_abstract: 惩教设施通常缺乏气候控制，造成了一种缺乏对炎热天气内生反应（如回避、调整和缓解）的环境。我们研究了密西西比州全境的每日天气变化，并表明高温会增加被监禁者中的严重暴力行为。具有不安全热指数指数的天数既改变了暴力的集约边际也改变了广延边际，使每日暴力互动增加了20%，任何暴力发生的概率增加了18%。我们的设定清晰地识别了高温对暴力的影响，并突显了当前设施基础设施先前未被观察到的社会成本。如果不进行调整，全球气温上升可能会大幅增加暴力。

papers.title: Entry and Exit of Informal Firms and Development
papers.authors: Brian McCaig, Nina Pavcnik
papers.abstract: Non-farm informal businesses comprise the majority of the firm distribution in developing countries. We document novel stylized facts about entry and exit of informal, non-farm firms using nationally representative panel data over 15 years and across regions with varying levels of local economic development in Vietnam. First, we find that informal businesses exhibit rates of entry and exit around 14-18% annually. Entry and exit rates are similar and highly correlated at a point in time, within industries, and within regions. They both decline over time and across space with economic development. Second, although market selection influences which firms survive, entry and exit has little net effect on aggregate (revenue) productivity or hiring of workers outside the household. This owes to overlapping labor productivity of entering and exiting firms and low subsequent productivity growth and hiring among the surviving entrants. Nonetheless, entry and exit are associated with large changes in individual income. Third, the large overlap in revenue of entering and exiting informal businesses and the high correlation between entry and exit rates are related to the education of owners and their economic activities before and after operating an informal business. Informal business owners are less educated on average than wage workers in the formal sector, but more educated than agricultural workers. The transitions in and out of operating an informal business reflect the underlying structure of economic activities of the working age population, with education gaps also playing a role. The most common transition into non-farm businesses is to and from self-employment in agriculture. The likelihood of this transition declines with economic development, highlighting the role of net entry from agriculture into informal non-farm businesses in structural change.
papers.zh_title: 非正规企业的进入与退出及发展
papers.zh_abstract: 非农非正规企业构成了发展中国家企业分布的主体。我们利用越南15年间的全国代表性面板数据，以及不同地方经济发展水平的区域数据，记录了非农非正规企业进入与退出的新颖典型事实。首先，我们发现非正规企业的年进入率和退出率约为14-18%。在某一时点、行业内部以及区域内部，进入率和退出率相似且高度相关。随着经济发展，两者在时间上和空间上都呈下降趋势。其次，尽管市场选择影响了哪些企业能够生存，但进入和退出对总体（收入）生产率或家庭外雇工几乎没有净效应。这是因为进入和退出企业的劳动生产率存在重叠，且存活下来的新进入者后续的生产率增长和雇佣水平较低。尽管如此，进入和退出与个人收入的巨大变化相关。第三，进入和退出的非正规企业在收入上的高度重叠，以及进入率和退出率之间的高度相关性，与所有者的教育水平及其在经营非正规企业前后的经济活动有关。非正规企业所有者的平均教育水平低于正规部门的工资劳动者，但高于农业劳动者。进出非正规企业经营活动的转变反映了劳动年龄人口经济活动的潜在结构，教育差距也起到了一定作用。进入非农企业最常见的转变是往返于农业自雇。这种转变的可能性随着经济发展而下降，凸显了从农业净进入非农非正规企业在结构变迁中的作用。

papers.title: After the Burning: The Economic Effects of the 1921 Tulsa Race Massacre
papers.authors: Alex Albright, Jeremy A. Cook, James J. Feigenbaum, Laura Kincaide, Jason Long, Nathan Nunn
papers.abstract: The 1921 Tulsa Race Massacre resulted in the looting, burning, and leveling of thirty-five square blocks of a once-thriving Black neighborhood. We examine the economic consequences of the Massacre for Black Tulsans. We find that in the years and decades that followed, the Massacre led to declines in Black home ownership, occupational status, and child education. The adverse effects of the Massacre on the home ownership of Black Tulsans persisted and actually widened in the second half of the 20th century. Consistent with historical accounts, we also see that, in the years following the Massacre, Black skilled workers were more likely to leave Tulsa. While the compositional effects due to selective migration are too small to explain the direct effects of the Massacre, dynamic growth effects from the loss of entrepreneurial talent may explain part of the longer-term adverse effects of the Massacre. Outside of Tulsa, we find that the Massacre also had detrimental effects on Black communities that were connected to Tulsa through family and kinship networks.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, POL；JEL：J62, J69, N32, N42, N92
papers.zh_title: 焚烧之后：1921年塔尔萨种族大屠杀的经济影响
papers.zh_abstract: 1921年的塔尔萨种族大屠杀导致一个曾经繁荣的黑人社区中35个街区被洗劫、焚烧并夷为平地。我们考察了这场大屠杀对塔尔萨黑人的经济后果。我们发现，在随后的数年乃至数十年里，大屠杀导致黑人住房拥有率、职业地位和儿童教育水平下降。大屠杀对塔尔萨黑人住房拥有率的不利影响持续存在，并在20世纪下半叶实际上有所扩大。与历史记载一致，我们还看到，在大屠杀后的几年里，黑人技术工人更有可能离开塔尔萨。虽然选择性迁移带来的构成效应太小，无法解释大屠杀的直接影响，但企业家才能流失带来的动态增长效应可能解释了大屠杀部分长期不利影响。在塔尔萨之外，我们发现大屠杀也对通过家庭和亲属网络与塔尔萨相连的黑人社区产生了不利影响。

papers.title: The Real Effects of Mandatory CSR Disclosure on Emissions: Evidence from the Greenhouse Gas Reporting Program
papers.authors: Lavender Yang, Nicholas Z. Muller, Pierre Jinghong Liang
papers.abstract: We examine the real effects of the Greenhouse Gas Reporting Program (GHGRP) on electric power plants in the United States. Starting in 2010, the GHGRP requires both the reporting of greenhouse gas emissions by facilities emitting more than 25,000 metric tons of carbon dioxide per year to the Environmental Protection Agency and the public dissemination of the reported data in a comprehensive and accessible manner. Using a difference-in-difference research design, we find that power plants that are subject to the GHGRP reduced carbon dioxide emission rates by 7%. The effect is stronger for plants owned by publicly traded firms. We detect evidence of strategic behavior by firms that own both GHGRP plants and non-GHGRP plants. Such firms strategically reallocate emissions between plants to reduce GHGRP-disclosed emissions. We interpret this as evidence that the program is costly to the affected firms. Our results offer new evidence that public or shareholder pressure is a primary channel through which mandatory Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) reporting programs affect firm behavior.
papers.zh_title: 强制性企业社会责任披露对排放的真实影响：来自温室气体报告计划的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了美国温室气体报告计划（GHGRP）对火力发电厂的真实影响。自2010年起，GHGRP要求每年二氧化碳排放量超过25,000公吨的设施向环境保护局报告温室气体排放量，并以全面且可访问的方式公开披露所报告的数据。采用双重差分研究设计，我们发现受GHGRP约束的电厂将二氧化碳排放率降低了7%。对于上市公司拥有的电厂，这种效应更强。我们发现了同时拥有GHGRP电厂和非GHGRP电厂的企业存在策略性行为的证据。这些企业在电厂之间策略性地重新分配排放量，以减少GHGRP披露的排放量。我们将此解读为该项目对受影响企业而言成本高昂的证据。我们的结果提供了新的证据，表明公众或股东压力是强制性企业社会责任（CSR）报告项目影响企业行为的主要渠道。

papers.title: Monetary Policy Risk: Rules vs. Discretion
papers.authors: David Backus, Mikhail Chernov, Stanley E. Zin, Irina Zviadadze
papers.abstract: Long-run asset-pricing restrictions in a macro term-structure model identify discretionary monetary policy separately from a policy rule. We find that policy discretion is an important contributor to aggregate risk. In addition, discretionary easing coincides with good news about the macroeconomy in the form of lower inflation, higher output growth, and lower risk premiums on short-term nominal bonds. However, it also coincides with bad news about long-term financial conditions in the form of higher risk premiums on long-term nominal bonds. Shocks to the rule correlate with changes in the yield curve’s level. Shocks to discretion correlate with changes in its slope.
papers.zh_title: 货币政策风险：规则与相机抉择
papers.zh_abstract: 宏观期限结构模型中的长期资产定价约束将相机抉择的货币政策与政策规则区分开来。我们发现政策相机抉择是总体风险的一个重要贡献因素。此外，相机抉择的宽松政策伴随着宏观经济方面的好消息，表现为更低的通胀、更高的产出增长以及更低的短期名义债券风险溢价。然而，它也伴随着长期金融状况方面的坏消息，表现为更高的长期名义债券风险溢价。规则冲击与收益率曲线水平的变化相关。相机抉择冲击与其斜率的变化相关。

papers.title: Why Are Some Recoveries Short and Others Long?
papers.authors: Edward E. Leamer
papers.abstract: Using the recession recovery point equal to the month when private payrolls first exceeded their previous peak level, this paper argues that it was the negative secular trend in manufacturing jobs that was the most important determinant of the length and depth of the last three recessions/recoveries. This negative secular trend changed the layoff/recall pattern of jobs in manufacturing into permanent displacements, a malady that lengthened the recovery periods and that is not the explicit target of either traditional monetary policy or traditional fiscal policy. Using the ideas gathered from an examination of the US two-digit sectoral data for the US overall, attention turns to the recession/recoveries of the 50 US states in the last three national recession periods. Regressions that explain the lengths and depths of the recessions in 50 US states reveal the importance of construction jobs, but the most important predictor was manufacturing jobs: the greater the share of manufacturing jobs prior to the recession, the worse was the recession/recovery.
papers.zh_title: 为什么有些复苏短暂而另一些则漫长？
papers.zh_abstract: 以私人就业人数首次超过此前峰值水平的月份作为衰退复苏点，本文认为，制造业就业的负向长期趋势是决定最近三次衰退/复苏长度和深度的最重要因素。这种负向长期趋势将制造业的临时解雇/召回模式转变为永久性失业，这一弊病延长了复苏期，并且不是传统货币政策或传统财政政策的明确目标。利用对美国整体两位数行业数据的研究所得出的观点，我们将注意力转向美国50个州在最近三次全国性衰退期间的衰退/复苏情况。解释美国50个州衰退长度和深度的回归分析揭示了建筑业就业的重要性，但最重要的预测因素是制造业就业：衰退前制造业就业份额越大，衰退/复苏就越严重。

papers.title: Exploiting Symmetry in High-Dimensional Dynamic Programming
papers.authors: Mahdi Ebrahimi Kahou, Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Jesse Perla, Arnav Sood
papers.abstract: We propose a new method for solving high-dimensional dynamic programming problems and recursive competitive equilibria with a large (but finite) number of heterogeneous agents using deep learning. We avoid the curse of dimensionality thanks to three complementary techniques: (1) exploiting symmetry in the approximate law of motion and the value function; (2) constructing a concentration of measure to calculate high-dimensional expectations using a single Monte Carlo draw from the distribution of idiosyncratic shocks; and (3) designing and training deep learning architectures that exploit symmetry and concentration of measure. As an application, we find a global solution of a multi-firm version of the classic Lucas and Prescott (1971) model of investment under uncertainty. First, we compare the solution against a linear-quadratic Gaussian version for validation and benchmarking. Next, we solve the nonlinear version where no accurate or closed-form solution exists. Finally, we describe how our approach applies to a large class of models in economics.
papers.zh_title: 在高维动态规划中利用对称性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种新方法，利用深度学习求解具有大量（但有限）异质性主体的高维动态规划问题和递归竞争均衡。我们通过三种互补技术避免了维度诅咒：（1）利用近似运动规律和价值函数中的对称性；（2）构建测度集中，利用来自异质性冲击分布的单次蒙特卡洛抽样计算高维期望；（3）设计和训练利用对称性和测度集中的深度学习架构。作为一个应用，我们找到了经典Lucas和Prescott（1971）不确定性下投资模型的多企业版本的全局解。首先，我们将解与线性二次高斯版本进行比较以进行验证和基准测试。接下来，我们求解不存在精确或封闭形式解的非线性版本。最后，我们描述了我们的方法如何应用于经济学中的一大类模型。

papers.title: Financial Innovation in the 21st Century: Evidence from U.S. Patents
papers.authors: Josh Lerner, Amit Seru, Nick Short, Yuan Sun
papers.abstract: We explore the evolution of financial innovation, using 24,000 U.S. finance patents applied for and granted over last two decades. Patented financial innovations are substantial and economically important, with annual grants expanding from a few dozen in the 1990s to over 2000 in the 2010s. The subject matter of financial patents has changed, consistent with the industry’s shift towards household investors and borrowers. The surge in financial patenting was driven by information technology and other non-financial firms. The location of innovation has shifted, with banks moving activity away from states with tight financial regulation. Concurrently, high-tech regions have attracted financial innovation by payments, IT, and other non-financial firms. Analyses of the returns to financial patents suggests that the social value of these innovations are higher than their private value. We present a simple model to explain these trends. The changing dynamics of financial innovation that began in the 1980s and 1990s may have lowered the private returns to innovation and increased the desirability of patent protection for financial innovations. Regulation of banks following the financial crisis of 2007 may have raised the costs of innovation, leading them to invest less in such activity.
papers.zh_title: 21世纪的金融创新：来自美国专利的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用过去二十年中申请并获批的24,000项美国金融专利，探讨了金融创新的演变。获得专利的金融创新是实质性的且具有重要的经济意义，年度授权量从1990年代的几十项扩展到2010年代的2000多项。金融专利的主题已经发生变化，与行业向家庭投资者和借款人的转变相一致。金融专利数量的激增是由信息技术和其他非金融公司推动的。创新的地点已经转移，银行将活动从金融监管严格的州转移出去。与此同时，高科技地区吸引了支付、IT和其他非金融公司的金融创新。对金融专利回报的分析表明，这些创新的社会价值高于其私人价值。我们提出了一个简单的模型来解释这些趋势。始于1980年代和1990年代的金融创新动态变化可能降低了创新的私人回报，并增加了对金融创新专利保护的渴望。2007年金融危机后对银行的监管可能提高了创新成本，导致它们在此类活动上的投资减少。

papers.title: Long-term effects of the Inca Road
papers.authors: Ana Paula Franco, Sebastian Galiani, Pablo Lavado
papers.abstract: The Inca Empire was the last of a long series of highly developed cultures in pre-colonial South America. It stretched across parts of the current territories of Argentina, Bolivia, Chile, Colombia, Ecuador and the whole of Peru. The Inca Road was its 30,000-kilometer-long transportation system. The aim of this study is to identify its long-term impact on current development in Peru. Our results show that the long run effect of the Inca Road includes increases in wages and educational attainment, a reduction of child malnutrition and an increase in children’s mathematics test scores. We also find that these effects are around 20% greater for women and explore the mechanisms that may account for this pattern.
papers.zh_title: 印加古道的长期影响
papers.zh_abstract: 印加帝国是前殖民时期南美洲一系列高度发达文化中的最后一个。它横跨现今阿根廷、玻利维亚、智利、哥伦比亚、厄瓜多尔的部分领土以及整个秘鲁。印加古道是其长达30,000公里的运输系统。本研究旨在识别其对秘鲁当前发展的长期影响。我们的结果表明，印加古道的长期效应包括提高工资和教育程度、减少儿童营养不良以及提高儿童数学测试成绩。我们还发现，这些效应对女性而言大约高出20%，并探讨了可能解释这一模式的机制。

papers.title: The Impact of Increased Access to Telemedicine
papers.authors: Dan Zeltzer, Liran Einav, Joseph Rashba, Ran D. Balicer
papers.abstract: We estimate the impact of increased access to telemedicine that followed widespread adoption during the March-April 2020 lockdown period in Israel (due to COVID-19). We focus on the post-lockdown period, which in Israel was characterized by a temporary return to normalcy. Prior to the lockdown, telemedicine accounted for about 5% of all primary care visits. It peaked at around 40% during the lockdown, and remained high, at around 20%, during the post-lockdown period. Using a difference-in-differences framework, we compare primary care episodes before and after the lockdown between patients with high and low access to telemedicine, with access defined based on their main primary care physician’s propensity to adopt telemedicine during the lockdown. Increased access to telemedicine results in a 3.5% increase in primary care visits, but a 5% lower per-episode cost, so overall resource utilization is slightly lower. We find that remote visits involve slightly fewer prescriptions and more follow-ups, mainly with the same physician, which is consistent with a prolonged diagnostic path in the absence of physical examination. However, analyzing specific conditions, we find no evidence of missed diagnoses or adverse outcomes. Taken together, our findings suggest that the increased convenience of telemedicine does not compromise care quality or raise costs.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS, PE, PR；JEL：I11, O33
papers.zh_title: 远程医疗可及性增加的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估算了2020年3月至4月以色列因COVID-19封锁期间远程医疗广泛采用后，其可及性增加所带来的影响。我们重点关注封锁后时期，该时期在以色列的特点是暂时恢复正常状态。封锁前，远程医疗约占所有初级保健就诊的5%。封锁期间，这一比例达到约40%的峰值，并在封锁后时期仍保持在约20%的高位。利用双重差分框架，我们比较了封锁前后，远程医疗可及性高和低的患者之间的初级保健就诊情况，其中可及性是根据其主要初级保健医生在封锁期间采用远程医疗的倾向来定义的。远程医疗可及性的增加导致初级保健就诊次数增加3.5%，但每次就诊成本降低5%，因此总体资源利用率略有下降。我们发现，远程就诊涉及的处方略少，但随访更多，且主要与同一位医生进行，这与缺乏体检情况下诊断路径延长的情况一致。然而，针对特定病症的分析并未发现漏诊或不良后果的证据。综合来看，我们的研究结果表明，远程医疗便利性的提高并不会损害护理质量或增加成本。

papers.title: Infrastructure Investment and Labor Monopsony Power
papers.authors: Wyatt Brooks, Joseph P. Kaboski, Illenin O. Kondo, Yao Amber Li, Wei Qian
papers.abstract: In this paper we study whether or not transportation infrastructure disrupts local monopsony power in labor markets using an expansion of the national highway system in India. Using panel data on manufacturing firms, we find that monopsony power in labor markets is reduced among firms near newly constructed highways relative to firms that remain far from highways. We estimate that the highways reduce labor markdowns significantly. We use changes in the composition of inputs to identify these effects separately from the reduction of output markups that occurs simultaneously. The impacts of highway construction are therefore pro-competitive in both output and input markets, and act to increase the share of income that labor receives by 1.8--2.3 percentage points.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, LS；JEL：J0, J42, O1, O18
papers.zh_title: 基础设施投资与劳动力市场买方垄断势力
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们利用印度国家公路系统的扩建，研究交通基础设施是否破坏了劳动力市场中的地方买方垄断势力。利用制造业企业的面板数据，我们发现，与远离新建公路的企业相比，靠近新建公路的企业在劳动力市场中的买方垄断势力有所减弱。我们估计，公路显著降低了劳动力加价幅度。我们利用投入构成的变化，将这些效应与同时发生的产出加价幅度降低区分开来。因此，公路建设在产出市场和投入市场都具有促进竞争的作用，并使劳动收入份额提高1.8至2.3个百分点。

papers.title: Teaching and Incentives: Substitutes or Complements?
papers.authors: James Allen IV, Arlete Mahumane, James Riddell IV, Tanya Rosenblat, Dean Yang, Hang Yu
papers.abstract: Interventions to promote learning are often categorized into supply- and demand-side approaches. In a randomized experiment to promote learning about COVID-19 among Mozambican adults, we study the interaction between a supply and a demand intervention, respectively: teaching via targeted feedback, and providing financial incentives to learners. In theory, teaching and learner-incentives may be substitutes (crowding out one another) or complements (enhancing one another). Experts surveyed in advance predicted a high degree of substitutability between the two treatments. In contrast, we find substantially more complementarity than experts predicted. Combining teaching and incentive treatments raises COVID-19 knowledge test scores by 0.5 standard deviations, though the standalone teaching treatment is the most cost-effective. The complementarity between teaching and incentives persists in the longer run, over nine months post-treatment.
papers.zh_title: 教学与激励：替代品还是互补品？
papers.zh_abstract: 促进学习的干预措施通常被分为供给侧和需求侧两类。在一项旨在促进莫桑比克成年人了解COVID-19的随机实验中，我们分别研究了一种供给侧干预和一种需求侧干预之间的相互作用：通过针对性反馈进行教学，以及为学习者提供经济激励。理论上，教学和学习者激励可能是替代品（相互挤出）或互补品（相互增强）。事先接受调查的专家预测这两种处理方式之间存在高度的替代性。相反，我们发现互补性远高于专家的预测。将教学和激励处理相结合，可将COVID-19知识测试分数提高0.5个标准差，尽管单独的教学处理最具成本效益。教学与激励之间的互补性在治疗后九个月的长期内仍然存在。

papers.title: Body-Worn Cameras and Adjudication of Citizen Complaints of Police Misconduct
papers.authors: Suat Çubukçu, Nusret M. Sahin, Erdal Tekin, Volkan Topalli
papers.abstract: Police body-worn cameras (BWCs) have been the subject of much research on how the technology’s enhanced documentation of police/citizen interactions impact police behavior. Less attention has been paid to how BWC recordings affect the adjudication of citizen complaints against the police. We employ citizen complaint data from the Chicago Police Department and Civilian Office of Police Accountability filed between 2012-2020 to determine the extent to which BWC footage enhances the efficacy of evidence used to formulate a conclusion of responsibility, and whether bias against complainants based on race would subsequently be reduced. Accordingly, we exploit the staggered deployment of BWCs across 22 Chicago police districts over time to estimate the effect of BWCs on these outcomes. Our findings indicate that BWCs led to a significant decrease in the dismissal of investigations due to insufficient evidence ("not sustained") as well as a significant increase in disciplinary actions against police officers ("sustained" outcomes”) with sufficient evidence to sanction their misconduct. We further find that disparities in complaints across racial groups for the “unsustained” category fade away with the implementation of BWCs.
papers.zh_title: 执法记录仪与警察不当行为投诉的裁决
papers.zh_abstract: 警察随身执法记录仪（BWCs）对警察与公民互动过程的增强记录如何影响警察行为，已成为大量研究的主题。然而，关于BWC录像如何影响公民对警察投诉的裁决，关注较少。我们利用芝加哥警察局和公民警察问责办公室在2012年至2020年间提交的公民投诉数据，来确定BWC录像在多大程度上增强了用于形成责任结论的证据效力，以及是否因此减少了基于投诉人种族的偏见。据此，我们利用BWC在芝加哥22个警区随时间逐步部署的情况，来估计BWC对这些结果的影响。我们的研究结果表明，BWC导致因证据不足而驳回调查（“不成立”）的情况显著减少，同时，因有足够证据制裁警察不当行为而对其采取纪律处分（“成立”结果）的情况显著增加。我们进一步发现，随着BWC的实施，不同种族群体在“不成立”类别投诉中的差异消失了。

papers.title: Could Vaccine Dose Stretching Reduce COVID-19 Deaths?
papers.authors: Witold Więcek, Amrita Ahuja, Michael Kremer, Alexandre Simoes Gomes, Christopher Snyder, Alex Tabarrok, Brandon Joel Tan
papers.abstract: We argue that alternative COVID-19 vaccine dosing regimens could potentially dramatically accelerate global COVID-19 vaccination and reduce mortality, and that the costs of testing these regimens are dwarfed by their potential benefits. We first use the high correlation between neutralizing antibody response and efficacy against disease (Khoury et. al. 2021) to show that half or even quarter doses of some vaccines generate immune responses associated with high vaccine efficacy. We then use an SEIR model to estimate that under these efficacy levels, doubling or quadrupling the rate of vaccination by using fractional doses would dramatically reduce infections and mortality. Since the correlation between immune response and efficacy may not be fully predictive of efficacy with fractional doses, we then use the SEIR model to show that fractional dosing would substantially reduce infections and mortality over a wide range of plausible efficacy levels. Further immunogenicity studies for a range of vaccine and dose combinations could deliver outcomes in weeks and could be conducted with a few hundred healthy volunteers. National regulatory authorities could also decide to test efficacy of fractional dosing in the context of vaccination campaigns based on existing immune response data, as some did for delayed second doses. If efficacy turned out to be high, the approach could be implemented broadly, while if it turned out to be low, downside risk could be limited by administering full doses to those who had received fractional doses. The SEIR model also suggests that delaying second vaccine doses will likely have substantial mortality benefits for multiple, but not all, vaccine-variant combinations, underscoring the importance of ongoing surveillance. Finally, we find that for countries choosing between approved but lower efficacy vaccines available immediately and waiting for mRNA vaccines, using immediately available vaccines typically reduces mortality.
papers.zh_title: 疫苗剂量稀释能否减少COVID-19死亡人数？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们认为，替代性的COVID-19疫苗接种方案可能极大地加速全球COVID-19疫苗接种并降低死亡率，并且测试这些方案的成本远低于其潜在收益。我们首先利用中和抗体反应与针对疾病的疫苗效力之间的高度相关性（Khoury等人，2021年）表明，某些疫苗的半剂量甚至四分之一剂量能产生与高疫苗效力相关的免疫反应。然后，我们使用SEIR模型估计，在这些效力水平下，通过使用分次剂量将疫苗接种率提高一倍或四倍，将大幅减少感染和死亡人数。由于免疫反应与效力之间的相关性可能无法完全预测分次剂量的效力，我们随后使用SEIR模型表明，在广泛可能的效力水平范围内，分次剂量将显著减少感染和死亡人数。针对一系列疫苗和剂量组合的进一步免疫原性研究可以在数周内得出结果，并且只需几百名健康志愿者即可进行。国家监管机构也可以根据现有的免疫反应数据，决定在疫苗接种活动中测试分次剂量的效力，正如一些机构对延迟第二剂接种所做的那样。如果最终证明效力很高，该方法可以广泛实施；而如果效力较低，则可以通过向已接种分次剂量的人补种全剂量来限制下行风险。SEIR模型还表明，延迟第二剂疫苗接种可能对多种（但并非所有）疫苗-病毒变异组合产生显著的死亡率收益，这强调了持续监测的重要性。最后，我们发现，对于在可立即获得的已获批但效力较低的疫苗与等待mRNA疫苗之间进行选择的国家，使用可立即获得的疫苗通常能降低死亡率。

papers.title: Playlisting Favorites: Measuring Platform Bias in the Music Industry
papers.authors: Luis Aguiar, Joel Waldfogel, Sarah B. Waldfogel
papers.abstract: Platforms are growing increasingly powerful, raising questions about whether their power might be exercised with bias. While bias is inherently difficult to measure, we identify a context within the music industry that is amenable to bias testing. Our approach requires ex ante platform assessments of commercial promise - such as the rank order in which products are presented - along with information on eventual product success. A platform is biased against a product type if the type attains greater success, conditional on ex ante assessment. Theoretical considerations and voiced industry concerns suggest the possibility of platform biases in favor of major record labels, and industry participants also point to bias against women. Using data on Spotify curators' rank of songs on New Music Friday playlists in 2017, we find that Spotify's New Music Friday rankings favor independent-label music, along with some evidence of bias in favor of music by women. Despite challenges that independent-label artists and women face in the music industry, Spotify's New Music curation appears to favor them.
papers.zh_title: 歌单偏好：衡量音乐产业中的平台偏见
papers.zh_abstract: 平台正变得越来越强大，这引发了关于其权力是否可能被带有偏见地行使的疑问。虽然偏见本质上难以衡量，但我们在音乐产业中确定了一个适合进行偏见测试的背景。我们的方法需要平台对商业前景的事前评估——例如产品呈现的排序——以及关于产品最终成功的信息。如果某一产品类型在给定事前评估的条件下取得了更大的成功，则该平台对该产品类型存在偏见。理论考量以及业界表达的担忧表明，平台可能存在有利于主要唱片公司的偏见，同时行业参与者还指出了针对女性的偏见。利用2017年Spotify策展人对“新音乐星期五”歌单中歌曲排名的数据，我们发现Spotify的“新音乐星期五”排名有利于独立厂牌音乐，同时也有一些证据表明存在有利于女性音乐的偏见。尽管独立厂牌艺术家和女性在音乐产业中面临挑战，但Spotify的新音乐策展似乎对他们有利。

papers.title: Pricing Without Mispricing
papers.authors: Tobias J. Moskowitz, Robert F. Stambaugh
papers.abstract: We test whether a model could price assets if the market were efficient. Specifically, we test whether a model assigns zero alpha to a strategy that uses only decade-old information, which even an inefficient market would correctly price. Persistence in the strategy’s multifactor betas gives our test power. Multifactor betas can help capture mispricing, but persistence in those betas then leads the multifactor model to distort expected returns well after that information gets priced correctly. The CAPM passes our test, but prominent multifactor models do not.
papers.zh_title: 无错误定价的定价
papers.zh_abstract: 我们检验一个模型是否能在市场有效的情况下为资产定价。具体来说，我们检验一个模型是否会对一个仅使用十年前信息的策略赋予零阿尔法，即使是一个无效市场也能正确定价这些信息。该策略的多因子贝塔值的持续性为我们的检验提供了效力。多因子贝塔值有助于捕捉错误定价，但贝塔值的持续性随后会导致多因子模型在信息被正确定价很久之后扭曲预期收益。CAPM通过了我们的检验，但著名的多因子模型却没有。

papers.title: Entrepôt: Hubs, Scale, and Trade Costs
papers.authors: Sharat Ganapati, Woan Foong Wong, Oren Ziv
papers.abstract: We study the global trade network and quantify its trade and welfare impact. We document that the trade network is a hub-and-spoke system where 80% of trade is shipped indirectly, nearly all via entrepôts—major hubs that facilitate trade between many origins and destinations. We estimate indirect-shipping-consistent trade costs using a model where shipments can be sent indirectly through an endogenous transport network and develop a geography-based instrument to estimate scale economies in shipping. Network and scale effects propagate local trade cost changes globally. Counterfactual infrastructure improvements at entrepôts generate ten times the global welfare impact relative to non-entrepôts.
papers.zh_title: 转口港：枢纽、规模与贸易成本
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究全球贸易网络并量化其贸易和福利影响。我们记录到，贸易网络是一个枢纽-辐射系统，其中80%的贸易是通过间接方式运输的，几乎全部经由转口港——这些主要枢纽促进了众多原产地和目的地之间的贸易。我们使用一个允许货物通过内生运输网络间接发送的模型，估计了与间接运输一致的贸易成本，并开发了一个基于地理的工具来估计航运中的规模经济。网络效应和规模效应将局部贸易成本的变化传播到全球。与在非转口港相比，在转口港进行反事实的基础设施改善所产生的全球福利影响是其十倍。

papers.title: Trade, Competitive Exclusion, and the Slow-Motion Extinction of the Southern Resident Killer Whales
papers.authors: M. Scott Taylor
papers.abstract: Orcinus Orca is the world's largest predator, and simultaneously a significant tourist asset and cultural icon for much of the Pacific Northwest. In the past two decades, the Southern Resident Killer whales (SRKW) have declined by more than 25 percent, and this population appears on a slow-motion path towards extinction. This paper combines elements from biology and economics to put forward a new methodology for investigating their collapse and presents empirical work supporting its novel explanation - the Orca Conjecture. The key mechanism is ecological - Gause's law of competitive exclusion - combined with a shock coming from booming trade with Asia. Using three different empirical methods drawn from economics, I find the attendant noise disturbance from increased ship traffic post-1998 has lowered births and raised deaths significantly, placing the SRKW on a slow-motion path towards extinction.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, ITI；JEL：F18, F64, Q37, Q5, Q57
papers.zh_title: 贸易、竞争排斥与南方居留虎鲸的缓慢灭绝
papers.zh_abstract: 虎鲸是世界上最大的捕食者，同时也是太平洋西北地区重要的旅游资产和文化象征。在过去二十年中，南方居留虎鲸（SRKW）的数量减少了超过25%，这一种群似乎正沿着一条缓慢的轨迹走向灭绝。本文结合生物学和经济学的元素，提出了一种调查其崩溃的新方法，并提供了支持其新颖解释——虎鲸猜想——的实证工作。关键机制是生态学上的——高斯竞争排斥定律——加上来自与亚洲蓬勃发展的贸易的冲击。利用来自经济学的三种不同实证方法，我发现1998年后因船舶交通增加而产生的伴随噪音干扰显著降低了出生率并提高了死亡率，使南方居留虎鲸走上了缓慢灭绝的道路。

papers.title: The Evolution of Market Power in the US Auto Industry
papers.authors: Paul L. E. Grieco, Charles Murry, Ali Yurukoglu
papers.abstract: We construct measures of industry performance and welfare in the U.S. car and light truck market from 1980-2018. We estimate a differentiated products demand model for this market using product level data on market shares, prices, and product characteristics, and consumer level data on demographics, purchases, and stated second choices. We estimate marginal costs under the conduct assumption of Nash-Bertrand pricing. We relate trends in consumer welfare and markups to industry trends in market structure and the composition of products, like the rise of import competition, the proliferation of SUV's, and changes in vehicle characteristics. We find that although prices rose over time, concentration and market power decreased substantially. Consumer welfare increased over time due to improving product quality and falling marginal costs. The fraction of total surplus accruing to consumers also increased.
papers.zh_title: 美国汽车行业市场势力的演变
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了1980年至2018年美国轿车和轻型卡车市场的行业绩效和福利衡量指标。我们利用产品层面的市场份额、价格和产品特征数据，以及消费者层面的人口统计、购买和陈述的第二选择数据，估计了该市场的差异化产品需求模型。我们在纳什-伯特兰定价的行为假设下估计了边际成本。我们将消费者福利和加成的趋势与行业市场结构和产品构成的变化联系起来，例如进口竞争的加剧、SUV的普及以及车辆特征的变化。我们发现，尽管价格随时间上涨，但集中度和市场势力大幅下降。由于产品质量的提高和边际成本的下降，消费者福利随时间增加。消费者获得的剩余份额也增加了。

papers.title: Efficiency and Equity Impacts of Urban Transportation Policies with Equilibrium Sorting
papers.authors: Panle Jia Barwick, Shanjun Li, Andrew R. Waxman, Jing Wu, Tianli Xia
papers.abstract: We estimate an equilibrium sorting model of housing location and commuting mode choice with endogenous traffic congestion to evaluate the efficiency and equity impacts of a menu of urban transportation policies. Leveraging fine-scale data from household travel diaries and housing transaction data identifying residents’ home and work locations in Beijing, we recover structural estimates with rich preference heterogeneity over both travel mode and residential location decisions. Counterfactual simulations demonstrate that even when different policies reduce congestion to the same degree, their impacts on residential sorting and social welfare differ drastically. First, driving restrictions create large distortions in travel choices and are welfare reducing. Second, distance-based congestion pricing reduces the spatial separation between residences and workplaces and improves welfare for all households when it is accompanied by revenue recycling. Third, sorting undermines the congestion reduction under driving restrictions and subway expansion but strengthens it under congestion pricing. Fourth, the combination of congestion pricing and subway expansion delivers the greatest congestion relief and efficiency gains. It can also be self-financed, with the cost of subway expansion fully covered by congestion pricing revenue. Finally, eliminating preference heterogeneity, household sorting, or endogenous congestion significantly biases the welfare estimates and changes the relative welfare rankings of the policies.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, IO；JEL：H23, R3, R41, R48, R51
papers.zh_title: 具有均衡分选的城市交通政策的效率与公平影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估计了一个包含内生交通拥堵的住房选址和通勤方式选择的均衡分选模型，以评估一系列城市交通政策的效率和公平影响。利用来自北京的家庭出行日志和识别居民家庭与工作地点的住房交易数据的精细尺度数据，我们恢复了在出行方式和居住选址决策上具有丰富偏好异质性的结构估计。反事实模拟表明，即使不同政策将拥堵减少到相同程度，它们对居住分选和社会福利的影响也截然不同。首先，限行政策在出行选择上造成了巨大扭曲，并降低了福利。其次，基于距离的拥堵收费减少了居住地与工作地之间的空间分离，并且在伴随收入循环利用时改善了所有家庭的福利。第三，分选削弱了限行和地铁扩建下的拥堵缓解效果，但增强了拥堵收费下的效果。第四，拥堵收费与地铁扩建相结合带来了最大的拥堵缓解和效率提升。它还可以实现自筹资金，地铁扩建的成本完全由拥堵收费收入覆盖。最后，消除偏好异质性、家庭分选或内生拥堵会显著偏差福利估计，并改变政策的相对福利排序。

papers.title: Quantifying the High-Frequency Trading "Arms Race"
papers.authors: Matteo Aquilina, Eric Budish, Peter O'Neill
papers.abstract: We use stock exchange message data to quantify the negative aspect of high-frequency trading, known as “latency arbitrage.” The key difference between message data and widely-familiar limit order book data is that message data contain attempts to trade or cancel that fail. This allows the researcher to observe both winners and losers in a race, whereas in limit order book data you cannot see the losers, so you cannot directly see the races. We find that latency-arbitrage races are very frequent (about one per minute per symbol for FTSE 100 stocks), extremely fast (the modal race lasts 5-10 millionths of a second), and account for a remarkably large portion of overall trading volume (about 20%). Race participation is concentrated, with the top 6 firms accounting for over 80% of all race wins and losses. The average race is worth just a small amount (about half a price tick), but because of the large volumes the stakes add up. Our main estimates suggest that races constitute roughly one-third of price impact and the effective spread (key microstructure measures of the cost of liquidity), that latency arbitrage imposes a roughly 0.5 basis point tax on trading, that market designs that eliminate latency arbitrage would reduce the market's cost of liquidity by 17%, and that the total sums at stake are on the order of $5 billion per year in global equity markets alone.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IO；JEL：D47, G1, G12, G14
papers.zh_title: 量化高频交易“军备竞赛”
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用证券交易所的消息数据来量化高频交易的负面方面，即“延迟套利”。消息数据与广为人知的限价订单簿数据之间的关键区别在于，消息数据包含了失败的交易或取消尝试。这使得研究人员能够观察到竞赛中的赢家和输家，而在限价订单簿数据中，你无法看到输家，因此无法直接观察到竞赛。我们发现，延迟套利竞赛非常频繁（对于富时100指数成分股，每个股票大约每分钟一次），速度极快（最常见的竞赛持续5到10微秒），并且占总交易量的比例非常大（约20%）。竞赛参与高度集中，前6家公司占据了所有竞赛胜负的80%以上。平均每次竞赛的价值很小（大约半个价格跳动），但由于交易量巨大，总赌注累积起来相当可观。我们的主要估计表明，竞赛约占价格影响和有效价差（衡量流动性成本的关键微观结构指标）的三分之一，延迟套利对交易征收了大约0.5个基点的税，消除延迟套利的市场设计将使市场的流动性成本降低17%，并且仅在全球股票市场中，每年的总赌注金额就高达约50亿美元。

papers.title: A Denial a Day Keeps the Doctor Away
papers.authors: Abe Dunn, Joshua D. Gottlieb, Adam Shapiro, Daniel J. Sonnenstuhl, Pietro Tebaldi
papers.abstract: Who bears the consequences of administrative problems in healthcare? We use data on repeated interactions between a large sample of U.S. physicians and many different insurers to document the complexity of healthcare billing, and estimate its economic costs for doctors and consequences for patients. Observing the back-and-forth sequences of claim denials and resubmissions for past visits, we can estimate physicians’ costs of haggling with insurers to collect payments. Combining these costs with the revenue never collected, we estimate that physicians lose 18% of Medicaid revenue to billing problems, compared with 4.7% for Medicare and 2.4% for commercial insurers. Identifying off of physician movers and practices that span state boundaries, we find that physicians respond to billing problems by refusing to accept Medicaid patients in states with more severe billing hurdles. These hurdles are quantitatively just as important as payment rates for explaining variation in physicians’ willingness to treat Medicaid patients. We conclude that administrative frictions have first-order costs for doctors, patients, and equality of access to healthcare. We quantify the potential economic gains—in terms of reduced public spending or increased access to physicians—if these frictions could be reduced, and find them to be sizable.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, IO, PE；JEL：H52, H75, I11, I13, I14, I18, L14, L33, L88
papers.zh_title: 每日一拒，医生远离
papers.zh_abstract: 谁承担了医疗保健中行政问题的后果？我们利用大量美国医生与多家不同保险公司之间重复互动的数据，记录了医疗计费的复杂性，并估计了其对医生的经济成本以及对患者的影响。通过观察过去就诊中索赔拒绝和重新提交的来回序列，我们可以估计医生为收取款项而与保险公司讨价还价的成本。将这些成本与从未收回的收入相结合，我们估计医生因计费问题损失了18%的医疗补助收入，而医疗保险和商业保险公司的这一比例分别为4.7%和2.4%。通过识别跨州执业的医生和诊所，我们发现医生通过拒绝接受医疗补助患者来应对计费问题，尤其是在计费障碍更严重的州。这些障碍在解释医生治疗医疗补助患者意愿的差异方面，与支付率在数量上同等重要。我们得出结论，行政摩擦对医生、患者和医疗保健可及性的平等具有首要成本。我们量化了如果这些摩擦能够减少，在减少公共支出或增加医生可及性方面的潜在经济收益，并发现这些收益相当可观。

papers.title: Welfare Costs of Idiosyncratic and Aggregate Consumption Shocks
papers.authors: George M. Constantinides
papers.abstract: I estimate welfare benefits of eliminating idiosyncratic consumption shocks unrelated to the business cycle as 47.3% of household utility and benefits of eliminating idiosyncratic shocks related to the business cycle as 3.4% of utility. Estimates of the former substantially exceed earlier ones because I distinguish between idiosyncratic shocks related/unrelated to the business cycle, estimate the negative skewness of shocks, target moments of idiosyncratic shocks from household-level CEX data, and target market moments. Benefits of eliminating aggregate shocks are 7.7% of utility. Policy should focus on insuring idiosyncratic shocks unrelated to the business cycle, such as the death of a household’s prime wage earner and job layoffs not necessarily related to recessions.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, LS, PE；JEL：D31, D52, E2, E21, E24, E32, E44, G01, G12, J6
papers.zh_title: 特质性和总消费冲击的福利成本
papers.zh_abstract: 我估计，消除与经济周期无关的特质性消费冲击的福利收益为家庭效用的47.3%，而消除与经济周期相关的特质性冲击的收益为效用的3.4%。前者估计值大大超过早期估计，因为我区分了与商业周期相关/无关的特质性冲击，估计了冲击的负偏度，从家庭层面的CEX数据中定位了特质性冲击的矩，并定位了市场矩。消除总冲击的收益为效用的7.7%。政策应侧重于保障与经济周期无关的特质性冲击，例如家庭主要工资收入者的死亡和不一定与经济衰退相关的失业。

papers.title: Collective Progress: Dynamics of Exit Waves
papers.authors: Doruk Cetemen, Can Urgun, Leeat Yariv
papers.abstract: We study a model of collective search by teams. Discoveries beget discoveries and correlated search results are governed by a Brownian path. Search results' variation at any point---the search scope---is jointly controlled. Agents individually choose when to cease search and implement their best discovery. We characterize equilibrium and optimal policies. Search scope is constant and independent of search outcomes as long as no member leaves. It declines after departures. A simple drawdown stopping boundary governs each agent’s search termination. We show the emergence of endogenous exit waves, whereby possibly heterogeneous agents cease search all at once.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, POL, PR；JEL：C73, D81, D83, O35
papers.zh_title: 集体进展：退出浪潮的动态
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个团队集体搜索的模型。发现催生发现，相关的搜索结果由一个布朗运动路径支配。任何时刻搜索结果的变化——即搜索范围——是共同控制的。代理人各自选择何时停止搜索并实施其最佳发现。我们刻画了均衡和最优策略。只要没有成员离开，搜索范围是恒定的，并且与搜索结果无关。在成员离开后，搜索范围会下降。一个简单的回撤停止边界支配着每个代理人的搜索终止。我们展示了内生退出浪潮的出现，其中可能异质的代理人会同时停止搜索。

papers.title: Non-Modernization: Power-Culture Trajectories and the Dynamics of Political Institutions
papers.authors: Daron Acemoglu, James A. Robinson
papers.abstract: Modernization theory is a cornerstone of much of political science, despite the mounting evidence against its predictions. In this paper, we argue that the theory's failings are rooted in predictions that are not conditioned on history and cultural configurations. We outline a theory in which the interplay of the distribution of political power and cultural configurations lead to three distinct self-reinforcing paths of political development, with very different state-society relations, institutions, and economic structures. These are paths to Despotic, Absent and Shackled leviathans. The role of cultural configurations, made up of attributes in a society's culture set, is critical in legitimizing the social arrangements in each path. For example, a Despotic Leviathan, as in China, cannot be understood without appreciating how Confucian culture has been used to bolster a worldview in which rulers are supposed to be virtuous and regular people are discouraged from political participation. We argued that this interpretation is not inherent to Confucian thought, but has to be understood as an endogenous outcome along the trajectory to the Despotic Leviathan. None of the three different paths we highlight support modernization theory. Under the Absent Leviathan, there is no economic modernization. Under the Despotic Leviathan, economic growth bolsters the existing regime and its supporting cultural configuration, with no tendency towards democracy or associate political changes. Under the Shackled Leviathan, there are dynamics leading to economic growth and political changes with greater bottom-up participation. Nevertheless, the causation does not go from the former to the latter, and these changes are critically dependent on cultural and political entrepreneurship in order to formulate and popularize new cultural configurations and institutionalize political changes.
papers.zh_title: 非现代化：权力-文化轨迹与政治制度的动态
papers.zh_abstract: 现代化理论是许多政治学的基石，尽管越来越多的证据反对其预测。在本文中，我们认为该理论的失败源于其预测没有以历史和文化配置为条件。我们概述了一个理论，其中政治权力分配与文化配置的相互作用导致了三种不同的自我强化的政治发展路径，具有截然不同的国家-社会关系、制度和经济结构。这些是通往专制利维坦、缺席利维坦和束缚利维坦的路径。文化配置的作用，由社会文化集中的属性构成，对于每条路径中社会安排的合法化至关重要。例如，像中国这样的专制利维坦，如果不理解儒家文化如何被用来强化一种世界观——即统治者应该是贤德的，而普通民众被劝阻不要参与政治——就无法理解。我们认为，这种解释并非儒家思想所固有，而必须被理解为通往专制利维坦轨迹上的内生结果。我们强调的三种不同路径都不支持现代化理论。在缺席利维坦下，没有经济现代化。在专制利维坦下，经济增长巩固了现有政权及其支持性文化配置，没有走向民主或相关政治变革的趋势。在束缚利维坦下，存在导致经济增长和政治变革的动态，具有更大的自下而上参与。然而，因果关系并非从前到后，这些变革关键依赖于文化和政治企业家精神，以制定和推广新的文化配置，并将政治变革制度化。

papers.title: Epidemic Exposure, Fintech Adoption, and the Digital Divide
papers.authors: Orkun Saka, Barry Eichengreen, Cevat Giray Aksoy
papers.abstract: We ask whether epidemic exposure leads to a shift in financial technology usage and who participates in this shift. We exploit a dataset combining Gallup World Polls and Global Findex surveys for some 250,000 individuals in 140 countries, merging them with information on the incidence of epidemics and local 3G internet infrastructure. Epidemic exposure is associated with an increase in remote-access (online/mobile) banking and substitution from bank branch-based to ATM activity. The temporary nature of the effects we identify is more consistent with a demand channel rather than that of supply with high initial fixed costs. Exploring heterogeneity using a machine-learning driven approach, we find that young, high-income earners in full-time employment have the greatest tendency to shift to online/mobile transactions in response to epidemics. Baseline effects are larger for individuals with better ex ante 3G signal coverage, highlighting the role of the digital divide in adaption to new technologies necessitated by adverse external shocks.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, IFM, PR；JEL：G0, G20, G59, I10
papers.zh_title: 流行病暴露、金融科技采纳与数字鸿沟
papers.zh_abstract: 我们探究流行病暴露是否会导致金融科技使用方式的转变，以及谁参与了这种转变。我们利用一个结合了盖洛普世界民意调查和全球金融指数调查的数据集，涵盖了140个国家约25万名个体，并将其与流行病发生信息和当地3G互联网基础设施信息相结合。流行病暴露与远程访问（在线/移动）银行业务的增加以及从银行网点活动向ATM活动的替代相关。我们识别的效应的暂时性更符合需求渠道，而非具有高初始固定成本的供给渠道。通过使用机器学习驱动的方法探索异质性，我们发现，全职工作的年轻高收入者在应对流行病时，转向在线/移动交易的倾向最大。对于事前3G信号覆盖更好的个体，基线效应更大，这凸显了数字鸿沟在适应由不利外部冲击所要求的新技术中的作用。

papers.title: The Dynastic Benefits of Early Childhood Education
papers.authors: Jorge Luis García, Frederik H. Bennhoff, Duncan Ermini Leaf, James J. Heckman
papers.abstract: This paper monetizes the life-cycle intragenerational and intergenerational benefits of the Perry Preschool Project, a pioneering high-quality early childhood education program implemented before Head Start that targeted disadvantaged African-Americans and was evaluated by a randomized trial. It has the longest follow-up of any experimentally evaluated early childhood education program. We follow participants into late midlife as well as their children into adulthood. Impacts on the original participants and their children generate substantial benefits. Access to life-cycle data enables us to evaluate the accuracy of widely used schemes to forecast life-cycle benefits from early-life test scores, which we find wanting.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, PE；JEL：C93, H43, I28, J13
papers.zh_title: 幼儿教育的代际收益
papers.zh_abstract: 本文对佩里学前教育项目（一个在“开端计划”之前实施的、针对弱势非裔美国人的开创性高质量幼儿教育项目，并通过随机试验进行评估）的生命周期内代内和代际收益进行了货币化。它是任何经过实验评估的幼儿教育项目中随访时间最长的。我们跟踪参与者直至中晚年，以及他们的子女直至成年。对原始参与者及其子女的影响产生了可观的收益。获取生命周期数据使我们能够评估广泛使用的、根据早期测试分数预测生命周期收益的方案之准确性，我们发现这些方案存在不足。

papers.title: Tracking Weekly State-Level Economic Conditions
papers.authors: Christiane Baumeister, Danilo Leiva-León, Eric R. Sims
papers.abstract: In this paper, we develop a novel dataset of weekly economic conditions indices for the 50 U.S. states going back to 1987 based on mixed-frequency dynamic factor models with weekly, monthly, and quarterly variables that cover multiple dimensions of state economies. We show that there is considerable heterogeneity in the length, depth, and timing of business cycles across individual states. We assess the role of states in national recessions and propose an aggregate indicator that allows us to gauge the overall weakness of the U.S. economy. We also illustrate the usefulness of these state-level indices for quantifying the main forces contributing to the economic collapse caused by the COVID-19 pandemic and for evaluating the effectiveness of federal economic policies like the Paycheck Protection Program.
papers.zh_title: 追踪每周州级经济状况
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们基于混合频率动态因子模型，利用涵盖州经济多个维度的周度、月度和季度变量，开发了一个可追溯至1987年的美国50个州每周经济状况指数的新数据集。我们表明，各州商业周期的长度、深度和时间点存在相当大的异质性。我们评估了各州在国家经济衰退中的作用，并提出了一个综合指标，使我们能够衡量美国经济的整体疲软程度。我们还说明了这些州级指数在量化导致COVID-19大流行造成的经济崩溃的主要力量，以及评估联邦经济政策（如薪资保护计划）有效性方面的实用性。

papers.title: Test Assets and Weak Factors
papers.authors: Stefano Giglio, Dacheng Xiu, Dake Zhang
papers.abstract: Estimation and testing of factor models in asset pricing requires choosing a set of test assets. The choice of test assets determines how well different factor risk premia can be identified: if only few assets are exposed to a factor, that factor is weak, which makes standard estimation and inference incorrect. In other words, the strength of a factor is not an inherent property of the factor: it is a property of the cross-section used in the analysis. We propose a novel way to select assets from a universe of test assets and estimate the risk premium of a factor of interest, as well as the entire stochastic discount factor, that explicitly accounts for weak factors and test assets with highly correlated risk exposures. We refer to our methodology as supervised principal component analysis (SPCA), because it iterates an asset selection step and a principal-component estimation step. We provide the asymptotic properties of our estimator, and compare its limiting behavior with that of alternative estimators proposed in the recent literature, which rely on PCA, Ridge, Lasso, and Partial Least Squares (PLS). We find that the SPCA is superior in the presence of weak factors, both in theory and in finite samples. We illustrate the use of SPCA by applying it to estimate the risk premia of several tradable and nontradable factors, to evaluate asset managers’ performance, and to de-noise asset pricing factors.
papers.zh_title: 测试资产与弱因子
papers.zh_abstract: 在资产定价中，因子模型的估计和检验需要选择一组测试资产。测试资产的选择决定了不同因子风险溢价的可识别程度：如果只有少数资产暴露于某个因子，则该因子是弱的，这会导致标准估计和推断失效。换言之，因子的强度并非其固有属性，而是取决于分析中所使用的横截面。我们提出了一种从测试资产池中选择资产并估计感兴趣因子风险溢价以及整个随机贴现因子的新方法，该方法明确考虑了弱因子和风险暴露高度相关的测试资产。我们将此方法称为监督主成分分析（SPCA），因为它迭代了资产选择步骤和主成分估计步骤。我们给出了估计量的渐近性质，并将其极限行为与近期文献中提出的基于PCA、Ridge、Lasso和偏最小二乘法（PLS）的替代估计量进行了比较。我们发现，无论是在理论上还是在有限样本中，SPCA在存在弱因子的情况下都表现更优。我们通过应用SPCA来估计几个可交易和不可交易因子的风险溢价、评估资产管理者的绩效以及对资产定价因子进行去噪，展示了SPCA的用途。

papers.title: Do Policies to Increase Access to Treatment for Opioid Use Disorder Work?
papers.authors: Eric Barrette, Leemore Dafny, Karen Shen
papers.abstract: Even among commercially-insured individuals, opioid use disorder (OUD) is undertreated in the U.S.: nearly half receive no treatment within 6 months of a new diagnosis. Using a difference-in-differences specification exploiting the extension of insurance parity requirements for substance disorder treatment to small group enrollees in 2014, we find that parity increases utilization of residential treatment but decreases utilization of agonist medications, the standard of care. We find direct interventions to increase access to medication may be more promising: increases in the county-level share of physicians able to prescribe agonists are associated with substitution toward medication-assisted treatment.
papers.zh_title: 增加阿片类药物使用障碍治疗可及性的政策有效吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 即使是在拥有商业保险的个人中，美国对阿片类药物使用障碍（OUD）的治疗也不足：近一半的患者在新诊断后的6个月内未接受任何治疗。我们利用一项双重差分设定，该设定利用了2014年将物质障碍治疗的保险平等要求扩展到小团体参保者的政策，发现平等要求增加了住院治疗的使用，但减少了激动剂药物（标准治疗）的使用。我们发现，直接增加药物可及性的干预措施可能更有前景：县级能够开具激动剂处方的医生比例的增加与向药物辅助治疗的替代相关。

papers.title: A Signal to End Child Marriage: Theory and Experimental Evidence from Bangladesh
papers.authors: Nina Buchmann, Erica M. Field, Rachel Glennerster, Shahana Nazneen, Xiao Yu Wang
papers.abstract: Child marriage remains common even where female schooling and employment opportunities have grown. We introduce a signaling model in which bride type is imperfectly observed but preferred types have lower returns to delaying marriage. We show that in this environment the market might pool on early marriage even when everyone would benefit from delay. In this setting, offering a small incentive can delay marriage of all treated types and untreated non-preferred types, while programs that act directly on norms can unintentionally encourage early marriage. We test these theoretical predictions by experimentally evaluating a financial incentive to delay marriage alongside a girls’ empowerment program designed to shift norms. As predicted, girls eligible for the incentive are 19% less likely to marry underage, as are nonpreferred type women ineligible for the incentive. Meanwhile, the empowerment program was successful in promoting more progressive gender norms but failed to decrease adolescent marriage and increased dowry payments.
papers.zh_title: 终结童婚的信号：来自孟加拉国的理论与实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 即使在女性教育和就业机会增加的地方，童婚仍然普遍存在。我们引入了一个信号模型，其中新娘类型无法被完美观测，但偏好类型从延迟婚姻中获得的回报较低。我们证明，在这种环境下，即使所有人都能从延迟中受益，市场也可能聚集于早婚。在这种情况下，提供小额激励可以延迟所有受处理类型和未受处理的非偏好类型的婚姻，而直接作用于规范的项目则可能无意中鼓励早婚。我们通过实验评估了一项旨在延迟婚姻的财务激励措施，以及一个旨在转变规范的女孩赋权项目，来检验这些理论预测。正如预测的那样，有资格获得激励的女孩早婚的可能性降低了19%，没有资格获得激励的非偏好类型女性也是如此。与此同时，赋权项目成功地促进了更进步的性别规范，但未能减少青少年婚姻，反而增加了嫁妆支付。

papers.title: Trade Policy
papers.authors: Lorenzo Caliendo, Fernando Parro
papers.abstract: This chapter reviews a recent body of theoretical and empirical work that studies the normative and positive aspects of trade policy. We start by presenting reduced-form evidence of the eﬀects of trade policy in the presence of supply-chain linkages, on the short-run and persistent eﬀects of trade policy across local labor markets, and on the eﬀects of trade policy uncertainty on employment and ﬁrms. We describe the shift-share method for trade policy analysis, discuss the interpretation of the estimated eﬀects, and provide a theoretical foundation. We then describe new quantitative frameworks, methods, and data used to study the aggregate and distributional eﬀects of trade policy in general equilibrium. We discuss how to take into account supply-chain linkages, local labor markets, and diﬀerent sources of dynamics. As an illustration, we quantify the aggregate and distributional eﬀects of the 2018 trade war between the United States and its trading partners. Finally, we present recent theoretical insights on optimal unilateral trade policy with ﬁrm and product heterogeneity in the context of large and small open economies with perfectly and imperfectly competitive product markets. We also discuss how optimal trade policy is shaped by the presence of multiple sectors, intermediate goods, and supply-chain linkages. We close the chapter by discussing the scope of future research.
papers.meta: Programs：ITI；JEL：F1, F10, F11, F12, F13, F14, F15, F16, F19
papers.zh_title: 贸易政策
papers.zh_abstract: 本章回顾了近期关于贸易政策规范性与实证性方面的理论与实证研究。我们首先展示了在供应链关联存在的情况下，贸易政策对短期及持续性影响的简化形式证据，这些影响涉及地方劳动力市场以及贸易政策不确定性对就业和企业的作用。我们描述了用于贸易政策分析的份额转移方法，讨论了估计效应的解释，并提供了理论基础。随后，我们介绍了用于研究一般均衡中贸易政策总体与分配效应的新量化框架、方法和数据。我们探讨了如何考虑供应链关联、地方劳动力市场以及不同的动态来源。作为示例，我们量化了2018年美国与其贸易伙伴之间贸易战的总体与分配效应。最后，我们提出了在大型和小型开放经济体中，面对完全竞争与不完全竞争产品市场，考虑企业与产品异质性时的最优单边贸易政策的最新理论见解。我们还讨论了多部门、中间品和供应链关联如何影响最优贸易政策。本章结尾探讨了未来研究的范围。

papers.title: Macroeconomic Misery by Levels of Income in America
papers.authors: Martin Ravallion
papers.abstract: Thirty years of distributional data are used to study the short-term impacts of popular macroeconomic indicators on real household incomes from the poorest to the richest Americans. The appropriate weights on unemployment versus inflation vary across the distribution. The unemployment rate matters at all levels, but especially so for the poorest. Inflation rates matter at middle incomes, though Okun’s famous Misery Index only performs well for the top income groups. GDP growth matters at all levels and proportionately more for the poorest, though only via the unemployment rate. Recessions are poverty-increasing, and skewness-decreasing, but with ambiguous effects on overall inequality.
papers.zh_title: 美国不同收入水平的宏观经济痛苦指数
papers.zh_abstract: 利用三十年的分配数据，研究主流宏观经济指标对从最贫困到最富裕美国居民实际家庭收入的短期影响。失业率与通胀率的适当权重在收入分布中有所不同。失业率对所有收入水平都有影响，但对最贫困群体影响尤为显著。通胀率对中等收入群体有影响，尽管奥肯著名的痛苦指数仅对高收入群体表现良好。GDP增长对所有收入水平都有影响，且对最贫困群体影响比例更大，但这仅通过失业率渠道实现。经济衰退会增加贫困并降低偏度，但对总体不平等的影响不明确。

papers.title: The Damages and Distortions from Discrimination in the Rental Housing Market
papers.authors: Peter Christensen, Christopher Timmins
papers.abstract: By constraining an individual's choice during a search, housing discrimination distorts sorting decisions away from true preferences and results in a ceteris paribus reduction in welfare. This study combines a large-scale field experiment with a residential sorting model to derive utility-theoretic measures of renter welfare loss associated with the constraints imposed by discrimination in the rental housing market. Results from experiments conducted in five cities show that key neighborhood amenities are associated with higher levels of discrimination. Counterfactual simulations based on the sorting model suggest that discrimination imposes damages equivalent to 4.4% and 3.5% of the annual incomes for African American and Hispanic/LatinX renters, respectively. Damages are increasing in income for African American renters, such that impacts become stronger for economically mobile households. Renters of color must make substantial investments in additional search to mitigate the costs of these constraints. We find that a naive model ignoring discrimination constraints yields biased estimates of willingness to pay for key neighborhood amenities.
papers.zh_title: 租赁住房市场歧视造成的损害与扭曲
papers.zh_abstract: 住房歧视在搜索过程中限制了个人的选择，从而扭曲了基于真实偏好的分类决策，并在其他条件不变的情况下导致福利减少。本研究将大规模实地实验与居住分类模型相结合，推导出与租赁住房市场歧视所施加约束相关的租房者福利损失的效用理论度量。在五个城市进行的实验结果表明，关键社区便利设施与更高水平的歧视相关。基于分类模型的反事实模拟表明，歧视对非裔美国人和西班牙裔/拉丁裔租房者造成的损害分别相当于其年收入的4.4%和3.5%。对于非裔美国人租房者，损害随收入增加而增加，因此对经济流动性较强的家庭影响更大。有色人种租房者必须进行大量额外的搜索投资，以减轻这些约束的成本。我们发现，忽略歧视约束的朴素模型会得出对关键社区便利设施支付意愿的有偏估计。

papers.title: Persuading Investors: A Video-Based Study
papers.authors: Allen Hu, Song Ma
papers.abstract: Persuasive communication functions not only through content but also delivery, e.g., facial expression, tone of voice, and diction. This paper examines the persuasiveness of delivery in start-up pitches. Using machine learning (ML) algorithms to process full pitch videos, we quantify persuasion in visual, vocal, and verbal dimensions. Positive (i.e., passionate, warm) pitches increase funding probability. Yet conditional on funding, high-positivity startups underperform. Women are more heavily judged on delivery when evaluating single-gender teams, but they are neglected when co-pitching with men in mixed-gender teams. Using an experiment, we show persuasion delivery works mainly through leading investors to form inaccurate beliefs.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, LS, PR；JEL：C55, D91, G24, G4, G41
papers.zh_title: 说服投资者：一项基于视频的研究
papers.zh_abstract: 有说服力的沟通不仅通过内容发挥作用，还通过表达方式，例如面部表情、语调以及措辞。本文研究了创业推介中表达方式的说服力。利用机器学习算法处理完整的推介视频，我们在视觉、声音和语言维度上量化了说服力。积极（即充满激情、温暖）的推介会增加融资概率。然而，在获得融资的条件下，高积极性的初创企业表现不佳。在评估单一性别团队时，女性在表达方式上受到更严格的评判，但在混合性别团队中与男性共同推介时，她们则被忽视。通过一项实验，我们表明说服性表达主要通过引导投资者形成不准确的信念来发挥作用。

papers.title: Do Urgent Care Centers Reduce Medicare Spending?
papers.authors: Janet Currie, Anastasia Karpova, Dan Zeltzer
papers.abstract: We examine the impact of the opening of a new urgent care center (UCC) on health care costs and the utilization of care among nearby Medicare beneficiaries. We focus on 2006–2016, a period of rapid UCC expansion. We find that total Medicare spending rises when residents of a zip code are first served by a UCC, relative to spending in yet-to-be-served zip codes, while mortality remains flat. We explore mechanisms by looking at categories of spending and by examining utilization. Increases in inpatient visits are the largest contributor to the overall increase in spending, rising by 6.65 percent within six years after UCC entry. The number of emergency room visits that result in a hospital admission also increases by 3.7 percent. In contrast, there is no change in the number of ER visits that do not result in admission to hospital, in visits to physicians outside a UCC, or in imaging and tests. Overall, these results provide little evidence that UCCs replace costly ER visits or that they crowd out visits to patients' regular doctors. Instead, the evidence is consistent with the possibility that UCCs—which are increasingly owned by or contract with hospital systems—induce greater spending on hospital care.
papers.zh_title: 紧急护理中心能否减少医疗保险支出？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了新开设的紧急护理中心对附近医疗保险受益人的医疗成本和服务利用的影响。我们重点关注2006年至2016年这段紧急护理中心快速扩张的时期。我们发现，当一个邮政编码区的居民首次获得紧急护理中心服务时，相对于尚未获得服务的邮政编码区，医疗保险总支出上升，而死亡率保持不变。我们通过考察支出类别和利用情况来探索其机制。住院就诊次数的增加是总支出增加的最大贡献因素，在紧急护理中心进入后的六年内增长了6.65%。导致入院的急诊就诊次数也增加了3.7%。相比之下，未导致入院的急诊就诊次数、紧急护理中心以外的医生就诊次数以及影像和检查次数没有变化。总体而言，这些结果几乎没有证据表明紧急护理中心取代了昂贵的急诊就诊，或者挤出了患者对常规医生的就诊。相反，证据与以下可能性一致：紧急护理中心——越来越多地被医院系统拥有或与之签约——导致了更多的住院护理支出。

papers.title: Growing Pains? A Comment on “Converging to Convergence”
papers.authors: Rohini Pande, Nils T. Enevoldsen
papers.abstract: Early tests of cross-country convergence found evidence only for conditional convergence. In contrast, with more recent data, Kremer, Willis, and You (2021) find evidence that since the mid-1980s there has been a trend towards unconditional convergence culminating in absolute convergence since 2000. Additionally, they find suggestive evidence that one of the major drivers of this trend is an underlying convergence towards development-favored policies. We discuss the implications of this result through the lens of individual welfare and poverty, concluding that the news is not as welcome as it may seem for the world’s poor. We point out that absolute convergence has happened contemporaneously with rising within-country inequality, resulting in more of the world’s poor living in middle-income countries. Next, we argue that domestic redistribution is essential to spread the benefits from industrialization, since the labor share of manufacturing isn’t reaching the heights it did in industrialized countries. Finally, we argue that the democratic institutions that can facilitate this redistribution themselves face headwinds. Democratic backsliding, the Covid-19 pandemic, and a bleak climate outlook all present obstacles to transforming economic growth into economic justice for the poor.
papers.zh_title: 成长的烦恼？对“趋同于收敛”的评论
papers.zh_abstract: 早期的跨国收敛检验仅发现了条件收敛的证据。相比之下，利用更新的数据，Kremer、Willis和You（2021）发现证据表明自20世纪80年代中期以来，存在向无条件收敛的趋势，并最终在2000年后达到绝对收敛。此外，他们发现暗示性证据表明，这一趋势的主要驱动因素之一是向有利于发展的政策的潜在收敛。我们通过个人福利和贫困的视角讨论了这一结果的含义，得出的结论是，对世界贫困人口而言，这一消息并不像看起来那么受欢迎。我们指出，绝对收敛与国内不平等加剧同时发生，导致更多世界贫困人口生活在中等收入国家。其次，我们认为国内再分配对于传播工业化的收益至关重要，因为制造业的劳动力份额并未达到工业化国家曾经的高度。最后，我们认为能够促进这种再分配的民主制度本身也面临阻力。民主倒退、新冠疫情以及黯淡的气候前景，都为将经济增长转化为贫困人口的经济正义设置了障碍。

papers.title: Place-Based Redistribution in Location Choice Models
papers.authors: Morris Davis, Jesse M. Gregory
papers.abstract: In recent location choice models, households randomly vary with respect to their utility of living in a location. We demonstrate the distribution generating this randomness is not identifiable from location choice data and the optimal allocation chosen by a social planner is not identified. We propose an algorithm for setting the distribution generating the random utility across locations that implies a planner will optimally choose no redistribution in the absence of externalities or equity motives between different types of people. Our algorithm preserves a planner's motives to redistribute due to equity considerations between types of people and efficiency in production.
papers.zh_title: 区位选择模型中的基于地点的再分配
papers.zh_abstract: 在最近的区位选择模型中，家庭在居住地效用方面随机变化。我们证明，产生这种随机性的分布无法从区位选择数据中识别，并且社会规划者选择的最优分配也无法识别。我们提出了一种算法，用于设定跨区位产生随机效用的分布，该算法意味着，在没有外部性或不同类型人群之间的公平动机的情况下，规划者将最优地选择不进行再分配。我们的算法保留了规划者因不同类型人群之间的公平考虑以及生产效率而进行再分配的动机。

papers.title: Instrumental Variable Identification of Dynamic Variance Decompositions
papers.authors: Mikkel Plagborg-Møller, Christian K. Wolf
papers.abstract: Macroeconomists increasingly use external sources of exogenous variation for causal inference. However, unless such external instruments (proxies) capture the underlying shock without measurement error, existing methods are silent on the importance of that shock for macroeconomic fluctuations. We show that, in a general moving average model with external instruments, variance decompositions for the instrumented shock are interval-identified, with informative bounds. Various additional restrictions guarantee point identification of both variance and historical decompositions. Unlike SVAR analysis, our methods do not require invertibility. Applied to U.S. data, they give a tight upper bound on the importance of monetary shocks for inflation dynamics.
papers.zh_title: 动态方差分解的工具变量识别
papers.zh_abstract: 宏观经济学家越来越多地使用外部来源的外生变异进行因果推断。然而，除非这些外部工具（代理变量）能够无测量误差地捕捉到潜在冲击，否则现有方法无法说明该冲击对宏观经济波动的重要性。我们证明，在一个具有外部工具的一般移动平均模型中，被工具化冲击的方差分解是区间识别的，并具有信息量的界限。各种附加约束保证了方差分解和历史分解的点识别。与SVAR分析不同，我们的方法不需要可逆性。应用于美国数据，我们的方法为货币冲击对通胀动态的重要性提供了一个严格的上界。

papers.title: Centralized Matching with Incomplete Information
papers.authors: Marcelo A. Fernandez, Kirill Rudov, Leeat Yariv
papers.abstract: We study the impacts of incomplete information on centralized one-to-one matching markets. We focus on the commonly used Deferred Acceptance mechanism (Gale and Shapley, 1962). We show that many complete-information results are fragile to a small infusion of uncertainty about others' preferences.
papers.zh_title: 不完全信息下的集中匹配
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了不完全信息对集中式一对一匹配市场的影响。我们重点关注常用的延迟接受机制（Gale and Shapley, 1962）。我们表明，许多完全信息下的结果在关于他人偏好的少量不确定性注入下是脆弱的。

papers.title: Communication within Firms: Evidence from CEO Turnovers
papers.authors: Stephen Michael Impink, Andrea Prat, Raffaella Sadun
papers.abstract: This paper uses novel, firm-level communication measures derived from communications metadata several months before and after a CEO transition for 102 firms to study whether and how this organizational event is reflected in employees’ communication flows. We find that CEO turnover is associated with an initial decrease in intra-firm communication (-10% relative to the pre-CEO transition period), followed by a significant increase approximately five months after the CEO turnover (+33%). The increase in communications is driven primarily by inter-departmental (i.e. communication involving employees of different functional departments) and vertical (i.e. communication among managers and employees) communication flows. Firms where the medium-run increase in communication is higher experience greater increases in market returns and revenues in the year following the CEO transition.
papers.zh_title: 企业内部沟通：来自CEO更替的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用来自102家公司在CEO更替前后几个月的通信元数据得出的新颖的企业层面沟通度量，研究这一组织事件是否以及如何反映在员工的沟通流中。我们发现，CEO更替与企业内部沟通的初始下降相关（相对于CEO更替前时期下降10%），随后在CEO更替后大约五个月出现显著增加（增加33%）。沟通的增加主要由跨部门（即涉及不同职能部门员工的沟通）和纵向（即管理层与员工之间的沟通）沟通流驱动。在CEO更替后的一年中，沟通中期增长较高的企业经历了更大的市场回报和收入增长。

papers.title: The Decline of Drudgery and the Paradox of Hard Work
papers.authors: Brendan Epstein, Miles S. Kimball
papers.abstract: We develop a theory focusing on general equilibrium and long-run macroeconomic consequences of trends in job utility—the process benefits and costs of work. Given secular increases in job utility, work hours can remain approximately constant over time even if the income effect of higher wages on labor supply exceeds the substitution effect. Secular improvements in job utility can be substantial relative to welfare gains from ordinary technological progress. These two implications are connected by an equation flowing from optimal hours choices: improvements in job utility that have a significant effect on labor supply tend to have large welfare effects.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, LS；JEL：J22, J24, J28, J31, O4
papers.zh_title: 苦役的衰退与努力工作的悖论
papers.zh_abstract: 我们发展了一个理论，聚焦于工作效用（工作的过程收益和成本）趋势的一般均衡和长期宏观经济后果。给定工作效用的长期增长，即使更高工资对劳动供给的收入效应超过替代效应，工作时间也可以随时间大致保持不变。工作效用的长期改善相对于普通技术进步的福利收益可能是显著的。这两个含义通过一个源于最优工作时间选择的等式联系起来：对劳动供给有显著影响的工作效用改善往往具有较大的福利效应。

papers.title: Biden, COVID and Mental Health in America
papers.authors: David G. Blanchflower, Alex Bryson
papers.abstract: Using US Census Household Pulse Survey data for the period April 2020 to June 2021 we track the evolution of the mental health of nearly 2.3 million Americans during the COVID pandemic. We find anxiety, depression and worry peaked in November 2020, coinciding with the Presidential election. The taking of prescription drugs for mental health conditions peaked two weeks later in December 2020. Mental health improved subsequently such that by April 2021 it was better than it had been a year previously. The probability of having been diagnosed with COVID did not rise significantly in the first half of 2021 but COVID infection rates were higher among the young than the old. COVID diagnoses were significantly lower in States that had voted for Biden in the Presidential Election. The probability of vaccination rose with age, was considerably higher in Biden states, and rose precipitously over the period among the young and old. Anxiety was higher among people in Biden states, whether they had been diagnosed or not, and whether they were vaccinated or not. The association between anxiety and depression and having had COVID was not significant in Biden or Trump states but being vaccinated was associated with lower anxiety and depression, with the effect being larger in Biden states. Whilst being in paid work was associated with lower anxiety, worry and depression and was associated with higher vaccination rates, it also increased the probability of having had COVID.
papers.zh_title: 拜登、新冠疫情与美国心理健康
papers.zh_abstract: 利用2020年4月至2021年6月期间的美国人口普查家庭脉搏调查数据，我们追踪了近230万美国人在新冠疫情期间心理健康的演变。我们发现，焦虑、抑郁和担忧在2020年11月达到顶峰，与总统选举时间吻合。因心理健康状况服用处方药在两周后的2020年12月达到顶峰。此后心理健康状况有所改善，到2021年4月，情况比一年前更好。在2021年上半年，被诊断出患有新冠的概率并未显著上升，但年轻人的新冠感染率高于老年人。在总统选举中投票给拜登的州，新冠诊断率显著较低。疫苗接种概率随年龄增长而上升，在拜登州显著更高，并且在年轻人和老年人中在此期间急剧上升。在拜登州，无论是否被诊断出新冠，也无论是否接种疫苗，人们的焦虑程度都更高。在拜登州或特朗普州，焦虑和抑郁与曾患新冠之间的关联并不显著，但接种疫苗与较低的焦虑和抑郁相关，且这种效应在拜登州更大。虽然有偿工作与较低的焦虑、担忧和抑郁相关，并与更高的疫苗接种率相关，但它也增加了曾患新冠的概率。

papers.title: The IO of Selection Markets
papers.authors: Liran Einav, Amy Finkelstein, Neale Mahoney
papers.abstract: This is an invited chapter for the forthcoming Volume 4 of the Handbook of Industrial Organization. We focus on "selection markets," which cover markets in which consumers vary not only in how much they are willing to pay for a product but also in how costly they are to the seller. The chapter tries to organize the recent wave of IO-related papers on selection markets, which has largely focused on insurance and credit markets. We provide a common framework, terminology, and notation that can be used to understand many of these papers, and that we hope can be usefully applied going forward.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, AP, CF, DEV, EH, IO, LE, LS, PE, PR；JEL：G22, L00, L13
papers.zh_title: 选择市场的产业组织
papers.zh_abstract: 这是为即将出版的《产业组织手册》第4卷撰写的一章。我们聚焦于“选择市场”，这类市场的特点是消费者不仅在愿意为产品支付多少上存在差异，而且在他们对卖方的成本高低上也存在差异。本章试图梳理近期关于选择市场的产业组织相关论文，这些论文主要关注保险和信贷市场。我们提供了一个共同的框架、术语和符号，可用于理解这些论文中的许多内容，并希望未来能够有效地应用。

papers.title: Is Recreational Marijuana a Gateway to Harder Drug Use and Crime?
papers.authors: Joseph J. Sabia, Dhaval M. Dave, Fawaz Alotaibi, Daniel I. Rees
papers.abstract: Recreational marijuana laws (RMLs), which legalize the possession of small quantities of marijuana for recreational use, have been adopted by 18 states and the District of Columbia. Opponents argue that RML-induced increases in marijuana consumption will serve as a “gateway” to harder drug use and crime. Using data covering the period 2000-2019 from a variety of national sources (the National Survey of Drug Use and Health, the Uniform Crime Reports, the National Vital Statistics System, and the Treatment Episode Data Set) this study is the first to comprehensively examine the effects of legalizing recreational marijuana on hard drug use, arrests, drug overdose deaths, suicides, and treatment admissions. Our analyses show that RMLs increase adult marijuana use and reduce drug-related arrests over an average post-legalization window of three to four years. There is little evidence to suggest that RML-induced increases in marijuana consumption encourage the use of harder substances or violent criminal activity, and some evidence that RMLs may aid in reducing opioid-related mortality.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LE, LS, PE；JEL：I12, I18, K14
papers.zh_title: 娱乐性大麻是通往更硬毒品和犯罪的敲门砖吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 娱乐性大麻法（RMLs）允许为娱乐目的持有少量大麻，已被18个州和哥伦比亚特区采纳。反对者认为，RML导致的大麻消费增加将成为通往更硬毒品使用和犯罪的“敲门砖”。利用2000-2019年期间来自多个全国性来源（全国药物使用与健康调查、统一犯罪报告、全国生命统计系统和治疗事件数据集）的数据，本研究首次全面考察了娱乐性大麻合法化对硬毒品使用、逮捕、药物过量死亡、自杀和治疗入院的影响。我们的分析表明，在平均三到四年的合法化后窗口期内，RMLs增加了成人使用大麻并减少了与毒品相关的逮捕。几乎没有证据表明RML导致的大麻消费增加会鼓励使用更硬物质或暴力犯罪活动，并且有一些证据表明RMLs可能有助于减少与阿片类药物相关的死亡率。

papers.title: Do State SNAP Policies Influence Program Participation among Seniors?
papers.authors: Jordan W. Jones, Charles J. Courtemanche, Augustine Denteh, James Marton, Rusty Tchernis
papers.abstract: Senior participation in the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) has traditionally been lower than other groups among those eligible, with historical estimates below 50 percent. We examine the impacts of state SNAP policies on program participation among low-income senior (age 60 and older) and non-senior households using data from the 2001-2014 December Current Population Survey Food Security Supplement.
