Our results suggest that policies designed to expand SNAP eligibility modestly increased participation among seniors but led to larger increases among non-seniors. In contrast, we find little evidence of effects of policies related to transaction costs, stigma, or outreach on either group.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EH, PE；JEL：I32, I38, J14, Q18
papers.zh_title: 州SNAP政策是否影响老年人的项目参与？
papers.zh_abstract: 在符合条件的群体中，老年人参与补充营养援助计划（SNAP）的比例传统上低于其他群体，历史估计值低于50%。我们利用2001-2014年12月当前人口调查食品安全补充数据，考察了州SNAP政策对低收入老年（60岁及以上）和非老年家庭项目参与的影响。我们的结果表明，旨在扩大SNAP资格的政策适度增加了老年人的参与，但导致非老年人的参与增加更大。相比之下，我们发现与交易成本、污名化或外展相关的政策对这两个群体几乎没有影响。

papers.title: Creating Controversy in Proxy Voting Advice
papers.authors: Andrey Malenko, Nadya Malenko, Chester S. Spatt
papers.abstract: We analyze the design of recommendations (available to all shareholders) and research reports (available only to subscribers) by a proxy advisor, who maximizes profits from selling information to shareholders. We show that the advisor benefits from biasing its recommendations against the a priori more likely alternative, thereby “creating controversy” for the vote. In contrast, it serves the advisor’s interest to produce precise and unbiased research reports. Our results help reinterpret empirical patterns of shareholders’ voting behavior, suggesting that proxy advisors’ recommendations may not be a suitable benchmark for evaluating shareholders’ votes. Our model also rationalizes the one-size-fits-all approach in recommendations.
papers.zh_title: 在代理投票建议中制造争议
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了一家代理顾问公司（向所有股东提供建议，仅向订阅者提供研究报告）的设计，该公司通过向股东出售信息来最大化利润。我们表明，顾问公司通过使其建议偏向于先验可能性较低的选项而受益，从而为投票“制造争议”。相比之下，制作精确且无偏见的研究报告符合顾问公司的利益。我们的结果有助于重新解释股东投票行为的经验模式，表明代理顾问的建议可能不是评估股东投票的合适基准。我们的模型也合理化了建议中“一刀切”的方法。

papers.title: Business Groups: Panics, Runs, Organ Banks and Zombie Firms
papers.authors: Asli M. Colpan, Randall Morck
papers.abstract: Business groups often contain banks or near banks that can protect group firms from economic shocks. A group bank subordinate to other group firms can become an “organ bank” that selflessly bails out distressed group firms and anticipates a government bailout. A group bank subordinating other group firms can extend loans to suppress their risk-taking to default risk, preserving risk-averse low-productivity zombie firms. Actual business groups can fall between these polar cases. Subordinated group banks magnify risk-taking; subordinating banks suppress risk-taking; yet both distortions promote business group firms’ survival. Limiting intragroup income and risk shifting, severing banks from business groups, or dismantling business groups may mitigate both distortions; but also limits business groups’ internal markets, thought important where external markets work poorly.
papers.zh_title: 企业集团：恐慌、挤兑、器官银行与僵尸企业
papers.zh_abstract: 企业集团通常包含银行或类银行机构，这些机构能够保护集团内企业免受经济冲击。一个从属于其他集团企业的集团银行可能成为“器官银行”，无私地救助陷入困境的集团企业，并预期政府会提供救助。一个使其他集团企业从属于自身的集团银行可以发放贷款以抑制其风险承担至违约风险水平，从而保留风险规避的低生产率僵尸企业。实际的企业集团可能介于这两种极端情况之间。从属型集团银行放大了风险承担；主导型银行则抑制了风险承担；然而这两种扭曲都促进了企业集团内企业的生存。限制集团内收入和风险转移、将银行与企业集团分离或解散企业集团，可能缓解这两种扭曲；但也会限制企业集团的内部市场，而内部市场在外部市场运行不佳时被认为至关重要。

papers.title: Financial Dollarization: Efficient Intranational Risk Sharing or Prescription for Disaster?
papers.authors: Lawrence Christiano, Hüsnü Dalgic, Armen Nurbekyan
papers.abstract: A large literature focuses on the implications of the dollar for international risk sharing. In contrast, we find evidence that most of the risk sharing associated with the dollar is intranational rather than international. It is sometimes suggested that the insurance benefits of the dollar are undone by an increased risk of financial fragility. We display empirical evidence that this concern is over-stated. We develop a simple model formalizing our findings about the insurance role of the dollar, which is consistent with the key cross-country facts on interest rate differentials, deposit dollarization and exchange rate depreciations in recessions.
papers.zh_title: 金融美元化：有效的国内风险分担还是灾难的预兆？
papers.zh_abstract: 大量文献关注美元对国际风险分担的影响。相比之下，我们发现证据表明，与美元相关的风险分担大部分是国内而非国际的。有时有人提出，美元的保险收益被金融脆弱性风险的增加所抵消。我们展示的经验证据表明，这种担忧被夸大了。我们开发了一个简单模型，将我们关于美元保险作用的发现形式化，该模型与利率差异、存款美元化和经济衰退时期汇率贬值的关键跨国事实一致。

papers.title: Long-Term Resource Adequacy in Wholesale Electricity Markets with Significant Intermittent Renewables
papers.authors: Frank A. Wolak
papers.abstract: Growing amounts of intermittent renewable generation capacity substantially increases the complexity of determining whether sufficient energy will be available to meet hourly demands throughout the year. As the events of August 2020 in California and February 2021 in Texas demonstrate, supply shortfalls can have large economic and public health consequences. An empirical analysis of these two events demonstrates that similar supply shortfalls are likely to occur in the future without a paradigm shift in how long-term resource adequacy is determined for an electricity supply industry with significant intermittent renewables. An alternative approach to determining long-term resource adequacy that explicitly recognizes the characteristics of different generation technologies is outlined and its properties explored relative to current approaches.
papers.zh_title: 具有大量间歇性可再生能源的批发电力市场中的长期资源充足性
papers.zh_abstract: 日益增长的间歇性可再生能源发电容量大大增加了确定全年是否有足够能源满足每小时需求的复杂性。正如2020年8月加利福尼亚州和2021年2月德克萨斯州的事件所表明的那样，供应短缺可能产生巨大的经济和公共卫生后果。对这两起事件的实证分析表明，如果不对如何为具有大量间歇性可再生能源的电力供应行业确定长期资源充足性进行范式转变，类似的供应短缺未来很可能再次发生。本文概述了一种确定长期资源充足性的替代方法，该方法明确承认不同发电技术的特性，并探讨了其相对于当前方法的特性。

papers.title: Business Cycles and Environmental Policy: Literature Review and Policy Implications
papers.authors: Barbara Annicchiarico, Stefano Carattini, Carolyn Fischer, Garth Heutel
papers.abstract: We study the relationship between business cycles and the design and effects of environmental policies, particularly those with economy-wide significance like climate policies. First, we provide a brief review of the literature related to this topic, from initial explorations using real business cycle models to New Keynesian extensions, open-economy variations, and issues of monetary policy and financial regulations. Next, we provide a list of the main findings that emerge from this literature that are potentially most relevant to policymakers, including the impacts of policy on volatility and how to design policy to adjust to cycles. Finally, we propose several important remaining research questions.
papers.zh_title: 经济周期与环境政策：文献综述与政策启示
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了经济周期与环境政策（尤其是具有经济全局意义的气候政策）的设计和效果之间的关系。首先，我们简要回顾了与该主题相关的文献，从使用真实经济周期模型的初步探索，到新凯恩斯主义扩展、开放经济变体，以及货币政策和金融监管问题。接下来，我们列出了该文献中得出的、可能对政策制定者最具相关性的主要发现，包括政策对波动性的影响以及如何设计政策以适应周期。最后，我们提出了几个重要的待研究问题。

papers.title: Career Effects of Mental Health
papers.authors: Barbara Biasi, Michael S. Dahl, Petra Moser
papers.abstract: This paper investigates the career effects of mental health, focusing on depression, schizophrenia, and bipolar disorder (BD). Individual-level registry data from Denmark show that these disorders carry large earnings penalties, ranging from 34 percent for depression and 38 percent for BD to 74 percent for schizophrenia. To investigate the causal effects of mental health on a person’s career, we exploit the approval of lithium as a maintenance treatment for BD in 1976. Baseline estimates compare career outcomes for people with and without access in their 20s, the typical age of onset for BD. These estimates show that access to treatment eliminates one third of the earnings penalty associated with BD and greatly reduces the risks of low or no earnings. Importantly, access to treatment closes more than half of the disability risk associated with BD.
papers.zh_title: 心理健康的职业影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了心理健康的职业影响，重点关注抑郁症、精神分裂症和双相情感障碍。来自丹麦的个人层面登记数据显示，这些疾病带来了巨大的收入惩罚，从抑郁症的34%和双相情感障碍的38%到精神分裂症的74%不等。为了调查心理健康对个人职业的因果影响，我们利用了1976年锂作为双相情感障碍维持治疗药物的获批。基线估计比较了在20多岁（双相情感障碍的典型发病年龄）时能否获得治疗的人群的职业结果。这些估计表明，获得治疗消除了与双相情感障碍相关的三分之一的收入惩罚，并大大降低了低收入或无收入的风险。重要的是，获得治疗弥补了与双相情感障碍相关的超过一半的残疾风险。

papers.title: The Evolution from Life Insurance to Financial Engineering
papers.authors: Ralph S. J. Koijen, Motohiro Yogo
papers.abstract: Since the mid-1980s, the share of household net worth intermediated by US ﬁnancial institutions has shifted from deﬁned beneﬁt plans to life insurers and deﬁned contribution plans. Life insurers have primarily grown through variable annuities, which are mutual funds with longevity insurance, a potential tax advantage, and minimum return guarantees. The minimum return guarantees change the primary function of life insurers from traditional insurance to ﬁnancial engineering. Variable annuity insurers are exposed to interest and equity risk mismatch and their stock returns were especially low during the COVID-19 crisis. We consider regulatory changes, such as more detailed ﬁnancial disclosure and standardized stress tests, to monitor potential risk mismatch and to ensure stability of the insurance sector.
papers.zh_title: 从人寿保险到金融工程的演变
papers.zh_abstract: 自20世纪80年代中期以来，由美国金融机构中介的家庭净资产份额已从固定收益计划转向人寿保险公司和固定缴款计划。人寿保险公司主要通过可变年金增长，可变年金是带有长寿保险、潜在税收优势和最低收益保证的共同基金。最低收益保证将人寿保险公司的首要功能从传统保险转变为金融工程。可变年金保险公司面临利率和股权风险错配，其股票回报在COVID-19危机期间尤其低。我们考虑监管变革，例如更详细的财务披露和标准化压力测试，以监控潜在的风险错配并确保保险部门的稳定性。

papers.title: Do Collateral Sanctions Work? Evidence from the IRS’ Passport Certification and Revocation Process
papers.authors: Paul R. Organ, Alex Ruda, Joel Slemrod, Alex Turk
papers.abstract: Penalties for tax evasion are typically financial, but many jurisdictions also utilize collateral sanctions that deny access to some government-provided service. To learn about the effectiveness of such penalties, we examine a U.S. policy restricting passport access for taxpayers with substantial tax debt, known as “certification.” We find an immediate and strong positive effect on compliance actions when a passport request is denied. We then take advantage of randomization during the policy rollout to identify the direct compliance effect of certification, and find smaller but non-trivial effects whose heterogeneity is consistent with measures of taxpayers’ value of having a passport.
papers.zh_title: 附带制裁有效吗？来自国税局护照认证和撤销程序的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 逃税的处罚通常是经济性的，但许多司法管辖区也利用附带制裁，拒绝提供某种政府服务。为了了解此类处罚的有效性，我们研究了一项美国政策，该政策限制有大量税务债务的纳税人使用护照，即所谓的“认证”。我们发现，当护照申请被拒绝时，对合规行为有直接且强烈的正向影响。然后，我们利用政策推广过程中的随机化来识别认证的直接合规效应，并发现了较小但不可忽视的影响，其异质性与纳税人拥有护照价值的衡量指标一致。

papers.title: When Is Tinkering with Safety Net Programs Harmful to Beneficiaries?
papers.authors: Jeffrey Clemens, Michael J. Wither
papers.abstract: Interactions between redistributive policies can confront low-income households with complicated choices. We study one such interaction, namely the relationship between Medicaid eligibility thresholds and the minimum wage. A minimum wage increase reduces the number of hours a low-skilled individual can work while retaining Medicaid eligibility. We show that the empirical and welfare implications of this interaction can depend crucially on the relevance of labor market frictions. Absent frictions, affected workers may maintain Medicaid eligibility through small reductions in hours of work. With frictions, affected workers may lose Medicaid eligibility unless they leave their initial job. Empirically, we find that workers facing this scenario became less likely to participate in Medicaid, less likely to work, and more likely to spend time looking for new jobs, including search while employed. The observed outcomes suggest that low-skilled workers face substantial labor market frictions. Because adjustment is costly, tinkering with safety net program parameters that determine the location of program eligibility notches can be harmful to beneficiaries.
papers.zh_title: 何时调整安全网计划对受益者有害？
papers.zh_abstract: 再分配政策之间的相互作用可能使低收入家庭面临复杂的选择。我们研究了一种这样的相互作用，即医疗补助资格门槛与最低工资之间的关系。最低工资的提高减少了低技能个人在保持医疗补助资格的同时可以工作的小时数。我们表明，这种相互作用的实证和福利影响可能关键取决于劳动力市场摩擦的相关性。在没有摩擦的情况下，受影响的工人可能通过小幅减少工作时间来维持医疗补助资格。在有摩擦的情况下，受影响的工人可能失去医疗补助资格，除非他们离开最初的工作。实证上，我们发现面临这种情况的工人参与医疗补助的可能性降低，工作的可能性降低，并且更有可能花时间寻找新工作，包括在职搜索。观察到的结果表明，低技能工人面临巨大的劳动力市场摩擦。由于调整成本高昂，调整决定计划资格门槛位置的安全网计划参数可能对受益者有害。

papers.title: Household Financial Transaction Data
papers.authors: Scott R. Baker, Lorenz Kueng
papers.abstract: The growth of the availability and use of detailed household financial transaction microdata has dramatically expanded the ability of researchers to understand both household decision-making as well as aggregate fluctuations across a wide range of fields. This class of transaction data is derived from a myriad of sources including financial institutions, FinTech apps, and payment intermediaries. We review how these detailed data have been utilized in finance and economics research and the benefits they enable beyond more traditional measures of income, spending, and wealth. We discuss the future potential for this flexible class of data in firm-focused research, real-time policy analysis, and macro statistics.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, PE；JEL：C81, D14, G5, H31
papers.zh_title: 家庭金融交易数据
papers.zh_abstract: 详细家庭金融交易微观数据的可用性和使用量的增长，极大地扩展了研究人员理解家庭决策以及跨广泛领域的总体波动的能力。这类交易数据来源于多种渠道，包括金融机构、金融科技应用程序和支付中介。我们回顾了这些详细数据如何在金融和经济学研究中被利用，以及它们相对于传统的收入、支出和财富衡量标准所带来的优势。我们讨论了这类灵活数据在企业重点研究、实时政策分析和宏观统计中的未来潜力。

papers.title: Geopolitics and International Trade Infrastructure
papers.authors: Sebastian Galiani, José Manuel Paz y Miño, Gustavo Torrens
papers.abstract: We develop a simple (incumbent versus entrant) strategic deterrence model to study the economic and geopolitical interactions underlying a strategic international activity, such as trade-related infrastructure projects like the Panama Canal. We study the incentives for global geopolitical players to support allied satellite countries where the strategic activity takes place or could potentially be initiated. We show that even if no effective competitor emerges, the appearance of a geopolitical challenger capable of credibly supporting the entrant has a pro-competition economic effect which benefits consumers all over the world. Thus, we provide a mechanism through which geopolitical rivalry between global powers leads to better economic outcomes for the global economy (i.e., less market power in the provision of international trade-related infrastructure). This contrasts with previous research on politics and market power which emphasizes the negative effects of political interference as well as research on international relations which often highlights the negative global effects of rising geopolitical tensions between an established power and a emerging challenger.
papers.zh_title: 地缘政治与国际贸易基础设施
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个简单的（在位者与进入者）战略威慑模型，以研究支撑战略性国际活动（如巴拿马运河等贸易相关基础设施项目）的经济和地缘政治互动。我们研究了全球地缘政治参与者支持其盟友卫星国（这些国家是战略活动发生地或可能启动地）的激励。我们表明，即使没有有效的竞争者出现，一个能够可信地支持进入者的地缘政治挑战者的出现，也会产生有利于竞争的经济效应，使全球消费者受益。因此，我们提供了一个机制，通过该机制，全球大国之间的地缘政治竞争为全球经济带来更好的经济结果（即在提供国际贸易相关基础设施方面减少市场力量）。这与先前关于政治与市场力量的研究（强调政治干预的负面影响）以及国际关系研究（通常强调现有大国与新兴挑战者之间地缘政治紧张局势升级对全球的负面影响）形成对比。

papers.title: Unobserved Heterogeneity, State Dependence, and Health Plan Choices
papers.authors: Ariel Pakes, Jack R. Porter, Mark Shepard, Sophie Calder-Wang
papers.abstract: We provide a new method to analyze discrete choice models with state dependence and individual-by-product fixed effects, and use it to analyze consumer choices in the policy-relevant environment of a subsidized health insurance exchange. Moment inequalities are used to distinguish state dependence from consumers’ switching choices in response to changes in product attributes. We infer much smaller switching costs on the health insurance exchange than is inferred from standard logit and/or random effects methods. A counterfactual policy evaluation illustrates that the policy implications of this difference can be substantive.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, IO, PE；JEL：C13, D12, I11, L60, M31
papers.zh_title: 未观测到的异质性、状态依赖性与健康保险计划选择
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供了一种新方法来分析具有状态依赖性和个体-产品固定效应的离散选择模型，并用它来分析消费者在政策相关的补贴健康保险交易所环境中的选择。我们使用矩不等式来区分状态依赖性与消费者因产品属性变化而做出的转换选择。我们推断出健康保险交易所的转换成本远低于标准Logit和/或随机效应方法所推断的结果。一项反事实政策评估表明，这种差异的政策含义可能是实质性的。

papers.title: You Can’t Handle The Truth: The Effects Of The Post-9/11 Gi Bill On Higher Education And Earnings
papers.authors: Andrew Barr, Laura Kawano, Bruce Sacerdote, William Skimmyhorn, Michael Stevens
papers.abstract: The Post 9/11 GI Bill (PGIB) is among the largest and most generous college subsidies enacted thus far in the U.S. We examine the impact of the PGIB on veterans’ college-going, degree completion, federal education tax benefit utilization, and long run earnings. Among veterans potentially induced to enroll, the introduction of the PGIB raised college enrollment by 0.17 years and B.A. completion by 1.2 percentage points (on a base of 9 percent). But, the PGIB reduced average annual earnings nine years after separation from the Army by $900 (on a base of $32,000). Years enrolled effects are larger and earnings effects more negative for veterans with lower AFQT scores and those who were less occupationally skilled. Under a variety of conservative assumptions, veterans are unlikely to recoup these reduced earnings during their working careers. All veterans who were already enrolled in college at the time of bill passage increase their months of schooling, but only for those in public institutions did this translate into increases in bachelor’s degree attainment and longer-run earnings. For specific groups of students, large subsidies can modestly help degree completion but harm long run earnings due to lost labor market experience.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：I26, J0, J01, J24, J38
papers.zh_title: 你无法承受真相：9/11后《退伍军人权利法案》对高等教育和收入的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 9/11后《退伍军人权利法案》（PGIB）是美国迄今为止颁布的最大、最慷慨的大学补贴之一。我们研究了PGIB对退伍军人大学入学、学位完成、联邦教育税收优惠利用以及长期收入的影响。在可能被诱导入学的退伍军人中，PGIB的引入使大学入学率提高了0.17年，学士学位完成率提高了1.2个百分点（基数为9%）。但是，PGIB使退伍军人从陆军退役九年后的平均年收入减少了900美元（基数为32,000美元）。对于AFQT分数较低和职业技能较低的退伍军人，入学年限效应更大，收入效应更负面。在各种保守假设下，退伍军人不太可能在其职业生涯中弥补这些减少的收入。所有在法案通过时已入学的退伍军人都增加了在校月数，但只有公立院校的退伍军人将其转化为学士学位获得率和长期收入的增加。对于特定学生群体，大额补贴可以适度帮助学位完成，但由于失去劳动力市场经验，会损害长期收入。

papers.title: Regulated Revenues and Hospital Behavior: Evidence from a Medicare Overhaul
papers.authors: Tal Gross, Adam Sacarny, Maggie Shi, David Silver
papers.abstract: We study a 2008 policy reform in which Medicare revised its hospital payment system to better reflect patients' severity of illness. We construct a simulated instrument that predicts a hospital's policy-induced change in reimbursement using pre-reform patients and post-reform rules. The reform led to large persistent changes in Medicare payment rates across hospitals. Hospitals that faced larger gains in Medicare reimbursement increased the volume of Medicare patients they treated. The estimates imply a volume elasticity of 1.2. To accommodate greater volume, hospitals increased nurse employment, but also lowered length of stay, with ambiguous effects on quality.
papers.zh_title: 受监管收入与医院行为：来自医疗保险改革的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了2008年的一项政策改革，其中医疗保险修订了其医院支付系统，以更好地反映患者的疾病严重程度。我们构建了一个模拟工具变量，利用改革前的患者和改革后的规则来预测医院因政策引起的报销变化。该改革导致不同医院之间医疗保险支付率发生了巨大且持续的变化。面临医疗保险报销增长更大的医院增加了其治疗的医疗保险患者数量。估计结果显示出1.2的数量弹性。为了容纳更大的患者数量，医院增加了护士雇佣，但也缩短了住院时间，这对质量产生了不确定的影响。

papers.title: Task-Based Discrimination
papers.authors: Erik Hurst, Yona Rubinstein, Kazuatsu Shimizu
papers.abstract: Why did the Black-White wage gap converge from 1960 to 1980 and why has it stagnated since? To answer this question, we introduce a unified model that integrates notions of both taste-based and statistical discrimination into a task-based model of occupational sorting. At the heart of our framework is the idea that discrimination varies by the task requirement of each job. We use this framework to identify and quantify the role of trends in race-specific factors and changing task prices in explaining the evolution of the Black-White wage gap since 1960. In doing so, we highlight a new task measure - Contact tasks – which measures the extent to which individuals interact with others as part of their job. We provide evidence that changes in the racial gap in Contact tasks serves as a good proxy for changes in taste-based discrimination over time. We find that taste-based discrimination has fallen and racial skill gaps have narrowed over the last sixty years in the United States. However, since the 1980s, the effect of declining racial skill gaps and discrimination on the Black-White wage gap were offset by the increasing returns to Abstract tasks which, on average, favored White workers relative to Black workers.
papers.zh_title: 基于任务的歧视
papers.zh_abstract: 为什么黑人与白人之间的工资差距在1960年至1980年间趋于收敛，而此后却停滞不前？为了回答这个问题，我们引入了一个统一模型，将基于偏好的歧视和统计歧视的概念整合到一个基于任务的职业分类模型中。我们框架的核心是，歧视因每项工作的任务要求而异。我们利用这个框架来识别和量化种族特定因素趋势和变化的任务价格在解释自1960年以来黑人与白人工资差距演变中的作用。在此过程中，我们强调了一个新的任务衡量指标——接触性任务，它衡量了个体在工作中与他人互动的程度。我们提供的证据表明，接触性任务种族差距的变化可以作为随时间变化的基于偏好的歧视的良好代理变量。我们发现，在过去六十年中，美国的基于偏好的歧视有所下降，种族技能差距有所缩小。然而，自1980年代以来，种族技能差距缩小和歧视减少对黑人与白人工资差距的影响，被抽象任务回报率的增加所抵消，而抽象任务总体上更有利于白人工人而非黑人工人。

papers.title: Doctors' and Nurses' Social Media Ads Reduced Holiday Travel and COVID-19 Infections: A Cluster Randomized Controlled Trial
papers.authors: Emily Breza, Fatima Cody Stanford, Marcella Alsan, Burak Alsan, Abhijit Banerjee, Arun G. Chandrasekhar, Sarah Eichmeyer, Traci Glushko, Paul Goldsmith-Pinkham, Kelly Holland, Emily Hoppe, Mohit Karnani, Sarah Liegl, Tristan Loisel, Lucy Ogbu-Nwobodo, Benjamin A. Olken, Carlos Torres, Pierre-Luc Vautrey, Erica Warner, Susan Wootton, Esther Duflo
papers.abstract: During the COVID-19 epidemic, many health professionals started using mass communication on social media to relay critical information and persuade individuals to adopt preventative health behaviors. Our group of clinicians and nurses developed and recorded short video messages to encourage viewers to stay home for the Thanksgiving and Christmas Holidays. We then conducted a two-stage clustered randomized controlled trial in 820 counties (covering 13\nStates) in the United States of a large-scale Facebook ad campaign disseminating these messages. In the first level of randomization, we randomly divided the counties into two groups: high intensity and low intensity. In the second level, we randomly assigned zip codes to either treatment or control such that 75% of zip codes in high intensity counties received the treatment, while 25% of zip codes in low intensity counties received the treatment. In each treated zip code, we sent the ad to as many Facebook subscribers as possible (11,954,109 users received at least one ad at Thanksgiving and 23,302,290 users received at least one ad at Christmas). The first primary outcome was aggregate holiday travel, measured using mobile phone location data, available at the county level: we find that average distance travelled in high-intensity counties changed by -0.993 percentage points (95% CI -1.616, -0.371, p-value 0.002) the three days before each holiday. The second primary outcome was COVID-19 infection at the zip-code level: COVID-19 infections recorded in the two-week period starting five days post-holiday declined by 3.5 percent (adjusted 95% CI [-6.2 percent, -0.7 percent], p-value 0.013) in intervention zip codes compared to control zip codes.
papers.zh_title: 医生和护士的社交媒体广告减少了假日旅行和COVID-19感染：一项整群随机对照试验
papers.zh_abstract: 在COVID-19疫情期间，许多卫生专业人员开始在社交媒体上进行大众传播，以传递关键信息并说服个人采取预防性健康行为。我们的临床医生和护士团队开发并录制了简短视频信息，鼓励观众在感恩节和圣诞节假期留在家中。随后，我们在美国820个县（覆盖13个州）进行了一项两阶段整群随机对照试验，开展大规模Facebook广告活动以传播这些信息。在第一个随机化层级，我们将县随机分为两组：高强度组和低强度组。在第二个层级，我们将邮政编码随机分配到处理组或对照组，使得高强度县中75%的邮政编码接受处理，而低强度县中25%的邮政编码接受处理。在每个处理过的邮政编码中，我们尽可能多地向Facebook用户发送广告（感恩节期间有11,954,109名用户至少收到一条广告，圣诞节期间有23,302,290名用户至少收到一条广告）。第一个主要结果是总体假日旅行，使用县级手机位置数据衡量：我们发现，在每个节日前三天，高强度县的平均旅行距离变化了-0.993个百分点（95%置信区间 -1.616, -0.371，p值 0.002）。第二个主要结果是邮政编码层面的COVID-19感染：与对照组邮政编码相比，干预组邮政编码在节后五天开始的两周内记录的COVID-19感染下降了3.5%（调整后95%置信区间 [-6.2%, -0.7%]，p值 0.013）。

papers.title: The Revealed Demand for Hard vs. Soft News: Evidence from Italian TV Viewership
papers.authors: Marco Gambaro, Valentino Larcinese, Riccardo Puglisi, James M. Snyder Jr.
papers.abstract: We analyze minute-by-minute, individual level data on viewership for Italian TV news broadcasts (from AUDITEL™), matched with detailed data on content (from Osservatorio di Pavia). We are interested in the behavior of viewers, and in particular in their decision to switch away from a news program as a function of the type of story they are currently watching. Somewhat surprisingly, we find that “soft” news systematically induces viewers to switch away, even more than “hard” news. On the other hand, sensational stories about crime, accidents and disasters are associated with less switching. We also find significant differences in this switching behavior according to gender, age, and the specific TV channel being watched. For example, young people are relatively more likely to switch away from hard news than soft news, compared to older people.
papers.zh_title: 硬新闻与软新闻的揭示性需求：来自意大利电视收视率的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们分析了意大利电视新闻广播的逐分钟、个体层面收视率数据（来自AUDITEL™），并与详细的内容数据（来自帕维亚观察站）进行了匹配。我们关注观众的行为，特别是他们根据当前观看的新闻故事类型而切换离开新闻节目的决定。有点令人惊讶的是，我们发现“软”新闻系统性地促使观众切换离开，甚至比“硬”新闻更甚。另一方面，关于犯罪、事故和灾难的耸人听闻的故事与较少的切换行为相关。我们还发现，这种切换行为在性别、年龄和所观看的具体电视频道方面存在显著差异。例如，与老年人相比，年轻人相对更可能从硬新闻切换离开，而不是从软新闻切换离开。

papers.title: Money or Power? Financial Infrastructure and Optimal Policy
papers.authors: Susanna B. Berkouwer, Pierre E. Biscaye, Eric Hsu, Oliver W. Kim, Kenneth Lee, Edward Miguel, Catherine Wolfram
papers.abstract: In response to the Covid-19 crisis, 186 countries implemented direct cash transfers to households, and 181 introduced in-kind programs that lowered the cost of utilities such as electricity, water, transport, and mobile money. Do cash or in-kind transfers generate greater welfare improvements? And, does a country’s financial infrastructure affect optimal aid disbursement? Through a parallel set of surveys in two urban regions in Africa—with comparable education, cell phone ownership, and electricity connectivity—we show that optimal government aid disbursement hinges on financial infrastructure. In line with economic theory favoring direct cash transfers, in a randomized experiment in Kenya 95% of urban recipients prefer mobile money over electricity transfers of a similar monetary value. But Kenya is an outlier with high mobile money adoption: this increases its value and reduces transaction costs of buying electricity credit. By contrast, in Ghana—where mobile money is less widespread and the transaction costs for buying electricity are higher—half of recipients prefer electricity transfers, and many are willing to forego significant value to receive electricity instead of mobile money. These results have several important policy implications. First, the optimal government policy in response to an economic crisis is not uniform: cash and in-kind transfers have different advantages that make each suitable for specific contexts. Second, the adoption of modern financial technologies will likely increase the efficiency of government cash transfer programs, even as in-kind transfers continue to be preferred in settings where mobile money uptake is slow. Finally, giving recipients a choice harnesses valuable local information that a policy maker may not have access to.
papers.zh_title: 金钱还是权力？金融基础设施与最优政策
papers.zh_abstract: 为应对新冠疫情危机，186个国家实施了直接现金转移支付给家庭，181个国家推出了降低电力、水、交通和移动货币等公用事业成本的在实物计划。现金转移还是在实物转移能带来更大的福利改善？一个国家的金融基础设施是否影响最优援助发放？通过在非洲两个城市地区（教育水平、手机拥有率和电力连接率相当）进行的一系列平行调查，我们表明最优政府援助发放取决于金融基础设施。与支持直接现金转移的经济理论一致，在肯尼亚的一项随机实验中，95%的城市接受者更喜欢移动货币而非同等货币价值的电力转移。但肯尼亚是一个移动货币采用率高的异常值：这增加了其价值并降低了购买电力信用的交易成本。相比之下，在加纳——移动货币不那么普及且购买电力的交易成本更高——一半的接受者更喜欢电力转移，许多人愿意放弃显著价值来获得电力而非移动货币。这些结果具有几个重要的政策含义。首先，应对经济危机的最优政府政策并非统一：现金和在实物转移各有优势，使其适用于特定情境。其次，现代金融技术的采用可能会提高政府现金转移计划的效率，即使在移动货币采用缓慢的环境中，在实物转移仍可能更受青睐。最后，给予接受者选择权，可以利用政策制定者可能无法获得的有价值的地方信息。

papers.title: The Real Channel for Nominal Bond-Stock Puzzles
papers.authors: Mikhail Chernov, Lars A. Lochstoer, Dongho Song
papers.abstract: We present evidence that the nature of aggregate consumption dynamics change around the time the bond-stock correlation switches sign. We identify three regimes in a real-time, sequential learning framework: two highly persistent regimes where either permanent or transitory consumption shocks are relatively more dominant, and a disaster regime that is largely transitory. We study implications of this finding for asset prices. The transition from the second to the first regime in the late 1990s makes the correlation between equities and real bonds switch sign from positive to negative as in the data, thus providing an explanation for this fact from the perspective of real consumption dynamics. The findings extend to the international setting.
papers.zh_title: 名义债券-股票谜题的实际渠道
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提供的证据表明，总消费动态的性质在债券-股票相关性符号转变时发生变化。我们在一个实时、序贯学习框架中识别出三种机制：两种高度持久的机制，其中永久性或暂时性消费冲击相对更占主导地位，以及一种主要是暂时性的灾难机制。我们研究了这一发现对资产价格的影响。从第二种机制到第一种机制的转变发生在1990年代末，使得股票与实际债券之间的相关性从正变为负，正如数据所示，从而从实际消费动态的角度为这一事实提供了解释。这些发现也适用于国际环境。

papers.title: Propagation and Amplification of Local Productivity Spillovers
papers.authors: Xavier Giroud, Simone Lenzu, Quinn Maingi, Holger Mueller
papers.abstract: This paper shows that local productivity spillovers propagate throughout the economy through the plant-level networks of multi-region firms. Using confidential Census plant-level data, we show that large manufacturing plant openings not only raise the productivity of local plants but also of distant plants hundreds of miles away, which belong to multi-region firms that are exposed to the local productivity spillover through one of their plants. To quantify the significance of plant-level networks for the propagation and amplification of local productivity shocks, we develop and estimate a quantitative spatial model in which plants of multi-region firms are linked through shared knowledge. Our model features heterogeneous regions, which interact through goods trade and labor markets, as well as within-location, across-plant heterogeneity in productivity, wages, and employment. Counterfactual exercises show that while knowledge sharing through plant-level networks amplifies the aggregate effects of local productivity shocks, it widens economic disparities between individual workers and regions in the economy.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, ITI, PR；JEL：C51, C68, E23, E24, L23, O4, R12, R13, R3
papers.zh_title: 本地生产力溢出效应的传播与放大
papers.zh_abstract: 本文表明，本地生产力溢出效应通过多区域企业的工厂级网络在整个经济中传播。利用保密的普查工厂级数据，我们发现大型制造业工厂的开设不仅提高了本地工厂的生产力，还提高了数百英里外远方工厂的生产力，这些远方工厂属于那些通过其一家工厂受到本地生产力溢出效应影响的多区域企业。为了量化工厂级网络对本地生产力冲击传播与放大的重要性，我们开发并估计了一个定量空间模型，在该模型中，多区域企业的工厂通过共享知识相互联系。我们的模型以异质性区域为特征，这些区域通过商品贸易和劳动力市场相互作用，并且在同一地点内，不同工厂在生产力、工资和就业方面存在异质性。反事实分析表明，虽然通过工厂级网络的知识共享放大了本地生产力冲击的总体效应，但它也加剧了经济中个体工人和区域之间的经济差距。

papers.title: The Impact of Covid-19 on Older Workers' Employment and Social Security Spillovers
papers.authors: Gopi Shah Goda, Emilie Jackson, Lauren Hersch Nicholas, Sarah See Stith
papers.abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic and associated mitigation strategies exacted a large economic toll on large portions of the United States population. For older and disabled workers, the effects could be more persistent and fiscally costly than the impacts experienced by young, healthy workers due to the spillovers onto Social Security. We use Current Population Survey, Social Security administrative data on applications for retirement and disability benefits, and Google Trends data to assess the impact of COVID-19 on older adults age 50-70. We find that employment for this group dropped substantially more than would have been predicted prior to the pandemic: employment for 50-61 year olds was 5.7 pp (8.3 percent) lower, while employment for 62-70-year- olds was 3.9 pp (10.7 percent) lower. For people aged 50-61, unemployment and labor force exits due to reasons other than disability and retirement represented 63 and 30 percent of the employment decline, respectively. For those aged 62-70, the two largest components of the reduction were unemployment (50 percent) and retirement-driven labor force exits (30 percent). We find evidence of declines in reporting a labor force exit due to disability (4-5 percent), applications for disability insurance (15 percent), and Google search intensity for disability (7 percent). Retirement benefit claiming remains largely unchanged overall, though we find evidence that applicants substituted towards filing for benefits via the internet. We explore potential mechanisms and find evidence for both supply- and demand-side explanations.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, LS, PE；JEL：H53, H55, J22, J23, J26
papers.zh_title: 新冠疫情对老年工人就业及社会保障溢出效应的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 新冠疫情及其相关的缓解策略对美国大部分人口造成了巨大的经济负担。对于老年和残疾工人而言，由于对社会保障的溢出效应，其影响可能比年轻健康工人所经历的影响更持久且财政成本更高。我们利用当前人口调查、社会保障管理局关于退休和残疾福利申请的行政数据以及谷歌趋势数据，评估新冠疫情对50-70岁老年人的影响。我们发现，该群体的就业率下降幅度远大于疫情前的预测：50-61岁人群的就业率下降了5.7个百分点（8.3%），而62-70岁人群的就业率下降了3.9个百分点（10.7%）。对于50-61岁人群，因残疾和退休以外原因导致的失业和退出劳动力市场分别占就业下降的63%和30%。对于62-70岁人群，就业减少的两个最大组成部分是失业（50%）和退休驱动的劳动力市场退出（30%）。我们发现有证据表明，因残疾而退出劳动力市场的报告减少了4-5%，残疾保险申请减少了15%，谷歌上对残疾的搜索强度下降了7%。退休福利申领总体上基本保持不变，但我们发现有证据表明，申请人转向通过互联网提交福利申请。我们探讨了潜在机制，并找到了供给侧和需求侧解释的证据。

papers.title: Currency Management by International Fixed Income Mutual Funds
papers.authors: Clemens Sialm, Qifei Zhu
papers.abstract: Investments in international fixed income securities are exposed to significant currency risks. We collect novel data on mutual fund currency derivatives and document that around 90% of U.S. international fixed income funds use currency forwards to manage their foreign exchange exposure. Funds' currency forward positions differ substantially based on risk management demands related to portfolio currency exposures, return-enhancement motives such as currency momentum and carry trade, and strategic considerations related to past performance and fund clienteles. Funds that hedge their currency risk exhibit lower return variability, but do not generate inferior abnormal returns.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, IFM, ITI；JEL：F21, F31, F34, G11, G12, G13, G15, G23, G32
papers.zh_title: 国际固定收益共同基金的货币管理
papers.zh_abstract: 对国际固定收益证券的投资面临显著的货币风险。我们收集了关于共同基金货币衍生品的新数据，并记录到大约90%的美国国际固定收益基金使用货币远期合约来管理其外汇风险敞口。基金的货币远期头寸因多种因素而存在显著差异，这些因素包括与投资组合货币风险敞口相关的风险管理需求、货币动量和套利交易等增强收益的动机，以及与过往业绩和基金客户群体相关的战略考量。对冲货币风险的基金表现出较低的回报波动性，但并未产生较差的异常回报。

papers.title: Treasury Richness
papers.authors: Matthias Fleckenstein, Francis A. Longstaff
papers.abstract: It is widely believed that Treasuries trade at premium prices because of their safety and money-like properties. In reality, this is only true on a relative basis when compared to other bonds, but is often not true on an absolute basis. Many Treasuries have repeatedly traded at substantial discounts to their intrinsic fair values for extended periods during the past 25 years. Since 2015, Treasuries have consistently been priced at an aggregate discount of $100 to $300 billion below their fair values. Treasuries often actually become cheaper following crises. These results provide new perspectives on safe-asset theories.
papers.zh_title: 国债的昂贵性
papers.zh_abstract: 人们普遍认为，由于国债的安全性和类似货币的特性，其交易价格存在溢价。实际上，这仅在与其他债券相对比较时才成立，但在绝对意义上往往不成立。在过去25年中，许多国债曾多次在较长时期内以远低于其内在公允价值的折价进行交易。自2015年以来，国债的总折价一直稳定在其公允价值以下1000亿至3000亿美元之间。危机过后，国债往往实际上变得更便宜。这些结果为安全资产理论提供了新的视角。

papers.title: Consumer Responses to Firms’ Voluntary Disclosure of Information: Evidence from Calorie Labeling by Starbucks
papers.authors: Rosemary Avery, John Cawley, Julia Eddelbuettel, Matthew D. Eisenberg, Charlie Mann, Alan D. Mathios
papers.abstract: This paper estimates the impact on consumer behavior of a firm’s voluntary disclosure of information. Specifically, we study the impact of Starbucks’ disclosure of calorie information on its menu boards in June 2013. Using data on over 250,000 consumers’ visits to specific restaurant chains, we estimate difference-in-difference models that compare the change in the probability that consumers recently visited Starbucks to the change in the probability that they recently visited a similar chain that did not voluntarily disclose: Dunkin Donuts. Estimates from difference-in-differences models indicate that we cannot reject the null hypothesis that Starbucks’ disclosure of calorie information had no impact on the probability that consumers patronized Starbucks in the past month. However, we find evidence of a transitory negative impact on the probability of visits the first year after disclosure, and evidence that disclosure reduced the probability of visits by men. These results are useful for understanding how consumers respond to the voluntary disclosure of information, a decision faced by many firms.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, IO, LE, PE；JEL：D22, D8, I12, L2, L83
papers.zh_title: 消费者对企业自愿披露信息的反应：来自星巴克标注卡路里的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文估计了企业自愿披露信息对消费者行为的影响。具体而言，我们研究了星巴克于2013年6月在其菜单板上披露卡路里信息的影响。利用超过25万名消费者访问特定连锁餐厅的数据，我们估计了双重差分模型，比较了消费者近期访问星巴克的概率变化与近期访问一家未自愿披露信息的类似连锁店——唐恩都乐的概率变化。双重差分模型的估计结果表明，我们无法拒绝原假设，即星巴克披露卡路里信息对消费者在过去一个月内光顾星巴克的概率没有影响。然而，我们发现有证据表明，在信息披露后的第一年，其对访问概率产生了短暂的负面影响，并且信息披露降低了男性访问的概率。这些结果有助于理解消费者如何响应企业自愿披露信息这一许多企业面临的决定。

papers.title: Long Run Effects of Aid: Forecasts and Evidence from Sierra Leone
papers.authors: Katherine Casey, Rachel Glennerster, Edward Miguel, Maarten J. Voors
papers.abstract: We evaluate the long-run effects of a decentralized approach to economic development, called community driven development (CDD), a prominent strategy for delivering foreign aid. Notably we revisit a randomized CDD program in Sierra Leone 11 years after launch. We estimate large persistent gains in local public goods and market activity, and modest positive effects on institutions. There is suggestive evidence that CDD slightly improved communities’ response to the 2014 Ebola epidemic. We compare estimates to the forecasts of experts from Sierra Leone and abroad, working in policy and academia, and find that local policymakers are overly optimistic about CDD’s effectiveness.
papers.zh_title: 援助的长期效应：来自塞拉利昂的预测与证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们评估了一种名为社区驱动发展（CDD）的分散式经济发展方法的长期效应，这是提供外国援助的一项重要战略。值得注意的是，我们在项目启动11年后重新审视了塞拉利昂的一个随机化CDD项目。我们估计，该项目在地方公共产品和市场活动方面带来了巨大且持久的收益，并对制度产生了适度的积极影响。有提示性证据表明，CDD略微改善了社区对2014年埃博拉疫情的应对能力。我们将估计结果与来自塞拉利昂和国外、从事政策工作和学术研究的专家的预测进行了比较，发现地方政策制定者对CDD的有效性过于乐观。

papers.title: A Unified Theory of Cities
papers.authors: Jacques-François Thisse, Matthew Turner, Philip Ushchev
papers.abstract: How do people arrange themselves when they are free to choose work and residence locations, when commuting is costly, and when increasing returns may affect production? We consider this problem when the location set is discrete and households have heterogenous preferences over workplace-residence pairs. We provide a general characterization of equilibrium throughout the parameter space. The introduction of preference heterogeneity into an otherwise conventional urban model fundamentally changes equilibrium behavior. Multiple equilibria are pervasive although stable equilibria need not exist. Stronger increasing returns to scale need not concentrate economic activity and lower commuting costs need not disperse it. The qualitative behavior of the model as returns to scale increase accords with changes in the patterns of urbanization observed in the Western world between the pre-industrial period and the present.
papers.zh_title: 城市统一理论
papers.zh_abstract: 当人们可以自由选择工作和居住地点、通勤成本高昂且规模报酬递增可能影响生产时，他们如何安排自己？我们在地点集是离散的且家庭对工作-居住地配对具有异质性偏好的情况下考虑这个问题。我们提供了整个参数空间中均衡的一般性刻画。将偏好异质性引入一个原本传统的城市模型，从根本上改变了均衡行为。多重均衡普遍存在，尽管稳定均衡不一定存在。更强的规模报酬递增不一定会集中经济活动，而较低的通勤成本也不一定会分散经济活动。随着规模报酬的增加，模型的定性行为与西方世界从前工业时期至今观察到的城市化模式变化相一致。

papers.title: Experimentally Validating Welfare Evaluation of School Vouchers: Part I
papers.authors: Peter Arcidiacono, Karthik Muralidharan, Eun-young Shim, John D. Singleton
papers.abstract: In this paper, we use a unique two-stage experiment that randomized access to school vouchers across both markets and students in rural India to estimate the revealed preference value of school choice. In the first step of the research design, we develop an empirical model of school choice subject to liquidity and credit constraints that is estimated using data from only the control markets. Based on this exercise, we estimate that the voucher generated welfare gains exceeding four times the average private school's annual tuition on average to the students induced into private schooling. The second step of the research design will validate the estimated welfare impacts by comparing model predictions for a simulated voucher program in control markets with the data from the treatment group. The results in this paper are based on the first step (using only control data) and this draft serves as a pre-commitment to the model estimates and predictions before examining the experimental data.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, IO, PE；JEL：D12, H42, I21, I28, O15
papers.zh_title: 实验验证学校代金券的福利评估：第一部分
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们利用印度农村地区一个独特的两阶段实验，该实验在市场和学生两个层面随机分配学校代金券的获取机会，以估计学校选择的显示性偏好价值。在研究设计的第一步，我们开发了一个受流动性和信贷约束影响的学校选择实证模型，该模型仅使用来自控制市场的数据进行估计。基于此分析，我们估计，对于被诱导进入私立学校的学生而言，代金券平均产生了超过私立学校年均学费四倍的福利收益。研究设计的第二步将通过将控制市场中模拟代金券项目的模型预测与处理组的数据进行比较，来验证估计的福利影响。本文的结果基于第一步（仅使用控制数据），本稿作为在检验实验数据之前对模型估计和预测的预先承诺。

papers.title: Selling Fast and Buying Slow: Heuristics and Trading Performance of Institutional Investors
papers.authors: Klakow Akepanidtaworn, Rick Di Mascio, Alex Imas, Lawrence Schmidt
papers.abstract: Are market experts prone to heuristics, and if so, do they transfer across closely related domains—buying and selling? We investigate this question using a unique dataset of institutional investors with portfolios averaging $573 million. A striking finding emerges: while there is clear evidence of skill in buying, selling decisions underperform substantially—even relative to random selling strategies. This holds despite the similarity between the two decisions in frequency, substance and consequences for performance. Evidence suggests that an asymmetric allocation of cognitive resources such as attention can explain the discrepancy: we document a systematic, costly heuristic process when selling but not when buying.
papers.zh_title: 快速卖出与缓慢买入：机构投资者的启发式行为与交易绩效
papers.zh_abstract: 市场专家是否容易受到启发式偏差的影响？如果存在这种偏差，它们是否会在密切相关的领域——买入和卖出——之间转移？我们利用一个独特的机构投资者数据集来研究这个问题，这些投资者的投资组合平均规模为5.73亿美元。一个引人注目的发现出现了：尽管在买入决策中存在明显的技能证据，但卖出决策的表现却显著不佳——甚至相对于随机卖出策略也是如此。尽管这两个决策在频率、实质以及对绩效的影响方面具有相似性，这一发现仍然成立。证据表明，认知资源（如注意力）的不对称分配可以解释这种差异：我们记录了在卖出时存在一个系统性且代价高昂的启发式过程，但在买入时则没有。

papers.title: Vaccine Hesitancy, Passports and the Demand for Vaccination
papers.authors: Joshua S. Gans
papers.abstract: Vaccine hesitancy is modelled as an endogenous decision within a behavioural SIR model with endogenous agent activity. It is shown that policy interventions that directly target costs associated with vaccine adoption may counter vaccine hesitancy while those that manipulate the utility of unvaccinated agents will either lead to the same or lower rates of vaccine adoption. This latter effect arises with vaccine passports whose effects are mitigated in equilibrium by reductions in viral/disease prevalence that themselves reduce the demand for vaccination.
papers.zh_title: 疫苗犹豫、疫苗护照与疫苗接种需求
papers.zh_abstract: 疫苗犹豫被建模为行为SIR模型中的一个内生决策，其中包含内生化的个体活动。研究表明，直接针对与疫苗采用相关成本的政策干预可能会对抗疫苗犹豫，而那些操纵未接种疫苗个体效用的政策则会导致相同或更低的疫苗接种率。后一种效应出现在疫苗护照中，其影响在均衡中被病毒/疾病流行率的降低所削弱，而流行率的降低本身又减少了疫苗接种需求。

papers.title: Experience Effects in Finance: Foundations, Applications, and Future Directions
papers.authors: Ulrike Malmendier
papers.abstract: This article establishes four key findings of the growing literature on experience effects in finance: (1) the long-lasting imprint of past experiences on beliefs and risk taking, (2) recency effects, (3) the domain-specificity of experience effects, and (4) imperviousness to information that is not experience-based. I first discuss the neuroscientific foundations of experience-based learning and sketch a simple model of its role in the stock market based on Malmendier et al. (2020a,b). I then distill the empirical findings on experience effects in stock-market investment, trade dynamics, and international capital flows, highlighting these four key features. Finally, I contrast models of belief formation that rely on “learned information” with models accounting for the neuroscience evidence on synaptic tagging and memory formation, and provide directions for future research.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：D03, D8, D83, D87, D9, E17, E52, E7, G02, G4
papers.zh_title: 金融中的经验效应：基础、应用与未来方向
papers.zh_abstract: 本文确立了关于金融中经验效应的日益增长的文献的四个关键发现：（1）过去经历对信念和风险承担的长期烙印，（2）近因效应，（3）经验效应的领域特异性，以及（4）对非基于经验的信息的免疫性。我首先讨论了基于经验学习的神经科学基础，并基于Malmendier等人（2020a,b）的研究勾勒了一个关于其在股票市场中作用的简单模型。然后，我提炼了关于股票市场投资、贸易动态和国际资本流动中经验效应的实证发现，突出了这四个关键特征。最后，我将依赖“习得信息”的信念形成模型与考虑神经科学关于突触标记和记忆形成证据的模型进行对比，并为未来研究提供了方向。

papers.title: Do Market Failures Create a ‘Durability Gap’ in the Circular Economy?
papers.authors: Don Fullerton, Shan He
papers.abstract: The interdisciplinary circular economy literature recommends longer lasting products, to reduce pollution from repeated production and disposal. For any type of appliance, we assume consumers choose among variants with different durability. Firms are competitive. Standard Pigovian analysis shows that optimal taxes depend on pollution and not on product life. Here, we find conditions where consumers choose lives that are too short – a “durability gap”. First, we show that suboptimal existing output taxes imply suboptimal durability. An increase in uniform tax on all variants encourages purchase of a more durable variant and raises welfare. Second, welfare also is raised by a subsidy for choosing a more durable variant or by a marginally binding durability mandate. Third, we find that a social discount rate less than the private rate is the strongest case for policy to favor durability. Fourth, the consumer misperceptions we study have ambiguous implications for durability policy.
papers.zh_title: 市场失灵是否在循环经济中造成了“耐用性缺口”？
papers.zh_abstract: 跨学科的循环经济文献推荐使用更耐用的产品，以减少因重复生产和处置造成的污染。对于任何类型的电器，我们假设消费者在不同耐用性的变体之间进行选择。企业是竞争性的。标准的庇古分析表明，最优税收取决于污染而非产品寿命。在这里，我们找到了消费者选择寿命过短的条件——即“耐用性缺口”。首先，我们表明次优的现有产出税意味着次优的耐用性。对所有变体征收统一税率的增加会鼓励购买更耐用的变体并提高福利。其次，通过补贴选择更耐用的变体或通过具有边际约束力的耐用性指令也能提高福利。第三，我们发现社会贴现率低于私人贴现率是政策支持耐用性的最强理由。第四，我们研究的消费者误解对耐用性政策具有模糊的含义。

papers.title: Are Student-Athletes Exploited?
papers.authors: James J. Heckman, Colleen P. Loughlin
papers.abstract: The Supreme Court decision NCAA vs Alston (June 2021) heightened interest in the benefits and costs of participating in sports for student-athletes. Anecdotal evidence about the exploitation of student-athletes was cited in the opinion and the media. Using panel data, we follow two different cohorts of students from high school through college and beyond. We examine the accuracy of the anecdotes as descriptions of the actual experiences of student-athletes. We show that, on average, student-athletes either out-perform or perform the same as observationally identical non-athletes in terms of graduation and post-collegiate salaries. Participation in athletics promotes social mobility.
papers.zh_title: 学生运动员是否被剥削？
papers.zh_abstract: 最高法院对NCAA诉Alston案（2021年6月）的裁决提高了人们对学生运动员参与体育运动的收益和成本的兴趣。关于学生运动员被剥削的轶事证据在判决意见和媒体中被引用。利用面板数据，我们跟踪了两组不同的学生群体，从高中到大学及以后。我们检验了这些轶事作为学生运动员实际经历描述的准确性。我们表明，平均而言，学生运动员在毕业率和大学毕业后薪资方面，要么优于观察上相同的非运动员，要么与之表现相同。参与体育运动促进了社会流动性。

papers.title: Uber and Alcohol-Related Traffic Fatalities
papers.authors: Michael L. Anderson, Lucas W. Davis
papers.abstract: Previous studies of the effect of ridesharing on traffic fatalities have yielded inconsistent, often contradictory conclusions. In this paper we revisit this question using proprietary data from Uber measuring monthly rideshare activity at the Census tract level. Most previous studies are based on publicly-available information about Uber entry dates into US cities, but we show that an indicator variable for whether Uber is available is a poor measure of rideshare activity — for example, it explains less than 3% of the tract-level variation in ridesharing, reflecting the enormous amount of variation both within and across cities. Using entry we find inconsistent and statistically insignificant estimates. However, when we use the more detailed proprietary data, we find a robust negative impact of ridesharing on traffic fatalities. Impacts concentrate during nights and weekends and are robust across a range of alternative specifications. Overall, our results imply that ridesharing has decreased US alcohol-related traffic fatalities by 6.1% and reduced total US traffic fatalities by 4.0%. Based on conventional estimates of the value of statistical life the annual life-saving benefits range from $2.3 to $5.4 billion. Back-of-the-envelope calculations suggest that these benefits may be of similar magnitude to producer surplus captured by Uber shareholders or consumer surplus captured by Uber riders.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, EH, LE, PE；JEL：I12, I18, R41, R49
papers.zh_title: 优步与酒精相关的交通死亡事故
papers.zh_abstract: 先前关于网约车对交通死亡事故影响的研究得出了不一致且常常相互矛盾的结论。在本文中，我们使用优步的专有数据重新审视这个问题，该数据以人口普查区为单位衡量月度网约车活动。大多数先前的研究基于关于优步进入美国城市日期的公开可用信息，但我们表明，优步是否可用的指标变量是网约车活动的一个糟糕度量——例如，它解释了不到3%的人口普查区层面的网约车变化，反映了城市内部和城市之间的巨大变化。使用进入指标，我们发现了不一致且统计上不显著的估计。然而，当我们使用更详细的专有数据时，我们发现网约车对交通死亡事故有稳健的负面影响。影响集中在夜间和周末，并且在一系列替代设定下都是稳健的。总体而言，我们的结果表明，网约车使美国与酒精相关的交通死亡事故减少了6.1%，并使美国总交通死亡事故减少了4.0%。基于统计生命价值的传统估计，每年的生命拯救效益在23亿至54亿美元之间。粗略计算表明，这些效益可能与优步股东获得的生产者剩余或优步乘客获得的消费者剩余规模相当。

papers.title: Machine Learning and Mobile Phone Data Can Improve the Targeting of Humanitarian Assistance
papers.authors: Emily Aiken, Suzanne Bellue, Dean Karlan, Christopher R. Udry, Joshua Blumenstock
papers.abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic has devastated many low- and middle-income countries, causing widespread food insecurity and a sharp decline in living standards. In response to this crisis, governments and humanitarian organizations worldwide have distributed social assistance to over 1.5 billion people. Targeting is a central challenge in administering these programs: given available data, how does one rapidly identify those with the greatest need? Here we show that data from mobile phone networks can improve the targeting of humanitarian assistance. Our approach uses traditional survey data to train machine-learning algorithms to recognize patterns of poverty in mobile phone data; the trained algorithms can then prioritize aid to the poorest mobile subscribers. We evaluate this approach by studying Togo’s flagship emergency cash transfer program, which used these algorithms to disburse millions of dollars in COVID-19 relief aid. Our analysis compares outcomes – including exclusion errors, total social welfare, and measures of fairness – under different targeting regimes. Relative to the geographic targeting options considered by the Government of Togo, the machine learning approach reduces errors of exclusion by 4-21%. Relative to methods requiring a comprehensive social registry (a hypothetical exercise; no such registry exists in Togo), the machine learning approach increases exclusion errors by 9-35%. These results highlight the potential for new data sources to complement traditional methods for targeting humanitarian assistance, particularly in crisis settings when traditional data are missing or out of date.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, LS；JEL：C55, I32, I38, O12, O38
papers.zh_title: 机器学习和手机数据可以改善人道主义援助的瞄准
papers.zh_abstract: COVID-19大流行摧毁了许多低收入和中等收入国家，导致广泛的粮食不安全和生活水平急剧下降。为应对这场危机，世界各地的政府和 humanitarian 组织已向超过15亿人分发了社会援助。瞄准是管理这些项目的核心挑战：在现有数据的情况下，如何快速识别那些最需要帮助的人？在这里，我们表明来自移动电话网络的数据可以改善人道主义援助的瞄准。我们的方法使用传统调查数据来训练机器学习算法，以识别手机数据中的贫困模式；训练后的算法可以优先向最贫困的手机用户提供援助。我们通过研究多哥的旗舰紧急现金转移项目来评估这种方法，该项目使用这些算法发放了数百万美元的COVID-19救济援助。我们的分析比较了不同瞄准制度下的结果——包括排除错误、总社会福利和公平性度量。相对于多哥政府考虑的地理瞄准选项，机器学习方法将排除错误减少了4-21%。相对于需要全面社会登记册的方法（一个假设性练习；多哥不存在这样的登记册），机器学习方法将排除错误增加了9-35%。这些结果凸显了新数据源在补充传统方法以瞄准人道主义援助方面的潜力，特别是在传统数据缺失或过时的危机环境中。

papers.title: Wealth and Insurance Choices: Evidence from US Households
papers.authors: Michael J. Gropper, Camelia M. Kuhnen
papers.abstract: Theoretically, wealthier people should buy less insurance, and should self-insure through saving instead, as insurance entails monitoring costs. Here, we use administrative data for 63,000 individuals and, contrary to theory, find that the wealthier have better life and property insurance coverage. Wealth-related differences in background risk, legal risk, liquidity constraints, financial literacy, and pricing explain only a small fraction of the positive wealth-insurance correlation. This puzzling correlation persists in individual fixed-effects models estimated using 2,500,000 person-month observations. The fact that the less wealthy have less coverage, though intuitively they benefit more from insurance, might increase financial health disparities among households.
papers.zh_title: 财富与保险选择：来自美国家庭的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 理论上，较富裕的人应该购买更少的保险，并通过储蓄进行自我保险，因为保险涉及监控成本。在这里，我们使用63,000名个人的行政数据，与理论相反，发现较富裕的人拥有更好的人寿和财产保险覆盖。背景风险、法律风险、流动性约束、金融素养和定价方面的财富相关差异只能解释正财富-保险相关性的一小部分。这种令人费解的相关性在使用2,500,000人-月观测值估计的个体固定效应模型中仍然存在。尽管直觉上较不富裕的人从保险中受益更多，但他们拥有更少的保险覆盖这一事实可能会加剧家庭之间的金融健康差距。

papers.title: Teacher Compensation and Structural Inequality: Evidence from Centralized Teacher School Choice in Perú
papers.authors: Matteo Bobba, Tim Ederer, Gianmarco Leon-Ciliotta, Christopher Neilson, Marco G. Nieddu
papers.abstract: We exploit data on centralized teacher recruitment in Perú to establish that wage rigidity creates large urban-rural disparities in teacher effectiveness. Leveraging a teacher compensation reform, we provide causal evidence that increasing salaries in less desirable locations attracts qualified teachers and improves student learning. We estimate a model of teacher sorting and student achievement featuring rich heterogeneity in teachers’ preferences and effectiveness. Substantial equity and efficiency gains arise from reallocating existing teachers to exploit match effects or attracting applicants with higher average effectiveness into public teaching. Cost-minimizing counterfactual wage schedules aimed at achieving these gains imply the latter is more cost-effective.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, ED, LS；JEL：H52, I20, J3, J45, O15, R23, R58
papers.zh_title: 教师薪酬与结构性不平等：来自秘鲁集中式教师择校的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用秘鲁集中式教师招聘的数据，证实工资刚性造成了城乡之间教师效能的大幅差异。借助一项教师薪酬改革，我们提供了因果证据，表明在不太理想的地区提高工资能够吸引合格教师并改善学生学习。我们估计了一个教师分类与学生成绩的模型，该模型充分体现了教师偏好和效能的异质性。通过重新分配现有教师以利用匹配效应，或吸引平均效能更高的申请者进入公立教学领域，可以带来显著的公平与效率提升。旨在实现这些收益的成本最小化反事实工资方案表明，后者更具成本效益。

papers.title: Designing Fuel-Economy Standards in Light of Electric Vehicles
papers.authors: Kenneth Gillingham
papers.abstract: Electric vehicles are declining in cost so rapidly that they may claim a large share of the vehicle market by 2030. This paper examines a set of practical regulatory design considerations for fuel-economy standards or greenhouse gas standards in the context of highly uncertain electric vehicle costs in the next decade. The analysis takes a cost-effectiveness approach and uses analytical modeling and simulation to develop insight. I show that counting electric vehicles under a standard with a multiplier or assuming zero upstream emissions can reduce electric vehicle market share by weakening the standards. Further, there are tradeoffs from implementing a backstop conventional vehicle standard along with a second standard that also includes electric vehicles, but such a backstop offers the possibility of ensuring that low-cost conventional vehicle technologies are exploited.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE；JEL：H23, Q48, Q53, Q54, Q58, R48
papers.zh_title: 考虑电动汽车的燃油经济性标准设计
papers.zh_abstract: 电动汽车成本下降如此迅速，以至于到2030年它们可能占据汽车市场的很大份额。本文考察了在下一个十年电动汽车成本高度不确定的背景下，燃油经济性标准或温室气体标准的一系列实际监管设计考量。分析采用成本效益方法，并利用分析模型和模拟来形成见解。我表明，在标准下以乘数计算电动汽车或假设其上游零排放，可能会因削弱标准而降低电动汽车市场份额。此外，实施一项后备常规车辆标准以及另一项也包括电动汽车的标准之间存在权衡，但这种后备方案提供了确保低成本常规车辆技术得到利用的可能性。

papers.title: Regulating Conglomerates in China: Evidence from an Energy Conservation Program
papers.authors: Qiaoyi Chen, Zhao Chen, Zhikuo Liu, Juan Carlos Suárez Serrato, Daniel Xu
papers.abstract: We study a prominent energy regulation affecting large Chinese manufacturers that are part of broader conglomerates. Using detailed firm-level data and difference-in-differences research designs, we show that regulated firms cut output and shifted production to unregulated firms in the same conglomerate instead of improving their energy efficiency. Conglomerate spillovers account for 40% of the output loss of regulated firms and substantially reduce aggregate energy savings. Using a structural model, we show that alternative polices that use public information on business networks could lower the shadow cost of the regulation by more than 40% and increase aggregate energy savings by 10%.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, IO, PR；JEL：H23, L51, O44, Q48
papers.zh_title: 监管中国企业集团：来自一项节能计划的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一项影响大型中国制造商（这些制造商属于更广泛的企业集团）的重要能源监管。利用详细的企业层面数据和双重差分研究设计，我们表明受监管企业削减了产出，并将生产转移至同一集团内未受监管的企业，而非提高其能源效率。企业集团溢出效应占受监管企业产出损失的40%，并大幅减少了总体能源节约。通过一个结构模型，我们表明利用商业网络公共信息的替代政策可以将监管的影子成本降低超过40%，并将总体能源节约提高10%。

papers.title: Who Owns What? A Factor Model for Direct Stock Holding
papers.authors: Vimal Balasubramaniam, John Y. Campbell, Tarun Ramadorai, Benjamin Ranish
papers.abstract: We build a cross-sectional factor model for investors' direct stock holdings, by analogy with standard time-series factor models for stock returns. We estimate the model using data from almost 10 million retail accounts in the Indian stock market. We find that stock characteristics such as firm age and share price have strong investor clienteles associated with them. Similarly, account attributes such as account age, account size, and extreme underdiversification (holding a single stock) are associated with particular characteristic preferences. Coheld stocks tend to have higher return covariance, suggestive of the importance of clientele effects in the stock market.
papers.zh_title: 谁拥有什么？直接持股的因子模型
papers.zh_abstract: 我们为投资者直接持股构建了一个横截面因子模型，类似于股票收益的标准时间序列因子模型。我们利用印度股市近1000万散户账户的数据估计该模型。我们发现，公司年龄和股价等股票特征与特定的投资者客户群相关联。同样，账户年龄、账户规模和极端分散化不足（持有单只股票）等账户属性与特定的特征偏好相关联。共同持有的股票往往具有更高的收益协方差，这表明客户群效应在股票市场中的重要性。

papers.title: Climate Change Uncertainty Spillover in the Macroeconomy
papers.authors: Michael Barnett, William Brock, Lars P. Hansen
papers.abstract: The design and conduct of climate change policy necessarily confronts uncertainty along multiple fronts. We explore the consequences of ambiguity over various sources and configurations of models that impact how economic opportunities could be damaged in the future. We appeal to decision theory under risk, model ambiguity and misspecification concerns to provide an economically motivated approach to uncertainty quantification. We show how this approach reduces the many facets of uncertainty into a low dimensional characterization that depends on the uncertainty aversion of a decision-maker or fictitious social planner. In our computations, we take inventory of three alternative channels of uncertainty and provide a novel way to assess them. These include i) carbon dynamics that capture how carbon emissions impact atmospheric carbon in future time periods; ii) temperature dynamics that depict how atmospheric carbon alters temperature in future time periods; iii) damage functions that quantify how temperature changes diminish economic opportunities. We appeal to geoscientific modeling to quantify the first two channels. We show how these uncertainty sources interact for a social planner looking to design a prudent approach to the social pricing of carbon emissions.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EEE, EFG；JEL：D81, E61, G12, G18, Q51, Q54
papers.zh_title: 宏观经济中的气候变化不确定性溢出
papers.zh_abstract: 气候变化政策的设计和实施必然面临多方面的不确定性。我们探讨了影响经济机会未来受损方式的模型的各种来源和配置所带来的模糊性后果。我们运用风险下的决策理论、模型模糊性和误设担忧，提供了一种基于经济学动机的不确定性量化方法。我们展示了这种方法如何将不确定性的多个方面简化为一个低维特征，该特征取决于决策者或虚构社会规划者的不确定性厌恶程度。在我们的计算中，我们盘点了三种替代的不确定性渠道，并提供了一种新颖的评估方式。这些渠道包括：i) 碳动态，它捕捉碳排放如何影响未来时期的大气碳含量；ii) 温度动态，它描述大气碳如何改变未来时期的温度；iii) 损害函数，它量化温度变化如何减少经济机会。我们借助地球科学建模来量化前两个渠道。我们展示了这些不确定性来源如何相互作用，对于一个寻求设计审慎的碳排放社会定价方法的社会规划者而言。

papers.title: Inequality in Life and Death
papers.authors: Martin S. Eichenbaum, Sergio Rebelo, Mathias Trabandt
papers.abstract: We argue that the Covid epidemic disproportionately affected the economic well-being and health of poor people. To disentangle the forces that generated this outcome, we construct a model that is consistent with the heterogeneous impact of the Covid recession on low- and high-income people. According to our model, two thirds of the inequality in Covid deaths reflect pre-existing inequality in comorbidity rates and access to quality health care. The remaining third, stems from the fact that low-income people work in occupations where the risk of infection is high. Our model also implies that the rise in income inequality generated by the Covid epidemic reflects the nature of the goods that low-income people produce. Finally, we assess the health-income trade-offs associated with fiscal transfers to the poor and mandatory containment policies.
papers.zh_title: 生与死的不平等
papers.zh_abstract: 我们认为新冠疫情对穷人的经济福祉和健康造成了不成比例的影响。为了厘清产生这一结果的力量，我们构建了一个与新冠疫情衰退对低收入和高收入人群异质性影响相一致的模型。根据我们的模型，新冠死亡不平等中的三分之二反映了先前存在的共病率和优质医疗保健可及性的不平等。剩余的三分之一源于低收入人群从事感染风险高的职业。我们的模型还表明，新冠疫情产生的收入不平等上升反映了低收入人群所生产商品的性质。最后，我们评估了与向穷人提供财政转移和强制性封锁政策相关的健康-收入权衡。

papers.title: Gay Politics Goes Mainstream: Democrats, Republicans, and Same-Sex Relationships
papers.authors: Raquel Fernández, Sahar Parsa
papers.abstract: Attitudes towards same-sex relationships in the US have changed radically over a relatively short period of time. After remaining fairly constant for over two decades, opinions became more favorable starting in 1992—a presidential election year in which the Democratic and Republican parties took opposing stands over the status of gay people in society. What roles did political parties and their leaders play in this process of cultural change? Using a variety of techniques including machine learning, we show that the partisan opinion gap emerged substantially prior to 1992—in the mid 1980s —and did not increase as a result of the political debates in 1992-'93. Furthermore, we identify people with a college-and-above education as the potential "leaders" of the process of partisan divergence.
papers.zh_title: 同性恋政治走向主流：民主党、共和党与同性关系
papers.zh_abstract: 美国对同性关系的态度在相对较短的时间内发生了根本性变化。在保持相当稳定二十多年后，观点从1992年开始变得更加有利——那是一个总统选举年，民主党和共和党就同性恋者在社会中的地位采取了相反的立场。政党和他们的领导人在这一文化变革过程中扮演了什么角色？使用包括机器学习在内的多种技术，我们表明党派意见分歧实际上早在1992年之前——即20世纪80年代中期——就已出现，并且并未因1992-93年的政治辩论而扩大。此外，我们将受过大学及以上教育的人确定为党派分歧过程的潜在“领导者”。

papers.title: Mechanizing Agriculture
papers.authors: Julieta Caunedo, Namrata Kala
papers.abstract: What are the gains from mechanization? We run a randomized control trial that subsidizes access to equipment rental markets to study how the adoption of mechanization shifts farming households’ labor supply, farm productivity and labor demand. The intervention induces greater mechanization in the upstream production stage, with labor savings concentrated in downstream, non-mechanized stages. Savings on family labor are concentrated among members engaged in worker supervision and accompanied by an increase in households’ non-agricultural income. To assess the welfare implications of the intervention, we build a model of heterogeneous farmers that make joint labor supply and production decisions because incentives to mechanize depend on the opportunity cost of supervising hired labor. The calibrated model predicts a consumption-equivalent welfare improvement of 7.6%, with two-thirds of those gains accruing to leisure. Welfare gains are heterogeneous despite common treatment effects. Through counterfactuals, we show that endogenous productivity gains account for relatively more of the welfare gains for farmers with low-supervision ability.
papers.zh_title: 农业机械化
papers.zh_abstract: 机械化的收益是什么？我们进行了一项随机对照试验，补贴农户获取设备租赁市场，以研究采用机械化如何改变农户家庭的劳动力供给、农业生产率和劳动力需求。干预措施在上游生产阶段诱导了更大的机械化，而劳动力节省集中在非机械化的下游阶段。家庭劳动力的节省集中在从事工人监督的成员身上，并伴随着家庭非农业收入的增加。为了评估干预措施的福利影响，我们构建了一个异质性农户模型，这些农户共同做出劳动力供给和生产决策，因为机械化的激励取决于监督雇佣劳动力的机会成本。校准后的模型预测消费等价福利改善为7.6%，其中三分之二的收益归于闲暇。尽管处理效应相同，但福利收益是异质性的。通过反事实分析，我们表明对于监督能力低的农户，内生生产率增长在福利收益中占相对更大的份额。

papers.title: Modeling Macroeconomic Variations after Covid-19
papers.authors: Serena Ng
papers.abstract: The coronavirus is a global event of historical proportions and just a few months changed the time series properties of the data in ways that make many pre-covid forecasting models inadequate. It also creates a new problem for estimation of economic factors and dynamic causal effects because the variations around the outbreak can be interpreted as outliers, as shifts to the distribution of existing shocks, or as addition of new shocks. I take the latter view and use covid indicators as controls to 'de-covid' the data prior to estimation. I find that economic uncertainty remains high at the end of 2020 even though real economic activity has recovered and covid uncertainty has receded. Dynamic responses of variables to shocks in a VAR similar in magnitude and shape to the ones identified before 2020 can be recovered by directly or indirectly modeling covid and treating it as exogenous. These responses to economic shocks are distinctly different from those to a covid shock, and distinguishing between the two types of shocks can be important in macroeconomic modeling post-covid.
papers.zh_title: 新冠疫情后宏观经济变动的建模
papers.zh_abstract: 新冠病毒是一个具有历史意义的全球性事件，仅几个月就改变了数据的时间序列特性，使得许多疫情前的预测模型不再适用。这也为经济因素和动态因果效应的估计带来了新问题，因为疫情爆发前后的变动可以被解释为异常值、现有冲击分布的偏移或新冲击的加入。本文采取后一种观点，在估计前使用新冠指标作为控制变量对数据进行“去新冠化”处理。研究发现，尽管实际经济活动已复苏且新冠不确定性已消退，但2020年底经济不确定性仍然高企。通过直接或间接地对新冠进行建模并将其视为外生变量，可以恢复变量对冲击的动态响应，其幅度和形状与2020年前识别到的冲击相似。这些对经济冲击的响应与对新冠冲击的响应截然不同，区分这两类冲击在疫情后的宏观经济建模中可能至关重要。

papers.title: Strategic or Confused Firms? Evidence from "Missing" Transactions in Uganda
papers.authors: Miguel Almunia, Jonas Hjort, Justine Knebelmann, Lin Tian
papers.abstract: Are firms sophisticated maximizers, or do they consistently make errors? Using transaction-level data from Ugandan value-added tax (VAT) returns, we show that sellers and buyers report different amounts 79% of the time, despite invoices being easily cross-checked. We estimate that 25% of firms are disadvantageous misreporters—they systematically misreport own sales and purchases such that their tax liability increases—while 75% are advantageous misreporters. Many firms—especially disadvantageous misreporters—fail to report imported inputs they themselves reported at Customs, increasing their VAT liability. On net, unilateral VAT misreporting cost Uganda about US$384 million in foregone 2013-2016 tax revenue
papers.zh_title: 战略型企业还是困惑型企业？来自乌干达“缺失”交易的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 企业是精明的最大化者，还是一贯犯错？利用乌干达增值税申报表中的交易层面数据，我们发现尽管发票易于交叉核对，但79%的情况下买卖双方报告的金额不一致。我们估计25%的企业是不利误报者——它们系统性地误报自身销售额和采购额，导致税负增加——而75%的企业是有利误报者。许多企业，尤其是不利误报者，未能报告其自身在海关申报的进口投入品，从而增加了增值税负债。总体而言，单边增值税误报在2013-2016年间使乌干达损失了约3.84亿美元的税收收入。

papers.title: The Lasting Effects of Early Childhood Education on Promoting the Skills and Social Mobility of Disadvantaged African Americans
papers.authors: Jorge Luis García, James J. Heckman, Victor Ronda
papers.abstract: This paper demonstrates multiple beneficial impacts of a program promoting intergenerational mobility for disadvantaged African-American children and their children. The program improves outcomes of the first-generation treatment group across the life cycle, which translates into better family environments for the second generation leading to positive intergenerational gains. There are long-lasting beneficial program effects on cognition through age 54, contradicting claims of fadeout that have dominated popular discussions of early childhood programs. Children of the first-generation treatment group have higher levels of education and employment, lower levels of criminal activity, and better health than children of the first-generation control group.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, PE；JEL：C93, H43, I28, J13
papers.zh_title: 早期儿童教育对提升弱势非裔美国人技能和社会流动性的持久影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本文展示了一项旨在促进弱势非裔美国儿童及其子女代际流动的项目的多重有益影响。该项目改善了第一代实验组在整个生命周期中的结果，这转化为第二代更好的家庭环境，从而带来积极的代际收益。该项目对认知能力的影响持续到54岁，这与主导早期儿童项目公众讨论的“消退”说法相矛盾。与第一代对照组子女相比，第一代实验组子女在教育和就业方面水平更高，犯罪活动水平更低，健康状况也更好。

papers.title: Long Term Effects of Cash Transfer Programs in Colombia
papers.authors: Orazio Attanasio, Lina Cardona Sosa, Carlos Medina, Costas Meghir, Christian Manuel Posso-Suárez
papers.abstract: Conditional Cash transfer (CCT) programs have been shown to have positive effects on a variety of outcomes including education, consumption and health visits, amongst others. We estimate the long-run impacts of the urban version of Familias en Acción, the Colombian CCT program on crime, teenage pregnancy, high school dropout and college enrollment using a Regression Discontinuity design on administrative data. ITT estimates show a reduction on arrest rates of 2.7pp for men and a reduction on teenage pregnancy of 2.3pp for women. High school dropout rates were reduced by 5.8pp and college enrollment was increased by 1.7pp for men.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, LE；JEL：D04, I23, I28, I31, J13, K42
papers.zh_title: 哥伦比亚现金转移项目的长期效应
papers.zh_abstract: 有条件的现金转移项目已被证明对教育、消费和健康就诊等多种结果具有积极影响。我们利用行政数据，通过断点回归设计，估计了哥伦比亚有条件现金转移项目“家庭行动”城市版本对犯罪、青少年怀孕、高中辍学和大学入学的长期影响。意向性治疗估计显示，男性逮捕率降低了2.7个百分点，女性青少年怀孕率降低了2.3个百分点。男性高中辍学率降低了5.8个百分点，大学入学率提高了1.7个百分点。

papers.title: A Note on the Level of Customer Support by State Governments: A Mystery-Shopping Approach
papers.authors: Oeindrila Dube, Sendhil Mullainathan, Devin G. Pope
papers.abstract: Many government services are provided at the state level such as unemployment insurance, Medicaid, and SNAP. Given the lack of competition, a natural worry is that customer support provided by states for these services is less than adequate. While there are many different measures of how a state can support beneficiaries, we focus on just one in this short and applied report: the ability to get a live representative on the phone to help with an application question. To do this, we take a “mystery shopping” approach and make 2,000 phone calls to state government offices. We find substantial heterogeneity in the availability of live phone representatives across states and types of service (UI, Medicaid, etc.). For example, live representatives in New Jersey and Georgia were reached less than 20% of the time while representatives in New Hampshire and Wisconsin were reached more than 80% of the time. We hope that this report provides a simple example for how academics, investigative reporters, and watch groups can help states be more accountable for their customer support systems.
papers.zh_title: 关于州政府客户支持水平的说明：一种神秘购物方法
papers.zh_abstract: 许多政府服务，如失业保险、医疗补助和补充营养援助计划，由州一级提供。由于缺乏竞争，一个自然的担忧是各州为这些服务提供的客户支持可能不足。虽然衡量州如何支持受益人的方法有很多，但在这份简短的应用报告中，我们只关注一点：通过电话联系到真人代表以帮助解答申请问题的能力。为此，我们采用“神秘购物”方法，向州政府办公室拨打了2000通电话。我们发现，各州以及不同服务类型（如失业保险、医疗补助等）之间，在真人电话代表的可用性方面存在显著异质性。例如，新泽西州和佐治亚州的真人代表接通率低于20%，而新罕布什尔州和威斯康星州的接通率则超过80%。我们希望这份报告能提供一个简单的范例，说明学者、调查记者和监察团体如何帮助各州对其客户支持系统更加负责。

papers.title: Effects of Welfare Reform on Household Food Insecurity Across Generations
papers.authors: Hope Corman, Dhaval M. Dave, Nancy Reichman, Ofira Schwartz-Soicher
papers.abstract: This study estimated the effects of welfare reform in the 1990s, which permanently restructured and contracted the cash assistance system in the U.S., on food insecurity—a fundamental form of hardship—of the next generation of households. An implicit goal underlying welfare reform was the disruption of an assumed intergenerational transmission of disadvantage; however, little is known about the effects of welfare reform on the well-being of the next generation. Using intergenerational data from the Panel Study of Income Dynamics and a variation on a difference-in-differences framework, this study exploits 3 sources of variation in childhood exposure to welfare reform: (1) risk of exposure across birth cohorts; (2) variation of exposure within cohorts because different states implemented welfare reform in different years; and (3) variation between individuals with the same exposure who were more likely and less likely to rely on welfare. We found that exposure to welfare reform led to decreases in food insecurity of the next generation of households, by about 10% for a 5-year increase in exposure, with stronger effects for women, individuals exposed for longer durations during childhood, individuals exposed in early childhood (0-5 years), and individuals whose mothers had a high school education (versus less).
papers.meta: Programs：CH, EH, PE；JEL：H53, I14, I3, I38
papers.zh_title: 福利改革对跨代家庭粮食不安全的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究估计了1990年代福利改革（该改革永久性地重组并缩减了美国现金援助体系）对下一代家庭粮食不安全（一种基本形式的困难）的影响。福利改革的一个隐含目标是打破假设的劣势代际传递；然而，关于福利改革对下一代福祉的影响，我们知之甚少。本研究利用收入动态面板研究的代际数据以及双重差分框架的变体，利用了童年时期福利改革暴露程度的三个变异来源：（1）不同出生队列的暴露风险；（2）由于不同州在不同年份实施福利改革，同一队列内部的暴露变异；（3）在相同暴露程度下，更可能和更不可能依赖福利的个体之间的变异。我们发现，福利改革的暴露导致下一代家庭粮食不安全状况下降，暴露时间每增加5年，粮食不安全约减少10%，对女性、童年时期暴露时间更长者、幼儿期（0-5岁）暴露者以及母亲受过高中教育（相对于更低教育水平）的个体影响更强。

papers.title: Systemic Discrimination Among Large U.S. Employers
papers.authors: Patrick M. Kline, Evan K. Rose, Christopher R. Walters
papers.abstract: We study the results of a massive nationwide correspondence experiment sending more than 83,000 fictitious applications with randomized characteristics to geographically dispersed jobs posted by 108 of the largest U.S. employers. Distinctively Black names reduce the probability of employer contact by 2.1 percentage points relative to distinctively white names. The magnitude of this racial gap in contact rates differs substantially across firms, exhibiting a between-company standard deviation of 1.9 percentage points. Despite an insignificant average gap in contact rates between male and female applicants, we find a between-company standard deviation in gender contact gaps of 2.7 percentage points, revealing that some firms favor male applicants while others favor women. Company-specific racial contact gaps are temporally and spatially persistent, and negatively correlated with firm profitability, federal contractor status, and a measure of recruiting centralization. Discrimination exhibits little geographical dispersion, but two digit industry explains roughly half of the cross-firm variation in both racial and gender contact gaps. Contact gaps are highly concentrated in particular companies, with firms in the top quintile of racial discrimination responsible for nearly half of lost contacts to Black applicants in the experiment. Controlling false discovery rates to the 5% level, 23 individual companies are found to discriminate against Black applicants. Our findings establish that discrimination against distinctively Black names is concentrated among a select set of large employers, many of which can be identified with high confidence using large scale inference methods.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, LE, LS, PE, TWP；JEL：C11, C9, C93, J7, J71, J78, K31, K42
papers.zh_title: 美国大型雇主中的系统性歧视
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一项大规模全国性通信实验的结果，该实验向108家美国最大雇主发布的、地理位置分散的职位发送了超过83,000份带有随机特征的虚构申请。与非裔美国人名字相比，显著的黑人名字使雇主联系的概率降低了2.1个百分点。这种种族联系率差距的幅度在不同公司间差异很大，公司间标准差为1.9个百分点。尽管男性和女性申请者的平均联系率差距不显著，但我们发现性别联系率差距的公司间标准差为2.7个百分点，这表明一些公司偏爱男性申请者，而另一些则偏爱女性。公司特定的种族联系率差距在时间和空间上具有持续性，并与公司盈利能力、联邦承包商身份以及招聘集中度指标呈负相关。歧视在地理分布上差异不大，但两位数的行业分类解释了约一半的种族和性别联系率差距的公司间变异。联系率差距高度集中在特定公司，种族歧视程度最高的五分之一公司占实验中黑人申请者失去联系机会的近一半。将错误发现率控制在5%的水平，有23家个体公司被发现歧视黑人申请者。我们的研究结果表明，对显著黑人名字的歧视集中在少数大型雇主中，其中许多可以通过大规模推断方法以高置信度识别出来。

papers.title: What Happens When Employers Can No Longer Discriminate in Job Ads?
papers.authors: Peter J. Kuhn, Kailing Shen
papers.abstract: When employers’ explicit gender requests were unexpectedly removed from a Chinese job board overnight, pools of successful applicants became more integrated: women’s (men’s) share of call-backs to jobs that had requested men (women) rose by 63 (146) percent. The removal ‘worked’ in this sense because it generated a large increase in gender-mismatched applications, and because those applications were treated surprisingly well by employers. The removal had little or no effect on aggregate matching frictions. The job titles that were integrated however, were not the most gendered ones, and were disproportionately lower-wage jobs.
papers.zh_title: 当雇主无法再在招聘广告中歧视时会发生什么？
papers.zh_abstract: 当中国某招聘网站一夜之间意外移除雇主的明确性别要求后，成功申请者的群体变得更加融合：在原本要求男性的职位中，女性获得回应的比例上升了63%；在原本要求女性的职位中，男性获得回应的比例上升了146%。从这个意义上说，移除性别要求之所以“有效”，是因为它大幅增加了性别不匹配的申请数量，并且这些申请得到了雇主出人意料的良好对待。移除性别要求对总体匹配摩擦几乎没有影响。然而，实现融合的职位并非性别化最严重的那些，而且不成比例地集中在低薪职位上。

papers.title: Optimal Tariffs and Trade Policy Formation: U.S. Evidence from the Smoot-Hawley Era
papers.authors: Douglas A. Irwin, Anson Soderbery
papers.abstract: This paper examines the political economy of U.S. trade policy around the time of the Smoot-Hawley tariff of 1930, a period when policy was unconstrained by trade agreements. We consider a model of politically-optimal trade policy for a large country that can influence its terms of trade and where workers and firms lobby for protection. The predictions of the model hinge on import demand and export supply elasticities, which we estimate using detailed U.S. import data from 1927-35, as well as industry lobbying data. We find that tariff levels are largely determined by firm lobbies, but about about 5 percentage points of the tariffs are explained by terms of trade considerations. Decomposing the politically-optimal tariff in 1931 reveals an intensification of demand for protection by workers in the Smoot-Hawley tariff.
papers.zh_title: 最优关税与贸易政策形成：来自斯穆特-霍利时代的美国证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文考察了1930年斯穆特-霍利关税法案前后美国贸易政策的政治经济学，这一时期政策不受贸易协定的约束。我们考虑了一个大国在可以影响其贸易条件且工人和企业游说寻求保护的情况下的政治最优贸易政策模型。该模型的预测取决于进口需求和出口供给弹性，我们利用1927-1935年间详细的美国进口数据以及行业游说数据对这些弹性进行了估计。我们发现，关税水平主要由企业游说决定，但大约5个百分点的关税可由贸易条件因素解释。对1931年政治最优关税的分解显示，斯穆特-霍利关税中工人对保护的需求有所加剧。

papers.title: “Unusual, Unstable, Complicated, Unreliable and Temporary” Reinterpreting the Ebb and Flow of Globalization
papers.authors: Michael D. Bordo, Catherine R. Schenk
papers.abstract: In 1919, John Maynard Keynes wrote his famous tract The Economic Consequences of the Peace. In that work, he anticipated the collapse of the first era of globalization that began in the mid-nineteenth century. He admonished the short-sighted assumption that these years of relative peace and prosperity for many was a permanent norm, interrupted only briefly by the Great War. The diplomatic failures, lapses in leadership, and promotion of narrow interests and vision outlined by Keynes underpinned his prediction of a backslash of economic nationalism, trade protectionism, and recession.\nThe paper revisits the turning points in the evolution of the global economic system since 1919 by focusing primarily on the evolution of the international monetary system and policy cooperation/coordination. We identify three disruptions and examine how each prompted a change in the underlying ideology about how the international monetary system should organize: World War I, Bretton Woods, 1970s Great Inflation and Managed Floating. Each turning point was characterized by different forms and institutions of cooperation, how rules (either explicit or implicit) were designed and implemented, and the crucial importance of the historical context.
papers.zh_title: “异常、不稳定、复杂、不可靠且暂时”：重新解读全球化的潮起潮落
papers.zh_abstract: 1919年，约翰·梅纳德·凯恩斯撰写了其著名著作《和平的经济后果》。在该书中，他预见了始于19世纪中叶的第一次全球化时代的崩溃。他告诫人们，那种认为对许多人而言相对和平与繁荣的岁月是永久常态、仅被世界大战短暂打断的短视假设是错误的。凯恩斯所概述的外交失败、领导力缺失以及狭隘利益与视野的鼓吹，支撑了他对经济民族主义、贸易保护主义和衰退反弹的预测。本文通过主要关注国际货币体系演变以及政策合作/协调，重新审视了1919年以来全球经济体系演变的转折点。我们识别出三次中断，并考察了每次中断如何促使关于国际货币体系应如何组织的潜在意识形态发生变化：第一次世界大战、布雷顿森林体系、1970年代的大通胀与管理浮动。每个转折点都以不同形式的合作与制度、规则（无论是显性还是隐性）的设计与实施方式，以及历史背景的至关重要性为特征。

papers.title: Is Online Education Working?
papers.authors: Duha Tore Altindag, Elif S. Filiz, Erdal Tekin
papers.abstract: This study examines the impact of instruction modality on student learning outcomes, with a focus on disparities observed pre- and post-pandemic.
