Using administrative data from a public university spanning seven pre-pandemic and five post-pandemic semesters, the analysis controls for endogenous sorting using fixed effects. The findings suggest that face-to-face (FtF) instruction results in better student performance, such as higher grades and a lower withdrawal rate. Additionally, students with greater exposure to FtF instruction are less likely to repeat courses, more likely to graduate on time, and achieve higher GPAs. The study also shows that the FtF advantage has been decreasing over time, and the differences are smaller post-pandemic. The results are consistent across student and instructor characteristics, except for Honors and graduate students, where the FtF advantage is either smaller or statistically insignificant.
papers.zh_title: 在线教育有效吗？
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究考察了教学方式对学生学习成果的影响，重点关注疫情前后观察到的差异。利用一所公立大学涵盖七个疫情前学期和五个疫情后学期的行政数据，分析通过固定效应控制了内生性选择。研究结果表明，面对面教学能带来更好的学生表现，例如更高的成绩和更低的退课率。此外，接触更多面对面教学的学生更不容易重修课程，更有可能按时毕业，并获得更高的平均绩点。研究还显示，面对面教学的优势随时间推移而减小，且疫情后差异更小。除荣誉学生和研究生外，这一结果在不同学生和教师特征中保持一致，对于这些群体，面对面教学的优势要么较小，要么在统计上不显著。

papers.title: Consistent Evidence on Duration Dependence of Price Changes
papers.authors: Fernando E. Alvarez, Katarína Borovičková, Robert Shimer
papers.abstract: We develop an estimator and tests of a discrete time mixed proportional hazard (MPH) model of duration with unobserved heterogeneity. We allow for competing risks, observable characteristics, and censoring, and we use linear GMM, making estimation and inference straightforward. With repeated spell data, our estimator is consistent and robust to the unknown shape of the frailty distribution. We apply our estimator to the duration of price spells in weekly store data from IRI. We find substantial unobserved heterogeneity, accounting for a large fraction of the decrease in the Kaplan-Meier hazard with elapsed duration. Still, we show that the estimated baseline hazard rate is decreasing and a homogeneous firm model can accurately capture the response of the economy to a monetary policy shock even if there is significant strategic complementarity in pricing. Using competing risks and spell-specific observable characteristics, we separately estimate the model for regular and temporary price changes and find that the MPH structure describes regular price changes better than temporary ones.
papers.zh_title: 关于价格变动持续时间依赖性的稳健证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个离散时间混合比例风险模型的估计量和检验方法，该模型考虑了未观测异质性。我们允许竞争风险、可观测特征和删失，并使用线性广义矩估计，使估计和推断变得简单。利用重复持续期数据，我们的估计量是一致的，并且对脆弱性分布的未知形状具有稳健性。我们将该估计量应用于IRI提供的每周商店数据中价格持续期的分析。我们发现存在显著的未观测异质性，这解释了卡普兰-迈耶风险率随持续期延长而下降的很大一部分。尽管如此，我们表明估计的基准风险率是递减的，并且一个同质企业模型可以准确捕捉经济对货币政策冲击的反应，即使定价中存在显著的策略互补性。利用竞争风险和持续期特定的可观测特征，我们分别估计了常规价格变动和临时价格变动的模型，发现混合比例风险结构对常规价格变动的描述优于临时价格变动。

papers.title: Fairness in Incomplete Information Bargaining: Theory and Widespread Evidence from the Field
papers.authors: Daniel Keniston, Bradley J. Larsen, Shengwu Li, J.J. Prescott, Bernardo S. Silveira, Chuan Yu
papers.abstract: This paper uses detailed data on sequential offers from seven vastly different real-world bargaining settings to document a robust pattern: agents favor offers that split the difference between the two most recent offers on the table. Our settings include negotiations for used cars, insurance injury claims, a TV game show, auto rickshaw rides, housing, international trade tariffs, and online retail. We demonstrate that this pattern can arise in a perfect Bayesian equilibrium of an alternating-offer game with two-sided incomplete information, but this equilibrium is far from unique. We then provide a robust-inference argument to explain why agents may view the two most recent offers as corresponding to the potential surplus. Split-the-difference offers under this weaker, robust inference can then be viewed as fair. We present a number of other patterns in each data setting that point to split-the-difference offers as a strong social norm, whether in high-stakes or low-stakes negotiations.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, IO, ITI, LE；JEL：C7, C78, D9, D91
papers.zh_title: 不完全信息谈判中的公平性：理论与来自实地的大范围证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用来自七个截然不同的现实世界谈判场景中关于连续报价的详细数据，记录了一个稳健的模式：参与者倾向于选择平分桌上最近两个报价之间差额的报价。我们的场景包括二手车谈判、保险伤害索赔、电视游戏节目、自动人力车出行、住房、国际贸易关税和在线零售。我们证明，这种模式可以在一个具有双边不完全信息的交替出价博弈的完美贝叶斯均衡中出现，但该均衡远非唯一。然后，我们提供了一个稳健推断的论点，来解释为什么参与者可能将最近的两个报价视为对应潜在剩余。在这种较弱的稳健推断下，平分差额的报价可以被视为公平的。我们在每个数据场景中呈现了许多其他模式，这些模式表明，无论是在高 stakes 还是低 stakes 的谈判中，平分差额的报价都是一种强大的社会规范。

papers.title: Economic Consequences of Hospital Closures
papers.authors: Diane E. Alexander, Michael R. Richards
papers.abstract: Hospitals anchor much of US health care and receive a third of all medical spending, including various subsidies. Nevertheless, some become insolvent and exit the market. Research has documented subsequent access problems; however, less is understood about broader implications. We examine over 100 rural hospital closures spanning 2005-2017 to quantify the effects on the local economy. We find sharp and persistent reductions in employment, but these localize to health care occupations and are more impactful in areas experiencing complete closures. Aggregate consumer financial health and housing markets appear unaffected by the shuttering of a rural hospital.
papers.zh_title: 医院关闭的经济后果
papers.zh_abstract: 医院是美国医疗保健的支柱，并接收了包括各种补贴在内的所有医疗支出的三分之一。尽管如此，一些医院仍会资不抵债并退出市场。研究已记录了随后的就医可及性问题；然而，对其更广泛影响的理解较少。我们考察了2005年至2017年间超过100家农村医院关闭的情况，以量化其对当地经济的影响。我们发现就业出现急剧且持续的减少，但这些影响局限于医疗保健职业，并且在经历完全关闭的地区影响更大。总体消费者金融健康和住房市场似乎未受农村医院关闭的影响。

papers.title: Intangibles, Markups, and the Measurement of Productivity Growth
papers.authors: Nicolas Crouzet, Janice C. Eberly
papers.abstract: In recent years, measured TFP growth in the US has declined. We argue that two forces contributed to this decline: the mismeasurement of intangible capital, and rising markups. Markups affect input shares, while intangibles omitted from measures of investment affect measured capital growth, each potentially generating downward bias in measured TFP growth. Most importantly, when both forces are simultaneously present, their effects reinforce each other and amplify the downward bias in measured TFP growth. Using input-output data, we estimate that this mechanism could account for one-third to two-thirds of the decline in measured TFP growth.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, PR；JEL：D24, D4, E01, E22, G31
papers.zh_title: 无形资产、加成率与生产率增长的度量
papers.zh_abstract: 近年来，美国测算的全要素生产率增长有所下降。我们认为有两种力量导致了这种下降：无形资本衡量的偏差，以及不断上升的加成率。加成率影响投入份额，而从投资衡量中遗漏的无形资产则影响测得的资本增长，每种力量都可能使测得的全要素生产率增长产生向下偏差。最重要的是，当这两种力量同时存在时，它们的效果会相互加强，并放大测得的全要素生产率增长的向下偏差。利用投入产出数据，我们估计这一机制可能解释了测得的全要素生产率增长下降的三分之一到三分之二。

papers.title: Racial Disparities in the Health Effects from Air Pollution: Evidence from Ports
papers.authors: Kenneth Gillingham, Pei Huang
papers.abstract: This study examines the uneven effects of air pollution from maritime ports on physical and mental health across racial groups. We exploit quasi-random variation in vessels in port from weather events far out in the ocean to estimate how port traffic influences air pollution and human health. We find that one additional vessel in a port over a year leads to 3.0 hospital visits per thousand Black residents within 25 miles of the port and only 1.0 per thousand for whites. We assess a port-related environmental regulation and show that the policy can help alleviate racial inequalities in health outcomes.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, EH；JEL：D63, I14, Q51, Q53, Q58, R41
papers.zh_title: 空气污染健康影响的种族差异：来自港口的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究考察了来自海港的空气污染对不同种族群体身心健康的不均衡影响。我们利用远洋天气事件导致的港口船舶准随机变化，来估计港口交通如何影响空气污染和人类健康。我们发现，一年内港口每增加一艘船舶，会导致港口25英里范围内每千名黑人居民中增加3.0次医院就诊，而白人居民仅增加1.0次。我们评估了一项与港口相关的环境法规，并表明该政策有助于缓解健康结果中的种族不平等。

papers.title: Intangible Assets, Corporate Taxes and the Relocation of Pharmaceutical Establishments: The case of Puerto Rico
papers.authors: Zadia M. Feliciano, Meng-Ting Chen
papers.abstract: Puerto Rico operated as a tax haven under U.S. Internal Revenue Code (IRC) Section 936. Firms in the pharmaceutical industry accounted for approximately 50% of tax credits awarded and 20% of employment under the program. The U.S. Congress eliminated the tax exemption program in 2006, creating a natural experiment on the elimination of corporate taxation of intangible assets. We use panel data on establishments from the Quarterly Census of Employment and Wages and a difference in difference methodology to measure the impact of the elimination of IRC Section 936 on pharmaceutical and medical devices using establishments with low, medium and high participation in the program as controls. Survival rates of all manufacturing establishments declined after the phaseout and elimination of the tax exemption program but pharmaceutical and medical devices establishments experienced an additional 6.9% decline. Approximately 50% of the 34% decline in pharmaceutical and medical devices establishments in Puerto Rico from 1995 to 2017 can be attributed to the elimination of IRC Section 936. Employment in pharmaceutical and medical devices establishments, which also declined by 34%, decreased at the same rate as that of other industries. Plant closings accounted for most of the decline in their employment.
papers.zh_title: 无形资产、公司税与制药企业搬迁：以波多黎各为例
papers.zh_abstract: 波多黎各曾根据美国《国内收入法典》第936条作为避税港运营。在该计划下，制药行业的企业约占税收抵免总额的50%和就业人数的20%。美国国会于2006年废除了该税收豁免计划，这为无形资产公司税的取消创造了一个自然实验。我们使用来自《就业与工资季度普查》的企业面板数据，并采用双重差分方法，以低、中、高参与该计划的企业作为对照组，衡量取消《国内收入法典》第936条对制药和医疗器械企业的影响。在税收豁免计划逐步取消和废除后，所有制造业企业的存活率均有所下降，但制药和医疗器械企业额外下降了6.9%。从1995年到2017年，波多黎各制药和医疗器械企业数量下降34%，其中约50%可归因于《国内收入法典》第936条的废除。制药和医疗器械企业的就业人数也下降了34%，其下降速度与其他行业相同。工厂关闭是就业下降的主要原因。

papers.title: Why do Bank Boards have Risk Committees?
papers.authors: René M. Stulz, James G. Tompkins, Rohan Williamson, Zhongxia (Shelly) Ye
papers.abstract: We develop a theory of bank board risk committees. With this theory, such committees are valuable even though there is no expectation that bank risk is lower if the bank has a well-functioning risk committee. As predicted by our theory (1) many large and complex banks voluntarily chose to have a risk committee before the Dodd-Frank Act forced bank holding companies with assets in excess of $10 billion to have a board risk committee, and (2) establishing a board risk committee does not reduce a bank’s risk on average. Using unique interview data, we show that the work of risk committees is consistent with our theory in part.
papers.zh_title: 为什么银行董事会要设立风险委员会？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个银行董事会风险委员会的理论。根据这一理论，即使没有预期银行风险会因拥有运作良好的风险委员会而降低，此类委员会仍然具有价值。正如我们的理论所预测：（1）在《多德-弗兰克法案》强制要求资产超过100亿美元的银行控股公司设立董事会风险委员会之前，许多大型和复杂的银行已自愿选择设立风险委员会；（2）设立董事会风险委员会平均而言并不会降低银行的风险。利用独特的访谈数据，我们表明风险委员会的工作在一定程度上与我们的理论一致。

papers.title: Using Satellite Imagery and Deep Learning to Evaluate the Impact of Anti-Poverty Programs
papers.authors: Luna Yue Huang, Solomon M. Hsiang, Marco Gonzalez-Navarro
papers.abstract: The rigorous evaluation of anti-poverty programs is key to the fight against global poverty. Traditional approaches rely heavily on repeated in-person field surveys to measure program effects. However, this is costly, time-consuming, and often logistically challenging. Here we provide the first evidence that we can conduct such program evaluations based solely on high-resolution satellite imagery and deep learning methods. Our application estimates changes in household welfare in a recent anti-poverty program in rural Kenya. Leveraging a large literature documenting a reliable relationship between housing quality and household wealth, we infer changes in household wealth based on satellite-derived changes in housing quality and obtain consistent results with the traditional field-survey based approach. Our approach generates inexpensive and timely insights on program effectiveness in international development programs.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, EFG, PE；JEL：C8, H0, O1, O22, Q0, R0
papers.zh_title: 利用卫星图像和深度学习评估反贫困项目的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 对反贫困项目进行严格评估是抗击全球贫困的关键。传统方法严重依赖重复的实地入户调查来衡量项目效果。然而，这成本高昂、耗时且通常在后勤上具有挑战性。在此，我们提供了首个证据，表明我们可以仅基于高分辨率卫星图像和深度学习方法进行此类项目评估。我们的应用估算了肯尼亚农村地区近期一个反贫困项目中家庭福利的变化。利用大量文献中记录的住房质量与家庭财富之间的可靠关系，我们根据卫星得出的住房质量变化推断家庭财富的变化，并获得了与传统实地调查方法一致的结果。我们的方法为国际发展项目的有效性提供了低成本且及时的见解。

papers.title: The Heterogeneous Value of a Statistical Life: Evidence from U.S. Army Reenlistment Decisions
papers.authors: Kyle Greenberg, Michael Greenstone, Stephen P. Ryan, Michael Yankovich
papers.abstract: We estimate the value of a statistical life (VSL), or the willingness to trade-off wealth and mortality risk, among 430,000 U.S. Army soldiers choosing whether to reenlist from 2002-2010. Using a discrete choice random utility approach and significant variation in retention bonuses and mortality risk, we recover average VSL estimates between $500,000 and $900,000, an order of magnitude smaller than U.S. civilian labor market estimates. We then document substantial heterogeneity by recovering indifference curves between wealth and mortality risk. The VSL increases with mortality risk within type, and soldiers in combat occupations have lower VSLs than those in noncombat occupations.
papers.zh_title: 统计生命价值的异质性：来自美国陆军重新入伍决策的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估算了2002年至2010年间43万名美国陆军士兵在决定是否重新入伍时的统计生命价值（VSL），即财富与死亡风险之间的权衡意愿。采用离散选择随机效用方法，并利用保留奖金和死亡风险的显著变化，我们得出的平均VSL估计值在50万至90万美元之间，比美国民用劳动力市场的估计值小一个数量级。然后，我们通过恢复财富与死亡风险之间的无差异曲线，记录了显著的异质性。在同一类型内，VSL随死亡风险增加而增加，且战斗岗位士兵的VSL低于非战斗岗位士兵。

papers.title: Concentration and Resilience in the U.S. Meat Supply Chains
papers.authors: Meilin Ma, Jayson L. Lusk
papers.abstract: Supply chains for many agricultural products have an hour-glass shape; in between a sizable number of farmers and consumers is a smaller number of processors. The concentrated nature of the meat processing sectors in the United States implies that disruption of the processing capacity of any one plant, from accident, weather, or as recently witnessed – worker illnesses from a pandemic – has the potential to lead to system-wide disruptions. We explore the extent to which a less concentrated meat processing sector would be less vulnerable to the risks of temporary plant shutdowns. We calibrate an economic model to match the actual horizontal structure of the U.S. beef packing sector and conduct counter-factual simulations. With Cournot competition among heterogeneous packing plants, the model determines how industry output and producer and consumer welfare vary with the odds of exogenous plant shutdowns under different horizontal structures. We find that increasing odds of shutdown results in a widening of the farm-to-retail price spread even as packer profits fall, regardless of the structure. Results indicate that the extent to which a more diffuse packing sector performs better in ensuring a given level of output, and thus food security, depends on the exogenous risk of shutdown and the level of output desired; no horizontal structure dominates. These results illustrate the consequences of policies and industry efforts aimed at increasing the resilience of the food supply chain and highlight that there are no easy solutions to improving the short-run resilience by changing the horizontal concentration of meat packing.
papers.zh_title: 美国肉类供应链的集中度与韧性
papers.zh_abstract: 许多农产品的供应链呈沙漏形状；在数量众多的农民和消费者之间，是数量较少的加工商。美国肉类加工行业的集中性质意味着，任何一家工厂的加工能力因事故、天气或近期所见的大流行导致的工人疾病而中断，都有可能引发系统性的中断。我们探讨了集中度较低的肉类加工行业在多大程度上能降低临时工厂停工的风险。我们校准了一个经济模型，以匹配美国牛肉包装行业的实际横向结构，并进行反事实模拟。在异质性包装工厂进行古诺竞争的情况下，该模型确定了在不同横向结构下，行业产出以及生产者和消费者福利如何随外生工厂停工概率的变化而变化。我们发现，无论结构如何，停工概率的增加都会导致农场到零售价格差扩大，即使包装商利润下降。结果表明，更分散的包装行业在确保给定产出水平（从而保障粮食安全）方面表现更优的程度，取决于外生的停工风险和期望的产出水平；没有哪种横向结构占据主导地位。这些结果说明了旨在提高食品供应链韧性的政策和行业努力的后果，并强调通过改变肉类包装的横向集中度来提高短期韧性并无简单解决方案。

papers.title: Internet Access and its Implications for Productivity, Inequality, and Resilience
papers.authors: Jose Maria Barrero, Nicholas Bloom, Steven J. Davis
papers.abstract: About one-fifth of paid workdays will be supplied from home in the post-pandemic economy, and more than one-fourth on an earnings-weighted basis. In view of this projection, we consider some implications of home internet access quality, exploiting data from the new Survey of Working Arrangements and Attitudes. Moving to high-quality, fully reliable home internet service for all Americans (“universal access”) would raise earnings-weighted labor productivity by an estimated 1.1% in the coming years. The implied output gains are $160 billion per year, or $4 trillion when capitalized at a 4% rate. Estimated flow output payoffs to universal access are nearly three times as large in economic disasters like the COVID-19 pandemic. Our survey data also say that subjective well-being was higher during the pandemic for people with better home internet service conditional on age, employment status, earnings, working arrangements, and other controls. In short, universal access would raise productivity, and it would promote greater economic and social resilience during future disasters that inhibit travel and in-person interactions.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PE, PR；JEL：D24, D84, E24, E27, E71, H54, J22, J24, J31, J81
papers.zh_title: 互联网接入及其对生产力、不平等和韧性的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 在后疫情经济中，大约五分之一的有薪工作日将在家庭中提供，按收入加权计算则超过四分之一。基于这一预测，我们利用新的《工作安排与态度调查》数据，探讨了家庭互联网接入质量的一些影响。为所有美国人提供高质量、完全可靠的家庭互联网服务（“普遍接入”）预计将在未来几年内使按收入加权的劳动生产率提高约1.1%。隐含的产出收益为每年1600亿美元，若按4%的利率资本化则为4万亿美元。在像COVID-19大流行这样的经济灾难中，普遍接入的估计流量产出回报几乎是其三倍。我们的调查数据还表明，在控制年龄、就业状况、收入、工作安排和其他因素后，疫情期间家庭互联网服务较好的人主观幸福感更高。简言之，普遍接入将提高生产力，并在未来抑制旅行和面对面互动的灾难中促进更大的经济和社会的韧性。

papers.title: Dynamic Spatial General Equilibrium
papers.authors: Benny Kleinman, Ernest Liu, Stephen J. Redding
papers.abstract: We incorporate forward-looking capital accumulation into a dynamic discrete choice model of migration. We characterize the steady-state equilibrium; generalize existing dynamic exact-hat algebra techniques to incorporate investment; and linearize the model to provide an analytical characterization of the economy’s transition path using spectral analysis. We show that capital and labor dynamics interact to shape the economy’s speed of adjustment towards steady-state. We implement our quantitative analysis using data on capital stocks, populations and bilateral trade and migration flows for U.S. states from 1965-2015. We show that this interaction between capital and labor dynamics plays a central role in explaining the observed decline in the rate of income convergence across U.S. states and the persistent and heterogeneous impact of local shocks.
papers.zh_title: 动态空间一般均衡
papers.zh_abstract: 我们将前瞻性的资本积累纳入一个动态离散选择迁移模型中。我们刻画了稳态均衡；将现有的动态精确代数技术推广到包含投资；并对模型进行线性化，利用谱分析为经济的转型路径提供解析刻画。我们表明，资本和劳动力动态相互作用，塑造了经济向稳态调整的速度。我们利用1965年至2015年美国各州的资本存量、人口以及双边贸易和迁移流数据，进行了定量分析。我们表明，资本和劳动力动态之间的这种相互作用，在解释观察到的美国各州收入趋同率下降以及地方冲击的持续性和异质性影响方面，发挥着核心作用。

papers.title: A Search and Learning Model of Export Dynamics
papers.authors: Jonathan Eaton, Marcela Eslava, David Jinkins, C. J. Krizan, James R. Tybout
papers.abstract: Exporting abroad is much harder than selling at home, and overcoming hurdles to exporting takes time. Our goal is to identify specific barriers to exporting and to measure their importance. We develop a model of firm-level export dynamics that features costly customer search, network effects in finding buyers, and learning about product appeal. Fitting the model to customs records of U.S. imports of manufactures from Colombia we replicate patterns of exporter maturation. A potentially valuable intangible asset of a firm is its customer base and knowledge of a market. Our model delivers some striking estimates of what such assets are worth. Averaging across active exporters, the loss from total market amnesia (losing its current U.S. customer base along with its accumulated knowledge of product appeal) is US$ 3.4 million, about 34 percent of the value of exporting overall. About half is the loss of future sales to existing customers while the rest is the cost of relearning its appeal in the market and reestablishing visibility as an exporter. As finding buyers takes time, the 5-year response of total export sales to an exchange rate shock exceeds the 1-year response by about 40 percent, with the 1-year response reflecting mostly sales per exporter-importer match and the 5-year response, reflecting the number of matches almost as much as sales per match.
papers.zh_title: 出口动态的搜索与学习模型
papers.zh_abstract: 海外出口比国内销售困难得多，克服出口障碍需要时间。我们的目标是识别具体的出口壁垒并衡量其重要性。我们构建了一个企业层面出口动态模型，该模型包含昂贵的客户搜索、寻找买家过程中的网络效应以及关于产品吸引力的学习。将该模型拟合至美国从哥伦比亚进口制成品的海关记录，我们复现了出口商成熟化的模式。企业一项潜在有价值的无形资产是其客户基础和对市场的了解。我们的模型对这些资产的价值给出了一些惊人的估计。平均而言，对于活跃的出口商，完全市场失忆（即失去其当前的美国客户基础以及积累的产品吸引力知识）造成的损失为340万美元，约占出口总价值的34%。其中约一半是未来对现有客户销售额的损失，而另一半则是重新学习其市场吸引力并重新建立作为出口商知名度的成本。由于寻找买家需要时间，总出口销售额对汇率冲击的5年响应比1年响应高出约40%，其中1年响应主要反映每个出口商-进口商匹配对的销售额，而5年响应则几乎同等程度地反映了匹配数量与每个匹配对的销售额。

papers.title: Structural Change in Labor Supply and Cross-Country Differences in Hours Worked
papers.authors: Alexander Bick, Nicola Fuchs-Schündeln, David Lagakos, Hitoshi Tsujiyama
papers.abstract: This paper studies how structural change in labor supply along the development spectrum shapes cross-country differences in hours worked. We emphasize two main forces: sectoral reallocation from self-employment to wage work, and declining fixed costs of wage work. We show that these forces are crucial for understanding how the extensive margin (the employment rate) and intensive margin (hours per worker) of aggregate hours worked vary with income per capita. To do so we build and estimate a quantitative model of labor supply featuring a traditional self-employment sector and a modern wage-employment sector. When estimated to match cross-country data, the model predicts that sectoral reallocation explains more than half of the total hours decrease at lower levels of development. Declining fixed costs drive the rise in employment rates at higher levels of income per capita, and imply higher hours in the future, in contrast to the lower hours resulting from income effects and expansions in tax-and-transfer systems.
papers.zh_title: 劳动力供给的结构性变化与各国工作时间的差异
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了在发展过程中劳动力供给的结构性变化如何塑造各国工作时间的差异。我们强调两个主要力量：从自雇就业到工资工作的部门再配置，以及工资工作固定成本的下降。我们表明，这些力量对于理解总工作时间的外延边际（就业率）和内涵边际（每个工人的工作时数）如何随人均收入变化至关重要。为此，我们构建并估计了一个包含传统自雇部门和现代工资就业部门的劳动力供给定量模型。当该模型被估计以匹配跨国数据时，它预测部门再配置解释了较低发展水平下总工作时间减少的一半以上。固定成本的下降推动了较高人均收入水平下就业率的上升，并意味着未来工作时间将更高，这与收入效应以及税收-转移支付体系扩张所导致的较低工作时间形成对比。

papers.title: The Great Canadian Recovery: The Impact of COVID-19 on Canada's Labour Market
papers.authors: Stephen R.G. Jones, Fabian Lange, W. Craig Riddell, Casey Warman
papers.abstract: The Canadian labour market experienced a period of unprecedented turmoil following the onset of the COVID-19 pandemic. We analyze the main changes using standard labour force statistics and new data on job postings. Envisaging a phase of temporary severing of employment relationships followed by a phase of more standard labour market search and matching, we use stock and flow data to understand key developments. We fond dramatic changes in employment, unemployment and labour market attachment in the first few months of the pandemic and a broad though gradual recovery through to the end of 2021.
papers.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, EH, LS；JEL：E24, E32, I14, I18, I3, J21, J23, J31, J63
papers.zh_title: 伟大的加拿大复苏：COVID-19对加拿大劳动力市场的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 在COVID-19大流行爆发后，加拿大劳动力市场经历了一段前所未有的动荡时期。我们利用标准劳动力统计数据以及关于职位发布的新数据来分析主要变化。设想一个就业关系暂时中断的阶段，随后是一个更标准的劳动力市场搜索与匹配阶段，我们使用存量和流量数据来理解关键发展。我们发现，在大流行的最初几个月，就业、失业和劳动力市场依附关系发生了剧烈变化，随后到2021年底经历了广泛但渐进的复苏。

papers.title: Inertia, Market Power, and Adverse Selection in Health Insurance: Evidence from the ACA Exchanges
papers.authors: Evan Saltzman, Ashley Swanson, Daniel Polsky
papers.abstract: We study how inertia interacts with market power and adverse selection in managed competition health insurance markets. We use consumer-level data to estimate a model of the California ACA exchange, in which four firms dominate the market and risk adjustment is in place to manage selection. We estimate high inertia costs, equal to 44% of average premiums. Although eliminating inertia exacerbates adverse selection, it significantly reduces market power such that average premiums decrease 13.2% and annual per-capita welfare increases $902. These effects are substantially smaller in settings without market power and/or risk adjustment. Moreover, converting the ACA's premium-linked subsidies to vouchers mitigates the impact of inertia by reducing market power, whereas reducing high consumer churn in the ACA exchanges increases the impact of inertia by enhancing market power. The impact of inertia is not sensitive to provider network generosity, despite greater consumer attachment to plans with more differentiated provider networks.
papers.zh_title: 健康保险中的惯性、市场势力与逆向选择：来自ACA交易所的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在管理竞争型健康保险市场中，惯性如何与市场势力和逆向选择相互作用。我们使用消费者层面数据来估计加利福尼亚州ACA交易所的模型，在该交易所中，四家公司主导市场，并实施了风险调整以管理选择。我们估计出高昂的惯性成本，相当于平均保费的44%。尽管消除惯性会加剧逆向选择，但它显著降低了市场势力，使得平均保费下降13.2%，年人均福利增加902美元。在没有市场势力和/或风险调整的环境中，这些效应要小得多。此外，将ACA与保费挂钩的补贴转换为代金券，通过降低市场势力来减轻惯性的影响，而减少ACA交易所中高消费者流失率则通过增强市场势力来增加惯性的影响。惯性的影响对提供者网络的慷慨程度并不敏感，尽管消费者对具有更差异化提供者网络的计划有更强的依附性。

papers.title: Buying Data from Consumers: The Impact of Monitoring in U.S. Auto Insurance
papers.authors: Yizhou Jin, Shoshana Vasserman
papers.abstract: New technologies have enabled firms to elicit granular behavioral data from consumers in exchange for lower prices and better experiences. This data can mitigate asymmetric information and moral hazard, but it may also increase firms’ market power if kept proprietary. We study a voluntary monitoring program by a major U.S. auto insurer, in which drivers accept short-term tracking in exchange for potential discounts on future premiums. Using a proprietary dataset matched with competitor price menus, we document that safer drivers self-select into monitoring, and those who opt-in become 30% safer while monitored. Using an equilibrium model of consumer choice and firm pricing for insurance and monitoring, we find that the monitoring program generates large profit and welfare gains. However, large demand frictions hurt monitoring adoption, forcing the firm to offer large discounts to induce opt-in while tempering the profitability of heavy ex-post rent extraction. A counterfactual data portability policy would further reduce the firm’s incentive to elicit monitoring data, leading to less monitoring and lower consumer welfare in equilibrium.
papers.zh_title: 从消费者处购买数据：美国汽车保险中监控的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 新技术使企业能够以更低价格和更好体验为交换，从消费者处获取细粒度行为数据。这些数据可以缓解信息不对称和道德风险，但如果保持专有，也可能增强企业的市场势力。我们研究了一家美国主要汽车保险公司实施的自愿监控计划，在该计划中，司机接受短期追踪以换取未来保费的潜在折扣。使用与竞争对手价格菜单匹配的专有数据集，我们记录了更安全的司机自我选择进入监控，而那些选择加入的司机在监控期间变得安全30%。通过使用一个关于保险和监控的消费者选择与企业定价的均衡模型，我们发现该监控计划产生了巨大的利润和福利收益。然而，巨大的需求摩擦损害了监控的采用，迫使企业提供大幅折扣以诱导选择加入，同时抑制了事后大量租金提取的盈利能力。一项反事实的数据可移植性政策将进一步降低企业获取监控数据的激励，导致均衡状态下监控减少和消费者福利降低。

papers.title: The Making of Social Democracy: The Economic and Electoral Consequences of Norway’s 1936 Folk School Reform
papers.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Tuomas Pekkarinen, Kjell G. Salvanes, Matti Sarvimäki
papers.abstract: Upon assuming power for the first time in 1935, the Norwegian Labour Party delivered on its promise of a major schooling reform. The reform raised minimum instruction time in less developed rural areas and boosted the resources available to rural schools, reducing class size and increasing teacher salaries. We document that cohorts more intensively affected by the reform significantly increased their education and experienced higher labor income. Our main result is that the schooling reform also substantially increased support for the Norwegian Labour Party in subsequent elections. This additional support persisted for several decades and was pivotal in maintaining support for the social democratic coalition in Norway. These results are not driven by the direct impact of education and are not explained by higher turnout, or greater attention or resources from the Labour Party targeted towards the municipalities most affected by the reform. Rather, our evidence suggests that cohorts that benefited from the schooling reform, and their parents, rewarded the party for delivering a major reform that was beneficial to them.
papers.zh_title: 社会民主主义的形成：挪威1936年民众学校改革的经济与选举后果
papers.zh_abstract: 挪威工党于1935年首次执政后，兑现了其进行重大学校改革的承诺。这项改革提高了欠发达农村地区的最低教学时间，并增加了农村学校可获得的资源，从而缩小了班级规模并提高了教师工资。我们记录了受改革影响更强烈的群体显著增加了教育年限并获得了更高的劳动收入。我们的主要结果是，学校改革也大幅增加了挪威工党在随后选举中的支持率。这种额外的支持持续了几十年，并且对于维持挪威社会民主主义联盟的支持至关重要。这些结果并非由教育的直接影响所驱动，也不能用更高的投票率，或工党针对受改革影响最大市镇的更多关注或资源来解释。相反，我们的证据表明，受益于学校改革的群体及其父母，奖励了该党实施了一项对他们有利的重大改革。

papers.title: Present Bias Amplifies the Household Balance-Sheet Channels of Macroeconomic Policy
papers.authors: David Laibson, Peter Maxted, Benjamin Moll
papers.abstract: We study the effects of monetary and fiscal policy in a heterogeneous-agent model where households have present-biased time preferences and naive beliefs. The model features a liquid asset and illiquid home equity, which households can use as collateral for borrowing. Because present bias substantially increases households' marginal propensity to consume (MPC), present bias increases the impact of fiscal policy. Present bias also amplifies the effect of monetary policy but, at the same time, slows down the speed of monetary transmission. Interest rate cuts incentivize households to conduct cash-out refinances, which become targeted liquidity-injections to high-MPC households. But present bias also introduces a motive for households to procrastinate refinancing their mortgages, which slows down the speed with which this monetary channel operates.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, EFG, ME；JEL：D14, D15, E03, E2, E21, E5, E62, E71, G4
papers.zh_title: 现时偏向放大宏观经济政策的家庭资产负债表渠道
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在一个异质性主体模型中货币政策和财政政策的效果，其中家庭具有现时偏向的时间偏好和天真的信念。该模型包含一种流动性资产和一种非流动性住房净值，家庭可以用后者作为借款的抵押品。由于现时偏向显著提高了家庭的边际消费倾向（MPC），现时偏向增加了财政政策的影响。现时偏向也放大了货币政策的效果，但同时也减缓了货币传导的速度。降息激励家庭进行套现再融资，这成为针对高MPC家庭的定向流动性注入。但现时偏向也引入了家庭拖延抵押贷款再融资的动机，从而减缓了这一货币渠道运作的速度。

papers.title: The Economics of Electric Vehicles
papers.authors: David S. Rapson, Erich Muehlegger
papers.abstract: We examine the private and public economics of electric vehicles (EVs) and discuss when market forces will produce the optimal path of EV adoption. Privately, consumer cost savings from EVs vary. Some experience net benefits from choosing gasoline cars, even after accounting for EV subsidies. Publicly, we survey the literature documenting the external costs and benefits of EVs and highlight several themes for optimal policy design including, 1) promoting regional variation in EV policies that align private incentives with social benefits, 2) pursuing a time-path of policies that reflect changing marginal benefits, and 3) rationalizing electricity and gasoline prices to reflect their social marginal cost. On the extensive margin, purchase incentives should ramp-down as learning-by-doing and network externalities (to the extent that they exist) diminish; on the intensive margin, gasoline should become relatively more expensive over time than electricity (per mile traveled) to reflect cleaner marginal emissions from electricity generation.
papers.zh_title: 电动汽车的经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了电动汽车（EV）的私人经济学和公共经济学，并讨论了市场力量何时会产生电动汽车采用的最优路径。在私人层面，消费者从电动汽车中获得的成本节省各不相同。即使在考虑了电动汽车补贴后，一些人从选择汽油车中获得了净收益。在公共层面，我们综述了记录电动汽车外部成本和收益的文献，并强调了最优政策设计的几个主题，包括：1）促进电动汽车政策的区域差异，使私人激励与社会效益相一致；2）追求反映边际效益变化的时间路径政策；3）使电价和汽油价格合理化，以反映其社会边际成本。在外延边际上，随着干中学和网络外部性（如果存在的话）的减弱，购买激励应逐步降低；在内涵边际上，随着时间的推移，汽油（每英里行驶）应变得相对比电力更昂贵，以反映发电中更清洁的边际排放。

papers.title: Well-being Analysis Favours a Virus-Elimination Strategy for COVID-19
papers.authors: John F. Helliwell, Max B. Norton, Shun Wang, Lara B. Aknin, Haifang Huang
papers.abstract: A well-being approach requires looking beyond COVID-19 deaths to compare the performance of elimination versus mitigation strategies as measured by other important supports for well-being. What do the data show? Our comparison based on 2020 data shows a virus elimination strategy to be more successful than other options, whether measured in terms of COVID-19 deaths, overall excess deaths, income, unemployment, trust, or mental and physical health. Countries that chose and followed a strategy of reducing community transmission to zero and keeping it there saved lives and better protected income and employment, all without obvious costs to either the social fabric or the mental health of their populations.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, PE；JEL：H12, H51, I14, I18, I31
papers.zh_title: 福祉分析支持针对COVID-19的病毒消除策略
papers.zh_abstract: 福祉方法要求超越COVID-19死亡人数，通过其他对福祉的重要支持指标来比较消除策略与缓解策略的表现。数据显示了什么？我们基于2020年数据的比较表明，无论是在COVID-19死亡人数、总体超额死亡人数、收入、失业率、信任度还是身心健康方面，病毒消除策略都比其他选项更成功。选择并遵循将社区传播降至零并保持这一状态的国家，挽救了生命，并更好地保护了收入和就业，且没有对社会结构或人口心理健康造成明显代价。

papers.title: A Synthetic Model of Disruption and Experimentation
papers.authors: Joshua S. Gans
papers.abstract: This paper examines how a firm's choice of the type of experiment impacts on its potential exploitation of new technological opportunities. It does so in the context of the failure of successful firms (or disruption) where the literature has informally suggested that firms undertake errors in experimental choice (in particular, choosing experiments that involved biased signals). It is shown that firms will generically choose biased over unbiased experiments even when there are no differences in their relative costs. This is done to better inform decisions regarding the exploitation of technological opportunities. It is shown that these choices can differ between incumbents and entrants based on their fundamentals as well as because of the anticipation of competition between them.
papers.zh_title: 颠覆与实验的综合模型
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了企业选择的实验类型如何影响其对新技术机会的潜在利用。这是在成功企业失败（或颠覆）的背景下进行的，文献中非正式地指出企业在实验选择上存在错误（特别是选择涉及有偏信号的实验）。研究表明，即使在没有相对成本差异的情况下，企业通常也会选择有偏实验而非无偏实验。这样做是为了更好地为有关技术机会利用的决策提供信息。研究表明，这些选择在在位企业和新进入企业之间可能因基本面不同以及它们之间竞争的预期而有所差异。

papers.title: Reserves Were Not So Ample After All
papers.authors: Adam Copeland, Darrell Duffie, Yilin Yang
papers.abstract: The Federal Reserve's "balance-sheet normalization," which reduced aggregate reserves between 2017 and September 2019, increased repo rate distortions, the severity of rate spikes, and intraday payment timing stresses, culminating with a significant disruption in Treasury repo markets in mid-September 2019. We show that repo rates rose above efficient-market levels when the total reserve balances held at the Federal Reserve by the largest repo-active bank holding companies declined and that repo rate spikes are strongly associated with delayed intraday payments of reserves to these large bank holding companies. Intraday payment timing stresses are magnified by early-morning settlement of Treasury security issuances. Substantially higher aggregate levels of reserves than existed in the period leading up to September 2019 would likely have eliminated most or all of these payment timing stresses and repo rate spikes.
papers.zh_title: 储备终究并非如此充裕
papers.zh_abstract: 美联储的“资产负债表正常化”在2017年至2019年9月期间减少了总储备，增加了回购利率扭曲、利率飙升的严重程度以及日内支付时间压力，最终在2019年9月中旬导致国债回购市场出现重大混乱。我们表明，当最大的回购活跃银行控股公司在美联储持有的总储备余额下降时，回购利率升至有效市场水平之上，并且回购利率飙升与这些大型银行控股公司的日内储备支付延迟密切相关。国债发行的早间结算放大了日内支付时间压力。与2019年9月之前的时期相比，显著更高的总储备水平很可能消除了大部分或全部这些支付时间压力和回购利率飙升。

papers.title: The Causes of Ukrainian Famine Mortality, 1932-33
papers.authors: Andrei Markevich, Natalya Naumenko, Nancy Qian
papers.abstract: We construct large, unique panel data to study the causes of Ukrainian famine mortality (Holodomor) during 1932-33 and document several new facts: i) Ukraine (the Soviet Union) produced enough food in 1932 to avoid famine in Ukraine (the Soviet Union); ii) mortality was increasing in the pre-famine ethnic Ukrainian population share and unrelated to food productivity across regions; iii) this pattern exists across the Soviet Union, even outside of Ukraine; iv) the pattern was similar at different administrative levels; v) migration restrictions exacerbated mortality; vi) actual and planned grain procurement were increasing, while actual and planned grain retention (production minus procurement) were decreasing in the ethnic Ukrainian population share across regions. Anti-Ukrainian bias in Soviet policy explains up to 92% of famine mortality in Ukraine and 77% in Ukraine, Russia and Belarus; approximately half of the total effect comes from bias in the centrally planned food procurement policy.
papers.zh_title: 1932-33年乌克兰饥荒死亡率的原因
papers.zh_abstract: 我们构建了大型、独特的面板数据来研究1932-33年乌克兰饥荒死亡率（大饥荒）的原因，并记录了几个新事实：i) 乌克兰（苏联）在1932年生产了足够的粮食以避免乌克兰（苏联）发生饥荒；ii) 死亡率随饥荒前乌克兰族人口比例增加而上升，且与各地区粮食生产力无关；iii) 这一模式在整个苏联境内（甚至乌克兰以外）都存在；iv) 该模式在不同行政层级上相似；v) 迁移限制加剧了死亡率；vi) 实际和计划的粮食征购量随乌克兰族人口比例增加而上升，而实际和计划的粮食留存（产量减去征购）则随该比例增加而下降。苏联政策中的反乌克兰偏见解释了乌克兰高达92%的饥荒死亡率，以及乌克兰、俄罗斯和白俄罗斯77%的死亡率；总效应中约一半来自中央计划粮食征购政策中的偏见。

papers.title: Direct and Spillover Effects from Staggered Adoption of Health Policies: Evidence from COVID-19 Stay-at-Home Orders
papers.authors: Vadim Elenev, Luis E. Quintero, Alessandro Rebucci, Emilia Simeonova
papers.abstract: Local policies can have substantial spillovers both across geographies and markets. Little is known about the impact of public health regulations across administrative borders. We estimate U.S. county level direct and spillover effects of Stay-at-Home-Orders (SHOs) aimed at containing the spread of COVID-19 on mobility and social interaction measures. We propose a modified difference-in-difference regression design, based on contiguous-county triplets. This approach compares treated counties, which adopted the SHO, and neighbors, to the neighbor's neighbors, which we term hinterland, counties. We find that mobility in neighboring counties declined by a third to a half as much as in the treated locations. These spillover effects are concentrated in neighbors that share media markets with treated counties. Using directional mobility data, we decompose the spillover decline in mobility into reductions in external visits coming from the treated county and an even stronger voluntary decline in the neighbor county's own traffic. Together, our results provide strong evidence that SHOs operate through information sharing and illustrate the quantitative importance of voluntary social distancing. The finding that the estimated spillovers are in the same direction as the direct effects casts doubt on the prevailing narrative that a more nationally coordinated policy response would have accomplished a greater reduction in mobility and contacts.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, PE；JEL：H75, I1, I18, R1, R38
papers.zh_title: 交错实施健康政策的直接效应与溢出效应：来自COVID-19居家令的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 地方政策可能在地理区域和市场之间产生显著的溢出效应。关于公共卫生法规在行政边界之外的影响，我们知之甚少。我们估算了美国县级旨在遏制COVID-19传播的居家令对流动性和社交互动指标的直接效应和溢出效应。我们提出了一种基于相邻县三联体的修正双重差分回归设计。该方法将采纳居家令的处理县及其邻居与邻居的邻居（我们称之为腹地县）进行比较。我们发现，邻近县的流动性下降幅度是处理县的三分之一到一半。这些溢出效应集中在与处理县共享媒体市场的邻居中。利用方向性流动性数据，我们将流动性的溢出下降分解为来自处理县的外部访问减少，以及邻居县自身交通更强烈的自愿减少。综合来看，我们的结果提供了强有力的证据，表明居家令通过信息共享发挥作用，并说明了自愿社交距离的量化重要性。估计的溢出效应与直接效应方向相同这一发现，对普遍认为更全国协调的政策响应本可实现更大流动性和接触减少的说法提出了质疑。

papers.title: Recreational Marijuana Laws and the Use of Opioids: Evidence from NSDUH Microdata
papers.authors: Mir M. Ali, Chandler B. McClellan, Ryan Mutter, Daniel I. Rees
papers.abstract: Recent studies have concluded that state laws legalizing medical marijuana can reduce deaths from opioid overdoses. Using data from the National Survey on Drug Use and Health, a survey uniquely suited to assessing drug misuse, we examine the relationship between recreational marijuana laws (RMLs) and the use of opioids. Standard difference-in-differences (DD) regression estimates indicate that RMLs do not affect the likelihood of misusing prescription pain relievers such as OxyContin, Percocet, and Vicodin. Although DD regression estimates provide evidence that state laws legalizing recreational marijuana can reduce the frequency of misusing prescription pain relievers, event-study estimates are noisy and suggest that any effect on the frequency of misuse is likely transitory.
papers.zh_title: 娱乐性大麻合法化与阿片类药物使用：来自NSDUH微观数据的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 最近的研究得出结论，允许医用大麻的州法律可以减少阿片类药物过量死亡。使用国家药物使用与健康调查（一项特别适合评估药物滥用的调查）的数据，我们研究了娱乐性大麻合法化与阿片类药物使用之间的关系。标准双重差分回归估计表明，娱乐性大麻合法化不影响滥用处方止痛药（如奥施康定、帕考西特和维柯丁）的可能性。尽管双重差分回归估计提供了证据表明允许娱乐性大麻的州法律可以减少滥用处方止痛药的频率，但事件研究估计结果噪声较大，并表明任何对滥用频率的影响很可能是暂时的。

papers.title: Exploring Spatial Price Relationships: The Case of African Swine Fever in China
papers.authors: Michael S. Delgado, Meilin Ma, H. Holly Wang
papers.abstract: We use a temporary ban on inter-province shipping of live hogs induced by the 2018 outbreak of African Swine Fever (ASF) in China as a natural experiment to study spatial mechanisms behind the dynamics of market integration. With a unique dataset of weekly provincial hog prices, we employ a novel spatial network model to estimate the strength of price co-movement across provinces pre and post the ban. Results indicate that, in the highly integrated national market prior to the ban, longer geographical distances between two provinces did not weaken the strength of their price linkage. The ban broken down spatial integration. Longer distances became a significant obstacle to spatial price linkage in the post-ban periods, implying faster re-integration of hog prices between proximate provinces than remote ones. The negative effect of distance can be rationalized by the interplay between arbitrage opportunities and imperfect information. Our findings highlight information transparency as a key to market integration post shipping bans used to curb animal pandemics like ASF.
papers.zh_title: 探索空间价格关系：以中国非洲猪瘟为例
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用2018年中国非洲猪瘟（ASF）爆发引发的跨省活猪运输临时禁令作为自然实验，研究市场整合动态背后的空间机制。利用独特的省级生猪周价格数据集，我们采用一种新颖的空间网络模型来估计禁令前后各省份之间价格联动强度的变化。结果表明，在禁令前高度整合的全国市场中，两个省份之间较长的地理距离并未削弱其价格联系的强度。禁令打破了空间整合。在禁令后时期，较长距离成为空间价格联系的显著障碍，意味着邻近省份之间的生猪价格比偏远省份更快地重新整合。距离的负面效应可以通过套利机会与不完全信息之间的相互作用来合理化。我们的发现强调了信息透明度是实施用于遏制如ASF等动物疫情的运输禁令后市场整合的关键。

papers.title: The 2000s Housing Cycle With 2020 Hindsight: A Neo-Kindlebergerian View
papers.authors: Gabriel Chodorow-Reich, Adam M. Guren, Timothy J. McQuade
papers.abstract: With “2020 hindsight,” the 2000s housing cycle is not a boom-bust but a boom-bust- rebound. Using a spatial equilibrium regression in which house prices are determined by income, amenities, urbanization, and supply, we show that long-run city-level fundamentals predict not only 1997-2019 price and rent growth but also the amplitude of the boom-bust-rebound. This evidence motivates our model of a cycle rooted in fundamentals. Households learn about fundamentals by observing “dividends” but become over-optimistic in the boom due to diagnostic expectations. A bust ensues when beliefs start to correct, exacerbated by a price-foreclosure spiral that drives prices below their long-run level. The rebound follows as prices converge to a path commensurate with higher fundamental growth. The estimated model explains the boom-bust-rebound with a single shock and accounts quantitatively for the dynamics of prices, rents, and foreclosures in cities with the largest cycles. We draw implications for asset cycles more generally.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：E32, G01, G4, R31
papers.zh_title: 以2020年事后之明看2000年代住房周期：一种新金德尔伯格观点
papers.zh_abstract: 以“2020年事后之明”来看，2000年代的住房周期并非一个繁荣-萧条周期，而是一个繁荣-萧条-反弹周期。使用一个空间均衡回归（其中房价由收入、便利设施、城市化和供给决定），我们表明长期城市层面的基本面不仅预测了1997-2019年的价格和租金增长，还预测了繁荣-萧条-反弹的幅度。这一证据激励了我们基于基本面的周期模型。家庭通过观察“股息”来学习基本面，但由于诊断性预期而在繁荣期变得过度乐观。当信念开始修正时，萧条随之而来，并被价格-止赎螺旋加剧，将价格推至长期水平以下。随着价格收敛到与更高基本面增长相一致的路径，反弹随之而来。估计的模型用单一冲击解释了繁荣-萧条-反弹，并在定量上解释了具有最大周期城市的房价、租金和止赎动态。我们更广泛地得出了对资产周期的启示。

papers.title: The Opioid Safety Initiative and Veteran Suicides
papers.authors: Joshua C. Tibbitts, Benjamin W. Cowan
papers.abstract: We investigate the relationship between opioid diverting policy and suicides among the veteran population. The opioid epidemic of the past two decades has had devastating health consequences among U.S. veterans and military personnel. In 2013, the Veterans Health Administration (VA) implemented the Opioid Safety Initiative (OSI) with the goal of discouraging prescription opioid dependence among VA patients. Between 2012 and 2017, prescription opioids dispensed by the VA fell 41% (VA, 2018). Because this involved the aggressive curtailing of opioid prescriptions for many VA patients, OSI may have had a detrimental effect on veterans’ mental health leading to suicide in extreme cases. In addition, because rural veterans have much higher rates of VA enrollment, more prescription opioid use and abuse, and lower rates of substance abuse and mental health treatment utilization, we expect any effect of OSI on veteran suicides to be concentrated in rural areas. We find that OSI raised the veteran suicide rate relative to the non-veteran (“civilian”) rate with rural veterans suffering the lion’s share of the increase. We estimate that OSI raised the rural veteran suicide rate by a little over one-third between 2013 and 2018.
papers.zh_title: 阿片类药物安全倡议与退伍军人自杀
papers.zh_abstract: 我们调查了阿片类药物转移政策与退伍军人群体自杀之间的关系。过去二十年的阿片类药物流行对美国退伍军人和军事人员造成了毁灭性的健康后果。2013年，退伍军人健康管理局（VA）实施了阿片类药物安全倡议（OSI），旨在阻止VA患者对处方阿片类药物的依赖。2012年至2017年间，VA发放的处方阿片类药物下降了41%（VA，2018）。由于这涉及对许多VA患者积极削减阿片类药物处方，OSI可能对退伍军人的心理健康产生了不利影响，在极端情况下导致自杀。此外，由于农村退伍军人的VA注册率更高，处方阿片类药物的使用和滥用更多，而物质滥用和心理健康治疗利用率更低，我们预计OSI对退伍军人自杀的任何影响都将集中在农村地区。我们发现，OSI提高了退伍军人自杀率相对于非退伍军人（“平民”）自杀率的水平，其中农村退伍军人承担了增长的大部分。我们估计，在2013年至2018年间，OSI使农村退伍军人自杀率提高了略高于三分之一。

papers.title: Public Debt Bubbles in Heterogeneous Agent Models with Tail Risk
papers.authors: Narayana R. Kocherlakota
papers.abstract: This paper studies the public debt implications of a class of Aiyagari (1994)-Bewley (1977)-Huggett (1993) (ABH) models of incomplete insurance in which agents face a near-zero probability of a highly adverse outcome. In generic models of this kind, there exists a public debt bubble, so that the government is able to borrow at a real interest rate that is perpetually below the economic growth rate. Given an equilibrium with a public debt bubble, the primary deficit and the level of debt are both strictly increasing in the real interest rate and in the fraction of government expenditures used for lumpsum transfers. There is no upper bound on the deficit level or long-run debt level that is sustainable in equilibrium. In a public debt bubble, regardless of its size, agents are better off in the long run if the government chooses policies that give rise to a larger debt and primary deficit.
papers.zh_title: 具有尾部风险的异质性代理人模型中的公共债务泡沫
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了一类Aiyagari（1994）-Bewley（1977）-Huggett（1993）（ABH）不完全保险模型中的公共债务含义，其中代理人面临一个接近零概率的高度不利结果。在此类通用模型中，存在一个公共债务泡沫，使得政府能够以永久低于经济增长率的实际利率借款。给定一个存在公共债务泡沫的均衡，基本赤字和债务水平都随实际利率以及用于一次性转移支付的政府支出比例严格递增。在均衡中可持续的赤字水平或长期债务水平没有上限。在公共债务泡沫中，无论其规模大小，如果政府选择导致更大债务和基本赤字的政策，代理人在长期内会变得更好。

papers.title: Industrial Organization of Health Care Markets
papers.authors: Benjamin R. Handel, Kate Ho
papers.abstract: In this paper we outline the tools that have been developed to model and analyze competition and regulation in health care markets, and describe particular papers that apply them to policy-relevant questions. We focus particularly on the I.O. models and empirical methods and analyses that researchers have formulated to address policy-relevant questions, although we also provide an overview of the institutional facts and findings that inform them. We divide the chapter into two broad sections: (i) papers considering competition and price-setting among insurers and providers and (ii) papers focused specifically on insurance and market design. The former set of papers is largely concerned with models of oligopolistic competition; it is often focused on the US commercial insurance market where prices are market-determined rather than being set administratively. The latter focuses on insurance market design with an emphasis on issues raised by asymmetric information, leading to adverse selection and moral hazard. In addition, we discuss the literature on consumer choice frictions in this market and the significant implications of those frictions for I.O. questions.
papers.zh_title: 医疗保健市场的产业组织
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们概述了为建模和分析医疗保健市场竞争与监管而开发的工具，并描述了将其应用于政策相关问题的具体论文。我们特别关注研究人员为应对政策相关问题而制定的产业组织模型、实证方法和分析，尽管我们也提供了为其提供信息的制度事实和发现的概述。我们将本章分为两个主要部分：（i）考虑保险公司和提供者之间竞争与定价的论文，以及（ii）专门关注保险和市场设计的论文。前一组论文主要关注寡头竞争模型；它通常侧重于美国商业保险市场，其中价格由市场决定而非行政设定。后者侧重于保险市场设计，强调由信息不对称引起的问题，导致逆向选择和道德风险。此外，我们讨论了关于该市场中消费者选择摩擦的文献，以及这些摩擦对产业组织问题的重大影响。

papers.title: What Do You Think About Climate Finance?
papers.authors: Johannes Stroebel, Jeffrey Wurgler
papers.abstract: We survey 861 finance academics, professionals, and public sector regulators and policy economists about climate finance topics. They identify regulatory risk as the top climate risk to businesses and investors over the next five years, but they view physical risks as the top risk over the next 30 years. By an overwhelming margin, respondents believe that asset prices underestimate climate risks. We also tabulate opinions about the correlation between growth and climate change; social discount rates appropriate for projects that mitigate the effects of climate change; most influential forces for reducing climate risks; and, most important research topics.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EEE；JEL：G12, G14, G32, H43, Q54, Q56
papers.zh_title: 您如何看待气候金融？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们针对861名金融学者、从业者以及公共部门监管者和政策经济学家，就气候金融主题进行了调查。他们认为，在未来五年内，监管风险是企业与投资者面临的首要气候风险；但展望未来30年，物理风险被视为首要风险。绝大多数受访者认为，资产价格低估了气候风险。我们还汇总了关于以下方面的观点：经济增长与气候变化之间的相关性；适用于减缓气候变化影响项目的适当社会贴现率；降低气候风险最具影响力的力量；以及最重要的研究课题。

papers.title: Labor Market Returns and the Evolution of Cognitive Skills: Theory and Evidence
papers.authors: Santiago Hermo, Miika M. Päällysaho, David G. Seim, Jesse M. Shapiro
papers.abstract: A large literature in cognitive science studies the puzzling “Flynn effect” of rising fluid intelligence (reasoning skill) in rich countries. We develop an economic model in which a cohort’s mix of skills is determined by different skills’ relative returns in the labor market and by the technology for producing skills. We estimate the model using administrative data from Sweden. Combining data from exams taken at military enlistment with earnings records from the tax register, we document an increase in the relative labor market return to logical reasoning skill as compared to vocabulary knowledge. The estimated model implies that changes in labor market returns explain 37 percent of the measured increase in reasoning skill, and can also explain the decline in knowledge. An original survey of parents, an analysis of trends in school curricula, and an analysis of occupational characteristics show evidence of increasing emphasis on reasoning as compared to knowledge.
papers.zh_title: 劳动力市场回报与认知技能的演变：理论与证据
papers.zh_abstract: 认知科学领域的大量文献研究了富裕国家中流体智力（推理能力）上升这一令人费解的“弗林效应”。我们构建了一个经济模型，在该模型中，一个群体的技能组合由不同技能在劳动力市场上的相对回报以及技能生产技术共同决定。我们利用瑞典的行政数据对模型进行了估计。通过结合征兵考试数据与税务登记中的收入记录，我们记录了逻辑推理技能相对于词汇知识的劳动力市场回报上升。估计模型表明，劳动力市场回报的变化解释了测量到的推理能力上升的37%，并且也能解释知识的下降。一项针对家长的原始调查、对学校课程趋势的分析以及对职业特征的分析均显示，与知识相比，对推理能力的重视程度在不断提高。

papers.title: Fiscal Stimulus with Imperfect Expectations: Spending vs. Tax Policy
papers.authors: Riccardo Bianchi Vimercati, Martin S. Eichenbaum, Joao Guerreiro
papers.abstract: This paper addresses the question: how sensitive is the power of fiscal policy at the ZLB to the assumption of rational expectations? We do so through the lens of a standard NK model in which people are dynamic-level-k thinkers. Our analysis weakens the case for using government spending to stabilize the economy when the ZLB binds. The less sophisticated people are, the smaller the government-spending multiplier is. Our analysis strengthens the case for using tax policy to stabilize output when the ZLB is binding. The power of tax policy to stabilize the economy during the ZLB period is essentially undiminished when agents do not have rational expectations. Our results are robust to whether or not Ricardian equivalence holds. Finally, we show that the way in which tax policy is communicated is critical to its effectiveness.
papers.zh_title: 非完美预期下的财政刺激：支出政策与税收政策
papers.zh_abstract: 本文探讨的问题是：在零利率下限约束下，财政政策的效力对理性预期假设的敏感程度如何？我们通过一个标准的新凯恩斯主义模型来研究，在该模型中，人们是动态层级思考者。我们的分析削弱了在零利率下限约束下使用政府支出来稳定经济的理由。人们的认知复杂程度越低，政府支出乘数就越小。我们的分析则加强了在零利率下限约束下使用税收政策来稳定产出的理由。当经济主体不具备理性预期时，税收政策在零利率下限时期稳定经济的能力基本不受影响。我们的结果在李嘉图等价是否成立的情况下都是稳健的。最后，我们表明，税收政策的沟通方式对其有效性至关重要。

papers.title: Soaking Up the Sun: Battery Investment, Renewable Energy, and Market Equilibrium
papers.authors: R. Andrew Butters, Jackson Dorsey, Gautam Gowrisankaran
papers.abstract: Renewable energy and battery storage are seen as complementary technologies that can together facilitate reductions in carbon emissions. We develop and estimate a framework to calculate the equilibrium effects of large-scale battery storage. Using data from California, we find that the first storage unit breaks even by 2024 without subsidies when the renewable energy share reaches 50%. Equilibrium effects are important: the first 5,000 MWh of storage capacity would reduce wholesale electricity prices by 5.6%, but an increase from 25,000 to 50,000 MWh would only reduce these prices by 2.6%. Large-scale batteries will reduce revenues to both dispatchable generators and renewable energy sources. The equilibrium effects lead battery adoption to be virtually non-existent until 2030, without a storage mandate or subsidy. A 30% capital cost subsidy—such as the one in the U.S. Inflation Reduction Act—achieves 5,000 MWh of battery capacity by 2024, similar to the level required under California’s storage mandate.
papers.zh_title: 吸收阳光：电池投资、可再生能源与市场均衡
papers.zh_abstract: 可再生能源和电池储能被视为互补技术，能够共同促进碳排放的减少。我们构建并估计了一个框架，用以计算大规模电池储能的均衡效应。利用加利福尼亚州的数据，我们发现，当可再生能源占比达到50%时，首个储能单元将在2024年实现盈亏平衡，且无需补贴。均衡效应至关重要：首批5000兆瓦时的储能容量将使批发电价降低5.6%，但从25000兆瓦时增加到50000兆瓦时仅能使电价降低2.6%。大规模电池将减少可调度发电机和可再生能源的收入。在没有储能强制要求或补贴的情况下，均衡效应导致电池的采用在2030年之前几乎不存在。30%的资本成本补贴——例如美国《通胀削减法案》中的补贴——将在2024年实现5000兆瓦时的电池容量，这与加利福尼亚州储能强制要求所规定的水平相近。

papers.title: Economic Development, the Nutrition Trap and Metabolic Disease
papers.authors: Nancy Luke, Kaivan Munshi, Anu Oommen, Swapnil Singh
papers.abstract: This research provides a single explanation for: (i) the persistence of malnutrition and (ii) the increased prevalence of metabolic disease (diabetes, hypertension, cardiovascular disease) among normal weight individuals with economic development. Our model is based on a set point for BMI or bodyweight that is adapted to conditions of scarcity in the pre-modern economy, but which subsequently fails to adjust to rapid economic change. During the process of development, some individuals thus remain at their low-BMI set point, despite the increase in their consumption, while others who have escaped the nutrition trap (but are not necessarily overweight) are at increased risk of metabolic disease. The model and the underlying biological mechanism, which are validated with micro-data from India, Indonesia and Ghana can jointly explain inter-regional (Asia-Africa) differences in nutritional status and the prevalence of diabetes.
papers.zh_title: 经济发展、营养陷阱与代谢性疾病
papers.zh_abstract: 本研究为以下两个现象提供了单一解释：（i）营养不良的持续存在，以及（ii）随着经济发展，正常体重个体中代谢性疾病（糖尿病、高血压、心血管疾病）患病率的上升。我们的模型基于一个适应前现代经济匮乏条件的体重指数或体重设定点，但该设定点随后未能适应快速的经济变化。因此，在发展过程中，一些个体尽管消费增加，但仍停留在其低体重指数设定点上；而另一些逃脱了营养陷阱（但不一定超重）的个体，则面临更高的代谢性疾病风险。该模型及其背后的生物学机制，通过来自印度、印度尼西亚和加纳的微观数据得到验证，能够共同解释区域间（亚洲-非洲）在营养状况和糖尿病患病率上的差异。

papers.title: No Free Launch: At-Risk Entry by Generic Drug Firms
papers.authors: Keith M. Drake, Robert He, Thomas McGuire, Alice K. Ndikumana
papers.abstract: After receiving FDA approval, a generic drug manufacturer can launch “at risk” before conclusion of any patent infringement litigation, but it risks paying damages if it loses. The generic can eliminate the risk by waiting to launch until the appeals process is complete but waiting has downsides too. We develop a model that implies that, after the generic has won a district court decision, at-risk entry is generally profitable and will occur quickly unless the cost of waiting for the appeal is very low. We examine generic drug applications that have received FDA approval with “first-filer” status (which precludes later filing generics from entering before the first filer). In our data, the generic and brand usually settled prior to the conclusion of litigation. For the remainder, drugs that received FDA approval prior to a favorable district court decision were always launched at risk. Generics without FDA approval before a favorable district court decision launched upon approval unless the approval was close in time to the appeal decision or it had forfeited the first filer exclusivity (indicating a low cost of waiting). We also consider implications of at-risk entry for social welfare, arguing that at-risk entry is analogous to a “buy out” of the patent with favorable welfare implications in both the short run (consumer prices) and long run (efficient incentives for R&D).
papers.zh_title: 没有免费的上市：仿制药企业的风险进入
papers.zh_abstract: 在获得美国食品药品监督管理局批准后，仿制药制造商可以在任何专利侵权诉讼结束前“冒险”上市，但如果败诉，则需承担支付损害赔偿的风险。仿制药企业可以通过等待上诉程序结束再上市来消除风险，但等待也有弊端。我们构建了一个模型，该模型表明，在仿制药企业赢得地区法院判决后，风险进入通常是有利可图的，并且除非等待上诉的成本非常低，否则会迅速发生。我们研究了已获得美国食品药品监督管理局批准且具有“首仿”资格（这阻止了后续申请的仿制药在首仿企业之前进入市场）的仿制药申请。在我们的数据中，仿制药企业和品牌药企业通常在诉讼结束前达成和解。对于其余案例，在获得有利的地区法院判决之前就已获得美国食品药品监督管理局批准的药物，总是以风险方式上市。在获得有利的地区法院判决之前未获得美国食品药品监督管理局批准的仿制药，则在获批后立即上市，除非批准时间与上诉判决时间接近，或者该企业已丧失首仿独占权（表明等待成本较低）。我们还考虑了风险进入对社会福利的影响，认为风险进入类似于对专利的“买断”，在短期内（消费者价格）和长期内（为研发提供有效激励）都具有有利的福利影响。

papers.title: Return on Student Loans in Canada
papers.authors: Lance Lochner, Qian Liu, Martin Gervais
papers.abstract: This paper uses new administrative data with detailed borrower information and lengthy repayment histories from the Canada Student Loans Program (CSLP) to measure rates of return on undergraduate student loans. We document substantial heterogeneity in returns based on information available at the time loans were disbursed, including province of residence, field of study, and institution of attendance. Field of study is a particularly important determinant of rates of return, explaining 22% of the variation in predicted returns across borrowers. We explore the implications of this variation for CSLP cross-subsidization across borrowers and potential risk-based loan limits. Given the variation in ex ante predicted returns across borrowers, using all available information at the time of loan disbursement, we study the implications of potential cream-skimming of high-return borrowers by private lenders.
papers.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE；JEL：D14, H52, H81, I22, I28, J24
papers.zh_title: 加拿大学生贷款的回报率
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用加拿大助学贷款计划的新行政数据，其中包含详细的借款人信息和漫长的还款历史，来衡量本科生学生贷款的回报率。我们根据贷款发放时可获得的信息，包括居住省份、学习领域和就读院校，记录了回报率的显著异质性。学习领域是回报率的一个特别重要的决定因素，它解释了借款人之间预测回报率差异的22%。我们探讨了这种差异对加拿大助学贷款计划中借款人之间交叉补贴以及潜在的风险导向贷款限额的影响。鉴于借款人之间事前预测回报率的差异，利用贷款发放时可获得的所有信息，我们研究了私人贷款机构可能对高回报借款人进行“撇脂”的影响。

papers.title: Can Monetary Policy Create Fiscal Capacity?
papers.authors: Vadim Elenev, Tim Landvoigt, Patrick J. Shultz, Stijn Van Nieuwerburgh
papers.abstract: Governments around the world have gone on a massive fiscal expansion in response to the Covid crisis, increasing government debt to levels not seen in 75 years. How will this debt be repaid? What role do conventional and unconventional monetary policy play? We investigate debt sustainability in a New Keynesian model with an intermediary sector, realistic fiscal and monetary policy, endogenous convenience yields, and substantial risk premia. When conventional monetary policy is constrained by the ZLB during an economic crisis, increased government spending and lower tax revenue lead to a large rise in government debt and raise the risk of future tax increases. We find that quantitative easing (QE), forward guidance, and an expansion in government discretionary spending all contribute to lowering debt/GDP ratio and reducing this fiscal risk. A transitory QE policy deployed during a crisis stimulates aggregate demand.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：E1, E12, E13, E2, E31, E32, E37, E4, E42, E43, E44, E6, E62, E63, G12, G18, G21
papers.zh_title: 货币政策能否创造财政空间？
papers.zh_abstract: 世界各国政府为应对新冠疫情危机实施了大规模财政扩张，导致政府债务水平达到75年来未见的程度。这些债务将如何偿还？常规和非常规货币政策扮演什么角色？我们在一个包含中介部门、现实财政与货币政策、内生便利收益以及显著风险溢价的新凯恩斯主义模型中研究债务可持续性。当经济危机期间常规货币政策受到零利率下限约束时，增加的政府支出和减少的税收收入导致政府债务大幅上升，并增加了未来增税的风险。我们发现，量化宽松、前瞻性指引以及政府可自由支配支出的扩张都有助于降低债务与国内生产总值比率并减少这种财政风险。在危机期间部署的暂时性量化宽松政策会刺激总需求。

papers.title: The Treasury Market in Spring 2020 and the Response of the Federal Reserve
papers.authors: Annette Vissing-Jorgensen
papers.abstract: Treasury yields spiked during the initial phase of COVID. The 10-year yield increased by 64 bps from March 9 to 18, 2020, leading the Federal Reserve to purchase $1T of Treasuries in 2020Q1. Fed purchases were causal for reducing Treasury yields based on the timing of purchases (which increased on March 19), the timing of yield reversal and Fed purchases in the MBS market, and evidence against confounding factors. Treasury-QE worked more via purchases than announcements. The yield spike was driven by liquidity needs of mutual funds, foreign official agencies, and hedge funds that were unaffected by the March 15 Treasury-QE announcement.
papers.zh_title: 2020年春季的国债市场与美联储的应对
papers.zh_abstract: 在新冠疫情初期，国债收益率飙升。10年期收益率在2020年3月9日至18日期间上升了64个基点，促使美联储在2020年第一季度购买了1万亿美元的国债。基于购买时机（3月19日购买量增加）、收益率反转的时机以及美联储在抵押贷款支持证券市场的购买行为，并排除了混杂因素的证据，美联储的购买行为是降低国债收益率的原因。量化宽松政策通过购买行为而非公告发挥了更大作用。收益率飙升是由共同基金、外国官方机构和对冲基金的流动性需求驱动的，这些需求并未受到3月15日国债量化宽松公告的影响。

papers.title: Retrospective Search: Exploration and Ambition on Uncharted Terrain
papers.authors: Can Urgun, Leeat Yariv
papers.abstract: We study a model of retrospective search in which an agent—a researcher, an online shopper, or a politician—tracks the value of a product. Discoveries beget discoveries and their observations are correlated over time, which we model using a Brownian motion. The agent, a standard exponential discounter, decides the breadth and length of search. We fully characterize the optimal search policy. The optimal search scope is U-shaped, with the agent searching most ambitiously when approaching a breakthrough or when nearing search termination. A drawdown stopping boundary is optimal, where the agent ceases search whenever current observations fall a constant amount below the maximal achieved alternative. We also show special features that emerge from contracting with a retrospective searcher.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, LE, LS, POL；JEL：C61, C73, D25, D83
papers.zh_title: 回顾性搜索：在未知领域的探索与雄心
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个回顾性搜索模型，其中代理人——如研究人员、在线购物者或政治家——追踪某个产品的价值。发现会引发更多发现，且其观测值随时间相关，我们使用布朗运动对此进行建模。该代理人是一个标准的指数折现者，决定搜索的广度和长度。我们完整刻画了最优搜索策略。最优搜索范围呈U形，当代理人接近突破或即将终止搜索时，其搜索最为雄心勃勃。一个回撤停止边界是最优的，即当当前观测值持续低于已实现的最大替代值一个固定幅度时，代理人停止搜索。我们还展示了与回顾性搜索者签订合同时出现的特殊特征。

papers.title: The Past and Future of Economic Growth: A Semi-Endogenous Perspective
papers.authors: Charles I. Jones
papers.abstract: The nonrivalry of ideas gives rise to increasing returns, a fact celebrated in Paul Romer's recent Nobel Prize. An implication is that the long-run rate of economic growth is the product of the degree of increasing returns and the growth rate of research effort; this is the essence of semi-endogenous growth theory. This paper interprets past and future growth from a semi-endogenous perspective. For 50+ years, U.S. growth has substantially exceeded its long-run rate because of rising educational attainment, declining misallocation, and rising (global) research intensity, implying that frontier growth could slow markedly in the future. Other forces push in the opposite direction. First is the prospect of "finding new Einsteins": how many talented researchers have we missed historically because of the underdevelopment of China and India and because of barriers that discouraged women inventors? Second is the longer-term prospect that artificial intelligence could augment or even replace people as researchers. Throughout, the paper highlights many opportunities for further research.
papers.zh_title: 经济增长的过去与未来：半内生视角
papers.zh_abstract: 思想的非竞争性导致了规模报酬递增，这一事实在保罗·罗默最近的诺贝尔奖中得到了强调。其含义是，长期经济增长率是规模报酬递增程度与研究努力增长率的乘积；这是半内生增长理论的本质。本文从半内生视角解读过去和未来的增长。在50多年的时间里，由于教育程度的提高、资源错配的减少以及（全球）研发强度的上升，美国增长已大幅超过其长期增长率，这意味着前沿增长未来可能显著放缓。其他力量则朝着相反方向推动。首先是“寻找新爱因斯坦”的前景：历史上，由于中国和印度的发展不足以及阻碍女性发明家的壁垒，我们错过了多少有才华的研究人员？其次是长期前景，即人工智能可能增强甚至取代人类作为研究人员。全文强调了进一步研究的许多机会。

papers.title: Obedience in the Labor Market and Social Mobility: A Socio-Economic Approach
papers.authors: Daron Acemoglu
papers.abstract: This paper presents an analysis of what types of values, especially in regards to obedience vs. independence, families impart to their children and how these values interact with social mobility. In the model, obedience is a useful characteristic for employers, especially when wages are low, because independent workers require more incentives (when wages are high, these incentives are automatic). Hence, in low-wage environments, low-income families will impart values of obedience to their children to prevent disadvantaging them in the labor market. To the extent that independence is useful for entrepreneurial activities, this then depresses their social mobility. High-income and privileged parents, on the other hand, always impart values of independence, since they expect that their children can enter into higher-income entrepreneurial (or managerial) activities thanks to their family resources and privileges. I also discuss how political activity can be hampered when labor market incentives encourage greater obedience and how this can generate multiple steady states with different patterns of social hierarchy and mobility.
papers.zh_title: 劳动力市场中的服从性与社会流动性：一种社会经济方法
papers.zh_abstract: 本文分析了家庭向子女传递何种类型的价值观（特别是关于服从与独立），以及这些价值观如何与社会流动性相互作用。在模型中，服从性对雇主而言是一个有用的特征，尤其是在工资较低时，因为独立的工人需要更多激励（当工资较高时，这些激励是自动的）。因此，在低工资环境中，低收入家庭会向子女灌输服从的价值观，以避免他们在劳动力市场中处于不利地位。由于独立性对创业活动有用，这进而抑制了他们的社会流动性。另一方面，高收入和特权父母总是灌输独立的价值观，因为他们期望子女能够凭借家庭资源和特权进入高收入的创业（或管理）活动。我还讨论了当劳动力市场激励鼓励更大程度的服从时，政治活动如何受到阻碍，以及这如何产生具有不同社会等级和流动性模式的多重稳态。

papers.title: Valid t-ratio Inference for IV
papers.authors: David S. Lee, Justin McCrary, Marcelo J. Moreira, Jack R. Porter
papers.abstract: In the single-IV model, researchers commonly rely on t-ratio-based inference, even though the literature has quantified its potentially severe large-sample distortions. Building on Stock and Yogo (2005), we introduce the tF critical value function, leading to a standard error adjustment that is a smooth function of the first-stage F-statistic. For one-quarter of specifications in 61 AER papers, corrected standard errors are at least 49 and 136 percent larger than conventional 2SLS standard errors at the 5-percent and 1-percent significance levels, respectively. tF confidence intervals have shorter expected length than those of Anderson and Rubin (1949), whenever both are bounded.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, CH, DEV, ED, EH, IO, LE, LS, PE；JEL：C01, C1, C26, C36
papers.zh_title: 工具变量法的有效t比率推断
papers.zh_abstract: 在单一工具变量模型中，研究人员通常依赖基于t比率的推断，尽管文献已量化了其潜在严重的样本扭曲。基于Stock和Yogo（2005），我们引入了tF临界值函数，从而得出一个标准误调整，该调整是第一阶段F统计量的平滑函数。在61篇《美国经济评论》论文中四分之一的设定下，校正后的标准误在5%和1%显著性水平上分别比传统两阶段最小二乘标准误至少大49%和136%。当两者都有界时，tF置信区间的期望长度比Anderson和Rubin（1949）的置信区间更短。

papers.title: What We Teach About Race and Gender: Representation in Images and Text of Children’s Books
papers.authors: Anjali Adukia, Alex Eble, Emileigh Harrison, Hakizumwami Birali Runesha, Teodora Szasz
papers.abstract: Books shape how children learn about society and norms, in part through representation of different characters. We introduce new artificial intelligence methods for systematically converting images into data and apply them, along with text analysis methods, to measure the representation of skin color, race, gender, and age in award winning children’s books widely read in homes, classrooms, and libraries over the last century. We find that more characters with darker skin color appear over time, but the most influential books persistently depict characters with lighter skin color, on average, than other books, even after conditioning on race; we also find that children are depicted with lighter skin than adults on average. Relative to their growing share of the U.S. population, Black and Latinx people are underrepresented in these same books, while White males are overrepresented. Over time, females are increasingly present but appear less often in text than in images, suggesting greater symbolic inclusion in pictures than substantive inclusion in stories. We then present analysis of the supply of, and demand for, books with different levels of representation to better understand the economic behavior that may contribute to these patterns. On the demand side, we show that people consume books that center their own identities. On the supply side, we document higher prices for books that center non-dominant social identities and fewer copies of these books in libraries that serve predominantly White communities. Lastly, we show that the types of children’s books purchased in a neighborhood are related to local political beliefs.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, POL；JEL：I21, I24, J15, J16, Z1
papers.zh_title: 我们如何教授种族与性别：儿童书籍图像和文本中的代表性
papers.zh_abstract: 书籍塑造了儿童学习社会与规范的方式，部分通过不同角色的代表性实现。我们引入了新的人工智能方法，系统地将图像转换为数据，并结合文本分析方法，测量了过去一个世纪中在家庭、教室和图书馆广泛阅读的获奖儿童书籍中肤色、种族、性别和年龄的代表性。我们发现，随着时间的推移，肤色较深的角色出现得更多，但最具影响力的书籍平均而言持续描绘肤色较浅的角色，即使在控制种族后也是如此；我们还发现，儿童平均被描绘得比成人肤色更浅。相对于其在美国人口中不断增长的份额，黑人和拉丁裔在这些书籍中的代表性不足，而白人男性则被过度代表。随着时间的推移，女性出现得越来越多，但在文本中出现的频率低于图像中，这表明在图片中的象征性包容多于故事中的实质性包容。然后，我们分析了具有不同代表性水平的书籍的供给和需求，以更好地理解可能导致这些模式的经济行为。在需求方面，我们表明人们消费以自身身份为中心的书籍。在供给方面，我们记录了以非主导社会身份为中心的书籍价格更高，并且在主要为白人社区服务的图书馆中这些书籍的副本更少。最后，我们表明社区购买的儿童书籍类型与当地政治信仰相关。

papers.title: Trade-Policy Dynamics: Evidence from 60 Years of U.S.-China Trade
papers.authors: George A. Alessandria, Shafaat Y. Khan, Armen Khederlarian, Kim J. Ruhl, Joseph B. Steinberg
papers.abstract: We study the growth of Chinese exports to the United States, from autarky during 1950–1970 to 15 percent of overall U.S. imports in 2008, taking advantage of the rich heterogeneity in trade policy and trade growth across products during this period. Central to our analysis is an accounting for the dynamics of trade flows, observed trade policy, and expectations about future policy. In our empirical analysis, we estimate the dynamics of the elasticity of Chinese exports to (i) past tariff changes and (ii) the risk of future tariff hikes. We find that Chinese exports responded slowly to the tariff changes that occurred when China was granted Most Favored Nation status in 1980, and that policy uncertainty was more important in the immediate aftermath of this liberalization than in the lead-up to China’s 2001 accession to the World Trade Organization. It is difficult, however, to separately identify these two effects using data alone. In our quantitative analysis, we disentangle these effects by using a structural model to estimate a path of trade-policy expectations. We find that the 1980 reform was largely a surprise and initially had a high probability of being reversed. The likelihood of reversal dropped considerably during the mid 1980s but changed little throughout the late 1990s and early 2000s despite China’s accession to the World Trade Organization in 2001.
papers.zh_title: 贸易政策动态：来自60年中美贸易的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了中国对美出口的增长，从1950-1970年的自给自足状态到2008年占美国总进口的15%，利用了这一时期各产品在贸易政策和贸易增长方面的丰富异质性。我们分析的核心是对贸易流动态、观察到的贸易政策以及未来政策预期的核算。在实证分析中，我们估计了中国出口对（i）过去关税变化和（ii）未来关税上调风险的弹性动态。我们发现，中国出口对1980年中国获得最惠国待遇时发生的关税变化反应缓慢，并且政策不确定性在这次自由化后的直接影响比在中国2001年加入世界贸易组织前夕更为重要。然而，仅使用数据很难单独识别这两种效应。在定量分析中，我们通过使用结构模型估计贸易政策预期的路径来厘清这些效应。我们发现，1980年的改革在很大程度上是一个意外，并且最初被逆转的概率很高。逆转的可能性在1980年代中期大幅下降，但在1990年代末和2000年代初，尽管中国于2001年加入世界贸易组织，这一可能性变化不大。

papers.title: Women's Well-Being During a Pandemic and its Containment
papers.authors: Natalie Bau, Gaurav Khanna, Corinne Low, Manisha Shah, Sreyashi Sharmin, Alessandra Voena
papers.abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic brought the dual crises of disease and the containment policies designed to mitigate it. Yet, there is little evidence on the impacts of these policies on women in lower-income countries, where there may be limited social safety nets to absorb these shocks. We conduct a large phone survey and leverage India's geographically varied containment policies to estimate the association between the pandemic and containment policies and measures of women's well-being, including mental health and food security. On aggregate, the pandemic resulted in dramatic income losses, increases in food insecurity, and declines in female mental health. While potentially crucial to stem the spread of COVID-19, the greater prevalence of containment policies is associated with increased food insecurity, particularly for women, and reduced female mental health. For surveyed women, moving from zero to average containment levels is associated with a 38% increase in the likelihood of reporting more depression, a 73% increase in reporting more exhaustion, and a 44% increase in reporting more anxiety. Women whose social position may make them more vulnerable—those with daughters and those living in female-headed households—experience even larger declines in mental health.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EH；JEL：I14, I15, J16, O12, O38
papers.zh_title: 疫情期间及防控措施下的女性福祉
papers.zh_abstract: COVID-19大流行带来了疾病和旨在缓解疫情的防控政策的双重危机。然而，关于这些政策对低收入国家女性影响的证据很少，这些国家可能缺乏吸收这些冲击的社会安全网。我们进行了一项大规模电话调查，并利用印度地理上多样化的防控政策，来估计大流行和防控政策与女性福祉指标（包括心理健康和粮食安全）之间的关联。总体而言，大流行导致了巨大的收入损失、粮食不安全加剧以及女性心理健康状况下降。虽然防控政策可能对遏制COVID-19传播至关重要，但防控政策的更高普及率与粮食不安全加剧（尤其是对女性而言）以及女性心理健康状况下降相关。对于受访女性而言，从零防控水平转向平均防控水平，与报告更抑郁的可能性增加38%、报告更疲惫的可能性增加73%以及报告更焦虑的可能性增加44%相关。那些社会地位可能使其更脆弱的女性——有女儿的女性和生活在女性户主家庭的女性——心理健康状况下降幅度更大。

papers.title: Lobbying Behind the Frontier
papers.authors: Matilde Bombardini, Olimpia Cutinelli Rendina, Francesco Trebbi
papers.abstract: This chapter investigates the non-market response of firms to international trade shocks increasing the level of competition in U.S. industries. Lobbying expenditures increase as a consequence of import changes related to the China shock. The effect on lobbying is not homogeneous across firms and it concentrates particularly in those producers which are behind the technological frontier. We discuss theoretical mechanisms driving lobbying of firms away from the technological frontier: not only the cost-benefit trade-off between innovation and lobbying is relatively less appealing for low productivity firms, but the collective action ability of low productivity firms improves after a competitive shock.
papers.zh_title: 前沿背后的游说
papers.zh_abstract: 本章研究了企业面对国际贸易冲击（即美国行业竞争加剧）时的非市场反应。与“中国冲击”相关的进口变化导致游说支出增加。游说效应在不同企业间并不均匀，尤其集中在那些处于技术前沿之后的生产者中。我们讨论了推动远离技术前沿的企业进行游说的理论机制：不仅创新与游说之间的成本收益权衡对低生产率企业相对缺乏吸引力，而且竞争冲击后低生产率企业的集体行动能力有所提升。

papers.title: Native Americans’ Experience of Chronic Distress in the USA
papers.authors: David G. Blanchflower, Donna Feir
papers.abstract: Four million Native Americans who identify as single race live in the USA. Another three million identify as Native American in combination with another race. Yet they are rarely the focus of detailed research. We provide the first evidence that levels of consistently poor mental health, or chronic distress, among Native peoples were greater in every year between 1993 and 2020 than among White or Black Americans. We find this to be present among those over the age of thirty but less so for the young. Over time we demonstrate there has been a rise in chronic distress among Native Americans and multi-race individuals. However, chronic distress seems to be lowest among Native peoples living in the seven states with the largest Native American populations of Alaska, Arizona, Montana, New Mexico, North Dakota, South Dakota and Oklahoma. In our judgment these facts are important and not widely known. This stands in stark contrast to the enormous scholarly and media interest in declining physiological well-being among White Americans.
papers.zh_title: 美国原住民的长期心理困扰经历
papers.zh_abstract: 美国有400万自认为单一族裔的原住民，另有300万自认为与其他族裔混合的原住民。然而，他们很少成为详细研究的焦点。我们首次提供证据表明，在1993年至2020年间的每一年，原住民群体中持续心理健康状况不佳（即长期心理困扰）的水平均高于白人或非裔美国人。我们发现这种情况存在于30岁以上的人群中，但在年轻人中较少。随着时间的推移，我们证明原住民和多种族个体的长期心理困扰有所上升。然而，在阿拉斯加、亚利桑那、蒙大拿、新墨西哥、北达科他、南达科他和俄克拉荷马这七个原住民人口最多的州，原住民的长期心理困扰似乎最低。我们认为这些事实很重要且未被广泛知晓。这与学术界和媒体对白人美国人生理健康下降的巨大兴趣形成鲜明对比。

papers.title: Headwinds and Tailwinds: Implications of Inefficient Retail Energy Pricing for Energy Substitution
papers.authors: Severin Borenstein, James B. Bushnell
papers.abstract: Electrification of transportation and buildings to reduce greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions requires massive switching from natural gas and refined petroleum products. All three end-use energy sources are mispriced due in part to the unpriced pollution they emit. Natural gas and electricity utilities also face the classic natural monopoly challenge of recovering fixed costs while maintaining efficient pricing. We study the magnitude of these distortions for electricity, natural gas, and gasoline purchased by residential customers across the continental US. We find that the net distortion in pricing electricity is much greater than for natural gas or gasoline. Residential customers in much of the country face electricity prices that are well above social marginal cost (private marginal cost plus unpriced externalities), while in some areas with large shares of coal-fired generation, prices are below SMC. Combining our estimates of marginal price and SMC for each of the fuels with a large survey of California households' energy use, we calculate the distribution of annual fuel costs for space heating, water heating, and electric vehicles under actual pricing versus setting price at SMC. We find that moving prices for all three fuels to equal their SMC would significantly increase the incentive for Californians to switch to electricity for these energy services.
papers.meta: Programs：EEE, IO；JEL：H23, L51, L71, L94, L95
papers.zh_title: 逆风与顺风：低效零售能源定价对能源替代的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 为减少温室气体排放而推动交通和建筑电气化，需要大规模从天然气和精炼石油产品转换。这三种终端能源均因未定价的污染排放而定价扭曲。天然气和电力公用事业还面临经典的自然垄断挑战：在维持高效定价的同时回收固定成本。我们研究了这些扭曲对美国大陆居民用户购买的电力、天然气和汽油的影响程度。我们发现，电力的净定价扭曲远大于天然气或汽油。美国大部分地区的居民用户面临远高于社会边际成本（私人边际成本加上未定价的外部性）的电力价格，而在一些燃煤发电占比高的地区，价格低于社会边际成本。我们将每种燃料的边际价格和社会边际成本估计值与加州家庭能源使用的大规模调查相结合，计算了在实际定价与社会边际成本定价下，空间供暖、水暖和电动汽车的年度燃料成本分布。我们发现，将所有三种燃料的价格调整至等于其社会边际成本，将显著增加加州人将这些能源服务转向电力的激励。

papers.title: Does Offshoring Production Reduce Innovation: Firm-Level Evidence from Taiwan
papers.authors: Lee G. Branstetter, Jong-Rong Chen, Britta Glennon, Nikolas Zolas
papers.abstract: Does the offshoring of production degrade or enhance the innovative capabilities of manufacturing firms? We contribute to this debate by exploiting a policy shock that differentially affected the ability of Taiwanese firms to offshore some products to China. We find causal evidence that offshoring impacts both the level and nature of innovation. In the technologies directly related to product categories that could be offshored more easily after the policy shock, overall innovation levels decline and innovative effort shifts away from product innovation and towards process innovation. However, we also find evidence of a second-order positive effect of offshoring on the levels of innovation—particularly product innovation—in other parts of the firm’s portfolio. These results are consistent with the notion that offshoring production induces a complex reallocation of innovation effort within the firm, both across and within technology categories. Our paper examines this reallocation in the context of Taiwanese electronics firms, and introduces new methods that could be used to study post-offshoring reallocations of innovative effort in other contexts.
papers.zh_title: 生产外包会降低创新吗：来自台湾企业的证据
