papers.title: Measuring the Welfare Cost of Asymmetric Information in Consumer Credit Markets
papers.authors: Anthony A. DeFusco, Huan Tang, Constantine Yannelis
papers.abstract: Information asymmetries are known in theory to lead to inefficiently low credit provision, yet empirical estimates of the resulting welfare losses are scarce. This paper leverages a randomized experiment conducted by a large fintech lender to estimate welfare losses arising from asymmetric information in the market for online consumer credit. Building on methods from the insurance literature, we show how exogenous variation in interest rates can be used to estimate borrower demand and lender cost curves and recover implied welfare losses. While asymmetric information generates large equilibrium price distortions, we find only small overall welfare losses, particularly for high-credit-score borrowers.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, PE；JEL：D14, D82, G10, G23, G5
papers.zh_title: 衡量消费者信贷市场中信息不对称的福利成本
papers.zh_abstract: 理论上已知信息不对称会导致信贷供给效率低下，但由此产生的福利损失的实证估计却很少。本文利用一家大型金融科技贷款机构进行的随机实验，来估计在线消费者信贷市场中因信息不对称而产生的福利损失。基于保险文献中的方法，我们展示了如何利用利率的外生变化来估计借款人的需求和贷款人的成本曲线，并恢复隐含的福利损失。虽然信息不对称导致了巨大的均衡价格扭曲，但我们发现总体福利损失很小，尤其是对于高信用评分的借款人。

papers.title: The Geography of Unemployment
papers.authors: Adrien Bilal
papers.abstract: Unemployment rates differ widely across local labor markets. I offer new empirical evidence that high local unemployment emerges because of elevated local job losing rates. Local employers, rather than local workers or location-specific factors, account for most of spatial gaps in job stability. I then propose a theory in which spatial differences in job loss emerge in equilibrium because of systematic differences between employers across local labor markets. The spatial allocation of heterogeneous employers in turn follows from their spatial sorting decisions. Labor market frictions induce productive employers to over-value locating close to each other. The optimal policy incentivizes them to relocate towards areas with high job losing rates, providing a rationale for commonly used place-based policies. I estimate the model using French administrative data. The estimated model accounts for over three fourths of the cross-sectional dispersion in unemployment rates and for the respective contributions of job losing and job finding rates. Inefficient location choices by employers amplify spatial unemployment differentials five-fold. Both real-world and optimal place-based policies can yield sizable local and aggregate welfare gains.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, ITI, LS, PE；JEL：E20, E24, E60, F16, H21, J42, J61, J63, J64, R13, R23
papers.zh_title: 失业的地理分布
papers.zh_abstract: 不同地方劳动力市场的失业率差异很大。我提供了新的实证证据，表明高地方失业率是由于地方失业率上升所致。地方雇主，而非地方工人或地点特定因素，解释了大部分工作稳定性的空间差异。然后，我提出一个理论，其中失业的空间差异在均衡中出现，是因为不同地方劳动力市场的雇主之间存在系统性差异。异质性雇主的空间分配反过来源于他们的空间分类决策。劳动力市场摩擦促使高生产率雇主过度重视彼此靠近选址。最优政策激励他们向失业率高的地区迁移，这为常用的地方政策提供了理由。我使用法国行政数据估计了该模型。估计的模型解释了超过四分之三的失业率横截面差异，以及失业率和就业率的各自贡献。雇主的低效选址选择将空间失业差异放大了五倍。现实世界和最优的地方政策都能产生可观的地方和总体福利收益。

papers.title: Signaling in Online Credit Markets
papers.authors: Kei Kawai, Ken Onishi, Kosuke Uetake
papers.abstract: We study how signaling affects equilibrium outcomes and welfare in an online credit market using detailed data on loan characteristics and borrower repayment. We build and estimate an equilibrium model in which a borrower may signal her default risk through the reserve interest rate. Comparing a market with and without signaling relative to the benchmark with no asymmetric information, we find that adverse selection destroys as much as 34% of total surplus, up to 78% of which can be restored with signaling. We also estimate backward-bending supply curves for some markets, consistent with the prediction of Stiglitz & Weiss (1981).
papers.zh_title: 在线信贷市场中的信号传递
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用贷款特征和借款人还款的详细数据，研究信号传递如何影响在线信贷市场的均衡结果和福利。我们构建并估计了一个均衡模型，其中借款人可能通过保留利率来传递其违约风险。将存在信号传递的市场与不存在信号传递的市场相对于无信息不对称的基准进行比较，我们发现逆向选择会破坏高达34%的总剩余，其中高达78%可以通过信号传递恢复。我们还估计了某些市场的向后弯曲供给曲线，这与Stiglitz & Weiss（1981）的预测一致。

papers.title: Fragile Algorithms and Fallible Decision-Makers: Lessons from the Justice System
papers.authors: Jens Ludwig, Sendhil Mullainathan
papers.abstract: Algorithms (in some form) are already widely used in the criminal justice system. We draw lessons from this experience for what is to come for the rest of society as machine learning diffuses. We find economists and other social scientists have a key role to play in shaping the impact of algorithms, in part through improving the tools used to build them.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, LE, LS, PE, PR；JEL：C01, C54, C55, D8, H0, K0
papers.zh_title: 脆弱的算法与易错的决策者：来自司法系统的教训
papers.zh_abstract: 算法（以某种形式）已经在刑事司法系统中被广泛使用。我们从这一经验中汲取教训，以预见随着机器学习的普及，社会其他领域将面临什么。我们发现，经济学家和其他社会科学家在塑造算法的影响方面可以发挥关键作用，部分是通过改进用于构建算法的工具。

papers.title: The Aftermath of Debt Surges
papers.authors: M. Ayhan Kose, Franziska L. Ohnsorge, Carmen M. Reinhart, Kenneth S. Rogoff
papers.abstract: Debt in emerging market and developing economies (EMDEs) is at its highest level in half a century. In about nine out of 10 EMDEs, debt is higher now than it was in 2010 and, in half of the EMDEs, debt is more than 30 percentage points of gross domestic product higher. Historically, elevated debt levels increased the incidence of debt distress, particularly in EMDEs and particularly when financial market conditions turned less benign. This paper reviews an encompassing menu of options that have, in the past, helped lower debt burdens. Specifically, it examines orthodox options (enhancing growth, fiscal consolidation, privatization, and wealth taxation) and heterodox options (inflation, financial repression, debt default and restructuring). The mix of feasible options depends on country characteristics and the type of debt. However, none of these options comes without political, economic, and social costs. Some options may ultimately be ineffective unless vigorously implemented. Policy reversals in difficult times have been common. The challenges associated with debt reduction raise questions of global governance, including to what extent advanced economies can cast their net wider to cushion prospective shocks to EMDEs.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM；JEL：E32, E63, F34, F44, F62, H6, H63
papers.zh_title: 债务激增的后果
papers.zh_abstract: 新兴市场和发展中经济体的债务已达到半个世纪以来的最高水平。在约十分之九的新兴市场和发展中经济体中，当前债务水平高于2010年，而在其中一半的经济体中，债务占国内生产总值的比重高出30个百分点以上。从历史来看，高债务水平增加了债务困境的发生率，尤其是在新兴市场和发展中经济体，并且当金融市场条件变得不那么有利时尤为如此。本文回顾了过去有助于降低债务负担的一系列全面选项。具体而言，它考察了正统选项（促进增长、财政整顿、私有化和财富税）以及非正统选项（通货膨胀、金融抑制、债务违约和重组）。可行选项的组合取决于国家特征和债务类型。然而，这些选项无一不伴随着政治、经济和社会成本。除非得到有力执行，否则某些选项最终可能无效。困难时期的政策逆转屡见不鲜。与债务削减相关的挑战引发了全球治理问题，包括发达经济体在多大程度上可以扩大其覆盖范围，以缓冲新兴市场和发展中经济体可能面临的冲击。

papers.title: Experimental Evidence on Semi-structured Bargaining with Private Information
papers.authors: Margherita Comola, Marcel Fafchamps
papers.abstract: We conduct a laboratory experiment to study a decentralized market where goods are differentiated and evaluations are private. We implement different semi-structured bargaining protocols based on deferred acceptance, and we compare their performance to the benchmark scenario of a sealed-bid auction. We show that bargaining dramatically improves efficiency, mainly to the benefit of players rather than the silent auctioneer. A protocol of unconstrained simultaneous bargaining performs best, doubling the proportion of deals relative to the benchmark. This is because participants seek to reveal information through a gradual bidding-up strategy that favors bargaining environments. Aggregate efficiency nonetheless suffers from the fact that buyers bargain harder than sellers, and that some players over-bargain to appropriate a larger share of the unknown surplus.
papers.zh_title: 关于具有私人信息的半结构化谈判的实验证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们进行了一项实验室实验，以研究一个商品差异化且评价为私有的分散市场。我们实施了基于延迟接受的不同半结构化谈判协议，并将其表现与密封投标拍卖的基准情景进行比较。我们表明，谈判显著提高了效率，主要惠及参与者而非沉默的拍卖者。一种无约束的同时谈判协议表现最佳，使交易比例相对于基准翻了一番。这是因为参与者试图通过一种有利于谈判环境的渐进出价策略来揭示信息。然而，总体效率因买方比卖方更努力讨价还价，以及一些参与者过度讨价还价以获取更大份额的未知剩余而受损。

papers.title: The Heterogeneous Effects of Large and Small Minimum Wage Changes: Evidence over the Short and Medium Run Using a Pre-Analysis Plan
papers.authors: Jeffrey Clemens, Michael R. Strain
papers.abstract: This paper advances the use of pre-analysis plans in non-experimental research settings. In a study of recent minimum wage changes, we demonstrate how analyses of medium- and long-run impacts of policy interventions can be pre-specified as extensions to short-run analyses. Further, our pre-analysis plan includes comparisons of the effects of large vs. small minimum wage increases, which is a theoretically motivated dimension of heterogeneity. We discuss how these use cases harness the strengths of pre-analysis plans while mitigating their weaknesses. This project’s initial analyses explored CPS and ACS data from 2011 through 2015. Alongside these analyses, we pre-committed to analyses incorporating CPS and ACS data extending through 2019. Averaging across the specifications in our pre-analysis plan, we estimate that relatively large minimum wage increases reduced employment rates among low-skilled individuals by just over 2.5 percentage points. Our estimates of the effects of relatively small minimum wage increases vary across data sets and specifications but are, on average, both economically and statistically indistinguishable from zero. We estimate that medium-run effects exceed short-run effects and that the elasticity of employment with respect to the minimum wage is substantially more negative for large minimum wage increases than for small increases.
papers.zh_title: 大规模与小幅最低工资变动的异质性效应：基于预分析计划的短期和中期证据
papers.zh_abstract: 本文推进了预分析计划在非实验研究环境中的应用。在一项关于近期最低工资变动的研究中，我们展示了如何将政策干预的中长期影响分析预先指定为短期分析的扩展。此外，我们的预分析计划包括对大规模与小幅最低工资增长效应的比较，这是一个具有理论动机的异质性维度。我们讨论了这些用例如何利用预分析计划的优势，同时减轻其弱点。该项目的初步分析考察了2011年至2015年的CPS和ACS数据。伴随这些分析，我们预先承诺了纳入延伸至2019年的CPS和ACS数据的分析。根据我们预分析计划中的各项设定进行平均，我们估计相对较大的最低工资增长使低技能个体的就业率降低了略高于2.5个百分点。我们对相对较小最低工资增长效应的估计在不同数据集和设定之间有所变化，但平均而言，在经济上和统计上都与零无显著差异。我们估计中期效应超过短期效应，并且对于大规模最低工资增长，就业相对于最低工资的弹性比小幅增长更为负向。

papers.title: The Long-Term Effects of Industrial Policy
papers.authors: Jaedo Choi, Andrei A. Levchenko
papers.abstract: This paper provides causal evidence on the impact of a large-scale industrial policy – South Korea’s Heavy and Chemical Industry (HCI) Drive – on firms’ long-term performance and quantifies its long-term welfare effects. Using unique historical data on the universe of firm-level subsidies and a natural experiment, we find large and persistent effects of this industrial policy. Subsidized firms grew faster than those never subsidized for 30 years after subsidies ended. We build a quantitative heterogeneous firm model that rationalizes these effects through a combination of learning-by-doing and financial frictions. The model is calibrated to firm-level data, and its key parameters are disciplined with the econometric estimates. The HCI Drive generated larger benefits than costs. If it had not been implemented, South Korea’s welfare would have been 3-4% lower. The majority of the total welfare impact comes from the long-term productivity benefits of learning-by-doing.
papers.zh_title: 产业政策的长期效应
papers.zh_abstract: 本文提供了关于大规模产业政策——韩国的重化工业驱动——对企业长期绩效影响的因果证据，并量化了其长期福利效应。利用关于企业层面补贴全体的独特历史数据和一个自然实验，我们发现该产业政策具有巨大且持久的影响。受补贴企业在补贴结束后30年内增长速度始终快于从未受补贴的企业。我们构建了一个定量异质性企业模型，通过边干边学和金融摩擦的结合来解释这些效应。该模型根据企业层面数据进行校准，其关键参数由计量经济学估计加以约束。重化工业驱动带来的收益大于成本。如果它没有被实施，韩国的福利将降低3-4%。总福利影响的大部分来自边干边学的长期生产率收益。

papers.title: The Pandemic’s Effect on Demand for Public Schools, Homeschooling, and Private Schools
papers.authors: Tareena Musaddiq, Kevin M. Stange, Andrew Bacher-Hicks, Joshua Goodman
papers.abstract: The Covid-19 pandemic drastically disrupted the functioning of U.S. public schools, potentially changing the relative appeal of alternatives such as homeschooling and private schools. We study changes in families’ choices of school sector using longitudinal student-level administrative data from Michigan and nationally representative data from the Census Household Pulse Survey. Public school enrollment declined noticeably in fall 2020, with 3 percent of Michigan students and 10 percent of kindergartners using other options. Most of this came from homeschooling rates jumping substantially among families with children in elementary school. Consistent with heterogeneous parental preferences for instructional mode, homeschooling increased more where schools provided in-person instruction while private schooling increased more where instruction was remote. Kindergarten declines were highest among low income and Black families while declines in other grades were highest among higher income and White families, highlighting important heterogeneity by students’ existing attachment to public schools. Our results shed light on how families make schooling decisions and imply potential longer-run disruptions to public schools in the form of decreased enrollment and changed composition of the student body.
papers.zh_title: 疫情对公立学校、家庭教育和私立学校需求的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 新冠疫情严重扰乱了美国公立学校的运作，可能改变了家庭教育、私立学校等替代选择的相对吸引力。我们利用密歇根州的纵向学生层面行政数据和全国代表性的人口普查家庭脉搏调查数据，研究了家庭在学校部门选择上的变化。2020年秋季，公立学校入学率显著下降，密歇根州3%的学生和10%的幼儿园儿童选择了其他选项。这主要源于有小学儿童的家庭中家庭教育率大幅上升。与家长对教学模式的异质性偏好一致，在提供面对面教学的学校地区，家庭教育增加更多，而在远程教学的地区，私立学校教育增加更多。幼儿园入学率下降在低收入和黑人家庭中最高，而其他年级的下降在较高收入和白人家庭中最高，突显了学生与公立学校现有依附关系的重要异质性。我们的结果揭示了家庭如何做出教育决策，并暗示了公立学校可能面临的长期干扰，表现为入学率下降和学生构成的变化。

papers.title: Urban Resilience
papers.authors: Edward L. Glaeser
papers.abstract: Will COVID-19 end the urban renaissance that many cities have experienced since the 1980s? This essay selectively reviews the copious literature that now exists on the long-term impact of natural disasters. At this point, the long-run resilience of cities to many forms of physical destruction, including bombing, earthquakes and fires, has been well-documented. The destruction of human capital may leave a longer imprint, but cities have persisted through many plagues over the past millennia. By contrast, economic and political shocks, including deindustrialization or the loss of capital city status, can enormously harm an urban area. These facts suggest that the COVID-19 pandemic will only significantly alter urban fortunes, if it is accompanied by a major economic shift, such as widespread adoption of remote work, or political shifts that could lead businesses and the wealthy to leave urban areas. The combination of an increased ability to relocate with increased local redistribution or deterioration of local amenity levels or both could recreate some of the key attributes of the urban crisis of the 1970s.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG；JEL：R11, R23, R28, R5, R53, R58
papers.zh_title: 城市韧性
papers.zh_abstract: 新冠疫情会终结许多城市自1980年代以来经历的城市复兴吗？本文有选择地回顾了关于自然灾害长期影响的现有大量文献。目前，城市对多种形式物理破坏（包括轰炸、地震和火灾）的长期韧性已有充分记录。人力资本的破坏可能留下更持久的印记，但城市在过去千年中经历了多次瘟疫而持续存在。相比之下，经济和政治冲击，包括去工业化或失去首都地位，可能对城市区域造成巨大损害。这些事实表明，新冠疫情只有在伴随重大经济转变（如远程工作的广泛采用）或可能导致企业和富人离开城市区域的政治转变时，才会显著改变城市命运。搬迁能力的增强与地方再分配增加或地方便利设施水平恶化或两者兼而有之，可能重现1970年代城市危机的某些关键特征。

papers.title: The Rise of Scientific Research in Corporate America
papers.authors: Ashish Arora, Sharon Belenzon, Konstantin Kosenko, Jungkyu Suh, Yishay Yafeh
papers.abstract: It is widely believed that university and corporate research are complementary: Companies invest in research in part to develop the capacity to absorb the knowledge emerging from universities. However, as we show in this paper, corporate research in the United States emerged when American universities were behind the world frontier in scientific research. Why, then, did for-profit businesses choose to invest in creating new knowledge, much of which could spill over to rivals, and whose conduct presented many managerial challenges? We argue that corporate research in America arose in the 1920s to compensate for weak university research, not to complement it. Using newly assembled firm-level data from the 1920s and 1930s, we find that companies invested in research because inventions increasingly relied on science, but American universities were unable to meet their needs. Large firms, close to the technological frontier, and operating in concentrated industries were likely to invest in research, especially in scientific disciplines where American universities lagged behind the scientific frontier. Corporate science seems to have paid off, resulting in novel patents and high market valuations for firms engaged in research.
papers.zh_title: 美国企业科学研究的兴起
papers.zh_abstract: 人们普遍认为大学和企业研究是互补的：公司投资于研究部分是为了培养吸收大学知识的能力。然而，正如我们在本文中所展示的，美国的企业研究是在美国大学落后于世界科学研究前沿时兴起的。那么，为什么营利性企业选择投资于创造新知识，其中大部分可能溢出给竞争对手，且其管理面临诸多挑战？我们认为，美国的企业研究在1920年代兴起是为了弥补大学研究的薄弱，而非补充它。利用1920年代和1930年代新整理的企业层面数据，我们发现公司投资于研究是因为发明越来越依赖科学，但美国大学无法满足其需求。大型企业、接近技术前沿的企业以及在集中行业运营的企业更有可能投资于研究，尤其是在美国大学落后于科学前沿的科学学科中。企业科学似乎取得了回报，产生了新颖的专利，并给从事研究的企业带来了高市场估值。

papers.title: Frictions in Product Markets
papers.authors: Alessandro Gavazza, Alessandro Lizzeri
papers.abstract: This is an invited chapter for the forthcoming Volume 4 of the Handbook of Industrial Organization. We focus on markets with frictions, such as transaction costs, asymmetric information, search and matching frictions. We discuss how such frictions affect allocations, favor the emergence of intermediaries or dealers, and potentially create market power. Our focus is mostly on markets with many participants rather than on transactions that are bilateral or involve a small number of players.
papers.zh_title: 产品市场中的摩擦
papers.zh_abstract: 这是为即将出版的《产业组织手册》第4卷撰写的一章。我们关注存在摩擦的市场，例如交易成本、信息不对称、搜索和匹配摩擦。我们讨论了这些摩擦如何影响资源配置、促进中介或交易商的涌现，并可能创造市场势力。我们的重点主要是参与者众多的市场，而非双边或涉及少量参与者的交易。

papers.title: The Effect of Safety Net Generosity on Maternal Mental Health and Risky Health Behaviors
papers.authors: Lucie Schmidt, Lara Shore-Sheppard, Tara Watson
papers.abstract: Single mothers are more likely to experience mental health problems and stress-related negative health behaviors, but a more generous safety net may improve these outcomes. We use a simulated safety net eligibility approach that accounts for interactions across safety net programs and relies on changing policies across states and time to identify causal effects of safety net generosity on psychological distress and risky behaviors of single mothers. Results suggest that a more generous safety net is protective of maternal mental health: a $1000 increase to the simulated potential combined cash and food benefit package reduces severe psychological distress by 8.4 percent. Breaking out effects by individual programs while still controlling for potential benefits from other programs, we find protective effects of tax credits, cash benefits provided by Temporary Assistance for Needy Families, and food benefits provided by Supplemental Nutritional Assistance, but no effects of Medicaid eligibility. The effects are primarily driven by single mothers with the lowest levels of education. We find no significant effects of generosity on daily smoking, but we find evidence that benefits reduce the likelihood of heavy drinking. Results suggest that government investments in resources available to low-income families are effective at improving well-being.
papers.zh_title: 安全网慷慨程度对母亲心理健康及风险健康行为的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 单身母亲更易出现心理健康问题和压力相关的负面健康行为，但更慷慨的安全网可能改善这些结果。我们采用模拟安全网资格方法，该方法考虑了安全网项目间的相互作用，并依赖各州及不同时期政策变化来识别安全网慷慨程度对单身母亲心理困扰和风险行为的因果效应。结果表明，更慷慨的安全网对母亲心理健康具有保护作用：模拟潜在现金与食品福利组合每增加1000美元，严重心理困扰降低8.4%。在分解各项目效应并同时控制其他项目潜在福利后，我们发现税收抵免、贫困家庭临时援助提供的现金福利以及补充营养援助提供的食品福利具有保护作用，但医疗补助资格无显著影响。这些效应主要由教育水平最低的单身母亲驱动。我们发现慷慨程度对每日吸烟无显著影响，但有证据表明福利降低了重度饮酒的可能性。结果表明，政府对低收入家庭可用资源的投资能有效改善福祉。

papers.title: Empirical Models of Demand and Supply in Differentiated Products Industries
papers.authors: Amit Gandhi, Aviv Nevo
papers.abstract: This is an invited chapter for the forthcoming Volume 4 of the Handbook of Industrial Organization. We present empirical models of demand and supply in differentiated products industries with an emphasis on the key ideas arising from the recent applied literature. We start with a discussion of the challenges in modeling and estimation of demand for differentiated products, and focus on discrete choice characteristics-based demand models that address these challenges while allowing enough flexibility to capture realistic substitution patterns. Our discussion emphasizes how empirical strategies can leverage different features of data depending on the sources of variation that are commonly found in applied work. Moving to the supply-side, we show how demand estimates combined with a pricing model, can be used to recover markups and marginal costs. We also show how the model of pricing can be tested. We discuss a baseline Bertrand-Nash model of competitive pricing, and expand it to cover a) coordinated pricing, b) wholesale relationships, and c) bargaining. We end the chapter with extensions of the demand model, including dynamic and continuous demand.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, IO, LS, PE, PR, TWP；JEL：C01, D12, D22, D43, L13
papers.zh_title: 差异化产品行业的需求与供给实证模型
papers.zh_abstract: 这是为即将出版的《产业组织手册》第四卷撰写的特邀章节。我们介绍了差异化产品行业的需求与供给实证模型，重点阐述了近期应用文献中的关键思想。我们首先讨论了差异化产品需求建模与估计面临的挑战，并聚焦于基于特征离散选择的需求模型，这些模型在应对挑战的同时保持了足够的灵活性以捕捉现实的替代模式。我们的讨论强调了实证策略如何根据应用研究中常见的变异来源，利用数据的不同特征。转向供给侧，我们展示了如何将需求估计与定价模型结合，以恢复加成和边际成本。我们还展示了如何检验定价模型。我们讨论了基准的伯特兰-纳什竞争定价模型，并将其扩展至涵盖：a) 协调定价，b) 批发关系，以及c) 讨价还价。本章最后讨论了需求模型的扩展，包括动态需求和连续需求。

papers.title: Empathy and the Efficient Provision of Public Goods
papers.authors: Geoffrey Heal
papers.abstract: I consider the effect of empathy towards others on the internalization of interpersonal externalities and on private contributions to the provision of public goods. I show that if preferences are empathetic in the sense of depending on the well-being of others, then in an extreme case external effects are fully internalized, and private contributions to the provision of a public good will be sufficient for it to be provided at an efficient level. Furthermore I show that an increase in the level of empathy shown by any agent will lead to an increase in the level of provision of the public good, and that as empathy levels increase towards their upper bound, the level of provision of the public good converges to the efficient level. Under certain conditions an increase in empathy is Pareto improving. As it is well-documented that people display some degree of empathy, it is arguable that our failure to provide public goods at efficient levels is attributable to lack of empathy as well as to the free rider problem.
papers.zh_title: 共情与公共物品的有效供给
papers.zh_abstract: 我考虑了对他人的共情对人际外部性内部化以及公共物品私人供给的影响。我证明，如果偏好是共情的（即依赖于他人福祉），那么在极端情况下，外部效应将被完全内部化，公共物品的私人供给将足以使其达到有效水平。此外，我表明任何代理人共情水平的提升都将导致公共物品供给水平的提高，并且随着共情水平趋近其上界，公共物品供给水平将收敛至有效水平。在特定条件下，共情增加是帕累托改进的。鉴于有充分证据表明人们表现出一定程度的共情，可以说我们未能以有效水平提供公共物品，既归因于搭便车问题，也归因于共情缺失。

papers.title: Community Colleges and Upward Mobility
papers.authors: Jack Mountjoy
papers.abstract: Two-year community colleges enroll nearly half of all first-time undergraduates in the United States, but to ambiguous effect: low persistence rates and the potential for diverting students from 4-year institutions cast ambiguity over 2-year colleges' contributions to upward mobility. This paper develops a new instrumental variables approach to identifying causal effects along multiple treatment margins, and applies it to linked education and earnings registries to disentangle the net impacts of 2-year college access into two competing causal margins: significant value-added for 2-year entrants who otherwise would not have attended college, but negative impacts on students diverted from immediate 4-year entry.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE, TWP；JEL：C31, C36, I23, I24, I26, J24, J31
papers.zh_title: 社区学院与向上流动性
papers.zh_abstract: 两年制社区学院招收了美国近一半的首次入学本科生，但其效果模糊：低持续率以及可能使学生从四年制院校分流，给社区学院对向上流动的贡献带来了不确定性。本文开发了一种新的工具变量方法，用于识别多个处理边际上的因果效应，并将其应用于关联的教育与收入登记数据，以将两年制学院准入的净影响分解为两个相互竞争的因果边际：对于原本不会上大学的两年制入学学生，具有显著增值效应；但对于从直接四年制入学分流的学生，则产生负面影响。

papers.title: Hub and Spoke Cartels: Theory and Evidence from the Grocery Industry
papers.authors: Robert Clark, Ignatius Horstmann, Jean-François Houde
papers.abstract: Numerous recently uncovered cartels operated along the supply chain, with firms at one end facilitating collusion at the other – hub-and-spoke arrangements. These cartels are hard to rationalize because they induce double marginalization and higher costs. We examine Canada’s alleged bread cartel and provide the first comprehensive analysis of hub-and-spoke collusion. We make three contributions: i) Using court documents and pricing data we provide evidence that collusion existed at both ends of the supply chain, ii) we show that collusion was effective, increasing inflation by about 40% and iii) we provide a model explaining why this form of collusion arose.
papers.zh_title: 轴辐式卡特尔：来自杂货业的理论与证据
papers.zh_abstract: 近期揭露的众多卡特尔沿着供应链运作，一端的企业促进另一端的合谋——即轴辐式安排。这些卡特尔难以合理化，因为它们导致双重边际化和更高成本。我们研究了加拿大涉嫌的面包卡特尔，并提供了对轴辐式合谋的首次全面分析。我们做出三项贡献：i) 利用法庭文件和定价数据，我们提供了供应链两端均存在合谋的证据；ii) 我们表明合谋是有效的，使通胀率上升约40%；iii) 我们提供了一个模型，解释了为何这种合谋形式会出现。

papers.title: The Plant-Level View of an Industrial Policy: The Korean Heavy Industry Drive of 1973
papers.authors: Minho Kim, Munseob Lee, Yongseok Shin
papers.abstract: Does industrial policy work? This is a subject of long-standing debates among economists and policymakers. Using newly digitized microdata, we evaluate the Korean government's policy that promoted heavy and chemical industries between 1973 and 1979 by cutting taxes and building new industrial complexes for them. We show that output, input use, and labor productivity of the targeted industries and regions grew significantly faster than those of non-targeted ones. While the plant-level total factor productivity also grew faster in targeted industries and regions, the misallocation of resources within them got significantly worse, especially among the entrants, so that the total factor productivity at the industry-region level did not increase relative to the non-targeted industries and regions. In addition, we provide new evidence on how industrial policy reshapes the economy: (i) The establishment size distribution of targeted industries and regions shifted to the right with thicker tails due to the entry of large establishments and (ii) the targeted industries became more important in the economy's input-output structure in the sense that their output multipliers increased significantly more.
papers.zh_title: 产业政策的工厂层面视角：1973年韩国重工业驱动计划
papers.zh_abstract: 产业政策是否有效？这是经济学家和政策制定者长期争论的主题。利用新数字化的微观数据，我们评估了韩国政府在1973年至1979年间通过减税和建设新工业综合体来促进重化工业的政策。我们表明，目标产业和地区的产出、投入使用和劳动生产率增长显著快于非目标产业和地区。尽管目标产业和地区的工厂层面全要素生产率也增长更快，但其内部资源错配显著恶化，尤其是在新进入者中，因此产业-地区层面的全要素生产率相对于非目标产业和地区并未提高。此外，我们提供了关于产业政策如何重塑经济的新证据：(i) 目标产业和地区的企业规模分布因大型企业进入而右移且尾部更厚；(ii) 目标产业在经济投入产出结构中的重要性增加，表现为其产出乘数显著增大。

papers.title: The Gender Gap in Earnings Losses after Job Displacement
papers.authors: Hannah Illing, Johannes F. Schmieder, Simon Trenkle
papers.abstract: Existing research has shown that job displacement leads to large and persistent earnings losses for men, but evidence for women is scarce. Using administrative data from Germany, we apply an event study design in combination with propensity score matching and a reweighting technique to directly compare men and women who are displaced from similar jobs and firms. Our results show that after a mass layoff, women’s earnings losses are about 35% higher than men’s, with the gap persisting five years after job displacement. This is partly explained by a higher propensity of women to take up part-time or marginal employment following job loss, but even full-time wage losses are almost 50% (or 5 percentage points) higher for women than for men. We then show that on the household level there is no evidence of an added worker effect, independent of the gender of the job loser. Finally, we document that parenthood magnifies the gender gap sharply: while fathers of young children have smaller earnings losses than men in general, mothers of young children have much larger earnings losses than other women.
papers.meta: Programs：LS, PE；JEL：J0, J16, J3, J63, J64, J65
papers.zh_title: 失业后收入损失的性别差距
papers.zh_abstract: 现有研究表明，失业对男性造成巨大且持久的收入损失，但针对女性的证据匮乏。利用德国行政数据，我们采用事件研究设计，结合倾向得分匹配和再加权技术，直接比较从相似工作和企业失业的男性和女性。结果显示，在大规模裁员后，女性的收入损失比男性高出约35%，且这一差距在失业五年后持续存在。这部分归因于女性在失业后更倾向于从事兼职或边缘就业，但即使在全职工资损失方面，女性也比男性高出近50%（或5个百分点）。接着，我们表明在家庭层面，无论失业者性别如何，均无证据显示附加劳动者效应。最后，我们记录到为人父母显著放大了性别差距：虽然年幼子女的父亲收入损失低于一般男性，但年幼子女的母亲收入损失远高于其他女性。

papers.title: Herding, Armed Conflict, and a Culture of Honor: Global Evidence
papers.authors: Yiming Cao, Benjamin Enke, Armin Falk, Paola Giuliano, Nathan Nunn
papers.abstract: We examine the importance of norms of revenge and punishment in perpetuating armed conflicts. Our analysis leverages the ‘culture of honor’ hypothesis from social psychology, which posits that traditional herding practices generate moral systems conducive to revenge-taking. We find that the descendants of herders (i) experience more frequent civil and non-civil conflicts; (ii) are more likely to be involved in conflicts motivated by retaliation; and (iii) exhibit a greater emphasis on revenge-taking in contemporary surveys and historical folklore. Our evidence suggests that a traditional form of subsistence generated a functional morality that continues to shape conflict across the globe today.
papers.zh_title: 游牧、武装冲突与荣誉文化：全球证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们考察了复仇与惩罚规范在延续武装冲突中的重要性。我们的分析利用了社会心理学中的“荣誉文化”假说，该假说认为传统游牧实践产生了有利于复仇的道德体系。我们发现，游牧者的后裔(i) 经历更频繁的国内和非国内冲突；(ii) 更可能卷入以报复为动机的冲突；(iii) 在当代调查和历史民间传说中更强调复仇。我们的证据表明，一种传统的生计方式产生了功能性道德，这种道德至今仍在塑造全球范围内的冲突。

papers.title: Inequality in Early Care Experienced by U.S. Children
papers.authors: Sarah Flood, Joel F.S. McMurry, Aaron Sojourner, Matthew J. Wiswall
papers.abstract: Using every major nationally-representative dataset on parental and non-parental care provided to children up to age 6, we quantify differences in American children’s care experiences by socioeconomic status (SES), proxied primarily with maternal education. Increasingly, higher-SES children spend less time with their parents and more time in the care of others. Non-parental care for high-SES children is more likely to be in childcare centers, where average quality is higher, and less likely to be provided by relatives where average quality is lower. Even within types of childcare, higher-SES children tend to receive care of higher measured quality and higher cost. Inequality is evident at home as well: measures of parental enrichment at home, from both self-reports and outside observers, are on average higher for higher-SES children. We also find that parental and non-parental quality is reinforcing: children who receive higher quality non-parental care also tend to receive higher quality parental care. Head Start, one of the largest government care subsidy programs for low-income households, reduces inequality in care provided, but it is mainly limited to older children and to the lowest income households. Our evidence is from the pre-COVID-19 period, and the latest year we examine is 2019.
papers.zh_title: 美国儿童早期照护中的不平等现象
papers.zh_abstract: 利用所有关于6岁以下儿童父母照护与非父母照护的主要全国代表性数据集，我们以母亲受教育程度为主要代理变量，量化了美国儿童照护经历中按社会经济地位（SES）划分的差异。社会经济地位较高的儿童与父母相处的时间越来越少，而由他人照护的时间越来越多。高社会经济地位儿童的非父母照护更可能发生在平均质量较高的托儿中心，而较少由平均质量较低的亲属提供。即使在照护类型内部，高社会经济地位儿童也倾向于获得测量质量更高、成本更高的照护。家庭内部也存在不平等：无论是通过自我报告还是外部观察者的测量，高社会经济地位儿童在家中获得的父母教育投入平均更高。我们还发现，父母照护与非父母照护的质量是相互强化的：获得更高质量非父母照护的儿童，也倾向于获得更高质量的父母照护。Head Start项目是面向低收入家庭的最大政府照护补贴项目之一，它减少了照护提供中的不平等，但主要局限于年龄较大的儿童和最低收入家庭。我们的证据来自新冠疫情前时期，我们考察的最新年份是2019年。

papers.title: Why is Workplace Sexual Harassment Underreported? The Value of Outside Options Amid the Threat of Retaliation
papers.authors: Gordon B. Dahl, Matthew M. Knepper
papers.abstract: Why is workplace sexual harassment chronically underreported? We hypothesize that employers coerce victims into silence through the threat of a retaliatory firing, and test this theory by estimating whether external shocks that reduce the value of a worker's outside options exacerbate underreporting. Under mild assumptions, a rise in the severity of formal complaints is indicative of increased underreporting. Combining this insight with an objective measure of the quality of charges filed with the Equal Employment Opportunity Commission (EEOC), we perform two analyses. First, we assess whether workers report sexual harassment more selectively during recessions, when outside labor market options are limited. We estimate the fraction of sexual harassment charges deemed to have merit by the EEOC increases by 0.5-0.7% for each one percentage point increase in a state-industry's monthly unemployment rate. The effect is amplified in industries employing a larger fraction of men and in establishments with a higher share of male managers. Second, we test whether less generous UI benefits create economic incentives for victims of workplace sexual harassment to remain silent. We find the selectivity of sexual harassment charges increases by more than 30% in response to a 50% cut to North Carolina's Unemployment Insurance (UI) program following the Great Recession.
papers.zh_title: 职场性骚扰为何被低估？外部选择价值与报复威胁
papers.zh_abstract: 为什么职场性骚扰长期被低估？我们假设雇主通过威胁报复性解雇来迫使受害者保持沉默，并通过估计降低工人外部选择价值的外部冲击是否会加剧低估现象来检验这一理论。在温和假设下，正式投诉严重程度的上升表明低估现象加剧。结合这一见解与向平等就业机会委员会（EEOC）提交指控质量的客观衡量指标，我们进行了两项分析。首先，我们评估工人在经济衰退期间（当外部劳动力市场选择有限时）是否更有选择性地报告性骚扰。我们估计，州-行业月度失业率每上升一个百分点，被EEOC认定有实质价值的性骚扰指控比例会增加0.5-0.7%。这种效应在男性员工比例较高的行业以及男性经理比例较高的企业中更为显著。其次，我们检验较不慷慨的失业保险金是否会对职场性骚扰受害者保持沉默产生经济激励。我们发现，在大衰退后北卡罗来纳州失业保险（UI）计划削减50%的情况下，性骚扰指控的选择性增加了30%以上。

papers.title: The Economic Impacts of the US-China Trade War
papers.authors: Pablo Fajgelbaum, Amit Khandelwal
papers.abstract: In 2018, the US launched a trade war with China, an abrupt departure from its historical leadership in integrating global markets. By late 2019, the US had imposed tariffs on roughly $350 billion of Chinese imports, and China had retaliated on $100 billion US exports. Economists have used a diversity of data and methods to assess the impacts of the trade war on the US, China and other countries. This article reviews what we have learned to date from this work.
papers.zh_title: 中美贸易战的经济影响
papers.zh_abstract: 2018年，美国对中国发起了贸易战，这与其在整合全球市场方面的历史领导地位截然不同。到2019年底，美国已对约3500亿美元的中国进口商品加征关税，中国也对1000亿美元的美国出口商品进行了报复。经济学家们运用多种数据和方法评估了贸易战对美国、中国及其他国家的影响。本文回顾了迄今为止我们从这些研究中了解到的内容。

papers.title: The Role of Trade in Economic Development
papers.authors: David Atkin, Dave Donaldson
papers.abstract: This chapter (to appear in the forthcoming Handbook of International Economics, Vol. 5) develops a framework with which to interpret and survey answers to the question: how does increased openness affect aggregate welfare in a typical developing country? We decompose answers into four mechanisms: (i) an effect akin to technological progress that is purely mechanical; (ii) an effect on factoral terms of trade; (iii) a distortion revenue effect that exacerbates or mitigates the consequences of domestic distortions; and (iv) an effect of trade on the magnitude of those distortions themselves. Our focus lies in the last two mechanisms as these are especially important for the study of low-income settings where domestic distortions are thought to be rife. Throughout, we provide both a review of existing work on these topics and quantitative calculations that aim to gauge the magnitudes involved in a global model that is calibrated to match firm- and industry-level data on trade flows, production techniques, and a host of distortions (tariffs, other taxes, markups, bribes, theft, credit constraints, contracting failures, labor regulations, and public utility provision) that have featured in the literature.
papers.zh_title: 贸易在经济发展中的作用
papers.zh_abstract: 本章（将收录于即将出版的《国际经济学手册》第五卷）构建了一个框架，用以解释和综述以下问题的答案：在一个典型的发展中国家，开放程度的提高如何影响总体福利？我们将答案分解为四种机制：（i）类似于技术进步且纯粹机械性的效应；（ii）对要素贸易条件的影响；（iii）扭曲收入效应，该效应会加剧或减轻国内扭曲的后果；以及（iv）贸易对这些扭曲本身规模的影响。我们的重点在于最后两种机制，因为它们对于研究国内扭曲被认为普遍存在的低收入环境尤为重要。在整个过程中，我们既回顾了关于这些主题的现有研究，也进行了定量计算，旨在评估一个全球模型中所涉及的数量级，该模型经过校准，以匹配关于贸易流动、生产技术以及一系列扭曲（关税、其他税收、加成率、贿赂、盗窃、信贷约束、合同失败、劳动法规和公共事业供给）的企业和行业层面数据，这些扭曲在文献中均有涉及。

papers.title: Foreign Investors and US Treasuries
papers.authors: Alexandra M. Tabova, Francis E. Warnock
papers.abstract: We build, from confidential security-level surveys, a novel dataset on the size, flows, coupon payments, and returns of the US Treasuries portfolios of foreign and US investors. The internally consistent dataset provides evidence on foreigners’ Treasuries portfolios that sharply contrasts with what is portrayed in the literature. Foreigners do not earn spectacularly low returns; they have higher average annual risk-adjusted returns than US investors (although the differences are well within the bounds of standard confidence intervals), as US investors’ strong mean returns are accompanied by higher volatility. Foreigners do not buy Treasuries when they are expensive; dollar-weighted returns that capture the timing and volume of purchases show that both private and official foreigners outperform US investors. And private foreign investors do not have inelastic demand; they are price sensitive, increasing purchases of Treasuries and the duration of their Treasury portfolios when non-US sovereign yields are low or decrease relative to Treasury yields. Our results should inform many literatures, including any that use data on international positions and flows. In fact, an important practical contribution is that the dataset shows which publicly available data on foreigners’ flows should (and should not) be used.
papers.zh_title: 外国投资者与美国国债
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用保密的证券层面调查，构建了一个关于外国和美国投资者持有的美国国债组合的规模、流动、息票支付和回报的新数据集。这个内部一致的数据集提供了关于外国人美国国债组合的证据，与文献中所描绘的情况形成鲜明对比。外国人并未获得极低的回报；他们的平均年化风险调整后回报高于美国投资者（尽管差异在标准置信区间范围内），因为美国投资者的强劲平均回报伴随着更高的波动性。外国人并非在国债昂贵时买入；捕捉购买时机和数量的美元加权回报显示，私人和官方外国投资者的表现均优于美国投资者。私人外国投资者并非需求缺乏弹性；他们对价格敏感，当非美国主权收益率较低或相对于美国国债收益率下降时，他们会增加对美国国债的购买以及其国债组合的久期。我们的研究结果应为众多文献提供信息，包括任何使用国际头寸和流动数据的文献。事实上，一个重要的实际贡献是，该数据集显示了哪些公开可用的外国人流动数据应该（以及不应该）被使用。

papers.title: Task Allocation and On-the-job Training
papers.authors: Mariagiovanna Baccara, SangMok Lee, Leeat Yariv
papers.abstract: We study dynamic task allocation when providers' expertise evolves endogenously through training. We characterize optimal assignment protocols and compare them to discretionary procedures, where it is the clients who select their service providers. Our results indicate that welfare gains from centralization are greater when tasks arrive more rapidly, and when training technologies improve. Monitoring seniors' backlog of clients always increases welfare but may decrease training. Methodologically, we explore a matching setting with endogenous types, and illustrate useful adaptations of queueing theory techniques for such environments.
papers.meta: Programs：IO, LS, PR；JEL：C02, C61, C78, D02, J22, L23
papers.zh_title: 任务分配与在职培训
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了当服务提供者的专业知识通过培训内生演化时的动态任务分配问题。我们刻画了最优分配协议，并将其与自由裁量程序（即由客户选择其服务提供者）进行比较。我们的结果表明，当任务到达更频繁且培训技术改进时，集中化带来的福利收益更大。监控资深服务提供者的客户积压总是能增加福利，但可能会减少培训。在方法论上，我们探索了一个具有内生类型的匹配设定，并展示了排队论技术在此类环境中的有用适应性。

papers.title: Big Loans to Small Businesses: Predicting Winners and Losers in an Entrepreneurial Lending Experiment
papers.authors: Gharad T. Bryan, Dean Karlan, Adam Osman
papers.abstract: We experimentally study the impact of relatively large enterprise loans in Egypt. Larger loans generate small average impacts, but machine learning using psychometric data reveals that ”top-performers” (those with the highest predicted treatment effects) substantially increase profits, while profits drop for poor-performers. The large differences imply that lender credit allocation decisions matter for aggregate income, yet we find that existing practice leads to substantial misallocation. We argue that some entrepreneurs are over-optimistic and squander the opportunities presented by larger loans by taking on too much risk, and show the promise of allocations based on entrepreneurial type relative to firm characteristics.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, LE, LS, PR；JEL：D22, D24, L26, M21, O12, O16
papers.zh_title: 小企业的大额贷款：预测创业贷款实验中的赢家和输家
papers.zh_abstract: 我们通过实验研究了埃及相对较大规模企业贷款的影响。较大规模的贷款产生的平均影响很小，但使用心理测量数据的机器学习揭示，“表现最佳者”（那些具有最高预测处理效应的企业）的利润大幅增加，而表现不佳者的利润则下降。这种巨大差异意味着贷款人的信贷分配决策对总收入至关重要，然而我们发现现有做法导致了严重的错配。我们认为一些企业家过度乐观，通过承担过多风险浪费了较大贷款带来的机会，并展示了基于企业家类型而非企业特征的分配方案的前景。

papers.title: Dynamic Strategic Corporate Finance: A Tug of War with Financial Frictions
papers.authors: Ulrich Doraszelski, João F. Gomes, Felix Nockher
papers.abstract: Access to capital markets plays a key role for the evolution of an industry over time. We develop a benchmark theoretical setting that integrates core corporate finance insights about the impact of financial frictions on investment with those from industrial organization on dynamic competition and industry evolution under perfect capital markets. Using state of the art computational tools to systematically detect and evaluate multiple equilibria and to thoroughly explore the parameter space of our model, we show how, depending on key industry characteristics such as market size, financial frictions impact firms' pricing and investment strategies and the degree of industry concentration.
papers.zh_title: 动态战略公司金融：带有金融摩擦的拉锯战
papers.zh_abstract: 进入资本市场的能力对行业随时间的演变起着关键作用。我们建立了一个基准理论框架，将关于金融摩擦对投资影响的核心公司金融见解与产业组织关于完美资本市场下动态竞争和行业演变的见解整合起来。利用最先进的计算工具系统地检测和评估多重均衡，并彻底探索我们模型的参数空间，我们展示了根据关键行业特征（如市场规模），金融摩擦如何影响企业的定价和投资策略以及行业集中度。

papers.title: Why Don’t Elite Colleges Expand Supply?
papers.authors: Peter Q. Blair, Kent Smetters
papers.abstract: While college enrollment has more-than doubled since 1970, elite colleges have barely increased supply, instead reducing admit rates. We show that straightforward reasons cannot explain this behavior. We propose a model where colleges compete on prestige, measured using relative selectivity or relative admit rates. A key comparative static of the model is that higher demand decreases [increases] the admit rate when the weight on prestige is above [below] a critical value, consistent with experience in elite [non-elite] colleges. A calibrated version of the model closely replicates the pattern in the data of declining admit rates at elite colleges while counter-factual simulations without prestige fail. Prestige competition is inefficient. Allowing elite colleges to collude on admissions strategy internalizes the non-pecuniary prestige externality and is Pareto improving.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, IO, LS, PE, POL；JEL：H23, I2, L1
papers.zh_title: 精英大学为何不扩大招生？
papers.zh_abstract: 尽管自1970年以来大学入学人数增加了一倍多，但精英大学几乎没有增加招生名额，反而降低了录取率。我们表明，简单的理由无法解释这种行为。我们提出了一个模型，其中大学在声望上竞争，声望通过相对选择性或相对录取率来衡量。该模型的一个关键比较静态是，当声望权重高于[低于]临界值时，更高的需求会降低[提高]录取率，这与精英[非精英]大学的经验一致。该模型的校准版本密切复制了数据中精英大学录取率下降的模式，而没有声望的反事实模拟则无法做到这一点。声望竞争是低效的。允许精英大学在招生策略上合谋，可以内部化非金钱的声望外部性，并且是帕累托改进的。

papers.title: Why Does Education Increase Voting? Evidence from Boston’s Charter Schools
papers.authors: Sarah Cohodes, James J. Feigenbaum
papers.abstract: Americans with more education vote more, but we know little about whether this effect on civic participation arises from educational quality or quantity. Using admissions lotteries at Boston charter schools, we estimate the impacts of charter attendance on academic and voting outcomes. We first confirm that there are large academic gains from charter school attendance. Second, we find that charter attendance boosts voter participation, substantially increasing voter participation in the first presidential election after a student turns 18 by six percentage points from a baseline of 35 percent. This effect operates through increased turnout, as there is no increase in voter registration. Rich data enable us to explore multiple potential channels of this voting impact, and our evidence suggests that charters increase voting by increasing noncognitive skills.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE, POL；JEL：D72, H75, I21
papers.zh_title: 教育为何能提高投票率？来自波士顿特许学校的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 受教育程度更高的美国人投票更多，但我们对于这种对公民参与的影响是源于教育质量还是教育数量知之甚少。利用波士顿特许学校的入学抽签，我们估算了特许学校出勤对学业和投票结果的影响。我们首先确认，特许学校出勤带来了巨大的学业收益。其次，我们发现特许学校出勤提高了选民参与率，使学生年满18岁后的第一次总统选举的选民参与率从35%的基线水平大幅提高了6个百分点。这种效应是通过提高投票率实现的，因为选民登记没有增加。丰富的数据使我们能够探索这种投票影响的多个潜在渠道，我们的证据表明，特许学校通过提高非认知技能来增加投票率。

papers.title: Recovery from the COVID-19 Recession: Uneven Effects among Young Workers?
papers.authors: Pinka Chatterji, Yue Li
papers.abstract: In this paper, we examine the labor market recovery from the COVID-19 recession and test for effects of termination of pandemic unemployment insurance programs among 15-24-year-olds. We use data from the January 2016-October 2022 Current Population Survey. Using regression-based methods, we show that while 15-19-year-olds experienced a brisk, full recovery in labor market outcomes from the COVID-19 recession, the recovery was sluggish and incomplete among 20-24-year-olds, with some work outcomes lagging below pre-pandemic norms well into 2022. Termination of pandemic UI programs led to increased work hours and full-time employment among 20-24-year-olds but did not have these effects among 15-19-year-olds.
papers.zh_title: 新冠疫情衰退后的复苏：年轻工人中的不均衡影响？
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了新冠疫情衰退后的劳动力市场复苏，并检验了终止疫情失业保险计划对15-24岁人群的影响。我们使用了2016年1月至2022年10月的当前人口调查数据。通过基于回归的方法，我们发现，尽管15-19岁人群在新冠疫情衰退后的劳动力市场结果上经历了迅速且完全的复苏，但20-24岁人群的复苏则缓慢且不完整，部分工作结果直到2022年仍低于疫情前水平。终止疫情失业保险计划导致20-24岁人群的工作时间和全职就业增加，但对15-19岁人群没有产生这些影响。

papers.title: Racial Disparities in Housing Returns
papers.authors: Amir Kermani, Francis Wong
papers.abstract: We document the existence of a racial gap in realized housing returns that is an order of magnitude larger than disparities arising from housing costs alone, and is driven by differences in distressed home sales (i.e., foreclosures and short sales). Black and Hispanic homeowners are both more likely to experience a distressed sale and to live in neighborhoods where distressed sales erase more house value. However, absent financial distress, houses owned by minorities do not appreciate at substantially slower rates than houses owned by non-minorities. Racial differences in liquid wealth and income stability are important determinants of differences in distress.
papers.zh_title: 住房回报中的种族差异
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录了已实现住房回报中存在的种族差距，其规模比仅由住房成本引起的差异大一个数量级，并且是由困境房屋销售（即止赎和短售）的差异驱动的。黑人和西班牙裔房主既更有可能经历困境销售，也更有可能居住在困境销售会抹去更多房屋价值的社区。然而，在没有财务困境的情况下，少数族裔拥有的房屋的增值速度并不显著慢于非少数族裔拥有的房屋。流动财富和收入稳定性的种族差异是困境差异的重要决定因素。

papers.title: Foundations of Demand Estimation
papers.authors: Steven T. Berry, Philip A. Haile
papers.abstract: Demand elasticities and other features of demand are critical determinants of the answers to most positive and normative questions about market power or the functioning of markets in practice. As a result, reliable demand estimation is an essential input to many types of research in Industrial Organization and other fields of economics. This chapter presents a discussion of some foundational issues in demand estimation. We focus on the distinctive challenges of demand estimation and strategies one can use to overcome them. We cover core models, alternative data settings, common estimation approaches, the role and choice of instruments, and nonparametric identification.
papers.zh_title: 需求估计的基础
papers.zh_abstract: 需求弹性及其他需求特征是回答大多数关于市场势力或市场实际运作的实证和规范问题的关键决定因素。因此，可靠的需求估计是产业组织及其他经济学领域许多类型研究的重要输入。本章讨论需求估计中的一些基础性问题。我们聚焦于需求估计的独特挑战以及可用于克服这些挑战的策略。我们涵盖了核心模型、不同的数据设定、常见的估计方法、工具变量的作用与选择，以及非参数识别。

papers.title: Demand Composition and the Strength of Recoveries
papers.authors: Martin Beraja, Christian K. Wolf
papers.abstract: We argue that recoveries from demand-driven recessions with expenditure cuts concentrated in services or non-durables will tend to be weaker than recoveries from recessions more biased towards durables. Intuitively, the smaller the bias towards more durable goods, the less the recovery is buffeted by pent-up demand. We show that, in a standard multi-sector business-cycle model, this prediction holds if and only if, following an aggregate demand shock to all categories of spending (e.g., a monetary shock), expenditure on more durable goods reverts back faster. This testable condition receives ample support in U.S. data. We then use (i) a semi-structural shift-share and (ii) a structural model to quantify this effect of varying demand composition on recovery dynamics, and find it to be large. We also discuss implications for optimal stabilization policy.
papers.zh_title: 需求构成与复苏的强度
papers.zh_abstract: 我们认为，如果需求驱动的衰退中支出削减集中在服务业或非耐用品，那么其复苏往往比更偏向耐用品的衰退的复苏更弱。直观上，对更耐用品偏向越小，复苏受到被压抑需求的缓冲就越少。我们证明，在一个标准的多部门商业周期模型中，当且仅当在面临对所有支出类别的总需求冲击（例如货币冲击）后，对更耐用品的支出恢复得更快时，这一预测才成立。这一可检验的条件在美国数据中得到了充分支持。然后，我们使用（i）半结构化的份额转移方法和（ii）一个结构化模型来量化这种需求构成变化对复苏动态的影响，并发现其影响很大。我们还讨论了对最优稳定政策的启示。

papers.title: International Reserve Management and Firm Investment in Emerging Market Economies
papers.authors: Joshua Aizenman, Yin-Wong Cheung, Xingwang Qian
papers.abstract: We examine the effects of active international reserve management (IRM) conducted by central banks of emerging market economies (EMEs) on firm investment in the presence of global financial shocks. Using firm-level data from 46 EMEs from 2000 to 2018, we document three findings. First, active IRM is found to affect firm investment positively. The effect strengthens when the magnitude of adverse external financial shocks increases. Second, financially constrained firms, compared to unconstrained ones, are less responsive to active IRM. Third, we find that 30% of the causal effect of IRM on firm investment is mediated through the country credit spread channel.
papers.zh_title: 新兴市场经济体的国际储备管理与企业投资
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了在全球金融冲击存在的情况下，新兴市场经济体中央银行进行的积极国际储备管理对企业投资的影响。使用2000年至2018年46个新兴市场经济体的企业层面数据，我们记录了三个发现。首先，发现积极的国际储备管理对企业投资有正向影响。当不利的外部金融冲击幅度增大时，这种效应会增强。其次，与不受融资约束的企业相比，受融资约束的企业对积极国际储备管理的反应较小。第三，我们发现，国际储备管理对企业投资的因果效应中，有30%是通过国家信用利差渠道传导的。

papers.title: The Evolution of Skill Use Within and Between Jobs
papers.authors: Costas Cavounidis, Vittoria Dicandia, Kevin Lang, Raghav Malhotra
papers.abstract: We develop a tractable general equilibrium model for understanding within- and between-occupation changes in skill use over time. We apply the model to skill-use measures from the third, fourth, and revised fourth editions of the Dictionary of Occupational Titles and data from the 1960, 1970, and 1980 Censuses and March Current Population Surveys. We recover changes in skill productivity by exploiting between-occupation movements. Most importantly, finger-dexterity productivity grew rapidly while abstract-skill productivity lagged. We leverage these findings to estimate an inelastic relation between abstract and routine inputs and explain within-occupation shifts in skill use.
papers.zh_title: 工作内与工作间技能使用的演变
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个易于处理的一般均衡模型，用于理解随时间推移工作内与工作间技能使用的变化。我们将该模型应用于来自《职业名称词典》第三版、第四版和修订第四版的技能使用度量，以及来自1960年、1970年和1980年人口普查和三月当前人口调查的数据。我们通过利用职业间的流动来恢复技能生产率的变化。最重要的是，手指灵巧度生产率增长迅速，而抽象技能生产率则滞后。我们利用这些发现来估计抽象投入与常规投入之间的非弹性关系，并解释工作内技能使用的变化。

papers.title: Technology Adoption and Market Allocation:The Case of Robotic Surgery
papers.authors: Danea Horn, Adam Sacarny, R. Annetta Zhou
papers.abstract: The adoption of healthcare technology is central to improving productivity in this sector. To provide new evidence on how technology affects healthcare markets, we focus on one area where adoption has been particularly rapid: surgery for prostate cancer. Over just six years, robotic surgery grew to become the dominant intensive prostate cancer treatment method. Using a difference-in-differences design, we show that adopting a robot drives prostate cancer patients to the hospital. To test whether this result reflects market expansion or business stealing, we also consider market-level effects of adoption and find they are significant but smaller, suggesting that adoption expands the market while also reallocating some patients across hospitals. Marginal patients are relatively young and healthy, inconsistent with the concern that adoption broadens the criteria for intervention to patients who would gain little from it. We conclude by discussing implications for the social value of technology diffusion in healthcare markets.
papers.zh_title: 技术采纳与市场配置：以机器人手术为例
papers.zh_abstract: 医疗技术的采纳对于提高该部门的生产率至关重要。为了提供关于技术如何影响医疗市场的新证据，我们聚焦于一个采纳特别迅速的领域：前列腺癌手术。在短短六年内，机器人手术发展成为占主导地位的浸润性前列腺癌治疗方法。使用双重差分设计，我们表明采纳机器人会驱使前列腺癌患者前往该医院。为了检验这一结果是反映了市场扩张还是业务窃取，我们还考虑了采纳的市场层面效应，发现其显著但较小，这表明采纳既扩大了市场，也重新分配了一些患者到不同医院。边际患者相对年轻且健康，这与采纳将干预标准扩大到获益甚微的患者的担忧不一致。最后，我们讨论了这些发现对医疗市场中技术扩散的社会价值的启示。

papers.title: The Sahm Rule and Predicting the Great Recession Across OECD Countries
papers.authors: David G. Blanchflower, Alex Bryson
papers.abstract: We examine the start date of the Great Recession across OECD countries based on two successive quarters of negative GDP growth recession. For most OECD countries this establishes the start of recession in Q22008 or Q32008. We find that the Sahm Rule identifies the start of recession in the US to the beginning of 2008 but in other OECD countries it identifies the start in almost every case, after that identified by GDP. But the GDP and labor market data are subject to major revisions, so the turn is not apparent in most countries for some time. We establish our own rule for predicting recession using the fear of unemployment series to predict recession. It involves looking for a ten-point rise in the series compared to its previous twelve month low. These surveys are timely and have the major advantage they are not subject to revision. Across the OECD we confirm this finding with other types of qualitative data and especially so in the UK. Qualitative surveys, we show, in the US in 2006 and 2007 predicted the subsequent recession and they did the same in Europe at the end of 2007 and in the early part of 2008.
papers.zh_title: 萨姆规则与预测经合组织国家的大衰退
papers.zh_abstract: 我们基于连续两个季度GDP负增长这一衰退标准，考察了经合组织国家大衰退的起始日期。对于大多数经合组织国家，这确定了衰退始于2008年第二季度或2008年第三季度。我们发现，萨姆规则将美国衰退的开始识别为2008年初，但在其他经合组织国家，它在几乎所有情况下都将衰退开始识别在GDP所识别的时间之后。但GDP和劳动力市场数据会经历重大修订，因此转折点在一段时间内对大多数国家并不明显。我们建立了自己的规则，利用对失业的恐惧序列来预测衰退。该规则涉及寻找该序列相比其前十二个月低点上升十个点的情况。这些调查是及时的，并且具有不会被修订的主要优势。在整个经合组织范围内，我们通过其他类型的定性数据证实了这一发现，尤其是在英国。我们表明，美国2006年和2007年的定性调查预测了随后的衰退，而欧洲在2007年底和2008年初的定性调查也做到了同样的事情。

papers.title: From Hermit Kingdom to Miracle on the Han: Policy Decisions that Transformed South Korea into an Export Powerhouse
papers.authors: Douglas A. Irwin
papers.abstract: In 1960, South Korea’s exports were about 1 percent of GDP, and the country’s ability to import depended almost entirely on US aid. After changing its foreign exchange and trade policies in the mid-1960s, Korea saw a surge in exports to more than 10 percent of GDP by the end of the decade. What factors account for the shift in policy that enabled this dramatic export growth to occur? The United States helped initiate the process by withholding financial assistance, pressuring Korea to devalue its currency and reform its foreign exchange regime. Initially, the Korean government resisted taking these steps, but in 1964 it became firmly committed to an export promotion strategy to boost foreign exchange earnings and end its dependence on American aid.
papers.zh_title: 从隐士王国到汉江奇迹：将韩国转变为出口强国的政策决策
papers.zh_abstract: 1960年，韩国的出口约占GDP的1%，其进口能力几乎完全依赖美国援助。在1960年代中期改变外汇和贸易政策后，韩国出口激增，到该十年末已超过GDP的10%。是什么因素导致了政策转变，从而实现了这一惊人的出口增长？美国通过暂停财政援助、施压韩国贬值货币并改革其外汇体制，帮助启动了这一进程。最初，韩国政府抵制采取这些措施，但在1964年，它坚定地致力于出口促进战略，以增加外汇收入并结束对美国援助的依赖。

papers.title: How Economic Ideas Led to Taiwan’s Shift to Export Promotion in the 1950s
papers.authors: Douglas A. Irwin
papers.abstract: Taiwan was perhaps the first developing country to adopt an export-oriented trade strategy after World War II. The factors usually associated with big shifts in policy—a macroeconomic crisis, a change in political power or institutions, lobbying by export interests, pressure from international financial institutions—were not present; it was ideas that were key. In 1954, economist S. C. Tsiang proposed that Taiwan boost export earnings rather than squeeze import spending to deal with its chronic shortage of foreign exchange. He recommended a currency devaluation to establish a realistic exchange rate and a market-based system of foreign exchange allocation to end the inefficient rationing by the government. Four years later, a leading policymaker, K. Y. Yin, fought for the adoption of Tsiang’s proposal, helping clear the way for Taiwan’s phenomenal growth in trade.
papers.zh_title: 经济理念如何引领台湾在1950年代转向出口促进
papers.zh_abstract: 台湾可能是二战后第一个采取出口导向贸易战略的发展中国家。通常与重大政策转变相关的因素——宏观经济危机、政治权力或制度变革、出口利益集团的游说、国际金融机构的压力——当时并不存在；关键在于理念。1954年，经济学家蒋硕杰提出，台湾应通过增加出口收入而非压缩进口支出来应对长期的外汇短缺。他建议进行货币贬值以建立现实的汇率，并采用基于市场的外汇分配体系，以结束政府低效的配给制。四年后，主要政策制定者尹仲容为采纳蒋硕杰的建议而奋斗，为台湾惊人的贸易增长扫清了道路。

papers.title: Electoral Violence and Supply Chain Disruptions in Kenya's Floriculture Industry
papers.authors: Christopher Ksoll, Rocco Macchiavello, Ameet Morjaria
papers.abstract: Violent conflicts, particularly at election times in Africa, are a common cause of instability and economic disruption. This paper studies how firms react to electoral violence using the case of Kenyan flower exporters during the 2008 post-election violence as an example. The violence induced a large negative supply shock that reduced exports primarily through workers' absence and had heterogeneous effects: larger firms and those with direct contractual relationships in export markets suffered smaller production and losses of workers. On the demand side, global buyers were not able to shift sourcing to Kenyan exporters located in areas not directly affected by the violence nor to neighboring Ethiopian suppliers. Consistent with difficulties in insuring against supply-chain risk disruptions caused by electoral violence, firms in direct contractual relationships ramp up shipments just before the subsequent 2013 presidential election to mitigate risk.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, POL；JEL：D22, D74, F14, O13, Q13
papers.zh_title: 肯尼亚花卉产业的选举暴力与供应链中断
papers.zh_abstract: 暴力冲突，尤其是在非洲选举期间，是导致不稳定和经济中断的常见原因。本文以2008年肯尼亚大选后暴力事件中的肯尼亚花卉出口商为例，研究企业如何应对选举暴力。暴力事件引发了巨大的负面供给冲击，主要通过工人缺勤减少了出口，并产生了异质性效应：规模较大的企业和在出口市场拥有直接合同关系的企业遭受的生产损失和工人流失较小。在需求方面，全球买家无法将采购转向位于未受暴力直接影响地区的肯尼亚出口商，也无法转向邻国埃塞俄比亚的供应商。与选举暴力导致的供应链风险中断难以投保的情况一致，拥有直接合同关系的企业在随后的2013年总统大选前增加了出货量以规避风险。

papers.title: Marijuana Liberalization Policies and Perinatal Health
papers.authors: Angélica Meinhofer, Allison E. Witman, Jesse M. Hinde, Kosali I. Simon
papers.abstract: We studied the effect of marijuana liberalization policies on perinatal health with a multiperiod difference-in-differences estimator that exploited variation in effective dates of medical marijuana laws (MML) and recreational marijuana laws (RML). We found that the proportion of maternal hospitalizations with marijuana use disorder increased by 23% (0.3 percentage points) in the first three years after RML implementation, with larger effects in states authorizing commercial sales of marijuana. This growth was accompanied by a 7% (0.4 percentage points) decline in tobacco use disorder hospitalizations, yielding a net zero effect over all substance use disorder hospitalizations. RMLs were not associated with changes in newborn health. MMLs had no significant effect on maternal substance use disorder hospitalizations nor on newborn health and fairly small effects could be ruled out. In absolute numbers, our findings implied modest or no adverse effects of marijuana liberalization policies on the array of perinatal outcomes considered.
papers.zh_title: 大麻自由化政策与围产期健康
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用多期双重差分估计量，利用医用大麻法和娱乐用大麻法生效日期的变化，研究了大麻自由化政策对围产期健康的影响。我们发现，在娱乐用大麻法实施后的头三年内，患有使用大麻障碍的产妇住院比例增加了23%（0.3个百分点），在授权商业销售大麻的州影响更大。这种增长伴随着使用烟草障碍住院比例下降7%（0.4个百分点），导致所有物质使用障碍住院比例净效果为零。娱乐用大麻法与新生儿健康变化无关。医用大麻法对产妇物质使用障碍住院比例或新生儿健康没有显著影响，并且可以排除相当小的效应。从绝对数字来看，我们的研究结果表明，大麻自由化政策对所考虑的一系列围产期结局没有或仅有轻微的不利影响。

papers.title: Privatization of Public Goods: Evidence from the Sanitation Sector in Senegal
papers.authors: Joshua W. Deutschmann, Jared E. Gars, Jean-François Houde, Molly Lipscomb, Laura A. Schechter
papers.abstract: Privatization of a public good (the management of sewage treatment centers in Dakar, Senegal) leads to an increase in the productivity of downstream sewage dumping companies and a decrease in downstream prices of the services they provide to households. We use the universe of legal dumping of sanitation waste from May 2009 to May 2018 to show that legal dumping increased substantially following privatization—on average an increase of 74%, or an increase of about 1640 trips to treatment centers each month. This is due to increased productivity of all trucks, not just those associated with the company managing the privatized treatment centers. Household-level survey data shows that downstream prices of legal sanitary dumping decreased by 5% following privatization, and DHS data shows that diarrhea rates among children under five decreased in Dakar relative to secondary cities in Senegal following privatization with no similar effect on respiratory illness as a placebo.
papers.zh_title: 公共物品的私有化：来自塞内加尔卫生部门的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 公共物品（塞内加尔达喀尔污水处理中心的管理）的私有化导致下游污水倾倒公司的生产率提高，以及它们向家庭提供的服务价格下降。我们利用2009年5月至2018年5月期间所有合法倾倒卫生废物的数据表明，私有化后合法倾倒量大幅增加——平均增加74%，即每月前往处理中心的次数增加约1640次。这是由于所有卡车的生产率提高，而不仅仅是与管理私有化处理中心的公司相关的卡车。家庭层面调查数据显示，私有化后合法卫生倾倒的下游价格下降了5%，人口与健康调查数据显示，与塞内加尔二级城市相比，私有化后达喀尔五岁以下儿童腹泻率下降，而对呼吸道疾病作为安慰剂没有类似影响。

papers.title: Social and Financial Incentives for Overcoming a Collective Action Problem
papers.authors: M. Mehrab Bakhtiar, Raymond Guiteras, James A. Levinsohn, Ahmed Mushfiq Mobarak
papers.abstract: Addressing public health externalities often requires community-level collective action. Each person’s sanitation behavior can affect the health of neighbors. We report on a cluster randomized controlled trial conducted with 19,000 households in rural Bangladesh where we randomized (1) either group financial incentives or a non-financial “social recognition” reward, and (2) asking each household to make either a private pledge or a public pledge to maintain hygienic latrines. The group financial reward has the strongest impact in the short term (3 months), inducing a 7.5-12.5 percentage point increase in hygienic latrine ownership. Getting people to publicly commit to maintaining and using a hygienic latrine in front of their neighbors induced a 4.2-6.1 percentage point increase in hygienic latrine ownership in the short term. In the medium term (15 months), the effect of the financial reward dissipates while the effect of the public commitment persists. Neither social recognition nor private commitments produce effects statistically distinguishable from zero.
papers.zh_title: 克服集体行动问题的社会激励与财务激励
papers.zh_abstract: 解决公共卫生外部性通常需要社区层面的集体行动。每个人的卫生行为都可能影响邻居的健康。我们报告了一项在孟加拉国农村对19,000户家庭进行的整群随机对照试验，其中我们随机分配了（1）群体财务激励或非财务的“社会认可”奖励，以及（2）要求每个家庭做出私人承诺或公开承诺以保持卫生厕所。群体财务奖励在短期内（3个月）影响最强，使卫生厕所拥有率提高了7.5-12.5个百分点。让人们在邻居面前公开承诺维护和使用卫生厕所，在短期内使卫生厕所拥有率提高了4.2-6.1个百分点。在中期（15个月），财务奖励的效果消失，而公开承诺的效果持续存在。社会认可和私人承诺均未产生统计上显著的效果。

papers.title: Fiscal Policy in the Age of COVID: Does it ‘Get in all of the Cracks?’
papers.authors: Pierre-Olivier Gourinchas, Ṣebnem Kalemli-Özcan, Veronika Penciakova, Nick Sander
papers.abstract: We study the effects of fiscal policy in response to the COVID-19 pandemic at the firm, sector, country and global level. First, we estimate the impact of COVID-19 and policy responses on small and medium sized enterprise (SME) business failures. We combine firm-level financial data from 50 sectors in 27 countries, a detailed I-O network, real-time data on lockdown policies and mobility patterns, and a rich model of firm behavior that allows for several dimensions of heterogeneity. We find: (a) Absent government support, the failure rate of SMEs would have increased by 9 percentage points, significantly more so in emerging market economies (EMs). With policy support it only increased by 4.3 percentage points, and even decreased in advanced economies (AEs). (b) Fiscal policy was poorly targeted: most of the funds disbursed went to firms who did not need it. (c) Nevertheless, we find little evidence of the policy merely postponing mass business failures or creating many ‘zombie’ firms: failure rates rise only slightly in 2021 once policy support is removed. Next, we build a tractable global intertemporal general equilibrium I-O model with fiscal policy. We calibrate the model to 64 countries and 36 sectors. We find that: (d) a sizable share of the global economy is demand-constrained under COVID-19, especially so in EMs. (e) Globally, fiscal policy helped offset about 8% of the downturn in COVID, with a low ‘traditional’ fiscal multiplier. Yet it significantly reduced the share of demand- constrained sectors, preserving employment in these sectors. (f) Fiscal policy exerted small and negative spillovers to output in other countries but positive spillovers on employment. (g) A two-speed recovery would put significant upwards pressure on global interest rates which imposes an additional headwind on the EM recovery. (h) Corporate and sovereign spreads rise when global rates increase, suggesting that EM may face challenging external funding conditions as AEs economies normalize.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM；JEL：C67, D2, E62, E65, F32, F41, G33
papers.zh_title: 新冠疫情时代的财政政策：它是否“渗透到所有裂缝中”？
papers.zh_abstract: 我们在企业、部门、国家和全球层面研究应对新冠疫情的财政政策效果。首先，我们估计了新冠疫情和政策应对措施对中小企业倒闭的影响。我们结合了来自27个国家50个部门的企业层面财务数据、详细的投入产出网络、封锁政策和流动性模式的实时数据，以及一个允许多个维度异质性的丰富企业行为模型。我们发现：（a）如果没有政府支持，中小企业的倒闭率将增加9个百分点，在新兴市场经济体中更为显著。有了政策支持，倒闭率仅增加了4.3个百分点，在发达经济体中甚至有所下降。（b）财政政策针对性差：大部分发放的资金流向了不需要的企业。（c）尽管如此，我们几乎没有发现证据表明该政策仅仅是推迟了大规模企业倒闭或制造了许多“僵尸”企业：一旦政策支持取消，2021年的倒闭率仅略有上升。接下来，我们构建了一个易于处理的包含财政政策的全球跨期一般均衡投入产出模型。我们将模型校准到64个国家和36个部门。我们发现：（d）在新冠疫情下，全球经济的相当大一部分受到需求约束，尤其是在新兴市场经济体中。（e）在全球范围内，财政政策帮助抵消了新冠疫情衰退约8%的影响，且“传统”财政乘数较低。然而，它显著减少了受需求约束的部门份额，保留了这些部门的就业。（f）财政政策对其他国家的产出产生了微小且负面的溢出效应，但对就业产生了正面的溢出效应。（g）双速复苏将对全球利率施加显著的上行压力，这给新兴市场经济体的复苏带来了额外的阻力。（h）当全球利率上升时，企业和主权利差扩大，这表明随着发达经济体经济正常化，新兴市场经济体可能面临具有挑战性的外部融资条件。

papers.title: Effect of the Jamaica Early Childhood Stimulation Intervention on Labor Market Outcomes at Age 31
papers.authors: Paul Gertler, James J. Heckman, Rodrigo Pinto, Susan M. Chang, Sally Grantham-McGregor, Christel Vermeersch, Susan Walker, Amika Wright
papers.abstract: We report the labor market effects of the Jamaica Early Childhood Stimulation intervention at age 31. The study is a small-sample randomized early childhood education stimulation intervention targeting stunted children living in the poor neighborhoods of Kingston, Jamaica. Implemented in 1987-1989, treatment consisted of a two-year home-based intervention designed to improve nutrition and the quality of mother-child interactions to foster cognitive, language and psycho-social skills. The original sample is 127 stunted children between 9 and 24 months old. Our study is able to track and interview 75% of the original sample 30 years after the intervention, both still living in Jamaica and migrated abroad. We find large and statistically significant effects on income and schooling; the treatment group had 43% higher hourly wages and 37% higher earnings than the control group. This is a substantial increase over the treatment effect estimated for age 22 where we observed a 25% increase in earnings. The Jamaican Study is a rare case of a long-term follow up for an early childhood development (ECD) intervention implemented in a less-developed country. Our results confirm large economic returns to an early childhood intervention that targeted disadvantaged families living in poverty in the poor neighborhoods of Jamaica. The Jamaican intervention is being replicated around the world. Our analysis provides justification for expanding ECD interventions targeting disadvantaged children living in poor countries around the world.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, EH, LS, PE；JEL：C31, I21, J13
papers.zh_title: 牙买加早期儿童刺激干预对31岁时劳动力市场结果的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们报告了牙买加早期儿童刺激干预在31岁时的劳动力市场效果。该研究是一项小样本随机早期儿童教育刺激干预，针对生活在牙买加金斯敦贫困社区的生长迟缓儿童。该干预于1987-1989年实施，治疗包括为期两年的家庭干预，旨在改善营养和母子互动质量，以培养认知、语言和心理社会技能。原始样本为127名9至24个月大的生长迟缓儿童。我们的研究能够在干预30年后追踪并访谈75%的原始样本，包括仍居住在牙买加和移民国外的人。我们发现对收入和受教育程度有巨大且统计上显著的影响；治疗组的平均时薪比对照组高43%，收入高37%。这比在22岁时估计的治疗效果（我们观察到收入增加25%）有显著提高。牙买加研究是在欠发达国家实施的早期儿童发展干预中罕见的长期跟踪案例。我们的结果证实了针对牙买加贫困社区弱势家庭的早期儿童干预具有巨大的经济回报。牙买加干预措施正在世界各地被复制。我们的分析为扩大针对世界各地贫困国家弱势儿童的早期儿童发展干预提供了理由。

papers.title: Sorting with Team Formation
papers.authors: Job Boerma, Aleh Tsyvinski, Alexander P. Zimin
papers.abstract: We fully solve an assignment problem with heterogeneous firms and multiple heterogeneous workers whose skills are imperfect substitutes, that is, when production is submodular. We show that sorting is neither positive nor negative and is characterized sufficiently by two regions. In the first region, mediocre firms sort with mediocre workers and coworkers such that output losses are equal across all these pairings (complete mixing). In the second region, high skill workers sort with a low skill coworker and a high productivity firm, while high productivity firms employ a low skill worker and a high skill coworker (pairwise countermonotonicity). The equilibrium assignment is also necessarily characterized by product countermonotonicity, meaning that sorting is negative for each dimension of heterogeneity with the product of heterogeneity in the other dimensions. The equilibrium assignment as well as wages and firm values are completely characterized in closed form. We illustrate our theory with an application to show that our model is consistent with the observed dispersion of earnings within and across U.S. firms. Our counterfactual analysis gives evidence that the change in the firm project distribution between 1981 and 2013 has a larger effect on the observed change in earnings dispersion than the change in the worker skill distribution.
papers.zh_title: 团队形成中的分类匹配
papers.zh_abstract: 我们完整求解了一个包含异质性企业和多个异质性工人的分配问题，其中工人的技能是不完全替代的，即生产函数是次模的。我们证明，分类匹配既非正向也非负向，而是由两个区域充分刻画。在第一个区域中，平庸的企业与平庸的工人及同事匹配，使得所有配对中的产出损失相等（完全混合）。在第二个区域中，高技能工人与低技能同事和高生产率企业匹配，而高生产率企业则雇佣低技能工人和高技能同事（成对反单调性）。均衡分配也必然具有乘积反单调性的特征，这意味着对于每一维度的异质性，分类匹配相对于其他维度异质性的乘积是负向的。均衡分配以及工资和企业价值都以闭式形式完全刻画。我们通过一个应用实例来说明我们的理论，证明我们的模型与美国企业内部和跨企业之间观察到的收入离散程度是一致的。我们的反事实分析表明，1981年至2013年间企业项目分布的变化对观察到的收入离散程度变化的影响大于工人技能分布的变化。

papers.title: Mobility for All: Representative Intergenerational Mobility Estimates over the 20th Century
papers.authors: Elisa Jácome, Ilyana Kuziemko, Suresh Naidu
papers.abstract: We estimate long-run trends in intergenerational relative mobility for representative samples of the U.S.-born population. Harmonizing all surveys that include father's occupation and own family income, we develop a mobility measure that allows for the inclusion of non-whites and women for the 1910s–1970s birth cohorts. We show that mobility increases between the 1910s and 1940s cohorts and that the decline of Black-white income gaps explains about half of this rise. We also find that excluding Black Americans, particularly women, considerably overstates the level of mobility for twentieth-century birth cohorts while simultaneously understating its increase between the 1910s and 1940s.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, LS, PE；JEL：H0, J15, J16, N3
papers.zh_title: 全民流动性：20世纪代际相对流动性的代表性估计
papers.zh_abstract: 我们估计了美国出生人口代表性样本中代际相对流动性的长期趋势。通过协调所有包含父亲职业和自身家庭收入的调查，我们开发了一种流动性衡量指标，该指标允许纳入1910年代至1970年代出生队列中的非白人和女性。我们表明，流动性在1910年代至1940年代出生队列之间有所增加，而黑白收入差距的缩小解释了这一增长的大约一半。我们还发现，排除非裔美国人（尤其是女性）会显著高估20世纪出生队列的流动性水平，同时低估其在1910年代至1940年代之间的增长。

papers.title: The Asymmetry in Responsible Investing Preferences
papers.authors: Jacquelyn Humphrey, Shimon Kogan, Jacob Sagi, Laura Starks
papers.abstract: We design an experiment to understand how social preferences affect investment decisions through stock allocations and probability assessments. The major preference channel is asymmetric in social outcomes – although negative and positive responsible investment (RI) externalities have the same magnitudes, negative externalities have greater impact on investment choices. The effect is persistent, but heterogenous. We also find asymmetries in belief formation and learning constitute a secondary channel. Overall, our results are consistent with important stylized empirical facts and the predictions of recent RI theories that social preferences lead to different investment choices, but our analyses also suggest important future modeling directions.
papers.zh_title: 责任投资偏好的不对称性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们设计了一个实验，以理解社会偏好如何通过股票配置和概率评估影响投资决策。主要偏好渠道在社会结果上是不对称的——尽管负向和正向责任投资外部性具有相同的规模，但负向外部性对投资选择的影响更大。这种效应是持久的，但具有异质性。我们还发现信念形成和学习中的不对称性构成了次要渠道。总体而言，我们的结果与重要的经验事实以及近期责任投资理论的预测一致，即社会偏好导致不同的投资选择，但我们的分析也指出了未来建模的重要方向。

papers.title: Is Healthcare Employment Resilient and “Recession Proof”?
papers.authors: Marcus Dillender, Andrew I. Friedson, Cong T. Gian, Kosali I. Simon
papers.abstract: Conventional wisdom often holds that the healthcare sector fares better than other sectors during economic downturns. However, little research has examined the relationship between local economic conditions and healthcare employment. Understanding how the healthcare sector responds to economic conditions is important for policy makers seeking to ensure an adequate supply of healthcare workers, as well as for those directing displaced workers into new jobs. We examine the impact of macroeconomic conditions on both the healthcare labor market and the pipeline of healthcare workers receiving healthcare degrees during a pre-COVID time period, 2005-2017. Our results indicate that the healthcare sector is stable across past business cycles. If anything, when areas experience more severe local economic downturns, healthcare employment increases. Much remains unknown about the adjustments and lasting impacts for the healthcare sector associated with the COVID era. Our study represents an important backdrop as policy makers consider ways to sustain the healthcare sector during economic and public health turbulence.
papers.zh_title: 医疗保健就业是否具有韧性和“抗衰退”特性？
papers.zh_abstract: 传统观点通常认为，医疗保健行业在经济衰退期间的表现优于其他行业。然而，很少有研究考察地方经济状况与医疗保健就业之间的关系。理解医疗保健行业如何应对经济状况，对于政策制定者确保医疗保健工作者的充足供应，以及引导失业工人进入新工作岗位至关重要。我们研究了在新冠疫情前时期（2005-2017年）宏观经济状况对医疗保健劳动力市场和获得医疗保健学位的医疗工作者输送渠道的影响。我们的结果表明，医疗保健行业在过去的商业周期中保持稳定。如果说有什么不同的话，那就是当地区经历更严重的地方经济衰退时，医疗保健就业反而增加。关于新冠疫情时代医疗保健行业的调整和持久影响，仍有许多未知之处。我们的研究为政策制定者考虑在经济和公共卫生动荡期间维持医疗保健行业的方式提供了重要的背景。

papers.title: The Puzzle of Falling US Birth Rates Since the Great Recession
papers.authors: Melissa Schettini Kearney, Phillip B. Levine, Luke W. Pardue
papers.abstract: This paper documents a set of facts about the dramatic decline in birth rates in the United States between 2007 and 2020 and explores possible explanations. The overall reduction in the birth rate reflects declines across many groups of women, including women who differ by race and ethnicity, age, and level of education. The Great Recession contributed to the decline in the early part of this period, but we are unable to identify any other economic, policy, or social factor that has changed since 2007 that is responsible for much of the decline beyond that. Mechanically, the falling birth rate can be attributed to changes in birth patterns across recent cohorts of women moving through childbearing age. We conjecture that the “shifting priorities” of more recent cohorts, reflecting changes in preferences for having children, aspirations for life, and parenting norms, may be responsible. We conclude with a brief discussion about the societal consequences for a declining birth rate and what the United States might do about it.
papers.zh_title: 自大衰退以来美国出生率下降之谜
papers.zh_abstract: 本文记录了2007年至2020年间美国出生率急剧下降的一系列事实，并探讨了可能的解释。总体出生率的下降反映了众多女性群体的下降，包括不同种族、民族、年龄和教育水平的女性。大衰退促成了这一时期早期的下降，但我们无法确定自2007年以来发生的任何其他经济、政策或社会因素对除此之外的下降负有主要责任。从机制上看，出生率的下降可归因于近期处于育龄期的女性队列中生育模式的变化。我们推测，近期队列的“优先事项转变”——反映了生育子女偏好、生活抱负和育儿规范的变化——可能是原因所在。最后，我们简要讨论了出生率下降的社会后果以及美国可能采取的措施。

papers.title: The Initial Effects of the Expanded Child Tax Credit on Material Hardship
papers.authors: Zachary Parolin, Elizabeth Ananat, Sophie M. Collyer, Megan Curran, Christopher Wimer
papers.abstract: The transformation of the Child Tax Credit (CTC) into a more generous, inclusive monthly payment marks a historic (temporary) shift in U.S. treatment of low-income families. To investigate the initial impact of these payments, we apply a series of difference-in-difference estimates using Census Household Pulse Survey microdata collected from April 14 through August 16, 2021. Our findings offer three primary conclusions regarding the initial effects of the monthly CTC. First, payments strongly reduced food insufficiency: the initial payments led to a 7.5 percentage point (25 percent) decline in food insufficiency among low-income households with children. Second, the effects on food insufficiency are concentrated among families with 2019 pre-tax incomes below $35,000, and the CTC strongly reduces food insufficiency among low-income Black, Latino, and White families alike. Third, increasing the CTC coverage rate would be required in order for material hardship to be reduced further. Self-reports suggest the lowest-income households were less likely than higher-income families to receive the first CTC payments. As more children receive the benefit in future months, material hardship may decline further. Even with imperfect coverage, however, our findings suggest that the first CTC payments were largely effective at reducing food insufficiency among low-income families with children.
papers.zh_title: 扩大儿童税收抵免对物质困难的初步影响
papers.zh_abstract: 将儿童税收抵免转变为更慷慨、更具包容性的月度支付，标志着美国对待低收入家庭方式的（临时）历史性转变。为了调查这些支付的初步影响，我们使用2021年4月14日至8月16日收集的人口普查家庭脉搏调查微观数据，应用了一系列双重差分估计。我们的发现提供了关于月度儿童税收抵免初步影响的三个主要结论。首先，支付显著减少了食物不足：初始支付导致有子女的低收入家庭中食物不足率下降了7.5个百分点（25%）。其次，对食物不足的影响集中在2019年税前收入低于35,000美元的家庭中，并且儿童税收抵免同样显著减少了低收入黑人、拉丁裔和白人家庭的食物不足。第三，要进一步减少物质困难，需要提高儿童税收抵免的覆盖率。自我报告显示，最低收入家庭比高收入家庭更不可能收到首批儿童税收抵免支付。随着未来几个月更多儿童获得福利，物质困难可能会进一步减少。然而，即使覆盖率不完美，我们的发现表明，首批儿童税收抵免支付在减少有子女低收入家庭的食物不足方面大体上是有效的。

papers.title: Bank Mergers, Acquirer Choice and Small Business Lending: Implications for Community Investment
papers.authors: Bernadette A. Minton, Alvaro G. Taboada, Rohan Williamson
papers.abstract: We examine the effects of bank merger and local market characteristics on local small business lending. Mergers involving small, in-state acquirers are positively associated with small business loan (SBL) originations in counties where target banks are located. Conversely, mergers involving large, out-of-state acquirers are associated with fewer SBL originations. The analysis suggests that the results are driven by acquirer’s choice of target. Small and in-state acquirers target banks that focus more on SBL and targets with strong relationships while large, out-of-state acquirers pursue better performing banks with stronger balance sheets and less focus on SBL. Results are particularly strong in counties with a large number of small firms. Post-merger activity supports banks expanding on their acquisition strategy decisions. The findings suggest that acquirer strategy is important for evaluating the impact of acquisitions on local community development and that one-size-fits-all policy solutions for bank mergers may not produce common local outcomes.
papers.zh_title: 银行并购、收购方选择与中小企业贷款：对社区投资的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了银行并购和地方市场特征对地方中小企业贷款的影响。涉及小型、州内收购方的并购与目标银行所在县的中小企业贷款发放量正相关。相反，涉及大型、州外收购方的并购与较少的中小企业贷款发放量相关。分析表明，结果是由收购方对目标的选择驱动的。小型和州内收购方瞄准更专注于中小企业贷款且关系牢固的目标银行，而大型、州外收购方则追求业绩更好、资产负债表更强且对中小企业贷款关注较少的目标银行。在拥有大量小企业的县，结果尤为显著。并购后的活动支持了银行扩展其收购战略决策。这些发现表明，收购方战略对于评估收购对当地社区发展的影响至关重要，并且一刀切的银行并购政策解决方案可能不会产生共同的本地结果。

papers.title: Labor Market Nationalization Policies and Exporting Firm Outcomes: Evidence from Saudi Arabia
papers.authors: Patricia Cortés, Semiray Kasoolu, Carolina Pan
