papers.zh_abstract: 繁忙机场的关闭会对噪音、房地产市场以及社区人口结构产生重大影响。我们利用一个独特的数据集，研究了丹佛斯台普顿机场关闭对附近住房市场的影响。我们发现，在关闭公告发布时，存在即时的预期价格效应，但在关闭时没有价格变化，且从公告到关闭期间几乎没有价格上升趋势的证据。然而，机场关闭后，更多高收入家庭迁入，黑人家庭减少，开发商建造了质量更高的房屋。最后，在关闭后，这些人口结构和住房存量的变化产生了显著的住房价格效应，即使将样本限制在已有的住房销售中也是如此。

papers.title: School Food Policy Affects Everyone: Retail Responses to the National School Lunch Program
papers.authors: Jessie Handbury, Sarah Moshary
papers.abstract: We study the private market response to the National School Lunch Program, documenting economically meaningful spillovers to non-recipients. We focus on the Community Eligibility Provision (CEP), an expansion of the lunch program under the 2010 Healthy, Hunger-Free Kids Act. Under the CEP, participating schools offer free lunch to all students. We leverage both the staggered roll-out and eligibility criterion for the CEP, which is limited to schools where at least 40% of students participate in other means-tested welfare programs. We find that local adoption of the CEP causes households with children to reduce their grocery purchases, leading to a 10% decline in grocery sales at large retail chains. Retailers respond with chain-level price adjustments: chains with the most exposure lower prices by 2.5% across all outlets in the years following adoption, so that the program's welfare benefits propagate spatially. Using a stylized model of grocery demand, we estimate that, by 2016, the indirect benefit had reduced grocery costs for the median household by approximately 4.5%.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, IO, ITI, PE；JEL：H42, I38, L11, R32
papers.zh_title: 学校食品政策影响所有人：零售业对全国学校午餐计划的反应
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了私人市场对全国学校午餐计划的反应，记录了该计划对非受益者产生的具有经济意义的溢出效应。我们重点关注社区资格规定（CEP），这是2010年《健康、无饥饿儿童法案》下午餐计划的一项扩展。根据CEP，参与学校向所有学生提供免费午餐。我们利用了CEP的分阶段推出和资格标准，该标准仅限于至少40%的学生参与其他经济状况调查福利项目的学校。我们发现，当地采用CEP导致有孩子的家庭减少食品杂货购买，导致大型零售连锁店的食品杂货销售额下降10%。零售商通过连锁层面的价格调整来应对：在采用后的几年里，受影响最大的连锁店将所有门店的价格降低了2.5%，因此该计划的福利效益在空间上得以传播。使用一个简化的食品杂货需求模型，我们估计，到2016年，间接效益使中等家庭的食品杂货成本降低了约4.5%。

papers.title: Fleshing Out the Olive? On Income Polarization in China
papers.authors: Martin Ravallion, Shaohua Chen
papers.abstract: In a rare example of an explicit national goal for income distribution besides reducing poverty, China’s leadership has recently committed to expanding the middle-income share—moving to a less polarized “olive-shaped” distribution. Recognizing the potential trade-offs, the paper asks whether China’s experience indicates that income-polarization was a by-product of past economic progress, including poverty reduction. The paper does not find robust time-series evidence of polarizing effects alongside either economic growth or population urbanization (including among those below the national median). There was strong co-movement between polarization and inequality. Larger urban-rural gaps in mean incomes are strongly polarizing in China.
papers.zh_title: 充实橄榄？——论中国的收入极化
papers.zh_abstract: 除了减少贫困之外，中国领导层最近承诺扩大中等收入群体份额——转向一个极化程度较低的“橄榄形”分配，这是一个罕见的明确国家收入分配目标。认识到潜在的权衡，本文探讨中国的经验是否表明收入极化是过去经济进步（包括减贫）的副产品。本文没有发现强有力的时间序列证据表明极化与经济增长或人口城市化（包括在国家中位数以下的人群中）同时存在。极化与不平等之间存在强烈的联动关系。在中国，城乡平均收入差距越大，极化效应越强。

papers.title: A (Dynamic) Investigation of Stereotypes, Belief-Updating, and Behavior
papers.authors: Katherine B. Coffman, Paola Ugalde Araya, Basit Zafar
papers.abstract: Many decisions – such as what educational or career path to pursue – are dynamic in nature, with individuals receiving feedback at one point in time and making decisions later. Using a controlled experiment, with two sessions one week apart, we analyze the dynamic effects of feedback on beliefs about own performance and decision-making across two different domains (verbal skills and math). We find significant gender gaps in beliefs and choices before feedback: men are more optimistic about their performance and more willing to compete than women in both domains, but the gaps are significantly larger in math. Feedback significantly shifts individuals' beliefs and choices. Despite this, we see substantial persistence of gender gaps over time. This is particularly true among the set of individuals who receive negative feedback. We find that, holding fixed performance and decisions before feedback, women update their beliefs and choices more negatively than men do after bad news. Our results highlight the challenges involved in overcoming gender gaps in dynamic settings.
papers.zh_title: （动态）研究刻板印象、信念更新与行为
papers.zh_abstract: 许多决策——例如选择何种教育或职业道路——本质上是动态的，个体在某个时间点收到反馈，然后在之后做出决策。通过一项控制实验（两次实验间隔一周），我们分析了反馈对两个不同领域（语言技能和数学）中关于自身表现和决策的信念的动态影响。我们发现，在反馈之前，信念和选择存在显著的性别差距：男性在两个领域都对自己的表现更乐观，也更愿意竞争，但在数学领域的差距显著更大。反馈显著改变了个体的信念和选择。尽管如此，我们观察到性别差距随时间持续存在。在收到负面反馈的个体群体中尤其如此。我们发现，在控制反馈前的表现和决策后，女性在收到坏消息后比男性更消极地更新自己的信念和选择。我们的结果凸显了在动态环境中克服性别差距所面临的挑战。

papers.title: Occupational Choice and the Intergenerational Mobility of Welfare
papers.authors: Corina Boar, Danial Lashkari
papers.abstract: How does parental income shape labor market outcomes? Standard measures of intergenerational mobility typically focus on earnings as the main outcome, but parental income may also influence children’s access to more fulfilling careers. Using U.S. survey data, we show that children from higher-income families are significantly more likely to select occupations offering greater non-monetary qualities such as autonomy, intellectual stimulation, and workplace respect. To explain this pattern, we develop and estimate a model where parental resources allow children to prioritize occupational quality over earnings. When we adjust earnings to compensate for the monetary equivalent of these desirable qualities, intergenerational mobility falls by 15–35%, revealing that traditional income-based measures overstate the equality of opportunity. Finally, we document recent labor market shifts toward higher-quality occupations that raise our compensated measure of intergenerational mobility, suggesting structural changes that may have led to more equal distributions of opportunity.
papers.zh_title: 职业选择与福利的代际流动性
papers.zh_abstract: 父母收入如何塑造劳动力市场结果？代际流动性的标准衡量通常以收入作为主要结果，但父母收入也可能影响子女获得更有成就感职业的机会。利用美国调查数据，我们表明，来自高收入家庭的子女更有可能选择提供更高非货币品质（如自主性、智力刺激和工作场所尊重）的职业。为了解释这一模式，我们构建并估计了一个模型，其中父母资源允许子女优先考虑职业品质而非收入。当我们调整收入以补偿这些理想品质的货币等价物时，代际流动性下降了15-35%，这表明传统的基于收入的衡量标准高估了机会均等。最后，我们记录了近期劳动力市场向更高质量职业的转变，这提高了我们经补偿后的代际流动性衡量指标，表明结构性变化可能导致了更平等的机会分配。

papers.title: Exposures and Behavioral Responses to Wildfire Smoke
papers.authors: Marshall Burke, Sam Heft-Neal, Jessica Li, Anne Driscoll, Patrick W. Baylis, Matthieu Stigler, Joakim Weill, Jennifer Burney, Jeff Wen, Marissa Childs, Carlos Gould
papers.abstract: The impacts of environmental change on human outcomes often depend on local exposures and behavioral responses that are challenging to observe with traditional administrative or sensor data. We show how data from private pollution sensors, cell phones, social media posts, and internet search activity yield new insights on exposures and behavioral responses during large wildfire smoke events across the US, a rapidly-growing environmental stressor. Health-protective behavior, mobility, and sentiment all respond to increasing ambient wildfire smoke concentrations, but responses differ by income. Indoor pollution monitors provide starkly different estimates of likely personal exposure during smoke events than would be inferred from traditional ambient outdoor sensors, with similar outdoor pollution levels generating >20x differences in average indoor PM2.5 concentrations. Our results suggest that the current policy reliance on self protection to mitigate health risks in the face of rising smoke exposure will result in modest and unequal benefits.
papers.zh_title: 暴露与行为反应：野火烟雾的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 环境变化对人类结果的影响通常取决于局部暴露和难以通过传统行政或传感器数据观察到的行为反应。我们展示了来自私人污染传感器、手机、社交媒体帖子和互联网搜索活动的数据如何为美国大规模野火烟雾事件（一种快速增长的环境压力源）期间的暴露和行为反应提供新见解。健康保护行为、流动性和情绪都对环境野火烟雾浓度的增加做出反应，但反应因收入而异。室内污染监测器提供的烟雾事件期间个人可能暴露的估计值与从传统环境室外传感器推断出的估计值截然不同，相似的室外污染水平导致室内PM2.5平均浓度差异超过20倍。我们的结果表明，当前政策依赖自我保护来减轻因烟雾暴露增加而带来的健康风险，将产生有限且不平等的效益。

papers.title: Predicting the Oil Market
papers.authors: Charles W. Calomiris, Nida Çakır Melek, Harry Mamaysky
papers.abstract: We study the performance of many traditional and novel, text-based variables for in-sample and out-of-sample forecasting of oil spot, futures, and energy company stock returns, and changes in oil volatility, production, and inventories. After controlling for small-sample biases, we find evidence of in-sample predictability. Our text measures, derived using energy news articles, hold their own against traditional variables. While we cannot identify ex-ante rules for selecting successful out-of-sample forecasters, an analysis of all possible two-variable models reveals out-of-sample performance above that expected under random variation. Our findings provide new directions for identifying robust forecasting models for oil markets, and beyond.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, EEE, IFM；JEL：C52, G10, G12, G14, G17, Q47
papers.zh_title: 预测石油市场
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了许多传统和基于文本的新变量在样本内和样本外预测石油现货、期货和能源公司股票回报，以及石油波动率、产量和库存变化方面的表现。在控制小样本偏差后，我们发现了样本内可预测性的证据。我们的文本指标（源自能源新闻文章）与传统变量相比毫不逊色。虽然我们无法确定选择成功样本外预测者的先验规则，但对所有可能的双变量模型的分析显示，其样本外表现高于随机变化下的预期。我们的发现为识别石油市场及其他领域的稳健预测模型提供了新方向。

papers.title: Data Engineering for Cognitive Economics
papers.authors: Andrew Caplin
papers.abstract: Cognitive economics studies imperfect information and decision-making mistakes. A central scientific challenge is that these can’t be identified in standard choice data. Overcoming this challenge calls for data engineering, in which new data forms are introduced to separately identify preferences, beliefs, and other model constructs. I present applications to traditional areas of economic research, such as wealth accumulation, earnings, and consumer spending. I also present less traditional applications to assessment of decision-making skills, and to human-AI interactions. Methods apply both to individual and to collective decisions. I make the case for broader application of data engineering beyond cognitive economics. It allows symbiotic advances in modeling and measurement. It cuts across existing boundaries between disciplines and styles of research.
papers.zh_title: 认知经济学的数据工程
papers.zh_abstract: 认知经济学研究不完全信息和决策错误。一个核心的科学挑战是，这些无法在标准选择数据中被识别。克服这一挑战需要数据工程，即引入新的数据形式来分别识别偏好、信念和其他模型构念。我展示了在传统经济研究领域（如财富积累、收入和消费者支出）的应用。我还展示了在评估决策技能以及人机交互方面的非传统应用。这些方法既适用于个人决策，也适用于集体决策。我主张在认知经济学之外更广泛地应用数据工程。它允许建模和测量共生进步。它跨越了学科和研究风格之间的现有界限。

papers.title: Pay, Productivity and Management
papers.authors: Nicholas Bloom, Scott W. Ohlmacher, Cristina J. Tello-Trillo, Melanie Wallskog
papers.abstract: Using confidential Census matched employer-employee earnings data we find that employees at more productive firms, and firms with more structured management practices, have substantially higher pay, both on average and across every percentile of the pay distribution. This pay-performance relationship is particularly strong amongst higher paid employees, with a doubling of firm productivity associated with 11% more pay for the highest-paid employee (likely the CEO) compared to 4.7% for the median worker. This pay-performance link holds in public and private firms, although it is almost twice as strong in public firms for the highest-paid employees. Top pay volatility is also strongly related to productivity and structured management, suggesting this performance-pay relationship arises from more aggressive monitoring and incentive practices for top earners.
papers.zh_title: 薪酬、生产率与管理
papers.zh_abstract: 利用保密的普查雇主-雇员匹配收入数据，我们发现，在生产率更高、管理实践更结构化的企业中，员工的薪酬显著更高，这种差异体现在薪酬分布的平均值以及每一个百分位数上。这种薪酬-绩效关系在高薪员工中尤为强烈：企业生产率翻倍与最高薪员工（很可能是CEO）薪酬增加11%相关，而中位数员工仅增加4.7%。这种薪酬-绩效联系在上市公司和私营企业中都存在，尽管对于最高薪员工而言，上市公司中的这种联系几乎是私营企业的两倍。最高薪酬的波动性与生产率和结构化管理也密切相关，这表明这种绩效-薪酬关系源于对高收入者更激进的监督和激励实践。

papers.title: Firms' Inflation Expectations: New Evidence from France
papers.authors: Frédérique Savignac, Erwan Gautier, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Olivier Coibion
papers.abstract: Using a new survey of firms’ inflation expectations in France, we provide novel evidence about the measurement and formation of inflation expectations on the part of firms. First, French firms report inflation expectations with a smaller, but still positive, bias than households and display less disagreement. Second, we characterize the extent and manner in which the wording of questions matters for the measurement of firms’ inflation expectations. Third, we document whether and how the position of the respondent within the firm affects the provided responses. Fourth, because our survey measures firms’ expectations about aggregate and firm-level wage growth along with their inflation expectations, we are able to show that expectations about wages are even more condensed than firms’ inflation expectations and almost completely uncorrelated with them, indicating that firms perceive little link between price and wage inflation. Finally, an experimental treatment indicates that an exogenous change in firms’ inflation expectations has no effect on their aggregate wage expectations.
papers.zh_title: 企业的通胀预期：来自法国的新证据
papers.zh_abstract: 利用一项关于法国企业通胀预期的新调查，我们提供了关于企业通胀预期测量和形成的新证据。首先，法国企业报告的通胀预期偏差比家庭更小（但仍为正），且企业间的分歧更少。其次，我们描述了问题措辞在多大程度上以及以何种方式影响企业通胀预期的测量。第三，我们记录了受访者在企业内的职位是否以及如何影响其提供的回答。第四，由于我们的调查同时测量了企业对总体和公司层面工资增长的预期以及通胀预期，我们能够表明，工资预期比企业通胀预期更加集中，并且两者几乎完全不相关，这表明企业认为价格通胀与工资通胀之间几乎没有联系。最后，一项实验处理表明，企业通胀预期的外生变化对其总体工资预期没有影响。

papers.title: The Impact of Group Size on Giving Versus Demand for Redistribution
papers.authors: Johanna Mollerstrom, Avner Strulov-Shlain, Dmitry Taubinsky
papers.abstract: We report the results of an online experiment studying preferences for giving and preferences for group-wide redistribution in small (4-person) and large (200-person) groups. We find that the desire to engage in voluntary giving decreases significantly with group size. However, voting for group-wide redistribution is precisely estimated to not depend on group size. Moreover, people’s perception of the size of their reference group is malleable, and affects their desire to give. These results suggest that government programs, such as progressive tax-and-transfer systems, can help satisfy other-regarding preferences for redistribution in a way that creating opportunities for voluntary giving do not.
papers.zh_title: 群体规模对自愿捐赠与再分配需求的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们报告了一项在线实验的结果，该实验研究了在小型（4人）和大型（200人）群体中，对自愿捐赠的偏好和对群体范围内再分配的偏好。我们发现，自愿捐赠的意愿随着群体规模的增大而显著下降。然而，对群体范围内再分配进行投票的意愿被精确估计为不依赖于群体规模。此外，人们对其参照群体规模的感知是可塑的，并且会影响他们的捐赠意愿。这些结果表明，政府项目（例如累进税和转移支付系统）可以帮助满足人们对再分配的利他偏好，而创造自愿捐赠机会的方式则无法做到这一点。

papers.title: Top Wealth in America: New Estimates and Implications for Taxing the Rich
papers.authors: Matthew Smith, Owen M. Zidar, Eric Zwick
papers.abstract: This paper uses administrative tax data to estimate top wealth in the United States. We assemble new data that links people to their sources of capital income and develop new methods to estimate the degree of return heterogeneity within asset classes. Disaggregated fixed income data reveal that rich individuals earn much more of their interest income in higher-yielding forms, and have much greater exposure to credit risk. Consequently, in recent years, the interest rate on fixed income at the top is approximately three times higher than the average. Using firm-level characteristics to value firms, we find that twenty percent of total pass-through business wealth accrues to those with losses. We combine this new data on fixed income and pass-through business returns with refined estimates of C-corporation equity, housing, and pension wealth to deliver new capitalized wealth estimates. Our approach---which builds on Saez and Zucman (2016) and Bricker, Henriques, and Hansen (2018)---reduces bias because wealth and rates of return are correlated. From 1989 to 2016, the top 1%, 0.1%, and 0.01% wealth shares increased by 7.6, 5.1, and 3.0 percentage points, respectively, to 31.5%, 15.0%, and 7.0%. While these changes are less dramatic than some prior estimates, wealth is very concentrated: the top 1% holds nearly as much wealth as either the bottom 90% or the "P90-99" class. We discuss implications for income inequality measures, capital tax policy, and savings behavior.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM, LS, ME, PE, POL, PR；JEL：D31, E01, E21, H2
papers.zh_title: 美国顶层财富：新估计及其对富人征税的启示
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用行政税收数据来估计美国的顶层财富。我们汇编了将个人与其资本收入来源联系起来的新数据，并开发了新方法来估计资产类别内部的回报异质性程度。分类固定收益数据显示，富人从收益率更高的形式中获得更多的利息收入，并且面临更大的信用风险敞口。因此，近年来，顶层人群的固定收益利率大约是平均利率的三倍。利用企业层面的特征来评估企业价值，我们发现，总共有20%的穿透式企业财富归属于那些有亏损的企业。我们将这些关于固定收益和穿透式企业回报的新数据，与对C类公司股权、住房和养老金财富的精细估计相结合，以提供新的资本化财富估计。我们的方法——建立在Saez和Zucman (2016)以及Bricker, Henriques和Hansen (2018)的基础上——减少了偏差，因为财富和回报率是相关的。从1989年到2016年，顶层1%、0.1%和0.01%的财富份额分别增加了7.6、5.1和3.0个百分点，达到31.5%、15.0%和7.0%。虽然这些变化不如一些先前的估计那么显著，但财富非常集中：顶层1%持有的财富几乎与底层90%或“P90-99”阶层持有的财富一样多。我们讨论了这些发现对收入不平等衡量、资本税收政策和储蓄行为的启示。

papers.title: The Effect of Medicaid on Care and Outcomes for Chronic Conditions: Evidence from the Oregon Health Insurance Experiment
papers.authors: Heidi Allen, Katherine Baicker
papers.abstract: Health insurance may play an important role not only in immediate access to care but in the management of chronic disease, which would have implications for long-run care needs as well as health outcomes. Such causal connections are often difficult to establish, but we use Oregon’s 2008 Medicaid lottery to assess the management of diabetes and asthma, as well as several markers of physical health. This analysis complements several prior studies by introducing new data elements and by analyzing chronically ill subpopulations. While we had previously found that having insurance increases the diagnosis and use of medication for diabetes, we show here that it does not significantly increase the likelihood of diabetic patients receiving recommended care such as eye exams and regular blood sugar monitoring, nor does it improve the management of patients with asthma. We also find no effect on measures of physical health including pulse, obesity, or blood markers of chronic inflammation. Effects of Medicaid on health care utilization appear similar for those with and without pre-lottery diagnoses of chronic physical health conditions. Thus, while Medicaid is an important determinant of access to care overall, it does not appear that Medicaid alone has detectable effects on the management of several chronic physical health conditions, at least over the first two years in this setting. However, sample limitations highlight the value of additional research.
papers.zh_title: 医疗补助对慢性病护理和结果的影响：来自俄勒冈健康保险实验的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 健康保险不仅可能在即时获得医疗服务方面发挥重要作用，也可能在慢性病管理方面发挥重要作用，这将影响长期护理需求和健康结果。这种因果关系通常难以建立，但我们利用俄勒冈州2008年的医疗补助抽签来评估糖尿病和哮喘的管理情况，以及若干身体健康指标。这项分析通过引入新的数据元素和分析慢性病亚群，补充了之前的几项研究。虽然我们之前发现拥有保险会增加糖尿病的诊断和药物使用，但我们在此表明，它并未显著增加糖尿病患者接受推荐护理（如眼科检查和定期血糖监测）的可能性，也没有改善哮喘患者的管理。我们还发现，保险对身体健康指标（包括脉搏、肥胖或慢性炎症的血液标志物）没有影响。医疗补助对医疗保健利用的影响，在抽签前有和没有慢性身体健康状况诊断的人群中似乎相似。因此，尽管医疗补助是决定总体医疗服务可及性的重要因素，但仅凭医疗补助本身似乎并未对几种慢性身体健康状况的管理产生可检测的影响，至少在该环境下的头两年内是如此。然而，样本局限性凸显了进一步研究的价值。

papers.title: The Economics of Walking About and Predicting US Downturns
papers.authors: David G. Blanchflower, Alex Bryson
papers.abstract: Economic shocks are notoriously difficult to predict but recent research suggests qualitative metrics about economic actors’ expectations are predictive of downturns. We show consumer expectations indices from both the Conference Board and the University of Michigan predict economic downturns up to 18 months in advance in the United States, both at national and at state-level. All the recessions since the 1980s have been predicted by at least 10 and sometimes many more point drops in these expectations indices. A single monthly rise of at least 0.3 percentage points in the unemployment rate also predicts recession, as does two consecutive months of employment rate declines. The economic situation in 2021 is exceptional, however, since unprecedented direct government intervention in the labor market through furlough-type arrangements has enabled employment rates to recover quickly from the huge downturn in 2020. However, downward movements in consumer expectations in the last six months suggest the economy in the United States is entering recession now (Autumn 2021) even though employment and wage growth figures suggest otherwise.
papers.zh_title: “四处走动”的经济学与美国经济衰退预测
papers.zh_abstract: 经济冲击以其难以预测而闻名，但最近的研究表明，关于经济主体预期的定性指标可以预测经济衰退。我们显示，来自世界大型企业联合会和密歇根大学的消费者预期指数，在美国全国和州层面，都能提前长达18个月预测经济衰退。自20世纪80年代以来的所有衰退，都至少被这些预期指数下降10个点（有时更多）所预测。失业率单月上升至少0.3个百分点也能预测衰退，就业率连续两个月下降也是如此。然而，2021年的经济形势是特殊的，因为政府通过类似强制休假安排对劳动力市场进行了前所未有的直接干预，使得就业率从2020年的巨大衰退中迅速恢复。然而，过去六个月消费者预期的下行表明，美国经济正在进入衰退（2021年秋季），尽管就业和工资增长数据表明情况并非如此。

papers.title: Effects of Opioid-Related Policies on Opioid Utilization, Nature of Medical Care, and Duration of Disability
papers.authors: David Neumark, Bogdan Savych
papers.abstract: We examine the effects of must-access prescription drug monitoring programs (PDMPs) and recent regulations limiting the duration of initial opioid prescriptions on care received by patients with work-related injuries, focusing on opioid utilization and medical care related to pain management. We find that must-access PDMPs contributed to declines in opioid utilization, while regulations limiting duration of initial opioid prescriptions had little effect on whether workers receive opioids, but reduced opioid use among those with prescriptions. We find some evidence that must-access PDMPs affected utilization of other medical care—most interestingly, in light of high opioid use, towards non-opioid pain medication and interventional pain management services for neurologic spine pain. We find that must-access PDMPs and limits on initial prescriptions had little impact on the duration of temporary disability benefits captured at 12 months of maturity.
papers.zh_title: 阿片类药物相关政策对阿片类药物使用、医疗护理性质及残疾持续时间的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了强制访问处方药监测计划（PDMPs）和最近限制初始阿片类药物处方持续时间的法规，对工伤患者所接受护理的影响，重点关注阿片类药物使用和与疼痛管理相关的医疗护理。我们发现，强制访问PDMPs导致了阿片类药物使用的下降，而限制初始处方持续时间的法规对工人是否接受阿片类药物影响甚微，但减少了有处方者的阿片类药物使用。我们找到一些证据表明，强制访问PDMPs影响了其他医疗护理的使用——最有趣的是，鉴于阿片类药物的高使用率，转向了非阿片类止痛药和针对神经性脊柱疼痛的介入性疼痛管理服务。我们发现，强制访问PDMPs和对初始处方的限制，对在12个月成熟期时捕获的临时残疾津贴持续时间几乎没有影响。

papers.title: Perceptions and Preferences for Redistribution
papers.authors: Stefanie Stantcheva
papers.abstract: The relationship between the degree of inequality and the demand for redistribution has been a central question in political science and political economy. The famous median-voter model predicts that higher inequality, reflected in a growing gap between the income of the average and the median voter, should lead to increased demand for redistribution, as policymakers cater to the median voter’s preferences (Meltzer and Richard, 1981). Yet, using data from OECD countries, Kenworthy and McCall (2008) show that, despite increases in inequality in those countries, there was no corresponding increase in demand for redistribution. Part of the explanation of this puzzle lies in the realization that it is not only (or even mainly) reality, but perceptions that shape support for policy. This article will explore recent evidence using large-scale social economics surveys and experiments that sheds lights on beliefs about inequality, social mobility, diversity and immigration, social position, and understanding of how policies work.
papers.zh_title: 对再分配的认知与偏好
papers.zh_abstract: 不平等程度与再分配需求之间的关系一直是政治科学和政治经济学的核心问题。著名的中位数选民模型预测，更高的不平等（反映在平均选民与中位数选民收入差距的扩大）应导致再分配需求增加，因为政策制定者会迎合中位数选民的偏好（Meltzer和Richard, 1981）。然而，Kenworthy和McCall (2008) 利用经合组织国家的数据表明，尽管这些国家的不平等加剧，但再分配需求并未相应增加。对这一悖论的部分解释在于认识到，塑造政策支持的不仅仅是（甚至主要不是）现实，而是认知。本文将探讨近期利用大规模社会经济调查和实验获得的证据，这些证据揭示了关于不平等、社会流动性、多样性与移民、社会地位以及政策运作方式的理解等方面的信念。

papers.title: Falling Rates and Rising Superstars
papers.authors: Thomas Kroen, Ernest Liu, Atif R. Mian, Amir Sufi
papers.abstract: Using high frequency interest rate shocks, we find that falling rates in a low interest rate environment favor industry leaders. A fall in interest rate near the zero lower bound leads to a stronger decline in the borrowing rate for industry leaders, who also borrow more, invest more aggressively, and acquire assets at a faster pace. This advantage from falling rates enjoyed by industry leaders diminishes in a higher rate environment. We estimate a “competition-neutral” nominal federal funds rate of about four percentage points, a level at which industry leaders and followers are impacted equally from an interest rate change.
papers.zh_title: 利率下降与超级明星企业崛起
papers.zh_abstract: 利用高频利率冲击，我们发现低利率环境下利率下降有利于行业领导者。当利率接近零下限时，利率下降导致行业领导者借款利率下降幅度更大，他们借款更多、投资更激进、资产收购速度更快。行业领导者从利率下降中获得的这种优势在高利率环境中会减弱。我们估计出一个“竞争中性”的名义联邦基金利率约为4个百分点，在此水平上，利率变动对行业领导者和追随者的影响是均等的。

papers.title: Market Design
papers.authors: Nikhil Agarwal, Eric Budish
papers.abstract: This Handbook chapter seeks to introduce students and researchers of industrial organization (IO) to the field of market design. We emphasize two important points of connection between the IO and market design fields: a focus on market failures—both understanding sources of market failure and analyzing how to fix them—and an appreciation of institutional detail.
papers.zh_title: 市场设计
papers.zh_abstract: 本《手册》章节旨在向产业组织（IO）的学生和研究人员介绍市场设计领域。我们强调产业组织与市场设计领域之间的两个重要联系：一是关注市场失灵——既理解市场失灵的根源，也分析如何修复它们；二是重视制度细节。

papers.title: Preemptive Entry and Technology Diffusion: The Market for Drive-in Theaters
papers.authors: Ricard Gil, Jean-François Houde, Shilong Sun, Yuya Takahashi
papers.abstract: This paper studies the role and incidence of entry preemption strategic motives on the dynamics of new industries, while providing an empirical test for entry preemption, and quantifying its impact on market structure. The empirical context is the evolution of the U.S. drive-in theater market between 1945 and 1957. We exploit a robust prediction of dynamic entry games to test for preemption incentives: the deterrence effect of entering early is only relevant for firms in markets of intermediate size. Potential entrants in small and large markets face little uncertainty about the actual number of firms that will eventually enter. This leads to a non-monotonic relationship between market size and the probability of observing an early entrant. We find robust empirical support for this prediction using a large cross-section of markets. We then estimate the parameters of a dynamic entry game that matches the reduced-form prediction and quantify the strength of the preemption incentive. Our counterfactual analysis shows that strategic motives can increase the number of early entrants by as much as 50 percent in mid-size markets without affecting the number of firms in the long run. By causing firms to enter the market too early, we show that strategic entry preemption leads on average to a 5% increase in entry costs and a 1% decrease in firms’ expected value (relative to an environment without strategic investments).
papers.zh_title: 先发进入与技术扩散：汽车影院市场
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了先发进入的战略动机在新行业动态中的作用和发生率，同时为先发进入提供了实证检验，并量化了其对市场结构的影响。实证背景是1945年至1957年间美国汽车影院市场的演变。我们利用动态进入博弈的一个稳健预测来检验先发激励：早期进入的威慑效应仅对中等规模市场的企业相关。小规模和大规模市场的潜在进入者对最终将进入的实际企业数量面临较小的不确定性。这导致市场规模与观察到早期进入者的概率之间存在非单调关系。我们利用大量市场横截面数据发现了对这一预测的稳健实证支持。然后，我们估计了一个动态进入博弈的参数，该博弈匹配了简化形式的预测，并量化了先发激励的强度。我们的反事实分析表明，战略动机可以使中等规模市场的早期进入者数量增加多达50%，而不会影响长期内的企业数量。通过导致企业过早进入市场，我们表明战略性的先发进入平均使进入成本增加5%，并使企业预期价值下降1%（相对于没有战略投资的环境）。

papers.title: Mental Health Therapy as a Core Strategy for Increasing Human Capital: Evidence from Ghana
papers.authors: Nathan Barker, Gharad T. Bryan, Dean Karlan, Angela Ofori-Atta, Christopher R. Udry
papers.abstract: We study the impact of cognitive behavioral therapy (CBT) for individuals selected from the general population of poor households in rural Ghana. Results from 2-3 months after a randomized intervention show strong impacts on mental and physical health, cognitive and socioemotional skills, and downstream economic outcomes. We find no evidence of heterogeneity by baseline mental distress; we argue that this is because CBT can improve human capital for a general population of poor individuals through two pathways. First, CBT reduces vulnerability to deteriorating mental health; and second, CBT directly improves bandwidth, increasing cognitive and socioemotional skills and hence economic outcomes.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EH, LS, PE；JEL：H0, H00, I0, I00, I3, J0, J01, J10, J21, J24, O0, O1, O10
papers.zh_title: 心理健康治疗作为增加人力资本的核心策略：来自加纳的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了针对加纳农村贫困家庭一般人群中选出的个体进行认知行为疗法（CBT）的影响。随机干预后2-3个月的结果显示，CBT对心理健康、身体健康、认知和社会情感技能以及下游经济结果产生了强烈影响。我们没有发现基于基线心理困扰的异质性证据；我们认为这是因为CBT可以通过两条途径改善贫困个体一般人群的人力资本。首先，CBT降低了对心理健康恶化的脆弱性；其次，CBT直接改善了认知带宽，增加了认知和社会情感技能，从而改善了经济结果。

papers.title: Market Segmentation and Competition in Health Insurance
papers.authors: Michael J. Dickstein, Kate Ho, Nathaniel D. Mark
papers.abstract: In the United States, households obtain health insurance through distinct market segments. To explore the economics of this segmentation, we consider the effects of pooling coverage provided through small employers and through the individual marketplace. We model households’ demand for insurance coverage and health care, along with insurers’ price-setting, to predict equilibrium choices, premiums, and health spending. Applying our model to data from Oregon, we find that pooling can both mitigate adverse selection in the individual market and benefit small group households without raising taxpayer costs: premiums in the individual market fall 11% for the most chosen plan type and consumers in both segments gain surplus. Our estimates provide insight into the effects of new regulations that allow employers to shift coverage to the individual market.
papers.zh_title: 健康保险中的市场分割与竞争
papers.zh_abstract: 在美国，家庭通过不同的市场细分获得健康保险。为了探讨这种分割的经济学含义，我们考虑了将小雇主提供的保险和个人市场提供的保险合并的效果。我们对家庭对保险覆盖和医疗保健的需求以及保险公司的定价进行建模，以预测均衡选择、保费和医疗支出。将我们的模型应用于俄勒冈州的数据，我们发现合并既可以缓解个人市场中的逆向选择，也可以使小团体家庭受益，而不会增加纳税人成本：对于最常选择的计划类型，个人市场的保费下降11%，两个细分市场的消费者都获得了剩余。我们的估计为允许雇主将保险覆盖转移到个人市场的新法规的影响提供了见解。

papers.title: The Marginal Value of Public Pension Wealth: Evidence from Border House Prices
papers.authors: Darren Aiello, Asaf Bernstein, Mahyar Kargar, Ryan Lewis, Michael Schwert
papers.abstract: We study effects of state pension windfalls on property prices near state borders, where theory suggests real estate reflects the value of additional public resources. Windfalls have grown to half the size of total state tax revenues and provide plausibly well-identified variation in fiscal conditions. We find one dollar of exogenous variation in pension asset returns increases border house prices by approximately two dollars. These estimates suggest governments, rather than wasting incremental resources, allocate additional funds towards high value projects or tax abatement. Evidence of larger effects in financially constrained municipalities highlight how fiscal resources amplify welfare effects of economic shocks.
papers.meta: Programs：AG, AP, CF, PE, POL；JEL：H41, H55, H74, R30
papers.zh_title: 公共养老金财富的边际价值：来自边境房价的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们研究了州养老金意外收益对州边界附近房产价格的影响，理论上认为房地产反映了额外公共资源的价值。这些意外收益已增长到州总税收收入的一半，并提供了看似合理且可识别的财政状况变化。我们发现，养老金资产回报的一美元外生变化会使边境房价增加约两美元。这些估计表明，政府并没有浪费增量资源，而是将额外资金分配给了高价值项目或税收减免。在财政受限的市政当局中观察到更大效应的证据，突显了财政资源如何放大经济冲击的福利效应。

papers.title: The Economic Consequences of the Opium War
papers.authors: Wolfgang Keller, Carol H. Shiue
papers.abstract: This paper employs new data to study the impact of Western colonial institutions on China’s economy during the 19th century. It is shown that trade and legal institutions in the treaty port areas accelerated industrialization and increased capital market efficiency. The former was driven by technology transfer and market access gains at the ports, while the latter was due to increased security through extraterritorial legal rule at the consular courts. Furthermore, a geographic spillover analysis demonstrates that even though the number of foreign places was relatively small, the Western impact was substantial because it radiated far from the ports and affected most of the country. At the same time, the West’s intervention harmed China’s economy by increasing protest activity organized by secret societies, thereby reducing Qing state capacity. A picture emerges according to which the West’s intervention had a major impact that is neither all-favorable nor all-unfavorable.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, ITI, POL；JEL：F63, G10, N25, O11
papers.zh_title: 鸦片战争的经济后果
papers.zh_abstract: 本文利用新数据研究了19世纪西方殖民制度对中国经济的影响。研究表明，通商口岸地区的贸易和法律制度加速了工业化并提高了资本市场效率。前者是由港口的技术转让和市场准入收益驱动的，而后者则是由于领事法庭的治外法权规则增加了安全性。此外，地理溢出分析表明，尽管外国场所数量相对较少，但西方的影响是巨大的，因为它从港口辐射到远方，影响了国家的大部分地区。同时，西方的干预通过增加秘密社团组织的抗议活动，削弱了清朝的国家能力，从而损害了中国经济。由此呈现的画面是，西方的干预产生了重大影响，既非完全有利，也非完全不利。

papers.title: Financial Incentives and Other Nudges Do Not Increase COVID-19 Vaccinations among the Vaccine Hesitant
papers.authors: Tom Chang, Mireille Jacobson, Manisha Shah, Rajiv Pramanik, Samir B. Shah
papers.abstract: Can financial incentives, public health messages and other behavioral nudges –approaches deployed by state and local governments, employers, and health systems – increase SARS-CoV-2 vaccination rates among the vaccine hesitant in the US? In mid-2021, we randomly assigned unvaccinated members of a Medicaid managed care health plan to $10 or $50 financial incentives, different public health messages, a simple appointment scheduler, or control to assess impacts on SARS-CoV-2 vaccination intentions and vaccine uptake within 30 days of intervention. While messages increased vaccination intentions, none of the treatments increased overall vaccination rates. Consistent with backlash concerns, financial incentives and negative messages decreased vaccination rates for some subgroups. Financial incentives and other behavioral nudges do not meaningfully increase SARS-CoV-2 vaccination rates amongst the vaccine hesitant.
papers.zh_title: 经济激励和其他助推措施并未提高疫苗犹豫人群的新冠疫苗接种率
papers.zh_abstract: 经济激励、公共卫生信息和其他行为助推措施——这些由州和地方政府、雇主及卫生系统部署的方法——能否提高美国疫苗犹豫人群的SARS-CoV-2疫苗接种率？在2021年中期，我们将一个医疗补助管理式医疗健康计划中未接种疫苗的成员随机分配到10美元或50美元的经济激励、不同的公共卫生信息、一个简单的预约安排器或对照组，以评估这些措施对SARS-CoV-2疫苗接种意愿和干预后30天内疫苗接受率的影响。虽然信息增加了接种意愿，但没有一种处理措施提高了总体接种率。与反弹担忧一致，经济激励和负面信息降低了一些亚组的接种率。经济激励和其他行为助推措施并未有意义地提高疫苗犹豫人群的SARS-CoV-2疫苗接种率。

papers.title: Policy Experimentation in China: the Political Economy of Policy Learning
papers.authors: Shaoda Wang, David Y. Yang
papers.abstract: Many governments have engaged in policy experimentation in various forms to resolve uncertainty and facilitate learning. However, little is understood about the characteristics of policy experimentation, and how the structure of experimentation may affect policy learning and policy outcomes. We aim to describe and understand China’s policy experimentation since 1980, among the largest and most systematic in recent history. We collect comprehensive data on policy experimentation conducted in China over the past four decades. We find three main results. First, more than 80% of the experiments exhibit positive sample selection in terms of a locality’s economic development, and much of this can be attributed to misaligned incentives across political hierarchies. Second, local politicians allocate more resources to ensure the experiments’ success, and such effort is not replicable when policies roll out to the entire country. Third, the presence of sample selection and strategic effort is not fully accounted for by the central government, thus affecting policy learning and distorting national policies originating from the experimentation. Taken together, these results suggest that while China’s bureaucratic and institutional conditions make policy experimentation at such scale possible, the complex political environments can also limit the scope and bias the direction of policy learning.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, POL；JEL：D72, D8, O2, P16, P21
papers.zh_title: 中国的政策试验：政策学习的政治经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 许多政府以各种形式进行政策试验，以解决不确定性和促进学习。然而，人们对政策试验的特征以及试验结构如何影响政策学习和政策结果知之甚少。我们旨在描述和理解中国自1980年以来的政策试验，这是近代历史上规模最大、最系统的试验之一。我们收集了过去四十年中国进行的政策试验的全面数据。我们发现了三个主要结果。首先，超过80%的试验在地方经济发展方面表现出正向样本选择，这在很大程度上可归因于政治层级间的激励错位。其次，地方政治家分配更多资源以确保试验成功，而这种努力在政策推广到全国时是不可复制的。第三，中央政府并未充分考虑样本选择和战略努力的存在，从而影响了政策学习并扭曲了源自试验的国家政策。综合来看，这些结果表明，尽管中国的官僚和制度条件使如此大规模的政策试验成为可能，但复杂的政治环境也可能限制政策学习的范围并使其方向产生偏差。

papers.title: On the Persistence of the China Shock
papers.authors: David Autor, David Dorn, Gordon H. Hanson
papers.abstract: Abstract We evaluate the duration of the China trade shock and its impact on a wide range of outcomes over the period 2000 to 2019. The shock plateaued in 2010, enabling analysis of its effects for nearly a decade past its culmination. Adverse impacts of import competition on manufacturing employment, overall employment-population ratios, and income per capita in more trade-exposed U.S. commuting zones are present out to 2019. Over the full study period, greater import competition implies a reduction in the manufacturing employment-population ratio of 1.54 percentage points, which is 55% of the observed change in the value, and the absorption of 86% of this net job loss via a corresponding decrease in the overall employment rate. Reductions in population headcounts, which indicate net out-migration, register only for foreign-born workers and the native-born 25-39 years old, implying that exit from work is a primary means of adjustment to trade-induced contractions in labor demand. More negatively affected regions see modest increases in the uptake of government transfers, but these transfers primarily take the form of Social Security and Medicare benefits. Adverse outcomes are more acute in regions that initially had fewer college-educated workers and were more industrially specialized. Impacts are qualitatively—but not quantitatively—similar to those caused by the decline of employment in coal production since the 1980s, indicating that the China trade shock holds lessons for other episodes of localized job loss. Import competition from China induced changes in income per capita across local labor markets that are much larger than the spatial heterogeneity of income effects predicted by standard quantitative trade models. Even using higher-end estimates of the consumer benefits of rising trade with China, a substantial fraction of commuting zones appears to have suffered absolute declines in average real incomes.
papers.meta: Programs：ITI, LS；JEL：E24, F16, J23, J31, R12, R23
papers.zh_title: 论中国冲击的持续性
papers.zh_abstract: 我们评估了中国贸易冲击的持续时间及其在2000年至2019年期间对一系列结果的影响。冲击在2010年趋于平稳，从而能够分析其影响在达到顶峰后近十年的情况。在贸易暴露程度更高的美国通勤区，进口竞争对制造业就业、总体就业人口比率和人均收入的不利影响一直持续到2019年。在整个研究期间，更大的进口竞争意味着制造业就业人口比率下降1.54个百分点，这占观察到的该数值变化的55%，并且这些净失业的86%通过总体就业率的相应下降而被吸收。人口数量的减少（表明净迁出）仅在外籍工人和25-39岁的本土出生工人中记录到，这意味着退出工作是应对贸易引发的劳动力需求收缩的主要调整方式。受到更负面影响的地区，政府转移支付的接受有所增加，但这些转移支付主要采取社会保障和医疗保险福利的形式。在最初大学毕业生较少且产业专业化程度更高的地区，不利结果更为严重。这些影响在性质上——但非数量上——与自1980年代以来煤炭生产就业下降所造成的影响相似，表明中国贸易冲击为其他局部失业事件提供了教训。来自中国的进口竞争在地方劳动力市场之间引发了人均收入的变化，这些变化远大于标准定量贸易模型所预测的收入效应的空间异质性。即使使用对与中国贸易增长带来的消费者收益的高端估计，仍有相当一部分通勤区的平均实际收入似乎出现了绝对下降。

papers.title: The Rise of Pass-Throughs and the Decline of the Labor Share
papers.authors: Matthew Smith, Danny Yagan, Owen M. Zidar, Eric Zwick
papers.abstract: This paper studies the coevolution of the fall in the US corporate sector labor share and the rise of business activity in tax-preferred, pass-through form. Reallocating activity to the form it would have taken prior to the Tax Reform Act of 1986 accounts for one third of the decline in the corporate sector labor share between 1978 and 2017. Our adjustments are concentrated among mid-market firms in services, leaving a larger role for the manufacturing sector and superstar firms in driving the remaining decline in the labor share. Our findings highlight the importance of tax policy when measuring factor shares.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, ME, PE, PR；JEL：E01, E25, H25, J32
papers.zh_title: 穿透型企业的兴起与劳动份额的下降
papers.zh_abstract: 本文研究了美国企业部门劳动份额下降与税收优惠的穿透型企业形式中商业活动兴起之间的共同演变。将商业活动重新配置到其在1986年《税收改革法案》之前本应采取的形式，解释了1978年至2017年间企业部门劳动份额下降的三分之一。我们的调整集中在服务业的中端市场企业，这使得制造业部门和超级明星企业在推动劳动份额剩余下降中发挥了更大作用。我们的发现强调了在衡量要素份额时税收政策的重要性。

papers.title: The Geography of Job Creation and Job Destruction
papers.authors: Moritz Kuhn, Iourii Manovskii, Xincheng Qiu
papers.abstract: Spatial differences in labor market performance are large and highly persistent. Using data from the United States, Germany, and the United Kingdom, we document striking similarities in spatial differences in unemployment, vacancies, job finding, and job filling within each country. This robust set of facts guides and disciplines the development of a theory of local labor market performance. We find that a spatial version of a Diamond-Mortensen-Pissarides model with endogenous separations and on-the-job search quantitatively accounts for all the documented empirical regularities. The model also quantitatively rationalizes why differences in job-separation rates have primary importance in inducing differences in unemployment across space while changes in the job-finding rate are the main driver in unemployment fluctuations over the business cycle.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PE；JEL：E24, E32, J63, J64, R13
papers.zh_title: 就业创造与就业消失的地理分布
papers.zh_abstract: 劳动力市场表现的空间差异很大且高度持久。利用来自美国、德国和英国的数据，我们记录了每个国家内失业率、职位空缺、工作找到率和职位填补率的空间差异中显著的相似性。这一组稳健的事实指导并约束了地方劳动力市场表现理论的发展。我们发现，一个包含内生离职和在职搜寻的空间版本的Diamond-Mortensen-Pissarides模型，在数量上解释了所有已记录的经验规律。该模型还定量地解释了为什么离职率的差异在诱导跨空间失业差异方面具有首要重要性，而工作找到率的变化则是商业周期中失业波动的主要驱动因素。

papers.title: The Fiscal and Welfare Effects of Policy Responses to the Covid-19 School Closures
papers.authors: Nicola Fuchs-Schündeln, Dirk Krueger, André Kurmann, Etienne Lalé, Alexander Ludwig, Irina Popova
papers.abstract: Using a structural life-cycle model and data on school visits from Safegraph and school closures from Burbio, we quantify the heterogeneous impact of school closures during the Corona crisis on children affected at different ages and coming from households with different parental characteristics. Our data suggests that secondary schools were closed for in-person learning for longer periods than elementary schools (implying that younger children experienced less school closures than older children), and that private schools experienced shorter closures than public schools, and schools in poorer U.S. counties experienced shorter school closures. We then extend the structural life cycle model of private and public schooling investments studied in Fuchs-Schuendeln, Krueger, Ludwig and Popova (2021) to include the choice of parents whether to send their children to private schools, empirically discipline it with data on parental investments from the PSID, and then feed into the model the school closure measures from our empirical analysis to quantify the long-run consequences of the Covid-19 school closures on the cohorts of children currently in school. Future earnings- and welfare losses are largest for children that started public secondary schools at the onset of the Covid-19 crisis. Comparing children from the top- to children from the bottom quartile of the income distribution, welfare losses are ca. 0.8 percentage points larger for the poorer children if school closures were unrelated to income. Accounting for the longer school closures in richer counties reduces this gap by about 1/3. A policy intervention that extends schools by 3 months (6 weeks in the next two summers) generates significant welfare gains for the children and raises future tax approximately sufficient to pay for the cost of this schooling expansion.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, EFG, EH, LS, PE；JEL：E24, E62
papers.zh_title: 应对新冠疫情学校关闭政策的财政与福利效应
papers.zh_abstract: 利用结构性生命周期模型以及来自Safegraph的学校访问数据和来自Burbio的学校关闭数据，我们量化了新冠危机期间学校关闭对不同年龄且来自不同父母特征家庭的儿童所产生的异质性影响。我们的数据表明，中学关闭面对面教学的时间比小学更长（意味着年幼儿童经历的学校关闭比年长儿童少），私立学校关闭时间比公立学校短，美国较贫困县的学校关闭时间较短。然后，我们扩展了Fuchs-Schuendeln, Krueger, Ludwig和Popova (2021) 中研究的私人和公共教育投资的结构性生命周期模型，加入了父母是否送孩子上私立学校的选择，利用来自PSID的父母投资数据对其进行经验校准，然后将我们实证分析中的学校关闭措施输入模型，以量化新冠疫情学校关闭对当前在校儿童群体的长期后果。未来收入和福利损失最大的是在新冠疫情开始时进入公立中学的儿童。比较收入分配顶部四分之一和底部四分之一的儿童，如果学校关闭与收入无关，较贫困儿童的福利损失大约高出0.8个百分点。考虑到较富裕县学校关闭时间更长，这一差距缩小了约三分之一。一项将学校延长3个月（未来两个暑假各延长6周）的政策干预为儿童带来了显著的福利收益，并提高了未来的税收，大约足以支付这一教育扩展的成本。

papers.title: Bank Runs, Fragility, and Credit Easing
papers.authors: Manuel Amador, Javier Bianchi
papers.abstract: We present a tractable dynamic general equilibrium model of self-fulfilling bank runs, where banks trade capital in competitive and liquid markets but remain vulnerable to runs due to a loss of creditor confidence. We characterize how the vulnerability of an individual bank depends on its leverage position and the economy wide asset prices. We study the effect of credit easing policies, in the form of asset purchases. When a banking crisis is generated by runs, credit easing can reduce the number of defaulting banks and enhance welfare. When the crisis is driven by fundamentals, credit easing may have adverse consequences.
papers.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM；JEL：E44, E58, F34, G01, G21, G33
papers.zh_title: 银行挤兑、脆弱性与信贷宽松
papers.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个易于处理的自我实现银行挤兑的动态一般均衡模型，其中银行在竞争性和流动性市场中交易资本，但由于债权人信心丧失而仍然容易受到挤兑的影响。我们描述了一家银行的脆弱性如何取决于其杠杆头寸和整个经济体的资产价格。我们研究了以资产购买形式实施的信贷宽松政策的效果。当银行危机由挤兑引发时，信贷宽松可以减少违约银行的数量并提高福利。当危机由基本面驱动时，信贷宽松可能产生不利后果。

papers.title: Blockchain Analysis of the Bitcoin Market
papers.authors: Igor Makarov, Antoinette Schoar
papers.abstract: In this paper, we provide detailed analyses of the Bitcoin network and its main participants. We build a novel database using a large number of public and proprietary sources to link Bitcoin addresses to real entities and develop an extensive suite of algorithms to extract information about the behavior of the main market participants. We conduct three major pieces of analysis of the Bitcoin eco-system. First, we analyze the transaction volume and network structure of the main participants on the blockchain. Second, we document the concentration and regional composition of the miners which are the backbone of the verification protocol and ensure the integrity of the blockchain ledger. Finally, we analyze the ownership concentration of the largest holders of Bitcoin.
papers.zh_title: 比特币市场的区块链分析
papers.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们对比特币网络及其主要参与者进行了详细分析。我们利用大量公开和专有来源构建了一个新颖的数据库，将比特币地址与真实实体联系起来，并开发了一套广泛的算法来提取主要市场参与者行为的信息。我们对比特币生态系统进行了三项主要分析。首先，我们分析了区块链上主要参与者的交易量和网络结构。其次，我们记录了作为验证协议支柱并确保区块链账本完整性的矿工的集中度和区域构成。最后，我们分析了最大比特币持有者的所有权集中度。

papers.title: The Effect of Free School Meals on Household Food Purchases: Evidence from the Community Eligibility Provision
papers.authors: Michelle M. Marcus, Katherine G. Yewell
papers.abstract: We find access to universal free school meals through the Community Eligibility Provision (CEP) had a meaningful impact on grocery spending for households with children, with monthly food purchases declining by about $11, or 5 percent. For households in zip codes with higher exposure, the decline is as high as $39 per month, or 19 percent. The composition of food purchases also changes after CEP, with low income households experiencing a 3 percent improvement in dietary quality. Finally, CEP exposure is associated with an almost 5 percent decline in households classified as food insecure. Our results on the heterogeneous effects of CEP exposure by prior free/reduced price lunch eligibility reveal benefits in terms of both spending, dietary composition, and food insecurity for previously eligible low-income families, suggesting that the stigma of free school meals may be declining after universal access.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, EH, PE；JEL：H51, I12, I38
papers.zh_title: 免费校餐对家庭食品购买的影响：来自社区资格规定的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们发现，通过社区资格规定（CEP）获得普及的免费校餐，对有儿童家庭的杂货支出产生了显著影响，每月食品购买量减少了约11美元，即5%。对于邮政编码区域中暴露程度较高的家庭，下降幅度高达每月39美元，即19%。在CEP之后，食品购买的构成也发生了变化，低收入家庭的饮食质量提高了3%。最后，CEP暴露与家庭被归类为食品不安全的比例下降近5%相关。我们关于CEP暴露按先前免费/减价午餐资格划分的异质性效应的结果显示，对于先前符合条件的低收入家庭，在支出、饮食构成和食品不安全方面都有益处，这表明在普及准入后，免费校餐的污名可能正在减少。

papers.title: It All Starts with Beliefs: Addressing the Roots of Educational Inequities by Shifting Parental Beliefs
papers.authors: John A. List, Julie Pernaudet, Dana Suskind
papers.abstract: Socioeconomic inequalities in child development crystallize at early stages, with associated disparities in parental investment in children. A key to understanding the data patterns is to document the sources underlying the observed inequalities. We first show that there are dramatic differences in parental beliefs across socioeconomic backgrounds (SES), with parents of higher SES being more likely to believe that parental investments impact child development. We then use two field experiments targeted to low-SES families to explore the mutability of such beliefs and their link to parental investments. In both cases, we find that parental beliefs about child development are malleable. The less intensive version of the program based on educational videos changes parental beliefs, but fails to lastingly increase parental investments and child outcomes. By contrast, in the more intensive version of our program combining home visits and feedback, the augmented beliefs are associated with enriched parent-child interactions and improved vocabulary, math, and social-emotional skills for the children. Together, these results suggest that changing parental beliefs can be an important pathway to raising parental investments and reducing socioeconomic gaps in children’s skills, but that simple informational policies may not be sufficient.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, ED, EH, LS；JEL：C93, D83, I21, J13
papers.zh_title: 一切始于信念：通过转变父母信念解决教育不平等根源
papers.zh_abstract: 儿童发展的社会经济不平等在早期阶段就已固化，并伴随着父母对儿童投资的相应差异。理解数据模式的关键在于记录观察到的这些不平等的根源。我们首先表明，不同社会经济背景的父母信念存在显著差异，社会经济地位较高的父母更倾向于相信父母投资会影响儿童发展。然后，我们利用两个针对低社会经济地位家庭的实地实验，探讨这些信念的可变性及其与父母投资的联系。在这两种情况下，我们发现父母关于儿童发展的信念是可塑的。基于教育视频的强度较低的版本项目改变了父母的信念，但未能持久地增加父母投资和儿童成果。相比之下，在我们结合家访和反馈的强度更高的项目版本中，增强的信念与更丰富的亲子互动以及儿童词汇、数学和社交情感技能的改善相关联。总之，这些结果表明，改变父母信念可以成为提高父母投资和缩小儿童技能社会经济差距的重要途径，但简单的信息政策可能不足以实现这一目标。

papers.title: Who Pays Sin Taxes? Understanding the Overlapping Burdens of Corrective Taxes
papers.authors: Christopher Conlon, Nirupama L. Rao, Yinan Wang
papers.abstract: We find that sin good purchases are highly concentrated with 10% of households paying more than 80% of taxes on alcohol and cigarettes. Total sin tax burdens are poorly explained by demographics (including income), but are well explained by eight household clusters defined by purchasing patterns. The two most taxed clusters comprise 8% of households, pay 68% of sin taxes, are older, less educated, and lower income. Taxes on sugary beverages broaden the tax base but add to the burdens of heavily taxed households. Efforts to increase sin taxes should consider the heavy burdens borne by few households.
papers.zh_title: 谁在支付罪恶税？理解纠正性税收的重叠负担
papers.zh_abstract: 我们发现，罪恶商品的购买高度集中，10%的家庭支付了超过80%的酒精和香烟税。人口统计特征（包括收入）难以解释罪恶税总负担，但由购买模式定义的八个家庭聚类却能很好地解释。税负最重的两个聚类占8%的家庭，支付了68%的罪恶税，这些家庭年龄较大、受教育程度较低、收入较低。对含糖饮料征税扩大了税基，但增加了税负沉重家庭的负担。提高罪恶税的努力应考虑少数家庭承担的沉重负担。

papers.title: Inflation, Interest, and the Secular Rise in Wealth Inequality in the U.S.: Is the Fed Responsible?
papers.authors: Edward N. Wolff
papers.abstract: Two hallmarks of U.S. monetary policy since the 1981-1982 recession have been declining interest rates and moderation in inflation. Coincident with these trends has been a surge in U.S. wealth inequality, with the Gini coefficient up by 0.070 between 1983 and 2019. This paper analyzes the connection between these two developments on the basis of the Survey of Consumer Finances. Contrary to expectations, the paper finds that these two monetary effects have reduced wealth inequality rather than increasing it. The effect is sizeable, with the Gini coefficient declining by 0.045 over these years. Asset price changes and debt devaluation accounted for 72.6 percent of the advance of mean wealth over 1983-2019. They also would have led to a 204.9 percent gain in median wealth, compared to the actual rise of 23.4 percent. Moreover, they have helped lower the racial wealth gap rather than enlarging it. These results are at odds with previous literature in which estimates range from a weak negative effect on inequality to neutral, small positive, and strong positive. In terms of methodology, this paper differs from previous work by focusing on only the direct effects of interest rate changes and inflation on the household balance sheet.
papers.zh_title: 通货膨胀、利率与美国财富不平等的长期上升：美联储是否负有责任？
papers.zh_abstract: 自1981-1982年经济衰退以来，美国货币政策的两个显著特征是利率下降和通胀缓和。与此同时，美国财富不平等急剧上升，基尼系数在1983年至2019年间上升了0.070。本文基于消费者金融调查分析了这两种发展之间的联系。与预期相反，本文发现这两种货币效应实际上降低了财富不平等，而非加剧了不平等。这一影响相当显著，基尼系数在这些年间下降了0.045。资产价格变化和债务贬值占1983-2019年平均财富增长的72.6%。它们本应使中位数财富增长204.9%，而实际仅增长23.4%。此外，它们有助于缩小而非扩大种族财富差距。这些结果与以往文献相悖，以往文献的估计范围从不平等的微弱负效应到中性、小的正效应和强的正效应。在方法论上，本文与以往研究的不同之处在于，仅关注利率变化和通货膨胀对家庭资产负债表的直接效应。

papers.title: Do Credit Conditions Move House Prices?
papers.authors: Daniel L. Greenwald, Adam Guren
papers.abstract: To what extent did an expansion and contraction of credit drive the 2000s housing boom and bust? The existing literature lacks consensus, with findings ranging from credit having no effect to credit driving most of the house price cycle. We show that the key difference behind these disparate results is the extent to which credit insensitive agents such as landlords and unconstrained savers absorb credit-driven demand, which depends on the degree of segmentation in housing markets. We develop a model with frictional rental markets that allows us to consider cases in between the extremes of no segmentation and perfect segmentation typically assumed in the literature. We argue that the relative elasticities of the price-rent ratio and homeownership with respect to an identified credit shock is a sufficient statistic to measure the degree of segmentation. We estimate this moment using three different credit supply instruments and use it to calibrate our model. Our results reveal that rental markets are highly frictional and closer to fully segmented, which implies large effects of credit on house prices. In particular, changes to credit standards can explain between 34% and 55% of the rise in price-rent ratios over the boom.
papers.zh_title: 信贷条件是否推动房价变动？
papers.zh_abstract: 信贷扩张和收缩在多大程度上驱动了2000年代的房地产繁荣与萧条？现有文献缺乏共识，研究结果从信贷没有影响到信贷驱动了大部分房价周期不等。我们表明，这些不同结果背后的关键差异在于，对信贷不敏感的代理人（如房东和不受约束的储蓄者）吸收信贷驱动需求的程度，这取决于住房市场的分割程度。我们开发了一个带有摩擦性租赁市场的模型，使我们能够考虑介于文献中通常假设的无分割和完全分割极端情况之间的情形。我们认为，相对于已识别的信贷冲击，租金房价比和住房拥有率的相对弹性是衡量分割程度的充分统计量。我们使用三种不同的信贷供给工具估计了这一矩，并用它来校准我们的模型。我们的结果显示，租赁市场摩擦性很高，更接近完全分割，这意味着信贷对房价有巨大影响。特别是，信贷标准的改变可以解释繁荣期间租金房价比上升的34%至55%。

papers.title: The Human Side of Structural Transformation
papers.authors: Tommaso Porzio, Federico Rossi, Gabriella V. Santangelo
papers.abstract: We document that nearly half of the global decline in agricultural employment during the 20th-century was driven by new cohorts entering the labor market. A newly compiled dataset of policy reforms supports an interpretation of these cohort effects as human capital. Through the lens of a model of frictional labor reallocation, we conclude that human capital growth, both as a mediating factor and as an independent driver, led to a sharp decline in the agricultural labor supply. This decline accounts, at fixed prices, for 40% of the decrease in agricultural employment. This aggregate effect is roughly halved in general equilibrium.
papers.meta: Programs：DEV, ED, EFG, LS；JEL：J24, J43, J62, L16, O11, O14, O18, R23
papers.zh_title: 结构转型中的人的因素
papers.zh_abstract: 我们记录到，20世纪全球农业就业下降的近一半是由进入劳动力市场的新一代劳动力驱动的。一个新编制的政策改革数据集支持将这些队列效应解释为人力资本。通过一个摩擦性劳动力再分配模型的视角，我们得出结论，人力资本增长——既作为中介因素也作为独立驱动因素——导致了农业劳动力供给的急剧下降。在固定价格下，这一下降解释了农业就业减少的40%。在一般均衡中，这一总体效应大约减半。

papers.title: Interpreting the Will of the People: A Positive Analysis of Ordinal Preference Aggregation
papers.authors: Sandro Ambuehl, B. Douglas Bernheim
papers.abstract: Collective decision making requires preference aggregation even if no ideal aggregation method exists (Arrow, 1950). We investigate how individuals think groups should aggregate members' ordinal preferences—that is, how they interpret "the will of the people." Our experiment elicits revealed attitudes toward ordinal preference aggregation and classifies subjects according to the rules they implicitly deploy. Majoritarianism is rare while rules that promote compromise are common. People evaluate relative sacrifice by inferring cardinal utility from ordinal ranks. Cluster analysis reveals that our classification encompasses all important aggregation rules. Aggregation methods exhibit stability across domains and across countries with divergent traditions.
papers.zh_title: 解读人民意愿：序数偏好聚合的实证分析
papers.zh_abstract: 集体决策需要偏好聚合，即使不存在理想的聚合方法（Arrow, 1950）。我们研究个人认为群体应如何聚合成员的序数偏好——即他们如何解读“人民意愿”。我们的实验引出了对序数偏好聚合的揭示性态度，并根据被试隐含使用的规则对其进行分类。多数主义罕见，而促进妥协的规则普遍存在。人们通过从序数排名推断基数效用来评估相对牺牲。聚类分析显示，我们的分类涵盖了所有重要的聚合规则。聚合方法在不同领域以及具有不同传统的国家之间表现出稳定性。

papers.title: The Financial Fragility of For-profit Hospitals: Evidence from the COVID-19 Pandemic
papers.authors: Ge Bai, Daniel Jiménez, Phillip Phan, Luis E. Quintero, Alessandro Rebucci, Xian Sun
papers.abstract: We estimate the likelihood of financial distress of U.S. hospitals in 2020 due to the COVID-19 pandemic using AHA Annual Survey data for 2011-2019 and smartphone mobility data for 2020. We find that while the average likelihood of distress across all hospitals is 28.53 % in 2020, slightly increasing from 2019, for-profit hospitals are much more likely to be distressed. Their average likelihood of financial distress is 39.13 %---a 6.93 percentage point increase from 2019. For-profit hospitals are the main providers of specialty health care services, such as psychiatric and acute long-term care, so their increased likelihood of distress poses a risk to service provision in these specialty areas, and particularly in rural communities. Our prediction model based on mobility data performs very well in sample against actual data and can potentially help policymakers and hospital administrators to monitor financial distress in real-time when case mixes change, or other large shocks materialize.
papers.meta: Programs：CF, DAE, EFG, EH, PE；JEL：G3, H51, I1, R51, Z21
papers.zh_title: 营利性医院的财务脆弱性：来自COVID-19大流行的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用2011-2019年美国医院协会年度调查数据和2020年智能手机移动数据，估算了2020年因COVID-19大流行美国医院陷入财务困境的可能性。我们发现，2020年所有医院的平均困境可能性为28.53%，较2019年略有上升，但营利性医院更可能陷入困境。其平均财务困境可能性为39.13%——较2019年上升6.93个百分点。营利性医院是精神科和急性长期护理等专业医疗服务的主要提供者，因此其困境可能性的增加对这些专业领域（尤其是农村社区）的服务提供构成风险。我们基于移动数据的预测模型在样本内与实际数据表现良好，并可能帮助政策制定者和医院管理者在病例组合变化或其他重大冲击发生时实时监控财务困境。

papers.title: Risks and global supply chains: What we know and what we need to know
papers.authors: Richard Baldwin, Rebecca Freeman
papers.abstract: Recent supply disruptions catapulted the issue of risk in global supply chains (GSCs) to the top of policy agendas and created the impression that shortages would have been less severe if GSCs were either shorter and more domestic, or more diversified. But is this right? We start our answer by reviewing studies that look at risks to and from GSCs, and how GSCs have recovered from past shocks. We then look at whether GSCs are too risky—starting with business research on how firms approach the cost-resiliency trade-off. We propose the risk-versus-reward framework from portfolio theory as a good way to evaluate whether anti-risk policy is justified. We then discuss how exposures to foreign shocks are measured and argue that exposure is higher than direct indicators imply. Finally, we consider the future of GSCs in the light of current policy proposals and advancing technology before pointing to the rich menu of topics for future research on the risk-GSC nexus.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM, ITI；JEL：F10, F13, F14, F15, F23
papers.zh_title: 风险与全球供应链：已知与未知
papers.zh_abstract: 近期的供应中断将全球供应链中的风险问题推至政策议程的首位，并造成一种印象：如果全球供应链更短、更本土化或更多元化，短缺本不会如此严重。但这是正确的吗？我们首先回顾了研究全球供应链面临的风险及其带来的风险，以及全球供应链如何从过去的冲击中恢复。接着，我们探讨全球供应链是否风险过高——从企业如何权衡成本与韧性的商业研究入手。我们提出投资组合理论中的风险与回报框架，作为评估反风险政策是否合理的一种有效方式。然后，我们讨论如何衡量对外部冲击的暴露程度，并认为这种暴露程度高于直接指标所暗示的水平。最后，在指出未来关于风险与全球供应链关系研究的丰富课题之前，我们结合当前政策提案和技术进步，展望了全球供应链的未来。

papers.title: Bad Lighting: Effects of Youth Indoor Tanning Prohibitions
papers.authors: Christopher S. Carpenter, Brandyn F. Churchill, Michelle M. Marcus
papers.abstract: Indoor tanning beds (ITBs) emit UV light at high intensity and have been classified as carcinogenic to humans by the World Health Organization since 2009. We are the first to study the role of state laws prohibiting youths from indoor tanning using a difference-in-differences research design. We find that youth ITB prohibitions reduced population search intensity for tanning-related information. Among white teen girls, ITB prohibitions reduced self-reported indoor tanning and increased sun protective behaviors. We also find that youth ITB prohibitions significantly reduced the size of the indoor tanning market by increasing tanning salon closures and reducing tanning salon sales.
papers.zh_title: 不良光照：青少年室内日光浴禁令的影响
papers.zh_abstract: 室内日光浴床以高强度发射紫外线，自2009年起被世界卫生组织列为对人类致癌物。我们首次采用双重差分研究设计，研究禁止青少年进行室内日光浴的州法律的作用。我们发现，青少年室内日光浴禁令降低了人群对日光浴相关信息的搜索强度。在白人少女中，室内日光浴禁令减少了自我报告的室内日光浴行为，并增加了防晒行为。我们还发现，青少年室内日光浴禁令通过增加日光浴沙龙关闭和减少其销售额，显著缩小了室内日光浴市场的规模。

papers.title: A Temporary VAT Cut as Unconventional Fiscal Policy
papers.authors: Ruediger Bachmann, Benjamin Born, Olga Goldfayn-Frank, Georgi Kocharkov, Ralph Luetticke, Michael Weber
papers.abstract: We exploit Germany’s temporary three-percentage-point VAT cut in the second half of 2020 to study the spending response to unconventional fiscal policy. We use survey and scanner data on household consumption expenditures and their perceived pass-through of the tax change into prices and a HANK model to quantify the effects of this VAT policy. The survey and scanner data show that the temporary VAT reduction led to a relative increase in durable and, to a lesser extent, semi-durable spending for individuals with high perceived pass-through. According to the HANK model, the VAT policy increased total aggregate consumption spending by 4.3 percent on impact.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, ME, PE；JEL：D12, E20, E21, E62, E65, H31
papers.zh_title: 临时性增值税削减作为非常规财政政策
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用德国在2020年下半年实施的临时性三个百分点增值税削减，研究消费对非常规财政政策的反应。我们使用关于家庭消费支出及其对税收变化传导至价格的感知的调查和扫描数据，以及一个异质性代理人新凯恩斯模型，来量化这项增值税政策的效果。调查和扫描数据显示，对于感知传导率高的个体，临时性增值税削减导致耐用品支出相对增加，半耐用品支出增加程度较小。根据异质性代理人新凯恩斯模型，这项增值税政策在实施时使总消费支出增加了4.3%。

papers.title: Macroprudential Policies and The Covid-19 Pandemic: Risks and Challenges For Emerging Markets
papers.authors: Sebastian Edwards
papers.abstract: This paper deals with COVID and macroprudential regulations in emerging markets. I document the build-up of a sturdy macroprudential structure during 2009-2019, and the relaxation of regulations in 2020-2021, as part of the effort to deal with the sanitary emergency. I show that in every country, regulatory forbearance played a key role in the response to COVID. I discuss capital controls as macroprudential instruments. I argue that rebuilding the macroprudential fabric is important to reduce the costs of future systemic shocks. I maintain that post-COVID regulations should incorporate the risks associated with digital currencies.
papers.zh_title: 宏观审慎政策与新冠疫情：新兴市场的风险与挑战
papers.zh_abstract: 本文探讨新冠疫情与新兴市场的宏观审慎监管。我记录了2009-2019年间稳健宏观审慎框架的建立，以及2020-2021年间作为应对卫生紧急事件努力的一部分而放松监管的情况。我表明，在每个国家，监管宽容在应对新冠疫情中发挥了关键作用。我讨论了资本管制作为宏观审慎工具的作用。我认为，重建宏观审慎框架对于降低未来系统性冲击的成本至关重要。我坚持认为，疫情后的监管应纳入与数字货币相关的风险。

papers.title: Estimating the Economic Value of Zoning Reform
papers.authors: Santosh Anagol, Fernando V. Ferreira, Jonah M. Rexer
papers.abstract: We develop a framework to estimate the economic value of a recent zoning reform in the city of São Paulo, which altered maximum permitted construction at the city-block level. Using a spatial regression discontinuity design, we show that developers respond to the reform with short-run increases in filings for multi-family construction permits in blocks with higher allowable densities. In the medium-run we observe increases in housing availability and reductions in house prices in neighborhoods that were allowed more densification. Welfare is then estimated with an equilibrium model of housing demand and supply that allows for endogeneous housing regulation. We finding that, in the long-run, the reform produces a 1.9% increase in housing stock and a 0.5% reduction in prices, with substantial heterogeneity across neighborhoods. Consumer welfare gains due to price reductions are small, but increase 4-fold once accounting for changes in built environment, with more gains accruing to college educated and higher income families. However, nominal house price losses faced by landlords and existing homeowners overshadow all consumer welfare gains.
papers.meta: Programs：AP, DEV, IO, LS, PE, POL, PR；JEL：H0, O18, R0
papers.zh_title: 估算区划改革的经济价值
papers.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个框架来估算圣保罗市近期一项区划改革的经济价值，该改革在街区层面改变了最大允许建设量。利用空间断点回归设计，我们表明，开发商对改革的反应是，在允许密度更高的街区，短期内多户住宅建设许可申请增加。在中期，我们观察到，在允许更多密度化的社区，住房供应增加，房价下降。然后，我们通过一个允许内生性住房监管的住房需求和供给均衡模型来估算福利。我们发现，长期来看，改革使住房存量增加1.9%，价格下降0.5%，且各社区之间存在显著异质性。消费者因价格下降获得的福利收益很小，但在考虑建成环境变化后增加了四倍，更多收益流向受过大学教育和收入较高的家庭。然而，房东和现有房主面临的名义房价损失超过了所有消费者福利收益。

papers.title: Medication of Postpartum Depression and Maternal Outcomes: Evidence from Geographic Variation in Dutch Prescribing
papers.authors: Janet Currie, Esmée Zwiers
papers.abstract: Using data on over 420,000 first time Dutch mothers, we examine the effects of postpartum antidepressant use on a wide range of maternal outcomes including further treatment for severe mental illness, labor market outcomes, and family formation. We exploit rules which state that Dutch general practitioners (GPs) must be available to make house calls to their patients. In practice many therefore use postal code boundaries to limit their practices. We instrument a postpartum woman’s receipt of antidepressants with the propensity to prescribe antidepressants to women aged 46 to 65 among GPs in her postal code. Ordinary Least Squares estimates suggest highly negative effects of postpartum treatment with antidepressants, but this is mainly due to selection into treatment. Instrumental variable estimates suggest that the marginal patient treated with postpartum antidepressants is much more likely to continue taking antidepressants long-term, with little evidence of effects on other outcomes.
papers.zh_title: 产后抑郁症药物治疗与产妇结局：来自荷兰处方地理差异的证据
papers.zh_abstract: 利用超过42万名荷兰初产妇的数据，我们研究了产后抗抑郁药使用对一系列产妇结局的影响，包括严重精神疾病的进一步治疗、劳动力市场结果和家庭形成。我们利用一项规定，即荷兰全科医生必须能够为其患者提供上门服务。实际上，许多人因此使用邮政编码边界来限制其执业范围。我们以产后妇女所在邮政编码区全科医生对46至65岁女性开具抗抑郁药的倾向作为工具变量，来估计其接受抗抑郁药治疗的情况。普通最小二乘估计表明，产后抗抑郁药治疗具有高度负向效应，但这主要是由于选择进入治疗所致。工具变量估计表明，接受产后抗抑郁药治疗的边际患者长期继续服用抗抑郁药的可能性要大得多，而对其他结局的影响证据很少。

papers.title: The Economics of Medical Procedure Innovation
papers.authors: David Dranove, Craig Garthwaite, Christopher Heard, Bingxiao Wu
papers.abstract: This paper explores the economic incentives for medical procedure innovation. Using a proprietary dataset on billing code applications for emerging medical procedures, we highlight two mechanisms that could hinder innovation. First, the administrative hurdle of securing permanent, reimbursable billing codes substantially delays innovation diffusion. We find that Medicare utilization of innovative procedures increases nearly nine-fold after the billing codes are promoted to permanent (reimbursable) from provisional (non-reimbursable). However, only 29 percent of the provisional codes are promoted within the five-year probation period. Second, medical procedures lack intellectual property rights, especially those without patented devices. When appropriability is limited, specialty medical societies lead the applications for billing codes. We indicate that the ad hoc process for securing billing codes for procedure innovations creates uncertainty about both the development process and the allocation and enforceability of property rights. This stands in stark contrast to the more deliberate regulatory oversight for pharmaceutical innovations.
papers.meta: Programs：EH, IO, PE, PR；JEL：I0, I1, O3
papers.zh_title: 医疗程序创新的经济学
papers.zh_abstract: 本文探讨医疗程序创新的经济激励。利用一个关于新兴医疗程序计费代码申请的专有数据集，我们强调了可能阻碍创新的两种机制。首先，获得永久性、可报销计费代码的行政障碍显著延迟了创新扩散。我们发现，在计费代码从临时（不可报销）升级为永久（可报销）后，医疗保险对创新程序的使用增加了近九倍。然而，在五年试用期内，只有29%的临时代码获得了升级。其次，医疗程序缺乏知识产权保护，尤其是那些没有专利设备的程序。当可占有性有限时，专业医学协会主导了计费代码的申请。我们指出，为程序创新获取计费代码的临时性过程，在开发过程以及产权的分配和可执行性方面都造成了不确定性。这与药品创新中更为审慎的监管监督形成鲜明对比。

papers.title: The International Price of Remote Work
papers.authors: Agostina Brinatti, Alberto Cavallo, Javier Cravino, Andres Drenik
papers.abstract: We use data from a large web-based job platform to study how the price of remote work is determined in a globalized labor market. In the platform, workers located around the world compete for jobs that can be done remotely. We document that, despite the global nature of the marketplace, the worker’s country accounts for almost a third of the variance in remote wages. The observed wage differences are strongly correlated to the GDP per capita in the worker’s location. This correlation is not accounted for by differences in workers’ observable characteristics, occupations, or differences in the employers’ locations. Instead, data on wage-histories indicate that remote wages are partly determined by the conditions that workers face in their local labor markets. We also document that, as with internationally traded goods, remote wages expressed in local currency move strongly with the dollar exchange rate of the worker’s country, and are highly sensitive to changes in the wages of foreign competitors.
papers.meta: Programs：IFM, ITI, LS；JEL：F1, F2, F4, F6
papers.zh_title: 远程工作的国际价格
papers.zh_abstract: 我们利用一个大型网络工作平台的数据，研究在全球化劳动力市场中远程工作的价格是如何决定的。在该平台上，世界各地的工人竞争可以远程完成的工作。我们记录到，尽管市场具有全球性，但工人所在国家几乎占远程工资差异的三分之一。观察到的工资差异与工人所在地的人均国内生产总值密切相关。这种相关性不能用工人可观测特征、职业或雇主所在地的差异来解释。相反，工资历史数据表明，远程工资部分由工人在当地劳动力市场面临的条件决定。我们还记录到，如同国际贸易商品一样，以当地货币表示的远程工资与工人所在国的美元汇率强烈联动，并且对外国竞争对手工资的变化高度敏感。

papers.title: Women in Science. Lessons from the Baby Boom
papers.authors: Scott Daewon Kim, Petra Moser
papers.abstract: How do children affect women in science? We investigate this question using rich biographical data, linked with patents and publications, for 83,000 American scientists in 1956 at the height of the baby boom. Our analyses reveal a unique life-cycle pattern of productivity for mothers. While other scientists peak in their mid-thirties, mothers become more productive after age 35 and maintain high productivity in their 40s and 50s. Event studies show that the output of mothers increases after 15 years of marriage, while other scientists peak in the first 10 years. Differences in the timing of productivity have important implications for tenure and participation. Just 27% of mothers who are academic scientists get tenure, compared with 48% of fathers and 46% of women without children. Mothers face comparable tenure rates to other assistant professors for the first six years but fall behind afterwards, suggesting that they face higher standards of early productivity. Mothers who survive in science are extremely positively selected: Compared with other married women, mothers patent (publish) 2.5 (1.4) times more before the median age at marriage. Compared with men, female scientists are more educated, half as likely to marry, one-third as likely to have children, but half as likely to survive in science. Employment records indicate that a generation of baby boom mothers was lost to science.
papers.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, LS, PR；JEL：J13, J16, J24, N3, N32, O3
papers.zh_title: 科学界的女性：婴儿潮时期的教训
papers.zh_abstract: 子女如何影响科学界的女性？我们利用1956年婴儿潮高峰期83,000名美国科学家的丰富传记数据，并结合专利和出版物信息来探究这一问题。我们的分析揭示了母亲群体独特的生命周期生产力模式。其他科学家在35岁左右达到顶峰，而母亲在35岁后生产力更高，并在40岁和50岁保持高生产力。事件研究显示，母亲在结婚15年后产出增加，而其他科学家在结婚头10年达到顶峰。生产力时间节点的差异对终身教职和职业留存有重要影响。在学术科学家中，只有27%的母亲获得终身教职，而父亲为48%，无子女女性为46%。母亲在头六年的终身教职获得率与其他助理教授相当，但之后落后，这表明她们面临更高的早期生产力标准。在科学界幸存下来的母亲是经过极端正向选择的：与其他已婚女性相比，母亲在结婚中位年龄之前的专利（出版物）数量是其2.5（1.4）倍。与男性相比，女性科学家受教育程度更高，结婚可能性低一半，生育可能性低三分之一，但在科学界留存的可能性也低一半。就业记录表明，整整一代婴儿潮母亲在科学界流失了。

papers.title: The Global Distribution of Authorship in Economics Journals
papers.authors: Ernest Aigner, Jacob Greenspon, Dani Rodrik
papers.abstract: We assemble a dataset of the universe of economics and business journal articles published since 1980 to assess differences in the levels and trends of the global distribution of authorship in economics journals and citations by country/region, quality of journal, and fields of specialization. We document striking imbalances. While Western and Northern European authors have made substantial gains, the representation of authors based in low-income countries remains extremely low -- an order of magnitude lower than the weight of their countries or regions in the global economy. Fields such as international or development economics where global diversification may have been expected have not experienced much increase in developing country authorship. Developing country representation has risen fastest at journals ranked 100th or lower, while it has barely increased in journals ranked 25th or higher. Regression analyses suggest that articles by developing country authors are far less likely to be published in top journals even when holding constant article quality (as proxied by citation counts). Similar trends are observed in citation patterns, with articles by authors in the U.S. receiving far more citations, and those by authors in developing countries receiving fewer. These results are consistent with a general increase in the relative supply of research in the rest of the world. But they also indicate authors from developing countries remain excluded from the profession’s top-rated journals and that their research receives less attention from other economists.
papers.zh_title: 经济学期刊作者身份的全球分布
papers.zh_abstract: 我们汇编了自1980年以来发表的所有经济学和商业期刊文章的数据集，以评估经济学期刊作者身份全球分布的水平与趋势差异，按国家/地区、期刊质量和专业领域划分。我们记录了显著的失衡。虽然西欧和北欧作者取得了实质性进展，但来自低收入国家的作者比例仍然极低——比其国家或地区在全球经济中的权重低一个数量级。在国际经济学或发展经济学等可能预期实现全球多元化的领域，发展中国家的作者比例并未显著增加。发展中国家作者的代表性在排名第100位或更低的期刊中增长最快，而在排名第25位或更高的期刊中几乎没有增加。回归分析表明，即使控制文章质量（以引用次数衡量），发展中国家作者的文章在顶级期刊上发表的可能性也远低于其他国家。在引用模式中也观察到类似趋势，美国作者的文章获得更多引用，而发展中国家作者的文章获得较少引用。这些结果与世界其他地区研究相对供给普遍增加相一致。但它们也表明，发展中国家作者仍然被排除在该行业顶级期刊之外，且其研究受到其他经济学家的关注较少。

papers.title: The Debt Capacity of a Government
papers.authors: Bernard Dumas, Paul Ehling, Chunyu Yang
papers.abstract: In a deterministic overlapping-generations economy with production and physical capital, the market value of debt is not necessarily equal to the present discounted value of future budget surpluses: it can be positive without any budget surpluses being in the oﬃng, because debt incorporates a rational bubble. Yet the dynamics of debt remain a function of the dynamics of the primary budget deﬁcit. The true ﬁscal cost of excessive government debt issuance cannot be assessed just from the current rate of interest or any current macroeconomic variable. Rather, it should be assessed in a dynamic context reﬂecting anticipated deﬁcits and population growth going forward. As a way to study their joint behavior, we specify the variation of a structural deﬁcit in the form of an underfunded social-security scheme. We deﬁne debt capacity as the level of debt that can be just sustained without a change of policy all the way to an unstable steady state. When it starts below the capacity, the debt converges to a stable steady state, in which the bubble is sustained. Above capacity the bubble unravels and the deﬁcit cannot be ﬁnanced. In several realistic scenarios occurring in economies, we calculate the needed policy response, which is the true “ﬁscal cost” of exceeding debt capacity.
papers.meta: Programs：AP；JEL：E13, E43, E44, E50, E62, E63, H30, H62, H63, H68
papers.zh_title: 政府的债务承载能力
papers.zh_abstract: 在一个具有生产和物质资本的确定性世代交叠经济中，债务的市场价值不一定等于未来预算盈余的现值：即使没有预算盈余，债务的市场价值也可能为正，因为债务包含一个理性泡沫。然而，债务的动态仍然是初级预算赤字动态的函数。过度政府债务发行的真实财政成本不能仅根据当前利率或任何当前宏观经济变量来评估。相反，应在反映预期赤字和未来人口增长的动态背景下进行评估。为研究其联合行为，我们以资金不足的社会保障计划形式指定结构性赤字的变化。我们将债务承载能力定义为在不改变政策的情况下，能够刚好维持到非稳定稳态的债务水平。当债务起始低于承载能力时，债务收敛于一个稳定稳态，其中泡沫得以维持。高于承载能力时，泡沫破裂，赤字无法融资。在经济体中发生的几个现实情景中，我们计算了所需的政策响应，即超出债务承载能力的真实“财政成本”。

papers.title: The Geography of Retirement
papers.authors: Courtney Coile
papers.abstract: As Americans work longer in response to a changing retirement landscape, it is important to ask whether there are groups being left out of this trend. Geography is a natural lens through which to examine this question, given regional disparities in the employment of prime-age individuals. In this study, we explore the geography of retirement using data from the U.S. Census/American Community Survey and other sources. We find large differences across U.S. commuting zones in employment rates at older ages, with a gap of about 20 percentage points between areas at the 90th and 10th percentiles of employment. Low-employment areas are systematically different, with a less educated and more diverse population, more low-wage jobs and import competition from China, poorer health outcomes and health care access, lower government spending, and more income inequality. Although these correlations are not necessarily causal, these factors collectively can explain about four-fifths of the geographic variation in employment at older ages.
papers.zh_title: 退休的地理分布
papers.zh_abstract: 随着美国人因退休格局变化而延长工作年限，探究是否有群体被排除在这一趋势之外至关重要。鉴于壮年个体就业的地区差异，地理是审视这一问题的自然视角。在本研究中，我们利用美国人口普查/美国社区调查及其他来源的数据，探讨退休的地理分布。我们发现，美国各通勤区在老年就业率上存在巨大差异，就业率第90百分位与第10百分位地区之间的差距约为20个百分点。低就业地区存在系统性差异：人口受教育程度较低且更多元化，低工资工作岗位更多，面临更多来自中国的进口竞争，健康状况和医疗保健可及性更差，政府支出更低，收入不平等程度更高。尽管这些相关性不一定是因果关系，但这些因素总体上可以解释约五分之四的老年就业地理差异。

papers.title: Nonlinearities and a Pecking Order in Cross-border Investment
papers.authors: Sara B. Holland, Sergei Sarkissian, Michael Schill, Francis E. Warnock
papers.abstract: Nonlinearities can arise in international investment factors because of a pecking order in barriers. When direct barriers are severe, improvements in governance factors such as rule of law and expropriation risk can increase investment. Only when severe barriers are ameliorated can factors such as firm-specific information, transaction costs and hedging motives become more important. Evidence from unconditional quantile regressions provides support for a pecking order hypothesis, as we find that investment factors vary across the distribution. Specifically, our empirical results indicate that access to basic information is important everywhere, governance and familiarity matter where barriers are high, roles for information and hedging motives become more apparent where barriers are moderate, and where there are no barriers small improvements in governance have little effect on investment. Going forward, analysis should incorporate nonlinearities inherent in cross-border barriers and investment.
papers.zh_title: 跨境投资中的非线性与啄序
papers.zh_abstract: 由于障碍存在啄序，国际投资因素中可能出现非线性。当直接障碍严重时，改善法治和征用风险等治理因素可以增加投资。只有当严重障碍得到缓解时，企业特定信息、交易成本和套期保值动机等因素才会变得更加重要。来自无条件分位数回归的证据为啄序假说提供了支持，因为我们发现投资因素随分布而变化。具体而言，我们的实证结果表明，获取基本信息在任何地方都很重要；在障碍高的地方，治理和熟悉度至关重要；在障碍适中的地方，信息和套期保值动机的作用变得更加明显；而在没有障碍的地方，治理的微小改善对投资影响甚微。未来，分析应纳入跨境障碍和投资中固有的非线性。

papers.title: Exchange Rates as Trade Frictions: Estimates and Implications for Policy
papers.authors: James E. Anderson, Praveen Saini
papers.abstract: This paper improves on current treatment of exchange rate variation in quantitative trade models. Exchange rate changes with heterogeneous passthrough to buyers are embedded in the structural gravity model. Quantification on two digit annual bilateral trade data reveals real effects of exchange rate changes on producers that are substantial for some country-sector-time period observations. Real national income effects are small but not always negligible. Effective exchange Rates with Gravitas (ERGs) are introduced as theory-consistent indexes to guide potential policy remedies.
papers.zh_title: 作为贸易摩擦的汇率：估计与政策含义
